review_text: [college infrastructure]: the infrastructure of the delhi technological university is up to the mark with various amenities and facilities like it lab, library, auditorium, theatre, large playground etc. the campus of dtu is well maintained and managed regularly. the washrooms are clean and hygienic , and the water coolers are with clean and fresh water. overall it's very good. | [academics]: the academics of the delhi technological university are outstanding. the faculties here are very professional in their field and have a lot of experience in teaching. the curriculum is a little bit strict where if you haven't maintained attendance you can be detained. rules and regulations are good some may be in favor of students and some may not. | [placements]: the placement of delhi technological university is very much good. the placement cell here is very nice and transparent with students & gets updated on time. the average package for civil here is around 10-12 lpa while the highest package offered here is around 18-20 lpa which is phenomenal. overall placement part of the dtu is excellent.

i got the admission into college by the entrance test conducted by the lpu and then a merit list is coming on which i got 5400 rank and i got 80,000 scholarship and then gone to the college on the given date and then i verified my certificate and then i got the admission into the college for the fee payment the college counselors were present into the different statesno college is so good into every field like if say into the food, environment for living and etc. but on negative remark is that the food which is quite good and due to this reason the students were not taking the food from the mess but they use to buy food from other vendors.

the placements at thapar are good. the average packages go around 9.75 lakh ctc and it increases every year. around 200 companies visit thapar. if you are not able to get placed during your graduation year then thapar gives you one more chance to get placed. from the 6th semester, they start your placement training. and by the end of the 7th semester, 75% of students are placed. if you don't want to go for placements then thapar also provides an option for startups. they give a grant to startups and also you are guided by their special team for the same.many companies like jp morgan, tata, mahindra, maruti suzuki, tcs, amazon and many others visit thapar with internship and job offers. this year microsoft recruited students with a stipend of rs 125000 per month and a job offer with rs 51 lakh ctc. they also help students if they want to go for projects. this year a group of students and faculty made a satellite for the punjab government to monitor wheater for earth's low orbit.
college_name: Thapar Institute of Engineering and Technology - [Thapar University]

review_text: i selected this course personally because of the family pressure plus societal pressure. there are so many claims from this course that mostly all students try to get this course no matter what. and there are so many jobs in it so i selected it. there is decent faculty present on the campus but very strict in every manner so not too good thing but some faculty members are good too. these are very qualified faculty members depending on what they do maybe best in their department of liking. some have a very easy way of teaching and a fun way and some have a very careless way of teaching just like typical teachers. term exams are moderate and sometimes a little hard depending on how the teacher was who was teaching and did he was teaching properly or not. passing is mostly easy every teacher passes the student but again mostly depends on the teacher as i said faculty is strict.there are two main fests one tech fest is known as moksha and another is a cultural fest known as resonance. moksha is usually conducted in the month of march and resonance is usually conducted in the month of october or november. there are plenty of books and journals available for students in the library and are quite easy to avail. there is so much exposure to other things than studying like all sports are present plus are being taught by the coaches and there are many societies which also help in extracurricular activities. there is an app present named nsutx made by students for the student profile and mainly attendance and there are a few pages after college on instagram handled by the students.

[college infrastructure]: currently we can say that indian institute of information technology bhopal do not have its own campus area but it is currently being operated in the manit campus and all the facilities of manit are available for indian institute of information technology bhopal | [academics]: academics are too good way there are very supportive as well as very trained and knowledgeable professor as well the teaching ability of the faculties are way much better than expectations hope it was helpful | [placements]: placements are currently way too good at indian institute of information technology bhopal last year it was approx 99.6% and this year also after this much of recession our placements are way too good | [campus life]: currently there is no personal campus for indian institute of information technology bhopal but it is being currently operated in the manit campus and hope we would get our personal campus as soon as possible
college_name: Indian Institute of Information Technology Bhopal

review_text: pros/cons: campus , the way of teaching of the faculty , high tech labs etc high technology labs and the size of classroom. cafetaria food is hygienic and tasty . there were too many students in one section. the number of students were too much in all over campus. the university cafetaria food is little much expensive. | placement experience: elegible for placements is depend on your particular course but mostly you can particpate in placement in your last semester . there were several number of companies which visit in my collage the top companies are amazon paytm wipro etc. the highest pakage was 1.5 cr and the average pakahe is 4-6 lpa. approximately 90+% students were placed last year . my future plans are to join a big company like amazon, microsoft.

[college infrastructure]: our college infrastructure not so good, in boys hostel in which room is for two person three are alloted, wifi is given on every floor but internet speed is like streaming 360p video with buffering. our college have a digital library, in which each semester students can issue books.food quality is average in our hostels. | [academics]: i'm currently studying electronics and instrumentation engineering , because its a good branch after cs, ec in this college. the quality of teaching is not so good, professors come and read ppt or thier notes and go like other colleges. | [placements]: overall placements of our college is 90%, the highest salary package offered was 80lpa, to computer science student. the average salary offered was 12-13 lpa. yes ,the placement process was easy here, as our college has tnp(training and placement cell), which make it easy for students. | [campus life]: our college campus, its best features is its green environment, it has more than 20 lakes and some lakes are so beautiful .students can engage in many activities including sports like cricket, football, etc. our campus looks more beautiful when its raining. as its located at higher place in silchar there is no fear of flood. as here thunderstrikes often takes place .

jyc(jaypee youth club) is run by students of college itself. there are many more clubs like robotics, singing, dancing, coding, and sports. a fest called impression happens every year in the month of april. library is very well equipped and has collection of over 50k books and research paper. sports is area where this college lacks. you will get an indoor game facility but there is no proper facility for outdoor games like cricket and football.i choose this course because it's matches with current industry scenario. the faculty-student ratio is somewhere about 1:13. almost all teachers are phd qualified and we'll experience in the field of study. they start teaching from basic and lift you up to an advanced level. there are 3 exams in every semester known as t1, te and end sem. exams are a little bit on the tougher side you have to study at least 10 days before exam.
college_name: Jaypee Institute of Information Technology University - [JIIT]

review_text: pros/cons: campus is great, loads of opportunities everywhere, crowd is decent and most of the professors are pretty good. labs and classes are very well furnished, fully ac. hostels are very clean and pleasant. absolutely zero ragging, seniors are very helpful in most cases. everyone minds their own business. too hot most of the times, its hard to survive without ac many places to go to, but gets boring pretty quickly its a student-run tow, so you wont be having the experience of the real world, everything is easier here | placement experience: placements are decent when taking into account that recession is going on, placement percentage is arond 65 percentage across all branches. for computer raelated branches its more this year (2025), and median for cs branches is around 12lpa. students are eligible for placements from 7th sem onwards. highest package is said to be from microsoft(not confirmed officially) with a package of 52 lpa . took students from cce.

rendezvous four-day cultural fest - has celebrities like sunidhi chauhan, and benny dayal. tryst is an annual tech fest. literati, becon, and kaizen are some other fests also different clubs also regularly organize events and competitions. for eg. the debating society of iitd conduct stalwarts where basically students showcase their debating skills and compete with others. thus, every club regularly organizes such activities. also, sports are given great importance and are considered a central part of campus life, particularly through the general championship (gc) which is an inter-hostel sports competition. additionally, there is the inter-iit sports meet where all the iits compete against each other in various sports.as a first-year student, i have not had any personal experience with internships, but from what i have observed and heard, many students have been able to secure valuable internship opportunities with a wide range of companies. these opportunities have varied greatly in terms of compensation, with some companies offering staggering packages of up to 40 lakhs, while others offer more modest salaries. many of the companies that offer these internships are well-known and respected and provide students with meaningful and valuable roles that can help them develop their skills and gain practical experience in their chosen fields.
college_name: IIT Delhi - Indian Institute of Technology [IITD]

review_text: [college infrastructure]: the college boasts state of the art infrastructure with modern classrooms, advanced pabs, and a comprehensive library. it?s expansive campus includes recreational facilities, green spaces and cutting edge technology, fostering an environment conducive to learning and growth. | [academics]: for me my coding journey in this college was really good and there are very bare minimum chances that you are going to face any kind of problem in this university as the teachers are really experienced. | [placements]: our college has many placements. many companies visit our college. 95% of students got placed in many companies. many job roles offered are system marketing hr etc. companies like tcs, zoho, l&t, accenture, mindtree, etc., came here.
college_name: PDPM Indian Institute of Information Technology Design and Manufacturing Jabalpur

review_text: [college infrastructure]: college infrastructure the college infrastructure is very good. all academic blocks are well-maintained, with spacious classrooms and adequate facilities for a good educational experience. the hostel blocks are also decent for living. the mess maintains hygiene and we get some variety in our food choices. we have a massive library that has lots of academic books and journals, along with novels and magazines. we also have several grounds and gyms, a swimming pool, and an indoor sports building. | [academics]: vit vellore follows a rigorous cirriculum with multiple quizzes and exams, which can sometimes make it difficult to handle. it is up to date, and teaches us practical skills as well. we can choose our own faculty and create our own timetable, and most faculties are good at teaching. you also get a lot of research opportunities. | [placements]: placements i haven't experienced placements as i'm just in second year. but as per the data, and seniors i know personally, the placements are quite amazing. vit has a job for every student, based on how talented they are. the average package is around 8 lpa, and the highest was 1 cr+ in 2022, despite covid-19. besides placements, you can also prepare for competetive exams or study abroad, as vit has good brand value. value-for-money vit follows a category system based on viteee rank, so fees | [campus life]: campus life is decent. you can pursue a lot of things in college, from dance, to robotics and film-making. we have a lot of clubs which give you the chance to showcase your talent, and learn new things. we have multiple events throughout the year, which include webinars as well as cultural events. gravitas and riviera are our national-level fests. our campus location is also decent. vellore has lots of things to explore.
college_name: Vellore Institute of Technology Chennai Campus

review_text: [college infrastructure]: wi-fi is average in this college. laboratory is also very good quality with computers. classrooms are well-maintained. the library has many books. the quality of the hostel is good as compared to other colleges. the food quality is also better. | [academics]: our college have a good academics record with wide range of subjects are available here study.i have completed my bachelor's degree in engineering with specialization in chemical engineering from here and i must say that all the facilities are best. | [placements]: our college has excellent placements. every student of b.tech and it is placed with a good salary package. almost all students are placed. the highest salary package offered is 30 lpa and the average salary package offered is 8 lpa. | [anything else]: all the staff are helpful
college_name: Thapar Institute of Engineering and Technology Patiala

review_text: [college infrastructure]: laboratory equipments are obsolete and numbers are less compared to the students. library is great. food and living space are nice.. computer lab far better...and one thing... special labs in master's are not so good | [academics]: don't expect much from the teachers in classroom. you have to do your own. but teachers are friendly and helpful... they will help you whenever you ask..but some teachers are not good at teaching...so you have to master of that topic by yourself | [placements]: as for physics students...there are no good placements. you may find some companies...but they prefer engineering than physics...but if you have a course in electronics...you may have a chance... that's it | [campus life]: campus environment is the best part of it. you will feel the freedom of a bird here. teaching and non-teaching staffs are friendly and supportive.

[college infrastructure]: the infrastructure is not so modern. it's out of the city, hence it would be peaceful to study and the hostels are good to stay. the campus is big with slight greenery which makes you feel refreshed. | [academics]: mba faculty memebers are knowledgeable, always available when needed. they are helpful to clear the doubts. hope the college gets more qualified faculty members for (finance) stream. it will help both mutually. | [placements]: as the strength was less, 85% of the students were placed. companies like big 4s hire from our college. but for (finance) there were limited placements. in fact for marketing, most of them will be placed. even students are given opportunities to attend the pool campus drives.
college_name: Nitte Meenakshi Institute of Technology Bangalore

review_text: [college infrastructure]: till now its an amazing experiance to be a part of lpu , here we have the well qualified faculties and students from all over the world and btech in computer science and engineering is the most opted branch here . | [academics]: talking about the academics ,so i am satisfied with the structure of course and the well maintained classes .currently i am pursuing my btech in computer science and engineering ,in this branch you will learn about the programming languages ,html java css and many more subjects. | [placements]: placements are good here as i have heard from my seniors that the 90% of the placement registered students get placed during their final year and also in the third year they are getting chances to be a part of a company as an intern. | [campus life]: campus life is also good enough as the infrastructure is very good here at lpu you will be provided with good facilities inside the campus ,everything you can get inside the campus only.

[college infrastructure]: our college having great infrastructure with all the facilities are available. library is very well maintained with all books and papers you need with space to study there as well. hostels on the other hand really need serious maintainance. the food quality is very bad to average. drinking water is not very good as well. there are no well made tables or chairs in hostels, you have to buy them on your own. for sports there are 2 big grounds where you can play cricket and football. there is separate court for basketball and one for badminton. except these there isn't anything else in sports department. | [academics]: my course is masters of technology in geoinformatics engineering. the curriculum is designed for the benifits of students so that they get quality education in their field. well the course might be a little complicated which is the case for the most governments colleges. the course helps in students disciplined lives . | [placements]: students are eligible for placement from the college from third semester onwards. the average package is around 8lpa and highest package offered this year was 58lpa. many renowned companies such as google, amazon, microsoft, etc.for placement the college cell will ask you to register in superset website. from your superset account you can apply for job and internships in different comapnies. there are more than 20 companies visited for placement this year. arround 80 percent students from my department were placed last year. | [anything else]: my area of specialization is remote sensing
college_name: Indian Institute of Engineering Science and Technology Shibpur

review_text: pros/cons: the faculty were very much friendly and very knowledgeable in practical teaching the lab facilities is very good for the students to improve the coding knowledge. the time they are providing to study for exams is nice | course curriculum overview: the specific aspect which is great future on it field of the curriculum that influenced my decision to choose the course. the curriculum prepared me to solve tough real-world logical aptitude test and coding test. the course curriculum is only based on the theory in several areas.my suggestion is to improve that too in practical manner for better real-world understanding. the frequency and the timing of my exams along with my perspective on the difficulty level is 2hrs.

i am interested in both mechanical and electrical, so i chose mechatronics. our principal said (who is hod of my dept, he taking the class for this sem) " our college only first launched a mechatronics course in india, our college curriculum motto is to develop knowledge in both mech and electrical. the faculty ratio is 1:60. all the faculties are ph.d. holders. in all debt except our dept, there are 20 to 30 faculty per dept, but our dept has 11, which is minus but we have a principal. 120 students per class,10 departments,120 *4=480 students per dept, 480* approx 4800 students in college. faculty 25*15 =375, dept including math, phy, chem so the ratio is 375/4800=0.078. i checked my college website most of the faculty completed their ph.d. teaching method is 1) ppt presentation 2) using software 3) practical 4) sometimes oral there are 3 internal exams namely the cat exam, and 1 external exam per sem above have difficult to pass.first of all, our college is old around 70 years, so you can not imagine advanced infra, but old is gold, a very peaceful environment. there is n number of clubs. no ragging. i am not sure about fest because am a 1st-year student. enough book is available, the sad thing is there is no storybook. you can take a book for 2 weeks with you. the classroom has a 2-seated bench. have a projector and a peaceful environment. iot club.

[college infrastructure]: nit calicut is a good college. it has one of the best ambiance and infrastructure. nitc has one of the best classrooms, library,and hostels . it also have wifi inside hostel as well as in classrooms with good strength . | [academics]: i am a student in nitc studying master in business administration (mba). nitc provides a worthy mba programme and they prepare us for placements . there are several specialization available for mba in nitc | [placements]: term of placement excellent perform every year nit calicut come under the top institute even better than few iits for cse dept it's really very good college mba placement also very good every year lot of consulting, it, automobile, fmcg, bank visit to hire

[college infrastructure]: our college have all the necessary infrastructure ,facilities and equipment. all the facilities in the college are used and they are well maintained .wifi speed is not upto the requirement level but its enough for you to work or study from it. | [academics]: i am currently enrolled in metallurgy and materials engineering . the quality of teaching is very good . professors are very helpful and they will always listen to your queries. i think as per my knowledge the curriculum is very much updated along with all the recent development in the field. the curriculum of our will make us job-ready. | [placements]: the placement has been the best part of our college. the placement percentage of the college is great and in between 80-90 percentage. the highest package offered was 42 lpa and it went to computer science branch. the average salary offered was between 8-9 lpa .the placement process was easy and my college supported me in every manner possible | [campus life]: there are more than 50+ club in the campus and you can join anyone of the club and actively participate in their events. the students get all the sports facilities along with many other facilities. the location of the campus is great and it is very safe. it can handle emergencies

the fee structure could not be affordable to a few students. the educational loan can help. the per semester fee of btech is almost 2.3 lakhs. course affordability is not affordable to all. this year rcbs captain is faf du plessis and the women's rcbs team captain is smriti mandhana.campus life is very good. the campus is very large and explorable. it's around 250 acres and the infrastructure is also good. recently constructed apj blocks provide a good experience for studies. there is a number of societies present that a student can join to enjoy college life.

[college infrastructure]: the class rooms are big, but in most of the part of college construction is going on. the libraries are up to date you will find all kinds of book. the system of cse,ise,aiml are good but the laboratories in ece,eee are not that good most of time we are struggling to get the output. there is only one sports ground. | [academics]: the batch joining from 2022 are having chill academics. for us its 3 cie and 1 see. but the students have to gibe just 2 internals which will cover 60 out of 100 and rest 40 marks if for projects. this give you a total of 100 and if there is a lab subject 50 marks for lab. the final exam will be of 100 marks (called as see) and if lab then lab exam of 50 marks. | [placements]: the placements are really good in rvce no matter in which brach you are from you will be allowed to site in almost in each and every company placements exam. if you are in cse,ise,ece,aiml you will get placements for sure. | [campus life]: the campus life in rvce is almost average, you will have many test going in a semester but the college club will conducting events to bust you and give you energy.

[college infrastructure]: building of the university is very beautiful and big. it attracts the students towards the learning environment. classrooms are available with all necessary facilities like boards, seats, lights etc for the students. all the living spaces is clean and safe also food is hygienic. | [academics]: quality of teaching is very nice because teachers support the students and help them to solve out their problems regarding subjects or future also. curriculum is updated and also it includes all the recent developments and updates in the field. | [placements]: highest salary package was offered 45 lacs per annum to the engineering student and the average salary package was offered 3-4 lacs per annum and the process of placement is done through interview and group discussion round. | [campus life]: campus life is also nice and the location of campus is safe and it can handle all the emergencies.

the college has a decent fee structure for a prestigious private engineering institute. there are opportunities for scholarships as well if one does excellent in the mid sem exams. many of the students got scholarships upto 1,00,000 for scoring full in mid sem examthe college takes care of the recreational needs of the students. there are two fests annually - one technical fest which is called techovit and a cultural fest called vibrance. also, there are clubs of hundreds of different types and various sports championships

[college infrastructure]: mnit has all the necessary facilities for students. infrastructure is very good and classrooms are very well maintained. food available in canteens and hostel mess are very hygenic and suitable for students. | [academics]: i am studying metallurgical and materials engineering in mnit , i have keen interest in this branch though it is research oriented. teaching quality is good and i think curriculum must get updated as per some important entrance exams like gate, etc. and i think there must be some improvement in this branch to encourage research oriented programmes. | [placements]: good placements in mnit especially in metallurgical and materials engineering there is 100% placement in some reputed companies like tata and reliance etc. average package of placement is approximate 6 to 8 lpa.
college_name: Malaviya National Institute of Technology Jaipur

review_text: [college infrastructure]: i have mostly explored the entire campus and i find it hygienic and well planned overall in terms of being in top 10 nits in india. mess food is not at all good. sports faculties are decent. campus is spacious and classrooms well equipped with smart boards. on an average infrastructure is high end. | [academics]: being a government college in engineering academics is not compromised much. curriculum provides one mid sem exams and one end sem exams along with several quizzes and assignments. all streams have updated curriculum, and being in civil i feel here enough hands-on here. | [placements]: 2014 witnessed the highest package of all nits in india in svnit. 42 lpa was the package that year. an average package of 5+lpa is maintained here, as of my seniors told me. even chemical and civil students find their way out with some in core companies as well. | [campus life]: campus life is amazing here. the campus has good environment with several small or big events happening all around. the fest here is popular in south of gujarat. night life here is very nice if you own a cycle. the hostels and classes are far, but the cycle rides in morning are amazing. campus life is best.
college_name: Sardar Vallabhbhai National Institute of Technology Surat

review_text: there are multiple technical societies and events are there throughout the year here many cultural socieities are present which have colorful events throughout the year we have a 2 fests one of them is a food fest tff and the other is main fest saturnalia which is a technical culutural fest, equipments for many sports are present here which can be accessed using ur id card.there are hostels similar to 5 star hotels, boys hostels are spread throughout the campus and girls hostels are clamped together, academic block and cs block are clubbed with library and the library js huge hostels are good to stay but yes wifi sucks, really slow and blocked so many social media sites like telegram, rest is good.
college_name: Thapar Institute of Engineering and Technology - [Thapar University]

review_text: fees per semester are nearly 1.2 lakhs for the general category whose family income is more than 5 lakhs. and for general category students with a family income between 1 to 5 lakhs and all obc students get a remission of 2/3 of tuition fees which are 1 lakh per semester. and whose family income is less than 1 lakh will get full remission of tuition fees and a 100 per cent tuition fee waiver for sc /st / pwd students. and there are lots of scholarship here for students.life on campus is fun but academics here at iitk are more difficult than at other iits. fests time is too much enjoyable there is a total of 3 fests but something keeps going on campus for a year. lecture hall has ac and a lot of places on campus to study. sports and other facilities are great and there are too many clubs, societies, and teams run by the student body to discover and live their passion.
college_name: IIT Kanpur - Indian Institute of Technology - [IITK]

review_text: [college infrastructure]: campus is quite spacious , well decorated with nature and it's location in such prominent place makes it wonderful. most of the classes accomodate around 100 students while some of them accomodate around 250 students. classes are equipped with acs , wifi and charging points. whole campus covered with high speed wifi. hostel rooms are small and mess food is average in taste and quality. | [academics]: most of the teachers are excellent in their topic having knowledge in depth. they are helpful to the students . though our course curriculum is tough , we work hard to get upto the mark. our course curriculum has an industry day in which faculties organise industrial visit so that we can get the proper exposure to the industry. | [placements]: every student of our branch got placed and almost 80% of college student got placed in various profile of consultancy, r&d, management , finance etc bagging up maximum package of around 2 crores per annum and have average package of around 10 lacs per annum. our tnp cell guide well through out the placement scenario so that students have great future ahead. | [campus life]: we have excellent academics with helpful teachers , non teaching staff and seniors who guide us throughout our journey. it's location in south delhi makes it great . we have various fests and other events with thousands of footfalls which makes our college life excellent. we also have various sports club and cultural clubs to give opportunity to various hidden artists.

[college infrastructure]: all the necessary infrastructure facilities and equipment are available, well-maintained classrooms, laboratories, informative libraries, all in one sports center and hygienic hostel rooms including wifi,tv,fridge. | [academics]: academics and faculties are well learned and supporting. updated course structure and market related subjects. the quality of education is wonderful. the faculties are well learned and knowledgeable. academics are upto date in our campus. | [placements]: 80% of students were placed in our course. the highest package is 19 lpa, and the average package is 10 lpa offered in our course. amazon, tech mahindra, and others are the top recruiters. 80% of students got internships from our course at some opportunities. every student gets good placement.

[college infrastructure]: the facilities provided are really good. we have almost everything which an elite college has. from sports facilities to food courts we have everything. life in vit is very interesting and fun. we meet people from all over the world and make friends with them. | [academics]: we can choose our course and subjects on our own. each branch of students have a given of courses which they have to complete in order to get the degree. rest lies upon the students how they complete those courses. students can select any faculty and time slot as per their choice. | [placements]: vellore institute of technology is a very good college in terms of placements. the campus is really beautiful. we have a system known as ffcs which stands for fully flexible credit system. under this student can select their courses and teachers along with the time slot on their own.
college_name: Vellore Institute of Technology Chennai Campus

review_text: [college infrastructure]: in the laboratory, the equipment is old. washrooms are not clean. our classrooms are good and it also has air-conditioners. laboratory and personal computers are very old. cep building is good, and laboratory building is better. there are 3 main classrooms in our college. laboratory manuals are also available. | [academics]: teachers are excellent in our college. semester exams are tough as compared to other colleges. teachers also provide materials and books for studies. this college is good in academics and teachers teach well. | [placements]: our university is famous for its placements. around 90% of students got placed in our course. the average salary package offered ranges from 17 lpa - 18 lpa. google, microsoft, sprinklr, flipkart, d e shaw, amazon, morgan stanley, etc., are the top recruiting companies. almost 60-70% of students got placed, and the average salary package offered was 25 lpa.
college_name: Dhirubhai Ambani Institute of Information and Communication Technology Gandhinagar

review_text: pros/cons: the best part of college is the infrastructure such as hostels and grounds that they have. mess food is quite good as compared to other colleges . girls is to boys ratio is also very good . like for our 2027 batch its 1100 boys to 900 girls worst part is that there are many useless subjects in the curriculum such as psychology etc etc also one tging that hostel in time is till 8 30 pm only that the worst part of students life another thing is that there are not enough things in patiala to roam around like you seriously get bored there | placement experience: from 6th semester students are leigible for placements. here lots and lots of companies visit. even all these companies dont visit every iit like d.e.shaw,jpmc , morgan stanley etc etc. well d.e.shaw didnt made offer from last 2 years to our campus but its ok there are literally 100 of companies that visit. highest package last year was 54 lakhs as sde in morgan stanley. if you belong to computer branch then placement percentage is almost 90% but for other branches its 50-60%. if i did not get the placement i will be applying for software engineer offcampus.
college_name: Thapar Institute of Engineering and Technology - [Thapar University], Patiala

review_text: [college infrastructure]: fully air-conditioned lecture halls and library access to wi-fi also consist of smartboards, projectors, etc. the hostel rooms are quite good, having a study table, a chair, a tea table, a bed, cupboard, all basic amenities, access to high-speed internet, games a tv room and also a gym in the hostel. mess food is the to good ,and also canteen food . | [academics]: teachers are quite helpful and good . but all the teachers are well qualified and knowledgeable. the teaching quality is decent. this course curriculum is very relevant to .semester exams are quite difficult but you can prepare for them just one or two days before the exam, even if you have not attended the classes. almost more than 90% of students were able to pass the exams easily. | [placements]: the highest package is 1.5 crores, the top companies are microsoft, google, amazon, flipkart, etc. also, like placements, only 90% of student got internships in many big and small companies. the top roles offered in our course are software development engineering, hardware engineering, data science, and data analysis.

[college infrastructure]: back when i joined college in 2016, the infrastructure was really poor with 20 year old buildings standing but recently college is paying attention to this field so infrastructure is improving at a good rate. | [academics]: academics is kind of poor as we were made to study the subjects stated in a curriculum which was created decades ago and not updated since.. but recently with the coming of new director thankfully noticeable changes have been made. | [placements]: placement for branches cs it ece is fairly good as various tech giants like flipkart, amazon, microsoft visits campus for on-campus placements. whereas for other branches like mechanical, civil placement is just average. | [campus life]: campus life is just awesome consisting of a number of national level fests both cultural and technical. and even in sports our college teams has outperformed other colleges at various national level platforms.

this is an undergraduate course of 4 years duration of the study. that is divided into 8 semesters. i chose this college for this course because i was unable to get any nit because of my low rank, the cse engineering field has really a great scope today as well as in future times the professors are experienced but some faculty here are taken new that do not have much teaching experience exams are easy in naturethe campus is really huge with the very big green lush ground covered with beautiful grass the college also conducts annual fests and programmes for the students along with freshers and farewell parties the library is very modern with very good facilities and books various types of games and sports are being played at the campus by the students some social groups are also formed

review_text: [college infrastructure]: yes, here the infrastructure is so well maintained by the concerned authorities. we are getting the facilities of adequate laboratories, libraries, sports centre, hostels, and most importantly a sweet and beautiful campus, apart from the campus restaurants. here the entire campus is filled with greenery and good vibes. a must to be visited campus. | [academics]: some professors over here are exceptionally good. you will feel elated while the class going on. passion is what makes them different from everyone other. although not alike you coaching teachers, still you will be satisfied with the teaching faculties. | [placements]: about the placements, you can trust this institute. here students are getting placed in various reputed companies, and in various renowned institutes too if you are from science background. technical field placement is fully satisfactory. | [campus life]: the campus is one of the best thing at nitr. i guess the most beautiful campus you could ever get the chance to see. filled with greenery, a beautiful swimming pool, and a massive and glorious campus. one would surely be in trauma after being in the campus.

[college infrastructure]: this university is the top most university of greater noida, the university is really big and open. the rooms are highly furnished. canteen serve cheap and healthy food. the atmosphere of this university is really safe for all. the outside area of the classrooms are fully air conditioned. | [academics]: academics is really great here. faculties are highly educated. this university is considered as the top most university of greater noida. the teaching technique of faculties are great, they explain everything easily and with easy methods. they guide students for better results. i am pursuing ba eng honors. | [placements]: the placement service is great. there is a criteria for placement. in the third year people take many students for placement. salaries are offered according to their course and experience. many students are given placement and they are happy about it. they score well in their academics and get placement. | [campus life]: the campus life is awesome. the campus is really big and safe. students make many memories with their friends, have fun in free periods, have programs. the university is famous for inviting celebrities and have a great time with them. the programs and festivals celebration is too good. students enjoy a lot here. there are a lot of activities for students to get engaged in. the emergencies are solved on time. | [anything else]: i love being here in this university. i am proud to be a student of galgotias university.

[college infrastructure]: it is one of the best college in terms of infrastructure. it is situated in himachal pradesh into the mountains. weather is so soothing here and cold. college has good facilities like water and heater in every class. overall a good college. | [academics]: here i am currently doing my phd in computer science and engineering because i want to do research and contribute to the engineering. quality of teaching is quite good. every professor is experienced. curriculum is also updated. this study makes us job ready and hoping i will also get opportunity to teach somewhere as a professor. | [placements]: as i have heard here from my seniors that quality of placement is good overall so many students get placements from here. i am also hoping the same that i will be getting some opportunity to teach somewhere. highest placement record of this college is 32 lpa and average offered salary was 9 lpa. college training and placement cell is helpful towards students they support us too much. overall it is good college for placement.

[college infrastructure]: infrasture is good and all facilities are easily available....hygienic is also good ....wifi facilities is ok ....becuse of firewall system,,,you may not access some study material........although nice infrastructure. | [academics]: you have to be independent hre you cannot totally depend on teachers ....since teaching is good there are professional teacher with aleast 5-6 yrs of experience and some are more than of that.over all nice adcadmics. | [placements]: i get to know that placement are good ...since i am still studing.... so i am,not 100% sure last year there is 86% placements are avg package is 5-6 lakh ....and ad highest package is 44 lpa sincwe these all are records. | [campus life]: campus life is awsome.

review_text: [college infrastructure]: wi-fi facility is there throughout the campus . it is completely free , and a huge amount of internet can also be used . the campus is exceptionally good . and classrooms are huge and really provide you with a feeling that you are studying in the college . some classrooms can accommodate 250-500 students also . most of the rooms have an accommodation capacity of 100-150 students . | [academics]: most of the teachers here are super qualified and are extremely knowledgeable in their respective fields . they are very helpful to students to talk with them and discuss problems . the course curriculum is very challenging and tough.but if we work hard , then it is very easy to get good grades . | [placements]: over 90% of students from mechanical department were offered placements in various companies . the average salary package offered was around 8 lpa . the highest salary package offered was maybe around 1.5 crores , and i am not sure , but it could have been around 2 crores also . | [campus life]: overall , i had a great experience so far in this college .

[college infrastructure]: college have very nice and good infrastructure with all facilities and labs and library are also very good...there are smart classrooms and good hostels which are well maintained and wifi is also available. | [academics]: our curriculum is up to date and includes all the recent developmets if this field which i'm studying. i'm a student of mba department and teaching quality of our department as well as college is outstanding.. | [placements]: nit hamirpur is known for its outstanding placements .. depending from student to student and department to department...every year nice placements are done for students which totally depend upon their hard work also placement process is easy. | [campus life]: nit hamirpur has a very good campus which is around more then 12km ... everything has been provided inside the campus ...students , teachers, support staff everyone is very helpful there...location is also very good and safe .

my course electronic and communication is one of the hardest courses out here but in the first year, everyone has the same subjects. you have to start studying at least a week before exams to score better in these exams. faculty members are qualified but their teaching methods are not that greatinternship opportunities are also very high in dtu we are just first years so we don't know much about it but what we have heard is that you can get an internship if you work hard but the percentage of students that get internships is pretty low

[college infrastructure]: the infrastructure is very good. our campus is huge. all facilities are availabe. our campus is wifi enabled. drinking water facility is available. laboratries are good and big. there is a huge library in this college. the food served in the mess is decent. big canteen available in this college. medical fecilities are not well-devloped. sports are conducted in this college. | [academics]: teachers are well qualified most of the teachers are ph.d holders and it reaults into impressive teaching quality. course curriculum is well which gives real learning experience to students. and become a industry ready and give you a real world experience. | [placements]: a large number of students secure placement in top companies such as deloitte, ubs, aditya birla group, kpmg and many more. the highest salary package offered is 7 to 9 lpa. average salary package offered is 4 to 6 lpa. and the lowest is around 2.5 to 3.5 lpa. students recieve comprensive training in aptitude, group discussions and personal interviews prior to placement. | [campus life]: college campus is great. every where is positive nature and fresh environment in this college. all activities are celebrated in this college was just soo perfectly and every student participate the event was compulsory. college located in the main of mumbai city thats why it is soo safe for every student specially for girls.

good placements are here in the core. gujarat is the chemical hub of india, so placements are very good. faculty qualifications are good, they are ph.d. holders and some are top scientists in india. exams are conducted twice a sem.the fee structure is very high for those who don't have any scholarship but if you have a scholarship and family income less than 5lpa or less than 1lpa, your scholarship depends upon your state of eligibility and your cast.

review_text: pros/cons: i liked the lack of population here which helps us learn more and participate more effectively i liked air conditioned hostels which were provided in this severe hot climate of bhilai. lack of sports culture in the campus due to studious students not alot but there's a bit of politics over here where the heads try to incubate their own people | placement experience: placement scenerio is pretty nice compared to the other third gen iits. all the placement stats are also available at the college site and we provide with student brochure at the beginning of the odd semesters which includes all the details.

review_text: you can assume that every course fees are same of rs 2.20 lakh for the first year. yes, university provides scholarships for students who had a family income less than from benchmark mark of the rupee just they have to show valid documents that show their eligibility to grant scholarships. on campus, you could have lots of opportunities to grab internships and also gets a chance to work with startupsyes, you will experience a very good life on the campus as talking about social life you will interact with international students and also the student from the master's background and from the design background there are lots of students to talk to elaborate your skills. one of the most famous annual fests is engifest and recently we had a literature and film fest we called it yuvaan23

[college infrastructure]: this campus is equipped with high speed internet, library, medical facilities, sports centres, gymnasium, labs and furnished classrooms. good quality facilities are provided in the hostel. food, mess, canteen everything is quite exceptional. | [academics]: apart from a very very few, most of the faculty members are interested in teaching and are very good at it. the course curriculum is diverse and designed in such a way that students get all necessary knowledge before joining the industry. | [placements]: top recruiting companies like microsoft, google, tcs, infosys, apple, tech mahindra, cognizant, manhattan associates, snapdeal, flipkart, amazon, myntra, and paytm visit our campus for our course placements. almost all the people who study at least decently get placed especially if they have some extracurricular skillsets relevant to the profiles offered including projects or internships.

[college infrastructure]: infrastructure wise it is the best college in kolkata because i have seen other similar college which are not as good as heritage institute of technology. facilities are also good. there are several common room where many games can be played. | [academics]: academically it is a good college. wbjee top rankers joined this college so there is also a healthy competition between the students. all the professors here are highly qualified with doctorate degree , and they are mostly very effective in teaching . | [placements]: placements are good and around 90% of student got placed. highest salary package offered is through off-campus , and i think it from biju's. many companies like sankalp semiconductors, tech mahindra and ibm provided a satisfactory salary package. | [campus life]: the campus is very big lots of playground, basket ball ground, swimming poll is there. it is in the center of kolkata so it is very safe. lots of extra curricular activity done here.

the fee structure is a bit of a pinch on the pocket considering this is a government college. nonetheless, the facility and the networking opportunities in my opinion give you a bang for the buck you put on the line. college is as much a space to study but is also a hub of networking with people who even 5 or 6 years down the lane would help you out giving a push to your career in the right direction. plus for many students who can't afford it right away, the college has provisions for many scholarships and schemes for relaxation and easy loan lending which is a great boon.curriculum and faculty here are a hit or miss. some are way too good with students, others might have their walls up and be strict to the teeth with their methodology and teaching. but nonetheless, the faculty has always been made of qualified individuals with some of them being one of the best in their streams. exams are straightforward if you're continuously revising and doing what the teachers are teaching.

[college infrastructure]: infrastructure of this college is very well maintained and developed. there are multiple workshops and physical laboratories for practical work. the library is also having lots of books with good designing layout at the canteen area. | [academics]: yes, the course curriculum is relevant and prepares you for the industry. the difficulty of semester exams is moderate, with a pass percentage of 98 percent in almost every subject. they are student friendly. | [placements]: the stipend varies from rs. 7,000 to rs. 15,000. companies that visit the college are brands like hdfc, itc, zoho, etc. the placement record is good. the college provides great opportunities, and it's up to you to grab the opportunities. | [campus life]: campus life is good. | [anything else]: nothing

review_text: i chose this course because have an interest in cse and expect a good future in this. we cannot define faculty with student ratio because there lots of students in the university but each section of the class have 65 students and 1 teacher for one-course code. all faculty qualified with p.hd and their teaching is quite good. for term two main exams, there is a little bit tough to pass.the placements in my college are very good. if a student wants only a degree doesn't come to this university, for improving skills you can come to this university. you will learn many about career guidelines and so many, others after coming to this. they are such big companies like google, amazon, ibm, tesla, microsoft, etc.. were offered the highest packages up to 65 lakhs per annum.

[college infrastructure]: high tech computer labs, high speed lan connection, wifi router in hostel, libraries with more than 3000 books and many more things are in the pipeline. hostels are well equipped and well maintained and proper sanitation and hygiene are taken care. mess food is also nice although it can't be compared with home food. | [academics]: latet bit of circulam and revised syllabus. industrial training and more emphasis on practical and real time work gives and makes you job ready. students are made ready for every future jobs not for past and that makes it unique. | [placements]: given almost on of highest package in india. most of companies that visit campus are mnc and almost give 100% job placement for most of branches. cse and ece branch students although gets 100% placed with an average of more than 12 lakh which is highest and other branches still follow up. | [campus life]: every college life is interesting part and most memorable too. new friends, gossip and friendly environment, supportive faculty makes it even more memorable. every month sth goe s in campus that makes it pretty much interesting and interactive too. college fest and various competitions are organised.

review_text: i chose this course because of my interest in chemistry but after the first class, it's more of physics and maths rather than chemistry. faculty are qualified and knowledgeable but not that interactive. we mostly go for youtube videos for our academics because it's so difficult to get into the flow of lectures. our first semester lasts just for 3 months, classes started on 27th oct and we had mid term exams from 9th to 13th dec and now we are having end term from 1st to 8th feb.cognizance, shristi, and thodi are some of the fests of iit roorkee. there any many clubs which you can join depending on your interest hacking clubs, literary clubs, fine arts, robotics, everything is here. ilt-r has a huge library with a vast collection of books.
college_name: IIT Roorkee - Indian Institute of Technology - [IITR]

review_text: [college infrastructure]: the institution might have basic facilities in place, it seems to lag behind in providing state-of-the-art infrastructure that matches the standards of other top institutions. facilities such as modernized classrooms, well-equipped labs, and a vibrant campus atmosphere are essential for holistic learning, and there might be a need for further investments in this aspect. improving the infrastructure could enhance the overall educational experience for students. | [academics]: the institution offers a range of technical and engineering programs with a faculty known for their expertise in various fields. while the curriculum is comprehensive and designed to provide a strong foundation, some students may find that certain courses lack depth or practical relevance. the overall academic environment is conducive to learning, but there might be room for improvement in terms of research opportunities, interdisciplinary studies, and more industry-oriented approaches. | [placements]: the placement aspect of iit bhubaneswar is its weakest point, the institution appears to face challenges in providing satisfactory placement opportunities to its students. factors such as industry connections, career counseling, and skill development programs may need to be strengthened to better prepare students for the job market.

[college infrastructure]: institute has a good infrastructure with all the necessary facilities like gym, canteen, football ground, basketball court,all the indoor games,wifi in hostels ,well maintained library,ac classrooms, nescafe, well maintained department buildings etc . | [academics]: academics is good as it's one of the prestigious institute in india. most of the professors here are highly qualified and have practical knowledge. recently the curriculum has been updated for b.tech first year students . the curriculum here focuses on making you job ready in terms of hard skills . | [placements]: placement here are very good. all the big mnc's visit the campus such as microsoft,google, goldman sachs,flipkart,amazon etc . highest package in 2022 was 1.2cr at amazon,150+ companies hired the students from this institute, 50+ companies offered ctc of 10 lakh or above . highest stipend of 1.25 lakh per month was offered for internship at microsoft. | [campus life]: campus life is good. if you are interested in sports you get here football ground, basketball court, vollyball court , gymnasium,indoor games such as carrom,chess etc. there is a well equipped gym inside the campus. there are canteens , night canteen, nescafe, snackers etc. zomato also comes in the college . you will get travel facilities very easily outside the campus. the connectivity with city is good
college_name: Dr B R Ambedkar National Institute of Technology Jalandhar
