review_text: in mid-may, they conducted an annual fest that is unifest in which many celebrities came. the library is large enough and we can take any books for at least 23 days. books are always available. some of the books are old edition books. they are installing acs in every class but now there are no acs. there are comfortable chairs and desks. there are various sports grounds and accessories that students can avail themselves like football taekwondo etc galotians student council and galgotian are the instagram handle that is run by the students.i was interested in this course and i took computer science in my 12th class also. there are enough teachers and the faculty-student ratio is around 1:60. i think it is the average ratio that all the colleges have. many of the faculties are double docterate and many of them are passed from iits and nits. some of the teachers are well enough and helping. it could be better if there are 5-month semester classes and if the student has the basic knowledge about the subject and practice they can pass.

[college infrastructure]: college infrastructure is good. whole campus is wifi enabled. good roads connecting every building. there are buildings from pre-independence period which looks great. the laboratories are well maintained, you'll get site visita under the guidance of best professors. hostel food is good, not like other colleges. you'll get to try different types of food from west bengal and also from pan india. cleanliness is well maintained in the whole campus. | [academics]: the college has ranked 21 in nirf 2020. and particularly in architecture the college ranks 6th in the nirf architecture college ranking. its one of the oldest colleges in india and is still at top most position in academics. | [placements]: placements are decent. with cst and it students getting the highest number of placements with good packages. number pf multinational companies come for placement to this college. overall placement is decent. average salary offered is around 4-5 lpa. | [campus life]: campus life in this college is awesome. you will love it. the lakes in campus, the iconic clocktower inside the campus, the trees and the historic buildings helps in building great memories for the students.the view of iconic howrah bridge looks great.ganga river ghats near the college is a great place to chill and spend time with friends. the botanical garden next to the campus provides fresh air to the surroundings also keeps the environment cool helping in tackling the heat of kolkata.
college_name: Indian Institute of Engineering Science and Technology Shibpur

review_text: [college infrastructure]: the college infrastructure is quite good in most of the cases. however, in some labs the equipments are very old or very limited. so we end up working with faulty equipment or working together in a large group. but one can still go in free hours to do the experiments again. | [academics]: although i was an ece student, i studied multiple courses in cs and take some cs electives as well. i particularly don?t like studying ece but as far as i can say, the quality of ece professors here is not that good. we end up learning notes or watching nptel videos. but not all professors are same. their were few good professors and tas who helped me a lot. | [placements]: everyone gets placed. but you need to at least prepare for 2 months before placements. ece companies are rare in college, but that?s because not everyone is interested in ece (at least in my batch). if you are good in ece, you will get placed in ece company. on the other hand, it companies come in college in huge numbers. so, if you are not sure where you want to apply , prepare for it companies.
college_name: Indian Institute of Information Technology Allahabad

review_text: [college infrastructure]: i don't know whether it's called legacy or it's the negative side of this college, the moment you enter pec you will see hundreds of year-old buildings, this same thing is with iit roorkee but they had balanced it well by integrating their legacy infra with new and modern architecture, this is where pec lost in infra, now i have seen pec is going on the same path as of iitr and building new hostels, auditoriums,mess,classroom if you join pec in 2023, you will definitely see a new modern pec. | [academics]: i am from the metallurgy department, teachers are neither good nor worst, it depends from teacher to teacher, the curriculum is too old and not related to industry requirements, and the curriculum will not make you job ready, as metta doesn't have a strong core, so you will have to study consultancy, finance by your own for placements though seniors will guide you. | [placements]: see i am from metallurgy and i will definitely recommend you to take metallurgy in pec over cse in any private college because the median of metta this year was around 10lpa which is very as compared to cse in private colleges(3-4lpa), overall branches package was 16.7lpa, highest was 83lpa(cse) on campus and off campus was 1.5cr(ee student) | [campus life]: the campus of pec is quite vibrant with events happening almost whole year. the campus is full of greenary buildings are just in pockets in between. there is every type of activity for every type of student so that's awesome. there is very little support and almost everything is managed by students, exams are conducted by m.tech and phd students and some are even faculty. this location is the best part of pec and may be the reason of it's success. hospitals and police services are available.

pros/cons: badminton ground i used to play badminton every weekend basketball ball ground it looks good and we can play any time table tennis board which we play on a room hostel mess food is the worest food i had eaten water had been on the roads when the rain is heavy classes are every bad and benches are good | course curriculum overview: the curriculum we had been going through is the worst curriculum it had been many useless subjects like physics and automata and many other subjects and then now our junior's had been going through the good curriculum

[college infrastructure]: outstanding buildings, laundry, mess, labs, grounds, halls, fields, moot court, canteens, classrooms, mac lab, dell lab, nvidia lab, etc. fully air conditioned indoors including each and every buliding, bery excellent cleaning management. overall, a very good infrastructure experience. wifi speeds not so good though. | [academics]: im currently persuing in b tech cse, some teachers are very skilled, some are average, but overall the faculty is good enough. most of the teachers are very supportive and helping, but again, some of them are not up to the mark. | [placements]: its the second convocation of my course in the college but there is no such lead on the placements are in our college. not much transparency, we dont know how much people are getting recruited and how much they have been offered.

the annual fest is riviera conducted in feb the tech fest is gravitas conducted in sep vit is having a very big library named periyar evr central library vit is also having a digital library and all the books which are related to your courses are available there in all classes projectors are their attendance is taken by the biometric system and there are smart classrooms which are having ac and a proper seating arrangement there are 80+ culbs and chapter which helps you to improve your skills there are so all sports activities and a proper place to play in the 400acre campusmy course is it and my interest in it so i had taken there is a lot of crowds but there are so many good faculties all the faculties in vit are phd holder in vit cat1 cat2 and fat this is the pattern cat - continuous assessment test fat - final assessment test

[college infrastructure]: nit patna has seperate mechanical branch . hostel and all the department are well equipped with wifi. it has average rating in cleanliness. we have various hostels each have high speed wifi and proper sanitation with average cleanliness. most of the classrooms have acs and projector.we have a stadium where we have various sports events. | [academics]: we have american society of automotive engineer (asme) and society of automotive engineer (sae) where students design and fabricate various models to take part in national level competition. lab condition is not so good as various machines are not in operating conditions though workshop is quite good. we have outdated syllabus though with the helps of interactive professors we try to build a culture and become job ready. | [placements]: about 80% of the current batch got placed bagging highest package of around 42 lpa by cse branch students. for mechanical branch we have recuriters like tata motors, maruti etc. this year about 60% of mechanical students got placed with average salary of 5 lpa. | [campus life]: we have various clubs which enhances our practical skills. we have helpful seniors, faculties and non-teaching staffs who guide us in various issues other than attendance and marks . there is a big hospital nearby our college named pmch to cope with emergencies. it's location is quite interesting,located on the banks of river ganga. we also have various extra curriculum activities in the campus itself. the campus is located in the centre of city with all facilities available nearby.

[college infrastructure]: this college has best quality of infrastructure and facilities for students. classroom are good, smart board are not available but only projector is present , but that's fine. college is also very clean in area. everything is well maintained. | [academics]: i have done my mba from here this year only. and the quality of teaching is average here. as some teachers are not that good in teaching. curriculum of this college is not good, but yes there are recent developments in the field. | [placements]: the quality of placements are average here as our batch was so small, still they were not able to provide us good jobs. average for us only 5 lakhs here highest was 9 lakhs per annum. placement process here was very bad.

the college curriculum without a doubt is at par. the curriculum follows all kinds of latest developments. the curriculum covers all the topics and is the proper picture of technical and management knowledge. the curriculum is designed in a way that we are aware of all the outcomes of the corporate world and it prepares us as future technicians and engineers. the faculty of the college are very knowledgeable. the faculty have completed their phd degree from the prestigious college of india. the faculty is the one that also helps us a lot during the assignments and motivates us to take part in the college's various activities.in a very short period of time, the college has understood the importance of placement quality in terms to compete with the top iits in india and the college placement committee and the college management work together to improve the college placement quality. the college maintains a record of 100% placement and the college's highest placement offer is around 43 lpa and the average salary offer is around 17 lpa. the faculty members of the placement committee are highly experienced and well qualified to handle any kind of responsibility.
college_name: IIT Jammu - Indian Institute of Technology - [IITJ]

review_text: [college infrastructure]: ju have good infrastructure, having all required facilities like drinking water to electricity , board and chalk to projector in every class and all required equipments. laboratory contains all type of equipment required and all type of machines or computers in each. each department contains it's own library instead of central library. it has sports centre , 2nd campus have cricket ground also , with well maintenance. in case of cleaning i would rate 3.5 out of 5. | [academics]: i'm studying b.e. in metallurgical and material engineering , because it is best branch i have got during counselling (gmr 1338 in 2018 ,when 90% domicile is not imposed in college) . yes our curriculum is updated every month , includes all developments in field , in each sector . yes, this college makes you job-ready, this is quality of this college. | [placements]: placement is very fine . approximately 60-75% students got placement from college or ppo. highest package offered is of 58lpa (by google to a student from computer science) . average package of cse is 20.77lpa and metallurgy is 5.67lpa . this is data of 2020 batch. | [campus life]: college campus life will got rating 6/5 from my side . because their is freedom , lot of freedom . here everything is in hand of student council , their is no pressure of attendence like 75% or 60% , even some students came college only one lab or with 20-25% attendance , they sit in semester exam. all students , teachers , staffs are humble . since last few yrs. this college lost diversity , that's very worst for colleges . it is 101% safe. yes it handle all type of emergency.

the social life is good in college. there is an annual fest bitotsav in which people come from many colleges to attend and many famous people come to perform. the name of the tech fest is pantheon which is the best in jharkhand. there are a lot of books available in the library but the library is not open 24 hours a day. the classrooms are air-conditioned and many sports facilities are also available. the club culture in bit mesra is great there is a lot of competition for joining elite clubsstudents become eligible for placements in the 6th semester when the companies start coming. there are a lot of companies coming with overall 85-90% placement overall. in the mechanical department, the average package of 2023 placement in 9 lacs and the highest is in oracle with 18 lac ctc. in mech, almost 90% of students got placed.

[college infrastructure]: my college nit rourkela , is one of the top most institute of our country. my college have all the necessary infrastructure and facilities which should be there in a tier 1 college. cleanliness is given the top priority in our campus. all the hostels , classrooms , are well maintained and hygienic. | [academics]: i am a studying electronics and instrumentation in nit rourkela . i always wanted to learn about electric circuits and machines and to know abut complex mechanisms in an electronic a gadget. the teaching faculties are very friendly and are always ready to solve your queries . | [placements]: placements stats are also awesome of my college . average package of my department is approx. 11 lakh per annum , which is definitely great. the highest package was of cs branch which was 42 lakh per annum . | [campus life]: campus life is the most important part of an student . the campus size of nit rourkela is too large . it takes few months to explore every part of the college. the college schedule is tight and we have compulsory attendance factor . but when we have free time we have a lot places to chill out .

[college infrastructure]: yes our college is having all the necessary facilities, infrastructure and equipments which helps the students in their studies. even all the living spaces are clean in our college and also the food is hygienic. | [academics]: i am currently doing b tech from lovely professional university. and the quality of teaching is very good in lpu. their way of making students understand about their studies is so appreciable. and also their curriculum is updated | [placements]: the quality of placements in our college is good . like if we try to look around, our university offers a minimum of 7 to 8 lakh per annum package which is good enough. if we look at the percentage of students then 70 % of students get placements.

[college infrastructure]: the college infrastructure is great. new infrastructure is being added at a very fast pace and the labs are well equipped with all the necessary items and latest instrument. the hostels are good also. | [academics]: the academics are great and the syllabus is up to date. the teachers are very friendly and they support us a lot and help us find the solution of the of our problems. therefore it's great to have them as our company. | [placements]: the placements of our college is outstanding and the placement cell works hard a lot. the placement statistics is great enough across all the branches. the packages are lucrative and top companies offer high ctc on the on campus rounds

as amity university is a private university, curriculum and exam structure are differ than government colleges. from my opinion the course that our college provided are far better than government colleges. they can provide the subject and syllabus which are necessary and highly useful in our career. for example we can able to learn ai/ml, python,c,c++, lot in our college as subject wherein in other colleges these are not in their curriculum. also exam structure are slight different. we have mid 1, mid 2 exam of 40 marks, which comes 2-2.5 months every semester. then we have final exam of 100 marks every semester. after that there's practical exam of 100 marks and finally viva, which are conducted by external faculty. we are getting results by estimating all marks, attendence, overall behavior, manuals, assignments, submission. there's is spi and cpi system in our college, so we get result out of 10.faculties in our college are very supportive and interactive.in january, there is kite fest in which students get together in the ground and flies the kites and enjoy.in march we have an annual function at our college named: galore . so much fun is there galore. there is dance, drama, singling, role play, games like cricket, badminton, tennis, chess, volleyball, racing etc. in october we have tech fest every year. in tech fest there are different kind of technical and non technical events. for every branch we have event by which we can enhance our skills and clear fundamentals in tech.events.also poster presentation is there in which we can showcase our ideas are realistic and useful, we can get fund from the college to implement our ideas. there is convocation, foundation day, and many more events are there.

[college infrastructure]: the infrastructure is very good. the college promises looks very attractive and the faculties are very cooperative. all the faculty members are highly qualified. laboratories are well maintained and highly equipped. | [academics]: the course are very broad. all the major courses are available and the faculties are highly qualified. we are very happy with the quality of education we are getting in the university. all the laboratory are functional. | [placements]: the placement opportunities in the college is very high. almost every student get placed from campus. good and high packages are giving to the student. all big mnc come for the recruitment in the college. | [campus life]: campus life is owesome

pros/cons: stunning campus and natural beauty: iit mandi is renowned for picturesque campus nestled amidst the himalayas. the serene environment and breathtaking views contribute to a positive and inspiring learning atmosphere. strong academic focus and rigorous curriculum: the institute offers a challenging academic curriculum designed to equip students with the necessary skills and knowledge to excel in their chosen fields. supportive faculty and mentorship: iit mandi boasts a dedicated faculty comprisiing experience researches and industry experts who are committed to guiding student academic and personal growth. the institute's location ins a remote are can sometime pose challenges in terms of accessibility and connectivity , especially for students who prefer a more urban environment. while the campus is beautiful, it man lack certain amenities and facilities that are common in larger urban campuses. the hilly terrain can lead to extreme weather conditions, which may affect outdoor activities and campus life during certain seasons | placement experience: company from microsoft , google, adobe amazon, atlassion, bny mellon,uber. inmobi, samsung and aroung 100 more company visit college every year for internship as well as placements. for btech cse average package is aroung 22lpa .
college_name: IIT Mandi- Indian Institute of Technology - [IITM], Mandi

review_text: bit mesra has an active internship program that offers students the opportunity to gain practical work experience and apply their classroom knowledge in real-world settings. the college has collaborations with various industries and companies, which provide students with a wide range of internship opportunities some of the companies that have offered internships to bit mesra students in the past include tata steel, ibm, infosys, wipro, hcl, cognizant, l&t, and many more. the roles offered under these internships vary depending on the company and the industry. for example, students may work as software developers, data analysts, web designers, marketing analysts, or research assistants. the internship projects offered to students at bit mesra are designed to help them gain hands-on experience in their chosen fields of study. for example, a computer science student might work on a project that involves developing a new software application or a website. an electrical engineering studentthe college conducts two annual fests. one tech fest is named pantheon and one cultural fest is named bitotsav. pantheon is conducted in october. bitotsav is conducted in february. books are available from all the fields in the library. classrooms are well maintained with ac, cctv surveillance, and noise proof. the lecture hall is very big. smartboard is available in every classroom. a sports event is also conducted named vajra where students of different colleges came and participate. there are many clubs like acm, sds, ieee, iet, litsoc, finance etc.

[college infrastructure]: the college was nice infrastructure is absolutely amazing & mind blowing. our college have comfortable seats so we can focus more on the studies & don't get bored in classes.also,college provides labs,library and a large playground. | [academics]: maximum faculty members are highly qualified and knowledgeable. the assistant professors help us get good knowledge in our free time. the curriculum is designed by the management, and it is very helpful to students. exams are not much difficult, and the pass percentage is 65%. | [placements]: the lowest salary package offered was 1.5 lpa, the highest salary package offered was 4 lpa, and the average salary package was 3.5 lpa. top recruiting companies were l&t, meil, and my home. only 20% of students got internships in nhai companies. | [campus life]: campus life is good. | [anything else]: nothing

[college infrastructure]: the college's infrastructure is extremely well maintained. there are acs, water coolers, and all the other required things. wi-fi is also available in colleges, and its speed is 300 mbps, which is quite impressive. labs are well maintained. there are different labs for using systems in which you can code. | [academics]: really, the faculty there is amazing. they are always with you; they know how students will be placed in the company. they assist you from start to finish. yes, this course is really very relevant, and this course also makes students ready for placement and grabs a good package. | [placements]: most of the students are placed in the bca course. placement assistance is given. the highest package goes to inr 7 lpa, and the lowest package goes to inr 3 lpa. the average package goes to inr 4 lpa. tcs, infosys, wipro, and many service-based companies come for placement.
college_name: Ajay Kumar Garg Engineering College Ghaziabad

review_text: [college infrastructure]: the college has a great infrastructure with all the necessary facilities and equipments as far as academics are concerned all classrooms are equipped with smart boards which are maintained well and used in almost every class but provision of facilities for sports has a scope for improvement as the gymnasiums and badminton courts for example require an increase in number to accommodate a growing student community in the hostels. the hostel rooms are cleaned frequently as per request. | [academics]: i joined mechanical engineering to strengthen my foundation for pursuing my interest in aerospace engineering, the quality of teaching when it comes to the programme core subjects has been excellent for me except in one subject and my professors have been highly supportive but this experience could differ based on the professor one gets which is why i speak to my friends and seniors for their opinion and recommendation while choosing a professor during course registration. | [placements]: vit vellore has one of the highest placement rates in the nation with 85 percent of the students getting placed with an average package of greater than 7 lakhs per annum and is steadily increasing by the year. the highest package of 44 lpa went to a computer science engineering student placed in microsoft | [campus life]: the campus life of vit is remarkably outstanding as the vibrant community of students gel together in this melting pot of culture in an environment of ample opportunities to unleash their potential which makes this stay memorable. initial adjustment to the hostel curfew looks tough but quickly becomes an opportunity to mingle with hostel mates in the same building which for the record are huge and this is where the frolicking around in the corridor at night as well as deep conversations happen.
college_name: Vellore Institute of Technology Chennai Campus

review_text: [college infrastructure]: infrastructure was amazing and environment was decent. all the facilities were available for students and also provide extra amenities, like classroom have smart boards and availability of good wifi connection. | [academics]: i have doing my master from this college. the quality of professors teaching was amazing and they mainly focused on students. according to every session curriculum were updated. yes this was making me job ready. | [placements]: the placement quality from this college was amazing and superb. almost 95% of students were placed. the placement process was easy and pleasant for me. the highest salary package offered was 7 lpa and average salary package offered was 4 lpa.

[college infrastructure]: this college infrastructure is very good .... there is a very big playground for the students who are interested in any kind of sports. there is also a student activity centre (sac) in which many indoor games courts are there. | [academics]: the academics are good. i can't say excellent but it is decent accept some of the professors. the grading and assessment criteria can also be improved. the labs are good and well equipped. there is also a very big library. | [placements]: the college placements are decent. but to be eligible in the campus placement you must have a certain amount of cgpa. for a good placement, students must work hard. the companies coming here are also decent. | [campus life]: the campus life here is quite amazing. the college is located in the mountains. the weather is amazing. the environment is very fresh here and is really good. campus is very large and beautiful.......

life at our college campus is very good, there are two fests that happen in our college one is the technical fest techniti which is held during the month of february and another is the cultural fest which is celebrated during the month of march, and in the library of our college most of the books are easily available you can issue your book by using the library card and library time is 9 am to 5 pm. the classroom is well furnished, the smart board is present in all the classrooms and ac is already fitted in each classroom, sitting benches are very comfortable, a total of 80 to 90 seats are present in our classroom and the ventilation system of our classroom is very good. regular sports activities occur in our college, there is a separate club of sports there in our college, all types of games are played in our college like cricket, badminton, hockey, volleyball etc, we can play these sports in our college at any time. several social and technical clubs are there in our college like gdsc, robotic clubs.most of the companies visit during the 6th semester for the internship program for the 2 months and during the 6th month, companies like bpcl reliance, amazon, google, veolia etc visit our college and provide paid internships to students, before the internships students need to give interview for the internships, for the internship students of the 3 rd year need to build at least one project so that they have the sufficient knowledge of the project, if the project of the students is good then they easily get the internship and they don`t need to do worry about it, companie in interview asked the question form the projects of the students. if the interviews and the project of the students are well and good then they easily get paid for internships.
college_name: Dr BR Ambedkar National Institute of Technology - [NIT]

review_text: [college infrastructure]: library was three floored, good collection of books, sports ground is there, hostel was very big atleast 10-15 building, separate for girls and boys, wifi was there in campus, smart board was not there. | [academics]: teachers taught very well, cleared all doubts personally if required. library had enough books to enhance knowledge, study was theoretical as well as practical experience was provided making one job ready. | [placements]: placement cell was decent with average package of 5 lpa, highest package 45 lpa, depending on the caliber of the student. highest package is usually for the computer science courses. mock interviews and guidance is there to sail your ship. | [campus life]: quite strict

review_text: pros/cons: yes this collage is provided all the needs of a student for their improvement. there is full facilities in hostel and mess. for mentorship there is wellness centre. there are many good quality teachers which always appreciate and motivates to students. infrastructure of college is very advanced and attractive. there is a carrier development cell for the development of students the most disliking thing the hectic nature of this collage which is become the cause of stress | placement experience: i am in my first year so i don't know much about it but as per i listen from my senior is that around 70 to 80 percent students got the placement in civil engineering branch i think thats a very good data as per my expectations

review_text: course curriculum overview: from chid hood i like to do btech so i give jee main than get this college there have good curriculm for prepare theye provied all the in stumenti that come use in in all the class was smat there exam difficulty was good

[college infrastructure]: the college has proper equipment to carry out experiments. added to this the new library is one of the best places to visit and study at, individual study space is maintained. canteen food as always is awesome and at low prices. | [academics]: me as studying civil engineering from the professors have been learning a lot. they explain properly. teachers do discuss about the latest happenings around the world and new projects coming up. there is a proper student teacher interaction. | [placements]: vjti never goes off placement specially for comps and it branches. for civil branches companies like tcs and lnt offer jobs. the placement process in our college has always been easy. to helps us anytime with queries we have.

[college infrastructure]: u get all the facilities over here except some in the main campus but these are available in its transit campus and also the campus is working on it . it has good sports facilities and labs are also good except some which are under construction. | [academics]: u get good support from professor . professor have personal tas who help them to solve all the problems if still their is a problem or any confussion profs are ready to help . the academic part is therefore good. | [placements]: as it is 2nd gen iit its placements are quite okk but not as that of old iits . but to improve this the head of department of placement is working very hard to solve the problem of placement . but as compare to other iits it is quite satisfying .

[college infrastructure]: we have good infrastructure. the campus is really beautifull.we have separate academic blocks.fully air conditioned library.good maintained hostels.we have 50gb of wifi per month.there are 4 canteens in the campus. with a incampus restaurant | [academics]: academic curriculum is good. we have a advantage of ffcs(fully flexible credit system),where we can choose our own faculty for our required courses.different students have different slots that enables for interdisciplinary learning. | [placements]: placements are pretty decent.the higesh package from our campus was 41.6 lacs from microsfoft.the placements for core branches is average.people are placed based on the skill only.also cgpa matters to some extent. | [campus life]: the campus life is really amazing. we have different programmes and activities taking place.we have two star events the vibrance and technovit..two inter college competitions for culturals and tech fest.also we have many clubs to join and participate in different activities

review_text: [college infrastructure]: yes, the infrastructure is very good and every possu facilities and equipment are thses. every class has projector, and other facilities. library and sport complex in also available. every facilities that are used in studying are available in the classroom. and they are used also as well as well maintained too. | [academics]: as it's a nit the quality of teaching should be good. teachers teach us every thing required and the curriculum is also updated and it covers allmost every development in the fields. yes the professor make us ready for jobs as well as higher studies. | [placements]: placement are good. about 90-95% eligible students get placement offers. max salary offered was 40lakh and it's in cse branch.average salary offered is 7-8 lakh and yes the placement process is super easy. and the college is so supportive. | [campus life]: campus life is beautiful and very exciting.many cultural activities and sports activities are held throughout the year. student tend to know their other interest than studies. everyone in the campus is so supportive. yes the campus location is very safe and yes it can handle emergencies.

review_text: campus life here is top notch because in our campus we got many clubs like e-cell and et.c and all of them are run by students of our college. we have separate clubs for each sports and we organise sports event within 2 weeks .we have very decent classes our classes are mounted with projector and a.c. and each class have personal p.c. in it. we have 10 department library and 1 central library so that make students to easily avial the books without any problem . our campus organises a annual fest in december which is massivecourse and curriculum here is easy and that's why i opted to study here . we have 1:20 faculty ratio here so it is easier for faculty to look out for students most of the faculty here have completed there ph.d and they opt for classic method of teaching. usually exams here are of moderate difficulty level . mid terms are easy and end term exams are little harder to crack.

[college infrastructure]: good infrastructure. very mordernistic and international level of architecture fully air conditioned classrooms and very big central library with latesttt book sets. the campus is very neat and clean . | [academics]: great academic life and wonderfull and supportive teachers. the university follows latest engineering syllabus and improved customised course content. the the mid semester and end semester exams are conducted in a very faithfull manner. | [placements]: decent placement record with and average of 8.5lpa cse branch and the university has a great track record of good companies visiting for the placement round the student placement percentage is approx 100%. | [campus life]: greqt campus life

review_text: [college infrastructure]: all necessary infrastructures are provided. classrooms are well maintained and is equipped with a smart board. the library also houses a large and well-kept collection of books. the college has various labs and facilities for sports as well. | [academics]: teaching is of excellent quality. professors are very well experienced and they guide you all the way through. the course curriculum is update time to time as a result, you keep yourself up to date on new technologies. | [placements]: psg is known for prepping students for high paying employment and guaranteed placements. the placement cell guides the students throughout and a lot of companies come for recruitment. it is a dream college for all engineering grads. | [campus life]: it?s unquestionably worthwhile to stay on campus. you get a good amount of exposure and the knowledge you gain is un paralleled.

[college infrastructure]: ancient buildings with best modern touches is a most famous building in college overall 36 acres campus, river view and 7 8 department buildings, 2 canteens and 2 auditoriums, 1 sbi bank and atm is also inside. | [academics]: look for accedmics it varies according to subject and school in which that subject is regulated there are 5 to 6 schools namely maths, physics, chemistry, computer engineering etc etc but you can ask seniors | [placements]: placement percentage overall is 78% but for cse its 87% and highest package id 85lpa with avg of 9lpa , placement process is quite easy with great assistance of placement cell officers and tpo which are highly active for our placement | [campus life]: a big campus with such mid point of city, lot of tress, riverside view and boating club which is couple spot, a undergroud passage to join north and south campus. huge meta canteen with really good food and fountain infront of main building is also good point to chill.. | [anything else]: a good college but do not keep too much expectation

pros/cons: social interaction with seniors is good but campus life is average. faculty is very good in this college and the course is relevant with respect to today's developing world. placement is good here and as my branch is cse, which has highest median here, i am happy with is quality of infrastructure i felt is very average but there is an ai building being constructed which might make research opportunities better. course is very rigourous and therefore you might not get enough time for doing two activites at the same time. there is no auditorium in the campus. it might be buit after 2-3 years but right now there is not one. | placement experience: students get a pre-placement offer in the 4th year, as the 4th year is based solely on intership or research, whatever you like. companies like deloitte, bny recruit in big numbers from here. this year 94% got placed.i plan to go in a development domain after my degree

review_text: [college infrastructure]: the library: has resources of 60,000 volumes,1400 journals and periodicals,700 cds and video cassettes. there are 9 hostels out of which 7 are for boys and two for girls.the colledge has badminton court, basketball court, cricket ground etc which are well maintained.the food is hygenic and the mess is clean. | [academics]: i am studying in electronics and instrumentation branch. as i am a fresher and 2020 is going on so we were not allowed to go to our college my onlione studying experience is good. yes i think that my curriculum is goo for me and it is well updated. | [placements]: i think that the quality of placements is good. over 75 % students are placed every year so it is a good sign that placements are good and students are intrested in the respective jobs.average salary is between 9-10 lacks per year. | [campus life]: about campus life i dont know much about it but according to y seniors it is good. and fresh environment is provided for students.

[college infrastructure]: kiit has one of the biggest campus in india. infrastructure is good, classroom are the best part, you have centralised air conditioning, projector, wifi is free throughout the campus. our new library is quite good. there is a canteen for every hostel. boys hostel is okay could be better, but the common washroom in hostel is quite good. food is from okaish to good. | [academics]: for a computer science student after 1st year all the subjects are wholly or partially dependent on computers. still as a student i feel there could be subjects that are more related to computer science and job placement. | [placements]: from what i have heard placements are quite good i have 2 siblings both passed out from kiit and both doing great. last year highest package was around 30-40lac per annum. average is also promising 5-6lac per annum. | [campus life]: campus life is quite good we have many societies in college of all fields like acting singing photography sports dancing etc. location of college is in bhubaneswar in main city, so outside college you can find anything and everything. bhubaneswar is cyclone prone, but the govt tackel it quite efficiently.

review_text: [college infrastructure]: our college infrastructure is designed to foster collaboration and innovation. the study lounges are comfortable and conducive to group work. the library's digital resources are vast, and the it support ensures we can always access the technology we need | [academics]: my college offers a demanding academic environment that has significantly improved my critical thinking and analytical skills. the professors are highly qualified and supportive. although the workload can be overwhelming at times, the comprehensive curriculum ensures a well-rounded education | [placements]: the placement team at our college is highly efficient, offering a wide range of resources to help students succeed. from career fairs to guest lectures by industry leaders, every initiative is geared towards enhancing our employability | [campus life]: i love the green spaces on campus. they're perfect for studying, relaxing, or hanging out with friends. the university really invests in maintaining a beautiful environment
college_name: SRM Institute of Science and Technology Chennai

review_text: the course i chose was cse because i like this field and also the placement package is nice. the curriculum, at first might seem unnecessary but as you study more you find that more or less everything in the course is necessary. there are two groups in each branch, i.e, about 60 students and there are two professors for each group for a particular subject. also, both the groups are further divided into three sub-groups, i.e, a total of six sub-groups for labs, and a professor is assigned to each sub-group. all the professors are not too good, not too bad just like the normal stereotypical image of a professor in an engineering college. the college conducts mid-term and end-term examinations in a semester. also, quizzes and lab assignments are also conducted. we have midterms after two and a half months after the start of the semester and end terms after the same amount of time. passing exams is easy if you just study occasionally even before the exams, you can pass.pecfest(cultural) is conducted at the end of the year and pecfest(technical) is conducted at around mid-year. both are great and basically the same for someone who wants to enjoy. there are many books available in the library and you can even ask for them if a book is not there. classrooms have projectors, acs (not all), and normal chalk/whiteboards. there are plenty of extra-curricular activities like cricket, football, basketball, tennis, dramatics(dance+acting), singing, bhangra, editorial boards, and societies for each branch-specific thing. most of the clubs are run by students only and they provide good opportunities for someone to grow in that field.
college_name: Punjab Engineering College University of Technology - [PEC]

review_text: [college infrastructure]: the campus has an excellent infrastructure with all the facilities such as wifi, lan, etc, well equipped laboratories, library, smart boards. it also has a sports campus and the hostels are well maintained. the food is hygeinic and campus has a good working environment. | [academics]: i am currently pursuing imsc food technology. it is a course of 5 years beacuse i aspire to become a food technologist some day. the faculty here is very patient and teaches everything with perfection but lacks a bit of coordination. the study materials provided are apt and to the point. yes the curriculum has been updated and provided practical knowledge which makes us job ready. | [placements]: heard that the placements are very good. assures us with a secure future. top companies come to our college for hiring. yes my college is supportive. i am not aware of the salary package it offered but i have heard that the placements are really very good. | [campus life]: it has a good environment so it's a nice experience studying with the peers. the library is also well furnished. the students , teachers and staff are very helpful and supportive . the location is more or less safe. yes i think it is well equipped to handle any sort of emergency.

[college infrastructure]: college infrastructure is average . there are limited classroom and limited students can take admission here . there is 2 canteen 1 cafe in college and one cafe is in hostel . and they provide average basic service to students like all colleges do. | [academics]: they have computer labs for b.tech students they don't allow to use lab to management students .they do not cover syllabus at time all the rest syllabus were left by the teachers . they are not providing quality of study. | [placements]: i think most of the students take admission with the scope of placement but they doesn't provide placement only 1 or 2 students got placed in normal companies rest of the remained unemployed. even at the time of internship students face problem. | [campus life]: campus life is quite boring here because it is situated in proper village. and in every events b.tech students are getting privileged by our college rest of the course students doesn't make any sense .
college_name: SRM Institute of Science and Technology NCR Campus Ghaziabad

review_text: [college infrastructure]: lpu infrastructure is one of the biggest in the world with spread across under 600 acre . college has almost all the facilities that must be available for students.facilities in classrooms are very advanced like smart classes with projectors. . it provides all the facilities let it be from restaurants, eateries, grooming facilities, atms, bowling alley, hospital, banks, and post-offices,hospitals are available. | [academics]: in this university i am pursuing btech in computer science and engineering. because in this university the scope of computer science is excellent compare to any other engineering branch. in this university one of the best , experienced and well qualified faculty provides best way of teching to students. about curriculum is updated and includes all the recent developments in the field. i am satisfied with our study that really help me to get the job. | [placements]: it has best placements records in computer science branch. this year it provides 42 lpa highest placements records in computer science. in this university mostly all the students are placed easily. because more than 500 companies visited in this campus. that's a key factor for students. if the academics of students is good then definitely he get placed at a good and renowned company. | [campus life]: best features of my campus are its grounds and huge infrastructure.you can make groups to play any type of game.worst are the guards they sometimes are very angry which might not be a very good thing for a student.students are very supprotive and also the teachers.location i woould say that it could have been better.i think it can handle emergencies.

[college infrastructure]: excellent infrastructure with over 60 blocks in total including labs, study space, agricutural experimental facilities and much more. rated one of the best campuses in terms of the overall beauty with green all around. | [academics]: over 4000 faculty members to make the students learning experience awesome. digital learning is the path the university follow. each student is given utmost attention with all kind of problems in terms of academics or any other things. | [placements]: companies are being floated to students on a daily basis for internships, full time jobs etc. exposure to all the students studying in various portfolios. engineering, management, journalism, law, fashion and many more. | [campus life]: with malls, shopping complex, olympic size swimming arena, gyms, playgrounds, cafeteria, there is a whole lot a student can enjoy inside the campus with their friends.

[college infrastructure]: the laboratories were equipped with all necessary equipment. each department and the library have open wi-fi access. the hostel provides spacious rooms that can accommodate two students. the mess facilities were somewhat manageable for students from other states. additionally, we have access to free medical services here. | [academics]: faculty is very good academically, maybe not in teaching; they are all at least ph.d. holders from iits or foreign universities; the pass percentage is around 80%; but students do get industry-ready. the course curriculum gets somewhat irrelevant in some branches. but overall, it is good. | [placements]: +% of students across all branches are placed at nit rourkela. there are around 16 branches and 21 departments in nitr; the highest package goes around 51 lacs, the lowest is about 3.5 lacs, and the average is around 14 lacs per annum. more placements are offered in software and analytics and consulting firms, mostly.

[college infrastructure]: we have well-equipped labs and not to mention sports centers and classrooms. we have more than 3 in-campus hostels and more than 4 off-campus hostels. not to mention a separate building for cs and it department. | [academics]: you won't really regret being a cse undergrad here. way too many courses to choose from. para-medical courses are kinda new. quality of teaching... umm... 4.5 stars out of 5. the curriculum is updated and b.tech grads get to choose from a wide range of specialization courses too. | [placements]: placements are pretty good here. career excellence classes and placement trainings get pretty good from penultimate year of study. all in all, luck and efforts matter but the faculties do put in a lot of effort ! kudos to them! | [campus life]: fun and fests 101

[college infrastructure]: iiit kota campus is not constructed yet,so iiit kota runs at mnit,jaipur.mnit jaipur have all necessary infrastructure,equipment,facilities.iiit kota student can use all facilities of mnit.facilities provided by departments are very good . | [academics]: iiit kota academics is run by mnit jaipur director.i am pursuing b.tech in electronics and communication engineering in iiit kota.faculties are very good and supportive.they have well qualified and they have good technical skill.they keep updating student with new technologies . | [placements]: iiit kota placement is awesome.amazon hires 6 student from iiit kota highest in rajsthan and highest package is 30 lac and average package of iiit kota is 6 lac.amazon,flipkart,and other prestigious company come at iiit kota for interview. | [campus life]: iiit kota now use mnit jaipur campus.mnit jaipur allot us ganga hostel which is a 5 star hostel.mnit jaipur have grern and clean campus and it is about 320 acres and mnit jaipur have asia's largest lecture theater complex.so we can say facilities are very good.
college_name: Indian Institute of Information Technology Kota

review_text: [college infrastructure]: my college has great infrastructure both from out and from inside . all the first year classrooms have air conditioned classrooms in them . we have non air conditioned classrooms from 2nd year onward . there is no shortage in any kind of lab equipment . our classrooms are equipped with projectors and good quality speakers . we have free wifi provided in our classrooms and also in our hostels. we do have hygienic food provided to us . | [academics]: teachers are not always fully equipped with the study plan and can sometimes disgust you. but they try their best to clarify any single doubt you might have. however, the curriculum is not periodically revised and as a result college study doesn't really makes you job ready. however, this gao can be bridged by going through various moocs. | [placements]: srm provides great placement opportunities but you need to know how to grab them as well. core companies do visit but in very limited numbers. placements are dominated by software companies. irrespective of whichever branch you are from, you need to learn coding to get a good offer. average salary offered are between 3-4 lpa while the highest is around 30 lpa. core companies offer somewhere around 4-5 lpa. the college is also very supportive during the placements. | [campus life]: campus life in srm is excellent. with such a big campus and sports fields present you can actually have a wonderful time. every student gets everything he/she needs.not to forget the lush greeneries that it offers and also different fests that it conducts. (aarush and milan being the two most celebrated ones which notes presence of students from other states as well).
college_name: SRM Institute of Science and Technology Chennai

review_text: [college infrastructure]: i?d say the infrastructure at galgotias university is quite impressive. the classrooms are air-conditioned, equipped with smart boards and projectors. labs are well-furnished with the latest equipment, and the library is spacious with good resources. the campus has a modern, clean look?almost like a mall?with plenty of green spaces and seating areas.hostels are decent, with both ac and non-ac options. wi-fi, lifts, canteens, and medical facilities are available. | [academics]: academically, galgotias university is decent. the syllabus is mostly industry-relevant and updated, especially for courses like bba, b.tech, and mba. faculties are knowledgeable and supportive.attendance is strictly monitored (75% is compulsory), and internal assessments, assignments, and quizzes are regular. there are good opportunities for certifications, workshops, and industry exposure?especially if you're proactive. but overall, academic success depends more on self-effort than on classroom teaching | [placements]: placements at galgotias university are average to good, depending on your course and personal efforts. for b.tech (especially cse/it), some top companies like infosys, tcs, wipro, and capgemini visit regularly. a few students get into product-based companies with good packages (up to 10+ lpa), but the majority get offers around 3?5 lpa.for bba, mba, and other courses, placements are more limited and often in sales, marketing, or customer service roles with basic packages. you need to build your skills, do internships, and have a strong resume to stand out.the university organizes job fairs and placement drives, but don?t rely 100% on the college?your own preparation makes the real difference. | [campus life]: campus life at galgotias university is lively but depends on your circle and involvement. there are regular fests, cultural events, hackathons, and student club activities, which keep the vibe energetic. the campus has a modern look with hangout spots, caf?s, and sports facilities like basketball and football grounds attendance rules are strict, so you can't skip too much. still, if you?re active in clubs, events, and make good friends, you?ll enjoy campus life here.

[college infrastructure]: i must say that the infrastructure of my college is awesome. the campus is quite big and is spread over an area of 650 acres. environment is quite green and eco friendly. classrooms are very big and spacious with all the modern equipments installed in it like projector, smart boards etc. library is gigantic and has huge collection of books. hostels are quite good and neatly maintained. living spaces are clean and food served in mess is very hygienic. | [academics]: i am pursuing b. tech from cse. i chose cse coz it has very vast scope in future. our university offers specialisation in various fields like cyber security, machine learning, iot, data science etc. which is very professional and makes a student ready for job. | [placements]: talking about the quality of placements in lpu, it's decent and quite good. several companies like tcs, wipro, tech mahindra, amazon, flipkart, adobe visit here for campus placement. recently, many students got placed in amazon for the package up to 30 lpa which is really a great thing. the average package of cse is around 5.7 lpa which is decent. | [campus life]: campus life here is so amazing that you will feel like your 2nd home. there is a huge stadium sized playground is there where you can play several sports like cricket, football, basketball etc. lpu is located at phagwara in punjab. the campus is very safe. it is said that there are more cctv camera here than indira gandhi international airport, new delhi. the university is well maintained and it can handle any case of emergency.

pros/cons: faculties are excellent, they are very helpful and dedicated to their work. we have a very good girl to boy ratio considering an engineering college. we have 1 girl on every 10 boys. we usually have a lot of events throughout the year, making this institute enjoyable. the only thing that i don't like about our college is the mess food , apart from that every thing is good. | placement experience: from 7th semester onwards students are eligible for campus placements. many companies like nvdia , amazon,qualquam , tcs , infosys, motive and many japanese firms come to our campus. highest package offered this year was 40 lpa and lowest was 6 lpa. 76.4 percent was the placement percentage this year. many students also go for masters in abroad.
college_name: Indian Institute of Information Technology - [IIITM], Imphal

review_text: nearly all courses in india are similar to b.tech in computer science so chose this college and course due to its closeness to my city and it has a good placement history. the faculty here is okayish like you would expect. most teachers are very educated and pay to focus on students but only a few are not upto the mark. i think the ratio here is 1:20 which means for every 20 students there is a teacher. term exams are very often although it's not very difficult. studying an hour daily will fetch you good marks.it is very surprising to see that this college doesn't have any fests although it's one of the most prestigious colleges in uttar pradesh. books are mostly available in our library. i don't have much knowledge as i'm too enthusiastic of reading books. the classroom is well equipped with all amenities excluding the acs so imagine a summer class. sports and extracurricular is also fine with a small cricket field for students. there are many social and drama clubs in our college namely taal, verve, horizon, etc.

[college infrastructure]: colege infrastructure, facilities and equipments are of top notch . we also have smart classes best in class laboratories.and we also have gym and hostels . only downside is that hostels dont have wifi. | [academics]: im studying b.sc research in physics department. all the faculties are the best and very helpful and the teaching is also great and the curriculum is updated with the recent developments in the field of knowledge. | [placements]: the placements is very good but most of the students go for higher studies rather than sitting in placements.but those who sit for placements get their job.the highest package is of 40 lpa in bsc and they also help students to do internships .

btech in communication and computer engineering (cce) will help me learn about computers and electronic devices that i am quite curious about. it will help me build my career in engineering field and as for placements, college provides assistance for competitive coding, machine learning, etc. the exam structure is relevant as the process is application based and adequate for the course. the college organises several events where trained professionals from several companies are invited for providing information as well as practical knowledge.gender ratio is 3:1 boys:girls. the campus life is good as the college provides with several amenities to the students like canteen, gym, parks, etc. there are 12 clubs in our college including coding, acting, nukkad club, photography, art and craft, fashion, social club(sankalp), literature club and more. the students are well behaved and follow strict rules provided by college authorities. several workshops are held by college and professionals from companies are invited to give speech and provide with practical knowledge to the students.
college_name: The LNM Institute of Information Technology - [LNMIIT]

review_text: [college infrastructure]: one of the largest and well organised campuses in india.every building whether its educational sector or hostels ..everything at its best...there are sitting areas ,open auditorium, metallic structures .. everything i can say | [academics]: teaching is both board-marker and ppt based. some prefer elaboration of topics some stick to ppts. so ppts might be improved but overall its a balanced combination and acceptable. most of the colleges follow same so its ok. | [placements]: well organised placement wing. lots of opportunities just need to focus on personal achievements. it has one of the largest placement records and record for bringing most companies for placements and providing best possible opportunities to students. | [campus life]: the best i can say. from transportation to malls and kiosks inside a campus ....its unbelievable. you can get all the dishes and even swiggy services inside the campus but yes the campus is veg so you need to get to one of the ends of university for non veg or outside the campus.

[college infrastructure]: our college have all the necessary infrastructure, facilities and equipment that are needed for every student. every class has projector, blackboard, smart board, wifi connection. library, sport centers and hostels are very well equipped with the facilities. all are well used and we'll maintained. the living spaces are clean and tidy. the food is also hygenic. | [academics]: i'm studying in 2nd year in civil engineering and i'm interested in that field. our teachers are outstanding in their areas. they have good knowledge about the subjects. our curriculum is updated and includes the recent developments in the field. the quality of our education makes me always ready for the job. | [placements]: our college placements are highly good. 60% of the students are placed. the highest package offered was 49.75 lpa to the student from cse department. the average salary package was 11.58 lpa. our college is very supportive for students and is preparing us for the next placement processes. | [campus life]: our campus life is very good and we can healthily make relationships. our college is located at heavily raining area. still it is on a hill, so it can handle all the emergencies. our college is a safer place. teachers and staff are very supportive for everything.

[college infrastructure]: our college has great infrastructure and also eco friendly campus facilities are also really good and 24/7 wifi campus. classrooms are really good and we have big sports ground for varies game. in hostel food is not provided by them we should eat outside the hostels and in our college there is near 40-50 cafeterias so we can eat what we want. | [academics]: i'm studying b.tech information technology in christ university it was really a good college for improve our knowledge and also we can be very advance in technology. yes our college is very upto date in every technology and also in subjects. | [placements]: placements in our college is very outstanding and also many students are placing in compines many of top compines are coming for placements highest package in our college is 24lpa and avg salary is 7lpa. 98% of students are placing in compines and few of them are looking for further studies.

[college infrastructure]: as it is an iit , you can expect very huge infrastructure . also , the campus is really big with a hostel and a lot of space , plus greenery is everywhere . the library is my favourite , ha ing lots of books and a group discussion room in it . | [academics]: the college faculty is very experienced and highly qualified , and they are very well known . the ratio is about 180 teachers . a college exam is in the semester format , where we have to give an exam every semester in order to get promoted to the next semester , and it is medium hard to pass the exam . | [placements]: more than 90 percent of students are placed on campus . the package is also high . it also provides internship programs and industrial projects to the students in the college . the college also provides the students with am internship program in which they can take part and get selected through the interview round , and they can learn and grasp knowledge and experience exposure from that internship for the upcoming placement sessions .

[college infrastructure]: okay okay infrastructure, all law engineering and architecture are in the same campus and is very small to hold such a large crowd. there is no dedicated play area for any sports. buildings are good condition. food is not good for people from north indians but are good according to south indians. | [academics]: theory based teaching and quality depended mostly on the teachers. quality of teachers are not that good. the curriculum is somewhat updated to the latest industry needs, in my aspect college does not make you job ready in much aspects. | [placements]: the quality of placements is quite average, the companies hire in mass. about 60-70% students get placed with avg package around 6-7 lakhs per annum and highest is aprox 42 lakhs per annum but that is some kind of exception. | [campus life]: campus life is not good.

[college infrastructure]: college infrastructure is quite amazing when compared to nit's and also better than new iit's. new buildings are in making which will be new lecture theatre and library. in nit jalandhar,there is unique way of making building, you will see it after coming here. | [academics]: i am studying industrial and production engineering and the teachers here are well qualified. they hold lot of research papers . some of our teachers are the directors of other nits. the teaching assistant also hold good knowledge. | [placements]: placement scenario is quite impressive here in nit jalandhar. the placement percentage for btech is 90% almost. many mnc's visit us , take placement talks and then contact tpo's for placement. overall it is quite nice. | [campus life]: the college campus is full of greenery and beautiful flowers and a variety of birds can be seen here. certain playing grounds for football, cricket, volleyball, badminton and basketball are there. security guards are present at each step in the campus.
college_name: Dr B R Ambedkar National Institute of Technology Jalandhar

review_text: [college infrastructure]: facilities and infrastructure available for our courses are well-equipped laboratories and fully wi-fi surrounded classrooms with all the latest technology. the campus and hostel are connected to high-speed wi-fi. asia's biggest library and auditorium are available. the hostel is very good. | [academics]: srm is known for good infrastructure, facilities and equipment. the facilities we have in our college is high tech with wifi on every classroom and they are well-maintained.the academics is good and curriculum is updated. | [placements]: the institute has successfully concluded its 2023 placement drive with more than 734 recruiters, who made around 7305 offers. srm university highest package stood at inr 57 lpa and the srm ist average package stood at inr 7.58 lpa.
college_name: SRM Institute of Science and Technology Chennai

review_text: [college infrastructure]: yes college has good infrastructure facilities and equipments ...........classrooms have smart interactive ways teaching ....which are techincally sound enough and there are well managed laboratories ,with all kind of equipments....in best possible conditions | [academics]: quality of education is extraordinary,all the staffs are knowledgeable and provide education in best possible ways . curriculum is updated in every possible way for the betterment of each and every student .... | [placements]: placements are better but not the best ,as per the name of the college ......bt placements are also offered in top companies like google ,microsoft with best packages of about 12-15 p.a .and much more .... | [campus life]: college has good facilities for cocurricular activities and sports and provides good opportunities to its students to showcase their talent in various fields and supports them financially too..and it has a perfect location ...which doesn't make it crowded a lot

the campus was extraordinary, having high-tech labs, and systems and looking well good, and the infrastructure was also very good, a big building with a round structure with the sail-like library. cultural, dressing, pongal fest, sports day the library had more number books with all dept courses. high tech classrooms conducting sports day, all participants won prizes and medals, and the main thing is, they conduct drestein there is a lot to learn new things in another department also.the course curriculum was good, and the faculty members are also good at teaching. i choose the ece department because it has a chance to get a job in both the electronic side and i m interested in both electronics and communication. 1:30 is the ratio of faculty and students faculty has good knowledge of teaching.teaches well and well. it has 70% easy to write the exam and some difficulties in 30%

[college infrastructure]: the college has all the required infrastructure for a smooth academic and fun filled college life . the college is very well kept and clean . classrooms possess projectors for further enhancing presentations . hostels are also cleaned weekly and washing machines are provided for laundry . sports centres are also active for sports enthusiasts to further continue their passion. libraries are working even on holidays to provide the students with much needed support . | [academics]: the quality of teaching is excellant . as you know psg is known for preparing its students for high paid jobs and almost ensured placements if you work hard throughout your college year . the professors are very well experienced and is always ready to entertain your doubts and interests. the curriculum is updated to focus on the latest trends in technology and thus prepares the students beforehand academically and provides much needed personality and character development trainings . | [placements]: psg college of technology is known for its outstanding preparation for students to pursue high paid placements . and has had many alumni's who is currently placed at a high pay job thanks to the training provided . especially for cse dept throughout 3rd year the training process is rigorous and prepares you technically as well as interview ready . | [campus life]: the campus life is definitely worth it. the location of the college is the middle of coimbatore and so markets malls and even stationary shops are easily available . the college has a canteen and besides that im canteen is best for spending some quality time with your friends. the sky walk is the major attraction of the college. the college also hosts technical and fun events all throughout the year giving the students plenty of opportunity to learn and have fun .

every year there is a 10 percent hike in the college fee. it will cost around 20 lakhs for the complete btech. i have not got any scholarship but if you are eligible you will definitely get it. it has a procedure which you can see on the college website.life is very good here. there is one cultural, tech, and sports fest held every year. there is a gym on campus and sac for table tennis and badminton. there are many clubs like imagination, insignia, eminence, astronomy, cybros, etc.
college_name: The LNM Institute of Information Technology - [LNMIIT]

review_text: [college infrastructure]: jadavpur university boasts modern infrastructure with hostels, library, cad lab, health centre, and counselling. major upgrades include new science and arts buildings, renovated auditoriums, guest houses, sports centre, and improved facilities for differently-abled students, ensuring a vibrant academic environment. | [academics]: jadavpur university offers many courses and programs for the students with a strong hold in their core subjects with the best faculties and professors. it is ranked 1st in west bengal colleges under wbjee through wbjee counselling. | [placements]: jadavpur university?s training and placement cell actively invites top companies for campus recruitment, ensuring excellent placement opportunities. with 17 engineering departments and numerous specializations, ju produces highly skilled graduates. the cell maintains strong industry relations and provides training to enhance students? employability, making the university a preferred destination for recruiters.

i am interested in programming and video editing and wanted to become a software engineer so i wanted to opt for computer engineering due to my low rank i had to choose mechanical engineering but i am now happy with it. faculty members are very helpful, if you need any help from them you can directly talk to them without any hesitation. i would only say that the sex ratio is one of the worst things in this college as in my class we have only 1 girl out of 75 students and this follows in all branches. we will be having one mid-sem and one end sem for the qualification of the semester.our college conducts the largest fest in north india its name is engifest and also there is one of north india's largest literary fests called yuvaan. these are conducted in the month of february. you can get any book to be it related to the course or not in our very spacious and fully airconditioned library. sports complex is one of the great highlights of this which is very big as big is a very small word for it. it is humungous and it offers separate courts for almost every sport. our college also had many social service organisations such as ncc, nss etc.

pros/cons: nirma university campus is one of the best campus in all over gujrat block system is good so all department has different blocks. food quality of canteen is good and sports grounds are also good faculty is not much experienced. most of them are phd students. education quality is not good over all and exam system is also irritating. | course curriculum overview: courses like physics chemistry engineering drawing economics are unnecessary in computer science . because of this this cources we could not focus on coding which is primary requirement in computer science.
college_name: Institute of Technology, Nirma University, Ahmedabad

review_text: [college infrastructure]: i'm currently persuing mba from indian institute of information technology allahabad, and it's good to study here. there are laboratories which are fully air conditioned and the computers are fully working. the hostels are very clean and it is fully wifi connected. | [academics]: i'm doing mba and the studies are very good. the teachers are very well educated, the ones from iim and the teachings are way too good. the curriculum are well updated and ut does makes up job ready for the placement. | [placements]: the highest placement has been 35 lacs per annum and and 85% of students were placed. the companies are way too good that come for placement and the average salary has been 10 lacs per annum. the college is supportive too.
college_name: Indian Institute of Information Technology Allahabad

review_text: [college infrastructure]: thapar provides amazing facilities to students. it has all the infrastructure that is needed for the development of the student. it has amazing labs with all the equipments in it the hostel and the campus is lush green and it is very hygienic. it also provides many sports facilities to students it has facilities for all kind of sports. the campus also has high speed wifi all over it | [academics]: i am currently pursuing electronics and communication engineering from thapar university. thapar provides you the best faculties and the quality of teaching is amazing. maximum faculty member are phd holders and they are very helpful. thapar's curriculum is up to date and includes all the recent developments and it also ensures that you have safe future with good placement | [placements]: thapar has good placements around 90% of students gets placed every year and the average package is about 11 lac and it is 13 lac for computer related branches. highest package last year was around 45 lac. placements in thapar university are increasing day by day and it is becoming better | [campus life]: if you are coming to thapar you will have the best campus life. it has a beautifull campus with green and clean surroundings. students here are involved in various sports activities and also in coding. the faculty members are also very helpful and good.

review_text: only 4th year students are eligible for campus placements but students can avail internships from third year onwards. 4th year students can also apply for off campus placements. 123 companies visited last year and total 567 seats were offered. highest package ofered was of dee shaw of 52lpa. whil the average package is 10.2 lpa overall but 18.2 of cs departments. 99.2% placement records for cs department and 76% overallthe anual fest moksha is held anually, and the cultural fests are held quaterly. famous celebs ae called for moksha. this year kk was presnet. books are present in library but the quality books feel low in amount journals are present in high amount though. clasroom for first years is very luxurious with ac rooms and individual sockets for each stdent. wacom tablets are also present for teaching purpose.
