review_text: i choose this course because i like to work on computers and i hoped for a good career after this course. in our computer science branch, there are approximately 4000 students this year and the faculty provided them including deen hod, and all faculty they are approx 300. the teachers are very good and almost all of them are supported also. they teach us well and every time ask us if we have some doubts. and clear them later. there are 6 ias and 3 cat exams. all ias is online mode. cats are in offline mode. each exam of a cat is at 1:30 time. and the level of questions is moderate.first, you have to do your registration with 1100 rs online on the galgotias university website. then they provide you with the application i. then you have to submit your documents and you have to pay 25000 minimum fees that time to confirm your admission. there is almost no scholarship other than sports quota as i know. you have to submit your fees for 1 year before attending the first lecture of your college. but there are job opportunities also. companies like amazon, wipro, syska, and flipkart visit every year.

review_text: [college infrastructure]: yes, our college has a very good infrastructure. wifi and classrooms are well maintained. the living spaces are clean and food is hygienic. our laboratories are well maintained. sports centre is yet to be constructed. | [academics]: i am an undergraduate in metallurgy and materials science stream. the quality of teaching is good. yes, the curriculum is updated and also includes the recent developments in the field considering the suggestions and reviews of the erstwhile students and also the staff. | [placements]: the quality of placements are good. maximum number of students are placed in various mnc's from branches like computer science and electrical engineering and less in case of other branches. the highest salary offered was 1.7 cr per annum .

i choose this course because i want to do it. i feel very joy when i do code. when any code runs without a single error it really gives me relief our faculty is very supportive. they help us each and every step. even they also take doubt classes. our faculty is very educated and well-qualified. here, most of the teachers are doctors (phd). term exam 2 was about 3 hours. and it's not about pass or fail it's all about how was your effort. if your effort was good then definitely you will passtill now there is nothing is organised by the college this month but i am sure they will. there are a lot of books in the library. you can easily get whatever kind of book you want. for sports, there is a sports club in our college you can play badminton carrom, table tennis or more than that. there is a club maths pirate which runs by students.

[college infrastructure]: college infrastructure is good all the necessary facilities & equipments are arevided.we have free wifi in library and smart board in classroom.all are in well maintained condition.living spaces are not so cleen specially the washrooms.food is good. | [academics]: i am pursuing b.tech in chemical engineering . since it's a new branch. quality of teaching can be more better.yes,my curriculum is updated and includes all the recent developments in the field.yes,my study makes me job ready. | [placements]: quality of placement is excellent.every year almost 50% students got placed.highest package so far is 20 lac in b.tech.average salary offered is 6-8lacs.placement processes are easy.college is supportive. | [campus life]: campus is very good.it provides all the necessary facilities.support staff is very good.its located near hills.but it is safe.hospitals and police station located near it

[college infrastructure]: yes my college has all the necessary infrastructure equipments and facilities required for the modern education and the classrooms are also neat and clean and wi-fi facilities are also available and it is all well maintained. | [academics]: i'm currently pursuing my masters of business administration and the quality of teaching offered here is equal to what is offered in the iim's and the curriculum is up to date and it includes all the recent developments in the field. | [placements]: quality of placements at my college is nice and percentage of students placed were around 60 percent and the highest salary package offered was around 13 lpa and it went to mba finance course. placement process was not at all easy but the college staff was supportive but the teachers were not supportive for the placement process

pros/cons: i loke the culture of this college students from different states live peacefully. genuinely the faculty of certain branches are so well educated. the drainage system is not good , in rainy season there is so much problem . | placement experience: there is many opportunities of placements in college , many on campus companies come to hire students companies loke l &t , jsw ,psus come for hiring for civil engineering and many startups come to hire students which give chance to students to sit in interview.

the course curriculum includes all the basic subjects like english, engineering mathematics, engineering physics , basic electrcial engineering, basic electronics, python programming , c programming , special subjects like php and ai based on your stream. these will be provided subjects for you in your first year. i chose ai as my course to pursue because i am really interested in this field and wanted to learn more here. the faculy student ratio here is quite good. i would say there would be 1:70 ratio and there isn't any issue for teachers. yes sometimes in first year , there are issues when new teachers join and they cant match up with students properly. most of the faculty in my first year. has done phd. or mtech. from good colleges like nit or iits. there are lectures and tutorials to solve problems as well. you will be taught in lectures and you will be given sheets which you can solve and ask doubts in tutorials. the exams here are semester wise and it wasnt very hard to pass.the placement provided by college is basic and depends solely on your skills. students can start looking for placement from 6th semester or third year. there are many great companies visisted here like google , infosys , etc. around more than 600 recruiters came this year. the highest packagae was of 44lpa in microsoft. the average packagae here woulf be around 5-7 lacs and it depends on your stream as well. mostly all students get placement though it may be of less amount but they get placed. i am thinking of taking placement if its around 15-20lpa otherwise i will look into doing masters.

[college infrastructure]: it's good.. wifi availablity is kinda poor. hostel facility isn't upto the mark though. but the cafeteria and stationary is the best thing you find here. regarding ac facility that too is only upto the mark. | [academics]: academics is good. they will ask you to engage in many seminars which enhance and boost up the knowledge. rest events and all are too organized according to the planner. i belong to cse, personally saying they will focus more on syllabus not on development. | [placements]: overall placements are roundabout 5 lpa. each student will be placed here. average ctc goes 3.5-5 lpa. rest all depends on your efforts. the more you burn yourself, the more you will earn. it all about how much you invest. | [campus life]: you will experience a good campus life here. as there are big gardens around all the three blocks. and a beautiful view from top of the building. library too is very good. different sort of activities will boost you up.

i had chosen electrical engineering because i had a deep interest in gazzetes and also i want to something for the country so i had chosen this branch and college. faculty to student ratio is very godd in iit delhi roughly around 15:1. all the faculties are world level qualified either they are graduated from one of the finest colleges of the world or they are very deeply talented. and as an student in this college i would say that the exams are not easy at all. it is very difficult to survive here in this utmost competitive environment.life at iit delhi is quite vibrant with avariety of social activities taking place on campus. iit delhi has numerous clubs and societies catering to a wide range of interests. the infrastucture of iit delhi is modern and well equipped. iit delhi hosts two major fests every year the cultural fest called rendezvous and the technical fest caled tryst. the classroom at iit delhi are equipped with modern audio visual-aids and projectors. also iit delhi has an excellent sports culture with facilities for indoor and outdoor games.
college_name: IIT Delhi - Indian Institute of Technology [IITD]

review_text: [college infrastructure]: graphic era university , dehradun offers a well equipped campus for student life. the entire campus boasts a high spees wi-fi connectivity, making it easy to stay connected. classrooms are modern with audio/visual equipments for engaging purposes. | [academics]: graphic era university focuses on a curriculum that blends theory with practical application. this aims to prepare students to be competent professionals who can make a real-world impact. the faculty is highly qualified. the university offers wide range of programmes. | [placements]: graphic era has a strong mba placement records of figures 80-90%. top recruiters include names like deloitte, hdfc bank, and itc. the university helps in career preparation to help students land their dream jobs.

i choose this course due to its immense placements. faculty are highly qualified and have phd degrees from top ivy league colleges in the world and india. their teaching method is a bit harsh on students and they expect a lot more from students i guess. there are tonnes of quizzes and exams having significant weightage from time to time.the annual fest is sarang and takes place usually in january. the library is huge and is open till 12 am. classrooms are world-class. sports competition takes place from time to time. competition is usually among hostels. there are hell of lot of clubs from robotics, coding, upsc etc actively run by students.

review_text: [college infrastructure]: infrastructure is mind blowing. well designed corporate like buildings are make positive vibes around us. look like amazing buildings. a good infrastructures for atudents.all necessary equipment are already there in laboratory. | [academics]: teaching quality is very good as the teachers are highly qualified.students oriented teaching method is used by all facilities. students are understand all subjects as teachers tought.the curriculum activities done by teachers are very good. | [placements]: good placement after course completion.minimum 80% students are placed after completion of the course. students are prepared to face as hard as interviews. they all are ready to face interview off campus also. | [campus life]: campus is very hygienic, positive vibes are rome around.

[college infrastructure]: the college infrastructure is modern and well-maintained. classrooms are equipped with smart boards and air ventilation. labs are fully functional with updated equipment. the library has a good collection of textbooks, journals, and reference materials. wi-fi is available across the campus, though sometimes slow during peak hours. the campus is clean, and there are dedicated study zones for students. hostel facilities are satisfactory with clean rooms, water purifiers, and mess services. sports grounds and indoor game rooms are decent too. | [academics]: the academic curriculum is well-structured and regularly updated as per the latest guidelines. faculty members are knowledgeable, approachable, and helpful during both lectures and practicals. teaching methods include smart classes, models, and live demonstrations, which enhance understanding. internal assessments and exams are conducted timely, helping students stay on track. there is regular emphasis on attendance, clinical exposure, and case discussions, especially useful for mbbs students. notes, presentations, and mentoring support are also provided. | [placements]: placements largely depend on the course. for technical and professional courses like b.tech or mba, companies do visit, and average packages are moderate. however, in medical colleges (like mbbs), placement is not the usual norm as students must complete their internship and further pg studies. most students prepare for neet-pg, usmle, or other entrance exams. the college provides guidance for further education and offers occasional seminars or workshops for career planning, but formal placement drives are limited. | [campus life]: campus life is lively and engaging with a mix of academics, cultural events, and student activities. various clubs, fests, and annual functions like sports meets, cultural nights, and fresher?s parties offer great opportunities for interaction and recreation. the college has separate areas for sports, hangouts, and quiet study. peer groups are helpful and friendly. hostel life is decent with shared rooms, and students from diverse backgrounds create a vibrant community. the overall environment is safe, disciplined, and enjoyable.

[college infrastructure]: it does have moderately good facilities when compared to other colleges in kolkata (other than ju and iiest shibpur as they are in a league of their own) but when compared to other top colleges (iem claims to be a top college), it falls short and it falls short by a lot | [academics]: it depends on the subject honestly but most subjects are not taught properly. while a main reason of that is perhaps the extra useless subjects that are taught during college hours, a lot of the teachers are also new and do not have experience in teaching.. they might know their stuff but they cant convey it properly. as for certain subjects like esp (essential skills for professionals) and sdp (skill development for professionals), they claim that these subjects will help in preparing for govt exams which might have been true if they were being taught properly and not during college hours... taking time out from courses such as maths and mechanics for this doesnt make sense... they should have kept this as an elective for those who wanted to do this | [placements]: this years placement has been quite satisfactory. a lot of students from the cs branch and its sub branches (cse aiml, cse csbs, cse ai, etc) got a lot of offers in the range of 15-20 lpa ctc. even our mechanical branch had 100% placement with one senior getting a record-braking 9 job offers (6 from in campus placement, 3 from off campus interviews) | [campus life]: theres no such thing as a campus life here... u have to enter the building by 9:30 as the gates close at that time or u wont be allowed to do any class all day and then u have to run around to get permission to even get in which u usually wont get... after that u only get around 50 mins of break for tiffin and u have to sit around doing all the classes everyday. on top of that u only have around 12 days of leaves per sem allowed in first year and 75% attendance from second and even if i have more than 75 and miss a class u get treated like a legit criminal... if ur coming here expecting campus life, dont, its even worse than a school
college_name: Institute of Engineering and Management Kolkata

review_text: [college infrastructure]: iit bhubaneswar has a great infrastructure. it has very new buildings and infrastructure. it has all the facilities like wificonnection spread across the entire campus. high clas sports facilities and swimming areas. the hostels are good. | [academics]: i have pursued doctor of philosophy in economics with specialization in economics of natural resources. the course gets completed in the year 2023. the experience here is very good and pleasant. the professors are supportive and their guidance helped me a lot. | [placements]: placement is good at iit bhubaneswar. almost 90 to 95 percent students got placed and the average salary offered is around rs 16 lakhs per annum with the highest being rs 30 lakhs per annum. the college is supportive round the placement process.

[college infrastructure]: the college campus is excellent. the campus is very big and the architecture is very unique. this one the biggest campus in the whole surrounding . there are parking facilities and so number of classrooms and labs and big playgrounds. | [academics]: our institute focus mainly on theory and secondary on practical knowledge. our teachers mainly focus on study help students to clear there doubts and help them to write there research papers and tell the benifits of these things. | [placements]: the college is known for its placement cell ,in this college you take 90 percent placement and very renowned companies are coming into the department like exon mobil and honey well etc and and great infrastructure for gate exam .

review_text: [college infrastructure]: there are 10 boys hostel and 3 girls hostel(one girls hostel is proposed to be built by 2024).the 1st year mess food is not that good , it improves from second year onwards.there wifi only in libraries and department buildings.living spaces are clean but the food is average. | [academics]: current academic calendar for 1st years is over worked but for others it is relaxed. the institute provides world class students every year. most faculty are well versed in their fields but there are few who might sometimes be nuisance. | [placements]: compared to many nits the placement here is pretty good with an overall placement percentage of 89%. the highest package this year has been recorded to be 80+ lpa. average package is still somewhat moderate at 14.39 lpa.

indian institute of technology are taking students on the basis of jee advanced examination. all the candidates who qualify jee mains exam are eligible for the jee advanced examination. i qualified the same with air-5431. when i appeared for the counselling, the best course available at my rank was computer science and technology. so, i took admission in iit dhanbad.yes, our college provides intern in the field of research. the placement season in all iits starts in the end of december and continues till march. many companies visit the campus for recruitment and they also provide internship to the 3rd year students. the internship program from college is generally in research field and they are paid a stipend of approx 25000.

review_text: [college infrastructure]: the infrastructure is very well established and has all the facilities for a mechatronics engineer and of other engineering domains and the best part is that one can use all their f it under the guidance of a professor for self improvement. the living spaces are also clean and wonderful. | [academics]: the academic part of the college is also very flexible and at the same time helps implement the knowledge in the minds of those completing the courses. the subjects can be chosen as per the students wish apart from the mandatory ones and that helps a lot. | [placements]: the placements is one of the top reasons for being in this college. even the training of the placements is very good and the number of companies to select from is very vivid, there by giving us a lot of choices. | [campus life]: the campus life is one to look forward to as it has everything from studies to research to sports and with lots of stores and canteens and the culture of the residents is very diverse as there are people from multiple fronts of life. so there's lot to learn and enjoy from. | [anything else]: nothing other than the fact that the college is really good for those aspirants who would love to gets their hands all in into the depths of engineering from whatever background or course they have chosen.

review_text: [college infrastructure]: infrasturucture of the college is great .it has got good hostels for girls ,boys and phd scholars as well. a very good indoor badminton court is provided and a sports complex is there for various games .24*7 library , good laborataries for physics and chemistry . hostels have wifi , mess, canteens each. the living place is clean and hygienic. | [academics]: i pursue b.tech incivil engineering . the college has got good no. of experienced professors and they teach good.they prepare us for the competitive world outside . the acedemic syllabus is updated alternate years. | [placements]: the quality of placement at my college is good. 60-70 %students get placed .highest salary package was 26lakh per anum for cs. average salary offered 40k monthly. yes the placement procedures were easy . the college has been pretty supportive. | [campus life]: it has got a good campus. good feature for us is that for boys the campus is 24*7 free to roam but for girls timing is 8 pm. the location is 10 mins far from the main kurukshetra town. u can get everything easily.

[college infrastructure]: lpu's infrastructure is what attracts people the most. it is very appealing and is one of the finest among all the private universities. lpu is absolutely great in maintaining its beauty as it maintains that hygienic environment by cleaning all the places regularly. there are many facilities such as a big library, indoor sports complex, swimming pool available inside the campus. | [academics]: in academics, lpu does exceptionally well. due to its strong academic base, there are students from different parts of the country studying here. it makes students strong into basic concepts. students are urged to think of new ideas and publish patents and research papers. regular check is there on the quality of teaching and support by the central department. | [placements]: placements are good inside the university. highest package for the university has been 3cr by a cse student. in all the departments, lpu does well with the placements. every year, hundreds of companies visit the campus to hire students. lpu also support students to get the job from in campus placements by providing them preparatory classes. | [campus life]: campus life is absolutely amazing. here the students gets to see different cultural events. on festival days, the university organizes fests. the environment here is supportive and friendly. it is safe inside with the security lpu provides. | [anything else]: lpu is amazing in nearly all aspects.

i chose this course because, in future, the demand for computer engineering is very much high. at gla university, the ratio of students and faculty is good. the teaching methods of all the facilities are excellent. there are two exams held in the one-semester midterm exam and an end-term exam.from the 6th semester, students become eligible for campus placements. amazon, microsoft, samsung, flipkart and other famous companies are visited gla university. the highest package is 32 lakhs per annum and the average package is 15 lakhs in gla university.

[college infrastructure]: infrastructure is not much satisfactory . library and classrooms are fine but canteen area needs better infrastructure . hostels are clean and well maintained , it has good infrastructure and proper hygiene is maintained there. | [academics]: i am pursuing by computer science and engineering . teachers here take their subjects really seriously . they'll take lectures throughtout the session , although you won't have much attendance issues . | [placements]: u can't really rely on this college for your placements . you need to look for outside campus placements too. most of the placements are from cse branch and then comes it . the highest package offered has been 16 lpa and average been 6 lpa as of 2019. | [campus life]: if you are looking for a good campus , then sorry my friend uiet won't help you in this . it doesn't have a good campus .

review_text: [college infrastructure]: my college does have all the necessary facilities. there is wifi almost everywhere and there are no connectivity issues. the labs have all the facilities. the library is great. the hostels are okay. the classrooms are big and are air-conditioned. the medical services are great. | [academics]: i'm studying b-tech in computer science and engineering. the faculty is well qualified and friendly towards students. the fees is a bit high. the courses are well-structured and flexible. overall i think the academics of iit kharagpur is great. | [placements]: placements are excellent. 90-95% of all the students get placed every year. around 350-400 companies come for recruitment, including hfts, amazon, google sprinklr, etc. a lot of students get internships in good companies. | [campus life]: my campus life till now has been great. the events here are amazing. they help release stress after exams. the spring fest and the technical fest in january are the best fests and are so fun. they create an energetic atmosphere. the college has a very social environment. | [anything else]: love it here.

[college infrastructure]: the university has 4 buildings (one under-construction). in the functional ones, it has one admin building and then comes inside the campus the engineering and technology building and the management building. | [academics]: the college teachers are very helpful and qualified. the teachers are experienced and knowledgeable. the teaching quality is much better. they use the digital method of teaching. the course curriculum is very helpful. | [placements]: about 90 % students placed every year and also got chance for backlog which is very part for all students and some big package company also come here, many students go abroad from this college and 90 percent students got internship from this college

[college infrastructure]: college infrastructure is good with quality and good labs , library and auditorium, but the college doesn't have good sports facilities and living spaces , rooms & food are properly maintain with a.c classrooms | [academics]: the level of teaching is good. they are behaving like a friend, you can ask any doubt anytime and also chat with faculty anytime . the curriculum is updated as per ugc. and we also have a separate tutorial class each a week for every core subject which is helpful for clearing doubts and practicing questions | [placements]: yes, the placement in jiit are good and more than 150 quality companies have visited this year. with highest package of 83 lpa. and also 98 percentage students were placed with avg package around 7-10 lpa. there are more opportunities for cse and ece department student . | [campus life]: campus life is above average because of less sports activities and less cultural activities like fests, but in jiit college societies are very active and helpful for all departments . and college is also located in prime location which just beside metro station which is safe for every student

review_text: [college infrastructure]: yes we have all facilities and equipments. we have projectors in the classroom, digital library facilities, we have gym in both boys and ladies hostels too, indoor badminton courts, basketball courts. | [academics]: i completed my mtech in remote sensing and gis and teaching is good. curriculum s updated and includes recent developments which are useful for selection criteria in placements. the quality of teaching is good and student friendly. | [placements]: placements are good. average salary was 5lpa and placement process is easy and pleasant and the staff was supportive. 70 to 80 percent of students are getting placed every year and packages are really good enough. | [campus life]: our college life is best and we had beautiful memories there. we had dance club, dramatic club, sports club, drawing club and so on.. we had dispensary in the college itself and teachers are supportive. we had emergency ambulance in the college.

[college infrastructure]: if we talk about the facilities and infrastructure of this college then it is good. they will provide you with all the latest and updated facilities. the environment of this college is also very good and having a good environment is important for the students. | [academics]: i am doing my post graduation in masters in business administration at this college. and if we talk about the quality of teaching at this college then it is average. the teachers are very helpful and supportive in nature. | [placements]: the quality of placement at this college is good. they will provide the proper guidance for the placement so that the students can placed themselves in a very well respective manners. and they will get a very good package.

so i opted for this course because i didn't have a good rank but at my rank, i am getting some upper branches also i opted for chemical engineering because i am good in chemistry and it is a unique branch from others. and you have some much free time for co-curricular activities and freelancing. the faculty is very awesome and experienced here. the professors are very helpful and kind. all faculty members are very highly qualified. i didn't know the exact qualification but all of them are phd holders aur extra than that. so don't worry about the faculty and teaching. so our semester started late so we have early exams almost 1.5 months before entering college. that's why we have to study hard for the mid-semester examinations. but if you study well and give some extra time to your studies you will definitely score good marks in your exams. so don't worry about the examinations.annual fest take place between january and february. the annual fest is called engifest. and tech fest also take place between jan and feb. life here at campus is so awesome. you have a great exposure. you can join various clubs according to your interest. some of the famous clubs and societies are ecell, yuvaan, pratibimb and cultural council etc. so talking about the library is that the library is very big. it is a three-floored ac library where you get all books your need or can read books in the sitting area of the library. the campus has great sports facilities. there is a very big sports complex which comprises an outdoor hall and an indoor hall. in the outdoor hall, you can play lawn tennis, football, cricket, volleyball, athletics track and basketball. inside the indoor hall, you can play badminton, chess, table tennis etc.

[college infrastructure]: the college is very big in size with many numbers of buildings. it has a campus size of 600 acres, taking a competition to top iits in terms of size. it is very modern and shiny. all the facilities are there inside the university. | [academics]: academically, one of the finest universities in terms of studies. staff is very supportive and kind. faculties provide study materials such as ppts, pdfs, videos, etc. lpu ranks 50th in university rankings. | [placements]: placements is not very good in our department. last year, only one core aerospace company came here for recruitment named skyroot aerospace. other aeronautical companies coming here are airbus, boeing etc. | [campus life]: campus life is very good. there are thousands of students here inside the university which are from different cultures. students get to learn different things such as dance, music, sports, etc. big playgrounds, mall, etc. are there for fun. | [anything else]: overall this is a good university.

[college infrastructure]: college is having best infrastructure. i have never such a huge campus. all the classroom are very big and fully air condtioned. classroom are equipped with projectors college is known for it huge green campus. | [academics]: well educated and helpfull faculities. all the teachers are very friendly and their way teaching is very good. they teach in such a way that each student easily get it everything. and course curriculum is always well organized and updated. | [placements]: i am pursuing btech cse. and cse placement is good in our university . average placement is 5lpa . highest pacakge offered is 32lpa. many companies provide 1 year internship as well. placement cell is very hard working they try to bring more and more for the placement .

the gender ratio is as same as any other engineering college. the labs are also good, well maintained, and all possible tools, chemicals and instruments are available. if you talk of sports then there is different space for almost every sports from table tennis to athletics. there is also gym in our sports complex as well as in the hostels.ya a first year fresher always needs a support from the experienced one (the senior) which is always provided in our college. in fact we all are friends. from giving us the campus tour to helping us in the exams they are always available for us.

[college infrastructure]: infrasture is old but very strong. all facilities and equipments are available. cleanliness is always maintained. library have all books suggested by lecturers. hostels, sports centers are properly maintained. | [academics]: lecturers are all good and modern teaching methods are used. curriculum is always upadated with notifications send to all students about change in any activity. there is no delay in any activity. apart from study there are always seminars for preparing for internship and placements. | [placements]: placements are good. but every students have to prepare nicely to get selected as company expect a bright students from college like this. salary offered depends in the student but in average it can be 10lack to 15 lack. college is always supportive. | [campus life]: students generly focus on study more and all the facilities required for that are available. besides interests of the students are also taken care of and singing, dancing, music, sports and other clubs are available. so overall campus life is very beautiful.

review_text: [college infrastructure]: the college infrastructure is fantastic. the college offers you a gym which is huge and amazing. there is a cricket ground for all the cricket lovers. the classrooms are spacious and very interactive. there are 3-4 libraries .boys hostel is inside the campus and girls hostel is outside the campus. the college offers 3 canteens . the food is very hygienic. | [academics]: i am pursuing b.tech in ece since i have a passion towards science. all the teachers are very knowledgeable and highly skilled. teachers are very helpful and kind. the faculty here are highly qualified. the labs are well built and equipped. | [placements]: a very good placement ratio is seen in pes university. companies like microsoft , infosys and many more come for recruitments every year. the placements of cse and ece are to be very well appreciated. the highest package offered was 63lpa in 2020.

[college infrastructure]: in infrastructure, no doubt lpu has top-class facilities. like they provide libraries to each building or block, computer labs on every floor, and free wi-fi on the college campus, in classrooms you will get all the basic needs things like an ac projector, etc. one thing i disliked is that the wifi is not working properly in hostels and the quality was not up to mark in hostels mess. | [academics]: some teachers are highly qualified and very friendly. they help you a lot. some teachers do not teach us well. in this course, you will get industry exposure. it makes us industry-ready. the difficulty level of exams is not very difficult. if you read one week before exams, you can score good marks. | [placements]: placements are very good at lpu, many career growth opportunities are there, and many well-reputed international companies visit the university for the placements and offers good packages. top roles like software development engineer, data scientist, analyst engineer, back and front end developer are offered to the students. | [campus life]: amazing campus life, these days were never get back, make friends, make memories, live it to the fullest. | [anything else]: excellent campus, experienced faculties.

placement season comes every year likely for last year's students. the company from various fields including cooperate and research-based companies are present. the average package is like 10 to 15 lakhs ctc and the highest fits cores. almost everybody gets placed though depending on the skill of the person also.companies come to grant internship opportunities after every summer break. moreover, information about internships is also circulated via mail between semesters. companies for both research and industrial sectors grant internship opportunities.

review_text: [college infrastructure]: the facilities provided are good. the infrastructure of our college is well maintained. everything is well organized and maintained. the quality of the food provided in the hostel is pure and hygienic. | [academics]: he faculty members are very much supportive and cooperative. they try to help students in all aspects. they are very humble toward students. even the facilities are much qualified and knowledgeable. the quality of teaching is so good | [placements]: almost all the students were placed in our course in various companies the highest package offered is 20-25 lacs. the average package offered is 6-7 lacs. the lowest package offered is 3-4 lacs. tcs , wipro are mass recruiting companies . | [campus life]: amazing life aheah at chitkara

review_text: 95% of students were placed during placement and the remaining them took had gone for higher education. the highest salary was offered by microsoft and it was about 45 lakh per annum and the average salary offered by the companies is around 7.5 lakh per annum. the top recruitment companies for the course for infosys tcs, hcl, wipro, microsoft, accenture etc.in vit we have 8 semesters in 4 years out of which in each semester we have to give three examinations that concludes cat 1 cat 2 and fat 1 in which cat is 30 marks and fat contains 50 marks and in which you have to at least core 50% to get promoted to make semester or otherwise in that particular subject you will get a back which is not good for you.

[college infrastructure]: i'm in sec-128 campus, the entire campus comprises of one large yellow building and 2 dda parks. (although they claimed to have swimming pool, gym, cricket ground etc etc) btw sec 128 doesn't even have a hostel major drawback and is situated in a doomed village. no metro, lacks in cab facilities after 4pm. | [academics]: 70% teachers are good and cooperative have no issues with attendance. curriculum is updated. need improvisation in lab and practical teaching. best part about the exams is they focus on the concept rather than rote learning. | [placements]: our college used to hold a certain position in noida only for it's placement. this yr for the batch 2024 the placements have degraded. but i won't like to blame the t&p department since they're trying their level best. the problem is with my batch "2020". | [campus life]: best: uniform hai, you don't have to think about what to wear every morning. worst: no active societies/clubs.
college_name: Jaypee Institute of Information Technology Noida

review_text: 1. from the 7th-semester student is eligible for campus placement i.e. ppo. 2. the top recruiters are amazon-2offers of 44lacs. microsoft-44. 5 lacs, flipkart-26. 5 lacs 2 offer, samsung-14lacs(10 offers), asian paints-11lacs(2offers), maruti suzuki-9. 4 lacs(2 offers) hero moto corp-8. 34 lacs(6 offers) ,mla group -9 lacs(3 offers). the avg package of college was 8lacs. and the highest package was 60lacs off campus. an international package of 52 lacs was made in paint technology by dubai based company. overall-75%-80% of students get placed. and in cs, it, and electronics paint the placement is above 90%. 3. i am preparing for ups cse 2025 and other a-grade government exams like cds afcat etc.1. name of feet. i. adhyay(cultural fest). ii. technica(technical fest). iii. aarambh(cultural fest + sports fest) 2. there is a central library having more than 1lacs books in different fields+ they have different types of daily newspapers that will help you if you want to go for a government job. 3. amenities- i. three auditorium ii. sports ground for cricket, basketball football tennis, and long tennis ground 4. amenities in the classroom- i.smartboard ii. separate lecture halls. 5. there are different clubs for extra circular activities like nsshbtu, art club, etc.

[college infrastructure]: though the facility and infrastructure were decent enough, the campus is one of a kind. but the wi-fi hardly works in any part of the campus except for the library, which works too rarely. the quality of the facilities in the hostel was adequate, and the food was decent too. sports and games facilities were also available. | [academics]: course curriculum is designed so that students can study hard and prepare themselves for bigger challenges. faculty are very supportive, and they always encourage their students. every 4 months, semester exams take place, and it is not that hard if you are attending lectures | [placements]: the placement percentage was 96.07%. the highest package is inr 50.09 lpa. the average package is inr 8.41 lpa. the top recruiting companies were ibm, xebia, microsoft, and many others. there are higher roles that are provided, but it depends on how much you can grasp. well, college shows 100 percent placement.
college_name: University of Petroleum and Energy Studies Dehradun

review_text: [college infrastructure]: my college infrastructure is average. it has all the facilities and are provided to us. this college let's us to lead a simple life with simple infrastructure. all classes have projector and wifi. hostel wifi is poor and food is below average due to routine food and non vegetarian food. | [academics]: i'm studying in srm college as an information technology in computer science and engineer. till now the faculty teaching is good and some lecturers are very good as they have lot of experience.they helps to the students | [placements]: as of i heard, the placements in my campus are very well and eye grabbing. the percentage of students placed are approximately 75% above. average salary offered by core companies of cse department is 8 to 12 lakhs.
college_name: SRM Institute of Science and Technology Chennai

review_text: [college infrastructure]: the infrastructure of the course and hostels are average. labs are fully functional and provide all the basic equipment but sometimes they do not work. hostels are the minus point i think as there are no air-conditioners in the room. the mess food is not worth it. | [academics]: teachers are average only. i am not going to take any names like they are biased towards some students and doing partiality which is not fair to other students. they are not helpful, and some of them are just coming and going. the course curriculum i think is not good and needs some changes also. they give assignments and quizzes every day, which becomes very hectic for students. the exam difficulty lies between moderate to hard and it looks like they are giving certain questions out of the syllabus to cut marks. | [placements]: in my opinion, the number of placements is pretty good here, as in my surroundings, many students got placed at very brilliant companies. the highest package is 30 lacs per annum. the average package ranges from 5-6 lpa. top recruiting companies for my course like microsoft, amazon, wipro, etc., hire students. roles offered are software engineer, data analyst, hr, etc. the average number of students placed every year is about 50% with the average package to very big packages.

pros/cons: i like the good behaviour of college faculties. i don't like the syllabus because they don't teach us our iiita's syllabus in the first year . they teach us nita syllabus. i don't like the exam schedule because there are no gaps for difficult subjects. | course curriculum overview: i had to pursue cse therefore i choose this course. faculties available all here are of nit agartala because our classes goes on in nita's campus only. faculty are not good here . term exams happens in two stages mid term and end term in each semester but they are very hard.
college_name: Indian Institute of Information Technology - [IIIT], Agartala

review_text: [college infrastructure]: facilities at iit roorkee are unlimited wi-fi, well-furnished classes, and well-ventilated central library. well-developed labs and central gym for both girls and boys, swimming pool, and sports facilities are available. | [academics]: all professors have excellent qualifications, have studied at reputable colleges (mostly iitians), have a good nature, and are not rude to anyone (however you can find some). the exams are not difficult either; one can manage by studying the night before. | [placements]: 85% students are placed in iit roorkee. top recruiting companies are tata, icici bank, indian bank, and others. top roles are manager and others. and there are good placements and good career prospects in tata group, as well as in companies like bhel and ongc. additionally, information teaches basic health care. | [anything else]: great college and best facilities are there with good placement.

students here also get the benefits of excellent internship opportunities both paid and unpaid or research interns both in indian and foreign colleges. min. stipend for paid internships is 30k per month which goes to a maximum of about 17 lakhs offered by optiver for the year 2023. although the cgpa required for such highly paying internships is quite high (obviously).rendezvous is an annual cultural fest and tryst is an annual tech fest that occurs at the start of the year. variety of books and journals available at 24*7 open library. fully air-conditioned classes. sports facilities are also good as compared to other colleges. a lot of clubs are run by student bodies such as music clubs, sports clubs, dance clubs, etc.
college_name: IIT Delhi - Indian Institute of Technology [IITD]

review_text: pros/cons: i appreciated the importance of education that jadavpur university always emphasized upon. the faculty and the teaching, the courses have helped me practice my research skills. the department specifically was holistic by invoking extra-curriculars and co-curriculars which included seminars and conferences. these often arrived with the benefits of cultural performances. the university shaped my understanding of the socio-political world and i shall forever remain grateful. it taught me resilience, circumstantial grounds of understanding and helped me become brave enough to remain out of the mainstream and its box. the administration perhaps is the most tedious segment of the entire university. it causes unnecessary delays and can be frustrating. the syllabus for comparative literature could use some changes, with respect to including newer aspects of literature, moving away from few of the classically foregrounded courseworks. | placement experience: most of the placements that took place at least for the literature departments ended up with people joining educational institutes and ngos. very few joined corporate enterprises like accenture. but it does provide almost a 5 lpa, if well placed. it is academically rigorous, therefore academics are weighed more than industry.

[college infrastructure]: i am totally satisfied with the infrastructure of my college. it is well-maintained and provides students with the resources they need to succeed. the laboratories are well-equipped with the latest equipment and the classrooms are well-maintained and spacious library is a great resource for students, with a wide collection of books, journals the college has a variety of sports facilities, including a football field, a basketball court. | [academics]: i've done b-tech in computer science, all the teachers are expert in their field and well qualified to teach us, our carricuum is also updated and includes recent development in the field of study, it is perfect to make us job ready. | [placements]: yes our placement is one of the things that i'm proud of, in the 2023 placement season, the highest salary package offered was inr 1.02 crore per annum, while the average salary package was inr 9.23 lakhs per annum. a total of 14345 offers were made to vit students, including 4461 super dream offers, 3453 dream offers, 624 marque offers, and 6431 regular offers. | [campus life]: it's amazing to say the least, campus life in vit is vibrant and exciting. there are a variety of activities and events that students can participate in, both academic and extracurricular. some of the academic activities that students can participate in include: technical fests:these fests provide students with opportunities to showcase their technical skills and compete with students from other colleges.research: has a strong research culture, and students can participate in research projects
college_name: Vellore Institute of Technology Chennai Campus

review_text: pros/cons: i have a better experience with this faculty.the experience of the faculty is not much high but they are very interactive with the students in their respective classes.they are interested to explain in other languages other than english. i liked the hostel facilities in the college .the rooms are very clean .we have current availability almost 24/7.there will be showers in bathroom. the one more thing i liked in the college is food .the food taste is good but in mornings it will be not as good as in afternoon.the food will be supplied limittedly. the bathrooms are the only things i have disliked in the hostel because there will be no supply of hot water for 1st year.we need to bath with cold water in winter also. i disliked the sports and gym facilities in this college .there are more people in the college but there are less courts in every sport.we need to wait lot of to play.the gym is also too small. iam not comfortable here with the laboratories because there is no better equipments to do the project and there is no freedom for their own access to use those equipments without helping of faculty . | placement experience: placements of this college is quite good.the staff are taking care of the placements. from 3rd year 3rd semester the college students can elegible for the campus placements. there are more no of companies viditing this collage like amazon,cognijent,wipro,tata etc. more than 250 menbers will get placements every year. according to my information the highest package is 44.4 lpa and average package is 12.3lpa. the people who got more than 7 gpa are elligible to get placements but if you get more you will get some more importance. at first i will do internships and jobs that are provided by colege and then i will go to software field more likely.

[college infrastructure]: the college infrastructure is really posh and nice. i really like it. it is good. it is a beautiful campus. exploring the campus is a must do. it is very calm, relaxing and soothing. everyone will love it. | [academics]: the college academics is good. the faculty are really nice and talented. i like the course curriculum very much. i am happy with the course i chose and would recommend it to others. academically it is a very good college. | [placements]: i heard the college placements are really good. i think there are a lot of placement opportunities. seniors are extremely nice and guide us a lot and help us with interviews to crack the college placement opportunities. | [campus life]: amazing | [anything else]: no

[college infrastructure]: yes the college has all the necessary infrastructure facilities and equipments........ the classes have projectors implemented.... the laboratories are overall good but old equipments... living spaces are clean food not really that hygenic | [academics]: i am studying btech mechanical engineering..... the quality of teaching is average... i took mechanical engineering because. i was interested in it since a long time..... ... no the study doesn't make job it depends on how much we can be practically implement it | [placements]: 60 percent of college placement....... i have not applied for placement yet................. ................................... .. yes the college is supportive in terms of placement...... average salary was 2-3 lakhs | [campus life]: the college campus is beautiful..... the best feature of the college are the plants and trees how they are well maintained all over the campus.... ... the location of the campus is safe but not really good in terms of handling emergency
college_name: SRM Institute of Science and Technology Chennai

review_text: [college infrastructure]: university infrastructure is build in such a way that instead of very big campus students can easily find their departments. various blocks of different departments are divided differently. the infrastructure of our college is well maintained. everything is well organized and maintained. the quality of the food provided in the hostel is pure and hygienic. the medical facilities is also good and there are many sports played in the campus. | [academics]: faculty teach us in so friendly manner that for every problem they help us to understand many times. also the syllabus was divided in such a way that they don't only prepare for college exam but also for gate exams too. teachers are so caring that they also provide online works too for understanding of subject. | [placements]: as per my knowledge the level and quality of placements here is appreciative. almost 95% students are placed every year. students who work hard and study properly get placed. average salary is 5-6 lakh. | [campus life]: college campus is well maintained and beautiful though there are many restrictions for hostellers yeah but environment over there is very good and worth for students from far away places. i have listened from my friends that mess food is not that good but we have square one where you can get everything on order basis.
college_name: Chitkara University Institute of Engineering and Technology Jhansla

review_text: [college infrastructure]: my university offers impressive infrastructure that supports both academic excellence and student life .the classrooms are modern and equipped with digital tools with computer labs and specialised laboratories provide us hand on experience | [academics]: graphic era combines accredited programs, experienced faculty, industry linked curriculum solid placement and research potential. career support services and seminar help students prepare for recruitment | [placements]: the placement cell is active and supportive and many students get placed before graduation.internship opportunities are also good and some students receives pre-placement offers ppo based on their performance | [campus life]: university has a clean campus with modern building smart classroom and well equipped labs the best part is vibrant student life worst part is the limited campus space teachers and staff are helpful | [anything else]: my experience at graphic era has been exciting and full of learning the campus, feel safe and friendly

life at college is extremely good. the infrastructure is something i really like complimenting the greenery of the grass and various flowers. there are good lecture halls, libraries, canteens, hostels etc. the annual cultural and tech fest is held yearly in the month of march and is known by the name of moksha innovision. the library is well-equipped with books and journals that are very helpful to everyone. the classrooms are well equipped with ac, smart teaching techniques, charging ports etc. the sports culture is also well promoted in our college, agasty is the annual sports fest conducted and winter sports in which all the year students compete with each other. there are a lot of societies ranging from dramatics, debating, singing, tech, consulting, finance, photography, arts and a lot more to give students a detailed experience of a fun college life.the reason why i chose this course is that i preferred college over the stream. since then has studied and completed 3 semesters in a hard deadline of 1 year, and given back-to-back exams because again we were/are the 'covid batch'. nevertheless, it has been a rewarding journey too. the faculty here as any other college would have is mixed. there are some extremely good professors who really persuade and like to help the kids in any way possible. their qualifications are also commendable. the kind of support these teachers provide is really to be thankful for. reviewing teaching methods is also seamless as we are supposed to fill out teaching feedback forms which help us to keep a check. exams are held timely as per the length of a semester and the difficulty always varies.

[college infrastructure]: yes my college have all the necessary infrastructure , facilities and equipment. proper classrooms are there for students and laboratories with all necessary materials. a well maintained library with good books.yes my college have all the necessary infrastructure , facilities and equipment. proper classrooms are there for students and laboratories with all necessary materials. a well maintained library with good books. | [academics]: basically i studied microelectronics and communication engineering department and we get best quality of teaching in our college . all the study material are provided through mail or google classrooms. and these materials are beneficial for our future. | [placements]: well ,about the placement . so the quality of placement at my college is good. maximum students sit in the placement and more than half get selected with good salary package. and all the facilities of training and placement cell is very helpful.

the computer science department of thapar is among the best in india. the tentative lecturers are above 300 and average age is around 30. all the faculty members, professors, assistant proffesors etc have completed their doctoral degrees. they have expertise in their respective fiels like database management, networking and coding etc. all of them are holding adeqaute experience and exhaustive research experience in their respective fields.the gender ratio is equal and diverse culture since thapar has students from many cities of north india. there are many extra curricular activities and competition which are much helpful in providing a gap from the daily hectic schedule. there are numerous clubs/societies a student can join and do work for them. we at thapar with diverse culture still live with peace with people befriending students irrespective of caste or religion.
college_name: Thapar Institute of Engineering and Technology - [Thapar University]

review_text: [college infrastructure]: the food of mess is not good sometimes but it is hygienic. smart boards are available in every classroom. the college has more than 1000 computers and all the laboratories are provided with the latest equipments. | [academics]: i am studying b.tech in 1st year in the stream of computer science. in our course the teachers are amazing and most of them are trained professionals.there are activities like showing presentations on topics that makes us ready for jobs in the future. | [placements]: yes the quality of placements are okayish and the placements have been good but mostly only for computer science branch. students also have to achieve a certain cgpa to sit for placements for most of the good companies.

talking about the fee it's 86000 per sem with a hostel fee of 69000 annually with 3500-4000 mess fee for the month some scholarships can be availed based on financial status. campus placements and internship opportunities are very good. last year about 90% got internship opportunities from the cse branch and 95-96% got placed. with an average package of 17lacsplacement and internship opportunities are quite very good. the main reason behind choosing this college is the placement stats only. last year around 90% got internship opportunities and around 95-96% got placed from cse with an average package of 17lacs. many big companies came for placement including microsoft, apple, goldman sachs, amazon, and uber.
college_name: Punjab Engineering College University of Technology - [PEC]

review_text: [college infrastructure]: coep have all necessary infrastructure, facilities and equipment. almost all the classrooms have projector facility. laboratories are well maintained. college have central library. so overall infrastructure of college is good. | [academics]: i'm pursuing btech computer engineering right now from this college. because computer engineering field have too many job opportunities. faculty of coep is good. hence quality of teaching is good. overall academics is good | [placements]: coep technological university is known for having a good placement record. it attracts a variety of companies during the placement season. students from coep technological university get placed in various sectors including it and core engineering and many more.

[college infrastructure]: the ece department of manit consists of various labs along with the lecture halls. the institute includes special 5g testing labs, which have been recently introduced, along with a special computer centre in the ece department. | [academics]: this course is industry-friendly and applicable, and the best thing is that its concepts are used in daily life. i wish the projecting of powerpoint presentations would be improved. events like maffick and technosearch are held every semester and many fests are organized with a good campus crowd. the campus surroundings are very beautiful, with full greenery. scholarships are available for local people with government aid. extracurricular activities are also supported at the college. | [placements]: before the recession period, almost 80?85% of the students were placed, with the average package being around 19.3 lacs per annum and the highest package being 82 lpa. the top recruiting companies visit the campus which includes atlassian, google, adobe, microsoft, de shaw, etc. | [anything else]: superb college.

review_text: our college started before three years. there no batch completed 4th year. so i don't know much about placements.in srm chennai there are good placement. so we are expecting good placrmnets here also. our college started before three years. there no batch completed 4th year. so i don't know much about placements.in srm chennai there are good placement. so we are expecting good placrmnets here also.i wrote entrance exam for the srm university called srmjee. i got rank 26,000.at first i went to srm chennai for admission. but they asked one lakh extra for the rank i got. so, again i came to amaravathi and attended for counclling. i got admission here.

the placements of this college are impressive. this college is known for its placement with an average package of around 12 to 13 lakhs and the highest package of 1.15 cr. around the top 20 % of students get placed in top mncs such as google, microsoft, amazon, de-shaw, intuit, jio, etc. with high packages ( of above 15 lpa ). rest get placed in mass recruiters and other service-based companies like wipro, tcs, etc.i chose this course because i was interested in this course. there is a good faculty: student ratio of about 1:15. there are some very good teachers while some are average, overall, there is a good study environment. there are two unit tests, mid-term vivas, and labs, and end-term exams. exams can be very well aced in one month of preparation.
college_name: Jaypee Institute of Information Technology University - [JIIT]

review_text: [college infrastructure]: college is well furnished and has an excellent infrastructure. hostels are also well maintained and classrooms are very good. overall campus is good with proper facilities. campus wi-fi is provided for all computer based courses and in all laboratories. libraries are huge and well facilitated. | [academics]: outstanding academic institution. the curriculum gets constantly updated according to the latest developments in the world. the quality of teaching is very good. the staff are experienced and well-versed in their subjects. | [placements]: good placements, almost 90% of the students get placed with an average salary of 7 lpa. the college has a great reputation among top tier companies and white collar job holders. the faculty also provide great amount of support during placements. | [campus life]: students constantly engage themselves in various club activities and associations. sports opportunities are really good too.

[college infrastructure]: our college has the good infrastructure.... and also our clg is top 4 nit in india.... our college has well planned structure through which we can enjoy our academics as well as the beautiful nature..... our college is compressed of almost 70% of with greenery.... and each can enjoy the beautiful nature in it and can feel it | [academics]: nit warangal has the best educational system. each and every professor is highly qualified.. each and every professor gives their best and make us to understand each and every topic in very easy way. they not only teach but they make us to understand each topic without any doubts. professors are very friendly... | [placements]: nit warangal has best placements our students have lived up to the expectation of organisations that visit the campus looking for bright candidate to take up important and challenging responsibility at their workplace. the ccpd boasts of maintaining an exllect rapport with a wide spectrum of companies spread across various industry sectors

[college infrastructure]: the infrastructure is really good. many trees surround the entire campus. college has all the necessary infrastructures, facilities and equipments. classrooms have smart boards which make teaching-learning process more advanced. | [academics]: i was pursuing b.com in marketing. the quality of teaching was really good. our curriculum was updated and included all the recent developments in the field. the study also made us job ready. the faculty and staff were amazing as well. | [placements]: the quality of placements has been really good over the years. almost 40% students from our batch were placed in many reputed and well known companies. the placement process was easy and simple. college was also very supportive.
college_name: Kalinga Institute of Industrial Technology Bhubaneswar

review_text: i always wanted to be a programmer so i decided to opt for a bachelor's in computer science engineering. if we talk about the faculty it's pretty excellent and intellectual and the teaching method is very interactive. exams took place in two halves the first phase is a mid-term examination and the second phase ends the term examination every semester the level of the exam it's not that tough it's pretty moderate.at the start of the 3rd year students are eligible for placements and they can sit in placements drives. companies like amazon, tcs, tech mahindra, tata consultancy, cardekho etc. the highest offered was 42 lakh/ annum from amazon; the average package is 7 lakhs and the lowest package is 5 lakhs.

[college infrastructure]: great college infrastructure can increase the experience tenfold for the students. campus/college infrastructure is something that students look at when deciding whether to join the campus or not. beyond the bustling classrooms and lively campuses, the infrastructure plays a pivotal role in shaping your academic journey. | [academics]: a well-equipped library, state-of-the-art laboratories, and modern classrooms enhance the learning environment. access to these facilities can greatly contribute to your academic growth. i do not recommend this college. | [placements]: the placement records of the colleges are inconsistent because of a lack of training and practice, some colleges provide rigorous training by not exposing students to mock interviews and mock aptitude tests. as the students do not attempt the mock interviews and practice the aptitude tests, they are screened out of the campus hiring process.

[college infrastructure]: lovely professional university is having more than it's need. facilities like smart board, wifi , ibraries available here nd well maintained. food is hygienic nd there is a lot of food courts offering good quality of food. | [academics]: i'm a student of btech cse department. teaching quality is very good , faculties are very polite and always available to help students. they provide mock drives which helps us in preparation for placements. | [placements]: placement is very good more than 600 companies visits our campus. for a better salary students must fill their eligibility criteria as well as one has to be very well in speaking and listening skills. | [campus life]: campus life is very good. each block has lots of cctv cameras for security. lpu is free of raging, seniors helps junior. university having it's own mall called uni-mall or unicenter and own hospital called uni-hospital.

[college infrastructure]: good infrastructure. new hostels with neat and clean classrooms . good playground but with average maintenance. sports facilities need to be maintained properly. should support students with full phase construction of the institute. | [academics]: student friendly facilities with good academic knowledge . if you study properly with interest you can achieve what you want and be in a good position in your future. it all depends upto how you study. | [placements]: average placements when compared to other nits. need to train the students properly for placements and should be supported with at most support. a special classes should be taken and trained properly in order to obtain better placement for all. | [campus life]: good campus life

pros/cons: the college has all equipment???s necessary the college has very good and experienced teachers it has good wifi all over both the campus the infrastructure is a bit old and shaggy college has started taking nri students for admission college timings are a bit weird earliers | course curriculum overview: the courses seem not too out of time but surely the curriculum can be a lot better . i am in first sem right now so i cannot really give a good opinion on this but what we are taught is relevant to us

there are a lot of societies in our university, u just have to say the name of which kind of society u want to join whether it is tech, dance, robotics, space, etc. university conduct 2 fests every yr moksha(name of the fest) which is 2nd biggest fest in delhi every sports facilities are available and they conduct 2 sports competition every yr.fees are a major issue for every parent but when u come to this university fees may be an issue there is an sbi branch that resolves ur all your issues with an education loan. university increases fees every yr by 10k approx. keep in mind there is a lot of scholarship from central and state governments which will give approx 75% fees of 4 yr.
