review_text: [college infrastructure]: college infrastructure is not at par with nits, iiits. it's infrastructure is similar to the aktu college not good not bad. classroom are moderate, library i. e. central library is best in the college, this is the thing that i compare with the colleges like nits, etc. living specs , we can say clean yes and food is hygienic. | [academics]: in terms of academics, only bookish knowledge is given no focus on practical knowledge they never encourage u to do some wonderful projects. the curriculum is not yet updated, old curriculum is followed by college department. professors are good in cse department if we compare it with other department | [placements]: placements is the only thing that worth it. in cse department, the average package goes nearly 10 lpa and median package ranges between 9-10 lpa. placement process is not that tough but the coding round and hr round takes place which makes it difficult to crack. | [campus life]: campus life is good, the main thing is mainly 80%people from up so u find many people from your own culture, so they are quite more interactive . the college is not in the remote place. teachers are supportive in cse department, they always help the students.

the fee structure is available at the official college site also. basically, 2.6 lakh fees have 2 lakh tuition fee components, you can avail of fee waiver benefits on that according to the parental income slab. there are many scholarships opportunity therei choose bachelor of technology in computer science and engineering because i have had an interest in cs before and cs placements are good in this college. companies like google and other tech giants used to visit campuses for placement & internship.
college_name: ISM Dhanbad - Indian Institute of Technology - [IITISM]

review_text: [college infrastructure]: bits pilani goa has all the necessary infrastructure, facilities and equipment. there are plenty of resources for studies, sports, and extra curricular activities. classrooms have black boards, and projector enabled smart boards. there is a huge sports center called as student activity centre. there are a lot of hostels for boys and girls. all hostels, labs, and libraries have wi-fi enabled. there are 4 food mess with different sections - veg, jain & non-veg. the food is very tasty and hygienic. | [academics]: i have completed me in computer science from bits goa. the quality of teaching is good. the academic pattern is really great. we get to work on many assignments and projects, which not only helps in building resume, but also develop and improve our skills. our curriculum is updated every year, and includes all the recent developments and research work in the field. studying here makes a student 100% job ready. | [placements]: quality of placements in bits goa is improving year by year. the average package here for cs students is more than 20 lpa. its good for electronics and other branches too. more than 95% of students gets placed in cs branch. i am not sure about other branches. highest salary package offered was 44 lpa in microsoft. some of the students got placed in microsoft from cs branch. we get different options for placements - through internship, actual campus recruitment and the practice school.

[college infrastructure]: yes , in terms of infrastructure , the college is well equiped . moreover , it has one of the largest libraries . the wifi facility is offered in the classes as well as the hostels and at good speeds . also , smart boards are present in classes so that the concept can be explained in a better way with the help of this technology | [academics]: i'm studying electronics and computer engineering because i was fascinated by both software and hardware . the curriculum is average to be honest and needs an update . although , various updates have been made every year in order to make the curriculum suitable for the industry however , it still needs improvement. thus , the curriculum needs certain improvement to make us job-ready | [placements]: the placements are quite good in the college . there is a special placement cell which works with the industry and does ensure that we are trained and given all proper resources so that we are well prepared for our job interviews . the average salary varies from 6-8 lac per annum . | [campus life]: the college campus is just amazing . with lots of societies and social activities organised regularly , you do feel that the college atmosphere is trying to improve your personality day by day . the campus offers great sporting facilities and is also close to the nsa patiala , thus making it a desirable place for the sports quota students . moreover , there are various socities that organise various events like coding events , food festivals , mun's .thus , it is a great atmosphere
college_name: Thapar Institute of Engineering and Technology Patiala

review_text: [college infrastructure]: our college is having a nice, well fursnished infrastructure. classrooms are well equipped and even having projector availability. library, labs, canteens all are comfortable. wifi facility is very good. | [academics]: all lecturers are well experienced and teaches us very well using different aids. practical approaches are given preferences. co curriculum is alos well balanced with so many events and fests. academics wise our college is very good. | [placements]: placed availability in our vollege in quite much high. as being under well reputed kle society, so many companies visit us every year. board members and alumnis are so supportive. every year output is very appreciable and increasing. | [campus life]: whole campis is completely friendly, cooperative and peaceful, hence i love my campus life.

[college infrastructure]: chitkara campus is fully furnished and has very good infrastructure. all the infrastructure is designed by the architect students of chitkara only. wi-fi facility is available to students only for the work basis. labs have updated version of all the software. | [academics]: teachers are helpful, qualified, and knowledgeable. they clear students doubts in a good manner. the curriculum of the course is entirely relevant. it makes the students industry-ready that's why the course has records of placement. teachers also help students in every aspect as they can. | [placements]: almost 90% of students get placed in this course. the highest package offered in our course is 15 lpa, the lowest package offered in our course is 3 lpa, and the average package offered in our course is 6 lpa. top recruiting companies in this course are infosys, tcs, virtual, wipro, hitachi, etc. almost 95% of students got an internship from this course in good companies like infosys, virtusa, beehyv, etc.
college_name: Chitkara University Institute of Engineering and Technology Jhansla

review_text: [college infrastructure]: the campus is clean and well maintained. it isn't big area wise but isn't small either. all the necessary facilities and equipment have been provided. the hostels are clean and the food provided is hygenic. | [academics]: teaching is average at best. students are encouraged to take up moocs and study more on their own, though. syllabus in each and every course has been recently reduced so that students find it easy to score good marks. the teachers and professors are very helpful, especially in my branch i.e. cse. 3 midsems per semester make life hellish, though. | [placements]: the scenario has gotten better recently. students in cse are easily placed with good to great offers. it is hard to say about other branches, though. nevertheless, from what i've heard, if your cgpa is over 7 or 7.5 and your smart enough, you'll have little to no trouble getting on-campus placements. the highest salary package this year was around 30 lakhs offered in software development (that's what you expect from a college in bangalore) to multiple students.
college_name: Dayananda Sagar College of Engineering Bangalore

review_text: fests are literally the best part of this college. moksha is the largest cultural fest of delhi organized in around march _ and april. and innovation tech week is the technical fest conducted nearly a bit before moksha. central library is well equipped with almost every genre of books. classrooms are very modernised with state of art infrastructure digital classrooms, cinema hall-like seating arrangements etc. name any sport and you will find someone practising it in the sports complex and sports grounds. there is a no. of clubs run by university students.csai is the premiere course of the university. you will get the most top-minded student on the entire campus in your class. also, ai has got a very bright future in the coming years. the student-faculty ratio is nearly about 8:1. the faculty is highly qualified, having deep knowledge of the subjects. exams are kind of moderate, you need to prepare at least 1 week before exams in order to get a good grade.

[college infrastructure]: college have a very good and outstanding infrastructure prevailing in 500+ acres. having all the necessary and important infrastructure inside the campus ranging from a phenomenal food court,malls, and 24 into 7 operational medical facilities. having a good library having more than 5 lakh+ books to improve your knowledge and reasoning. college campus is full of lush green trees and saplings making the ecosystem cool and fresh during summers it is worth roaming and hanging around with friends. | [academics]: the computer science and engineering branch of lovely professional university is prevalent among young breed coders and technocrats. academics go hand in hand along with the co curricular activities and skills. | [placements]: if you studied well in the college in your 4 years and you have the demanding it skills then you don't have to worry about the placements almost all sort of companies along with ranging packages visit lpu . | [campus life]: college life is good and phenomenal

fee is quite less than private colleges as iits are government colleges but placements are too high than private colleges. and for scholarships i have somewhat less knowledge as i am a first year undergraduate. but placements is quite high. as average package for cse branch is 26lpa and highest domestic package is 82 lpa.about faculty, faculty is highly experienced and extra-ordinary in their respective fields. you can ask your doubts in class and via email. in case if respective professor is not there then you can ask their tas doubt anytime they will help you. each ta have around 30 students.
college_name: IIT Ropar - Indian Institute of Technology - [IITR]

review_text: [college infrastructure]: college was nice and amazing mostly all facilities are there and infrastructure was also good. the laboratories were also there and big labs with proper wifi connection. every classroom is having the smart board. | [academics]: professors are knowledgeable and approachable, providing valuable insights and guidance. the library is well-stocked, and there are ample opportunities for research and practical learning. yes it's makes me job ready. | [placements]: companies come to our college to give job opportunities in our campus placement drive and selected students will be given good package in offer letter, every year almost 80 percentage of gradutes were placed in campus placement.
college_name: PDPM Indian Institute of Information Technology Design and Manufacturing Jabalpur

review_text: campus life is very nice because of many factors like there are many extracurricular activities which helps one to remain occupied when bored. also a large number of fests in every field like technical, cultural and management are organizedthapar institute of technology, pataila, punjab helps students to excel in studies along with keeping his or her passion or interest in some other field alive. also faculty here is very experienced and cooperative.
college_name: Thapar Institute of Engineering and Technology - [Thapar University]

review_text: [college infrastructure]: nit uttarakhand stand out for engineering school teachers are great and supporting with seniors support and great opportunity to internship and placement. new infrastructure and technology help us understand concept of course | [academics]: academic is great teachers guide and help us understand the concept of course. new tech and infra help us to. with seniors guiding us and helping and and motivation from dean and principle help us boost our career | [placements]: placement is decent very honest the highest package here was 1 cr which is decent but not all the students get placement infact interesting thing about this college is internship opportunities which help build cv and connection in top firms and companies | [campus life]: campus life is decent particularly for me i thought it would be boring but it's completely opposite. indoor and outdoor activities are best playing sports and extra curricular activities like music dancing and acting classes are helping students in many various ways

fests in gla are average from january to april, you would enjoy number of functions in gla all books you need are available in the library if there was not a book that you want you can apply for that book and that book easily be available in 10 to many cricket matches, baseball, football matches are organized from time to time and also students selected for university level tournaments many clubs are there at gla university yantriki society asme literario club math club poetry club droid speed club analysis club laughter club and many morei choose this course because of my interest in cars and bikes engines, and designs from starting faculty is well qualified for their subjects the method of their teaching is a practical basis term exams was not difficult even if you study 5 days before exams you can easily pass the exam

[college infrastructure]: the college has a fairly good infrastructure. we have proper labs,libraries, sports centres and hostels. the classes are well maintained. we have a wifi network in the college premises. living places , hostels and canteens are all clean and hygenic. | [academics]: i am studying computer science. because its my favorite branch and believe me the faculties here are just perfect. the cirriculum is updated. and ya what you will study here makes you job ready as well. | [placements]: the quality of placements has been a little dull. lower percent of students were placed. highest salary package was about 98 lakh from coa branch last time. average salary offered was about 12lakhs. the placement process is easy . and the college is suppportive. | [campus life]: the campus life is good . there are many canteens and stuff like fests amd all. but the administration is not so friendly . however the teachers and students are very friendly amd co-operative. the location of the college is very good and any emergency situation can easily be cured here.
college_name: Netaji Subhas University of Technology New Delhi

review_text: [college infrastructure]: the facility are excellent. the infrastructure is better. there is a beautiful library and we can study there peacefully. the food serve in this mess is better. there is sports centre in this college. medical facilities are good. the quality of food is optimal and you are provided with two boiled eggs for breakfast on wednesday for non vegetarians only. mess is vegetarian and you would get bored of paneer since that is more common. | [academics]: the teaching quality is quite good. they provide you with sufficient notes lecture videos and modules to score well even if you study by yourself. semester exam are easily internal passing marks are 30 and external passing marks are also 30. course curriculum is good and up to the mark | [placements]: the college is best in terms of placement. the college gives a lots of opportunity in terms of placement. it depends totally on you whether you will be qualify or not. about 80% of students quote internship from our codes and of those 20% got stipend. highest salary package in our college is 45 lpa and the low salary packages 3.25 lpa and the average salary packages 7.85 lpa.
college_name: Ajay Kumar Garg Engineering College Ghaziabad

review_text: there are various events held in our college. kashish-for first year followed by the events of singing and dancing night.the event is organised by the second year for the fresher's which also includes the launch of the kem cho fresher's video of first year as what they expect from the college. well there are also the student elections that are held inside the college in which various posts of the student parliament are decided through polling. sparsh-annual fest applicable for all the years ignis and various of student chapters that organise their respective events. there are also specific student chapters for each departments that organise their specific departmental events . their is also ncc.yeah it's slightly expensive for a middle class fellow but goes on decreasing with the passing years.it includes fees for academics as well as different fee for hostel and the as the first sem passes we also have to pay for the next sem mess fees and the fees for the academic term of next sem and the same system goes on . after the one year concludes and at the end of the summer vacations we are allowed to choose our hostel room for our next year though online portels through which our hostel fees is paid.and the tuition fees is paid through the online portel.
college_name: Sardar Vallabhbhai National Institute of Technology - [SVNIT]

review_text: the life at the campus is literally good, the annual fest is called the unifest . there are lots of fests that are organized regularly. the life there is very good. a variety of clubs are there you can find everything to find your niche.course faculties are really good, helping, etc. most are from iits and good-ranked colleges. term examination difficulty was like average you just have to study a week for them. the environment is very positive.

[college infrastructure]: the infrastructure was good. most of the students are in good condition. all the classes are equipped with projectors. wifi facility is availabe inside the college. the food available in canteen was so good and at reasonable proce. | [academics]: the syllabus was good but we should study on our own. curriculum is updated for every 2 years. many senior faculties are there in the department. most of the subjects are relevant to placements. it was a great place for learning with your friends. alumni network was very strong. | [placements]: average package was around 6 lpa. the highest paclage was cisco 28lpa. we would get around 40 to 50 companies mostly of product based and many startups. but the competition is heavy as you have to compete with btech, integrated msc studnets.

[college infrastructure]: the infrastructure is good. the college has laboratories for the engineering students, the library has 200000+ books, about the sports center the college have swimming pool, basketball court, tennis court, cricket ground, for the sports department the college has a separate building. the college has smart boards, wifi for the engineering students the college have mcbooks too. they all are well maintained. the college have 3 cafes and 1 canteen, and they're hygienic too. | [academics]: i'm pursuing integrated bba mba, i've chose this course to escape from the pg entrance exams the teaching faculty is far better then i expected. yes it includes all the recent development in the field as we've digital marketing as our subject | [placements]: as much as i heard and know the placement rate is pretty much better. almost 90% of the students got placed. the average salary is 14lpa the college is supportive with the placements and they also provide us the internship | [campus life]: the campus life is so good you can get the best people there the activities are so much a student can engage in there are more than 70 clubs students can engage in the campus is safe as much as i know
college_name: Dr Vishwanath Karad MIT World Peace University Pune

review_text: pros/cons: excellent acadmic environment and facult one of the most imprresive aspec of iit ropar is strong reaserch oriented most professors have phd from top iits and their teachign is not just limited to texbooks but also focus on developing problem solving modern infrastructure and peacful campus teh iit ropar campus is among teh most wel planned andmodern cmapuses in india the infrastructure includes lecutre hals labs and high speed netowrk and smart classes hostels are clean comofrtable and equipped strong placemtn and career development srupport iit ropar offers sold placement opportunites and guidance for career advancemnt limited city exposure and social life one ofthe major drawbacks of it ropar is its location the campus is siiuated in an smalll twon rupnagar which lacks teh kind of social and cultural exposure that studentsi in diteis enjoy gender imblaance and limited diversity anoterh are when iit roapr still need improvement is gender diversity teh girls to boys ration on campous is quie low, roughly around 1:8 it depnds on branches good quality and hostel maintenace issues although hostel are modern and well equpped the food quality in mess is one of the most common complaints among students | placement experience: placemtn basic and elibility student typically become legible for on campus placements druing their final year often from 7th semeste ronward teh institue career devleopment an placemnt cell handels registrationof elegible student invites companies
college_name: IIT Ropar - Indian Institute of Technology - [IITR], Ropar

review_text: [college infrastructure]: vit has state of art infrastructure with well equipped labs for both software and hardware components, has unlimited access to both books and e-books. vit has incredible sports facilities boosting students' overall development. the hostels are clean and hygienic and the management always listen to the students' complaints and try to resolve them as soon as possible. | [academics]: i am currently pursuing my btech in ece. the over all learning is more oriented on research and development. the exams are more based on application based questions. the curriculum of the course is anually updated. | [placements]: the quality of placements in vit is exceptional. top companies like microsoft, cisco and others come anually to recruit students. the highest package offered was 48 lakh per annum voming from microbiology. the offer was bagged by a girl from cse department. the average salary goes around 6-8 l.p.a.

[college infrastructure]: the college is really good about everything like the infrastructure the facilities and the laboratory and the classroom is neat and kabs are as well and there is a library in every block and it has a wide range of books in it . | [academics]: i was a student of bca in the college and the teaching quality is good and the teachers are well knowlegeble to provide information about the course and they are experienced in their respective feild. | [placements]: the quality of placement in the college was good as i was student and many of my batchmate get selected in companies as the placement cell was supportive and the teachers as well and the average salary was good enough to start you career

[college infrastructure]: iitm is known to have world-class facilities with state-of-the-art laboratories, well-equipped classrooms, all major sports facilities, a central library, cafeterias, and good hostel and mess facilities. the whole first semester was insufficient for me to explore all the places on campus. initially, hostel facilities may not match the expectations, but soon, the hostel would become my second home. i was scared about mess food, but it is good in terms of taste and as well as hygiene. | [academics]: honestly, classroom study is not that interesting except for a few prof's classes, but the environment and culture outside the class and friends will teach you a lot. the research and entrepreneurship environment is the best among all the institutes in the country. the curriculum is always up to date and aligned with the industry requirements. | [placements]: iitm is always a favorite destination for recruitment for many top firms (e.g., google, amazon, netflix, ibm, and many more). the placement percentage for 2019-20 was 64% across all streams, with the highest salary offered, rs. 88.82 lakhs per annum in the computer-science branch. the median salary offered to ug was 13.06 lakhs per annum. institute extends all support to help you out in the placement procedure. | [campus life]: there are a lot of activities to do if someone is willing. there are many clubs in the institute that engage you in different activities all the time. i have never seen an event like "saarang" in my life before. apart from academic pressure, campus life is enriching and you will make a lot of friends and lifetime memories.

[college infrastructure]: infrastructure is good but sports facility is not available and hence there are some playing problems faced by students. otherwise, halls are present which are quite big and clean and all the seminar take place | [academics]: academics is good as well because of different qualified professors. there are many professors having phds degrees and students are always under scrutiny by taking exams. this prepared them well for the semester exams. | [placements]: as far as placement is concerned it is not very good neither very bad. although it is a fact that iem provides one of the best placements among private institutions in kolkata or west bengal. placement cell and supports are available.
college_name: Institute of Engineering and Management Kolkata

review_text: because i am interested in this course and the student's ratio is high here but the education quality is best teacher support students with a lot of exams held every one to two months and it is easy to pass if you pay attention in classesthe campus is good it looks good every two or three months fest is going on and students enjoyed lot them facilities of the classroom are high tech full ac and seats are good and projectors in every class social media handles available

[college infrastructure]: although the college campus is quite small compared to many others but the facilities are great, we have great computer labs (nvedia, apple mac lab,etc), there are also sports facilities from tennis court to badminton and swimming pools. | [academics]: the teachers are all phd, and really easily approachable for any issues you have, they are friendly and will help you out with your doubts whenever you approach. the cse curriculum gives us a lot of chances to implement what we studied because of having a project almost every semester | [placements]: bennett university is a fairly new college, so the placements doesn't attract many high paying giants as of now but with every new batch passing out of the college is also improving in this sector too.

[college infrastructure]: the college infrastructure is really good. the the campus is built beautifully and every thing is well organised. the hostels are also in really good condition. and everything is built with modern technology. | [academics]: the faculty is really good, all doctrate faculty. they help students in every concept, clear every doubt. also the way of teaching is good they put very less pressure on students. the type of material provided is also very good. | [placements]: the placement is quite good in vit as compared to other colleges. the average package is 6-7 lakh per year. the highest package was 43 lakh per year. if u are in core branch then you will definately get a good placement. | [campus life]: campus life is good the atmosphere there is really good for coding and studying. but the problem is that the college rules are really strange.you can't go out after 10 and there is discrimination between the timings for girls and boys. you also can't stay at your friend room.so campus life is not so cool.

review_text: [college infrastructure]: some departments are very old but overall its nice to be here.....new building are underconstruction. the swimming pool is nice and big. the roads are smooth and transport facility from tots are nice and cheap. | [academics]: the quality of teaching is really poor. teachers are highly qualified in subjects but dont know how to teach, the major mass is suffering problem. they think that just because we are iitians we dont much help with our studies but we really do, we want help | [placements]: this year it has seen a fall, prolly due to recession etc. but i guess we will get back and pace ourselves back up again by the time we reach our placemnt years. m tech students got more oppurtunities this year whish was very unlikely. | [campus life]: amazzzinggg, speechless, love the ambience

yeah, here there is so much scope for getting a job through campus interviews. the only thing you need to do is follow the academic schedule properly and increase your skills. coming to the fee structure is completely based on your performance. if u perform well then you might be getting a seat for just 2 lakhs per year. it goes from 2,3,4,4.5 and 5 lakhs per year. for nri students it is around 7 l per year. a bit high but again it is based on your entrance exam result.vit is full of extracurricular activities. mainly clubs and fests. every 2 years, we'll be having a huge fest. the library is also very large. you can stay in the library till 12:30 am. for a student's information, there's a website called vtop which has every detail of a student.

[college infrastructure]: ycce has modern infrastructure,including well-equipped labs,libraries and sports facilities. the campus fosters a conducive environment for academic and extracurricular activities. the architecture is contemporary,and facilities are regularly updated to meet the need of students | [academics]: ycce is a well regarded institution known for its strong academic programs in engineering and technology.it has a reputation for providing quality education, modern facilities and a conducive learning environment. | [placements]: ycce is known for its strong engineering program and good placement opportunities.the college has a reputable faculty and offers a variety of courses in engineering fields. its placement record is generally positive with many students securing jobs in leading companies. | [campus life]: campus of ycce id beautiful with dedicated faculty and modern facilities,it provide a conducive environment for academic growth.the campus also offer various extracurricular activity ,fostering holistic development among student.

review_text: [college infrastructure]: nsut have all the necessary infrastructure, facilities related to studies but one in terms of sport not very well equipped. 1st year classrooms are like advanced classes with full air conditioned and smart screens with many other facilities in every single room. from 2 year classes are normal like school . wifi available all over the campus . | [academics]: quality of teaching is good . yes the curriculum is updated and includes all the recent developments in the field. they prepare you for job , intership through different courses and training. but still you have to put hardwork from your side . | [placements]: placements are very great . placements percentage of every branch is different. i don't remember exact statistics but in cse 80-85% placements, csai 70-80% placements,it almost 90 % or more placements. | [campus life]: the campus life at netaji subhas university of technology (nsut), formerly known as nsit, is vibrant and diverse, offering a blend of academic, cultural, and social experiences.student clubs and activities: nsut hosts a variety of student clubs and societies catering to diverse interests such as technical, cultural, sports, and social causes. these clubs organize events, workshops, competitions, and cultural festivals throughout the year, providing students with opportunities to showcase their talents and passions

review_text: [college infrastructure]: srm college has 24x7 power supply in the university. hostel rooms and classrooms are spacious. the food served in the canteen is fine. other amenities such as medical facilities, sports facilities, and gym are excellent. no wi-fi is provided on campus or hostel and most of the time internet does not work. | [academics]: i'm srm, faculty members have strong domain expertise and are well competent in their fields. every year, new technology is added to maintain the standard of education. when we join the companies, the courses won't aid the students. and all the faculty are highly graduated. | [placements]: this college is doing pretty well. and we are hoping the placements will improve drastically dure the shift in focus to build necessary skills in particular student. crc team works day and night, connect corporates to us for enough oppurtunities.
college_name: SRM Institute of Science and Technology Chennai

review_text: [college infrastructure]: the college infrastructure for s very good. it's a campus of 70 acres and different buildings for different streams. they are air-conditioned,large and very well maintained. good campus and hostels are also very good. | [academics]: on the basis of my first year i think the college is providing a large amount of courses to all students. the academics are less theoretical but more practical. there is plenty of time for student to enhance hua skills. | [placements]: college claims 100% placement for all students . and it is very true about it. there are major recruiters in our college like amazon.,adobe,tcs,wipro,airtel,light year. etc these all are providing very descent packages to students | [campus life]: there are different faculty for same subjects. there are highly trained and intelligent and experience of 10 years of teaching. they are good. they help students with their all problems and doubts ...
college_name: Chitkara University Institute of Engineering and Technology Jhansla

review_text: [college infrastructure]: college infrastructure is very good all kind of facilities and other equipments are available in good quantity. classrooms are very clean with proper sitting arrangement . hostel are good with all facility and hygienic food. | [academics]: i am studying in b tech cse and quality of teaching of teachers are very good . all teachers are highly well qualified and have good knowledge about their subjects . they make our surroundings very comfortable the way of their teaching helps us to learn very quickly . | [placements]: average placements offer 90% of students got placed with an average of 4 to 5 lakh highest package 1.5 lpa . it is best college for btech and it gives oppurtuinity to each and every students to sit in placement . | [campus life]: the college is campus friendly and it doesn?t support any ragging activites in college campus.the location of college is in safe place.

[college infrastructure]: we have the best in class infrastructure the campus is very clean there is no such problem it feels like home all the basic facility is available here the canteen is also very hygienic there is no wifi in the campus. campus is neat and clean. | [academics]: all the teachers are very helpful and supportive here. they are all well-experienced and knowledgeable. exams are conducted on our college campus. we can easily pass exams. the course curriculum is good and gives industrial knowledge. industry visits are also organized regularly here. | [placements]: the package starts from 4-5 lakh and upto 13-15 lakhs. there are many mncs that comes to the campus for placements. deloitte and many more. most companies come here for finance and then marketing and hr. so if you're planning for finance this is your college.
college_name: SRM Institute of Science and Technology Chennai

review_text: ordinary free structure in our college is about 2.5 lacs there will be a scholarship for the students from here the college management if we get above 90 percentage in mpc subjects then we will get 75% scholarship and if you right face 1 exam you will get extra 25000 scholarship and if you write phase 2 exam then you will get 20,000 scholarship extrayeah the main advantage in our college when compared other colleges have a scholarship facility provided by the college management as before i already said.if you get above 90 percentage in maths physics chemistry subjects in inter mpc then you will get 70% scholarship if we get above 80% then you get 50% scholarship
college_name: Vel Tech Rangarajan Dr. Sagunthala R and D Institute of Science and Technology - [Vel Tech]

review_text: [college infrastructure]: college have all equipments and proper teaching aids.the ground is huge and there are separate gyms for both girls and boys .college campus consit of indoor stadium and spacious auditorium.well developed college building. | [academics]: college has updated syllabus and curriculum as per research need and competitive exam perspective. it includes all development which are needed .the teaching is good and the faculty are expert in particular field. | [placements]: the placement are average and no high scale packages are offered though the companies which come are renowned and internationally recognised but due to college reputation and intake capacity is less higher placements are neglected.
college_name: International Institute of Information Technology Hyderabad

review_text: [college infrastructure]: labs are good for cs, but core branches labs doesn't live up to the expectation. theory classes are well equipped with wifi, ac, smartboard,etc. for sports, there are enough grounds for different sports. there is also a gym, but equipments are not that well maintained. | [academics]: just like every other engineering colleges, this college also focuses only on theoretical knowledge rather than practical.same old curriculum and syllabus. you can easily pass your exams by mugging up just before the exam day. | [placements]: placements are good for tech branches but other than those, situation is not upto the mark. student has to put really hard efforts to get a good placement.and don't expect u will land a good placement just by college studies, you have to put the efforts on your own even when you are in cs branch. | [campus life]: campus is good lush green and big 150 acres but there is only one canteen and vehicles entry is also prohibited.
college_name: Netaji Subhas University of Technology New Delhi

review_text: so life in nit calicut is pretty chill. you got the annual technical fest tathva happening in october and the annual cultural fest ragam every year in march. you got different clubs both technical and non-technical which you can join as per your interests. in terms of sports, there are facilities for cricket, football, hockey, badminton, and table tennis. you also got a gym and swimming pool here at nit calicuti took this course for my interest in mechanical. the faculty: student ratio is nearly 50:1 for all branches. the faculty members are highly qualified. a mid-sem exam would be conducted around 2 months after a sem begins and end-sem exams would be near the end of 4 months. the exams are a bit of more difficult side and a small number of people won't be able to pass

life here is totally different from school or from home. we are independent here and have to study whenever we want or whenever we want to play we can play here. we get many friends here we get to know our professors. we have many clubs here like dance, music, quiz, etc.many companies come with internship offers mostly tech companies like google, microsoft, etc. the roles for the internship are data science analyst and tech-related work. the annual internship stipend is around 10 lacs per annum.
college_name: IIT Delhi - Indian Institute of Technology [IITD]

review_text: the placement of our college is pretty decent with great opportunities but being competitive at the same time which reduces one's probability of getting a good placement with many eyeing for the de spot but it also pushes one to achieve higher skills to better one's chancesthe fee structure of our campus isn't any lesser than that of a private college with the fees increasing yearly making it hard to be met the students. the scholarships and financial assistances aren't any good either, only a few lots get to avail of such facilities.

[college infrastructure]: as iit hyderabad comes under new generation iit. it has a very good infrastructure and the buildings are new and modern. hostel blocks also have radiant cooling system. it has two mess which are quite big. all the living places are clean and hygienic. | [academics]: i am studying in electrical engineering(ict). it's a new branch that is started this year. professors of iith are the one's who have done phd from the top universities of the world. the professor student ratio is great here. our professors are quite young: average age of professors here is 35 yrs. the curriculum is well updated here. it changes every year if required according to the new coming technology. | [placements]: iit h is having very good placement stats. it's placement are top among the all second generation iits. all top companies like google, microsoft, jp morgan, deshaw,etc. the average ctc for electrical engineering is 32lpa. | [campus life]: our campus is spread over 576 acres. the campus life is amazing here. there are no restrictions in the hostel for both girls and boys. you can live outside of your hostel overnight and enjoy the night life of iith which is very amazing. girls can go to boys hostel anytime except in the night. its location is far from the city. the staff supports in any kind of emergency. there is iith hospital also which is free of cost for students.

[college infrastructure]: my college has one of the best infrastructure. it's infrastructure is old. but it has all new technical facilities. there's is projector in college, which makes learning easy. labs are also best. campus is always clean. yes food is hygienic and taste is also good. there are 4 hostel in college. college also has wifi and white board facilities. | [academics]: teachers are intelligent and there's best teaching staff in college. both teachers and seniors are very helpful. yes curriculum is updated and it's very useful according to placement point of view. as i am electronics and telecommunication first year student, this branch is best according placement in both hardware and software field. | [placements]: according to placement, college is best. cs, it, extc, mechanical engineering branches have 100% placement and remaining branch have more 90% placement. 2021 ongoing placement is 44 lpa offered by microsoft, 37 lpa offered by udaan, etc. in overall college placement, average salary offered is 8.10 lpa. yes the placement process easy and pleasant. college is most supportive in placement. | [campus life]: college is at matunga, mumbai which is main area near to dadar. yes it's safe area and pleasant too. campus is best . students involve in many curricular activities easily.

[college infrastructure]: our college have all necessary things, infrastructure, facilities and equipments. but except one thing - a gym for 1st year students. we don't have wifi. living spaces are very clean and hygienic. food is good in 1st year. hostels have very old infrastructure, which is worst part of this college. | [academics]: academics are good. quality of teaching is moderate. yes absolutely it makes us job ready . but you have develope some skills for your placement. it gives you an edge in interview . keep learning is art of living. | [placements]: quality of placements are moderate. every branch have their own percentage of placements. highest salary was offered in computer science and engineering which was 60 lakh per annum. average salary offered was around 8.5 lakh per annum. which is quite good than some nits. | [campus life]: campus life is outstanding because you will get so much time to have fun and you can learn anything what you can. location is fine. it is very safe.

this collage is culturally rich there is an annual fest also. the library is huge and the facilities of the online library are also there. also, semester books are provided by the college only. the college has facilities for each and every sport with a dedicated field and arena. regular inter-departmental competitions are held. there are different societies where students can develop their extra co-curricular skills.the total tuition fee is around 4 lakh for 4 years. students of west bengal can also opt for west bengal scholarships. you have to pay fees per semester wise and each year the semester fees are raised by 500 rs. education loans are also available for students of bihar. a bihar student credit card is the best option.

the curriculum is similar to that of any other university. i'm a student of cs branch and i pursue this course as i'm interested in coding and it has a great scope in future. there are almost 15000 students in university including mba, bba, bca, etc., and about 2500+ teachers. a maximum of the faculty has a ph.d. degree and were the students of nits, iits. in one semester we have to give 2 exams and they are moderately hardall mba and engineering students at gla university are required to perform an internship that lasts one or two months at the conclusion of their first and third years, respectively. most students don't receive an internship offer from their schools; instead, they must set up their own internships according to their schedules and relationships.

[college infrastructure]: srm has excellent infrastructure with multiple high-end equipment . all the classrooms have either smart board or projector and my campus has a large library with study space and there are also many sports teams which are highly encouraged and funded by the college . all build is the campus has fast wifi connection. | [academics]: i'm a 2nd-year computer science student currently pursuing a degree in csc with specialisation in software engineering. the quality of the curriculum is up to the global standards and highly related to the job market. we undertake various career guidance sessions to understand the current job trends and needs, and work on that. the syllabus helps us become job-ready and is updated every few years | [placements]: the quality of placements has been good, but due to the global recession, the placement percentage has dropped significantly compared to previous years. around 80% of the students get placed before the 4th semester. the highest salary package as of this year is 48lpa, to my knowledge, for a csc major. the college is very supportive of the placements, and the average salary package is between 3.5 - 5 lpa | [campus life]: the campus life is good; there are multiple clubs, both academic and non-academic. it is a pretty safe campus located on the outskirts of chennai. everyone is highly encouraging and supportive and aims for better future development
college_name: SRM Institute of Science and Technology Chennai

review_text: the course for our batch is constantly changing sem by sem which is making it a bit difficult but it's making everyone more competent and b.com was a course where u could learn about commerce and a bit of management. students are about 250 in our batch, the faculty members are also approachable at times of any doubt or queries. there are regular tests after every unit in each subject. and it is cbtfor campus placement and employment opportunities, students must be in the 5th sem and there are a few sessions also conducted by the college on employment. there is a number of companies which come to college naming a few are accenture, amazon, intellipaat, london stock exchange and many more. the placement package would vary from 2.5l to 4l.

[college infrastructure]: as per my opionion, the college provides you all the stuffs what you want. right now i am in the first year and genuinely i don't have any complain regarding maintaince of the college . because there are lots of students (apprx. 1500) in the first year of b-tech and no one have any complain towards seating arrangement and labs. | [academics]: i am doing btech cse(1st semester) from this college because this is the best college for cse across dehradun. the quality of teaching is quite decent as per my opinion because i faced lot of problems during my academics. | [placements]: the placement will only depends on you, i don't think college will really helpful for you. you need to do everything from your side. the college provides you the opportunity. the placement is something about 74% per year.

the campus is small, with not too much space to roam around but still campus life is good. annual fest is 8th mile but it won't happen annually, esummit happens almost after every year which is also a good fest. fests are conducted after every 2-3 months, small or big doesn't matter. enough books are available in the library to make use of it. the classroom contains a smart board and is good for a student kind of environment. the sports culture is pretty good as uk anil kumble and lots of other sports personalities are from rvce. ecell, raag, rotaract, coding club, alap etc. are some of the clubs.7th sem students are eligible for campus placement. placements are better than lots of nits and almost all the government colleges. average placement is >14 lpa this year for the isc department and >8 lpa for iem deloitte, capgemini, mercedes benz, microsoft, volvo etc. are some companies visit our college. no. of offers are maximum >250 for ece department. the highest package is nearly 88 lpa this year almost all the students are placed in iem. i may prefer mba as i'm already studying management at iem.

pros/cons: i like the hostels and the campus its very green and clean the friend circle, all of them are very different and creative as they belong to different part of india hence networking the facilities of labs and professors help they provide is also great as the batch intake is very less there is not very club culture over here alumni network is also not that strong as the number of pass out is very less placement over here is also not that great as cse branch had been introduced over here in the recent years | placement experience: there is placement provided over here, but its decent as the cse branch had been introduced here in recent years and most of the companies arriving here are of that domain which also allows another branch student to sit, sometimes they require a minor in cse.
college_name: IIT Gandhinagar - Indian Institute of Technology - [IITG], Gandhinagar

review_text: the fee hike is not so much per year because it is a central government college. obviously, it demands fewer fees than other colleges. a large scale of scholarships are available but you have to go for it and apply before the deadlines of scholarships.i chose this course because there are ample opportunities in this course. term exams are monthly occurring and give ample time to study. exams are not difficult to pass but are difficult to top. teachers are highly qualified and knowledgeable.

[college infrastructure]: gla infrastructure is well developed but still wi-fi is not working all over also the living space of gla university especially washrooms are not that much hygienic. in all classes digiboards are available. | [academics]: currently i am studying mba to develop my managerial skills but the quality of teaching is not up to the mark as the teachers are not able to control the class and the curriculum is not sh updated as per market trends. | [placements]: really university is known for placement for mba student package up to 5 to 6 mba is fixed also almost 70 - 80% student got placed then the placement procedure is more so pleasant because it is very tough. | [anything else]: gla is good for doing graduation not for post graduation.

the annual cultural fest is vivacity and the tech fest is plinth and it is held in february. there are a lot of books available in the library. classrooms are well spacious and all sports facilities are also available. there are various clubs in college.from the 7th semester onwards, students are getting placed. all major companies like amazon, slice visit campus for placements. the highest package is 1 cr and the average package is 14lpa. almost 100 per cent of students are placed.
college_name: The LNM Institute of Information Technology - [LNMIIT]

review_text: pros/cons: contain professor from various iit and other highly qualified institut compris of various laboratories in manage bhopal excess to a very good sports complex of married bhopal not having own campus lead to some restriction in bhopal 75% attendance is mandatory for all and if you are not having 75% then you would not be allowed to sit in exam india most strict institute in terms of rules and regulation | placement experience: placements are very good around 80 percent of the student gets please in good companies the average package of cac was 14 lp and where is ece and it was around 10.5 lpa in the year 2024 if talking about the year 2023 90% of the student are easily and average package institute was around 20 lpa
college_name: Indian Institute of Information Technology -[IIIT], Bhopal

review_text: [college infrastructure]: infrastructure of dtu is very good as the campus size is approximately 160 acres which is very big. even the sports complex of dtu is vey huge where we can apply various games outdoor and indoor. there are basketball ground, football ground, cricket ground, tennis court, badminton court and many more games. gym is also available for students. | [academics]: dtu is government aided college faculty is not that good, professors has very good knowledge for their respective field but teaching style is not that good, hence you have to study here by yourself.you can also try upse exams from dtu college. | [placements]: placements are overall good in dtu as dtu is second best government college in delhi. beside this 70-80% students are placed in campus interview (above 90% for cs it students. ) in dtu top recruiting company like amazon, microsoft, sprinkler and google also come to offer a good package to the students.

[college infrastructure]: yes, college have all the necessary infrastructure an institute should have.all classes have enough comfortable desks, proper lightening, proper white boards with projector installed in all classrooms with a proper white screen in front of them.all laboratories have all the equipment one need for the course he/she opted for. there is multiple food spots across campus. | [academics]: i am currently pursuing batchelor of technology in computer science and engineering because i have an interest in the world of computers and the opportunities it gives us to make such new and extraordinary things. quality of teaching is good if one wants to study and excel in the academics. yes if you follow the necessary roadmap with proper guidance you will definitely be job ready. | [placements]: placements have been phenomenal in the past many years. i don't know the correct statistics, but placements are awesome on campus with multiple opportunities. placements process is easy and smooth as well as pleasant, one can easily get placed if he/she has worked hard during the duration of course and has quite good skillset with them.

[college infrastructure]: it has huge campus. and large number of qualified faculties. it has biggest library with all the facilities. the library is very good and large inside the campus. if you have a good gpa you can have the most desired q block hostel, which is best in hostel. | [academics]: the curriculum was pretty updated and was specifically curated to make it industry oriented. we learned a lot and the curriculum made us capable enough to deal with the day to day challenges of working in a corporate. | [placements]: the placement cell at vit is quite active, and every year a lot of companies visit here for recruitment. but a lot of companies don't visit here to hire core electrical engineer graduates. many reputed companies like whirlpool, alstom, hyundai, qualcomm, hp, etc.
college_name: Vellore Institute of Technology Chennai Campus

review_text: [college infrastructure]: yes the college has the necessary infrastructure and all the basic facilities a student might require at any given point of time.all classrooms are equipped with smart tvs and there are two massive libraries where u can spend ur free time reading and referring to books.the mess food is also pretty decent enough and the college is pretty clean too | [academics]: im currently pursuing my btech in civil engineering. i was interested in civil since the start and this college also offered the branch so it was like a dream come true. the quality of teaching here is pretty high .all the faculties are highy knowledgeable and teach with a lot of patience.the curiculum has been pretty much same since the last two years | [placements]: the quality of placements for my department is pretty decent enough and not that fancy. but if you opt for any other branch like cse, ece , eee, the placement statistics are extremely good. if you complete your mtech too from this college then u might have a pretty good chance of landing a job in a big mnc | [campus life]: the campus is pretty big with a lot of open spaces but they havent utilised the open space in a proper way.there is just one tree in the whole campus.apart from that the campus life is pretty amazing.there are many clubs the students can join and many activities are hosted by the seniors and the students activiely participate in them

life on campus is very enjoyable. there are many clubs such as cricket club, literario club, natraj club, nidhas club etc. there is a big library in the college so no need to buy books for study, all classrooms are fully air-conditioned. coding club is run by student.internship at goldman sachs and which offered the role of analyst internship and gave a stipend of 8000-12000rs duration 2 months. internship of caravel tech and which offered the role of machine learning and gave a stipend of 26000rs and a duration of 6 months.

[college infrastructure]: the college is well equipped for academic as well as extra curricular activities. the classrooms are well maintained and equipped with projector and wifi too. the food are well prepared and maintained. | [academics]: i did my bsc in christ university. the teaching quality is good and the faculty members are well experienced. we also learned holistic education and job skills during the course which made us job ready after graduation. | [placements]: all the good companies came for placement interview. most of the students who wanted to work were placed. the average salary offered was around 3 lpa. the college organised a workshop on job skills, how to face interview and how to write resume to support us. | [campus life]: the campus life was amazing. we can play all kinds of sports, street play, music and also participate in choir. there used to be intra college competition for various fields too. it was fun and i had a great time studying in the college.

from the seventh semester, the students become eligible for campus placements. a lot of companies come for hiring, the highest package offered was by motorq in 2022 and the ctc was more than 1crore .then the highest package was ctc of 45 lakhs by microsoft, and the 1 companies like goldman sachs, de shaw, amazon, morgan stanley provide a package of more than 25 lakhs. there are also companies like deloitte that offer 9-10 lakhs of ctc. then comes the mass recruiter like tcs, wipro, and cognizant which offer a ctc of 5 - 6 lakhs. almost 90 percent of the students get placed in vit who are sitting for placements without any doubt. i would mostly prefer to do a job after obtaining the degreethere are 2 fests namely riveria and gravitas. rivera is the annual fest conducted in feb, whereas gravitas is the tech. fest conducted in september. they is a more than 1500 books and magazines in the library, you will most probably get all the books related to academics in the library there are a lot of sports and extracurricular activities and clubs you can join for exposure except for your academics. you have a lot of sports infrastructure like basketball courts, gyms, squash courts, badminton courts, swimming pool. vit munsoc is one such club run by students to help improve their communication skills

[college infrastructure]: facilities and equipment are well maintained, all the labs are equipped with the necessary equipment and the infrastructure is good enough for students to move around, buildings are well maintained and decent. | [academics]: i?m currently pursuing b.tech in computer science and the faculty in this college is knowledgeable and caring for their students. our doubts are answered in class and the curriculum is updated and includes all the recent developments | [placements]: the quality of placements have been good in this college with a maximum of 40 lpa, and an average of 7-8 lpa in the computer science branch, with 100% of students getting placed in that respective branch.
college_name: Institute of Engineering and Management Kolkata

review_text: [college infrastructure]: the infrastructure of our college is good. laboratories are well-equipped. there are a total of 4-5 huge libraries in our college, which is a knowledge hub of our college. wi-fi is available throughout the campus. the hostel has wi-fi. classrooms have good facilities like smart boards and projectors. our campus provides good facilities and infrastructure. | [academics]: all teachers are helpful and qualified. most of them are ph.d. holders in various fields. the curriculum is very much outdated and is of no use in the real-time industry. it is mainly focused on finishing the syllabus rather than letting us gain some knowledge. our batch is a covid one, and in the initial days, we used to rush our semesters, and we have not understood. now everything is sorted, and we are also ahead of other colleges. still, we are made to rush the semester, and we are finishing semesters in 3 months. semester exams are easy in our college. a preparation of 15 days before the exam would be more than enough to score an average grade. | [placements]: around 80-85% of students got placed in our course. the highest salary package offered is 13 lpa. the average salary package offered is 6 lpa, and the lowest salary package offered is 3 lpa. top recruiting companies are l&t, bosch, diamler, boeing, and jsw. about 40% of students got internships. top roles offered are qa engineer, production engineer, some design-related roles, etc.

[college infrastructure]: have very good facilities like e-class room,library, well maintained student activity center sac ,sports facilities, gym in hostel, two lecture hall ,a student park,ground and also different shops for our needs | [academics]: academics is a load for students due to assignment, mandatory attendance and teachers taking unnecessary extra classes. the teachers here are quite poor in teaching leaving some of them. the college is not research oriented and the faculty is very narrow minded. the administrative is quite biased towards himachal people. | [placements]: a decent packages form a good companies is got by the some of seniors.few students were also got 7 digit package or dream package. also students is able to crack gsoc, electrothon ,like big competition.

[college infrastructure]: nit jamshedpur has a great infrastructure equipped with all latest technology in labs. recently new academic building has been inaugurated which has fully furnished classrooms and other features. there is a mega hostel and a new mega canteen that provides clean and hygienic food. the campus is also very large, about 350 acres in outskirts of jamshedpur. | [academics]: all the teachers and lab assistants are highly qualified and trained. they are ready to assist students at any time and are very co- operative. there are also several technical teams that helps to get more practical knowledge in various niches like off-road car manufacture, aero designing, solar vehicles etc. | [placements]: nit jamshedpur has excellent placement records. since it is a college of national importance many mncs visit the college for placements. top mncs like amazon, goldman sachs etc. visit for cs jobs and for core branches tata steel, jindal etc. visit the college and give good job offers.

[college infrastructure]: i am impressed with the college's infrastructure. the auditorium is massive and well-maintained, perfect for events and gatherings. classrooms are air-conditioned and comfortable. the cafeteria serves delicious food and has a clean environment. parking is also convenient. | [academics]: my college impressed with the academic standards. the professors are knowledgeable and passionate about teaching. the coursework is challenging but manageable. i appreciate the regular feedback and guidance from instructors. the college also offers helpful academic resources. | [placements]: i'm impressed with the placement record. many students get placed in top companies, and some even get international offers. the college invites renowned companies for campus recruitment. the placement team is supportive and helps with preparation. | [campus life]: the campus is always buzzing with energy, and i feel lucky to be a part of this vibrant community.

[college infrastructure]: my college had all the necessary infrastructure , facilities and equipments. we also have hostels with free wifi access, gyms , playground , libraries and sport centres and they are all well maintained. | [academics]: i have studied b.tech in computer science and communication engineering . the facuties of the department are very helpful and the teaching quality is good and the curriculum is updated and includes all the recent developments in the field. | [placements]: the quality of the placements is good and it focuses on the deciplined and hard working students.and the process of the placements are easy and pleasant for the students also. and they also provide internships to the students
college_name: Kalinga Institute of Industrial Technology Bhubaneswar

review_text: pros/cons: the girls to boys ratio is around 1/3 for a class. staff are very less many times we need to complain for the small things there is not much good teachers in some subjects the quality of mess food is also not good | course curriculum overview: well the curriculam is good easily accesable and reachable and i have selected electronics only because i have interested in it from the very starting and the curriculam is good for me. yes the curriculam helps to solve the real world probelm but not at all as most of it are theoritical and but some lab experiments and good. exams are held every 2 months sometimes it become difficult to face the exams.
college_name: Indian Institute of Information Technology - [IIIT-K], Kota

review_text: pros/cons: message food is okay but not so good but can be eat teachers are really well qualified all of them are studied from best and best college seniors are very kind and supportive they will help in each and every situation campus area is very less only 35 acres it is not sufficient | placement experience: yeah my college offer very good placement very big company like google, microsoft,ibm also reach to my college for their offer and also they offer very high paying job .my college avarage placement offer is about 7 -8 lakh per annum

[college infrastructure]: good infrastructure with nice environment and also new building is coming soon so eager to see the big building and it is evergreen college and top college with awesome facilities including hostel and other | [academics]: academics is also good in pes.i wanted to do civil so i am doing civil professors are very expert and experienced the curriculum is very good and well updated and includes all the recent developments in field | [placements]: placements are good in pes.every year large number of companies visit to recruit talented students with high package recently eleven students backed a package of more than forty lakhs per annum average package is 5 lakhs | [campus life]: awesome campus

[college infrastructure]: our college provides excellent infrastructure. labs are excellent. mess is not available. there are more than 10 cafes and restaurants on campus. ccd, dominoes, and subway are also available for students also. | [academics]: our teachers are excellent and supportive. the course curriculum is a bit useless for us. we learn very little related to our field in the first year and unnecessary pressure due to complicated subjects and good for students. | [placements]: our college provides excellent placements. there are more than 1000 students in a batch. the average salary package offered is 6 lpa to 7 lpa. the highest salary package offered is 20 lakh per annum for students.

review_text: i have a passionate coder since 9th standard so b.tech was the obvious choice for me. another reason was that i always topped in pcm in school without taking any stress so i thought engineering will be the perfect fit. iit was my dream since 10th standard because my mother's bestfriends son got admitted in iit kanpur faculty to student ratio balanced. a single subject is divided between 3 faculty members alongwith teaching assistants maximum faculty members are alumni of iits themselves and have pursued post doc from foreign universities in usa, uk, germany. faculty is very learned and have immense knowldege surpassing even their domain. teaching style differs from professor to professor but most of them are young so they understand and teach according to students. mid sems and end sems are conducted with 3 quizzed before mid and end sems. reading ppts and notes of the professor alongwith previous year question papereven just 3 days before exam are sufficient to get a good grade.the annual cultural fest is kashiyatra and conducted in january, annual technical fest is technex conducted in february, the annual sports fest is spardha conducted in september/october. iit bhu has a big library with vast resources of books and journals. the library has an ac facility and 4 big large reading rooms. classrooms are soundproof and have a blackboard and smart boards. depending on the department one may have ac too. iit bhu has 4 councils - cultural, film & media, sports, science & technology. each has different clubs and iit bhu is the perfect place to hone your all-around skills. you name it and we have a club with experienced seniors and alumni to guide their juniors. all the clubs and councils have their instagram pages. some of the clubs are dance, quiz, literary, indian & western music, aeromodelling, astronomy, coding, business, media, outreach, cine, badminton, aquatics, and volleyball. this is not even half the list.
college_name: IIT BHU - Indian Institute of Technology

review_text: [college infrastructure]: well the college infrastructure is quite good comparing the fees they take and the hostels have all the facilities required from wifi to gym .we have a wifi over the campus so there are no issues in downloading stuff. | [academics]: well i think the academics is great for the cs department i don't know about other departments.we have a great coding culture and the cs faculties always encourage us to do new things and they set a bar each year for competitive coding which helps a lot in placements | [placements]: well the placements are quite good being a private college there are placements happening in companies like amazon,adobe etc which is quite great the avg package is good overall i think placements are going great and they will keep on increasing the packages | [campus life]: campus life is good not that great.there is no ragging at all the college is quite disciplined about it .so you need not worry about it moreover the senior junior interaction is less i guess if it would have been more it would be much better.

fee structure of all nit's and iit's are good. the colleges have semester fees around 1 lakh rupees but the college provide different fees slabs for different cateogaries based on their annual family income. if someone's total family income is less than 1 lakh they have to pay nothing. if family incomed is between 1 to 5 lakh they have to pay one third of total fees, and above 5 lakh family income they have to pay full fee. so it is very good.its excellent, focus on research is always there we do different type of practicals in our labs.we have lived our btech.through aieee exam.wanna do b tech. through exam process i got good marks and got admission in btech eee branch electrical and electronics.i mom is in electical line so they hold my intrest in this line.

review_text: [college infrastructure]: yes we have everything but the toilets are not that much good. very unhygenic, unhealthy of few buildings. we have free wifi throughout the whole campus. there are lot of food corner and they are very much hygienic. | [academics]: i am doing my honours in english literature. the quality of teaching is just amazing. professors from oxford cambridge and santinetan are here. they are very helpful and friendly. yes what they teaches us will always help you in the future jobs. | [placements]: if i say about engineering and science's placement it's quite well but there is almost no placement oppurtunity for the arts people. some of company came with limited seats and took only the best ones | [campus life]: campus life here in jadavpur is the best. you can enjoy sanskriti night with indian ocean or you can spend your evening chatting with your friends in worldview chottor. the best days are waiting for you.

the curriculum is very good, especially the subjects they have kept in this new branch of geoinformatics. they have mixed civil with it and added remote sensing. exams are of decent level and faculty to student ratio is decent. faculty members are enough educated.the fee structure is similar to iit/nit and there is a scholarship known as edistrict scholarship where st/sc ews student can get the financial assistance a scholarship is named mcm it is for students with less than 8 lac of income of their family.

moksha is the annual fest, it is a grand event conducted in the month of march every year. we receive good sponsorship, with a large footfall each year. big artists grace the occasion. we have winter sports and an annual sports meet. the library is a two-storey building with many books and a wi-fi connection. yet a lot, of course, books are not available in the library and it is open for a short period of time; it is also closed on weekends. classrooms are nice, spacious, well equipped, and with a proper security system. we have a gym, a tt room and a badminton court with a football, basketball court and a race track. a lot of social groups and communities are there, tech and nontech.chose this course as it has the best placement opportunities and due to personal interests. student to faculty ratio is average like most colleges 1:80 students the faculty is well qualified but sometimes teachers don't show up for lectures for a long time exams were on time, but our semester started late the college is trying to compensate for it by making the semesters shorter, and easier for them but makes it hard for students to cope with the study and exam load alongside extracurriculars

review_text: [college infrastructure]: there are collaborative classrooms and labs fully air conditioned. there are smart boards in very class , fully maintained and aur conditioned library and sport centres of various sports. the university provides the well planned and learning oriented infrastructure for the students. | [academics]: the faculties are really supportive and highly qualified. the academic is also well planned and supports outcome based learning which is be used further in the industries by the students. the faculties are highly qualified and motivates the students for learning new skills and programming. | [placements]: as a b.tech cse student in my sixth semester, i can confidently say that the internship and placement opportunities here are quite promising.regarding internships, opportunities are available starting from the second semester. one notable avenue is the aicte-approved internship program, which offers virtual internships across various domains. these include programs supported by major tech companies like aws for cloud computing and google for google developer technologies, among many others. these virtual internships are typically undertaken during the summer break.beyond these, offline, in-office internship opportunities also arise through company-specific tests and interview processes.for placements, the process typically begins in the fifth semester. companies start visiting the campus to offer both 6-month and 12-month internships, with the  a full-time job offer based on your performance during the internship. these companies often provide a stipend during the internship period.furthermore, galgotias university facilitates corporate-supported skill enhancement programs, such as the cognizant digital nurture program, wipro talent next program, and the wipro future skills program. additionally, a cognizant-supported elective course is offered in the fifth semester. these initiatives further enhance our skills and employability.furthermore, hackathons are a regular feature here. we have the smart india hackathon, a government-organized event, conducted annually. additionally, galgotias university organizes its own internal hackathons. the ieee student branch also actively conducts conferences, hackathons, boot camps, and various other events. participation in these activities significantly enhances our practical skills and provides valuable talking points during company interviews. | [campus life]: apart from learning, the campus life is also vibrant. they organise multiple events, fest and many more things. | [anything else]: overall, it is a great place for learning.

[college infrastructure]: the institute provide us with all the necessities infrastructure, equipments and facilities which can enhance our stay and academic. the institute has hostels, proper mess, sports facilities, classrooms which can accommodate more than 70 students with proper seats. the hostel and mess are clean and hygienic. all the equipments are well maintained and available for each students. | [academics]: being an nit students, the teaching quality is great and the faculties are well knowledgeable and experienced on their respective fields. the curriculum is updated with recent trends. we are not only taught in theory but also in practicals which enhance our study to make us job ready. | [placements]: the placement is decent for every filed, the average placement is around 8lpa. while most of the student get placed through the institute while some get contractual job through their network, so most of them get a hands on job before graduation.
