[college infrastructure]: yes our college provide all the necessary equipments and facilities. yes we have all the needed and we'll maintained facilities, which are required. yes the living spaces are very clean and hygienic | [academics]: i am studying mtech in water resource engineering and i want to achieve higher education. the quality of education is very good . yes we have all the curriculum updated and included , all development | [placements]: quit good placements we have in our college. about 60 % students are placed in our college with highest salary packages in computer science engineering. the average salary package is 10 lack salary .
college_name: Malaviya National Institute of Technology Jaipur

review_text: pros/cons: so, the positive aspects of the college are that big companies come for the place like amazon, nvidia, tata, texas instruments and many more. and also, the fees is relatively less than the other engineering colleges. and also many workshops happens. the college life is decent and also the quality of social interaction is good in this college as people from different regions of india comes here. some faculties are very interested in teaching but some are not very much interested . the quality of infrastructure in this college is not so good as this college made in 1960s, but new buildings are also on constructions and the amenities that the campus provides is the all sports access and also olympic level pool is also available. there are no almirah's in the hostel and also the internet speed is decent and the connectivity for the nit rourkela is not so good and the power cuts are very frequent and there is also no generator available for this. the curriculum is not up to date the college is only focusing on theory but not on the skills for the students and therefore students have to work by their own to develop such skills which require for the placements. also the mess food is very decent and some lecture rooms are also not well maintained as there are issues of the eco of the voice of professor in the lecture halls. | placement experience: so the students become eligible for placemant usually from the 7th semester of the btech which is from the 4th year and the internship opportunities are available from the 3rd year onwards that is from 5th and 6th semester. so in year 2024-25 the number of companies that visited the campus is around 330 and the total job offers offered is about 1200. so the highest package in the ec branch is about 1.2 crore per annum and the average package for the ec branch is around 13 to 14 lakhs. and the profile of jobs are core electronics, vlsi and semiconductor roles ,system and embedded developments, software engineering, it services, consulting and analytics. the percentage of student which are getting placed are in the range of 90 to 99% for ece branch. the top recruiters are apple google, microsoft, amazon, wipro, deloitte, tata,vedanta etc. after completing my degree in ece from nit rourkela my plan is to join the core technology sector as a vlsi and semiconductor engineer in a reputed multinational companies, leveraging the strong foundation and industrial exposure gained during my studies in case i do not secure a campus placement i aim to pursue the off campus opportunities in electronics, it or analytics sectors. alternatively i am open to perceive higher studies in mba to specialize in the management sector.

many annual fests are going on in the university every time. the library of the university is huge and you can avail of books any time you want for free from the library. the amenities in classrooms are moderate as there are all kinds of faculty some of which you may find interesting and some dull. the university gives special attention to students interested to participate in sports and extracurricular activities. there are many social groups run by the students like gsdc, newton's coding club, etc.i chose this course because of my interest in computer science. in every class, there are 72 students and one faculty. all the faculty here are mostly ph.d. holders and masters in their field except a few new joiners as they lac experience in teaching. there are two term exams mid-term and end-term. it is not that much difficult to pass the exams if you study decently. you also have the option to reappear in the exam five times if you fail the exam.

[college infrastructure]: it has the basic requirements and facilities. the classrooms are well maintained. in the computer lab we are provided with individual pcs. in other labs (e.g. ece, chemistry, etc), we have to form groups. the overall campus is clean and hygienic. | [academics]: i am currently pursuing btech in cse. the teachers are quite good. the curriculum is up to date and the subjects taught are the ones highly demanded at this time. this makes the students of this college job ready. | [placements]: the placements are also quite good. companies like tata consultancies, etc come for on campus placements. average package is almost 4-5 lpa. while off campus placements also take place in companies such as microsoft, amazon, etc. last year highest package was 30 lgpa. | [campus life]: the college campus is very nice. it is one of the largest college campus in west bengal. the teachers and seniors are very supportive and helpful. the campus is ragging free. it is in the main kolkata area.

pros/cons: gla university is spread in over 100 acres and each department is assigned their specific block. faculties too are groomed before they can take classes. management always listens as there's a proper complain department. placements are few and no internships from university ends. | placement experience: placements are not many and to be realistic only 25% students or so get jobs from here. it is quite less indeed but that is how it is and some corporate houses who have branding issues are the ones that hire some students from here. most students try to find joh outside only.

[college infrastructure]: amity noida has a huge infrastructure from big parks to big buildings to big hygienic canteens. it has all the facilities and equipments . different buildings are dedicated for different departments. students are allowed to bring their vehicles and have a dedicated parking space for them. it has laboratories libraries, sports room , music room , swimming pool . | [academics]: according to me academics could have been more better as teachers are more focused on traditional methods of teaching and not digitally. seminars and workshops are being conducted for students. events are organised. | [placements]: placement is good as they provide 100% placement guarantee . but for that it also charge a big amount of fees . it has tie ups with big mnc?s and startups. average package goes from 4-8 lakhs per annum . but i have seen my seniors taking about people getting 11 lakhs per annum too. , so it depends on the student to student. | [campus life]: campus is big huge with many buildings with a big canteen and other food outlets too . | [anything else]: my experience is great as i am persuinv mba after architecture and hoping for a good placement.

[college infrastructure]: the infrastructure of the college is amongst the best in bangalore. there are many vast spaces, canteens, sport facilities and gym. it is a wholly self contained campus comprising of everything that students on campus would ever require. | [academics]: academics and faculties both are good and yes syllabus and course updates time to time. practicals are pretty interesting. classes are chill and enjoyable. they lack in some places , but is still good . | [placements]: msrit has a very good placement record. placement is 100% and at the end of four years most of the students end up getting 2 job offers. the average package for cse is around 6-7 lakhs per annum which is pretty good.

i choose this course because i have to become aeronautical engineer my passion is to become an aircraft maintenance that's why i choose this course there are good faculty are available here and nice teaching there all the faculty and they will explain very simple.there are so many companies providing internships in this college hal, google, cognizant, amazon, indigo, like that and they all are giving good stipends for the students for this kind of internship you have to do a minor project or major project.
college_name: Vel Tech Rangarajan Dr. Sagunthala R and D Institute of Science and Technology - [Vel Tech]

review_text: pros/cons: faculty: the faculty is highly knowledgeable and supportive, providing clear explanations and guidance both in and out of the classroom. they have a passion for their subjects, making learning engaging and effective. gender ratio: the college has a gender ratio of roughly 10% girls to 90% guys. while imbalanced, this ratio creates a focused and goal-oriented academic environment, which i found conducive to my studies. placements: the college's placement services are excellent, with a high percentage of students getting placed in reputable companies. the average salary packages are competitive, reflecting the quality of education and career support. facilities: the college's facilities are outdated and poorly maintained. labs lack modern equipment, and common areas like the library and sports grounds are in need of significant upgrades. college area: the campus is quite small and the surrounding area offers very few amenities for students. its remote location makes commuting difficult and limits access to services and entertainment options. canteen: the canteen food is disappointing in terms of both quality and variety. the hygiene standards are poor, and the menu is repetitive, making it an unappealing option for daily meals. | course curriculum overview: i liked the scope of the course in the field so i chose the course. the curriculum prepares us for real worls applications because it's really practical. the practical exams can be improved. exam frequency is okay like once in 2 months and the difficulty is moderate.
college_name: Netaji Subhas University of Technology - [NSUT], New Delhi

review_text: [college infrastructure]: the vit campus in vellore is the one which is one of the obvious targets of engineering aspirants nowadays. no wonder about why this is so. the infrastructure's awesome and all facilities, equipment are provided, as per students' needs. the classrooms are spacious, with the latest smart-board features. laboratories do have instruments but some of them need prompt replacement and are error-prone. the library and sports centres are one of the best and the living spaces are neat with hygienic food. | [academics]: i'm pursuing my bachelors in electronics & communications engineering here. i believe that as far as education and learning are concerned, it's totally up to the student. he/she needs to be creative and attentive enough to grab opportunities, which are in plenty, here. the overall quality of teaching is good, faculties are experienced, though some do have a problem in speaking english. the curriculum is updated and includes all recent developments in the field. becoming job-ready demands effort. | [placements]: vit promises 100% placements. this is one of its trait which brings down students in large numbers, every year, here because everyone needs good placements. take my word on this, it entirely depends on you what you'll get at the end of four years. your cgpa matters, your skillset matters and your soft skills matter. if you're too smart not to pay any heed on all these and think these things don't matter, then i'm sorry you're coming to a wrong place, after all. | [campus life]: campus life is interesting. there are movies organized on the weekends when exams are over. the college campus is big and scenic view is in plenty. it is very safe for female students unless they don't care about their safety. the campus in-timings may irritate and annoy a lot of students (as it does here), but take my word, this is essential and it's for your good. there are all sorts of students here, you need to judge and mingle with people. the support staff is quite cooperating here.

[college infrastructure]: thiagarajar college of engineering provides quality education in the field of engineering. the campus is spread over an area of 143 acres with a lush green area. the institute provides various facilities to students such as well-structured classrooms with projector facility which helps students understand the subjects in a better manner. moreover, the institute has highly structured computer labs where all the systems are connected with the internet and all the training sessions in the computer | [academics]: we have smart boards and we have wifi enabledthe institute encourages students to take part in sports activities and organises sports programs that can help students take up team building and leadership activities. various sports facilities such as cricket, table tennis, volleyball, basketball, etc are also available.classrooms are good and spacious and all our classrooms have projector facility and wifi is excellent both in our college and in hostel too..in my hostel dining halls look fantastic | [placements]: we have ccc lab in which placement companies will come and conduct interviews. we have record of 86%+ placement every year.the centralized computing centre(ccc) of tce was established in the year 2004. the main objective is to provide state-of-art computational facility for the academic and research community. it is featured with hp itanium server, hp blade servers and hp ml350g servers with san and nas storage and 150 hp desktops. 'single sign-on' mechanism is implemented using these centralize | [campus life]: the college has an nss wing which aims to make the students socially responsible citizens. it organizes various awareness campaigns wherein the students actively participate. it has conducted visits to old age homes & orphanages, awareness programs, blood donation camps, rallies, fieldwork in nearby villages, leadership programs, etc.the college organizes various activities throughout the year. the students participate in various national, state, and inter-district sports competitions. it has so

the college life is fun with lots of scope for cultural activities. all sorts of extracurriculars are practiced by the students and the management is supportive towards those who bring accolades. there are several academic clubs as well, but seeing as how girls are not allowed to work late nights in the college buildings that thourows a constraint. the main festival vitopia is a fun-filled extravaganza and guests are invited (often popular celebrities). the food becomes even better.a cultural fest known as vitopia and tech fest known as vtapp are organized. the college celebrates each and every festival wherein student get to show their local culture. it is fun and everyone enjoys. the hostellers are provided with special lunch/dinner on the day of festival. well known celebrities are called for the big events and also ensures that every one enjoys it

[college infrastructure]: so all the facilities provided are great the infrastructure of our college is very good we have many things to do with various clubs are also there to motivate us. i think my choice for chitkara university was great | [academics]: teacher's are not that good they need to be changed with their teaching methods. some of the teacher's are good but some need tk be changed at the end we need to study by our own from various methods. | [placements]: placements are genuine and good. chitkara university is also known for its placement they also offer semesters exchanges and also provide us with 2 plus 2 offer that is 2 year study in india and 2 years out of india | [campus life]: campus life is over all very good teachers are very nice
college_name: Chitkara University Institute of Engineering and Technology Jhansla

review_text: there are many events celebrated in our college. it's hard to find a month when preparations for a certain event is not going on. events are as follows: 1. aagman :- this event is for fresher's & only fresher's participate in this in different arts like dance, drama, music, quizzes etc. 2. spardha:- this is the annual .sports fest of our college and one of the asia's largest sports festival. in this teams of different sports came from all ovdr the india to participate & win in this prestigious sports fest. 3. fmc weekend:- this is the annual digital arts festival of iit bhu for photographers, cinematographers, writers & many more who are involved or interested in digital arts. in this many creative competitions & workshops of different genres are organised. overall this is the best annual fest of iit bhu.i am 1st year student so as of now i don't have any internship experience. but placements here are exceptional, i myself experienced that because this year's placements which occur in december 2018 many companies came like google, microsoft, uber, ola, goldman sachs, intel and many more and highest package of this year's was 1.52 crore. also there's 100% placement from circuital branches. my college(iit bhu) was in news for good placements & no. of students placed. yes, our college provide internships from 2nd year onwards.
college_name: IIT BHU - Indian Institute of Technology

review_text: [college infrastructure]: the hostel facilities are excellent, offering well-equipped rooms with a bed (no mattress), a table with drawers, overhead storage, a wooden slab, and an almirah. common amenities include a fridge and microwave on the ground floor of each hostel, along with a common room furnished with a foosball table, sofas, tables, chairs, and a large tv for watching movies and shows. there are no curfew timings. | [academics]: the courses are quite challenging, and passing is not easy. for example, the passing cutoff for the probability and statistics course in the second semester is set at 13%, yet many students still fail. around 30-40% of students fail each course, and professors rarely lower the passing marks. you really need to study hard once you join this college, especially for end-semester exams, where the class average often falls between 10-15%. | [placements]: around 95% students got placement in big mncs like zomato, facebook, etc. around 60?70% got internships every year and others may get opportunities for higher studies and placement offers. average package is about 12 lpa
college_name: Thapar Institute of Engineering and Technology Patiala

review_text: [college infrastructure]: the university have a satisfactory infrastructure needed for a student, with the fee student pay you get all the basic amenities and facilities required. there are multiple computer labs and all the practical labs. | [academics]: the academics are fine you get a good syllabus for each terms. there are decent faculty with good experience and enough subject knowledge. extracurricular subjects are also there but not every faculty and students take it seriously. | [placements]: the university has an average placement majority of companies coming are small scale and majorly offer sales job with basic pay. however some big companies also come but again for sales mostly and sometimes for finance and hr. | [campus life]: campus life is determined by friends college doesn?t play the primary part | [anything else]: a decent university within this region.

the college is well known for its placements and its college life. dtu has many societies with different choices like dance singing racing sports and some coding societies. dtu has a very big library which has books for studies and some great novels. engifest is the annual cultural festival of dtu which is one of the biggest and oldest colleges in north india it helps in february every year and attracts thousands of participants and spectators from all over delhi across every college. some other fests are aahvaan innovation and even small fests at dtu are bigger than the best of nsut's moksha.the total cost for 4 years of study is around 9 lakhs and it increases every year. like for me my first-year fee was 212000 but for my junior, it is 219000. but there are some good scholarships provided by dtu as well as the delhi government for dtu there is an interview of the student and his parents together and based upon that one can get the scholarship similarly for e-distict delhi there are multiple. scholarships based on merit and annual income by using these scholarships ones can get tuition fees refunded which is approximately 65 percent of the total fess.

[college infrastructure]: birla institute of technology mesra has really very good infrastructure full of greenery. bit mesra is built up in about 1 acre of land. it has a cordial auditorium with a capacity of 2500 people. there are different canteens available within the campus like mehak, h&p, and lakshmi. the library has very good collections of books on all subjects. bit mesra is also famous for its sports complex & gymnasium hall. the institute also provides a free wi-fi on the whole campus for the internet facility | [academics]: bit is a deemed university with excellent academy records. we have a very organized laboratory full of modern instruments and software especially biotech. bit mesra also provides the birla scholarship to meritorious students. our academic is controlled by aicte and ug. we have an almost similar academic syllabus to that of nit and iits. | [placements]: we have a tnp cell that manages the companies coming for the placement. after you enter in 3rd year of college. you will get registered on the tnp portal. you will be notified through these placement cells about the company visiting the campus for the placements. we have very good placements of the students belonging from the it domain. most of the tier-1 company from amazon, goldman sachs, microsoft to tier-3 companies like tcs visit the college to recruit meritorious students. | [campus life]: bit has fantastic college fest like bitosav, vajra, and pantheon. bitosav, vajra, and pantheon are the cultural, sports, and technical fest of the bit mesra which attracts students from the different colleges. we have 23 clubs that really help you to set your skills and grow your network. bit still not have fences but they are working on it.

i do not take any special courses. the faculty is good at timing and they are highly qualified teachers they explained high-level teaching and if you have any doubt regarding the subject you can ask doubt at the time in the class otherwise you can approach the respective faculty in their particular staff room.ph.d. and higher education qualified teachers. every 3 months there will be held exams and exams are difficult to pass.there will be many fests going on regarding the festival or something. fest is good and you enjoy it a lot. the college only provides the books library. asia's largest lecture hall we have provided. there will be a large ground and sports competition also going on. you can find many pages on social media under the name of mnit jaipur.

[college infrastructure]: residing in its mentor institute (mnit-j), the infrastructure is really good. we are stationed at newly built vinodini hostels. they are clean, well ventilated and the finest of all existing hostels present in the campus. though there are network problems and no wifi is available in our hostel yet. classrooms and libs are air conditioned and have every facilities be it projector or white boards and well spaced.sports complex is available but in limited time slots. food is ok. well maintained. | [academics]: yes, the curriculum is updated and far better than the iit/nit's. my batch got some really good teachers, we are happy with that.besides that really doesn't matter, because youtube is the best teacher:) and self study is the mantra. many teachers are on contract based and hence you may not know who will replace whom. our seniors are really hard working and not a single week goes by without a workshops being organized by our seniors. | [placements]: placements are good. highest package goes around 25-30 lpa.competitve coding is the key to jaw-dropping,lavish packages. most of the students get placed, few opt for higher studies. there are limited interns for third year. the placement team is just great. | [campus life]: campus life does not depend on the institute, but rather on your friend circle. i enjoy my life here. our first year ended just in a blink of an eye. couldn't enjoy the last part of our first year together, thanks to corona :/
college_name: Indian Institute of Information Technology Kota

review_text: the college is rich of the extra curricular activities. apart from the academics it helps us to develop the overall personality of the student. it also provide us labs sessions to enrich the knowledge of the students and to make them more pratical in life. the college arranges sport events time to time to keep students physically fit.alumni network of the iit kharagpur is very strong. they also donated various things to the institute so that students don't face much problems. seniors are very helpful in the college. they do not only properly guide us but also solve our day to day life problems by sparing out some time from their much important part of the life.
college_name: IIT Kharagpur - Indian Institute of Technology - [IITKGP]

review_text: [college infrastructure]: yes, the college campus has almost all the necessary facilities you?ll require. there?s a small supermarket, a domino?s, a bank, atm machine, gazebos. but the most attractive aspect of the campus is its cleanliness. although there are many dogs in the campus, which hinders some people. the hostels & mess better than most of the other colleges. and yeah if you're a 1st year girl, you're not really allowed to go out of the campus, you've to go through a hell long of a procedure to get out. | [academics]: the academics system overall is a bit different and better than the other indian colleges. the subjects are appropriate and the work load is also of appropriate amount. but since the corona virus outbreak, they?ve been showering us with loads of work in the form of assignments, reviews, das, quizzes and of course exams. there are 3 exams each semester, 2 internals and a final exam. they?ve shown no mercy during this pandemic time in terms of work load and stress. | [placements]: most of the highest salary packages are offered to the cse department students. the placement quality is actually pretty good. the college guides you through the procedure and prepares you for the interview. | [campus life]: the campus is actually great. it's fresh and green always. you can take long walks along the pathway. there's plenty of space too. but the hostels are a mess. hygiene wise, the girls hostel is mostly clean and nice, but you've got a lot of restrictions. our campus in time is 6 pm. some of the classes end at 7 pm. the hostel in time for girls is 7 pm and for boys it's 9 pm. it's unjust but you cannot do anything about it. the library is open till 12 only.
college_name: Vellore Institute of Technology Chennai Campus

review_text: pros/cons: the campus is very green and systematic making it a small but compact among other nits the hostel food and affordability is very nice for everyone at nominal cost. the central garden and various other spots are nice . the faculties have nice tieups with foreign faculties hostel in time should be exceeded so that we can roam more . | placement experience: students get ppos from the third year end itself that too very high packages . phonepe , de shaw , tata steel .deloitteb, blackrock , drl and many more comapnies offer ppos . generally all branches have good ppacements except biotech and biomed . mechanical and metallurgy students get generally more than 90 percent placements that too with a average package of 10 lakhs . highest package ranges from 55-62 lakhs with it branch average 18 lakhs . my plan is to pursue masters in aiml after btech.

[college infrastructure]: there is a huge campus. there are many fields like athletics ground, football ground, swimming pool of 10 feets. the college has all the necessary facilities. there was canteen also and which was very hygienic. | [academics]: he teaching method followed is good. they are highly knowledgeable. moreover, they achieved a gold medal in teaching. there are almost 25 faculty available for 600 students. the college provides excellent industry exposure. and finally faculties are very helpful. | [placements]: our college where you will get trained very well to reach your aimed job roles for your future. my seniors placed in different companies with a good packages of salaries and we are hoping the same. the highest package is 12 lpa.

the course is different but the syllabus is the same for all core and noncore branches in the first year. the faculty members are really of great help and the seniors too help a lot. the system of examination is also improved over the last few years and attendance is not that big an issue here, only 75 percent mandatory.had to pay the complete course fee via cash mode on the spot of admission. one who fails to submit the fee on the spot is excluded from the admission process and the seat you reserved for you, might be handed to some other guy. but every student can avail of scholarships offered by the government itself.

[college infrastructure]: yes, our college have all the necessary infrastructure facilities and equipment. we have many facilities in our classrooms like projectors and smart room. and they all used and very well maintained.yes we all are living in clean and hygienic place. | [academics]: academic are comparable with almost any top colleges in india as they are updated to keep match with current changing scenerio. both industrial and technical aspects are taken in account that leads to overall development of student. | [placements]: one of the highest placed student ratio in both national and international companies makes it one of the best college in india. highest package with more than 25 lakh and lowest around 5 lakh is worthy of every dream of student.
college_name: Malaviya National Institute of Technology Jaipur

review_text: [college infrastructure]: the college is lush and green covering around 100 acres of area . they provide library in every department and the one central library also. they provide good facilities in hostel like lan wifi , cleaning every single day . the quality of the food is excellent..... | [academics]: i studying computer science and engineering bachelor degree here . the teacher and professor are very interactive in their sessions. they listen every problem of student try to solve it in very sophisticated manner. | [placements]: they have a placement cell in their campus the company they provide to student for working is quite good . some big companies also visit the campus like infosys , wipro, tcs etc. at the time of placements they also provide personality development classes to the student. | [campus life]: college campus is overall good but slightly distance from main city . but the connectivity to reach their is good. they care for each and every student like a responsible mentor. the vibes of the campus is very positive and progressive.

[college infrastructure]: library and new academic building are excellently built and meet international standards. hostels are okay and usually get better with each year, but they are anyway far better than government colleges'. food and hygiene are okay and usually depend from hostel to hostel. | [academics]: depends on professors and the grasping power of students. some professors are really good. some make you attend classes only for attendance. the overall environment creates a good learning experience if you're ready to put in a little more efforts. | [placements]: decent placements. average placements usually reach 7-8 lacs. again it depends on how much skill you have gained as an individual. some placements (usually in coe,ece,enc branches, but not necessarily) go as high as 25+ lacs.
college_name: Thapar Institute of Engineering and Technology Patiala

review_text: [college infrastructure]: infrastructure is really excellent and all labs are well-equipped, wi-fi has a good speed of 150+ and library is huge and has good collections of books and even has huge digital library of algood grade computers, hostels are quite good food is really well cantees | [academics]: faculty are well trained they are highly qualified and has wide range of knowledge they almost have m.tech degrees and many have ph.d. semester exams are easy comparatively but can be cracked with hard work. | [placements]: most of cse students are placed around 1400 of them got campus placed out of which 690 belong to cse and out of which 140+ have secured 6lpa and above packages and average package around 4.2 lpa and the highest offer was around 17lpa from amazon

[college infrastructure]: the campus is green and spacious, offering a conducive environment for learning. hostel accommodations are generally good, with options for single and shared rooms. however, keep in mind that specific details and conditions may change, so it's advisable to check the latest reviews or visit the campus website for the most up-to-date information. | [academics]: it offers a wide range of undergraduate, postgraduate, and doctoral programs across various disciplines, including engineering, science, management, and humanities. the faculty is highly qualified, and the curriculum is rigorous, ensuring that students receive a top-notch education. | [placements]: diverse job offers: students receive job offers from a wide range of industries, including technology, finance, consulting, manufacturing, and more. this diversity allows students to explore various career paths.

from the 7th and 8th semesters, students are eligible for placements. this year's highest package was 38 lpa by amazon. the average package of my college is about 6 lpa. the lowest package was 2.5 lpa. the main companies that visited my college are microsoft, wipro, ibm, accenture, etc. around 92 percent of students gpt placed this year.faculty are very well experienced and have a lot of knowledge about their subjects. teachers supports students in every manner. teachers are well qualified. exam difficulty is moderate like you can score good marks by just preparing the notes of the teachers. akg college holds the place in the cse department among all the colleges.

[college infrastructure]: good infrastructure of college and it provides various facilities like in sports and in academics. overall all the performance are good . and have big sports complex which will help to all the student to be a healthy and have various courts of badminton , volleyball, cricket, etc,. | [academics]: very good in academics and have also different different lab which help the student to get more in practical knowledge and teacher use the white board and projectors for better understanding. the quality of teaching is good and all the teachers are well educated. they are always ready to help students. lpu has various organizations which conduct webinars to help students increase their skills. | [placements]: various good company's like products based come and it allows all the branch to give their exam and offers the various placement offers and also provide the internship. hundred percent students get placed and avg salary provide by the company in between 10 to 12 lakh per annum. | [campus life]: the campus life is such great that you can always learn something new each and every minute. there a lot of activities including sports, dancing, singing and so many other activities that students can engage in. the seniors and teachers are always supportive that they are always there to help students either in academics or non-academic activities too. moreover, lpu has its own uni- hospital, where anyone can visit during emergencies.

[college infrastructure]: state of the art facilities with the very high-speed internet, labs with the best equipment, fully furnished lecture halls, fully equipped sports facilities for all sports. the quality of food in mess and canteen is decent. hostel rooms in certain halls are amazing, with the new halls having single and double rooms there is a health facility | [academics]: some of the professors are the best in the world, like h.c. verma and m.k. harbola on the teaching department. the teaching methods vary from board teaching to ppts or other visual aids at the discretion of the professors. the course curriculum is well set and is revised every few years very excellent | [placements]: about 70% of the placement was recorded in 2016. the average salary was about 10-11 lakhs per annum. however, average in cse was about 18 lakhs per annum, and in eee was 16 lakhs per annum. the companies visiting the campus include microsoft, dr.reddy's, schlumberger etc some company came for internship

[college infrastructure]: one of the well infrastructured university of up is very well maintained. it's classrooms and other living spaces are based on modern technologies including wifi smart board and air-conditioning. sufficient playground and very good open space is there. gla central library is very very big and many other departmental libraries are there. here we separate buildings for all courses and branches. | [academics]: we can say academics as a little above average as it gives a decent output in terms of placement and jobs. professor are from iits and nits having phd qualification. syllabus is well up-to-date based on iit pattern. teaching aim is to make students job ready. | [placements]: in computer science btech course almost every student gets a good job from cmpus itself. many mncs visit campus for recruitment every year. average package offered is 5-6 lpa. highest is 35 lpa. regular visitors are capegemini, microsoft, tcs, infosys, wipro etc.

[college infrastructure]: college is well equipped with necessary stuff related to studies and to improve quality of life so there is no hindrance in studies. most of campus is air-conditioned. there are proper equipments for sports and gyms which are accessible to all in the campus. hostels in 1st year may not be equipped with ac but the memories you made in these hostels are priceless, in 2nd year you will get the ac rooms with ease but you will consider the hostels of 1st year the best. hygiene is very good and food? | [academics]: not all the professors know how to teach there will be some of professors in each department that will make study easy and thorough for you others are not best but are good, and few of them are just joke. curriculum is proper and includes every thing necessary for you to learn to survive in industry. the study may make you job-ready, but you need more than that for a top notch job. | [placements]: in computer engineering if you are not placed you are the most unluckiest person in the universe. the top-notch packages are limited because people with top-notch skills are limited, if you are excellent in any field no one can stop you from getting 25 lakhs+ package. average salary in coe department is about 500k. college is suppirtive in placements. | [campus life]: campus life is awesome. best memories of life will cherish your life in the time you are here. lots of stuff to do for every kind of person to do. many many many societies to work in technical or non-technical. being art of fests and making possible big events will bring you a big smile on face and will bring better out of you. there are people from every part of country and from outside too. ofcourse college life can't be like karan johars movies but you will find it awesome.location is perfect
college_name: Thapar Institute of Engineering and Technology Patiala

review_text: [college infrastructure]: our college boasts of a comprehensive infrastructure, however, it falls short in terms of maintenance. the highlight of the campus is undoubtedly the central library, which is not only spacious but also provides an ideal study environment, complete with air conditioning and silence. despite this, some departments such as the mechanical and civil engineering department are in dire need of upgrades.but cse and ee dept is new and cool.a minor drawback is the absence of auditorium inside the campus. | [academics]: the curriculum at our college is thoroughly modernized and up-to-date with a cutting-edge curriculum for cse that includes the latest technologies such as blockchain and machine learning. the quality of teaching is average and although the academic workload may appear overwhelming during the initial years, one quickly adapts to it. the lab and tutorial sessions are highly beneficial in thoroughly understanding the subject matter. however, self-study can help significantly. | [placements]: the placement opportunity at our college is noteworthy, with a majority of the companies visiting the campus belonging to the banking sector, including prestigious names like jpmorgan chace and visa. we have the presence of companies like amazon offering ample opportunities to students. an impressive 90% of students who sit for placement are successfully placed, with an average package of 15 lakhs per annum. | [campus life]: campus life at our college can be described as mediocre, lacking exiting activities or notable attractions within the premises. however, the city of surat offers a good time pass with various malls and shopping complexes. the college hosts two major events, namely sparsh, a grand cultural fest, and mmnct, a prestigious cricket tournament. additionally, there are various smaller events organized by various clubs that provide opportunities for students to showcase their talents and interests.
college_name: Sardar Vallabhbhai National Institute of Technology Surat

review_text: [college infrastructure]: most of building whether they are lecture hall, academic hall, library, computer labs are all newly constructed. high speed internet connection labs, up to date books in library are some of most important thing one looks in college infrastructure. | [academics]: college academic are more closely related to iit kanpur thus more emphasis on practical knowledge. academics are designed in such that students are made industrial demand ready with work experience. professor uses practical knowledge and examples to teach students. | [placements]: cse and ece students are placed with maximum package of rs 25 lakh per annum and minimum rs 5 lakh per annum. and placement % is 100. mechanical students are also placed in it companies as coding culture is highly prevalent in campus. | [campus life]: situated outside the city in forest add to its scenery making more memorable memories for students.
college_name: PDPM Indian Institute of Information Technology Design and Manufacturing Jabalpur

review_text: campus life is really good at vit and i m sure would really be happy about it we have numerous fests happening and you can really enjoy fests and on every saturday there will be time allotted for fests and you can really feel good as they burst your stress out and make you happy and i really like dj nights in vit where students can dance and enjoy you will definitely like them too. and vit has the best library with the best books which are useful to students and we have various sports competitions happening and there are numerous extra circular activities too. we have a telegram group for vit ap too. get latest updatesi have chosen ece because i was interested in electronics and in vit you can find students from all states students' strength was more in vit and equally we have good strength in faculty too and they divide slots for each subject and faculty will be allocated according to slots so that they can cover all students. most of our teachers have done specializations in their respective fields and they have good knowledge about the subject. exams in vit are a bit tough as they were asked application oriented you have to understand in depth about the concept and if u understand that you can definitely score well.

[college infrastructure]: kiit central library has successfully built up a comprehensive collection of over 6,83,616 books covering different branches of knowledge. there are 15 food courts specialized in cuisines from different parts of the world. | [academics]: kiit attempts to provide a comprehensive education that instills within its students a philosophy that values not only learning and professionalism, but also contribution and commitment to the advancement of community. | [placements]: placement is one of the advantages that kiit offers since its inception .it has an impeccable record in campus placement. kiit has always been much favored talent hunting ground for corporate world as it delivers industry-ready students. a well organized placement team streamlines the recruitment process and students get the jobs of their choice.
college_name: Kalinga Institute of Industrial Technology Bhubaneswar

review_text: students here also get the benefits of excellent internship opportunities both paid and unpaid or research interns both in indian and foreign colleges. min. stipend for paid internships is 30k per month which goes to a maximum of about 17 lakhs offered by optiver for the year 2023. although the cgpa required for such highly paying internships is quite high (obviously).rendezvous is an annual cultural fest and tryst is an annual tech fest that occurs at the start of the year. variety of books and journals available at 24*7 open library. fully air-conditioned classes. sports facilities are also good as compared to other colleges. a lot of clubs are run by student bodies such as music clubs, sports clubs, dance clubs, etc.
college_name: IIT Delhi - Indian Institute of Technology [IITD]

review_text: [college infrastructure]: the infrastructure is good and is equipped with all the latest facilities, i am a b.tech final year student and i can say that these facilities helps in my studies so much. we have 24x7 wifi facility through out the campus. | [academics]: academics is also up to the latest industry trends and the quality of teaching is very good. the professors are knowledgeable and teaches us with the updated curriculum as per the aicte norms. i enjoy studying so much. | [placements]: lovely professional university is one of the top college for good placement. the average salary packages offered by lpu is 6 lpa. lpu sets another placement record package of 3 crore of the batch 2018.

fees structure of the college is equal for all. the average fee of the college is 1.5 lakh per annum. but while taking admission via the university side there is a quite chance of scholarship. and the finance for the college is through the serious admission process which can be asked while admitting. rest is just perfect.the internship is not still opted by me but as per the seniours the internship is quite good and there are many paid and unpaid internship options. which is thought opted by the students. the roles are minimal. but the opportunities are endless also with mncs

[college infrastructure]: iit delhi has a large campus. all facilities related to sports like badminton court, tt, swimming pool, cricket ground, football is available in our campus. wi-fi is there in every department. labs and classrooms are well-equipped with projectors and screens. hostel rooms are very cleaned every day and mess food is eatable. | [academics]: every teachers have done their ph.d. and have written books which students from other mba colleges like iim refer from. we are lucky to have those teachers teaching us. classes are very interactive and related to real life scenarios. we have global field study to interact with companies outside india. our batch went to cape town and israel. | [placements]: we have 100% guarantee placements for summers and internships. companies like synergy, ibm, amazon, hp visit the campus every year. the average highest package was 23 lacs and the lowest was 8 lacs for the senior batch. stipend on an average is 40,000 for 2019 batch. place com works day in and out to convert the companies.many other committees like alum com and industry interaction committed help place com.

[college infrastructure]: dit university in dehradun has a modern campus. during my b.tech in computer science and engineering, the facilities were great. we had advanced computer labs, modern classrooms, and a good library. the campus was big with lots of greenery, perfect for studying and relaxing. there were also fun activities like a gym, a basketball/badminton court. | [academics]: the computer science and engineering program at dit university was tough and had both current and outdated courses like c, c++. we learned about programming, algorithms, and more. some teachers were experienced and friendly. during our time there were not much courses that makes us job ready, but with the competitive environment we ourself got job ready | [placements]: well about 80% of my batchmates were placed and around 20% had multiple job offers, but as expected of private college, avg package was around 4-5lakh ctc. only cse had best offers, max package was around 15 lakh

[college infrastructure]: the campus is very greeny and it is like a home.it is a huge campus with new people's to interact with and students are coming from different states, countries. university provide wifi to students and each class has smart boards. | [academics]: study's are great but need to improve in terms of explanation about topics more depth and quality of teaching is great. the curriculum is updated to us before start of semester so that we can get overview about units that what we learn. | [placements]: placements are great in lpu mostly for cse students but for other branches that is need to improve more but university is trying to give more opportunities to students to reach there goals and highest salary offered is 61 lakh for cse student but for agriculture student it is less. | [campus life]: college campus is great and greeness and it is like a second home for students and students are coming from different states and countries so we can interact with them to gain experience and learn new things. teacher are supportive and help students to gain more knowledge. campus is safe.

college is very good from every point of view, it conducts its annual fest tech fest and many other events, and there are so many clubs that conduct events and make college life memorable. one will create so many memories in this college life. the only thing which i feel low about is the size of the campus. 40 acres of campus is a little small for a large infrastructure college. the sports festival is also celebrated every year. in sports festivals it conducts itramurals means inter-departmental, inter nit means all nits participate in that. and almost every club is run by students like the tesla club, robotics club, music, dance, etc.the fees of nit patna is not so low not so high. it is that much that one middle-class family can afford it. and if that much is difficult to pay then there are so many financial assistance. like family income categorized. if family income is less than 1 lakh then the student need not pay the tuition fees, if family income is 1-5 lakh then the student needs to pay only one-third of the tuition fees and if income exceeds 5 lakh then he/she will have to pay the entire fee. the college also provides some scholarships.

[college infrastructure]: there are lawns ,botanical garden for botany students and for people who love nature..our all classrooms are air conditioned, and has smart board facilities.college is big enough for program events all is good. it has big cricket ground | [academics]: teacher are so good and well qualified in their course of studying all have much experience . each subject is easily understood by all teachers. their way of method of teaching is very good and understandable. but all professors are very strict. | [placements]: now a days recession is going on. so, there is some bad affects on placements. year of 2022 placement is good but not very good.most people go for finance, consulting and software development roles. although it is not as settled as circuital branches
college_name: National Institute of Technology Karnataka Surathkal

review_text: [college infrastructure]: college has a large campus area having a good building. the college provides a wi-fi zone and a big library which consists of over 25000 books. they have more than 500 rooms in the campus. they provide hostel facility with wi-fi, 250+ rooms and the best hygienic food. | [academics]: professors are also skilled and almost all of them have completed their phds from very prestigious universities. they are always ready to help us if we of any doubts. so the teaching quality is good. the difficulty of semester exams depends on professors. about 90?95% of students pass the courses on average. | [placements]: all the students got placements from my college because iitd is among the top colleges. the average package offered for a student is more than 10 lacs per annum. top techno companies visited and hired the best students for work. | [anything else]: the best college..

[college infrastructure]: as a graphic era student, i can say that the university does have most of the necessary infrastructure, facilities, and equipment. here's a breakdown: classrooms: the classrooms are equipped with amenities such as projectors, and not so comfortable seating arrangements. laboratories: the university has well-equipped laboratories with the latest instruments and technology relevant to various disciplines. these facilities are often used for practical sessions and they are generally well-maintained, although occasional maintenance issues may arise. libraries: the library facilities are extensive, with a wide range of books, journals, and digital resources available for students. the libraries are conducive to studying and research, and they offer amenities such as wifi access and quiet study space. sports centers: graphic era has dedicated sports facilities for various indoor and outdoor activities, including a gymnasium, basketball and volleyball courts, football fields, and indoor game rooms. these facilities are utilized by students for recreational purposes and organized sports events, and they are generally well-maintained. hostels: the university provides on-campus accommodation for students, and the living spaces are generally clean and well-maintained. the hostel rooms are equipped with basic amenities such as beds, study tables, and storage facilities. | [academics]: "i am currently pursuing a bachelor of technology degree in computer science because i have a strong interest in coding. in terms of the quality of teaching, i find that some of the teachers are exceptionally skilled while others are average. however, i do not feel it is my place to judge a teacher's abilities." teacher? plus to make us job ready we have classes of professional communication in which we are taught many different skills and help us in grabbing an internship or a job offer. | [placements]: at graphic era university, the quality of placements has generally been quite good. the percentage of students placed typically varies, but it's usually high, often above 80% or even 90%. the highest salary package offered depends on the year and the specific course, but it's usually impressive. for instance, in recent years, it could range from 10-20 lakhs per annum for engineering courses like computer science or mechanical engineering. the average salary offered again varies, but it tends to be competitive, usually ranging from 4-8 lakhs per annum across different courses. the placement process at graphic era university is typically well-structured and supportive. many students find it easy and pleasant, thanks to the assistance provided by the college's placement cell. | [campus life]: graphic era university is situated in dehradun, uttarakhand, surrounded by the picturesque himalayan mountains. the campus boasts modern infrastructure and lush greenery, making it conducive to learning. its best features include state-of-the-art laboratories, well-equipped libraries, and diverse extracurricular activities ranging from sports to cultural events. one of the worst features could be occasional connectivity issues due to its location in the hilly terrain. the location offers a blend of natural beauty and urban amenities, with dehradun city nearby for shopping, dining, and entertainment. safety measures are in place on campus, with security personnel and cctv surveillance ensuring a secure environment for students. additionally, the university has protocols in place to handle emergencies effectively, including medical emergencies and natural disasters.

[college infrastructure]: awesome infrastructure for both student as well as teachers to have a wonderful opportunities to collaborate and develop life long skills. environment is friendly due to its green environment with different species of plants. | [academics]: in my point of view i found the academic of vit excellent it was a great platform to learn,uplift the field knowledge with theoretical concepts. most of the engineering profession knowledge was given by experts. | [placements]: it's famous for its placement statistics every year it provide a golden opportunity to students to get the dreams fulfilled of working in different multinational and national companies i.e l@t which makes them a role model in society and provides good social life.

[college infrastructure]: overall the college infrastructure is good ,we are provided with all the basic amenities which are needed like proper cleanliness , wifi and other things which a student needs ,classrooms are now being equiped with smartboards. | [academics]: hbtu is among the oldest college in the country so teaches here are well qualified maximum of them are phd holders and they are supportive to a good extent they will guide you properly but few of them are not as good as they will seem. | [placements]: placements are very good this is most important factor of this university with almost 90% placement and in few branches it goes as high as 100% with good packages comparing to which a engineering graduate gets cse branch highest last year was 60 and 48 lakhs

[college infrastructure]: the university has good infrastructure from basic facilities to high class facilities. the campus has green healthy environment and the classrooms are also well maintained and all the places are hygeinic. | [academics]: the university has wide range of courses and has designed well designed curriculum for each particular courses. the faculties are educated and stay updated regarding the latest trends and developments. | [placements]: the university offers one of the best placement opportunities and number of students get placed also. the students are given training regarding the placement interviews about how to crack them. various top companies visits the campus and offer high salary packages.

i qualified the joint entrance examination ( main) with a rank.by the end of june counselling process start which last upto 3rd week of july.through counselling i was alloted a seat in department of civil engineering.after few reported physically and submit and verify all the documents and then institute accepted it and alloted a hostel.finally i got admission.placement and job scenario in computer science department, information technology, electrical engineering, electronics an telecommunication engineering, mining engineering is more than 80%.and in all othet departments its swinging around 60%.yes, institute provides interships.overall experience is average.
college_name: Indian Institute of Engineering Science and Technology - [IIEST] Shibpur

review_text: [college infrastructure]: the college have all the necessary infrastructure, and equipment .the labs are full filled with all the equipment.the class rooms are having smart board.the has all the books.the whole campus is enabled with wifi. | [academics]: i am studying mechanical.the quality of teaching is excellent.dit is well know for his academic.the is curriculum is always updated .the teachers informs the student about the all recent technology.and with the various going throughout the year it makes you job . | [placements]: the placement is all over good in other branches fo cse it is 100% whereas for other branches it is less compared to cse.but you can do ur best to achieve best in placement and also get place here in companies like tata,kirloskar | [campus life]: the college is situated in a very nice place.the atmosphere is very nice.the student teacher are very supportive.the college can hold all emergency.the hostel member are like family members.the college is totally safe.

[college infrastructure]: i was absolutely stunned by the massive size of the campus as it felt like a small-contained city to me. i found the electronics and electrical communication engineering department and research laboratories well-equipped. i spent countless hours in the amazing central library. | [academics]: my master of technology course was extremely rigorous and i loved that i was constantly challenged. i felt i was being taught by some of the most educated professors in my field, and i gained deep, socialized knowledge through my thesis work. | [placements]: i secured a fantastic job effortlessly during the campus placements. i know the top core companies valued my specialization, and i found the placement process to be very efficient and successful for me. | [campus life]: i experienced great independence living in the hall of residence. i truly enjoyed the late-night talks and activities that me and my friends used to do. the college environment is fun but focused. sometimes, i had to study during my free time because of the vast syllabus.

[college infrastructure]: the hostels are clean, and there is plenty of space in the rooms. even though there are few hostels for girls, the hygiene is good. canteen foods are delicious and healthy. there is a medical room with good documents to help students in distress. the hostels are in an open area and, hence, are not compact. | [academics]: faculty members at this college are highly qualified and some teachers are ready to help students when they want. teaching quality depends from teacher to teacher; i think it is the curriculum where we are lagging, not the faculty members. they often teach us for semester exams, not industry; semester exams are okay?not so tough, not so easy. | [placements]: this college is a well-known and prestigious college among the modern colleges, and because of that, many good companies hire students from this college. that's why the placement rates are quite high, and the coding culture is also good. | [anything else]: time spend with some amazing people.
college_name: Netaji Subhas University of Technology New Delhi

review_text: vit has a good social environment. every month an event with regards to our carrier. yearly once there will be a sports event and we will get cash prizes. annually there will be an event called rivera in which celebrities participate. our university has a huge library where everything is digital. the amenities of the classroom change from blocks to blocks. the main block will have a good infrastructure bathroom while the smv has a mid-range washroom.the course curriculum is updated frequently so that you read the things that are needed for now. faculty behaviour changes with respect to their moods. as well as your internal marks. qualification for the faculty in vit is that you need a doctorate certificate and a good level of knowledge. the time period of one semester is 4-5 months. we have cat 1, cat 2, quizzes and digital assessment, and finally final assessment test.

[college infrastructure]: college having high class labs, well furnished classrooms, library havibg more than 50000 books. college don't have their hostel facilities.living spaces is clean and food hygiene. not for boys. in campus almost one building for boy's. and only 1 hostel for girl's. having spearte mess | [academics]: teaching quality is nice and they teach each and every concept effectively. our college is govt think this field is as much as hard then electrical communication engineering.i think this field is as much as hard then electrical communication engineering. | [placements]: the highest package was nearly 60lacks and average salary offered is 3.6 lacks per annum.avarage salary for the students is 7 lpa and minimum is almost 5lpa and is was good for staring package. overall our college gives good placement.
college_name: Maulana Azad National Institute of Technology Bhopal

review_text: the campus life is a blessing especially for those who love nature. every month there are some cultural and technical events. the college has various cultural and technical clubs like for music, photography, environment, theatre and technical clubs like robotics and departmental clubs. the biggest technical fest of kolkata is instruo which is organised by iiest and also we host the oldest cultural festival that's rebeca. apart from these there are departmental fests of each department and also of each club.the campus is very green with over 5000 trees. the green lush adds to the scenic beauty of the institute. there are 3 football grounds in the campus. there is also exist swimming pool, basketball court, volleyball facility, cricket pitch, badminton court in each hostel. all the hostels have high speed wi-fi. the library is well equipped and digital. labs of most core departments use equipments which are old but fully functional
college_name: Indian Institute of Engineering Science and Technology - [IIEST] Shibpur

review_text: [college infrastructure]: the infrastructure of galgotias university is well developed with modern classrooms, smart boards, a central library and computer labs. the campus is spacious and well maintained. wi-fi is available across the campus and hostels are comfortable with decent food and hygienic surroundings. sports and cultural facilities are also provided for overall development. | [academics]: the academic environment is very supportive. the faculty members are knowledgeable and helpful, and they focus on practical as well as theoretical learning. the curriculum is regularly updated as per industry standards which makes students job-ready. teachers also guide us with extra sessions and assignments that enhance our skills beyond textbooks. | [placements]: the placement opportunities are good as reputed companies visit the campus for recruitment. the placement cell organizes training sessions, soft skills workshops and mock interviews to prepare students. many students get internships as well as full-time offers. the highest package is impressive, and the average package is decent compared to other universities in the region.

[college infrastructure]: the infrastructure is good and everything is kept clean and ready for use. the mess is okay, not the best, but meets expectations. the canteen is phenomenal, with great food, although it's expensive. it?s a big canteen with a nice outdoor tree area for sitting. | [academics]: the teachers are helpful, qualified, and ready to assist. some are even great and encouraging. the curriculum has been revised many times, so it's up-to-date. the difficulty level is moderate, and you need 84% attendance to write exams for any subject. | [placements]: about 40-50% of students were placed in the course. the average package was around inr 10 lpa. recruiting companies included bosch, intel, amazon, microsoft, apple, bookmyshow, and other big tech companies are participated in campus placement drive.

i chose this course above all choices because i know that the manufacturing sector will grow very rapidly in the coming years because of initiatives like aatmanirbhar bharat. the course curriculum is quite good and new technologies are also being taught in the institute despite that some curriculum is age-old and needs to be replaced and some equipment to is very old. talking about teachers they are highly qualified but they lack the technical aspects. also, some lectures get really boring. also, faculty to student ratio is close to good. the exams were conducted at the right time with transparency.many events get organised on campus including some prominent speakers but the main fest is bitotsav which gets organised in a very classy manner. there are a lot of books and journals in the library and the library consists of two floors. the classrooms look quite modern with virtual classroom facilities. there is a big cricket ground and 2 football grounds and 2 basketball courts along with 1 indoor stadium for badminton and a gym for exercising. there are more than 10 clubs for students to showcase their talents like the aerospace club dramatic club musical club racing club etc.

one india and one world are the two fests held in an academic year. one india involves people participating from all over the world and one world consists of people from all over the world as lpu has world-wide diverse populations to show off their skills.the fee structure is approx. 12 lacs for the whole course but a student can get scholarships according to their merit and marks scored in the test called lpunest. the test is conducted in online mode which prevails the students to have a better environment.

pros/cons: indian institute of technology-patna has a very beautiful campus. for first years the hostel is too spacious. the relation between juniors and seniors is too good. the grading system. this college has absolute grading system. the rooms in hostels for 2nd,3rd years are too small. the classes starts early nearly at 8 am . | placement experience: in phase 1 alone 207 students were placed,including 58 pre placement offers. impressively, 12 international offers were made. the average package of indian institute of technology stood at ?25.5lpa,where the highest domestic package reached 60lpa.top recruiters this year are google 15 offers ,flipkart, zs associates,microsoft ,amazon, adobe, intel , nvidia ,and accenture japan. departmentwise, m.sc mathematics program achieved 100%placement, artificial intelligence and data science 80% and computer science and engineering 75%. aproximately 700 students participated for placements this year and participation of over 220 companies.
college_name: IIT Patna - Indian Institute of Technology - [IITP], Patna

review_text: [college infrastructure]: the infrastructure of the college is fairly well in regards to the location of the campus. irrespective of having a very small amount of area they have build a very well equipped campus for students to study. | [academics]: the academics is one of the best things related to my college. although the management is a little week but the academics keep up for it. the teacher's are well qualified and are very friendly with the students and help the students to study. | [placements]: the placements that we as students get after completing our respective degrees from the university are above average in regards to our capability and what the companies want. a fair amount of students get good placements after there tenure as a student ends.

[college infrastructure]: the college infrastructure is just average, just like any other institute/university. there are 2 gyms in the boy's hostels, a swimming pool, a few canteens/shops in the shopping complex. other than that, the campus is pretty much average. the hostels do not have much facilities. wifi is present everywhere in the campus and hostels but the signal quality isn't excellent. | [academics]: this college, being an institution of national importance, is one of the best college in the country in terms of academics. all the professors and faculty are well experienced and good quality teaching will be provided to the students. | [placements]: there are almost 100% placements in the college. the packages are also very good, can be comparable with the top iits. many top companies come for placements. however, there is also a lot of competition during the placements season. | [campus life]: not that campus life is the most excellent, but it is pretty good to take a degree in iiita. one can just enjoy life along with the studies.
college_name: Indian Institute of Information Technology Allahabad

review_text: [college infrastructure]: our institute is one of the oldest in our nation due to which all the buildings of the institute are pretty old except 2 hostels all other buildings are very old. also maintenance including the department complexes, labs, workshops, lecture halls. i feel that a lot of improvement can be done with the funds allotted by the ministry of education. | [academics]: few courses have been updated in the past decade. recently the facility of open electives started from last year, but due to a limit on number of students per course very few students can get the opportunity from it. also i feel that a lot of new updates can be done to modernise the courses. | [placements]: i'm proud to say that placements wise our college iit bhu varanasi is very exceptional all over the nation. every year more than 97% students get placed during the placement season. i feel that there still is room for improvement in this sector.
college_name: Indian Institute of Technology Banaras Hindu University Varanasi

review_text: the internship process at nsit begins in the month of august ie from your 5th semester. generally the first company that comes for internship is microsoft. after that you have some companies coming at an interval of 1 month for internship. all of them are generally for coe/it people. i don't think there is any company that comes for mpae/bt. some electronics companies come (like qualcomm, ti) and then people from ece and ice have a chance to get a college internshipmostly all the top companies including technical and non-technical companies visit every year for placement process. placement process is very crystal clear. students with more than 65% aggregate can sit in almost all relevant companies. recruitment process includes percentage shortlisting, followed by written test, followed by group discussions and final interviews.

the course curriculum is relevant for someone appearing for gate .we do have some technical trainings and industrial tour to get some real life experience. we are taught about the subjects in practical in the labs that are equipped with most recent technology.we host an annual techfest event which is considered as one of the best fest in asia.there are a lot of events in which people participate from all over the world.the star night is just amazing.
college_name: Punjab Engineering College University of Technology - [PEC]

review_text: [college infrastructure]: yes, abv iiitm have all the necessary infrastructure, facilities and equipments. the classrooms have centralized ac, and capacity of nearly 130-150 students. the main attraction is the sports complex which is better even than many leading iits. the campus is mostly clean, but due to large size and a wide forest area it is not possible to clean each and every place daily. there is a cafeteria, but a general one, i must say the food there is pretty average and attached with amul icecream parlour. | [academics]: i am currently enrolled in ipg(integrated post graduate) course-it(information technology). the institute boasts of all phd teaching faculties(one of the only kind) in the institute. the curriculum is similar to other colleges and pretty average. for job the key is self study. | [placements]: more than 80% of the students get placed. last year, the highest package went upto 40lpa for the ipg course. the average salary is between 10-15 lpa, which is quite satisfying being a student of abv iiitm. | [campus life]: campus life is quite pleasant and there is ample of time to explore your hobbies. the internet is decent and evening-time is best for strolls, or play any sport. there are separte buildings for staff and students residence. the environment is pretty safe(just beware of snakes around, as there is a lot of greenery).the campus can handle emergency situations i suppose, since i haven't encountered with one during my stay.
college_name: Atal Bihari Vajpayee Indian Institute of Information Technology and Management Gwalior

review_text: many technical fests and annual fests are held in the college every year like instruo, rebeca, scintilations, etc. the college library is very huge and contains many books related to many different fields both academic and non-academic. not all but a few classrooms are air-conditioned. all the laboratories are air-conditioned and are fully equipped with the latest equipment required to conduct experiments. a college sports team is also very active and regularly takes part in different inter-college sports events. inside the campus, we have two big grounds, a basketball and badminton court and a swimming pool. many clubs and societies run in college are managed by the students' senate. we have societies for dance, music, photography, videography, games and sports, some welfare societies and an entrepreneurship development cell also.from the point of view of job opportunities computer science is one of the best branches to choose from within engineering. faculty: student ratio is about 1:90. faculties are highly qualified all with a doctorate degree and their teaching method is also quite efficient. term exams are held twice per semester with moderate difficulty levels.
college_name: Indian Institute of Engineering Science and Technology - [IIEST] Shibpur

review_text: [college infrastructure]: the college has all the necessary equipments and facilities to help you expand your creativity and knowledge. wifi is excellent. the college is pretty clean and the food is hygienic. so that doesn't seen to be a problem. | [academics]: the college is one of the best engineering colleges in india. so the curriculum is pretty updated and the students are very competitive. it makes us job ready for sure.im studying chemical engineering as i want to pursue aeronautical engineering in the future and it does have a lot of things in common. | [placements]: placements are top notch for all the departments. but the effort needs to be from once own then placements are easy.the companies coming over here are great and pay pretty great salaries.its a great choice overall. | [campus life]: i am a bengali and our campus is predominantly bengalis so it's not a problem fitting in.but non residential students might have a problem. but it's not colossal.
