[college infrastructure]: this college has good infrastructure and good facilty ,better condition having required for good college.their are lot of books in library and it has a big sport centre.hostel are clean and food is average in taste . livings spaces are clean and food is hygienic. | [academics]: i am studying be in the college and we have mentors for different classes.the quality of teaching is great and the curriculum is updated in every 3 years. the syllabus include all the essential items and all subjects including in the course are essential for our placements. | [placements]: the college offers an average pack of 3-5 lakh per year.more than 500 companies came for recruitment in the campus to hire. 100 percent students are placed and highest package is 21 lakh and college is very supportive and it has placement self. | [campus life]: the college campus is beautiful and there are big grounds to play and students can join clubs and party.and sometimes teachers and students organize events and parties .
college_name: Chitkara University Institute of Engineering and Technology Jhansla

review_text: there are 3 fests, tech fest plinth, sports fest desportivo and cultural fest vivacity. they are conducted in january and february. almost all the books the courses are available in the library. sports facilities are really good we have courts and tracks for almost all popular sports and there is our club sankalp which tries to bring a change in the life of people by helping the needy and educating nearby villages and mess workers.students are eligible for placement from the 5th sem. more than 100 companies visit including google, amazon. out of 587 students, 579 had at least a single offer. the highest package is 53 lakh and the average is 14.6 lakhs. more than 98% of students were placed. i plan to do an mba after btech.
college_name: The LNM Institute of Information Technology - [LNMIIT]

review_text: [college infrastructure]: 1.spacious and well ventilated classrooms.the college have very good infrastructure and approx all facilities are available.campus is clean well maintained and laboratories are well equipped and classroom well structured.e | [academics]: i am student bca for good placements and learning new technology.quality of teaching is good and try to solve every problem.the curriculum is updated time to time and include all recent development in field. | [placements]: quality of placement our college is excellent.almost 90% were placed.the highest salary package is 18 lakh in btechaverage salary offered is 4-5 lakh. yes my collge support at every level.but in other brancehes the placement is less like bsc. | [campus life]: college campus is very good and provide different equipment.surrounding by hills and eye catching views.all staff members and students are supportive and location is good.

[college infrastructure]: the college infrastructure is awesome. we have top class labs and gyms with high-quality equipment. our sporting equipment too is up-to-date providing us with extensive amenities. classrooms are well-equipped with the necessary things. | [academics]: academics could be better. our professors are good but not great. the syllabus sometimes feels like it is not updated regularly. we do get great practical experiences in labs which helps us refine the concepts we learn in our classes. | [placements]: placements are usually good, especially for the computer science department. even non-cse departments usually sit for software placements and bag good jobs. overall, placements are good in software sector but not so good for core jobs in other sectors.
college_name: SRM Institute of Science and Technology Chennai

review_text: athletics have great importance in our college as students get chance to play at other colleges iits, nits etc, they learn importance of victory and defeat in life through experience gained their. library provides essential study hours and calm environment to students who are preparing for high level exams like upsc, gate, cad, gre etc with facilities. lab equipments are moderate and are kept in proper conditions.campus life is awesome, the greenary and healthy environment of campus drives students to fall in love with beauty of nature. cutural and techinal events like utkansh and techniti are held every year.the moments enjoyed by students in shows are immortal and remain best part of life. utkash and techniti are biggest three days events of this college which organises various inter colleges competitions.
college_name: Dr BR Ambedkar National Institute of Technology - [NIT]

review_text: [college infrastructure]: the hostel facilities are there for boys and girls separately but the number of hostels for girls is sufficient. mess food differs according to the mess but overall, it is average if rated. the wi-fi facility is good. clean campus and classrooms are also clean. | [academics]: teachers are good at mnnit; they have a good ranking in their subject in india. mnnit is followed by nep (the new education policy from 2022). semester exams are tough, and marking is also taught. some professors are also not allowing students who have less than 75% attendance. | [placements]: the placement of the college is very good. in the current batch, 80% of students got placed. the highest package is 33 lpa, while the average is around 11 lpa. top companies like google also came to the college.mnnit known for it's placement.. | [anything else]: best college for study.
college_name: Motilal Nehru National Institute of Technology Allahabad Prayagraj

review_text: [college infrastructure]: yes our college have all the necessary infrastructure facilities and equipments.smart boards are available, doubght clearing sessions are held regularly. library is open 24*7 and any student can use the library at any time. indoor and outdoor games options are also available and everything is well maintained.yes hostels are very clean even i am a hostel student and food is very hygienic. | [academics]: i am pursuing b.tech in cse from iem as i want to know more about the subject and want to start a won company.we have very well qualified teachers who teaches us with great care and help us to grow more in all sectors.yes the curriculum is well update and include all the recent developments in the fields of it sector and coding.yes it's a professional course and our teachers from the beginning help us to get well prepared so that when companies come we are ready to persue the jobs . | [placements]: good placement and jobs offers are available in iem. around 80percent of the students from iem got placed in last year.as i am new in the college i am not sure of the highest package but it was above 50l per annum.the student was from it. average salary offered in iem is around 8lakhs per annum. college is very supportive and placement process is easy but i know very less about it as i am in 1st year. | [campus life]: it has one of the best campus in kolkata. iem has a very good infrastructure outdoor games like basketball golf and cricket are being played. indoor games such as quiez and coding competition are also being held. the staff and teachers are very supportive. yes iem is located in a posh locality with all the emergency facilities available nearby.
college_name: Institute of Engineering and Management Kolkata

review_text: [college infrastructure]: the construction is happening but no ground to play very consisted ground. all buildings very less greenery library is very well equipped but lost of dust due to construction . parking lot is playground for us | [academics]: nice faculty for cs. i don't know about about other branches.even there is course of io where u could start doing your minor in first year first semester itself.and you have chance of teaching junior in 1 sem and teachers are not bad. | [placements]: cse has a good placement ratio.one of them got a package of 50lakh per annum and some of them are doing their masters in prestige university like stanford.so if you are getting cse then it is not bad in here also after nitk it is one of the best engineering college in karnataka | [campus life]: not so adventures here.

[college infrastructure]: the auditorium is pretty big and good although the campus area is small almost 18 acres.the class are equipped with digital projectors and the entire campus have an wifi connection available to connect. | [academics]: the teaching expirence is good enough teachers are helpful . also the curriculum is up to date . i guess they update the cources every 10 years as the oldest subject i have been taught was of the year 2015 . | [placements]: when i joined in 2022 the the ppcement was asome according to any private college but as the recession progesses the placements have been down by a significant number.this years average was avout 10 lpa for cse students i guess. | [campus life]: the campus life is fine and there are not much restrictions and inside the campus but you have to wear uniform during the college hours and they really put a fine on you if you don't wear it . and the mess food is not upto mark somdays it will really make you cry.
college_name: Jaypee Institute of Information Technology Noida

review_text: [college infrastructure]: every student get single occupancy room with ac, wi-fi and lan connection. library is open 24x7 and air conditioned. huge sports complex with facility of badminton court, tt court, cricket ground, football ground etc. also, primary health center offers medical facilities. | [academics]: curriculum is bit hectic but manageable. faculty members are highly qualified. level of exam depends on professor. grading is done relatively. there 75% attendance criteria, if score less than c- grade and attendance falls below 75% you will be failed. getting good cgpa may be tough for some students. | [placements]: more than 90% students were placed in year 2023-24. the highest was around 60lpa in japan and average was around 16lpa. for cse branch 100% placement was noted. some people also go for higher studies abroad in prestigious universities. companies like amazon, cognizant, media. net, zomato etc. visited for placement. top role was sde. core roles were comparatively less offered.

campus of lovely professional university is amazing. sex ratio is good as compared to another college university. lovely professional university has good placement records. if you are serious in your carrier then college will definitely support you but if you are not serious, no one is there to take you out of your safe zone. talking about the college life, its really awesome, college has everything you need for entertainment, daily some programs are going on in college.course syllabus gets updated every year. yes, we were provided enough industrial experience. nahita mam, cse faculty is an amazing teacher, she really explains the concept very well. she supports the students very much.

nsit has a strong culture of student activities. numerous societies are active on campus that aim to inculcate team values and nurture talents within students. canvas, crescendo, ashwamedh,junoon, mirage, are some recreational societies and ieee, devcomm, csi nsit, etc are tech societies. there are several other societies.technology courses were 1,45000 by 2018-19, it was increased to rupees 1,65,000 and now for session 2022-2023, it is hiked up to 2,19,000 rupees for the first year. nsit have some scholarship programs too and offers fee waivers for students whose family income is low

[college infrastructure]: situated outside the city near forest area, close to airport, gives it an pleasant and wonderful view. new developed computer lab, library, lecture hall add to its beauty, highly specialised labs, qualified teacher and lab staff makes it easy for practical knowledge for students. | [academics]: it follows highly patronized pattern of iit kanpur thus an lead ahead of many nits and newly iits. more emphasis on practical knowledge and making students ready for industrial gives it an advantage. this is due to highly developed management. | [placements]: many defence important companies like brahmos aerospace recruit routinely and many other mnc reaseach and development wings also recruit form here specially samsung. this is all due to its highly developed labs and practical knowledge emphasis. | [campus life]: situated in middle of jungle, beautiful scenery, thadi, late nightouts add to students memories and make it memorable more. teachers and students are more friendly with you and best one, they support you..
college_name: PDPM Indian Institute of Information Technology Design and Manufacturing Jabalpur

review_text: [college infrastructure]: the college has all the equipments which are necessary for academics ,gym, and has cricket ground , badminton court , cafeteria. and they are building a new building which has a lot of facilities. and b-block 13th floor is a nice place to chill and also read. | [academics]: the teachers over here are highly qualified and are done/doing phd's from a highly reputated instituions. the teachers are very interactive and helpful. even u can do research under the teachers which will be helpful. | [placements]: the placements are very good , so many multinational companies come over to this college and the most of the people in this college get placed. the highest placement is above 50l and more than 5 people got placed for that offer. | [campus life]: the campus life is very nice you will get exposure in every aspect . activities will be conducted very frequently and the teachers ,students and the other staff people are very cooperative and freindly.

i always had interest in technological aspects of the machines that's why i decided to continue my studies in the same field information technology is a growing field and has endless scope the student-faculty ratio is about 40:1 the teachers are all retired professors and researchers with a ton of experience they are really extraordinary in the knowledge field exams are little tough and you will have to study round the year if you want to score wellthe campus placements are really good as if you compare it to any nit college, dtu provides a better package at average the highest package of dtu was from computer science this year and was of 80lpa of salary the major companies were byju's, tisco, tcs and google, wipro almost 98% of students gets placed every year my plan after the degree is to get placed in a good company

[college infrastructure]: the college infrastructure is superb however it's confusing inside out by it's actually fully air conditioned and good to look it's a nice experience in this college with beautiful infrastructure there are spots for pics | [academics]: the academics is good teachers are well educated well known and help us in any way possiblem and guide us throughout the exams and semesters the library is good provided with all the books for exams | [placements]: the placement cell is superb there is especially a placement cell to help us out in any way possible and guide us for our upcoming future and it is for all the courses. this overall it's good to get placement from this college | [campus life]: campus life is fine. i am introvert kind off but i enjoyed it with my friends and it's a nice experience the college is good canteen good spots to chill with friends to roam around the fests are superb to experience | [anything else]: overall the college is just amazing especially those who are extrovert and thosewho are excited to experience their life with fun and be best jn any way possible it often provides various opportunities to prove yourself in any way u want to

[college infrastructure]: kiit has excellent infrastructure with a world class campus spread over a large area.the classroom are spacious,air-conditioned and equipped with smart board and modern teaching facilities.laboratories are well maintained. | [academics]: i am pursuing engineering at kiit because it offers good exposure and a structured academic environment.the quality of teaching is mixed.the curriculum is mostly updated.some faculty members are very supportive. | [placements]: kiit provides decent placement opportunities, especially for student who are consistent and skill-oriented.a few students get good offer from reputed companies but that require strong coding skills, projects and internship. | [campus life]: campus life is very good with top notch infrastructure, college fest, society are very good. | [anything else]: don?t joined this college.
college_name: Kalinga Institute of Industrial Technology Bhubaneswar

review_text: [college infrastructure]: the infrastructure of the colleges really good it is well furnished polished proper clean well maintained and it is clean on daily basis so i like it i would read that full as i am very satisfied with interested have complain | [academics]: i have pursued bca that is bachelors of computer application at christ university delhi ncr campus the quality of teaching is really poor and not satisfied too many assignments and cis are given at the same time we get no time to enjoy our college life | [placements]: very very placement is of this campus that is price delhi ncr campus and where if you companies visit over they are few number of students that is one or two students get placed over there even among our seniors only quite few number of students have got placed among so many talented students so don't come here

[college infrastructure]: national institute of technology , hamirpur have a very good infrastructure. there is always a fresh and clean environment. it's building and academic block buildings are also very nice in infrastructure. | [academics]: academics of nith is also very good. i am a student of btech 1 st year student in electrical engineering department. it's academic curriculum is based on the new education policy. it's academic session contains different types of curriculum activities also | [placements]: placements of nith is also good. many students of nith get different types of very good placements. many students are get placed. all eligible students are getting a chance to sit in interviews of different companies.

i took computer science and engineering because it was of interest to me and the field is very vast and offers a lot of opportunities. the faculty-to-student ratio is decent in this institute. all the faculties are highly qualified and their teaching methods are easy to understand and effective. there is a mid-semester exam and an end-semester exam which are held midway between the semester and at the end of the semester respectively. if you attend classes regularly and study on your own a bit before the exams it's fairly easy to pass them.the cultural fest is called culrav and it is held in april. the tech fest is called avishkar and it is held in december. the library is huge and has a lot of hard copies and soft copies of various books and journals available. the classrooms are decent but not too good but it has all the amenities. there is a sports fest which is held in january. the websites for culrav and avishkar are maintained by students.
college_name: MNNIT Allahabad - Motilal Nehru National Institute of Technology - [MNNIT]

review_text: i have chosen this course because of the placement and the brand value of delhi technological university. the faculty is well experienced and helps in any way. there are almost 2500 students in our batch. exams are held per semester wise and you can pass them easily by studying 2-3 days before the examthere are mainly 4 fests at delhi technological university. firstly, 'yuvaan ' is the literature and film festival fest. second, ' invictus' is the tech-fest of our college. third, 'engifest' this is the cultural fest and last 'aahavan' is the sports fest.

pros/cons: kiit university of law is one of those private orissa university which has an active placements cell too. we have fests which are biggest in orissa as no other university or college has budget like ours. not many scholarships are provided and that's a big issue as fees is already very high. | placement experience: law firms of litigation or corporate law firms were among other who have joined hands with kiit school of law. it's an amazing college and placements too are good as generally freshers lawyers don't get what students of kiit school of law are paid from campus placements of kiit school of law. thus our placements are next to nluo in orissa.
college_name: Kalinga Institute of Industrial Technology - [KIIT], Bhubaneswar

review_text: [college infrastructure]: the college campus is sprawling. it is spread over a large area and offers appropriate environment for studying infrastructure is good, needs regular maintenance. facilities provided by the college are good. | [academics]: quality of teaching is okay. we have access to all the experience that is offered by our professors. some academic aspects needs to be updated in line with latest developments. student nees to be aware with recent happenings in order to be job ready. | [placements]: quality of placements has been continuously improving from year to year. nearly 90% of the batch gets placed. highest package offered was 14 lpa. average salary offered was 8.25 lpa. college was supportive.
college_name: Motilal Nehru National Institute of Technology Allahabad Prayagraj

review_text: i have somewhat interest but i got the seat at iit it is a very prestige student: faculty ratio is 1:10 faculty are very highly qualified and highly intellectuals all over india their teaching is also very extreme soo good exams are also so good and it is difficult to passmany of the students will do internships while studying after that they will go to higher studies like intel and microsoft offer interns like 1lakh per month they will do by studying the btech only like all the projects they give and they train
college_name: IIT Roorkee - Indian Institute of Technology - [IITR]

review_text: fees for 1 year are nearly rs219000. there are many scholarships that a student can get. for example, there is a merit cum scholarship given by the delhi government through e district site. also, there are scholarships for students in college if they score good marks.i choose this course as i had an interest in artificial intelligence and computer science. and artificial intelligence has greater scope in the future. the course curriculum is well-designed. faculty members are very supportive. exams are taken monthly.

[college infrastructure]: our college infrastructure was more than adequate, and we had all the facilities we needed on campus, including computer labs, a workshop, and a library. the hostel was very nice, with good maintenance, and each room had only two occupants. we enjoyed our b.tech days very much. | [academics]: our teachers were good at teaching, supporting, and guiding us in all situations so that we could build our confidence. they completed the syllabus on time and also revised some difficult topics. most of us were able to clear the exams by studying the class notes | [placements]: most of us and our seniors were selected during campus placement in different companies like tcs, vipro, accenture, mind tree, etc. the highest salary offered was 8 lpa. many of our friends joined internships before and after b.tech to gain practical knowledge.

[college infrastructure]: indian institute of technology (iit) madras has a modern campus with excellent infrastructure for teaching, research, and student life. teaching and research laboratories: well-equipped labs for research and testing library: central library with printed and digital resources, plus a computer center centers of excellence: 36 centers for research, skill training, and leadership in various fields student life hostels: separate hostels for boys and girls, with single, double, and triple rooms sports: indoor and outdoor facilities for football, cricket, tennis, and more medical care: hospital with x-ray, in-patient wards, and an ambulance insurance: medical insurance for students campus amenities free wi-fi parks and gardens open air theater places of worship guest houses schools skill training and fabrication facility infrastructure management the engineering unit manages campus infrastructure, including electricity, water supply, sewage, and roads the office of institutional advancement handles fund-raising and alumni relations campus environment a peaceful and modern lifestyle for students, faculty, and staff cultural activities to promote holistic development annual fests to bring together students . | [academics]: as you all know the academics of iit madras is so good the teachers are well qualified and very experience about their courses and jobs the teachers also helps and guide us in the placements and also in the co-curricular activities they are very supportive. | [placements]: indian institute of technology (iit) madras has a good placement record for its aerospace engineering program. in 2021-22, the department had a placement percentage of 78%. placement details the minimum package offered in 2021-22 was rs 6.5 lakh per annum. the maximum package offered in 2021-22 was rs 46 lakh per annum. according to a survey, the average salary package offered to graduates of aerospace engineering at iit madras was 18 lpa. other top colleges for aerospace engineering hindustan institute of technology and science indian institute of technology (iit) bombay indian institute of science bangalore indian institute of space science and technology, trivandrum factors affecting salary the salary of an aerospace engineer depends on several factors, including: the candidate's skill, the candidate's knowledge, and the candidate's experience. salary trends the salary of an aerospace engineer in india can range from 25,000 to 2,50,000 rupees per month, depending on the candidate's experience. some companies that hire aerospace engineers in india include: hindustan aeronautics limited (hal) indian space research organisation (isro) bharat electronics limited (bel) drdo (defence research and development organisation) tata advanced systems limited (tasl) airbus india boeing india rolls-royce india the department of aerospace engineering at iit madras was established in 1969. it is known for its research and development in the field of aerospace engineering. | [campus life]: according to students, iit madras campus life is characterized by a vibrant mix of academic rigor, a rich natural environment within a protected forest, diverse extracurricular activities including sports, cultural events, and technical fests, with a strong emphasis on student clubs and a sense of community, all set within a beautiful and well-maintained campus with top-notch facilities. key aspects of iit madras campus life: natural beauty: the campus is often described as a "forest within a city", with a large lake, diverse wildlife including blackbucks and spotted deer, and a variety of trees and plants, making it a great spot for nature enthusiasts. active student life: students participate in a wide range of clubs and activities encompassing sports, cultural events, technical competitions, entrepreneurship initiatives, and social service projects. strong academic focus: iit madras is recognized for its high-quality academic programs and research opportunities, with dedicated professors and well-equipped labs. hostel life: the hostels are considered comfortable and well-maintained, with a strong sense of community among students living in the same hostel. campus festivals: iit madras hosts large-scale cultural and technical festivals that provide a platform for students to showcase their talents and creativity. sports culture: the campus boasts excellent sports facilities and a vibrant sports culture with inter-hostel competitions and opportunities to participate in various sports. regional diversity: due to the large student intake from across india, the campus offers a rich cultural mix with various regional clubs and events.

[college infrastructure]: thapar university has the best infrastructure among all college in north india. the campus is spread over 250 acres which include hostels, academic block, library, sports arena, general complex, meditation centre, health centre and many more interesting spots. | [academics]: every college has some good and bad faculty members. but in thapar, you can say faculty members are average. there are many experienced teachers and have good knowledge. if we talk about the course curriculum, every branch has 8 semesters. the summer training and one internship are mandatory for every student. | [placements]: placements at thapar university are quite good. but it's not relevant if we consider fee as a contributing factor. as i have seen the data of placements of the year 2019, the total placement offers were almost 1250, and nearly 325 organisation visited the campus for placements. from being an electrical background, the average salary package offered is around 4 lpa.
college_name: Thapar Institute of Engineering and Technology Patiala

review_text: i love this course because i have an interest o this field, there are enough faculties in this college, and a vast number of students are reading here, the faculties are much more talented and they are amazing. if you are going to study in a good college there is some criteria, you have to follow them.kiit university offers various types of scholarships and their benefits differ. the pradyumnabal memorial scholarship program covers college fees, hostel fees including mess, books and any other ancillary expenses. this scholarship is awarded every year to two financially weak and meritorious students.

[college infrastructure]: chitkara provides a wonderful infrastructure to the students. be it labs, classrooms, or anything else, they are up to date and well maintained. there are many wi-fi networks in the college. each department has its own library. | [academics]: the faculty is wonderful. the teachers work really hard to teach the students. they give full time to the students to make them good at their studies. apart from this, they also work on the overall personality development of the students. | [placements]: chitkara guarantees 100% placement to its students which is really wonderful. and students get really good packages. top mncs and startups come to the college to recruit the students and they offer high packages to the students. | [campus life]: the campus is very beautiful and lively. there are lots of trees and really big grounds where the students can sit and there is a big cricket ground as well.
college_name: Chitkara University Institute of Engineering and Technology Jhansla

review_text: pros/cons: education system : the education system in iem is very good. rules and regulations : the rules and regulations is very hard | course curriculum overview: the college event list is very big. the college event had many things like dancing competition. running completion, football playing and cricket match. and the collage arranged e sports in collage.
college_name: Institute of Engineering and Management - [IEM], Kolkata

review_text: exam is based on 11 and 12 class subjects of physics, chemistry and mathematics. paper solving is a very important aspect in this exam and you need to prepare for a year or two years too. this exam checks up your smart work capabilities with your hard work and the away yoh solve a question.we do have a technical fest ime. sphinx where we do have all the events related to technology and pro nights too. college is off this e days. we do also have a cultural fest ime. blitzschlag where there are many cultures event's and participate.

[college infrastructure]: small campus thus we don't have well equipped labs and workshops which is must in btech. the space also creates issues in various sports activities as we don't have sufficient space for football and cricket. but we have space for volleyball, kabbadi etc. all the classrooms are well equipped with acs & projectors. we have small library thus always have insufficient number of books. all the campus is neat and clean and also well maintained. | [academics]: all the professors are phd qualified from reputated institutes. they are experts in their subjects and fields thus give us practical insights in them. they also helps us in our project works . our course curriculum needs to be updated so that we can get insights of new technologies thus meet current industrial demands. | [placements]: for electrical branch few companies visit. we have tata power and l&t as our core branch recruiters. also many eee students not shortlisted for placement drive of coding related companies inspite of having good skills. but 50-60 % of eee students got placed with average package of 6lpa . | [campus life]: inspite of lack of space we have 2 fests every year along with freshers and fairwell in which all students enjoy a lot. seniors and faculties are very helpful in academic related issues and also sometimes in day to day conduct. the college is located near narela market inspite of being far from new delhi. it also has one govt hospital in nearby so that students didn't have to bother for health related issues.

there is a cultural fest kashiyatra, a tech fest technex and a sports fest spardha every year. all these events are very big and happening. there are many other small fests and events throughout the year. all course books and popular journals are available in the library either as e-books or as hard copies. the classrooms are very basic with a board, speaker system, projector system etc. sports are very much respected and encouraged here. there is a new building with really good sports equipment and space at iit bhu. their many clubs run by students namely cult, science & technology and social services.i choose ece because it is very interesting and gets you good placements. faculty is very strict about core studies so it is hard to manage side interests. the faculty is well-qualified for teaching and will help you with your curriculum always. exams are hosted twice every semester and are easy to pass.
college_name: IIT BHU - Indian Institute of Technology

review_text: [college infrastructure]: the infrastructure includes well designed buildings and furnished campus with greenery all around with amazing facilities like restaurants and a shopping mart. the hostels are hygienic and the rooms are comfortable too | [academics]: teachers here hold doctorate degrees and some are pursuing it. quality of education is well acknowledged here as the teachers are interested in project work which gives us an insight to the technologies. | [placements]: being in the first year i dont have that much idea about placements , however the upcoming batch has gotten the pre placement offer with a highest of 42 lpa and nearly 10-15 above 25 lpa. but many mnc's visit our campus and recruit the students with a well established package | [campus life]: we have medical facilities ,hostel facilities , supermarket , restaurants (dominos too) ,various other places to hang out with friends and have a great time. the library is 4storeyed with almost every book and genre. though it is away from the chennai city but a campus size of 190 acres makes it home and malls and restaurants in vicinity makes it apt
college_name: Vellore Institute of Technology Chennai Campus

review_text: placement experience: the institute has wide reach when it comes to chemical industry. there are plenty of placement opportunities from both core and non-core industries for students who choose to appear for placement industries. every year almost 90-95% of the students from chemistry department who opt for placement get successfully placed.

yes, technical and cultural events are organised in our college. we have an annual event named pyrokines. its one of the biggest institutional event of assam. a lot of students and people gather for the event. well known band and singers are also invited for performance.the faculty is ok. some of them are alumni of our own college, assam engineering college, and some are from other colleges. they are not much interactive with the students but still they teach well. some teachers are a bit boring but still it happens everywhere.

i chose this course because in today's generation average ctc of this course is very high as compared to other courses. teaching is good most of the faculties are ph.d. graduates and have good experience compared to others. in a week one exam is conducted and 2 term exams are conducted over here which are taken very strictly. good environment and system.overall placement ratio is good. one of the graduates of lpu got a 3 crore package. from 3rd year the students become eligible for placements. the average ctc of cse is 5-6lakhs and the highest is 64 lakhs. the percentage of students getting placed is 80-85%.

[college infrastructure]: we have all the necessary infrastructure, up to date lab equipments. classrooms are digital. teaching via smart boards and presentations. sport centred are very well maintained. hostels are okayish. cleaning done regularly. food quality is good. | [academics]: market and industry oriented coursework. curriculum still not updated much. teaching quality is good, not excellent. curriculum doesn't include latest developments in the field, but is industry oriented and hands-on. | [placements]: quality of placement declining by each passing year. placement unit needs improvements. most of the students get placed. no idea about the average salary. still compared to our college's past reputation, placement has seen a downslide. | [campus life]: college campus, although small, but is very beautiful and well maintained. location is quite odd, because it is located in a small city like pilani.
college_name: Birla Institute of Technology and Science Pilani

review_text: this university's infrastructure is very beautiful and its campus spreads over 17 acres they provide 3 hostels for boys and 3 hostels for girls and in this university's faculty members are very educated all teachers grab a (phd). and teachers are friendly to each student and they always help students in every situationfrom the 5-6 th semester every student is eligible for campus placement so many companies visit this university like paloalto, infosys, wipro, google, amazon, oyo and so on. and its average package is 5-6 lpa and the highest package is 40 lpa every student placed in this university that they don't have any backlogs.

the university students have been regular recipients of accolades at various international events and competitions. cansat ??? team kalpana-1, an undergraduate student???s team, reached the finals of the cansat competition 2018 conducted by the american astronautical society (aas) and nasa by securing a percentile rank of 7 out of 165 teams worldwide. a delegation of students from nsut was awarded the outstanding delegate accolade in world health organization and the diplomatic mention award in ga ??? specpol at the 64th edition of harvard national model united nations in 2018. the past performance of the outgoing batches has done us proud. in the past, eight students have been offered an annual package of rs. 1.25 crores by google. apart from that, various companies like goldman sachs, intuit, microsoft, amazon, walmart, linkedin, tower research, adobe, direct i among others have been visiting nsut regularly for placements and a number of companies has been on the rise ever.netaji subhas university of technology, new delhi takes 210000 rs from each btech student. the past performance of the outgoing batches has done us proud. in the past, eight students have been offered an annual package of rs. 1.25 crores by google. apart from that, various companies like goldman sachs, intuit, microsoft, amazon, walmart, linkedin, tower research, adobe, direct i among others have been visiting nsut regularly for placements and a number of companies have been on the rise ever since. a number of psus have also visited the university and have been recruiting regularly. nsut has also witnessed its alumni become administrators by bagging ranks 1 and 3 in the upsc examinations.nsut has introduced fee reimbursement for top-ranking students admitted to university and financial assistance for financially weaker students as per chhatra vittiya sahayta evam protsahan kosh (cvspk) scheme-2020. this scheme also has the provision to give incentives for joining defence

[college infrastructure]: shiv nadar university is a ver new campus and it has high tech infrastructure.all the class rooms are ac class rooms and students a re given high speed internet access.comming to food aspects the good is very hygienic and very very tasty. | [academics]: i am studying b.e in electrical and electronics engineering.the very good quality of teaching is very good and the faculty at shiv nadar are are phd graduated from top iits in india.the curriculum at shiv nadar is updated and very different . | [placements]: being a new campus it has a less reputation in india but still the placements at shiv nadar are really good the highest package offer last year was around 42lakhs.which really grate and the average package is aroun 7lakha.

pros/cons: less population in the college benefits us in many ways lacking of having a permanent campus is a major loss | course curriculum overview: i have interest in mathematics and research. the faculty student ratio is very good, 1:10. most of the faculty possess doctorate certificate and are well educated in their field. the team exams are conducted for 40 days roughly. but they are moderate in toughness.
college_name: IIT Goa - Indian Institute of Technology - [IIT Goa], Ponda

review_text: the campus curriculum is cbc where students can choose their own faculty and subjects except the first year where it is common for all. the faculty here are so friendly except for a few who will be very serious only about their studies. mostly all the faculties are done with their ph.d. there are internal and external exams. for the external exams which are final sem exams carryout 60 marks and for internal exams, you will have for 40marks. adding both the marks you need 50 marks to pass and 27 for sure in external to get a pass which is pretty easy if you study with some concentration at the time of internal exams. the gap between exams is not soo long there will be exams continuously in the last month of the sem.coming to my college life and others is totally different someone wants studies and some want fest. this is the place you can find both things. the university conducts a project expo every year known as visai and we have our own incubator in collab with ashok leyland and goreh and avnl avadi. the clubs were so good here you need to join at least one club to get your graduation which is very useful in getting explore to others. and the college students won many tournaments in cricket and kabaddi football and the sports amenities are super good.
college_name: Vel Tech Rangarajan Dr. Sagunthala R and D Institute of Science and Technology - [Vel Tech]

review_text: i must say it is one of the best universities. the reason to choose this course: e&c is one of the best branches because if you compare it with other branches some branches teach only about programming they don't have any hardware knowledge, and some branches teach only about hardware. but in e&c you will learn both programs as well as hardware. in this college you will get one of the best faculties, best in the sense they too supportive and encourage you to do something great, the faculty-student ratio may be for every 10 to 15 students one faculty is there. most of the faculties have the phd degrees with a great experience. after every 1 and a half months, there will be an exam i.e internals, there total of 2 internals and an end sem exam. it is not too difficult to pass the exam but yes questions will be completely application based, but a student can pass easily.fests: there are no.of fests that occur every year, they conduct the fest at their convince. last month only we had a fest in college where many great personalities visited our university. the best thing about this college is library, you will get thousands of books, and whichever book you need, you will get that book. each classroom is near and clean and every class is a smart classroom. we have a big ground for sports, many students take participate in yearly sports. college has cricket, volleyball, kabaddi and many sports teams, and these teams won inter-level competitions. there so many clubs are there, like upsc club, automotive club and many other clubs.

[college infrastructure]: the university has an exceptional infrastructure with tens of buildings. the university ranges in an area of 600 acres which makes it one of the largest universities of india. the buildings are always clean and equipped with all the facilties such as ac, fans, benches etc. there is a big library, sports complex and a mall inside the university. | [academics]: academics is very nice for the aerospace department. the professors are well knowledged, experienced and kind. they always provide students with the best study material and guidance. the curriculum set here is of competetive examinations level such as gate. regular cas and examinations are there to keep a track of students' academic performance. | [placements]: placements in the aerospace deparment is not so good. core companies are not there in this department. only a few big companies come for placement every year such as boeing, airbus etc. package is also average with a range of 4-5 lpa. highest package for this department is around 12-13 lpa. | [campus life]: campus life inside the university is great as there multiple events and concerts happening here regularly. the university has a special department for students to get involved in extracurriculur activities. the campus is full with leisure activity zones where students can enjoy. | [anything else]: overall this university is a good option to go with. placements for aerospace department can be improved but otherwise it is very good.

[college infrastructure]: vit does have all the facilities a typical college should. the academic buildings are well maintained. maybe a little bit more improvement for some academic buildings. but when it comes to hostels, there is a lot of scope for improvement especially in terms of hygiene and cleanliness. the wifi facility is good but sometimes the connectivity is very poor and requires a lot of patience for downloading important material or apps. food is good and edible. maintenance overall cannot be complained. | [academics]: vit is a highly reputed and popular college among many students for its world class facilities and this one reason is quite enough for why i joined. the curriculum does have a lot of promising courses. some maybe a tad bit underwhelming because of the topics. according to my field, the curriculum is great, interesting and well thought out, but too soon to say if it makes me job-ready. | [placements]: the quality of placements may one of the best in the country. highly reputed mncs from all over the world come to take interviews from students. they are offered super dream and dream contracts. the highest salary package was upto 40 lakhs per annum. being just a sophomore and that too from chemical engineering stream, it's hard for me to conclude anything since the job opportunities are a bit underwhelming as well as for some courses like biotech, and so on. the college is highly supportive. | [campus life]: the campus is huge and takes some time to navigate around landmarks and buildings. money is highly appreciated. it speaks louder than anyone. there are many restrictions for female students and first year students especially. they are many facilities for fitness, arts, etc. but all of them require payment per semester. there are all kinds of people in vit. some are good, some are bad and some are just not worthy. the campus is located slightly away from the urban area. good transportation, safe.

[college infrastructure]: the college of engineering pune is very prestigious for its impressive infrastructure, which basically enhances the student experience on the campus. classrooms are also well equipped with the projectors, digital learning tools and also are very spacious. | [academics]: the college has a very high standards for its academic rigor which is required for the engineering education, making it one of the top indian top technical institute. the curriculum is very thoughtfully designed incorporating both theoretical knowledge and practical applications | [placements]: the placement outcomes are well famous through out the maharashtra as the placement works pro actively, providing students with resources for skill development and interview preparations including resume building, aptitude and mock interviews.

[college infrastructure]: the facilities in the course are very very good we have ac in our labs, and we have wonderful systems with i7 processors. the library has a huge and vast amount of books, and the quality of the facilities in my hostel is good. we have individual rooms for each and every person, and the quality of the mess food is good, but the overall quality of the food is not good. | [academics]: the teachers were helpful and skillfull too.they clarify every and every single doubt. they have the huge knowledge to explain me. the teaching is qualified enough. the curriculum is very relevant; it even covers the gate subjects. the difficulty of the semester exam is too hard, and the pass percentage is around 80 percent. | [placements]: the students who were placed in my course are around 40-45. the very highest and the least, and the lowest are 26, 5, and 7 lpa respectively. coming to the top recruiting companies are z-scalar, tata, infosys, nvidia, etc. the students who got internships from my course are around 60 percent. the roles offered are software engineering, data science, etc.
college_name: National Institute of Technology Andhra Pradesh

review_text: the course curriculum is very well made and learning capabilities and met. learning resource centre is filled with course-related and research-related material. the faculty of every department is also very helpful and do not over clad students with assignments.campus life is very enriching at jaypee institute of information technology. many different hubs are present on the campus all run by students. to make classroom learning easier in any weather air conditioners are employed in every class.
college_name: Jaypee Institute of Information Technology University - [JIIT]

review_text: [college infrastructure]: the infrastructure is great in this college with knowledge resources center. there are 30,000 books in the digital library. wi-fi is enabled on the whole campus. the cricket stadium, indoor games center, and many more make this college worth considering. | [academics]: teachers are always helpful in this college. the course curriculum is very relevant. semester exams can be difficult or easy depending on how much students are prepared for the same. the course curriculum makes students industry-ready. the subjects help students a lot in applying the industry concepts. | [placements]: placements depend upon what kind of job students prefer. ece students are eligible for software companies, but most students are placed in cse. only a few core companies visit to hire students. most of the ece students get low pay, and there are mass recruitment jobs. the average salary package offered is 2.5 lpa. the highest salary package offered is 3.5 lpa.

i have a general category so i don't get any scholarship. but because of national importance, the fee structure of nits is very affordable and the level of education is very excellent and provides all the facilities which are given by the college.i got a cse branch in nit uttarakhand. i have a lot of interest in artificial intelligence (ai), machine learning, and web development so i want to become a good coder and want to get specialization in these courses which are in the cse branch.

the fee for each sem is around 1, 35, 000 including the tution fee, mess fee, hostel fee, medical fee, transportation fee, etc. i don't think it's that expensive. well the figure i told was for general boys whose family income is more than 5 lacs per annum below that we have to pay one-third of it and if it is below 1 lacs per annum we have to only pay hostel and mess fees. for obcs, scs and sts and all the girls the tution fee is 0.placement and job opportunities are really good here. companies like microsoft, adobe, amazon, tcs, goldman etc. come every year to provide jobs. the average package of a student graduated from iit mandi is around 15 lacs per annum. yes, my college provides intership opportunities in the field of research, data science, machine learning and many more.
college_name: IIT Mandi- Indian Institute of Technology - [IITM]

review_text: placement and job opportunities are very great because vit is one of the top colleges in country. only thing is that the competition level is slightly higher than other colleges due to large number of students. internships are provided for second year and third year students with stipend ranging from 5000 to 25000 per month given by companies like jp morgan, microsoft and amazon.the curriculum is designed as such to prepare the students for technologies and methods being used in industry presently which gives an edge over other students. research is always promoted. labs and exams are all part of day to day life and students have enough leisure time to themselves along with much time to work on any skills they want.

[college infrastructure]: infrastructure of our college is very well and all the necessary equipments, facilities are provided here like wi-fi, smart lab, laboratories, and all. all the place of our college is well maintained and food provided in our college canteen and mess is hygienic | [academics]: i am currently studying here management with the specialization of finance and operations. all the curriculum provided here are which is same like aktu syllabus. teaching style of the facilities are very well here and all the faculties are also very professional. | [placements]: placement of this college in management is 100% so many firms visit here for the placement drive like hdfc, axis, icici, idbi, federal, consulting firms, it firms and alle. ab and the process of placements are very smooth..
college_name: Motilal Nehru National Institute of Technology Allahabad Prayagraj

review_text: [college infrastructure]: library and lab facilities are excellent. classroom facilities is not that good means some class rooms are not well vantilaed. cleaniness and hygiene is up to the mark. the internet facility is pretty good. | [academics]: in my veiw our acedmics is very well structured means the whole course is very well divided so that students feel less burdend. in term of teaching some professor's are very helpful and give attention to the whole class but some professor's only pay attention on completing the course and not on weather student understand or not their teaching. and what we are studying is appropriate in term of job prospective. | [placements]: in term of placement our have a great growth every year. highest salary offered in 2019 placement session is 43 lpa and it goes to the computer science branch. average salary offered is 14 lpa and minimum salary offered is around 9 lpa. and in my view all the college faculty is very supportive in placement process. being a first year student, all the seniors are also supportive . | [campus life]: campus is well maintained and its location is perfect so that student's do not need to spend to much time in going anywhere. railway station is very close to campus. campus includes all the basic need shops.
college_name: Indian Institute of Technology Indian School of Mines Dhanbad

review_text: [college infrastructure]: our facilities are absolutely amazing. ac is everywhere, classrooms are good, and labs are fully equipped. our seminar hall is beautiful, we have different departments for different branches. our canteen is so good that people from different colleges come to sit there. | [academics]: personally, i love our faculty. they know what they're doing, they're all phds and highly educated. and most of all, they really are interested in helping the students. the curriculum is very personalized due to the nep, we have electives and minor and honors programs now. | [placements]: the college will provide average 12 lpa, the highest is 42 lpa (so far), and the lowest maybe 4 lpa. top recruiters are google, l&t, etc. internships are also amazing and in fact, google picked up 4 kids for 1.5 lacs per month this year.
college_name: Dayananda Sagar College of Engineering Bangalore

review_text: [college infrastructure]: the infrastructure is great. it feels like a corporate building. everything here is great. especially the wi-fi is super fast. people just need to put their register numbers in order to get the wi-fi. | [academics]: i?m studying bba . the academics are great. the lecturers are very friendly. they are also very very knowledgable. we have industrial visits for many subjects like production management. also we get to learn from various scholars. | [placements]: placements have been great with an average package of 5 lpa. the last year placements have been great. the highest package this year was 9 lpa. overall the placements have been great and various top companies come to visit us. | [campus life]: it is amazing. there are a lot of places to hangout. the cafeteria is amazing. our college is known for its canteen. the food here is amazing. there are 4-5 libraries which are amazing. they are air conditioned and help you study or work in peace.

[college infrastructure]: the infrastructure is good. the campus has 160 acre green and clean campus with maintained academic buildings. the labs are well equipped specially the mechanical labs. whole campus is wifi equipped and have smart classes as well. the living spaces are clean and food is hygienic as well. | [academics]: the mechanical department of dtu is considered best in india and even some people claim it to be best in asia. the quality of teaching is above average. you can even find some professors who can help you with your unofficial projects as well. the mechanical curriculum is updated but the computer science curriculum needs to be updated. | [placements]: the placements of dtu are one of the india's best. almost all of the students sitting are placed so the placement is mostly 100% which some students gaining multiple offers from various companies. the highest package offered was 1.4 crore offered by uber. the highest domestic package is 40+lpa by adobe. both the packages were grabbed by computer science students. the average package is 11-12lpa and the average package for tech branches is 18lpa. college is very supportive in placement process. | [campus life]: the campus life of dtu is very amazing. there are lots of societies and extra curricular clubs active throughout. the competitions go on almost whole of the year. college participates in lots of competitions. the students and seniors are very supportive. the location is in north east delhi which is safe and easily accessible through metro.

[college infrastructure]: the college buildings are overall good. the campus is of the average size, so the number of blocks are justified according to that. overall the infrastructure is fine. i personally like the college campus. | [academics]: the academics are fine considering the number of staffs. the quality of the professors are average to good. they help us is every field in which we want the help in. we have experts in each and every field. | [placements]: the placements is overall good. most of the students gets placed in our campus in their respective fields. the average placement is also kind of average. most of the students of course choose the college in which the placement section in good and this is one of them.
college_name: SRM Institute of Science and Technology NCR Campus Ghaziabad

review_text: [college infrastructure]: iiit ranchi does not have its own permanent campus . now a days , college is running in two different campuses, one is in jupmi and one is in jut campus ranchi. our permanent campus construction work is going on . | [academics]: i am btech(cse) undergraduate at iiit ranchi. our faculty staff is very good and all are phd holders having best knowledge in their field . they are very friendly and supportive. our curriculum is updated according to the industry and research field. | [placements]: iiit ranchi is the best college in placement point of view having average package of 15.93lpa in 2023 . and highest 83lpa in 2023,median 13.53lpa . 13 students get packages of 45lpa from amazon and microsoft ,google also visits our campus. | [campus life]: campus life is very good as the hostels provided by iiitranchi are very good and well maintained and much better from many government colleges . in campus all required facilities are available for students.
college_name: Indian Institute of Information Technology Ranchi

review_text: [college infrastructure]: the college has a very good infrastructure. most of the old buildings are already renovated. the college library is a good place to study and is well-maintained. the classrooms are hygienic and are air-conditioned. | [academics]: i am studying b.tech in electrical engineering since the department is one of the best among other and is the second old one, established in 1912. the faculty members are mostly ph.d holders and have a really good knowledge of the subjects. | [placements]: the placements at iiest are really good. many top companies visit the college for campus hiring including tcs, microsoft, texas etc. considering 2019's placements, around 70% electrical department students got placed. | [campus life]: the campus is so beautiful with lots of greenery. there are three lakes, each of them adding beauty to the college. the college has a hospital, swimming pool, badminton court, gymnasium, school. the hostels aren't good enough but they have security guards and hence safety at the campus is highly maintained.
college_name: Indian Institute of Engineering Science and Technology Shibpur

review_text: [college infrastructure]: college has limited hostel facility, workshop and labs are well equipped,good wifi and lan port in each hostel room,rooms and bathroom are cleaned and hygienic, library timing is limited sports facilities are decent | [academics]: i am student of electrical branch,its best branch if you are looking for tech jobs as well as to prepare for gate. our curriculum also includes value education and communication skills,which helps is developing students personality | [placements]: excellent placement,9.2 lpa average for electrical branch, minimum package is 6lpa,most students placed in tech jobs overall college average is 10 lpa, and its increasing every year, placement cells are there to make you prepare | [campus life]: 100 acre college campus which is decent,many fest are organised also many clubs are there, teachers and seniors are supprting

[college infrastructure]: the infrastructure at ajay kumar garg engineering college meets the highest standards of quality. the campus is located at a short 5 minutes travel time from metro station. the college campus provides the following: ? ragging free campus ? 24/7 security ? central library ? air-conditioned classrooms ? computer labs ? wi-fi internet service ? ample parking space ? clean & hygienic environment ? basement/hall for hosting events many hostel facilities are available | [academics]: i am pursuing 2nd year computer science and engineering.(b. tech).quality of the teaching is good. our curriculum is getting updated and includes all the recent developments of the field.yes,my study makes me job-ready. | [placements]: honestly there are alot of companies visiting campus everyday but we hardly get information about placements (so no idea) but we get special training for how to appear in an interview and how to represent yourself etc etc etc. last year campus placement is 90 percent. | [campus life]: it has a big and very beautiful campus. there?s greenery everywhere. there?s guard everywhere, so it?s very safe. there?s an open air theatre and fountain too.
college_name: Ajay Kumar Garg Engineering College Ghaziabad

review_text: one need to clear jee mains exam with a good percentile score to get into this college with a good branch. you'll get all india rank which will determine your college and branch jossa will conduct counciling which have 2 mock rounds and 7 main rounds , in that you have to fill the colleges as per your desire and ur desired branches. you will get some branch and college according to the rank nd percentile score you got. reservation for sc st pwd candidates is also there. after that you have to accept the seat you got and verify your documents and identity in suggested colleges finally there is admission process.it is a all india online exam which is conducted by nta, and it have questions based on 11th and 12th cbse syllabus. nta changes pattern and exam method last year and doing some modifications this year too. it is a 3hr exam with 3 subjects i.e. physics chemistry and maths each having 1hr time . from this year 25 questions will be there in exam of which 20 will be multiple choice questions and 5 will be integer type. exam is conducted online in two shifts per day which is held for 5 to 6 days .

[college infrastructure]: classrooms are well-organised. they are not too big but are spacious enough to sit. the college is fully wi-fi enabled, but the network is the worst, so no one uses it. there is no hostel facility for boys, so you have to take a hostel outside, which costs around rs. 7,000 rupees per month. students also take pg accommodations with other friends. there is a hostel facility for girls, but it is just average. the campus is very small, so there are very few sports grounds like cricket, football, basketball, and table tennis. | [academics]: teachers are well-qualified and have done phds in their field. their teaching methods are old. students get bored easily, but if they pay attention, they teach well. the course curriculum is outdated and doesn't prepare students for the industry. semesters are tough and rigorous. they don't give marks easily. | [placements]: placement in heritage institute of technology is good . most companies are mass recruiters, offering 4 lpa-5 lpa. our placement percentage is around 70%-80%. the percentage seems high because our college doesn't allow students to sit in placements once they are already placed. top recruiting companies are tcs, infosys, and others. the highest salary package placement is around 16 lpa, and the lowest salary package is around 2-3 lpa.

[college infrastructure]: the campus feels very relaxing with vibes of old and new building beautifully designed . with well equipped labs and modern classrooms with modern technologies helps students a lot in gaining practical knowledge . | [academics]: dtu academic blends with theory and hands on skills with the real strength to explore and independent students get to know their own learning path . faculty supports varies yet motivate students too in their path . | [placements]: recruiters from modern tech and consulting firm visit the college most for hiring . others than this in core and low field offer decent packages to students and allow them to join and know more about the industry exposure. | [campus life]: dtu student life is energetic and event packed with socities function through the year . also the sports arena held every year allowing students to participate and enjoy and explore in other field too .

[college infrastructure]: wi-fi- the facility available for our batch but recently high-speed wi-fi facility was made available on the campus labs- department labs are fully functional and are provided with all the equipment, apparatus, and engines to make students understand the theoretical concepts by giving them hands-on experience. library-the university library centrally situated and easily accessible to all the departments on the campus. library has a vast collection of books, digital versions, open access journals, institutional repository for ph.d. students and competitive examinations. | [academics]: course curriculum - curriculum is designed in such a way that it is in line with the upgrading technology. our college boasts of having a curriculum similar to the gate examination syllabus. faculty- professors are knowledgeable, friendly and helpful. they provide you with all the inputs on subjects . | [placements]: the roles offered were department specific. mechanical- it services, core manufacturing, construction and mechanical design consultancy. ece, eee - it services and electrical components manufacturing roles civil- it services, construction and consultancy cse- it services the placements and roles offered were similar for both senior and our batch. the highest salary offered was 7.5lpa, lowest was around 3.2lpa and average was around 4.5lpa the percentage of students placed was around 95%. to add to this many students sought placements out of campus .

[college infrastructure]: national institute of technology raipur has two main buildings housing the different departments. one is devoted for engineering courses while the other whole is for architecture department. classrooms are spacious with some equipped with acs. institute has central library with a reading room for students. sports centre is located near football ground and basketball court. hostels are available for both boys and girls. there is a utility store and snack stores besides a beautiful canteen. | [academics]: i am a student of b.tech. in mining engineering. faculties here, are well experienced in their teaching expertise. faculties do not incline towards any particular section of class. course curriculum is updated often by the opinion of professors and board of directors. each semester comprises of two class tests and an end-sem examination. | [placements]: placements tend to only improve in the recent years. 70% of the students get placed in on-campus placements including core as well as non-core offers. highest package is offered is 32 lacs to the students from cse and it department. average salary is offered in the range of 5-6 lacs. training and placement cell assist the students in their placements and internships as well. | [campus life]: there are two gardens at the institute. various clubs and committees are there like robotics club, entrepreneurship cell, cultural committee,dance club, drama club, innovation cell and more. frequent seminars and workshops are organised for the students in different fields. nit raipur is a hub of college fests with many fests such as eclektica, cultural fest, aavartan, technical fest, shruti, music fest and robo fest.

pros/cons: sports facilities are very good for all who is interested 6 km from railway station easy traveling from home town to nit kkr academically very difficult as compared to class 12th in school poor network no or very less signals in mobile phones | placement experience: i dont know much about this but- placements stats for all the branches are very hood except civil( 60 to 75 %l which is somewhere better than any local college there is not much for civil engineers in private so gov jobs may be the good option

students get full time placement opportunities in fourth year. however internship opportunities come in the second and third year. every big mnc like google,amazon, microsoft ,flipkart,apple come here for recruitment. over 400 companies come for recruitment. in 2022 the average placement was about 16 lpa for entire college and 25 lpa in cse branch. record placements were seen in 2022. number of offers were close to 2400 approx and almost all the students(about 90percent) were placed who appeared for placements in 2022. highest international package was about 1.15 crore which was offered to 15 students form amazon dublin. highest domestic package was 65 lpa given by apple. my plan is to get a tech( full stack devloper) job with a decent package in any of these companies. however placement opportunities are really great, i feel that due to huge competition in dtu beacuse of large student strength, it becomes really competitive to get that dream package of above 40 lpa.college life at dtu is the best. our annual cultural fest is engifest. it is the biggest fest in north india. it is conducted in month of february. it is one of the best experience in our college to attend engifest . this time around sunidhi chouhan, amit trivedi and kaleshi chori guys came in our engifest and they just made the atmosphere crazy. library of dtu includes every book and journal which student needs. students can go to library at any time during day and study in a peace environment. the infrastructure of the library is very good. the classrooms for first year students in the pragya bhawan are very good. but apart from that classrooms are not that up to the marks. they are older and don't have ac. sports facilities in the college are decent. there is gym , sports complex as well as big grounds for playing sports. various inter and intra college sports competition are organised. there are a lot of student societies in dtu for every damn interest.

the course are being modified in accordance to the need of the industry and what industry requires from their employees and it is latest. from year 2019 onwards the branch change policy changed which now says anyone who will score above 9.0 cgpa will be eligible to change branch. things like specialisation(disciplinary as well as inter-disciplinary), minors etc have been introduced, so basically a bio engineering student also can opt for cse,ee,me courses after seventh semester as well as can go for minors in entrepreneurship etc facilities are overall good the hostel are like heaven place for students, dining facility is just like all other places.the peer you get is amazing, there is a great interaction between students of different years and they are jointly trying year by year to make it better. lots of fest are being introduced and students work very hard to make it better than the previous years. ignus is the main cultural fest of the college, then there is prometeo for technical, spandan for college people, framed for design and arts, aaftab for literature, ideaspark and inicio for entrepreneurship etc. almost all the festivals are managed and celebrated by students and these all are actually best parts of session.
college_name: IIT Jodhpur - Indian Institute of Technology - [IITJ]

review_text: pros/cons: helping people: i enjoy providing useful information, answering, question and assisting with problem solving. learning new thing: even though i have knowledeg cutoff, i enjoy exploring new topics and adapting to different conversation creativity: whether it is writing,coding, or brainstroming ideas , i love helping with creative project. misinformation: i dislike false or misleading information and always try to provide response. i sometimes dislike not being able to access realtime data or process image directly. vague or unclear question can make it hard to provide a helpful answer by other fellows | course curriculum overview: the course curriculam at iiit bhagalpur is designed to balance theoritical knowledge and practical application . it cover essential engineeing fundamental while incorporating modern thrends technology such as ai, data science and automation. the institute btech program cse, ece, mea, and mnc. one of the key strength of curriculam is its interdisciplinary appproach. for example mea integrate mechanical design, automation, and electrical / electronic control, preparing students for carers in robotics , aerospace, and manufacturing industries.
college_name: Indian Institute of Information Technology - [IIIT], Bhagalpur

review_text: the one who is interested to join in the institute has to mainly clear the country's most toughest exam jee mains. the joint entrance exam has lots of competition.one should score rank of less than 10000 to get a seat. for the branches like computer science, you must get air less than 1500there will be four exams conducted per semester.two minors each one for 10 marks .one mid for 30 marks .and one end for 50 marks. you should get 35 marks to pass a subject and definitely 17.5 in end. the grades are based on relative grading. this is about exams.

dtu is well known for its huge fest and very chill campus life. it has 5-6 really big fest per year. the cultural fest i.e. engifest is the biggest fest in north india. along with it, we also have technical, sports, literary, etc fest. some fest is organised by different societies of the college. dtu library is really big, you can wide range of books in it. all classrooms are fully air-conditioned and have projectors and good-quality benches. college is very supportive of sports. the sports facilities are really good. there are many societies and clubs in the college, you can choose based on your choicecurrently, for a btech course, the total fee for four years is 9.31 lakhs. in the first year, 2.19 lakhs while in the last year, it is 2.5 lakhs. students get scholarships via college also or through the delhi government. the college also provides you with an education loan at a cheap rate of interest as dtu has sbi bank on its own campus. university provides you with good internship opportunities and on-campus placements

[college infrastructure]: there are fully ac classrooms and wi-fi available in all the classrooms. the college provides hostels and a library. the library is the most beautiful part of the campus and it is very big. in hostel, the mess is sodexo's which is a french company. | [academics]: the faculty members are quite experienced in their respective fields. the course curriculum is set to industry standards. the academics are hard here due to the competitive atmosphere. the semester exams are above average in terms of toughness. the passing percentage is generally 35%. | [placements]: the average package offered for computer science and engineering branch is 12 lakh per annum which is very good. the top companies for our course aee nvidia, and other german companies. roi is also good.

i love finance that that the reason why i have chosen this course. the faculty is very good cooperative and not irritating kind of. and also very helpful for us. the teaching method is very good and also they are very much educated too. exams are not tough and easy to pass but there isn't any chance of cheating.very loss or no fee hike policy is there and they have 3 kinds of scholarships. 1st 25 percent, 2nd 50. 3rd 100 more than 93 percent marks will give you 100. 89 percent will give you 50. and 73-75 will give you 25 percent for 2 starting semesters one sem is for 6 months.
