review_text: [college infrastructure]: yes it has an excellent infrastructure . we have sufficient facilities and all proper equipments. we have wifi facilities in hostel rooms, classrooms , library and at many places of institution. we have computer facilities in library for the students who can't afford a pc. every class is equipped with projectors . yes living spaces are cleaned regularly . campus is always very clean. food provided was hygienic but the taste not maintained up to the mark due to that students prefer to eat outside | [academics]: i am studying in mechanical engineering , quality of teaching depends on the proffs in my opinion. not everyone teach in the way we understand. yes i think curriculum is updated and includes all recent developments in the field. | [placements]: i don't know much about placements but as far as i know about 75% students gets placed. highest packages was more than 1cr . it was from computer science branch. i think average salary offered was around 6-8 lac per annum | [campus life]: campus life was amazing. it is a place of many activities . every club including apart from studies music,dance, media,coding ,cfi, cinematography every activity is available. student can pursue whatever they want.

the campus is very good and very well all types of play are doing here like basketball football cricket etc. placement is good in this college well package offered from company side for placement percent must 75% and no backlogs. depends on your stream company offered profile.placement of college is good and we get opportunities to excel in all field. i heard a lot about this college and when i took admission it was better than most colleges. also, many friends of mine were taking admission to this college.

[college infrastructure]: overall, the infrastructure of our college is strong. every classroom has air conditioning in addition to the necessary lab equipment. since we are the only campus with 5g, wifi is now widely available. the 7-10 metres between each type of dustbin ensures that the campus is kept spotless even during the wet season.having a solid bricks design | [academics]: the majority of instructors hold phd degrees, and several also have net and gate certificates. i'm here pursuing my bachelor's degree in computer science (b.tech) because i want to work in the sector. people are inclining toward a healthy lifestyle in my industry, which makes it a great job choice. it is a growing field because technology is involved. | [placements]: while in a college the average placement is 8lpa, in my programme it is more like 5.5lpa. the biggest salary offered in a college is $3.3 crore, while a student just received a salary of $52 lacs. b.tech students get a better deal than other students as always . | [campus life]: excellent on-campus life sports are this school's best feature because of the diversity of its pupils, who come from many states and countries. if you communicate with them, you might learn more about their cultures and languages. all cultural events are under the direction of the department in charge of student welfare. teachers and students communicate effectively. there are over 2600 security guards on duty, and 4000 cctv cameras are installed in every area. in relation to contemporary cities

review_text: every single week the fests are conducted in the college.you are given a lot of opportunities for co-curricular activities in the campus. there is a huge library approximately of 5 floor filled with different types of books. you can visit there and study. the classroom are changed with every single period. each class are designed with projector, smart boards and air conditioner. you can join depart of student welfare for different extra curricular activities.you can do intership from 2nd year of the college. there are about 400-500 companies visits every year for placements which includes google, microsoft, bosch, tcs ,etc. the average package is 6lakhs and the highest package offered is 3 crore. you have to maintain atleast 8 cgpa to seat in every placement drive. you can also do start-up in college while studying. this is the best opportunity you can grab in the college.

review_text: [college infrastructure]: the infrastructure at the east campus (vivek vihar) is modern but compact. the best part is that the entire academic block, including classrooms and the library, is fully air-conditioned, which is a lifesaver in delhi summers and something even north campus colleges often lack. the library is state-of-the-art with a great collection of economics and business books. the computer labs are well-equipped with software like spss and r for our labs. however, you must know that this is not the main bawana campus. the campus is small (about 2 acres). we do not have vast playgrounds; sports facilities are limited to a small basketball/volleyball court and indoor games like tt and carrom. crucial note on hostels: there are no on-campus hostels at the east campus. most of us live in pgs or flats in vivek vihar, karkardooma, or dilshad garden. the mess food is irrelevant since there is no hostel mess, but the campus canteen is decent and hygienic. | [academics]: academics is the strongest suit of usme (east campus). the curriculum is rigorous and updated as per the nep (4-year degree), comparable to top du colleges like srcc or stephens. the faculty is highly qualified, with many professors being alumni of dse (delhi school of economics) and iims. they are approachable and focus heavily on research and practical application rather than rote learning. the economics hons course here includes a good mix of mathematics, statistics, and econometrics, making you job-ready for analyst roles. attendance rules are strictly followed (75% is mandatory), and the workload is significant with regular assignments and presentations. | [placements]: placements for economics and bba students are decent and improving every year. since we are under the dtu umbrella, we get a good brand value. the placement cell is active and student-driven. stats: the average package for eco hons hovers around 4.5 lpa to 6 lpa, with the highest going up to 10-14 lpa. roles: mostly analyst roles, research associates, and consulting. companies: companies like zs associates, kpmg, bain capability network, and other analytics firms visit. while it doesn't match the b.tech placements of the main campus, it offers a solid roi compared to private universities. if you build good skills in excel and r, getting placed is not difficult. | [campus life]: this is where you need to manage expectations. the campus vibe is very different from the main campus. because the campus is small, it feels a bit like a school extension. everyone knows everyone, which is nice, but you miss out on the massive "fests" and sprawling campus life unless you travel to the main campus in bawana for events like engifest. crowd: the crowd is decent, mostly serious about their careers. location: vivek vihar is a residential area. it's safe and well-connected by the blue line (karkardooma) and red line (mansarovar park) metros. societies: there are active societies like finance, debating, and cultural clubs, but events are on a smaller scale. | [anything else]: excellent academics and faculty in a compact campus- ?if you want a serious academic environment with top-tier faculty and don't mind missing out on a huge campus life, dtu east campus is a fantastic choice. it is perfect for students who want to focus on their studies and secure a good analyst job. just be prepared to hunt for a pg nearby as there are no hostels.

review_text: [college infrastructure]: gla is having very fantastic infrastructure facilities and equipment available. facilities like secured wifi, digiboards for covering syllabus and they are well maintained also availability. gla provide hygienic food and clean sanitation. | [academics]: currently i am studying bba because it will enhance my business skills.the quality of teaching is very efficient as faculty is teaching through digiboards.our curriculum is perfectly updated accordingly to recent trends. | [placements]: the quality of placement of my college is very good. approx 95% students are placed from our college in big different companies. the highest salary package offered is 7 lpa this was by our top students from bba. my college is very supportive. | [campus life]: gla university have may best features like it's infrastructure, football ground, basketball court, auditorium for events, library, digiboards classes also many skills developing clubs for extra curricular activities or organising events. teachers are very supportive

[college infrastructure]: the college has all facilities available. there are libraries, labs, gyms and hostels with high speed wifi. everyday the classrooms are neat and clean. the infrastructure is well planned with large space. hostel food is very good. laboratories have all the equipment. | [academics]: i am pursuing btech with electrical engineering. the faculty members are so cooperate and very helpful. the faculty members are so well treated persons and the explanation just amazing to express the subject the professors are preparing their daily ppt's and they giving their best to teach us. i am so glad to be a student of this institute . | [placements]: i think the placements of an institute place a vital role for the upgrade. there is almost 95% placements for electrical engineering. this branch has many sources to get placement at any platform. the average package ? is about 5lakhs package .the college package is additionally than it be. | [campus life]: the campus life is just amazing and also it is the first experience of mine i felt so well to be alone the feeling you get that you are independent. there are many clubs if you are bored you can join their. the clubs exist different types of skills for different students. joining of clubs may help you in future.

iit kanpur has a large campus of 1055 acres. however, you'll usually wander around only 300 acres. life on the campus is nice. the campus is very beautiful and the sports facilities are well-maintained. we have here one hockey ground, one football ground, one pe ground, and several other grounds. the campus is full of greenery. one thing i especially like about iit kanpur is its culture. it has hall culture, wing culture, baapu culture, and many other cultures. the annual cultural fest is antaragini and the tech fest is techkriti. both of them are going to be conducted this year in march and i haven't attended them yet, so i cannot review them. regarding the availability of books, the pk kelkar library has around 4 to 5 lac books and you'll find most of the books you need there. there are 20 lecture halls of different sizes and the new ones are very good. iit kanpur has the best oat among all the iits and is the main hub for cultural activities.well, i choose this course because this is the best which i can get at my rank, but after joining the institute, this course sounds interesting to me. the faculty: student ratio here is around 1:9. the faculty is highly qualified here and have great knowledge of their respective fields, however, i would say that they somewhat lack in teaching. most of the students have to study by themselves to get good grades in exams. plus the academics at iit kanpur are hard. within a few weeks of the beginning of our semester, quizzes were organized and after a few weeks, our mindsets started. just after the midterms were finished, we got the dates for the end seems, which took place one and a half months later. in short, you will have to give exams very frequently. if you want to pass, you'll have to study one week before the exams, but if you want to excel, you'll have to study hard and regularly.
college_name: IIT Kanpur - Indian Institute of Technology - [IITK]

review_text: [college infrastructure]: not that great needs improvement in terms of infrastructure. development is going in near future it might attend the good infrastructure outing hours and independence is less here need improvement in that term also | [academics]: average academic the teachers only read ppts and no practical implementation of the theories happens . no other extra curriculum activities happens . no sports team is active long study hours of reading pppts | [placements]: it has good placement companies comes alot mass recruitment happens but issue is the package that they offer is ver less if someone is giving more package that will be for sales for sure rest its good only

[college infrastructure]: the infrastructure is new and great with picturesque viewpoints all across the campus. there are many new blocks and buildings including the library facilities, the lecture hall complexes and laboratories. | [academics]: the academics is great, thanks to the good faculties and professors who are experienced and well versed in teaching. most of the professors here have done phds from abroad and esteemed universities from india as well. | [placements]: the placements at iit indore are great. as pithampur is a industrial hub it provides ample of opportunities for all the students to sit for placements and bag on campus placements of high stature and prestige. | [campus life]: there is a vast area of student activities, both in cultural and technical fields.

[college infrastructure]: the infrastructure is good but there is a need for improvement in infrastructure for better. add additional space for sports and cultural activities. the library is good, but the wi-fi quality is not up to the mark. the college campus is far away, making it challenging for students to commute daily. | [academics]: well-qualified, helpful, knowledgeable, and experienced faculty. however, they expect students to work hard to enhance their skills. scoring good marks in semester exams is challenging, so be prepared for both exams and projects. | [placements]: 80% of students are placed. the highest package is 20lpa, and the lowest is 5 lpa. top recruiters include tcs, icici, hdfc, and reliance. the college provides internship programs to facilitate in various fields such as finance, marketing, data science, agriculture business operations,, and hospitality and tourism | [campus life]: master of business administration has a wide scope for learning skills to grow your care

[college infrastructure]: yes my college have all infrastructure and facilities and projector,lab,free campus wifi and free lab for everyday, variety of sports facilities,swimming pool for men and women and gym and lunch spot library hall like everything clean and maintained by vit. | [academics]: i studied bca on vit because i'm interested in coding. and teaching in vit is quite good because they teach what the currici follow and curriculum is well updated for what companies expect. learn a one programming skill and practice and master it then be a good communicator in english and start to practice for aptitude. | [placements]: placement is quite not good because on that time covid peek so on our batch we don't get placed a lot. but still around 100 to 150 companies came so don't need to worry about placements if you skill you can crack it. 50 percentage of students are placed with an average of 3,00,000 per year. mostly company went for software,web and java roles. and throughout the process the college will helpful to sending mails regarding placement and training also given early on third year to students. | [campus life]: various fun activities and functions is there in vit but lot of students feel no time to engage in every task that is might be a problem in vit .but one thing sure all are planned well and organised in safe manner so don't need to worry about that.

[college infrastructure]: the area in which the college is built is really small. there is not much space inside the campus. you will feel like you just entered the college from gate 1, and after 2-3 minutes, you will reach the exit gate of the college. there is nothing like a university campus | [academics]: faculty members at the college are good. they provide good lectures, and the examination system is also decent. the marking scheme is also systematic. teachers are helpful by nature and have good knowledge of their respective subjects. the curriculum is huge, but teachers manage to get it completed on time. | [placements]: the worst placements ever. they show every student placed in their system, but in reality, almost 30-40% of students are still unplaced from the 2025 batch. i am one of them. the college is not at all concerned about this, nor do they respond to us now.
college_name: National Institute of Technology Andhra Pradesh

review_text: [college infrastructure]: iit kanpur provided top-notch facilities to students. there are 24 hours of wi-fi facility with great speed for students. the quality of labs and classrooms were also very excellent. the institute makes sure that students faced no problem in their hostel rooms with high quality safety | [academics]: faculty members of iit kanpur were acknowledged throughout the world. most of the professors worked on world-class projects and participated in various conferences, lectures etc. however, there is no industry exposure to students. the institute focused mainly on theoretical knowledge and provide high quality education | [placements]: placements exceeded the expectations of the students. around 300 students got placed on day 1, which saw the participation of over 38 companies. placements in our college were better than the last year. studies from 5-year programme (b.tech +m.tech) were preferred over b.tech students.

[college infrastructure]: the college infrastructure is excellent, all around the college and with the othere colllege infrastructure. we have wifi facilites all over the campus and wifi is completely free and classrooms are fully facilitated. it has new tables and chairs good facilities in labs and moreover the class are completely air conditioned. | [academics]: academics are well good. we have good teachers who understands the students, their capability and necessity. they are good at making the students understand the topics. the curriculum is not updated recently but it is not that old curriculum, we are not having such hard syllabus for the studies. | [placements]: the number of placement in the college is high than other private institutions of similar type. the package obtained for the graduates are almost the average of the college placement package rather for our course. | [campus life]: campus life is good. we have a lot of space to roam around. i usually go with my friends for campus touring when we are free and less tight schedule is found. there are a lot of areas in the campus yet to be visited as the campus is large. we also have all shoping and fooding facilities in the campus itself.
college_name: Vellore Institute of Technology Chennai Campus

review_text: although the campus is just 16 acer it is situated in the heart of mumbai this is a 100-year-old campus that includes two full-size grounds, a hostel, mess. there are many annual fests that happen in college in the month of january to feb for students which includes pratibimb largest culture fest that happens in mumbai after iitb other than that technovanza is a tech fest that is conducted by student of vjti in this in this technovanza conducted an isro science exhibition which attracts 80,000-foot fall in collegethe faculty is good but not up to the mark, which was there in past. faculty are well educated but now most of the teachers are on a contract system, moat of the newly joined teacher has no idea what going on they just complete the syllabus and move on college is autonomous that's why teachers whatever they teaching and provided notes question ask directly from this exam

[college infrastructure]: overalll college infrastructure is cool , we have vltc aisa largest lecture complex theatre , which can accomadate very large no.of students and fully ac rooms , greenry all around ,hostel facilities are also quit good ,mess good is not bad at all and hygienic, we have badminton court ,basketball court ,sports ground ,footbal ground and sports complex fully equipped with sports items ,library also quipped with many interesting books and a peaceful place for students to study , college is amazing | [academics]: quality of education we get from malviya national institutes of technology our college is very very good ,we have highle educated m experienced professors which makes us understand doubts from basic level to advanced level ,and they makes us understand through real life experiences too ,so that we will be more comfortable with subjects , academic curicullum includes everything from bookish knowledge to lab experiments ,webinars in which we can connect through various personalities to guide us .. | [placements]: in the placement drive of 2018- 2019, 620 students were placed at mnit jaipur. median package of 6.5 lpa was offered to students. around 50 students were given pre-placement offers. the total number of internships offered to the students (ug+ pg) was 152. many companies approaches mnit tp hire students no only in core but non core companies tooo for engineering background students too .the placement & training cell shall be responsible for: ? ensuring that appropriate procedures are in place to | [campus life]: mnit has a beautiful, lush green campus and is situated in the heart of city. it's proximity to airport and railway station is plus point. also there are various market places and malls nearby, which makes it very easy for a new person in city to fulfill his/ her requirements.
college_name: Malaviya National Institute of Technology Jaipur

review_text: [college infrastructure]: sports ground is not in the campus. also the classrooms aren't too clean . however they aren't too dirty either. there are labs and auditoriums and there is one separate lab for extra curriculum research works | [academics]: from academics point of view , iem has the best academic record as well as othere good technical records amongst private colleges in west bengal. the midsems are conducted twice for each semester and one semester of 100 marks. | [placements]: placements as of 2023 stand good. tcs, accenture and cognizant fall amongst the mass recruiters. also, oracle and ey visit the college every year for recruiting meritorious students. iem has had a good placement record over the years.
college_name: Institute of Engineering and Management Kolkata

review_text: [college infrastructure]: campus has an outstanding setup of infrastructure and facilities. being one of the newest campuses, it has all important facilities like smart-digitized classrooms, well-equipped laboratories, libraries, sports centers and all of them are well maintained. also, the campus has bcci recognized cricket ground maintained by goa cricket association and a football ground maintained by salgaocar f.c. food is good and living-spaces are hygienic. | [academics]: the academic course structure is governed by university, bits pilani. however, every campus has its own autonomous administration, student welfare division, faculty recruitment, and placement division. well updated curriculum, constructive competitive environment ensure quality teaching experience. | [placements]: the college is very supportive in terms of placements and has ensured quality placements for its students over the years. even amid pandemic, over 98% of bits goa students got placed. the maximum domestic package was offered by microsoft india development center. | [campus life]: there are many student-run clubs and departments that make life on campus more fun and engaging. the campus culture, quality of students, and institute's image are top-notch.

[college infrastructure]: galgotias university offers a world class campus infrastructure that significantly enhances the academic experience the university is equipped with state of the art facilities including fully air conditioned and smart classrooms digitally equipped seminars halls auditorium and highly tech computer labs the library is major highlight featuring a vast collection of management books journals digital resources and access to international databases essential for business research and care studies | [academics]: college offers a comprehensive and industry driven program that is designed to equip student both theoretical knowledge and practical skills the curriculum is continually updated to reflect the latest trends in the global business environment with core specialisations in marketing finance human resources management operations and more the academic structure balances classroom lectures with case studies live projects group discussions and experiential learning to foster critical thinking | [placements]: galgotias university has built a strong reputation for offering excellent placement opportunities particularly for every students the university corporate resources centre plays a proactive role in preparing students for the job market through continuous tarining in sorft skills aptitude group discussions and personal interviews with strong industry linkages and corporate partnerships | [campus life]: campus life is vibrant engaging and conductive holistic development the university promotes a dynamic environment where academic rigor is balanced with rich extracurricular and co curricular activities students actively participate in a wide range of student clubs including marketing finance cultural club which organise work shops guest lectures business quizzes with a diverse student community inclusive environment and regular industry interaction events

[college infrastructure]: dit university has a modern and expansive campus between mussoorie's mountains. during my time in btech from it, we had access to high-quality facilities, including well-equipped classrooms, computer labs with the latest software, etc. | [academics]: the curriculum covered key it topics such as software engineering, database management, networking, ai-ml, cybersecurity, etc. the faculty is experienced and approachable, and the college really follows an open-door policy. | [placements]: the placement cell needs to become more robust. during my final year, we had multiple campus placement drives, and many of my classmates, including myself, secured campus placement in reputed it firms, but the placement isn't 100%. | [campus life]: there were many clubs, societies, etc. we had annual festivals and events that brought the whole campus together, creating a sense of community and fostering lasting friendships. these experiences were as valuable as the academic learning, contributing to a well-rounded college life.

as an effect of the corona lockdown, our first semester is of only 3.5 months every sem we have at least 2 ct, 1 mid sem,1 end sem, an internal practical exam, and a final practical exam. teacher's are mostly teaching with pdf which is already shared in google classroom, so no one shows interest in the class. some teachers are cool, some are also very dedicated for study.we have one of the biggest fests in our college moksha i can't brief much about it as i am fresher but as per our seniors it's totally worth it. people of college are very friendly and helpful but we have very pressure to study, assignments because the teachers are so strict.

fests are conducted so often like once a month. flash mobs will be conducted. books and journals are plenty in our library. once you get into the library no one will disturb you. and our university has a digital library. we can access that by our university mail. the classrooms are built well and the infrastructure will be nice, ac classrooms are more massive in amount than normal classrooms. our university has a cricket club and a kabaddi club, our university is named after extracurricular activities. once you get into the clubs you can work with seniors and juniors.i choose this course because i am interested in electronics. and also the fee structure for this course is lesser than the cse. in each section, there will be a minimum of 50 to 60 students. the ratio of students and faculty is good more than enough. mostly all facility has done ph.d., and they are good at teaching even though they haven't done a ph.d. exams are conducted four times before the seminar exams. ut1, ut2, mt1, and mt2, this is the exams conducted before the semester. the exams are based on the course outcome. pass is difficult if not prepared thoroughly.
college_name: Vel Tech Rangarajan Dr. Sagunthala R and D Institute of Science and Technology - [Vel Tech]

review_text: [college infrastructure]: the college infrastructure is not as expected. the building are old and feel like haunted area the wifi facility was good and very advance sport activity centre well maintained sports ground the hostel was very small. | [academics]: interaction with professor and seniour is very helpful and supporting. the style of teaching was very supportive and teachers help student any time and give extra time to clear their doubt before the semester exam. | [placements]: placement was amazing specially in the it sector and the coading culture was amazing. the student get all the help from department and placement cell. seniour also help juniour to prepare for the placement. | [campus life]: the campus life was amazing but there was a big problem due to open campus. outsider was randomly walking inside the campus. people's mobile and purse generally get snatched. there was a benefit of having an open campus because people get food item from outside.
college_name: Indian Institute of Technology Banaras Hindu University Varanasi

review_text: [college infrastructure]: college infrastructure is too good with the consistency in improving the facilities upon maintaining the digital classrooms for us and also good labs with better hostel facilities also and all things are well maintained. | [academics]: academics is too good and i am pursuing bsc in hotel management and getting good placement from the campus moreover the quality of teaching is too good as there are professionals faculty they also provide us visits to different sites. | [placements]: quality of placements being provided to us from the college as this got us from the seniors only and the highest package is around 8lpa, and average package is around 4-5 lpa . overall highest package of the university is 18lpa from m.tech. | [campus life]: campus life is too good as the faculty , students all are too much supportive. | [anything else]: overall a better option to choose galgotias university

pros/cons: teachers are very co-operative and are very good. the campus is eco friendly and very clean. the campus is ragging fee and hostles is also very good. there are too many restrictions like you are not allowed to go outside after 8 pm. the library is very small and very much less books are present. game equipments are not presents and girls is to boys ration is 1:10 | placement experience: placements are overall good for cse departments. average package is 10-12 lpa,and placement percentage is also about 76 % not all placement are campus based some are off campus placement .this is too less as compased to other iiits .the placement in ece department is about 8-10 lpa which is also very less compared to other iiits.
college_name: Indian Institute of Information Technology - [IIITM], Imphal

review_text: [college infrastructure]: our infrastructure is okay. its not too big campus but it is good enough. we have wi-fi but it's not accessible in the classroom. there are library for every department. library has proper wi-fi. our labs are okayish they are not too big but it has every required equipment. campus has boys hostel which is very good. | [academics]: teachers are really nice. they are proper knowledgeable. we are provided here course structure and every teachers follow it. maths and physics faculty are very good in this college. exam are little bit tough. we have to study for our exams. and around 80% students passes their semester exam here. | [placements]: placement is the backbone of this college beside this bad management team. they provide every possible resource for preparing for placement. we have good teachers and good courses. this year a student got a package of 23 lacs and the average placement is around 4-5 lacs. every company ranging from average to big product based companies come here like hcl, amzon, wipro etc.

campus life is cool,if u r extrovert.technical events are held on day called phaseshift.where all colleges are invited.cultural events happen on utsava for 4 days.festivals i have not seen,coz i go to my place.all events happen very grandly.neighbouring colleges too get jnvitedsports -small ground.due to too much of building ground size,garden were all reduced. wifi-not available for all.only for staff and lab uses. size of library-tooo big.best library in karnataka. labs-damn cool.few are old school.others modern.just as required.

antaragni, techriti, udgosh in these fests people example from all over the world and they are so productive like we can involved in them and learn something new be it managing or leadership skills. there are a lot more internal competitions which i find more resourceful.fees here are different for different students. sc and st students have no tuition fees here. they only have to pay the hostel and mess charges. many scholarships are available to students here at the banks and other authorities in the college.
college_name: IIT Kanpur - Indian Institute of Technology - [IITK]

review_text: [college infrastructure]: the institute is provided with the various equipments and facilities required. as it is an it college the computer labs are kept in the best state along with various other respective labs essential during the course work. the classrooms are spacious and ventilated. the library has a large collection of books related to both academic and non academic topics. the sports centre of the institute is one of the best you can find. | [academics]: i am doing my btech course in information technology right now. the quality of teaching is good as the professors support the students with the classwork and are available even for after class doubt sessions. the curriculum is updated and covers the essential sectors. | [placements]: the quality of placement at the institute is very high and each year the placement curve seeks higher and higher. students received offers from various companies both nationally and internationally. various students even started successful startups.
college_name: Atal Bihari Vajpayee Indian Institute of Information Technology and Management Gwalior

review_text: [college infrastructure]: yes my college has the necessary infrastructure and facilities for a smooth college life. the classrooms are neatly built with comfortable individual chairs and good air conditioning system, all the other things like libraries etc are also good. all the living spaces are clean and the food provided here is hygenic. | [academics]: i am currently studying btech in cse, since i have intrest in computer fields, the teaching provided here is good. our curriculum is updated according to the trends in the industry. i think what i study here is good for making me job-ready. | [placements]: the placements here are good and been improving since the start of the college. the placement rate is 100% and the highest package offered is 50lpa and it is in the course of cse. the average salary is 8lpa. | [campus life]: campus life is good the best features are good living spaces and there are various activites students can engage in like sports, dance and music which are formed as clubs. all the people here are good and well speaking. the campus is remote-located but it can handle emergencies

[college infrastructure]: this college provides very modern hostels with many facilities. there are many washing machines, heaters, electric irons, television, electric kettle, etc., for every hostel. sports facilities are good. the quality of hostel life is better than other . it also provides elevators. | [academics]: exams are comparatively less difficult than other .many exams are mcq type and much easier than jee advanced. some exams are memory-based. in other colleges questions are much tougher then in feel this course is much relevant. | [placements]: around 50% of students are placed. the top recruiting companies are tata, cisco, larsen and toubro, some telecom companies, google, apple, microsoft, and much more. the internships ratio is good. almost everyone gets a chance for internships in any year.

pros/cons: we have a temporary campus .which was taken as rent in goverment engeneering college raichur .and permanent campus was yet to finish by the time juniors come the permanent campus will be getting finished.just needed the proper campus no improvments the campus life was not as expected by a student because here the cluns are not very active like in any other colleges , u can enjot a lot with your friends in your hostel. every branch has a faculty adviser we can meet them and discuss our problems with them .the faculry were very good they were well experienced ,they teach in general way as any teacher does on a digital board. the placement cell is not that good , the students were not getting places for good amount of package as expected . the labs were not well maintained that should be resolved that is the main problem in this college as well as library we have a very small library which is in a size of a regular class hostel was not within the campus which makes some difficulty to walk through the streets with roaming buses and cars and bikes , in our college boy girl ration was very less it is 1: 7 like that. | placement experience: from 6th semester students are eligible for taking interships and they get placed in 7th semester and have to leave campus after 8th semester the highest would somewhere aroubd 20 lpa and avg would be 9 to 10 lpa . i plan to do mtech in any reputed college by writing gate . the percentage of studebts getting placed are 70 %
college_name: Indian Institute of Information Technology -[IIIT], Raichur

review_text: [college infrastructure]: uiet have decent infrastructure for academics but didn't say the same about co-curriculam stuff. just a basketball ground but has enough space to built auditorium, or other sports facility.through the same is not much of concern because one can enjoy these facility through panjab university. wifi is fast , mess food is fine. hostel isn't available for every one.only top 10-20 student of every branch get the same in 1st year. | [academics]: tech branches study curriculam is much more updated and co-relevant than core branches(as per the common notion), teaching quality is fine but can be improve to much more extent.practical labs have decent and well maintained equipment. | [placements]: great for tech branches, can be significantly improved for core branches. core branch student tends to go for gate/other similar exam including cat mostly and few continue to aspire as tech engineer(these are relativaly more happier at the end of 4 year.) tech branches student get placed closed to 95 percent with highest package of 45 lac and average 7-8 lakh, for core branches 70percent , 18lakh, 4-5 lakh. student pursuing biotech are the most ignored in this aspect. | [campus life]: panjab university is spread in sector 15(north) and in sector 25(south).campus life is fully lived in the north campus particularly for hostelors. ac joshi,gandhi bhawan, stuc, rose garden , pu ground are the highlight. no restriction for girls in term of hostel timing.
college_name: University Institute of Engineering and Technology Panjab University Chandigarh

review_text: [college infrastructure]: amazing infrastructure. the classes are huge and so are the buildings, labs, playgrounds and hanging out area. the hostel rooms are also spacious and quite ventilated. there is enough space for fests, events and any kind of activities. | [academics]: i am studying computer science as it has numerous opportunities but the quality of teaching is just satisfactory. the teachers do take enough effort to create assignments and quizzes. but the quality can be improved more. | [placements]: there are numerous placement opportunities and the college takes extra pride and care in ensuring that each and every person is placed. the stream of computer science has ample opportunities but other streams have also crossed there mark in terms off placements. | [campus life]: there are certain restriction based on the timings of entries and other freedom parameters but the campus life is pretty equisite. it is fun and learning experiences all together. you will evolve as a person during the tenure.
college_name: Vellore Institute of Technology Chennai Campus

review_text: placements are average i.e 4.5 lpa. the biggest reason for avg. placement is high student intake. students can apply for placement services from 2nd year (4th sem) which is optional but mandatory from 3rd year (6th sem). no. of companies visited is very high, almost 1000+ companies visited. most of the companies are regular. some big mncs are - amazon, google, microsoft, tech mahindra, dee shaw, etc... the highest package is 64 lpa from b.tech and avg. is 4.5 lpa from cse. 90%+ students got placement here eighter in mncs or mass recruiters. i'm thinking of taking placements.the annual fest of lpu is - youth vibe which is generally held in february. there are about 20 lacks+ books in the lupus library which are well furnished and nicely designed. all the course books are available. all classes are well furnished, projected, cctv, and air conditioners. sports culter is excellent at lpu. almost every sport is available and equally respected. extracurricular activities at lpu are very frequent. many clubs are run by students like - coding ninjas, lpu-nss, coding pirates, dyc, dso, ojaswi, etc...

pros/cons: computer labs are good and well furnished students are good in this college as everyone is supportive phd scholars are good here and very helpful in nature mess food is not that good in our campus and it's getting worst day by day sports facilities are not good proper equipments are not provided some faculties are not good in teaching as they simply read the ppt | placement experience: students become eligible from 7th sem and placement was good before but in this 2024 batch it's the worst placement of all time only 58% students got placement with less package because of recession im looking for a placement and further plan is to work for a company
college_name: National Institute of Technology - [NIT], South Sikkim

review_text: [college infrastructure]: mess food depends on individual experiences but it's normally just enough for the strength. they charge rs.100 per day. the canteen is nice, we have 3 canteens and all are good but sometimes it's hard to get them because of long lines and surplus orders. the sports facilities are very good and it's split up into 2 parts. | [academics]: all teachers need a ph.d. degree to teach in iit, so there's no doubt about their qualifications. the curriculum is the same for all branches in the first year. students are industry ready because of the good labs and realistic competitions. | [placements]: our college has the best placements from companies like microsoft, deloitte, and many more. many big companies are being approached by our cnp (career & placement) cell, which is the best cell in iit mandi. many big companies are being approached by our placement cell. also, the placement percentage in such cases is always greater than 98%.

[college infrastructure]: classrooms are really good with digital boards and are air-conditioned. white screens are available for presentations. in hostels, lan is available with a good speed and fair connectivity. the library is satisfactory. hostels are the best part of our college. mess food is delicious and hygienic. a sports ground very good with a running track 400m is also there. we have a healthcare centre on the campus with an ambulance service. | [academics]: the course curriculum is good. faculty members are also helpful. labs are good, and professors will guide you regarding the course. attendance is an issue, so you need to maintain a minimum of 75% for obvious reasons. however, faculty member is co-operative and helpful. | [placements]: our college placement rate is good. the average salary package offered ranges 7lpa to 8lpa. top recruiters of our college are maruti suzuki, hero, bajaj and many more. internships rate is less due to covid-19 pandemic. still the college is putting efforts to avail various projects to students. | [campus life]: the best features of college are that you get everything in the college. for enjoyment, there are 2 main fests techspardha and confluence which is too good. all the seniors, teachers and support staff are friendly and co-operative. the college location is safe.

the total fee range for the nit patna btech programme is rs 5,29,100 - rs 5,50,000 nit patna offers a wide variety of scholarships for meritorious unreserved category students and reserved category students. there is a total of 34 scholarships of range rs 2,400 - rs 31,65,600. minority-1 minority commission, ranchi rs 17,000 sc-2 st & sc development deptt. orissa rs 49,760 sc-3 indian oil, new delhi rs 1,08,000 st-2 st & sc development deptt. orissa rs 49,760 gen-1 sitaram jindal foundation, new delhi rs 2,400placements are improving every year. in recent placements (2021) batch, overall placement percent was 80%. for ee department, it was 70%. many students target software roles. the highest package was 30 lpa, the lowest 5 lpa and avg was 8 lpa. top recruits include godrej, oyo, paytm, deloitte, mindtree, zs associates, american express etc. internship opportunities are less in comparison to other nits. college helps students in getting internships. recently a girl from my college got placed in facebook with 1.6cr package.

[college infrastructure]: the infrastructure of our college is good, clean, and has a greenery environment. in our college, there is free wi-fi which is different for different departments. there are different labs for different courses. there are also sports and canteen facilities, which are good. | [academics]: there are about 30 faculties in our department. all the faculty are friendly and specialized in their professions. many are qualified as professors and associate professors. there are eight semesters in four years, which contain 3 internal exams and one external exam per semester. | [placements]: the placement in our college is quite good enough. the highest package offered is 7 lpa and the lowest package is 2.5 lpa. the average package offered is 3-4 lpa. a maximum of 30 percent of the students are placed in our college. our college also prefers internships.
college_name: Dayananda Sagar College of Engineering Bangalore

review_text: placement experience: almost 70 -80% of students plan to go to higher studies and other students get placement. placement is good in college but not that much avg placement is 8lakh. placement varies accordingly to branch. polymer engineering and chemical engineering get very good placement opportunities. companies visited in college:- exon mobi, bsf, asian paint, trident, dyester and other.

[college infrastructure]: yes the infrastructure is best of the best, and talking about the facilities i can say what i personally have experienced, there is everything what you look for in any a grade colleges, it has 4,5 canteens where you can lunch or brunch, it has a huge campus, high class hostels with all the facilities, the amazing fully ac buses for the convenient transportation, free wifi in all corners of the campus, clean spaces and hygienic food as well. overall the infrastructure is really very good | [academics]: i am studying business management which is mba as a course, and i am studying this because i was fully determined since the beginning that what i have to do in life so ya that's it about the study. and talking about the curriculum i can say it's updated but not modernalized with the on going scenario in the market of jobs, so it needs to be improved ?. what i studied that definitely made me job ready but many of my friends couldn't get the job through what they taught us. | [placements]: i am satisfied with my placement but ya definitely when i am studying with my friends and they don't get a job only because the campus in incompetent ism getting what they want, so that's the biggest fault of my campus. | [campus life]: campus life was also average.
college_name: SRM Institute of Science and Technology NCR Campus Ghaziabad

review_text: [college infrastructure]: our hostel is awesome. radhakrishanan bhawan has free unlimited wi-fi, lan, gym, canteen, tv room, elevator, indoor game complex, etc. the department of mathematics has a library, free wi-fi, and great supportive professors. the quality of food served in the hostel was average. but breakfast used to be great at our time. classes are conducted in the lecture hall complex, which was at a distance of 10-15 minutes from our hostel. | [academics]: teachers are highly intelligent, and their quality is as par course. they are really helpful in our courses. the course curriculum is great, and even a lot of core branches students take our courses as additional. semester exams are not that tough to pass. if a student takes classes seriously and studies for a decent amount of time, then they can easily get good grades. | [placements]: majority of students from our batch got placed in reputed companies. the highest salary package offered was 40 lpa, and the average salary package offered was 10 lpa. top recruiting companies like adobe, goldman sachs, microsoft india, mastercard, jp morgan, oracle, oyo, tcs, wipro, etc., visit the college for placements. almost all students got placed. some students opted for higher studies, and some went for civil services exam preparation.we phd student got many opportunities in companion. | [anything else]: all the facilities are very helpful

[college infrastructure]: college is average , all the necessary facilities are available like wi-fi, equipped laboratory, digital library, big sports ground, different buildings for different branch, clean living space, hygienic food, welldone security, qualified faculty etc. | [academics]: average academic, syllabus is followed in the college issued by abdul kalam technical university lucknow, syllabu is new, yes colleges doing development in many fields,course job oriented so college make us job oriented. | [placements]: placement quality is average, quality is uptu level, quantity is about 90%, highest package is 9 lakh rupees per annum computer science student got this offered by service based company, average packages 3 to 4 lakh rupees per annum for all branch, colleges very supportive in placement. | [campus life]: campus is very good same campus life is very good, majorly student engage in sports, student teacher support staff is good and very good, ghaziabad is the location it is safest because police station is very near and hospital is also very near.
college_name: Ajay Kumar Garg Engineering College Ghaziabad

review_text: [college infrastructure]: the department is equipped with modern computer labs, high-speed internet, and access to a wide range of software tools and platforms. classrooms are well set, and students have access to online learning platforms and coding resources. | [academics]: the academics in the cse department at rnsit are good and up to date. core subjects are taught well, and there?s good exposure to trending tech like ai, ml, and cloud. faculty are supportive and make sure concepts are clear, not just memorized. you?ll get plenty of hands-on practice through labs and mini-projects, which really helps. | [placements]: placements are good? top it and product-based companies recruit from here, and the placement training is quite thorough.the placement cell, in collaboration with the cse faculty, conducts mock interviews, aptitude training, and resume workshops to prepare students for the job market. | [campus life]: the department has active student clubs and coding communities such as ieee etc. regular events, hackathons, and tech fest s create a vibrant and collaborative atmosphere. department fests will be going on which balances between studies and also even helps us to relax

[college infrastructure]: the college have all necessary infrastructure. the college have all necessary equipments. classroom, labs and so on are well maintained. library is housed in the ?b? block mezzanine floor of the library. we are using dspace as digital library software. digital library is a library in which collections are stored in digital formats and data accessible through the computers by users. the digital content may be stored locally, or accessed remotely via computer networks. a digital library is a type | [academics]: dayananda sagar college of engineering offers 160 undergraduate programs leading to 4/5 year bachelor's degrees, 16 post graduate programs leading to 2/3 year master's degrees and 21 research centers offering a 2/5 year m.sc.(eng.)/ph.d. degrees. the academic degrees are awarded by visvesvaraya technological university.[5] | [placements]: dayananda sagar college of engineering (dsce) bangalore placements 2021 are currently going and more than 1400 students have been placed yet. it has a dedicated placement cell which coordinates with the recruiting companies and handles the entire placement process. a few ket facts regarding dsce bangalore placements 2020 are mentioned below: final placements 2020 a total of 2,194 students were placed, which was 2,281 in 2019 the highest ctc offered was rs 27 lpa approximately 20 students rec
college_name: Dayananda Sagar College of Engineering Bangalore

review_text: [college infrastructure]: campus is good... covered with lush green forest... greenery is in the air.. lecture halls are in good condition.lab instruments are also good.hostels are average.cleaniless happens on daily basis.it also include big playground as well as indoor game centres. | [academics]: i am currently pursuing chemical engineering.i had been interested in chemical engineering since my childhood.my grandfather was great chemical engineer.he worked with isro as well so is an inspiration for me.profs are quite educated and kind here.various course made us quite confident and prepared for our job interviews | [placements]: placement of my college is quite decent.last year chemical engineer got 100% placement.last year highest package was 54lpa which my cousin had got .he was pursuing cse from same college.average salary is 14 lpa for chemical engineers..rest other branch has 12 lpa.yes college was quite supportive instead of security guards.they stopped using to sit in one of my interviews because i had not done entry in hostel register | [campus life]: best feature that it has good boys is to girls ratio students are engaged in various activities from design and deco to singing and dancing to coding...in everyyyyy field we are great.location is very peaceful

[college infrastructure]: yes nmit has all the necessary infrastructure, facilities and equipment.the college management is even ready to help the students with funds for the equipment,but the infrastructure in college hostel is bad. | [academics]: i am studying in eee because of my own interest.the quality of teaching is the best i had ever.the curriculum is updated according to the current trends and includes all the recent developments in the field. | [placements]: the placements in this college are not that great.the percentage of students placed in the college are just 50%,mostly japanese companies come to the college and mass recruiting companies only.i hope this should change. | [campus life]: campus life is very bad in this college,only one event will be held by the college and the other events are not even discussed which affects my campus life and the transportation from/to the college is very difficult.
college_name: Nitte Meenakshi Institute of Technology Bangalore

review_text: the campus is around 300 acres and it's fulfilled with greenery. we have a private beach it's very nice. the area around the college is very peaceful. our college conducts an annual fest incident and one tech fest engineer. our library is very big so many books are there. the classroom of our college is very big and well furnished. in college, we have 2 basketball courts 2 volleyball courts 1 cricket ground 1 football ground.4 badminton court 2 kabaddi court and sports faculties is very nice our college websites iris is run by our college seniors and many clubs are there whose run by studentscollege fees are 157000 per year college management takes fees per sem. our college fees are not high compared to other iits. the college provides financial assistance scholarships for sc, st students and some obc and ews students took benefit from college fees national scholarship program nsp is a central government scholarship scheme there are many types of scholarships we can take

[college infrastructure]: good classroom, big library, good environment. all facilities in the hostel q uality foots , daily cleaning, cctv camera facilities friendly superintendent, medical help, in mess , leave times time spent in ground allowed 24/7 security low hostel fees | [academics]: helpful teachers, experience faculties, extraordinary teaching. symposium and cultural on student happiness. 50 percentage exam contect by anna university, results published exam finish after 2 months, low exam fees, exam very strict exam go to write another cambus | [placements]: 60 above percentage. 4 lpa. 10+ above companies.good placement training, teaching career difficults, 70 percentage site engineer,bim engineer , software related civil works, quantity surveyor,survey engineer, project engineer, design engineer....etc

pros/cons: first thing is about the campus, it is filled with greenery and we'll maintained campus . second things is about their fests , there will be 2 fests in a year , 1 is technical fest and other is cultural fest of the budget 1.5cr around thrid thing is the remission of the fee scheme which they have been providing for students first thing is about their buildings , they are very old second thing is about the distance between the classroom and the hostel it is nearly 1 km from some of the hostels third thing is about their some of the teaching techniques using still the very old way | placement experience: for architecture students its in 10 th sem and for btech students its in 8 th sem for architecture they are landt asian paints pinnacle and some other too packages offered was 14 lpa 9 lpa 6 lpa highest package was 14 lpa and lowest was 5 lpa and the average was around 7 lpa almost 90 percent got placed my plans after getting degree is to get placement and get experience and start on your own
college_name: Malaviya National Institute of Technology - [MNIT], Jaipur

review_text: pros/cons: freedom that the college gives you in regards to in-time within campus and within hostel blocks great infrastructures and buildings with beautiful architectures help provided in placements by student clubs and organizations distance between hostels to academic blocks is very long and methods for commuting are limited course material is not provided until the class has progressed to a certain point making it difficult to get a step ahead some lab courses are very poorly structured | course curriculum overview: some subjects in your first year may feel irrelevant and sometimes they are. but most of them provide a better understanding for your own course. in second year you will branch out into your chosen courses and study more indepth topics. for the most part, the course stays on track and remains relevant but some courses are very outdated and could use some improvement as they follow very old standards and teaching methods

[college infrastructure]: yes the college has all the necessary infrastructure, facilities and equipment including three sports grounds, one indoor student activity centre, a gymkhana. the institute has top tier lab equipment and opportunities for research and higher studies. | [academics]: the quality of teaching is the best one can ask for with almost all of the teachers being phd scholars. they are masters in their fields and have a lot of hands-on experience. the curriculum is up to date with some extra subjects for overall development which, according to me, should be dropped. what we study makes us job ready, capable enough to write a research paper even. | [placements]: placements of iits are arguably among the best of the nation. more than 90% being placed while the rest opting for higher studies. the highest package was 1.2 crore and the average around 25lpa. placement process is smooth with the college supporting us every step of the way.
college_name: Indian Institute of Technology Banaras Hindu University Varanasi

review_text: pros/cons: campus, natural vibes, sports complex , library academic area, knowledge park, festivals auditorium, sac building, professors, technical fest restriction over girls hostel, in and out time for girls, adjusting for all the things in gargi hostel network issues, cultural fest not organised mess food, changing weather, costly things | placement experience: at nit agartala, students become eligible for placements from the 7th semester. companies like infosys, wipro, tcs and land t visit, offering diverse profiles. the highest package crosses 40 lpa with an average

[college infrastructure]: the classrooms, laboratories and library everything is well maintained. with well modernized equipments and furniture. wifi facility provided here is also good and fast. medical facilities and sports facilities are also good. food quality provided in the mess is also good. there are many canteens and cafes available in the campus. | [academics]: teachers are extremely helpful and gives excellent guidance. the teaching quality is also excellent. the course curriculum is also upto dated as per the technology needed. the course study makes us industry ready. lab instructors are also very nice and helpful. | [placements]: here almost every students gets placed with good packages. the highest package till now was around 50lpa. top recruiting companies like adobe, samsung, mastercard, ibm. mostly students also got the internships here from good companies. college is also very supportive during placement drives. | [campus life]: campus is very big and huge with all the facilities provided here for the students. it is one of the best iits. you will grow your self here personally as well as professionaly.

pros/cons: they university is very clean beautiful roads. different varieties of flora in faculty. fully aircondition classrooms with high speed wifi. number of classes in a week is high like more than 20 classes labs are are not that much advance that much they tell. lack of sports equipment and ground area is not well maintained. | placement experience: from 6 semester all students are eligible for campus placements there are almost more than 30+ companies come to make offers and don't recall the names but almost 34 lakh per annum is the highest package they offer and some lucky students also get 80 lakh per annum package almost 80 percent students get placed.
college_name: Netaji Subhas University of Technology - [NSUT], New Delhi

review_text: [college infrastructure]: the infrastructure of nsut is quite good. the new blocks are air-conditioned, and new lecture halls have world-class amenities. the library is huge, and it is fully air-conditioned and also has wi-fi. hostel life is quite good, and the food is above average. the rooms are of single occupancy, so there is no issue with hygiene. almost all the sports facilities are available at the college. | [academics]: the mac course is new, so most of the teachers and the syllabus are new. some of them are great, like experienced teachers, but while some weren't. it usually depends on students how and when they want to study for college exams as cgpa matters. there is no spoon-feeding, unlike school, which is a good thing as you become self-dependent. it is also an important life skill to have as you wouldn't have anyone to help you in real life too. | [placements]: it is difficult to get internships if you are in mechanical, mpae and biotech because p&t cell does not allow us to attend internships. however, there is no such issue during the placement session. the average salary package offered here is around 16 lpa.
college_name: Netaji Subhas University of Technology New Delhi

review_text: [college infrastructure]: yes, we have good infrastructure in our college and also we have good laboratories to explore the means of learning. in our hostel we have hygienic food every day. every day cleaning of room will be done. | [academics]: i am studying ece dept in engineering to have good opportunities in carrier and it will also help to get a good job and enhance my knowledge to have bright future and to reach my goal. the quality of teaching in college is very excellent. every teacher will be very friendly they always welcome for any doubts. in our college the curriculum will be designed by higher officials that will be upto date. the curriculum will gives us confidence to job ready. | [placements]: the quality of the placement in my will be up to the marke. the package is not main issue but you have to learn more and more to enhance your skills that will automatically support your package that all enhance skills techniques will be trained by our trainers. higest package is 6,50,000 per year. the least package will be 3,50,000 per year. according to my collage it will be very supportive in placement training. | [campus life]: according to campus and features it will be good . students are encouraged to have different activities to mingle with others to for a friendly environment. the students will also support staff and staff will also support students. it is very near to chennai. it is very safety because police patrolling will be every day. it can handle emergency 24 hours ambulance services is there in our college.
college_name: Vel Tech Rangarajan Dr Sagunthala R and D Institute of Science and Technology Chennai

review_text: i guess computer engineering was something that excited me from the very beginning and the faculty here too shows full support and interest in new innovative ideas of the students. moreover, it is fully digital here so there is no need for a traditional notes system and regular evaluations to help in understanding the course well.no doubt the fees are on the higher side but i guess the return value is also good. moreover, if you need financial support then there are a variety of scholarships available for example there are 3 slabs of scholarship on the basis of jee mains score and merit cum scholarship is there too
college_name: Thapar Institute of Engineering and Technology - [Thapar University]

review_text: [college infrastructure]: infrastructure is quite well ..buildings are modern every facilities are provided labs and classes also have proper conditioning and maintenance every physical aspect of infrastructure is well taken care of | [academics]: academic is quite good they offer wide possibilities simulatneously too ...teacher and faculty are also well versed modern and intersting teaching methods are accommodate which also develop students interest | [placements]: palcements are also good many big product based companies visit the campus which is due to the reputation of college..such companies are difficult to crack without the support o college placement is ensured if u are here

[college infrastructure]: college infrastructure is good and improving even tho its not that good as the huge campuses like manipal its filled with greenery and peaceful serenity. it has all the necessary equipments required . | [academics]: lecturers especially in my branch are pretty strict and other branches like ise the kecturers are cool ..and notes will be provided in digital form if you want pdf just below each building a xerox shop will be there | [placements]: placements are good here ...average salary is 8 to 20 lakhs and even tho it is a resession period the companies visited nitte it seems..almost all of them got placements who worked hard for it.so placement is good here | [campus life]: campus life is awsome ..my favourite time was when incredia was happening.incredia pro nights and in year 2025 shaan and masala coffee performance was just soo mesmerizing.i got such cool friends here too
college_name: NMAM Institute of Technology Karkala Taluk

review_text: scholarships offered to the students are again based on the entrance examination rankings.their are different categories of scholarship(category 1 to category 5):a rough estimate is: category 1:195000/yr category 2:295000/yr category 3:395000/yr category 4:495000/yr category 5:595000/yras for this, whatever we know is based on what others say(100% placement). but still, we know that a lot of companies do visit the campus, and the fact that the placement procedure is a joint one,i.e, all the students attend the placement procedure jointly in vellore.

algo is the biggest fest of the university. it basically occurs in march-august. for a library, anyone can issue a book and even all study material is available in the library, you just need to have your id for it. classrooms are well furnished with ac and wifi facilities. there are many groups for co-curricular activities and even for coding.there is no hike policy in the college. for the first semester, we need to pay 80000 then the rest is 70000 semester and the hostel including the mess is about 35000 per semester for 4 seater boys. there is no such scholarship but even it provides loans for students who want to have one.

i choose this course because i am deeply interested in forming designs and someday, i want to establish my own brand the faculty is interactive but strict and they don't accept any excuse at the student's end to maintain a good reputation and maintain the 75% attendance. the professors are fairly qualified and have very interesting teaching methods but they require some contribution at the student's end the examination marks distribution criteria are fairly simple. firstly you have 2 minors (each of 20 marks)(happens every 40 days or so), then you have an end sem (50 marks) and the rest 10 marks are in the hands of the professor tutoring the course.life at the campus is pretty lively and very happening, there are lesser restrictions as you progress into next semester the infrastructure of the campus is above average but the classrooms and study rooms are well furnished and have an all-around nice vibe. there are a variety of sports and clubs but the infrastructure for open sports is poor.
college_name: Dr BR Ambedkar National Institute of Technology - [NIT]

review_text: [college infrastructure]: great infrastructure with modern facilities. labs are well equipped especially biotechnology labs and thus provides research opportunities... lecture and tutorial rooms, classrooms are airy, spacious and equipped with overhead projectors. there are excellent facilities for outdoor+ indoor games and sports like cricket, football , volleyball, basketball, table tennis, carrom, badminton and many more. college canteen provides hygienic and good quality foods but they are overpriced. | [academics]: it is a autonomous college (but affiliated to makaut) so you have to pay your full focus and concentration during class. if you want to study biotechnology but could get into any of the nits then you may get into this college. same goes for cse, it and other departments. it provides amazing learning opportunities. good faculty members and seniors are much helpful. | [placements]: i am a biotechnology student in this college. commonly biotech students are not concerned with placements except few. they opt for higher studies. placement is average. tcs is the main company that comes to hire students.

[college infrastructure]: galgotias university boasts a modern and well-planned campus with impressive infrastructure. the classrooms are spacious, air-conditioned, and equipped with projectors for smart learning. the library is well-stocked with a wide range of academic resources and offers a quiet environment for study. the campus also includes dedicated labs for various branches, high-speed wi-fi, and multiple cafeterias serving decent food. hostels are well-maintained, though a bit crowded during peak semesters. overall, the infrastructure supports a comfortable and productive learning experience. | [academics]: professors are really good when you're in doubt. galgotias university offers a structured and industry-relevant academic curriculum. the faculty members are knowledgeable and supportive, with many holding phds or having significant industry experience. regular lectures, workshops, and guest sessions help enhance practical understanding. the university also focuses on project-based learning and provides good exposure to research and innovation. continuous internal assessments, quizzes, and assignments keep students engaged. however, the academic pressure can be high at times, and improvements in a few departments could enhance the overall experience. still, it's a strong environment for academic growth. | [placements]: galgotias university provides good placement support, especially for students in technical and professional courses. the placement cell is active and organizes regular training sessions, mock interviews, and workshops to prepare students for corporate roles. many reputed companies visit the campus, offering roles across various domains. students who are consistent and skill-oriented tend to secure decent opportunities. however, placements can vary depending on the branch and individual performance. while some students land excellent jobs, others may need to explore off-campus options. overall, with the right effort, placements are quite promising. | [campus life]: fun and exciting.

[college infrastructure]: as per as my experience there are some issues regarding food hygienic and some infrastructure also, our academic building are not well coloured.our class rooms are not well designed and also in mess ,we lost lots time for taking food . | [academics]: i am studying here to get good knowledge and experiences,i am studying here for updating myself from a boy to a good man,a good citizen,so that i can serve our country but sometimes i feel that here we need more development in our curriculum. | [placements]: in our college, placement criteria is average some students are getting job but some students are not getting job . as per as my knowledge the median package in our college is 11lpa and recruiter are amazon, microsoft etc. | [campus life]: my college campus is average or i would say that it's good there are greenery in our campus and we can engage many activities in our college,in our college seniors are very helpful they always help us in different activities.

[college infrastructure]: our college has best infrastructure and hostel facilities. it is one of the well known iits. institute is situated at a beautiful place of himachal pradesh with peaceful and full of greenary environment. classrooms are fully modernized and furnished. hostels are also provided with every facilities like water coolers with clean water, hygienic washrooms good food in mess etc. | [academics]: the level of exams in our college is a bit difficult. but the teachers are very good here, they are always available for us whenever we require them . the curriculum is set in such a way that we understand each and every thing very easily. every teacher here holds phd degree so there is no doubt in their qualification. labs are also very good here with each and every software required for students. | [placements]: iit mandi has one of the best placement records and students get good placements from here as well as internships also. highest package was of 70lpa till now that students of our department got from here. companies like samsung, qualcomm, google, microsoft, amazon, flipkart, zomato etc visits our institute for placements drive.

there was many extracurricular activities. there was cricket stadium,football stadium,basket ball court,long tennis court. there was a student activity centre for guide student for extra curriculum. students can participate in dance,music, modelling, photography etc. there was a gym and swimming pool. labs are also good and well maintained by college.the fees structure is semester fees 1.5 lacs. there are many type of hostel. non ac three seater 21000/-.non ac two seater 30000/-. ac three seater 40000/-. if you want attach bathroom you have to pay 5000/- per semester extra. mess fees 17500/-. this fees structure is according to 2018 batch.

[college infrastructure]: yes my university has all the great necessary infrastructure, equipment and facilities.classrooms are well maintained with good desk and smartboards, labs have all the recent updated systems and most of the equipments for core engineering are available. our campus has been shortlisted for the 5g lab by the pm of india. library is the best place in the university with great ambience..multiple canteens with multiple food stalls in affordable price | [academics]: i am a btech-electronics and communication engineering student currently in 3rd year. the teaching quality is nice with the professors having a great background of academics mostly qualified from iits and nits. yes the curriculum far better than other colleges. | [placements]: with a great strength of students of nearly 6000students passing out in a year which makes placement a more competitive. but yes many big companies visit our campus such as microsoft adobe amazon jp morgan oracle and many other. nearly 85%students were placed last year with a highest package of around 75lakhs and average around 6.5lpa | [campus life]: great networking place and a free environment. but the worst part is about being more strict in academics and engaging students in constant pressure through 24/7 by exams everytime
college_name: Vellore Institute of Technology Chennai Campus

review_text: chemical engineering is one of the oldest branches in mnnit allahabad, placement percentage is very high in the core but slightly poor in the software field. faculty are supportive and chill. classes are fewer as compared to mechanical and production engineering. the faculty is good and helpful, some are not good though. but overall it is good. seniors are quite helpful and guide the juniours when needed.fees are nearly the same in all the nits pan india, only the mess fees vary. mess fees are 15k per semester which is not included in the fee structure. scholarships are available. and tuition fees for sc, st, pwd, and students whose income is below 1 lac are fully waived.
