review_text: pros/cons: the computer labs, the vendhar knowledge center has been made a very modern a nd high tech lab with mac labs also available, fully air conditioned and thermal system for winters too. the rest of the things are decent in college. they have made an international hostel which has all good facilities but the cost is 300000 per annum which is high the infrastructure isn't that good in terms of fee. the fests aren't also that good , they invite local artists that are not good at all. the proffesors are decent, but they gove a lot of assignment at the last moment. the placement isnt also up to par in terms of college fee. they only have a red canteen, yellow canteen and green canteen. no good spots/ franchise to eat in college. | placement experience: students become eligible for placements from 6th sem onwards. many companies visit , the major being tcs, oracle, and others. the students have to go to the main campus for placement drive and around 10% students appearing in drives get placed instantly the rest have to wait or settle for less. i also plan to get placement after degree

the annual tech fest of kiit is known as the kiit fest and is very popular. every year big artists from all around the country visit our campus to perform. there are also many tech workshops held and extracurricular activities and cultural night programs during the fest. kiit fest is generally held from december to february. the kiit central library has world-renowned collection of journals and books. it has more than 100000+ books and 40000+ journals. the classrooms are modern and equipped with all the required amenities to serve the students. classrooms have screens, projectors, air conditioners, and whiteboards. kiit is well known for its sports facilities and many renowned superstars are alumni of kiit. kiit spends a lot to improve the sports infrastructure. kiit mun is a famous club here at kiit and very well-known all across the globe. other clubs include kaliope (anchoring), kreative eye (photography), and kfs (film society).the fees here at kiit are divided into different parts. the institutional fee is 175000 per semester and the hostel fees vary from 28000 to 60000 per semester depending on the type of hostel opted. the mess fee is fixed at 22500 and there is some other cost like exam registration etc. kiit also takes one-time money of 75000 for providing a laptop and blazer. the total cost to study at kiit varies from 15 to 20 lakhs. there are many bank loans that can be availed to study here at kiit and there are many scholarship awards. kiit provides scholarships to the top 1000 rank holders in kiit. they give 10000 rupees per month to the students. there are also stipends for securing top rank every year. i secured 3rd rank in the 3rd semester and received 5000 rupees per month for the next 6 months.

[college infrastructure]: the college firstly provides green environment and take cares of the cleanliness and hostle are really clean and provide you everything stationary and other basic can be taken from inside the college they provide all types of food items too | [academics]: professors take care of each and every student and feedback is taken after every month so that good quality of teaching can be provided they not only make studied interesting by different activity but also have extra activity so that children can learn in different ways | [placements]: the college have placement program every year and many children sits for that and get placement in amazing company like amazon infosis and aviation related also they go with fair play no partial way during placement | [campus life]: campus is really you can get everything inside there food court which provides various kind of food and cleanliness is maintained on college and you are provided really healthy environment

[college infrastructure]: the college has clean and well maintained environment. facilities includes library, huge play ground, good size classrooms, sports centers, hostel, smart board, good wifi speed in college as well as in hostel. in every laboratories they have enough equipment. | [academics]: i honestly want to say that they have well up-to-date syllabus in b tech. every year they are trying to add new trading things in syllabus for their students. teachers are very supportive and helpful. they have some very active hubs by students like ieee, csi etc. i was a part of ieee which is very active group in our college. | [placements]: 5placement of this college is above the average. they have good connections in recruiters. every year minimum 50 companies visited the campus, highest salary was rs. 43.17 lacs by adobe. in ece, total no. of offers is 508. placement department is very supportive for students. many of the companies provide internship offer also. | [campus life]: yes, my campus life is awesome. students takes part in various extracurricular activities. we have clubs like finance, marketing, hr and operations clubs. which provide a professional and social network for students pursuing their specialization in different areas. the campus is safe and have lots of trees. i really enjoyed the freshers party which was organized by jiit college.
college_name: Jaypee Institute of Information Technology Noida

review_text: [college infrastructure]: as infrastructure been considered, my college has a very good infrastructure facilities. each classrooms is been provided with a projector. all books in our college library is at good conditions. labs are well maintained. | [academics]: am studying in the electronics and communication department, 2nd year. as my department is considered all staffs are very talented , has more knowledge in their field. they are all student friendly. we can approach them with doubts without any hesitations. | [placements]: in my college ,90% of the students get placed each year. nearly 85% get placed at it jobs , remaining 15% at core companies. core companies would come to all departments and recruit only very few students. | [campus life]: as i had entered this college through a tamil nadu engineering counselling, through government aided seat my fee per year is easily affordable it's ?17000 per year. i feel my money's worth. they provides a good facilities for me in this fee.

[college infrastructure]: yeah our college had all the necessary infrastructure,facilities and equipment. the facilities are available in the class rooms, laboratories and libraries and they all are well maintained and available for us. the living space is so clean and hygenic. | [academics]: i have studied b.tech aerospace engineering. the quality of teaching is so high. yeah my curriculum is updated and includes all the recent developments in the fields and also my study made my job ready. | [placements]: yeah well our college has brilliant quality of placements and our college is well known for the huge placement availability.many students were placed with high salary package. the place process is so easy and pleasant to me | [campus life]: we had a best campus with best features.
college_name: Shanmugha Arts Science Technology Research and Academy Thanjavur

review_text: all the teachers are professionals and experts in their respective subjects. every subject teacher motivates students to ask questions and makes sure that they understood everything in the classroom. all of the teachers are good-natured, friendly people with whom you can interact freely and clear your doubts. the course curriculum is very good as we get to know about everything related to the field and gives knowledge about the industry. semester exam papers are well-set on a professional level.campus life is not so good overall it's boring as not many events take place. the campus crowd is quite good, guards make sure discipline is maintained on the campus and everyone is in a healthy environment. sports are also encouraged and students may try to get selected for the college's team. there are many social groups and clubs for students which are run by them only.

[college infrastructure]: having all modern classrooms, well-equipped laboratories, a huge library, and sports amenities, the college stands out on its own. the hostel consists of clean accommodation and proper hygienic food. the campus provides equal spirit to academics as well as extracurricular activities, truly making it an awesome learning environment fulfilled with all resources necessary for the students' own growth and development. | [academics]: the curriculum is well-structured and covers key industry trends, though some updates could enhance relevance. teaching quality is good, with knowledgeable faculty. it provides a solid foundation for jobs. | [placements]: placements are good, with the larger portion of students getting placed. the average salary is around 4.5 lpa to 5 lakh per annum, while the highest got 16.5 lpa. the entire process of placement smooth and very well organized, with the college support for conducting trainings, which proved to be useful for students, and companies were good in their participation. | [campus life]: the college has 14-acre campus offers modern labs, a vast library, sports facilities, and hostels. events like "yash" keep student life vibrant. teachers are supportive, and staff is helpful. the location is accessible and safe. hostel maintenance could improve, but overall, it provides a great learning environment.
college_name: Yeshwantrao Chavan College of Engineering Nagpur

review_text: vit has a good social environment. every month an event with regards to our carrier. yearly once there will be a sports event and we will get cash prizes. annually there will be an event called rivera in which celebrities participate. our university has a huge library where everything is digital. the amenities of the classroom change from blocks to blocks. the main block will have a good infrastructure bathroom while the smv has a mid-range washroom.the course curriculum is updated frequently so that you read the things that are needed for now. faculty behaviour changes with respect to their moods. as well as your internal marks. qualification for the faculty in vit is that you need a doctorate certificate and a good level of knowledge. the time period of one semester is 4-5 months. we have cat 1, cat 2, quizzes and digital assessment, and finally final assessment test.

the fee structure for 1st year is 219000 and goes to increase for the next years. scholarships are given to the toppers. students from weak financial backgrounds are also given scholarships. campus jobs are generally under professors of the departments in the which you are already studying. also, there is no restriction on working with other departments.all the faculties are helpful. there are mid-term examinations and end-term examinations for each semester. you have the clear end sem examination for no backlogs and if you are regular in your studies you will pass easily. just go through the syllabus thoroughly.

[college infrastructure]: infrastructure of college is okay all the facilities are available like well maintained praking for both bike and cars, water cooler, playground for cricket and football, computer lab, cafeteria is also okay etc. | [academics]: academics of dit university is also good all the teachers are supportive and well experienced they support all the students for their studies. the other staff of the college is also very good and cooperative. | [placements]: placements of the college is also good and okay. the companies visit the college for the placements are also good companies like capgemini, hcl, infosys etc. teachers of college also help the students for their placements. | [campus life]: campus of the college is also very good and campus life of the college is also good.

[college infrastructure]: building is ancient and prone to fall in earthquake. wifi facility is limited to professor only food is average in canteens hostel is messy and small.infrastructure of salt lake campus is below standard. | [academics]: professors are cooperative and they possess knowledge and i respect this aspect here. if you pay proper attention and do your duty responsibly you will be good enough to get a job in the end. i am in construction engineering and its records are good in terms of placement and also the number of students going foreign countries for further studies tell the same | [placements]: placement in this construction engineering branch is average as compared to other circuital branches. but if people learn a bit of coding in their 3rd year and become serious at right time they are highly likely to get a good salary in it companies like tcs capgemini bridge i2i wipro infosys etc | [campus life]: campus life is pretty ordinary in salt lake campus as campus is pretty small with no open air theatre or auditorium like main campus.just a cab ground to catch your attention and nothing else.only 1 canteen operational in whole campus is often crowded not to mention.

the only reason i took this course is integrated course is totally 5 years course so we can complete our pg degree in 5 years instead of 6 years the faculty are the well-experienced people to teach the teaching wise the faculties are too good exams are simple just have to prepare the material which was given by the faculty membersto my knowledge in my course your senior lot of persons placed in intel company for the internships for 7 lacs per annum package averagely. they do their internship for 6 months there and they perform well then they got jobs there itself

[college infrastructure]: our college has a very good infrastructure which helped us to learn practically. we had high-speed wi-fi, so we always explore new things through the internet. we had a central library which is one of the most favorite spots in our college. hostels are maintained pretty clean, but food in the mess was average. however, we have many food stalls on our campus where the food is tasty. | [academics]: i am in computer science stream. and each faculty explains very well. time table is also well organised, with lecture classes and tutorial classes. even master classes are also organised for better understanding of students. i am in second semester now, and my journey is going very well. | [placements]: by the end of the final semester, more than 90% of the students got placed. the highest salary package offered was 42 lpa, the average salary package offered was 4 to 5 lpa, and the lowest salary package offered was 2 lpa. top recruiting companies are cognizant, capgemini, bosch and some other startups. | [campus life]: i have heared many culbs and activities are going on college and you must join one of the culbs of it. you can have many online e-resources books through there website. lpu is known for the achievement of many students

[college infrastructure]: our college has all the necessary infrastructure and departments and all the required facilities such as central seminar hall for fests and program . we have wifi or lan services in hostels and neat and clean lecture theatres. | [academics]: it is good . the faculty provide good knowledge in practical labs and also in lectures but some faculty do not give required effort to curriculum . the curriculum updated after one semester so that we will what required in curriculum only. | [placements]: although we get an average salary of 8 lakh approximately but we have 100 percentage of placement in mechanical and also the placement process is easy so that everyone will get placed . we get placement in core as well as non core companies too. | [campus life]: this is the only reason why my college is good because we have 2 best beautiful campus in nits and also we have all the facilities such as open air theatre air conditionered lecture theaters different clubs for extra curriculum activities and gymnasium for physical fitness .
college_name: Dr B R Ambedkar National Institute of Technology Jalandhar

review_text: excellent faculty members, excellent infrastructure and good placement and it is in my city and there is only two college in my city which offers the course i am keen to take. ragging free campus is also one of the reason to take admission in this collegecurrently i am in 2nd year and due to this pandemic we have not got chance to of industrial exposure. the syllabus of curriculum was elaborately given for every semester at the beginning. the faculty were experienced and good.

[college infrastructure]: i remember the campus was quite small back then, mainly just the main building. my electronics and communication engineering department laboratories were functional and i had the equipments needed for my coursework but i did not find much open or green space for me to relax or hang out, making the environment feel compact. | [academics]: i feel the academic standard was very high. the syllabus was demanding and i learned a tremendous amount about my core subjects. most of my professors had a lot of knowledge and they pushed me hard, which i now realise was important for my career. | [placements]: i was very content with the placement opportunities presented to me and my batchmates. the placement cell worked hard, and most of the students were able to secure a job during the campus drive. i feel the college name carried significant weight and therefore we used to get a lot of placement options. | [campus life]: my campus life was extremely strict. i was required to wear a uniform, and the attendance rules were inflexible, leaving me little room for freedom or enjoyment. i feel i missed out on a typical college life experience as my time was strictly managed and focused on classroom attendance.
college_name: Institute of Engineering and Management Kolkata

review_text: [college infrastructure]: the facilities provided are good. the infrastructure of our college is well maintained. everything is well organized and maintained. the quality of the food provided in the hostel is pure and hygienic . | [academics]: teachers are also helpful and qualified and knowledgeable. they know that all the trends of the industry what new is happening in the industry and the teaching quality is also good all the doubts are cleared on the spot | [placements]: almost all the students were placed in our course in various companies the highest package offered is 15-17 lacs. the average package offered is 8-9 lacs. the lowest package offered is 5-7 lacs. top recruiting companies for our courses are tcs, amazon etc. all the students got an internship in our course.
college_name: Chitkara University Institute of Engineering and Technology Jhansla

review_text: the fee structure is very high it is one of the most expensive colleges in north india. some scholarships are also provided but it is limited only to a very few students some stipends are also provided to the students. though many scholarships are also provided to students in which there is full fee reimbursement is there.internships were offered by various companies like jp morgan, adobe and more stipends were above 50000 for technical branches projects like robotics arm and good dsa knowledge adds a benefit to the cv and enhances the placement growth for students as well as the college
college_name: Thapar Institute of Engineering and Technology - [Thapar University]

review_text: [college infrastructure]: the infrastructure of the college is very good. many buildings are newly made or renovated. each classroom has a projector installed in it for the visual learning of students. the library is well-equipped with the latest books in it. the hostel is also good but the fee is high. the mess food is average. there is a big sports ground in the college. tennis and basketball courts are also there. | [academics]: teachers are highly qualified. some of them are also ph.d. holders. sometimes, they start speaking in kannada which makes it difficult for other state students. there are 3 internals and 1 semester-end examination in each semester. the passing percentage is 40%. | [placements]: : i am a cse student. there is so much demand for cse engineers. the packages are also quite decent. the average is 10 lpa. top companies like amazon, wipro, tcs, and ibm visit the college. the highest package last year was about 51 lpa. internship opportunities are also good as bangalore is a tech hub.
college_name: Dayananda Sagar College of Engineering Bangalore

review_text: blitzschlag fest is the greatest fest in mnit jaipur. it is organized in february. many books are available in the library. you can read any book. also, asia's largest lecture hall is there in our college that is vltc ( vivekananda lecture theatre complex). every sport is present in our college like cricket, badminton, volleyball, football, basketball, table tennis, chess, etc. also a badminton court, volleyball court, etc. there are many clubs like robotics club, entrepreneur club, astronomy club, zine, and many more.mnit jaipur is one of the oldest colleges in rajasthan. and the electrical engineering course has good placements. the faculty is so friendly and helpful. in each course, there are approximately 120 students. and girls to boys ratio is 1:5. every faculty does ph.d. in their course. the exam is conducted twice a semester. the difficulty level is medium. in the overall semester, you have to gain 35% marks to pass the semester. class size: 120. course fees: inr 161000.

the fees are quite high as it is a government college and if we compare the fees of this college to other government colleges you see a huge difference between them. the scholarship is given to students there are 3 scholarships there and you are only eligible to take one scholarship from a college or from the government.the course is good if you are selecting it for higher studies and research purposes and also my college gives great opportunity and priority to the ep branch for placements and internships. and faculties are good and bad both it only depends on which course and which faculty is allotted to you.

[college infrastructure]: there are cctv system and wifi connection everywhere necessary. even the hostels are very clean and hygienic .our classrooms, libraries, laboratories are well equipped and there's a lot of importance for sports. | [academics]: one can get good exposure to outside world through the various amount of projects happening in the college.most of the teachers provide you with the knowledge you need and guidance regarding career. nice engineering college. | [placements]: packages offered are quite good with many students getting their dream packages.the highest packages are generally related to cs courses. i'll say placements are improving .more than 80% of the students were placed
college_name: Maulana Azad National Institute of Technology Bhopal

review_text: [college infrastructure]: our college is building our career, which in return help in our concentration and knowledge build-up. all facilities such as canteen, medical, sports and events are available with education as the prime focus. classrooms are modern and follow digital norms | [academics]: industry standards are maintained here with a good connection with the companies as collaborated. teachers are the pillars of our college who help in the career build-up of the students and are always ready to help students to achieve a greater good in life. | [placements]: our college provides placements to almost 95% of the students. the average salary package offered is 7 lpa, and students are attracted to our college for career build-up. company's standards are provided in our college with the expectation of the future.

the campus offers good placement opportunities for students enrolled in be program. companies visiting the campus hire for tech, non-tech, and core roles as well. however, tech opportunities are more relative to other domains. the highest offer made was around 40 lahks pa with an avg of 10 lakh pa. 70-80 percent of the batch gets hired easily during the campus placements.during my session in the college, the fee for pursuing be was around 4 lakh annually which includes the academic fee, the hostel, and the mess fee(2019-2023). but recently the management has introduced a hike in the fee structure. there is a system of financial support and scholarship in the college which is department-wise and rank-based.
college_name: Thapar Institute of Engineering and Technology - [Thapar University]

review_text: the campus is huge. nearly 250 acres. vit has one of the best infrastructures. every department has its school. it has a world-class library. so many books are available in the library. there is every type of sports ground here. state-level competitions are conducted on vit. there are so many clubs and chapters in it. more than 100 clubs and chapters. students can join any club.from the 7th semester, students are eligible for placement. more than 850 companies visit vit. most of them are tech-oriented. the core is very less. for use average package is around 10 lakh. psu also visits for core placement. for cse, it, ece, and eee placemats are 100 percent.

[college infrastructure]: facilities are good but the thing i like is the wi-fi. it used to work with quite good speed.classrooms are very good. library is very good. a lot of sitting capacity is there with acs and around 1-3 lakh books are there in it. | [academics]: all the teachers are well qualified, and of course knowledgeable as well. teaching quality is decent. some teachers teach very good.the course curriculum is relevant. semester exams are easy if you start studying from start but if you start to study 12 hrs before the exams then you will get almost 7 cgpa. | [placements]: the placements in are decent,since i am from mechanical, some of mechanical students got 1 crore package too .if you can work hard then you can get good ctc from the all companies. many get 35 lpa in campus placement, the lowest package we got is 4 lpa and the highest is 35 lpa.on an average, the percentage of placement is around 85 - 95%, a mechanical student can get almost all the roles from other companies from chemical to aerospace.

[college infrastructure]: nsut provides you with all the facilities and infrastructure that is needed, which includes ac lecture halls, sports ground, canteen, labs, clean washrooms, student activity centre, gym, etc. and not to forget a central library. | [academics]: nsut focuses on the academics the most. most of the faculty and professors are very well educated and well known to their subjects. they help students to understand the topic, provide them with the nessesary study material. in fact i have also seen professors taking classes in the weekends on the depand of students. | [placements]: i am a second year engineering students at nsut from ece department and as far as i know this university provides excellent placements to all the deserving students. many multinational, big it companies visit our campus every year and offer good packages to the students. | [campus life]: campus life is very very great, and the annual cultural fests makes it even more happening.
college_name: Netaji Subhas University of Technology New Delhi

review_text: [college infrastructure]: university's infrastructure is really huge there are 4 block naming a,b,c,d. in which 3 are academic block a,b,c and 1 is on campus hostel d. you will find hockey ,cricket,football grounds separately inclusive of 2 basketball courts and 1 volleyball courts. food court comprises of 13 different shops mainly of different cuisines ranging from south indian to chinese we have a maggie point called as hotspot. and campus is fully air conditioned(exceeded word limit lol). | [academics]: faculty are genuinely very sweet and some are very strict they won't even give you attendance if if you attend the classes. 90% of the facukty members are from iits or nits or from any goverment colleges. every faculty has a personal cabin so if you face any difficulty in asking a doubt in class you can report to faculty's cabin and can clear your doubt. | [placements]: suming up all the hardwork, seeing many ups and downs during your graduation or post graduation in this college you are gonna want a respected job in a respected company. so let me tell you are at the right place avg package this year2019 was 5.5 lakhs and highest was 35 lakhs amazon. almost every student placed at a reputated company after his/her final year few even before in 3rd year. | [campus life]: campus life is little bit of tiring as you have to travel alot to reach to college it is 19 kms away from main city and you will hardly find anything to enjoy,but if you have friends every road is easy and enjoyable. as there are frequent dj night and celbrity visits recently karthik aryan and sara ali khan came for love ajj kal promotions and many more celebritties have visted our college for promotions including akshay kumar

i joined this college by the jee main examination. i feel happy to come here. it gives the opportunity to show our relent in front of people and the environment of collage is too good. the teacher promotes the student.the course curriculum is good. it covers all the good topics which are useful for us in the future. it's not difficult but interesting to study. all work also understand by practical after the class.
college_name: Dr BR Ambedkar National Institute of Technology - [NIT]

review_text: [college infrastructure]: the infrastructure of the collage is decent and had all kinds of basic facilities that is required for the students so that they doesn't face any kind of problems in college and all are well maintained. campus is very hygiene. | [academics]: our college mainly focuses on the academic of the students . our college has good and friendly faculties . they gives full of knowledge to the students . the syllabus of our college is too lengthy and the college time is also so vast . | [placements]: in our college placements are fine.last year or before last year clearly i don't know but our college toped around 34 lakhs package.in our college the highest package is 34 lakhs and lowest is 7 lakhs package

[college infrastructure]: wi-fi labs and classrooms are genuinely fantastic. we have single sharing rooms with air conditioning. all hostels have thermal insulated walls and moreover they have indoor game facility room, gym as well. washrooms are clean. mess is hygienic as well. | [academics]: faculty members are really good here, they are very helpful and even help after the working hours. they have good experience as well. research opportunities here is also good, faculty members gives decent grades to students as well although some faculty members are very strict when it comes to grading part. | [placements]: placements are above average. almost all students from cse and electrical are placed and the highest package this year was 65 lacs per annum, the biggest recruiter is google. internship is also decent although pre placement offers are quite low here. top roles offered here were manager and senior executives. | [anything else]: placement are satisfied

campus life is just so great here at iit delhi. you make great friends here with whom you spend nights on campus. the campus itself is so beautiful and colorful. iit delhi also conducts its cultural /annual fest called rendezvous and tech fest called tryst. both fests take place around the feb-mar-apr period. the central library of iit delhi is one of the biggest libraries in india which contains almost any book you need. it also has the thesis of many students and old texts of great writers. our classes take place in the lecture hall complex (lhc) which was built only 10 years ago. it has one the most modern classrooms with charging points, projectors, a centralized ac system, speakers, etc. iitd focuses not only on academics but on co-curricular activities too. talking about sports, we have a hockey ground, basketball, volleyball ground, tennis lawn, football ground, cricket ground, sac (student activity center) which has tt, chess, etc. we also have dance, music, photography, and debatingi choose this course because i have a great interest in electrical engineering. faculty: the student ratio is pretty good. you have a great interaction with the professor under the condition that you participate well in the class discussions. faculties are highly educated having degrees from foreign institutes. some professors may not be able to convey what they want to teach. one of the reasons for this is that these professors are great at their knowledge but weak at conveying that knowledge. from the next semester, iit delhi would be starting 2 minor exam patterns, wherein we would have 2 mid-semester exams and 1 end semester exam along with quizzes and assignments. passing courses can be difficult if you don't pay attention to classes carefully.
college_name: IIT Delhi - Indian Institute of Technology [IITD]

review_text: [college infrastructure]: college inverter is very good in the other colleges in meerut. on the facilities are available like wi-fi enable and library and more than two and lakh books available for all courses and subjects. hostel are very affordable price and they are provide good condition in ac and cooler in the hostels. | [academics]: teachers give full support to students in study-related activities; they provide notes one at a time. in the way of teaching, teachers just focus on completing the syllabus any way. semesters are 6 months long, but due to pandemic corona, the semester was completed in just 3 months. | [placements]: there are mostly 70% placements that happen in the college. the highest package goes up to 8 lpa, whereas the lowest package is 2 lpa. the average package is around 3-3.5 lpa. the top recruiting companies in the it domain are cognizant and tcs. mostly, students go outside for internship opportunities, and the top roles in the domain include full stack developer, data engineer, and data analytics, etc.

talking about the fees ....the fees are high if considering government college ....it's around 2,20,000 per year and it increases around 10 percent yearly. many scholarships are available at college and also government provides scholarships or financial assistance for people with low family income and the reserved category. you can be among the top 5% of the students to get a 100% scholarship from the college.the best i can get on my rank is ece so i choose it .....btw in starting you will regret but later on, you don't have to... ece is among the top branches and also you will have better exposure to other things which you will realize later ... some faculty members came to teach and they are good but some faculty (the majority) don't mind whether you study or not and some come only to complete the syllabus

[college infrastructure]: yes the college have all the necessary infrastructure facilities and equipments... we have wifi facility smart teaching facility ac facility in our classrooms.. they all are properly used and are maintained regularly.. they are giving proper hygienic food with different menu or varieties of food everyday even milk is also provided on daily basis in various forms.. aslo they are giving a clean space to to have lunch to stay to play.. further facilities such as medical emergency tailor are also th | [academics]: i m persuing btech computer science because i am interested in leariy soft skills.. the quality to teaching is very good.. teachers always clears your doubt always ready to give you extra time if needed always there for you in any condition might related to academics or not..my curriculum gets updated timely and includes all the recent developments in the fields such as artificial intelligence machine learning and many more...yes what i study is making me ready for my job and to do my bestt..... | [placements]: the quality or placements in my college is very high they are giving us platform of high package through different companies to showcase our skills.. the highest salary offered is till now is 32 lac ... the average salary is around 4.5 lacs | [campus life]: campus life is very interested there are many activities to indulge in such as poetry dance music social work photography sports and there are many more clubs available according to your interest your can choose any of them

[college infrastructure]: most of the part of college is newly constructed, whether it is academic block, lecture hall, hostels playground, student activity centre, library, computer labs and many more in process. hight speed internet connection, world's best book bank add to its feathers. | [academics]: academic is closely related to iit kanpur and thus making it advanced education pattern in india. more emphasis on research and practical and project works rather than theory. professor use easy and practical approach to make students understand concepts. | [placements]: cse and ece branches students are placed 100% while mechanical also has an placement of 80%. most of the students are placed in research wings of highly reputable mnc including samsung, walmart and many more. minimum package irrespective of branch is 5 lakh per annum. | [campus life]: best ones because memories are created while within campus and natural scenery add to them.

review_text: [college infrastructure]: yes it have a good infrastructure and food atmosphere in the campus. all are well maintained and useful for practicals and let's ur gain knowledge. the living space is clean but the food in hostel is not upto the mark. | [academics]: i'm studying in ece communication engineering departmentand everything in good. the curriculum is updated and well developed the placements is going on 3rd year and and lots of companies are approaching us. | [placements]: the placement starts in 3rd year and going for in the final year projects and the placement are done in 3rd year of our college. and many companies including jp morgan approached. 99% students are placed. | [campus life]: the campus is very disciplined | [anything else]: nothing much

review_text: this was the best course available at my jee rank, so i chose this college over my choice of branch. the faculty-student ratio is about 1:20. most of the professors are pretty much well-qualified and experienced. but there is a chunk of young training assistants that are new to the job. exam time is the most hectic time of the year, the entire process is very tiresome and very strict. the evaluation is too strict too.moksha and innovision are the cultural and technical fest of nsut. conducted in march. one of the best college experiences is through the fest. the sports authority in college keeps on hosting regular sports weeks throughout the year.

[college infrastructure]: our college not have its own campus, it ranted a other college to manage the classes. this college have decent infrastructure with one smart board and one whiteboard. library have so many books of famous authors and poets. | [academics]: our college have good academia in each courses. with stability of studies with no pressure and also with no updates from many years. but it is easy to understand and little bit enough for job preparation. | [placements]: our college highest package in 2023 was 60 lpa and average package was around 15 to 16 lpa. more than 50% of the students have been placed till now and further processing for more placement is going on | [campus life]: our college have no campus but ranted campus is decent with two boys' hostels an one girls' hostel with accommodation of staff members of the college. ranted campus have ground for outdoor games such as football, volleyball, basketball and many more and also have area for indoor games such as carrom, table tennis, billiards, etc

review_text: campus life is well and good except for going out for outings. there are many clubs that you can join like csi, ieee, and many more. more than 10-12 clubs are here. the infrastructure is well and nice clean big buildings with life and 2 way stare with an amazing light view at night, big corridors big ac classrooms with projector and router in every single classroom.loan/ scholarship provisions: the fee structure is 660000 exclude hostels and hostels fees are around 33000 per semester including wifi, landry, and 4-time mess food. in this year 2022, it's a little delay from the university for placement purposes.

[college infrastructure]: rv college of engineering is renowned for its academic excellence and strong reputation in the field of engineering education. it's been good college and infrastructure is not quite good and it is a old college. | [academics]: rv college of engineering boasts a rigorous academic curriculum that is designed to impart both theoretical knowledge and practical skills to its students. the faculty members are highly qualified and experienced, often engaging students through innovative teaching methods and research-oriented approaches. the college places a strong emphasis on hands-on learning, with well-equipped laboratories and workshops where students can apply theoretical concepts to real-world problems. additionally, rvce offers opportunities for interdisciplinary learning and encourages students to participate in research projects and internships to gain practical experience in their respective fields. the academic environment at rvce is known for its competitiveness and excellence, preparing students to excel in their careers and make meaningful contributions to the field of engineering. | [placements]: rv college of engineering has a stellar track record when it comes to placements. the college boasts strong ties with industry leaders, which translates into excellent placement opportunities for its students. | [campus life]: campus life at rv college of engineering is vibrant and dynamic, offering students a rich and diverse experience beyond academics.

[college infrastructure]: the college infrastructure is really nice. however, because of the construction going on, the students have to take different routes to reach their block. the library and study space is really nice. the washrooms can be a little more clean. | [academics]: the teachers are good. the syllabus however is a little tough. for some students, it might feel like a cake walk. for me, personally, it is not. the teachers teach well and the smart boards are put to use. | [placements]: i am a first year b.tech student and i don't know much about the placements. according to the seniors, it is very good and almost every student gets placed. the salaries is of all ranges. all top companies do come here. | [campus life]: campus is good and the location is safe. however, there is a drain near the college. i wish it would be closed so it would be perfect

[college infrastructure]: lpu has all the necessary infrastructure, facilities and equipment... class has projectors installed and cctv is present for security reasons and also almost classes are air conditioned... if any problem arises you put a rms and your problem will be fixed... i very enthusiastically praise their rms system... wifi is also present for studies purpose and most of the things will go smooth with the speed of 3 mbps... it's good (for studies ???) library is huge... | [academics]: i'm a 4th year student in lpu.since the first day ,i haven't felt like something you have mentioned in question.there are gossips about lpu which is made by other university students just because they are jealous of lpu.i agree to the point that lpu doesn't have a spoonfeeding system. to a greater extent that helps each student to explore more about the subjects.after completion of each chapters teachers upload the necessary documents for the preparation of the respective chapters. | [placements]: almost 60% of the students got placed in our course. i heard that the highest salary package offered was of 8 lpa, and the lowest salary package offered was 3.5 lpa. goggle, microsoft, amazon, tcs, etc., and a lot of companies instructor visited and recruited the students they want. most of the students got placed from college. students were offered good roles and high salary packages. | [campus life]: the college campus is the best with many scenic sites and the whole campus is a site to watch and stay in. the students can engage in many different co-curricular activities such as dance, song, sports and there are many clubs and societies to join for students where they can engage with many different minds. the security in the college and the college campus in whole is liked by everyone. the locations in the campus are totally safe with security guards and cameras, ready for emergencies.

every year there is a fee hike in dtu and the hostel and mess charges also tend to increase annually, in recent time fee hike seems unjust for a reputed govt college like dtu. however, if you are from a reserved category you shall be all state, centre and university scholarship plus scholarship based on academic performance is also given i.e. 10000 rupees for securing department rank 1placements are good at dtu, more than 350 company visit the campus for placement including all top mnc and faang companies, if you are a student of cs or it related branch you should not be worried about the placements, however increasing strength of batches result in tough on-campus competition during placements

[college infrastructure]: vit, vellore, campus is 372 acres of land where 62 lac square feet is built up space. the college infrastructures are state of the art with built in classes and fully equipped labs for every branch. the college has beautiful grounds for the students to take enjoy, long with that there are 9 academic buildings each beautifully constructed and each building holding up branch and its facilities entirely. beautiful infrastructure. | [academics]: i am studying b.tech biotechnology and the reason i am pursuing is this is because my love for biology and medicine but i did not want to do medicine. vit holds up the bargain when it comes to biotechnology by providing labs that are fully equipped and offering various research opportunity. | [placements]: vit promises 100% placements and usually every one gets placed and get a good package. at vit there are super dream job which are the highest paid jobs and dream job that are just below them and there's a record that vit always maintain of getting its students placed. highest placement till now is 40lac per annum.

i chose cse, as this course is in high demand and has good opportunities. in our batch, we have 120 students in cse where the student-to-professor ratio is 20:1. the faculties are top-notch as they have a prestigious degree and their teaching style is far better and they are easily approachable. we have quiz exams each week and mid-sem and end sem in the interval of 1.5months. if you study properly throughout the semester the exams won't be difficult for you otherwise they will be hard or difficult to pass.we have one annual fest breeze conducted every year in the month of march. books are easily available in the library and are open from 8 am to 2 am. the classrooms are fully air-conditioned and lecture halls are extremely bigger. we have a total of 60 clubs in our university which are led by students( nexus, adventure club, tedx, equestrian club, etc)

aurora: this is a cultural festival held over a period of three days in the month of february/ march. aurora should not look upon as just a cultural event but as an attempt to promote the friendship, teamwork and alliances. our tech-fest name is infotsav: our college organises events that acknowledge technological innovation and it is conducted every year. our library is the central biggest library in which over 30000+ books are available & our library boasts almost 80 journal titles both from india and abroad. amenities in classrooms such as projector, laser light, chairs, fans, ac, black & whiteboard. we have a sports complex in which you can play all the sports such as badminton, table tennis, squash, one basketball court, one cricket ground & one football ground. in iiitm gwalior there are various club such as rotaract (which work for social welfare), uthaan(recreational club), sgm(helps poor children by teaching them), e-cell & ieee.i have chosen this college because of my interest in cs/it field and i want to pursue this interest. faculty: student ratio is 1: 20 due to the fewer number of branches in our college there is less intake of students and that's why our faculty: student ratio is well maintained. in iiitm gwalior all the faculty members are phd holders & have a grip on their concepts and teach us in the best way. generally, minor exams are conducted in the span of 2 months and after that major exams are conducted after 2 months then the next semester will be started. and if you give attention towards the classes and solved reference books then scoring a good cgpa will be a piece of cake for you.
college_name: Atal Bihari Vajpayee Indian Institute of Information Technology and Management - [ABVIIITM]

review_text: i choose this course because i am deeply interested in forming designs and someday, i want to establish my own brand the faculty is interactive but strict and they don't accept any excuse at the student's end to maintain a good reputation and maintain the 75% attendance. the professors are fairly qualified and have very interesting teaching methods but they require some contribution at the student's end the examination marks distribution criteria are fairly simple. firstly you have 2 minors (each of 20 marks)(happens every 40 days or so), then you have an end sem (50 marks) and the rest 10 marks are in the hands of the professor tutoring the course.life at the campus is pretty lively and very happening, there are lesser restrictions as you progress into next semester the infrastructure of the campus is above average but the classrooms and study rooms are well furnished and have an all-around nice vibe. there are a variety of sports and clubs but the infrastructure for open sports is poor.
college_name: Dr BR Ambedkar National Institute of Technology - [NIT]

[college infrastructure]: all classrooms are equipped with air conditioning and all laboratories are facilitated with wi-fi and air conditioning. there are separate clubs and lounges for coding. our library has a vast number of journals and books related to all branches and our library is digitalized and has an air conditioning facility. our campus hostel is good and maintained well, and the food quality is good. | [academics]: all faculty members in our college are well trained, knowledgeable, and teach well. the course curriculum is good, and there is a chance to choose from faculty members to every subject they get in our semester. many skill-oriented courses are included in the curriculum which makes students industry-ready, and semester exams are covered with all topics of a subject | [placements]: almost 80-85% of students are placed in mncs like microsoft, amazon, pwc, tcs, deloitte, pega, cognizant, adobe, etc. the highest salary package offered in our course is 42 lpa, and the average salary package offered in our course is 4.6 lpa. the lowest salary pacakge offered in our course is 3.6 lpa. almost 80% of students get internships in mncs. the top roles offered are system analyst, security analyst, sde, penetration tester, etc.

review_text: utsav is the annual fest of bmsce and it is conducted in the month of april we have a technical fest in september. my department has a department-level fest called nirman. we have a good library and reference section classrooms are big and airy evenly lit we have a pretty big indoor stadium but the outdoor ground is small you can visit bmsce_memes on instagram to have a sneak peekcivil engineering is an old engineering course you can get a lot of knowledge in this field but the placements are quite low so opt for other branches if you are looking for quick money. exams are timely and easy to moderate level just refer to what prof is saying and you can easily pass the subject.

[college infrastructure]: it is pretty good. spacious with a fully digitalized central library and an advanced computing centre, nit silchar makes into the top nits in terms of its infrastructures and facilities. however, the internet speed at some of the hostels is below average ranging from about 0.5 mbps to about 1 mbps. the internet speeds at the library and computer centres are quite satisfactory though. | [academics]: this is a question which will definitely receive mixed reactions. of course the academics are quite good. but the class durations sometimes becomes quite hectic. and there are a few professors who actually are good at teaching. the rest of them can be just rated as average in terms of colleges. one can do everything in the campus, just they need to maintain a 75% attendance. | [placements]: check the official website and judge the placement scenario accordingly. while the average is a fairly decent 15-24 lpa, the highest touches to about 80 lpa (just rough figures as per current statistics). almost every big tech company visits the campus during the placement season. | [campus life]: campus life is awesome. you might require a cycle to explore the whole campus of about 650 acres. its beauty is more exaggerated by the beautiful lakes inside the campus. furthermore the lush green trees make the campus a heaven for the students. not only that, the college has various club activities going on almost every month of the year which helps the students to follow their passions apart from engineering.

the fest season starts from mid to late january and goes on till april. there are several societies that conduct their fests and events. but the biggest is engifest which is the main fest of the university. many books and journals are available in the library.i chose this course since it is the easiest bachelor of technology course at delhi technological university. the faculty-student ratio is good. we have a batch of 60-70 students, with 5 faculties for all 5 papers. the faculties are highly qualified.

[college infrastructure]: my college is having a good space for the students, it has a nice looking campus. in the campus itself hostels are their for both boys and girls also mess is their. the infrastructure can be improved for sure but it is ok for now. | [academics]: i would review the academic culture at my college to be more then average. and definitely opportunities are their for the seekers. teachers are good in all the branches and also good knowledge is given to the students during the course. | [placements]: average placements records i would say because the dream company opportunities are less. off course you can crack them off-campus. the average package for my branch last year was 7-8 lpa, but some students got really good package in it sector.
college_name: Ajay Kumar Garg Engineering College Ghaziabad

review_text: moksha is the annual cultural fest held in match. resonance is a tech fest. there is a central library with over 40,000 books including every subject and genre. we have a sports complex with a well-equipped basketball court, badminton court, tt room volleyball court, cricket ground, kabaddi ground, and tracks. nsutx app is there for being updated on attendance, apps for getting pg, and the devcomm site is there.because i was interested in this. student-faculty ratio is 70:1 teachers are highly qualified. two of my professors are iitians. we get an academic calendar at the beginning of the semester and every detail about exams and various academic events is given there.

[college infrastructure]: the infrastructure of the college is good and i'm getting the best facilities from here such as the wifi smartbiard laboratories lab and library in the college and also having the clean and hygenic space | [academics]: here i'm studying mba because i want to increase my management knowledge and the quality of the teaching is good and all the faculty member are well educated and they are giving the practical knowledge by giving the real life example | [placements]: the placement criteria in this college is good and well maintained most of the students got placed and getting the best package and they also provide the training and placement team to train the students to the interview | [campus life]: here i'm enjoying the best part of my life and getting the good experience here all the faculty member and the students are friendly in nature and they are also supportive to the other students of the college

[college infrastructure]: no not all hostel charge is too high mess food is worst wifi speed is too low the quality of placement is good at college few of the students are placed average salary offered is twa to three lakhs and highest salary is fifty lakhs offered overall package is fine it needs more improvement | [academics]: academic is good the quality of placement is good at college few of the students are placed average salary offered is twa to three lakhs and highest salary is fifty lakhs offered overall package is fine it needs more improvement | [placements]: the quality of placement is good at college few of the students are placed average salary offered is twa to three lakhs and highest salary is fifty lakhs offered overall package is fine it needs more improvement | [campus life]: good

pros/cons: campus area and the beauty , there is lot of trees and plants in the college faculty is very supportive and helpful of my branch they always help us college placement were very good and it's avg package is 15.63 lpa local area near the campus is not so good means around after 2 km from the college goons area start | placement experience: there is good campus placement offers around 400+ companies recruit students on various roles from here and offer good amount of money last year the highest package is from atlassion or ebullient security of around 88lpa

fees are too much for the general category students. it is around 2,19,000 for all but other category students get a scholarship of 50% from the college side. there are various other scholarships provided by external firms and associations. for example:- jio foundation.i choose the information technology branch as i was really interested in artificial intelligence and courses related to computers. the faculty are really helpful to the students. provide notes and are well qualified. first and second sem exams are a bit faster.

pros/cons: every faculty is open for any doubt of students in the university. neither of the student is discriminated over any particular thing university is very beautiful. the campus is filled with trees, plants and flowers. every area inside the campus is beutifully maintained by workers. students from different states of india come to study in my university. since it is an engineering college, girl is to boy ratio is 4:1 faculties try to complete the syllabus in very fast speed | placement experience: bit provides various chances for placement in different types of companies majorly in india. different types of companies come to our university in order to find good and intelligent employees for their companyies. students are eligible for campus placement in the 3rd or 4th year of their courses. companies such as cipla, microsoft, wipro come for placements of students. highest average package is 5100000 per annum and lowest package is 500000 per annum.
college_name: Birla Institute of Technology - [BIT Mesra], Ranchi

review_text: pros/cons: there are less distractions in srinagar like there are no clubs and all, so you can focus on your studies better and also the environment here is good and clean. there is less hectic schedule for cse branch, there is very less college pressure so you have a lot of time to explore different opportunities. placements are decent for cse branch (in it sector). there is no permanent campus like other nits of iits. college schedule is hectic for ece and eee branch, you will have not much time for other activities. placements are not so good for branches other than cse. | placement experience: placements are decent for cse branch. but for other baranches very few companies visit on campus. also for other branches your cgpa should be good to be eligible for companies.if you have interest in your core branch(other than cse) than it is better to preparing for gate in early stage(like start preparing from 2nd year).
college_name: National Institute of Technology - [NIT] Uttarakhand, Srinagar Garhwal

review_text: [college infrastructure]: the college infrastructure is new and therefore some more development is required which will be done in upcoming years of course. otherwise the college provides proper classrooms, library, reading rooms, canteen, amphitheatre, etc. | [academics]: the academics is the best part of this college. it provides various courses which includes core branches like ece and cse and specialisation like human gaming, data science, ai and ml and iot. standard cgpa criteria is followed for the semester exams held every semester. | [placements]: the placement records have been very encouraging from iiit n. despite being a young institute it has cemented it's position with the top iiit's of country with average packages going upto 14 lpa and highest being 89 lpa. | [campus life]: there is an active campus life in the college with various activities like annual institute gathering (kshitij), technical fest( tantrafiesta) and cultural fest (abhivyakti ). there are also numerous clubs which regularly organise different events.
college_name: Indian Institute of Information Technology Nagpur

review_text: [college infrastructure]: classes of 1st and 2nd-year b.tech students are held in the old gallery, which remains overcrowded when all the students attend the course. for 3rd and 4th year students, classes are stored in the new gallery, which has better capacity than the old one. | [academics]: like all other nits and iits, you will get some professors with whom you will resonate while not with others. if you connect well with seniors and faculties, you may get various co-curricular opportunities (like research, etc.) | [placements]: in general, placements are good. for more details, you may refer to the official nit silchar's training and placement cell page on linkedin. even during the tough times of recession, our tnp cell actively works to bring companies to campus. | [campus life]: the campus is almost ragging-free. the anti-ragging committee is quite strict here.

pros/cons: teachers are supportive mentorship qualities are good . there are 4 workshops for mechanical branch more than any other branch the campus location is perfect mountains and clouds during rain. infrastructure is not good need improvment . mess and hostel gaurds are not supportive sometimes they sre drunked . delay on solving our problems . poor classes infrastructure . | placement experience: after 8 semester students become eligible for campus placement but he may get pre placement offer of he so talented l&t , tech mahindra , tata, bel, infyosis , wipe out, powegrid, microsoft, etc companies have 147 placement offers. 80 percent are placed. my plans are to do business after graduation.

[college infrastructure]: the college infrastructure is really good the campus is big, clean, and well-maintained classrooms, labs, and libraries are modern and fully equipped. wi-fi and other facilities are also available everywhere | [academics]: academics at lpu are good. most of the teachers are helpful and explain the topics well. the syllabus is updated and focuses on both theory and practical. exams are regular and attendance is also important | [placements]: placements at lpu are decent. many companies visit the campus like infosys, wipro, capgemini, etc.. some students get high packages, especially in tech roles. you need good skills to get placed well.

[college infrastructure]: the infrastructure at vit college in my opinion is rather remarkable and offers a simulating atmosphere for both academic and personal development. the campus is greenery and aesthetic landscaping contribute to visually pleasing atmosphere. the reach of modern technology and resources improves the educational experience even more by enabling student to investigate and apply theoretical knowledge in real world context. the library has wide range of books, literature, newspaper and digital resources meets student in different needs and interest. vit hostel facilities provide excellent accommodation and clean dorms encouraging student interaction with others and sense of unity. there is physical fitness, extracurricular activities which enables student to have a fun college life as well as a refreshing balance to academic life. | [academics]: my academic experience in vit was a revolution. i wouldn't say it was good or bad because everything depends entirely on us and how we handle it. sure, they give is facilities and faculty who are experts in their field, but as a student, all you should do is work hard to succeed in many areas. for my subject they do teach us how to apply theoretical knowledge to practical, but in certain topics in the curriculum that need to improve. | [placements]: the quality of placements is good in vit. the only drawback in vit placement is that, although it is an industry requirement of engineering student, they are given the first preference compared to student form another stream. they provide us with guidance and assistance in preparing for the workforce, but ultimately, it's up to you to put extra effort to land in a job. if you do well in your acedemic and have interest outside your field, you will have opportunities to advance your career. | [campus life]: the campus life at vit is lively and exciting. diverse cultural events, extra circular activities and supportive community create unforgettable experience and memories.

a hundred percent placement is in the final year. every student gets placed in the final year. the minimum package for the student is 19,00,00 per annum. microsoft's amazon tcs. these companies are coming for placements. all of the students of the college will get +2 different companies more than a hundred companies.classrooms are the very best quality. they are very well maintained and with high technology of wifi used to give better internet access. sports are very good level. you can find coaches for every game and they are well-trained sportspersons. you have to go through all details.

i wanted to pursue some courses that had wide scope but that much core coding. so ece was my good-to-go course. the faculty to students is such that 2 batches study in the same class throughout 1 and 2 years so it remains 40-50:1. mostly they have faculty who have done mtech or phd from iits but not bachelor's, and some faculty are from international colleges also. the exams happen 3 times a semester. 1st after 1.5 months of start of semester, 2nd after 2.5 and 3rd after 3.5. the time after the start of the semester is the peaceful one other than its all hustle day and night. too much academic pressure.hardly 5-10 companies visited for internship opportunities and many or most students did not even get a chance to apply for the internship. also, the college did not tell you that there is a specialization certificate in your own core field that you get after completing certain courses in a certain semester of your own domain.
college_name: Jaypee Institute of Information Technology University - [JIIT]

review_text: [college infrastructure]: good faculty. enough books in the library, well lit classroom, enough sitting facilities. clean environment to eat and study places. well equiped library with fast wifi facilities and access to great amount of books online | [academics]: i m doing my mba in marketing. the curriculum is updated and job ready. they make you job ready and ready to take any challenges in your way. case studies are done eleborately to develop overall thinking | [placements]: placements were good till the last year. but this year the conditions are not good. due to the bad economic conditions placement scenerio has been not that up to the mark as aspected.but we do hope the scene changes | [campus life]: campus life is great. surrounded in greenery and lakes. campus has great places to study in the open and also good for open walks and exercises. food options are available with hygiene factor taken in mind.

[college infrastructure]: yes our college has all necessary infrastructure, facilities and equipment. . mnits lecture hall vltc is asia's biggest lecture hall with all classes having well air-conditioning system ,projectors ,etc. it has great lan and wifi speed in campus. | [academics]: quality of teaching is nice with great curriculum. but slight update need to be done in that .we do have many clubs -technical and non technical which encourage every student to develop some skills..... | [placements]: placements are good. approx more than 75% students gets placed every year and of average package or more than 7-8 lakhs. highest package was around 42 lakh last year. even if you are average student, you will have job when you pass out

review_text: there are a lot of fests that are conducted each year in the months of november december february april like the adhyaay cultural fest which has a lot of fun singing, dancing, comedy nights, and stand-up comedy. hige availability of books in the central library which is fully air-conditioned and will make you experience kashmir in summer 4 books are issued to each one.from the 8th semester, a lot of companies visited oracle, microsoft, amazon, flipkart, sbi, l and t, tata, havells, asian paints, and a lot more. 61.7 lakhs is the highest offer given. 87% of students get placed. to become an ias officer.

[college infrastructure]: we have exceptional wi-fi with a high-speed of about 100 mb/s and having no limit on use. works 24/7. classes are also high-tech. every class is fully ac and has a projector. iit kanpur library has a collection of more than 4,00,000 volumes and subscriptions to more than periodicals. it opens till 12pm-midnight. labs at iit kanpur has every facility a researcher look for we have a computer center which is open for all.opens every time | [academics]: professors are exceptionally qualified here. they know their domain very much. professors have their ongoing projects and some of the professor developed so many thing to be used in daily life. course curriculum is very much relevant and professor are talented and it also changes according to the industry demand. student here are taught and trained so well to be industry compatible. | [placements]: in material science and engineering most of the student got placed last year with an average package of 12-18 lacs. top recruiting companies include goldman sachs, axis bank, accenture, american express, many more. some of the students also got ppo offers from gs, itc,it non it. branch is so flexible. you could go for other profiles too. some people also got placed in analytics, finance and other things too.

pros/cons: i like the student staff interaction and i like the club activities. the college campus is small and in a very rural place | placement experience: the placement is well.most placement are in bosch, amazon, flipkart, facebook,ibm, hitachi, oracle . if no placement are available the average package is 11 lakh outside package are good my plans for future is still unknown

review_text: [college infrastructure]: the infrastructure is best of my college . my college has separate halls for first year and separate building for lecture theatre which are air conditionered and neat and clean . hostels are provided with wifi facilities well maintained library . | [academics]: this is average the faculty not provide enough facilities for our placements we need to put more effort in our core teams like aavishkar daksh etc but even doing this the faculty doesn't provide attendance to us . | [placements]: placements are good but this is on our efforts we need to work hard in core teams and need to maintain attendance even then we can get placement in core companies like honda etc. if we don't do that we get an average placement of 7 lakh | [campus life]: the awesome college life . all the festivals are celebrated in hostels also college provide technical and cultural festivals in which stars also invited last year when i was in 1 year hardy sandhu came on star night of techniti our technical fests
college_name: Dr B R Ambedkar National Institute of Technology Jalandhar

review_text: the faculty of iits are well known by everybody and are quite educated to a great level but most of them are much focused towards their research and other stuff and that's why they make the lecture part quite boring but some of them are good at teaching and makes lecture very interesting. in my course, i found have met till date only 2 professors to be having teaching attitude. overall the faculties are well educated and are able to handle all workload of academics and are well enthusiastic for the research part which is quite necessary for our nation.in my college, admission is through jee - advanced examination conducted by different iits under jee council board. there were two steps both having merit list, first one was jee main conducted by mhrd, nta then comes jee_advanced and those students who qualified in a specific range of ranks are proceeded further for admission in iits through jossa counselling and various steps including document verification and ordering of your preferences of iits, and finally authorised letter by jossa that is required during admission process in iit.
college_name: IIT Guwahati - Indian Institute of Technology - [IITG]

review_text: [college infrastructure]: all the facilities are available in the university and everything is very easily accessible using the lpu touch android app. everything is well maintained and very punctual. equipments or smart boards are available in the classes required, the library has all the books as well as online support for accessing the books. | [academics]: the course curriculum is updated regularly and the course co-ordinator makes everything clear including the credits, number of lectures and tutorials and total number of class assessments and exams. there is lpu live app for easy communication between teachers and students which is very helpful. | [placements]: every year many students get placed in well reputed companies, recently the highest placement record is of 42 lacs from microsoft to a cse branch student. college supports all students for placement and internships and provides many opportunities to everyone. | [campus life]: university has uni hospital for all emergencies and it's very easily accessible. the university is prepared for all types of situations and people are very helpful. seniors really support juniors and joining various clubs makes campus life very interactive and fun.

[college infrastructure]: we have all the necessary infrastructure. we have a very big sports centre with gym and equipments . we have a smart class and wifi in every nook and corner of the college. everything is utilized and cleaned regularly. we also have biometric attendance. | [academics]: biotechnology because it interests me. we have all phd doctors who teach us . they not only give us bookish knowledge but also knowledge of industrial and job aspects. teachers maintain punctuality and quality of teaching is improved a lot by smart classes. | [placements]: we have atleast 90 percent placement. we get all the big companies like nestle and britannia with good placements. also help for phd preparation. not only b.tech but also have dual degree courses for our added banefit | [campus life]: we enjoy our campus life with a little strictness and full enjoyment

review_text: [college infrastructure]: college is very good, college in duct with various facilities which make it unique and advanced, laboratory are fully equipped and properly built, wi-fi is available in some classes, everything is well maintained, food canteen is very good and tasty food is offered by the canteen, space is clean. | [academics]: academics are average, there is very high professional and well experienced faculty who gives lecture to us, colleges doing development in various fields like technology sports and so on, yes this is study makes us job ready. | [placements]: college placement is very good, highest package offered is 9 lakh rupees per annum, it was offered to computer science student by a service based company, placement is easy and pleasant, colleges very supported in placement. | [campus life]: everything is the best feature of college , teacher are very supportive, just walk in the campus and enjoy your life, location is ghaziabad very safe location.

review_text: [college infrastructure]: college has all the necessary infrastructure, facilities and equipments required to grow and learn. in classroom we have wifi, smart board, projector. all of them are well maintained. living space and food are also hygienic | [academics]: i have studied b.e. computer engineering. reason of choosing this course is good placemens for computer science students. quality of teaching is decent. curriculum is up to date with the inclusion of all latest trending fields like ai, ml, etc | [placements]: quality of placement is pretty good. overall percentage of placement across all streams is around 80. for computer engineering it is above 95. highest salary package is 32 lac ctc , offered by d.e shaw in computer engineering stream.
