review_text: [college infrastructure]: college infrastructure is good and huge it's made of modern structure. classrooms and labs having all the basic equipments. hostels are good and campus have fully wifi coverage. canteen is favourite spot can celebrate all the things. library has all the journals and books. | [academics]: as per my interest i choosed this course electrical engineering which is basic need of world. the curriculum updated and having lot of new researches. it job oriented course and if you have good skills you will get placement in good companies . | [placements]: placement drive it's working on soft skills and mock interviews. chitkara have good collaborations with local and big mnc's provide placement to students. the average package in my course is 3 to 4 lacs .i have plan study abroad in europe | [campus life]: missing college days.

[college infrastructure]: great infrastructure. all buildings are equipped with well structured classrooms, labs and other amenities. it also has space for conducting extracurricular activities like sports and cultural events. | [academics]: there are plenty of resources to enhance academics. there are many labs and research facilities available for students to improve their knowledge and to encourage in depth learning and to apply the theory in real world projects. | [placements]: placements are decent. depends on the branch and how one perform individually. many top companies from different industries come for placements. as there is considerable amount of people it is necessary to have relevant skill set as placements can become competitive.

the college campus is good. but the government must take measures to control the monkeys,leopards,pythons,cows, which causes a lot of disturbances in classes, the leopards sometimes roams freely in the campus and sometimes cow dung is found in the classrooms. the students and the staff is average. it is located in a beautiful place covered with greenery. yes,it can handle emergencies to some extent.since assam engineering college is one of the oldest colleges in assam, the infrastructure is poor. the buildings are old,the laboratory materials are not good, bathrooms are not well maintained and same goes for the hostels too,wi-fi doesn't work properly, sports materials are not good. and regarding hygienty in hostels, it is really poor.

[college infrastructure]: the college has a great infrastructure with all the necessary requisites like a computer centre, an innovation and incubation cell , entrepreneurship cell, sports complex , open air theatre and most importantly asia's largest lecture theatre complex. | [academics]: i am pursuing metallurgical and material engineering as i have a profound interest in materials and i want to pursue my research work in this field. the quality of teaching is excellent. the faculty provides an amazing learning experience. | [placements]: the quality of placements has been fairly good. around 80% of the students get placed with good job security and a great future. the highest paid salary package goes upto 50lpa in the computer science stream. | [campus life]: extending upto an area of 300 acres of lush greenery, the campus of the institute is imaginatively laid out with a picturesque landscape. it presents a spectacle of harmony in modern architecture, natural beauty which enthralls and inspires.

review_text: from the 4th semester students are eligible for campus placements and all the huge companies definitely visit this college, last year the highest package is 50 lakhs per annum which is quite high. in cse department, there is almost 100% of placement took place.i'm not actually placed yet, but i have seen my seniors getting placed in intel, zoro tata, etc. they would have finished the project by 6th sem and placed on 10 lakhs per annum on average. skills spoke as collage only provided the opportunity.

[college infrastructure]: our college infrastructure is quite decent. there are a lot of open spaces and well maintained greenery. the facilities are all present including laboratories, libraries and hostels. i like the gym. the food is delicious in my opinion. | [academics]: the teachers are all very experienced and of high qualifications. they regularly update the syllabus since the world of computer is ever-growing in a fast pace. apart from our core subjects, they teach us communication skills which i think is very essential for future as well as jobs. | [placements]: i'm not so sure about this since i'm only in the 1st year. but i guess getting placed in good companies depends on self as well. the better one performs the better jobs will be offered by big companies. | [campus life]: the teachers and staff are friendly and helpful. the boys nri hostel warden is very friendly and kind.

review_text: [college infrastructure]: yes, this university have an amazing extraordinary infrastructure all around. all the facilities are available in the classroom such as enabled wifi, electric socket and cable to keep laptops fully charged. | [academics]: we have been provided best quality and quantity education at our university. every curriculum is updated on the lpu ums where we are provided with each and every information required to know about the curriculum. | [placements]: we have got to know about its recent placements by the respected faculty members of this university. even we keep on attending sessions made available for us in auditorium to get updated about the news of placement cells.

[college infrastructure]: the infrastructure of the college is very good, the washrooms are clean and all the classrooms, including the library, are fully ac. there is a collection of thousands of books in the library which is open till 12 am midnight and till 2 am during exams. the food in the mess is good. | [academics]: the faculty of the university is great, they have good knowledge of their subjects. all faculty members are from renowned universities and are really very helpful. the course includes semester exams followed by quizzes, lab exams, viva, and project works in between. | [placements]: the placements are great, as far as i know. many seniors have been placed with an average package of 15-16 lpa. many of them are offered 22-25 lpa packages as well. the top companies visiting campus are oracle, microsoft,tcs, dell, etc. | [anything else]: college is good...nice campus..

[college infrastructure]: infrastructure is okay. necessary equipment aretherebuttime to time it needs repair causing it to be a nuisance for the faculty and students. maintenance of laboratory items are not good at all. living spaces are clean. food hygiene is fine. | [academics]: i took production as my major. quality of teaching depends upon who takes the class. the senior professors are good but not so with the temporary faculty. my curriculum is flexible. updates every year. | [placements]: students are placed 100% every year without fail. the college do take this quite seriously and prepare the students for interviews before the actual placements. highest salary offered was above 15 lakhs. | [campus life]: campus is run by students. there are alot of events conducted throughout the year that makes us to showcase our competitiveness via sports, technology, dance, singing etc. the campus is 45 mins away from the city. in terms of medical emergencies, we have a hospital in our campus for first degree injuries and other general checkup. if it's serious, we have a hospital that is 15 mins away. the campus is safe as long as you don't wander in the dark areas especially for girls.

well this is something, which really needs to be worked upon, as campus placements are very less for tech field, and almost zero for core branches. here companies do visit, but at a very bad rate. on campus placements do happen, but the amount is not very fair. the average package is of about 3 to 4 lpa. something which is good here is that, students take off campus jobs from here, and this college also provides, quite a number of good ranks of gate exam from core branches. yes, if you study here, and have a dream of having job, then you need to work on your skills, so that you can grab off campus jobs. in recent years, companies like infoysis, tca, etc have visited here, and provided employment to students. but it's not constant. nearly 50-60 percent of students from cse and it get placed from here, but highest package won't go above 6 lpa on campus. i do look forward for an off campus job, with decent salary from here. fee here, for whole year, for cse, cse ai, and is 10400, while for the core branches, it's 84400 per annum. fee structure is quite decent, because there is no extra money required, once the fee payment is done, nothing else is required. as per taking my experience, apart from fee, if you live in hostel here, your per semester expenses can reach upto 5-6 thousands apart from fee payment. here, college provides internships, which are unpaid, and if you want, you can go for paid internships too, but for that, you need to help yourself, and college won't be providing as such assistance. people here are getting off campus jobs mostly, and some of them are also getting on campus jobs, but they are little in amount. about 3-4 lakhs can be considered the average placement here, which is offered to limited students, so job opportunity is not very well over here. for jobs, you mostly need to rely on off campus jobs opportunities.
college_name: University Institute of Engineering and Technology - [UIET]

review_text: the faculty in bennett is amazing. all have phd qualifications from very good institutions. the teachers are really good and friendly over here and the student and faculty ratio is very less so we get more time to interact. i got admission in this college through my jee marks and it is also offered through 12 th???s board results. inspire pf being selected in many other institutions i selected bennett because of its outstanding curriculum.

[college infrastructure]: fabulous no doubt, full with greenery and cleanliness is their in the college. the facilities for students to develop in sports are also good.yes internet connectivity is their and you can eat from mess it is not very bad for sure. | [academics]: the teachers in research are very good they help students a lot especially if you are doing your phd. so, you should focus on your research papers and their quality more. the curriculum is changed according to any updation. | [placements]: yes no doubt placements of iit delhi are very amazing but you can also opt to go deep into a subject like myself. the placement process is easy and very pleasant and a good no. of students opt for it... thanks!...

[college infrastructure]: infrastructure is awesome, inside campus there is hospital,mall, food court etc all the important things are available inside the campus . the campus is spread in more than 600 acre. i really advice that you should to visit the campus atleast once. | [academics]: academics are good, faculty are well trained and knowledgeable. their academic are fully based on industry demand. whats need to get placed in corporate, university provides. here , more than 600 companies came for placement like google,amazon, microsoft, capgemini, cognizant...etc | [placements]: according to my point of view placement facility are outstanding but some are not support it because here one important thing that people doesn't like that if you have above 5/10 cgpa then only you will eligible for placement. once you are eligible for placement, 90% chances that you will definitely placed. | [campus life]: campus life are such a awesome ...once you enter the campus then definitely you will miss it. everything that you wants all are provided inside the campus, shopping , hospital, domino's, subway etc ...most of the brand are available here.

[college infrastructure]: this university have best infrastructure. it gives good environment for study and also for sports. there is an indoor stadium with all the facilities are well equipped and maintained. i really feel good here . i miss it very much | [academics]: i am persuing bsc hons. agriculture here . all the teacher are good and supportive. they all are always ready to help us. they behave like friends and always ready to help out from any problem. there are high quality of teaching style. | [placements]: good placement cell work in this university. all the average and good level students can be prepared for doing job by placement cell of this university. most of the students can get placement in good company with good salary package. | [campus life]: home like campus life , no raging , all students can live like a family.nice environment for study and fun and play . all the staffs are always ready to help us at any time. so i am very happy with this university.

students after 6th semester are eligible for the placements there are 172 companies visiting in college every year. there are every type of company visits in college like a mass recruiter - mass recruiter made offers - 20-30 normal recruiter - 5-8 big tech companies like apple microsoft - 1-3 the highest package for the tech profile - is 1.25 cr or usd 207750 and avg package for the tech profile is 14-18 lpa the highest package for a non-tech profile - is 26 lpa and avg package for a non-tech profile is 10-12lpa till last year nsut claims 100% placements. this year the placement is going on till now. my plan after the degree is to join the company and experience the work culture. after that, i will pursue my higher education.fees for newly admitted students- 1st year - 190000 (tuition fee - 59500; university fee - 74750; remaining extra services and charges) 2nd year - 206000(tuition fee-64250 ; university fee-80250 ; remaining extra services and charges) 3rd year - 219000(tuition fee -69575; university fee - 86275 ; remaining extra services and charges) 4th year - 229000(tuition fee- 73000; university fee - 73000 ; remaining extra services and charges) there is financial assistance to the students of the university pursuing higher education - chattra vittiya sahayata exam protsahan kosh (cvspk) college provides placement and internships also i got job in e&y

[college infrastructure]: it has all necessary infrastructure, facilities and equipment which is easily accessible by students and teachers. there is good quality of wifi connection and has smartboards . there is well organised library, well equipped laboratories, sports center and good hostel facility. everything is well maintained. there is also facilities of canteen and food is hygienic. | [academics]: i'm persuing be biotechnology as i'm very interested in this course. there are professors with high qualifications . the curriculum is well organised and is very helpful for future aspects. it has all recent developments. | [placements]: compared to other departments be biotechnology placements is not up to the mark. only 2-3 companies come for placements and hire very less number of people. highest salary package is around 3lpa. i'm not satisfied with placement. | [campus life]: campus is the best. there are various activities arranged for students. fests are organised. oye college campus is very safe.

[college infrastructure]: great infrastructure , good sports facilities , badminton , tenis , volleyball ground everthing is provided in our college . college also provides with good amount of theatres and other areas for students to perform . we have seperate libraries for different department | [academics]: my branch is electronic and electrical engineering . i choose this course because it facinated me , quality of teaching is great teacher forces us to particpate in various competetition and projects . my cirriculam is updated | [placements]: placement is better , highest package is 20 lac offered to it branch , average package is 4 lac , placements was more less nice , our techers supported us and prepared us for placements . various companies came | [campus life]: awesome campus , campus is very student friendly , various caffeteria for students to relax , and garden spaces for students to relax
college_name: Kalinga Institute of Industrial Technology Bhubaneswar

review_text: we have one of the best opportunities in india in terms of placement and internship. we have 150+ companies visiting campus during internship and 300+ companies during placement. most of these include tech giants like google, microsoft, goldman sachs, adobe, amazon, etc. i have an internship offer from adobe india and they offer 1 lac monthly stipend along with reimbursement of travel and 14 days free accommodation in 5star hotel. international companies like amazon robotics pay as huge as 8000$ monthly stipend as well. also microsoft redmond, wa pay similarly.we have numerous scholarships as mentioned earlier. some which i can recall are mcm scholarship which pays ? 70k annually to students who maintain a certain gpa and are not financially well-off. then there is earn-learn-return which offers ? 1lac annually to toppers of jee advanced. there is also another scholarship which is offered to toppers of every department. moreover the sbi bank kharagpur branch offer educational loan at no interest or reduced rate.
college_name: IIT Kharagpur - Indian Institute of Technology - [IITKGP]

review_text: [college infrastructure]: the food is unhygienic. the infrastructure is basic but gets the job done. a lot of amenities are present on campus and the campus itself is very picturesque. the labs are well-maintained and stocked. | [academics]: while the curriculum is up to date the faculty are a hit or miss. either they're absolutely amazing and skilled professors or they're not. the curriculum as mentioned earlier is good and based off of unesco certified guidelines. | [placements]: although most courses have placements, that is not a privilege that can be enjoyed by mass communication students. it is sadly based on internships undertaken from the students side. as such, i am not one to quote about the placements of other courses. | [campus life]: campus life is not the best due to the various restrictions put on the students in terms of the pass system and the various other restrictions. but overall it is indeed an very treasurable experience.

the total fee for b.tech computer science and engineering is one lack sixty thousand. where ten thousand is exam fees. one lacks thirty thousand in hostel fees. there are many scholarships at galgotias university: merit scholarship on admission. the university offers scholarships to meritorious candidates based on her/his academic performance in qualifying examinations prescribed by the university, viz 10+2 or graduation, rank/score in all india/state level entrance/aptitude test, and candidates possessing exemplary skills in sports, performing arts or literature.they conduct tests regularly, and assignments are given so that students can learn the subject thoroughly. faculty members faculty in our college are highly qualified, and the course curriculum is very good. the course curriculum is a little hectic, but the faculty members are very helpful and facilitate students-oriented education. the course curriculum which is provided by this college to our department is relevant, and it makes students industry-ready. all teachers have ph.d. degrees from top iits and nits.

[college infrastructure]: the college at kiit is updated with the best infrastructure that students have access to. starting from libraries to mechanical and electrical workshops, all of them are of world-class quality .and services. | [academics]: the courses offered are quite outdated as is the case in most of the engineering colleges across the country. in order to makeup for this lack of advanced syllabus, it is complemented by the presence of world class faculties who work tirelessly for the benifit of the students. | [placements]: the placements for the streams of computer science and information technology were of top-notch quality and can be compared with most of the top colleges in the country. the department of electronics also had a very high repute in placing their students in world-class mncs.
college_name: Kalinga Institute of Industrial Technology Bhubaneswar

review_text: it is nothing but backdoor privatization of public educational institutions where students have to bear the cost of their education and the government is withdrawing from its responsibility by not allocating the required funds. students belonging to low-income families find it difficult to pursue higher studies. whether it is the payment of high-school education or completion of college, these students do not have it easy.cultural and technical festivals are held in indian institutes of technology (iits), national institutes of technology (nits), and indian institutes of information technology (iiits) throughout india. my college conducts the fests. a good library is judged by the effective utilization of the resources of the library.

pros/cons: the natural view of kanchenjungha and greenery with fresh air.it is so much relaxing. the quality of education and the professors. the perks and benefits of institute of national importance. the less availability of resources like water and electricity. less space available and small campus due to which less number of rooms. less exposure like no malls , no educational institutions and any kind of coaching centres | placement experience: from 5 th semester student can apply for internships and after 6th semester they can apply for placements. the average package is 7 lakh per annum and highest is based upon recession and market structure. last year one senior got 44 lpa package from nivida.
college_name: National Institute of Technology - [NIT], South Sikkim

review_text: [college infrastructure]: bits pilani hyd campus (bphc), is the only tier-1 engineering college in india which offers the facility of live recorded lectures. this can give you an idea on how good the infrastructure of bphc is. well-equipped labs (frequently used for research purposes), facilities for all types of sports (including swimming pool & billiards), library with thousands of books, decent hostel rooms with unlimited internet & smart boards and extremely hygienic conditions make bphc unbeatable in infrastructure. | [academics]: the idea of scaling up small scale processes into a large scale processes for industrial level of production, seems very fascinating to me and hence i am happy pursuing my major in chemical engineering. while the curriculum being followed is regularly updated to make the students job-ready, teachers do not spoon feed their students. teachers will always be ready to help but the student needs to put in significant hard work as well. | [placements]: bits pilani is known for its placements. more than 99% of its students get placed in each academic year with packages as high as 50 lpa (computer science course). the average package lies around 20-25 lpa. the immense support from the college in terms of placement makes the placement process easy and pleasant. | [campus life]: the rock garden, waterfall, lush greenery, etc. make bphc one of the most beautiful college of india. the campus is extremely safe with good security system & well-equipped medical center. the seniors here treat their juniors like younger siblings and the amount of fun students have in the campus cannot be explained in words. there are innumerous clubs, departments and associations to keep students lively on the campus. other than scorching heat in april/may, everything about the campus is gold.
college_name: Birla Institute of Technology and Science Pilani

review_text: pros/cons: cleanliness, greenery and area of campus faculties are experienced and industry connected and oriented no need to study irrelevant subjects in any year. only important subjects. gender ratio is very bad, girls are very less in number as compared to boys the size may seem small at first but over time it comes out to be better inly academic pressure maybe high sometimes but that is the need of the hour as per industry standards | placement experience: 1) students are eleigble for placement from 5th semester itslef. 2) companies like nvdia, qualcom, samsung, apple, google etc visit here. the placement is 100%. 3) highest package for the past year was 65 lpa with median package being 36.4 lpa and average package was 36.3 lpa. 4) 100 % students gets placed here. 5) my plan is to join a company via campus placement itself.
college_name: International Institute of Information Technology - [IIIT-B], Bangalore

review_text: i choose this course because i m interested in computer science and i want to became a app developer. approximately 20 faculty work on a subject and 1500 student in my course. teaching methods of faculty is very simple they explain their topic with real life example. exams conduct 2 times in a semester and level of exam is moderate.every year many mnc give offers for internship to student companies like google, amazon, tcs, and other mnc. according to student work campany also give job offers. in internship company give two project one is minor and second is major.

[college infrastructure]: good infrastructure, nice facilities, outstanding campus. library, sports centre everything is all right. food hygiene, living space everything is great. isse jyda kya likhu bas kro ab. sb kuch badiya h lelo admission. | [academics]: nice curriculum. everything is fine here. professor are very very very very supportive. i have never seen such type of professor in my life. just next level. you will not regret after taking admission. | [placements]: good placement. placement are dream for us and dream comes true. because placement cell is so hard working. they work too hard to invite companies for placements. that's all from my side. thank you so much. | [campus life]: nice campus

[college infrastructure]: talking about the infrastructure of indian institute of technology roorkee is wonderful. wifi facilities are available 24 / 7 in campus and hostel both. labs of my college are upto date and almost everything is provided to us . | [academics]: academics culture of indian institute of technology roorkee is very nice . it is one of the old iits . the teachers are very well qualified and experts in their respective domains. the teaching quality is average until you go and personally take interest in a particular field. | [placements]: the placements of indian institute of technology roorkee is also superb . it vary according to the department like btech, mtech, phd. mostly phd students become professors so they usually not take placement.

[college infrastructure]: yes, the college is well equipped with the facilities according the students requirement. all the college buildings are equipped with ac across the campus. wifi connectivity is available on 24/7 basis with 6gb data limit. the campus has cricket ground,football field,kho-kho,kabbadi,volleyball, basketball, tennis, badminton, squash courts and including gym, swimming pool. hostel rooms have comon bathrooms & washrooms and a room consists of 2 study tables, 2 wardrobes, 2 beds, etc. | [academics]: i have pursued bba course and i prefered it to do because of my career future goals are into family business. the quality of teaching is good & quite understanding. the curriculum subjects for our batch used to change frequently since we were the first batch and it required experiences & learnings for the management to put best efforts in making strategic decision for good education. yes, the curriculum includes all the recent events & topics required and related to current economic activities. | [placements]: placements in the college was a tough job because it's a 4 year recently established college. so its new for companies to recruit students from our college with unestimated results in case of job output. the first batches of university passed out in this year except for the mba curriculum. the percentage of students placed is less than 50% hardly, and the highest package till now i remember was 40lakh (approx.) placed in microsoft corporation. the placement traning is well executed & operated. | [campus life]: the best things in the college were weekend holidays, sports facilities and academics. and the worst thing experienced in the college was taste of food, the hospitality service & maintained were the best except for dishes recipes & taste. students are obviously the most energetic & amazing people everywhere. the staff was student friendly and always supporting. the location is not safe over there, many crimes & other misleading activities happen. but the security across the campus is stringent.

environment. while some areas have been renovated, the labs and classrooms are noticeably outdated. this aging infrastructure affects the quality of equipment and resources available to students. modernization is crucial to enhance the learning experience and provide students with the tools they need. investing in updated facilities would greatly benefit both students and faculty. a comprehensive renovation plan is necessary to address these critical infrastructure needs and elevate the institution's standing. | [academics]: the academic environment cultivates a unique learning experience. rigorous coursework challenges students to develop critical thinking skills. dedicated faculty members provide individualized support. state-of-the-art facilities enhance the learning internships and job placements. extracurricular activities provide opportunities for personal development and networking. the institution fosters a sense of community among students and staff. graduates are well-prepared to enter the professional world. continuous improvement efforts ensure the institution maintains high standards. | [campus life]: campus life presents a mix of academic pursuits and social experiences. building a strong community involves fostering respect and inclusivity among all members. positive interactions between senior and junior members contribute to a supportive environment. extracurricular activities offer opportunities for personal growth and development. addressing negative behaviors, such as hazing or substance abuse, is crucial for maintaining a healthy campus atmosphere. promoting responsible decision-making and providing resources for support can help students navigate challenges. open communication and clear expectations are essential for creating a positive and productive campus experience. ultimately, a thriving campus community benefits everyone by fostering a sense of belonging and shared purpose. | [anything else]: 1. stay away from zones 2.stay away from clubs. 3.try to stay away from alcohol

our annual techno and cultural fest name are "tirutsava", it happens in the month of march or april every year. you will get every book related to your course in the library, so you don't have to buy any books. there are various clubs operating on campus like a coding club, dance club, music club, cooking club, photography club etc.i didn't know much about the fee hike policy, but you will cost around 1 lakh per semester for the course. there are several governments and college scholarships available for students. but these are only for girls and students who have a family income below 4.5 lpa.

review_text: [college infrastructure]: very good working environment. we have a very good wifi connection. mess is also clean and hygiene is maintained strictly. also they improve very quickly if at all complaints are made by the students. | [academics]: i'm currently studying food technology and the faculty here is very patient and teaches everything with perfection. provide practical as well as theoretical knowledge which can be applied in real life as well. | [placements]: heard that placements are very good. assures us with a secure future. top companies come to our college for hiring. and we are given pre placement trainings so that we can ace the interview on our d day. | [campus life]: good working and studying environment with peers. well furnished library.

[college infrastructure]: the college infrastructure is modern and well-maintained. the buildings are spacious, with plenty of natural light and ventilation. the classrooms are interactive and engaging. the laboratories have state-of-the-art equipment and are designed ergonomically, ensuring safety and efficient usage. the library has an extensive collection of books, journals, and e-resources. the campus is eco-friendly. | [academics]: teachers are very helpful and supportive here the quality of teaching , the teachers all the stars everyone there is very good there very helpful they provides students with everything the students want. | [placements]: placements are tough due to the large batch size and difficult financial year. though the companies that come are good and roles offered are also decent. the college management is also supportive. placement cell is also present in our campus.
college_name: SRM Institute of Science and Technology Chennai

review_text: you can get internships at industries, and r&ds research institutions. list of industries - fermenta biotech dahej, panipat oil refinery, ioc paradip, ioc gujarat, ppl paradip, microfilt umbergaon, iocl r&d faridabad, csir-immt, fermenta biotech kulu, vizag steel, ap, oriplast, balasore, iocl faridabad, jagannath polymer, odisha, iocl oil refinery baroda, etc.i chose the course because it offered 6 internships/ industrial training programs with academics. all faculties of this college are ph.d. holders and prominent researchers. the faculty-student ratio is relatively lower. along with terms exams here we have to give internal assessment tests in phases almost every week.

[college infrastructure]: yes, the infrastructure is really good in our college. the structure of main building attracts the students a lot . the greenery nature in our college looks so good to feel. the classrooms are well spaced and are well maintained. smart boards and normal boards are combined for our use. the living spaces are cleaned and are hygeneic always. | [academics]: yes , the teaching they provide is outstanding . all recent technologies are updated in the curriculum. do , students get to know more about today's world . it helps them to work with new projects of their own ideas. | [placements]: the placement team at our college make students to learn what's necessary and had prepared us for a better interviews. they give more traing on softskill , aptitude, communication,etc . they even encourage students to participate in many number of competitions held around the world to grow more experience and knowledge. all the faculty teach more practical classes and kindle their spirit to come out of them .

[college infrastructure]: facilities and infrastructure of the college is good. we have a football field, a cricket ground, basketball court, volleyball court, badminton court, table tennis, a gymnasium equipped with decent workout. there is a table tennis in each hostel so that we can play without leaving the hostels the food is great but after sometime one can get fed up with that. we have a weekly menu. we also have a clinic in the campus itself. and recently our network was upgraded to 1gbps. | [academics]: teachers are really helpful. all the professors have at some point in time studied in bits iit's or overseas or equivalent good colleges. there is no doubt in the qualification. if you have any doubt in the curriculum you can meet the professor in their respective office. if you are very interested in a certain topic or course in you can also go for doing projects under professors which can be a very good experience to get to know how things really work. the every year some changes are made in t | [placements]: in this college you can get placed easily if you are looking to go in software do means if you want to go in core branches like electronics and mechanical then there can be a little bit problem for you your bi have one of the best coding cultures the element is on the college frequently conduct session and how to get place and train the students at the end you need not worry about job until and unless your putting the hard work on coding and development are college have aluminized in mncs like. | [campus life]: we have the second best technical and cultural fest in rajasthan after bits pilani. the cultural fest will be stored as the best moments in your life. many famous artists have visited polytechnic subah nautiyal nishant suri hardy sandhu
college_name: LNM Institute of Information Technology Jaipur

review_text: [college infrastructure]: infrastructure of my college is optimum and pretty well for growth , all the necessary equipments and facilities are provided . classrooms are fully ac with high tech lights and projectors . internet facility near the classroom and canteen is very well but it's adequate near the ground or parking area .the living space is very well hygynic and cleaned regularly . | [academics]: i am studying electronics because there is a high scope in future to rise in this field . the quality of teaching is good as per me , it can be better .there is no fixed time table , for classes or for breaks , it goes as per the teacher . | [placements]: placement of college is good . there are large no of companies that arrive here , which offer great packages . it depends on the student that what is his/her ability to maximize the amount of package he/she gets . | [campus life]: campus life can be more happening , as there is very less area for rejuvenation . although it has a great space , but it can be utilised properly and maintained properly to give a good lifestyle . this is also very much required with studies .

review_text: [college infrastructure]: the institute consists of 7 hostels, that are pretty spacious with natural light and ventilation. each room has an attached bathroom and a toilet. each student is provided with a separate study table for his/her own use. all hostels have wi-fi internet connectivity and a tv lounge is present on the ground floor of each hostel building. the campus also consists of a low priced canteen and a juice corner for the refreshment of the students. | [academics]: i am currently in the final year of my b.tech course specializing in electronics & telecommunication, since the department offers industry sponsored research and has now even started interactions with other universities. | [placements]: the institute has a well organized placement and training cell. the cell has good tie-ups with a large number of companies that have been offering placements to the students. last year several students got placed in tier-1 companies like microsoft ,dell, hitachi etc. till now, i have not had my placement round so i am preparing for it, in the upcoming months. | [campus life]: this must be the best thing for a student who wishes to enroll in this institute. the campus life is too exciting and full of fun here. it's location is the major factor due to the scenic beauty it provides from the hill-top campus.

[college infrastructure]: as per the infrastructure wise, it's amazing. all the labs are well equipped with pcs and high speed internet connection. all the programming labs are pre installed with required softwares. the classrooms are well maintained. | [academics]: vit allows ffcs, which allows students to choose the subjects and time slots for the upcoming semester which is very useful for students to manage their time and work accordingly. the faculties are well aware of the subject and are very well experienced. | [placements]: i don't know yet, but i heard it's above 95%. from super dream to normal package job placements takes place every year. very well planned placement program that do not clash with academic time table or else during feasible time slots.

review_text: i am quiet not into research. yes but we have class test (2 in one sem) one mid sem and one end sem. practical exams are taken during end sem exams. 2 semester in. one year. also its quite hectic when classes are from 8am -6 pm. that happens 2-3 days a week and rest is normal days till 12:30the faculties are having minimum of phd degree from nit/iit and usually gold medal or toppers from best colleges in india. we don't have foreign teachers. we are proud to say that we have best teachers from best iits in india. they teach with full dedication and entutisashm

the annual cultural fest of ju is sanskriti and srijan is our annual tech fest. they are conducted in the first quarter of the year. we have a big building as our central library and many books and journals are available here. the classrooms are not so bad-no so good kind of. they have projectors and acs. sports like cricket, football, basketball, long tennis, table tennis etc are hugely encouraged by the college and separate fields are there for each sport. many clubs are there like mountains, photography, debating, drama, science, coding etc are here on campusstudents can apply for on-campus internships from the 5th semester and for placements from the 7th semester. many companies from google, amazon, and apple to deloitte, razorpay, slice, grab more than 150 companies visit campus and make offers of more than 1.9k last year's highest package was 1.8 cr per annum from google london for the sde role. around 80-90% of students get placed in ju and etce has a 100% placement record. though college offers great placements, i'm willing to do an mba after my graduation.

review_text: [college infrastructure]: students will be facilitated with all the facilities they need. 24 hours wifi in hostels and campus,smart boards in class rooms, hygeine environment in living spaces and campus premises. the laboratories , libraries are well equiped. | [academics]: all the teaching faculty are phd doctorates in the field, they are teaching. they have abundant knowledge ans supportive to the students. the curriculum is also been updated yearly. the campus placement trainings will be started from 1 st year itself. the curriculum also helps in getting ready for job placements. | [placements]: since, the first passout batch is 2021 batch, the placements have started in recent months. so, it's no appropriate to comment on placements at this point of time. however, the university provided internship opportunities to every student in their 2 nd year summer break to the 2021 batch. i am hoping, that university will do their best in placements too...

pros/cons: the regularity and placement cell efforts for the students were amazing and the curriculum and the exposure was also good other things included placement and training opportunities in private as well as public firms which were good the immense pressure for attendance (80% compulsory) the presence of proper uniform like school students which was actually too much for undergraduate students and they werent allowed in the campus if they enetered after 9.15am | placement experience: the students were eligible for placements from just before the end of the 6th semester (3rd year).companies used to come on allocated days and it didnt stress out the students much due to proper schedule.the companies visited were oracle, juspay, keysight tech, eq tech, cognizant, pwc,deloitte, accenture,tcs, capgemini,itc, ey gds and many other startup based companies. almost 100% students got placed from our batch. i planned to pursue for an m.tech after this.

review_text: [college infrastructure]: our college has very good and large building also well developed, there are library facilities along with wifi and computer laps also, the college greenary is so beautiful and many events are conducted in our college.. | [academics]: in academics,our college is very good in academic.. teacher faculty are so nice with students and well educated they provide every aspect of knowledge, and they conducted many extra classes which is so informative.. | [placements]: college has provided mnay opportunities students every student get job and internship many companies come to the college amd take interview, college did many things related to placement for students.amazon,tag, mahindr and many more college has come.

i had a strong interest in physics when i was in class 12th, so i pre determine that i will take a mechanical engineering course. the faculty-student ratio is quite good & the faculties are also very very helpful and cooperative towards the students & most of these faculties are having ph.d. degrees from foreign universities. the exams are conducted weekly and monthly.we have a very very good campus life our annual fest is called spring fest which is the biggest hybrid fest in asia and there is the biggest library in india called the national library of kharagpur in the classrooms are very big and the sports complexes are of like olympic size, there is also social groups and clubs which students can join and find their interest.

review_text: pros/cons: the affordability of college for the given fee structure environment in which the college is situated.full of greenery simplicity of the people(teaching and non teaching staff) old classrooms and laboratory...but it is improving nowadays college is a bit offsite as it is in a village out of city. placement is not cent percent i.e all the students doesn't get placed. | placement experience: the students are eligible to placements from 6th semester.all the branches are eligible for placements.but non it branches faces less percentage of placement opportunity compared to it branches. internships start in 8th semester.

[college infrastructure]: college is over-all good and it has all the necessary infrastructure, the infrastructure of our college was good, it had well-equipped classrooms with projectors and a well-equipped library, the canteen was good with different food items, the food served at the canteen is good and hygiene is maintained in the canteen | [academics]: i have studied electronics and communication engineering and the faculty members are very good and helpful, they are very well qualified and guide us in every possible domain, the best part is that the college arranges industrial visits and workshops for students to excel in their particular field | [placements]: in electronic and communication engineering the overall, 70% of the students from our department got hired by the private company, the highest salary package offered is 8 lpa, and the lowest salary package offered was 4 lpa, the top recruiting companies are airtel, icici bank etc, almost everyone got an internship opportunity at good companies from our department, and many students after their graduation they want to pursue some higher studies so they generally go for higher education. | [campus life]: campus is somehow not so big but campus is over all a good campus event also happenes in our university time to time

[college infrastructure]: college infrastructure is good but the academic blocks are too far to reach one place from another. although the best facility is hygienic in terms of sanitation and fooding facility. library of different department are available separately. | [academics]: for post graduation professional faculties are available on the other hand teaching pattern for graduation are quite compromised nowadays. the mock practices for graduation students are undermoderation means lack of personal interviews which consists lenency. | [placements]: placement opportunities for post graduation are uncountable. the quality of placements is overall very accurate as the average % of placement is 85%. the placement process is not so pleasant as many stages are there to cross for attending interview. | [campus life]: campus life is not bad. | [anything else]: my experience of studying bba from gla is good as gla is ranked a+ from nacc.

[college infrastructure]: our university has the best architecture it's a temple of learning, with different kinds of engineering courses and non engineering, our university also include hostel, gym and different kinds of mess based on student interest and 100% recruitment for different streams | [academics]: am campus selected it's all because of excellent teacher and apptitude training, good discipline. since since our college is autonomous there by our courses are eco-friendly to us and we can loan even more things that are not related to a subject which cases only knowledge and with the help of knowledge we can build our own interest and we can achieve in our career | [placements]: 100%placement on student interest we have allmost all companies in our university our college provides a easy way to to interact with all the to interact with all the faculties and thereby provides all the necessary information about the companies and pre planned demonstration for training | [campus life]: best is on student interest we have won many prizes on non academics

[college infrastructure]: the infrastructure of the institute is pretty old but well maintained . the hostels decent enough so giving a 3 star . every hostel has wi-fi enabled but the academic building is equipped with jammers , so games in classrooms . the food is okayish for the first year hostels , but the mess food for the seniors is good enough . | [academics]: so being an electrical engineering student from the first year , people from all the courses are same , but faculty review is average , you'll find good teachers and not so good teachers as well. academics in the college totally depend on you yourself , so basically college teaches how to manage studies and co-curricular activities altogether . but if you seek support from the professors , you'll find some great profs here. | [placements]: the placements here are the highlights of our college . you can find the statistics and numbers on the website and college websites as well . the average package for this year for electrical engineering was 16 lacs approx. so a good number as compared many nits and other colleges in northern india . placements here are better than nit kurukshetra , nit jalandhar and chitkara university and other colleges. | [campus life]: the campus of pec chandigarh is spread around 150 acres . the area is utilized perfectly , the location in the perfect location in the city .v

there are 120-180 students, with a 3:2 male-female ratio in chemical engineering, the faculties are really good, but there are continuous assessments throughout the semester, there are 2 cat exams, that is midterm exams, quizzes conducted frequently and internals also, consistency is required to ace the exams.the campus life is pretty good, and the societies, clubs, and student chapters here are very active, the college provides ample amount of opportunities in different fields. the library is very big and beautiful with the best academic books to refer.

[college infrastructure]: our college have all neccessary infrastructure,facilities and equipments.it is the best college in india in all terms.college classrooms have smart boards,white boards and black boards also.hostels have wifi systems also. | [academics]: i am currently enrolled in ph.d in electronics and communication engineering from indian institute of technology roorkee.quality of teaching is good and teachers are also very helpful in nature.curriculum is also updated every year. | [placements]: quality of placements are also good .many companies visit our campus including top mnc's(like google,microsoft,amazon etc.)mostly all students got placed every year.highest package was offered from computer science branch.

[college infrastructure]: our college is equipped with all the necessary infrastructure and facilities and the classrooms are very neat and have adequate space, laboratories, and the sports grounds are nice. the library is so good that you will fall in love with studying. | [academics]: quality education provided. theoretical and practical knowledge given. there are so much we get to learn when it comes to knowledge. not only from the curriculum but also from teachers and trainers experiences. | [placements]: placements for journalism and mass communications students are fairly good. many students get internships and job offers from reputed media houses and other organizations. the placement cell is active and helps students prepare for interviews.

[college infrastructure]: we have all the necessary facilities witha good infrastructure with well equipped laboratories. the campus itself is a good inspiration for some of the architect students. it has many facilities like gym, vast playground, libraries with books related to both academics and books of our own interest ,even hostels have all the facilities which we need and feels like staying in our own home they maintain it clean and hygiene. | [academics]: i'm pursuing my postgraduation here, where i found such friendly and interactive faculty who teaches us both academics and lifelessons from their experiences. and coming to the curriculum yeah its updated one which helps us to gain knowledge by studying the subject in more depth. | [placements]: as i'm not in final year, i dont know about placements yet, but we are getting pretty good companies for internships. yes our college is supportive towards the placemwnts. they are ready to make us to be placed in high position with high salaries. | [campus life]: students are allowed to engage in many extracurricular activities like dancing,music, yoga, sports etc...even the hostlers have the chance of staying more time to read in libraries.the campus is safe and healthy with lots of trees which gives the fresh air for relaxation, in case of health emergencies they have an health centre for critical cases they even provide ambulance.each student has a particular mentor from faculty with whom they can share problems facing by them in the campus.

[college infrastructure]: infrastructure: the college isn't large, but it's clean and good. wi-fi is available on campus, but i don't know how to access it or whom to ask. there is a library, and it is good for reading and preparing for exams. the canteen is also there on campus, but i mostly used to eat outside. i lived on rent, so i had no idea about hostels. but the hostel had internet thank you | [academics]: faculty: the curriculum was by bangalore university, so no complaints there. but there could be more from our college side. the subjects were not hard for me as i was tech-savvy, but i have definitely seen people working hard and getting good marks. easier than engineering. thank you | [placements]: placements: the year i graduated, the placements were pathetic. there were no developed-role jobs on campus; only customer support roles were available. i had to find myself applying for internships and jobs independently. only a very few were placed, maybe 20%. i had joined an internship by myself. thank you

the course curriculum is pretty good. i chose the computer science course because i have an interest in computer science. the faculty-student ration is good, there are enough professors. most of the teachers are phds. their teaching methods are pretty good. the exam level is good but you can pass easily if you study well.college placement is good. we become eligible for placements in 3rd year. famous companies visit colleges like microsoft, google, samsung, etc. the highlights package is more than 1cr and the average package is 15 lakhs. almost 60 % of students get placed. i will prepare for placements after getting a degree

the campus life is great as there is a whole city of varanasi to explore with its mix of old and new. it is considered one of the oldest cities in the world and it has a lot to offer. extracurriculars are run by the students and professors are involved if required. there are ample opportunities for one to pursue his hobbies. the labs are a bit old but that does not come much in the way of things. the fee for the program is about 1lac rupees per semester which is feasible by indian standards. the amount is roughly 1400 usd for each semester. the college is transparent in its fee payments and each of the costs are shown when the fees is to be paid. and being a institute operated by the government, everything is clear and no extra charges have to be paid to secure admission.

review_text: [college infrastructure]: the college provides good infrastructure, facilities like smart learning, etc. the college has a very good library with good books and spacious classrooms. the hostel is also good with very good quality food. the quality if teaching here is awesome and the teachers are very helpful when it comes to helping a sstudnt | [academics]: i learned many new things from my teachers who were very helpful in every way they could. the teacher-student interaction was great. the teachers were very friendly because of which i could clarify many of my doubts. placements college provides us with many internship plus training. | [placements]: college provides us with many internship plus training .and it also conduct placement drive with companies you will get a good mentor plus exposure to many things plus get a good knowledge of your course

review_text: [college infrastructure]: our college has good infrastructure but most of it is somewhat broken because of lots of fight and politics in du the fights, otherwise classes are good and clean canteen food is also good .our college has hostel facility | [academics]: the studies are average there is less of teaching more of politics as a major ratio is of boys so teaching environment is affected somewhat but teachers are well qualified and helps students in every way | [placements]: the placements are average not that good but major portion of students go for higher studies or are interested in politics , the average salary is usually around 5lpa the placement process is definitely not a smooth one but everyone has to do it.

[college infrastructure]: this university has one of the finest infrastruture in all over india with modernies buildings. it has a great space for literally everything. there are separate buildings for everything. since the computer science field here has maximum number of students, the number of academic buildings for computer science is also maximum. the academic buildings consist of nearly 10 floors each with impeccable classroom facilities. | [academics]: computer science department is good in terms of academics. there are experienced professors with industry connections. classes are from monday-friday, sometimes saturday also from 9am-5pm. the focus for studies is towards research as well as placement. there are online tests and assignments on regular basis. | [placements]: placements for computer science department is great. it has the average package of nearly 7 lpa and also the highest package of 3 cr. there are many core companies as well as mass recruiters who come here for hiring the computer science students such as tcs, infosys, google, accenture, cognizant ,etc. the placement rate is also high for this department with a value of 90%. there are regular placement training classes also for the final year students. | [campus life]: there is unity in diversity that is visible in lpu quite well. there are many students of so many countries and nearly all the states of india who study here and stay together. the events also showcase the combined talent of indian and nri students. the university is completely safe for all the students as it has a separate security department which keeps an eye on students' security and wellness. there is no ragging here because of the strict policy of the university. for medical emergencies, the university has a hospital inside the campus. | [anything else]: for such academic and non academic reasons, lpu would be favorite place for all. one can not only be good at studies but also good as human studying here.

[college infrastructure]: mnit jaipur has one of the best infrastructure and other needed facilities for its students and staff members. internet is available for 24x7 in hostels and also in whole campus. it has a computer centre where you can use highly equipped pcs with a 100 mbps internet connection for your various uses. mess food is quite hygienic and has an average taste. shopping complex and all sports facilities are also available in mnit jaipur. | [academics]: the course curriculum is up to date, and you also get practical exposure to get industry-ready. labs are highly equipped, and for reserve and m. tech scholars, labs are better than most of the iits and other a+ colleges. we also have an innovation and incubation center where young minds can take their ideas and gets funded by the college for startups. | [placements]: placement is good. above 70% of the students got placed in almost all branches and have a descent package too and the rest students choose their career differently like in civil services, govt. sector and entrepreneurships. mnit jaipur has a good alumni network which helps students a lot for getting good placements and internships.
college_name: Malaviya National Institute of Technology Jaipur

review_text: [college infrastructure]: iit patna is one of the finest college of india in terms of infrastructure. classrooms and laboratories are fully functional and modern with high speed internet connectivity. hostel rooms are in very good condition and have good facilties. | [academics]: i am studying chemical engineering in iit patna. reason for choosing this branch was i want to go towards research field. quality and useful knowledge is delivered to students in iit patna which help students in getting job as well as becoming good individual.there is proper well dedicated placement cell which help students to prepare for placements. | [placements]: iit patna is a college that provides guaranteed placements to students in top companies. last year 150+ companies came for recruitment in iit patna which includes amazon, goldman sachs, google,etc. average package of iit patna is 25 lakhs per annum.

[college infrastructure]: good infrastructure and college is very nice and great and educational details are bery good . must say it is kne of the best college in bangalore and i truly appreciate the great faculty and people of the college for it. | [academics]: great education and brilliant proffesors . great faculty and very knowledgeable staff . their understanding on topic is in depth nd that helps students too overall so i will highly recommend this college | [placements]: placement is good and they bring many companies in campus so you can rest assured if your gpa is above 7. maintain good gpa and have basic knowledge of coding and this college will surely secure placements for you | [campus life]: great campus life

[college infrastructure]: all necessary infrastructure is there. wifi and air conditioners in all classrooms. projectors are also present in classrooms, college is very clean and the food is also hygienic. college library is also well maintained. | [academics]: i am studying electrical engineering, the quality of teaching is very good at college of engineering pune. the curriculum at college of engineering pune is updated regularly, the curriculum makes us job ready. | [placements]: i am studying electrical engineering, the quality of teaching is very good at college of engineering pune. the curriculum at college of engineering pune is updated regularly, the curriculum makes us job ready. | [campus life]: excellent campus life

[college infrastructure]: the living spaces in this college nmit are really clean and the food provided in the mess by this college is also really hygienic and good.the facilities provided in the classrooms,laboratories,libraries,sports centers and hostels are well maintained. | [academics]: im studying in cse 3rd year.the quality of teaching is really good and nice and understandable by all the students.the curriculum is updated and includes all the recent developments in the field.this study in the nmit college makes me job ready. | [placements]: the placements in this college are not really bad.the college management does their best to provide the best training to the students by bringing industry people for the training.the average salary that we get in this college is 9 lakhs. | [campus life]: the teachers, staff and the management here really supportive towards the students and helps in a lot of activities.the location is far from the city,but honestly the place is safe to stay.yah the wardens in the hostel take care of the health and wellbeing of the students staying in the hostel.

review_text: since cse was a course pretty relevant and in the scene i opted for it, also our college is pretty famous for placements in the cse department. the faculty are somewhat helpful and qualified but in the end. the student's efforts do matter. the faculty is pretty qualified. the exams happen over 2 months, first the mid sem and then the end sem. exams aren't that hard but focused on the basics of the curriculum.the annual grafest hasn't been celebrated yet due to the pandemic but regularly clubs host events for the students. the summer fest is also celebrated every may and many celebrities are also invited to such events. the library has a good stock of books.

[college infrastructure]: iit patna is a well-established institution with a sprawling campus located in bihta, about 35 km from patna. the campus is well-planned and all the blocks, hostels, and workshops are well-designed. the interconnecting roads beautify the campus. | [academics]: the faculty at iit patna are knowledgeable and dedicated, often going above and beyond to ensure that students grasp the concepts being taught. the college also provides ample practical exposure through well-equipped laboratories, enhancing the learning experience. | [placements]: the institute has seen participation from numerous national and international companies during the placement drive.the highest package offered at iit patna is impressive, and the average package stands at a competitive level.

[college infrastructure]: collage infrasytructure is good abut the number of students are very high so you fell sometim,e that there is a bulk of student at single place .acdemic buildings have good facility.labs are well maintained | [academics]: some proffesors are really good and some ware very bad .they help you in every way to increase your capabilities and helps you to make your future good.if you will mainage to maintain a good relatio with the proffesor then it is reallhy good for you. | [placements]: placements situation are not really goods because of the number of students .you need to work hard and do multiple things to get placed in this collage.focous on your skills and enhance your coding skills . | [campus life]: campus life are good.it depends on you that how can you utilise your time.you need to make good friends so that you grow yourself.again there are clubs and chapter to help but again the number of students is the problem

review_text: [college infrastructure]: nitk has all the facilities related to banking, post office, food canteens, shopping centres etc. all the classrooms are well equipped with projector, wi-fi, white and green boards etc. all the lecture hall complexes are well maintained. | [academics]: i am pursuing information technology course in nitk. the best part of the course is that it makes us capable to survive in the upcoming software industry. the course teaches various technologies that are being used in today's scenario. | [placements]: the placements of nitk are actually very good. the highest package of it branch in 2023 was 51 lpa. the average package was 24 lpa. the percentage of students placed in the same year is 100%. the placements process is a bit difficult because there are no. of technical round interviews and coding tests. | [campus life]: the campus life of nitk is so thrilling and joyful. there is no ragging in the campus. nitk has its own beach. students go there and get chill. there are many cultural clubs that organizes some fun acitvities regularly.
college_name: National Institute of Technology Karnataka Surathkal

review_text: [college infrastructure]: the college has a rented campus of iamr so it doesn?t give that exclusive premium feeling which other good nits or iits give but still it has decent space to accommodate the intake of students it has. all in all it?s an average campus with nature?s beauty at the back. | [academics]: all the professors here are appointed through government tender and thus it ensures that the quality of teaching is upto the mark. most of the faculty have done higher studies from iit or reputed university. the exposure provided is enough to be industry ready. | [placements]: despite being a new nit it boats of good campus placements and good average packages in all the three departments with handsome pay packages. reputed companies like microsoft, amazon and deloitte visit the campus and recruit decent individuals. | [campus life]: though the campus is small but the students and the alumni are very supportive making it a memorable experience for any individual. everything combined we can say that campus life is not as good as other nits but still at a decent level .

pros/cons: the campus i liked it's very huge and full of trees and plantations the cafeteria is also good has many eating options mess is also good the food quality is above average the girls to boys ratio is very less it should be better in summers it's very hot to live in campus, the rooms must have been air conditioned the classrooms are less there are only 6 lecture halls for whole colllege | placement experience: the placements are pretty average in our college for cse, eee,mnc, ai placements are top notch like really good but for bramches such as mechanical, civil the placements are average, not that good. the college has placement drive in two phases.
college_name: IIT Ropar - Indian Institute of Technology - [IITR], Ropar

review_text: we have 5 councils- games and sports council, science and technology council, cultural council, social welfare council, film and media council. each council has its own college festa. the kashi yatra is one of the oldest fests of iit bhu. it is organized by the cultural council and is a cultural fest of the college. events like singing, dancing, debates take up in this event with prize money of over 3 lakhs. it happens between 15-20 january every year and is a 3 day event. next fest is technex- the technical fest of the college- organized by science and technology council. it is a 3 day event taking place in mid february every year having a prize over 3 lakhs with events and competitions related to aero modelling, robotics, coding, startups, astronomical and core engineering events. then comes spardha- the sports fest happening in the end of october. it is 3 day event and the asia's largest sports festival. film and media council has an event called fmc weekend- a 3 day event with competitions like film making, photographies and many others. each council depends on other councils and helps each other in their respective events.the course structure is well planned and curriculum is also well maintained such that the students get a good time for extra-curricular acrivities and also for studies. we have a credit and cgpa system as in us and other top foreign universities. we have each course of a pparticular credit. lab courses are usually of 13 credits. the credits are divided as follows-3-1-2, 3 is the number of credit for each class. each week we have 3 classes so we have 9 credits, 1 credit for tutorial and 1 for self study and 2 for lab. so in this way we have 13 credits of lab courses. we have mid semester and end semester examination. mid semester examinations carry 30% weightage and end semwstwr examination have 60% weightage. the rest 10% is of class assignment/attendance/class tests and quizzes. grading system is as follows- a* hrade for outstanding performance and a for excellent. both have 10 pointer. a- has 9, b has 8, b- has 7, c has 6, c- has 5 and after that it is f or fail grade. so cgpa is calculated as- sum of grade??credits of each subject divided by total number of credits.
college_name: IIT BHU - Indian Institute of Technology

review_text: nsit has a strong culture of student activities. numerous societies are active on campus that aim to inculcate team values and nurture talents within students. canvas, crescendo, ashwamedh,junoon, mirage, are some recreational societies and ieee, devcomm, csi nsit, etc are tech societies. there are several other societies.technology courses were 1,45000 by 2018-19, it was increased to rupees 1,65,000 and now for session 2022-2023, it is hiked up to 2,19,000 rupees for the first year. nsit have some scholarship programs too and offers fee waivers for students whose family income is low

[college infrastructure]: lpu has a very impressive infrastructure. classrooms are well equipped and library is available in every academic block and there is also one central library. hostel rooms are average. there is also a well maintained indoor stadium. | [academics]: teaching quality is average in the university. students get field based assignments so that they can understand the concepts properly and also seminars are conducted to make the students know about the field. | [placements]: lpu provides 95% placements in cse in well known companies such as infosys, cognizant, amazon, capgemini. these companies visit for internship as well. average package is 5 lpa and the highest package last year was 42 lpa by microsoft.

[college infrastructure]: srm is well known for its infrastructure. yes, it is not a myth, the college does provide us with indispensable facilities in terms of smart classes, laboratories with upto date facilities, libraries with huge collection of books. wifi connection is also a boon here. moreover, hostel rooms are well cleaned and provision of hygienic food is also there. | [academics]: quality of reaching is pathetic here. i"m currently pursuing my bachelor's in it but i can vow for all other branches, none are satisfied with the quality of education provided. curriculum here is never updated and if you desire to be industry-ready, you have to do a lot of self-study. | [placements]: quality of placements is a corner where srm shines out. with its huge batch-size, srm still manages to provide placement to all. with average package ranging from 4-5 lpa, highest package may reach as high as 32 lpa. | [campus life]: campus in srm (kattankulathur) is a beautiful one. it is spreaded over an area of 250 acres and is filled with greenary. amongst all others, there's 2 fields to play games such as cricket, football, hockey etc. separate badminton courts, basketball courts, and even lawn tennis courts are present. above all, gymnasium is also present (fully ac).
college_name: SRM Institute of Science and Technology Chennai

review_text: [college infrastructure]: infrastruture is good and it's improving daya by day because of new construction work is going on for the upcoming batches. our college has all necessary equipments and facilties. our hostel rooms are also clean, but at the same time it also depends upon the person living there, how he keeps his/her room. | [academics]: i am studying electronics and communication engineering, beacuse i love the electricity branch of physics. it is the best part of bennett university because it's curriculum is updated everytime according to the needs of the industries. but at last it depends upon the student, he or she can make a whole lot of difference but not because of any curriculum but it's own willpower and determination. | [placements]: since, bennett university is very new and the first batch of engineering just passed with an average package of 5.45 lacs/annum and highest of 44 lacs/annum. it's not so good as well as not so bad for a new university. it will get improve with coming batches. | [campus life]: the overall college life is good, you can hangout in the campus till 11 and then you need to go back to your hostel. you can go out of campus before 7 and can enter only also enter before 7. although the location of our college is very remote but it is very safe for the students. teachers are all qualified but they are same like other colleges they don't know the skill of teaching although they have immense knowledge about their respective subjects. the support staff is friendly.

[college infrastructure]: college infrastructure is good .. classes not having smart board they have simple white boards , classes were clean nd classes infrastructure is nice not good ... nd food is okay as other clges mess having .. you can expect such a good taste its jusy fine to eat.. | [academics]: i'm doing b.tech in mechanical engineering .. the teacher is good some are very good but some are is quite lazy ... i'm in 1 year so i don't know about all the facalty but teacher are cooperative if you willingly do study.. | [placements]: placement of all the campuses of srm will be placed in main campus (ktr chennai) nd i came to hear from my seniors that some of companies visit ncr campus also if you wanted to sit in placement then you can.. otherwise students have to travel chennai for placements | [campus life]: i haven't experienced clg life .m because all the college were closed due to covid ..so i cant tell clearly but it seems it will be nice if i would be there ..

review_text: pros/cons: aircraft maintenance is taught at special uait labs as our university has tie-ups with them. our university takes a lot of initiatives like blood donations and grow more trees campaign. we don't have any special facilities for our branch as even our classes are held in engineering department block. | placement experience: it's the aerospace engineering companies and manufacturing of such objects companies like bel, hal and drdo are the ones which provides us jobs. though we will be the first batch to pass out from here.

[college infrastructure]: college has a lush green campus. classes are so well developed but only for first year students. from second year onwards the studying area is not less than any govt school classroom. they should be maintained just like apjs. other than that library and labs are easily accessible. | [academics]: nsut is considered one of the best engineering college of delhi. no doubt all the professors are very talented here and teaches very well. but some guest profs sucks. they should learn how to teach first ig. | [placements]: i'm in first year but heard that placements here are very good. almost all the students get placement from on campus companies. tho i heard that only few students get chance for on campus intership still trying hard will always payback. | [campus life]: campus life is good. i spent 3-4 months having a lot of fun. roaming around and experiencing different things. just the minus point is that the campus have a lot of couples, sometimes their pda becomes cringe and sucks. | [anything else]: is anything left to say.. idts
