review_text: the reason behind choosing this course is that this course benefits you if you are interested in artificial intelligence or data science. a lot of maths you have to study in this course. it has also a good scope in cryptocurrency. the faculty is also good .some of the faculty are very senior and experienced like h.c taneja, jp kesari,, and many more. their teaching method is very good, they tried to make students comfortable. term exams are very frequent this year due to make up for the loss due to covid-19. but the term exam is of moderate level.there are many fest in the dtu. some are annual fests and some are organized by the societies of dtu. some of the famous national-level fests are homecoming and engifest. there are an adequate amount of amenities in the classroom to help students like projectors for presentation,a.c rooms, etc. dtu has their sports team to represent them in different competitions. there are various societies run by students in dtu.

choice: due to the brand name and alumni network. also, product design placements and opportunities are better and more versatile. also, intake is low (although intake competition is high) and opportunities are better. faculty: the student ratio is very nice. 30:1 and there is much attention on all. as the course is new so there is no such permanent faculty. although there are guest faculties from iits, nids, and nifts with versatile qualifications.there are multiple technical and cultural fests throughout the year that you can enjoy. books are ordered according to authorities and no one knows when they will arrive design books are not in libraries. acs are installed in all classrooms. there are various societies and sports you can join and they are very active and have connections with other branch peeps.

pros/cons: the hostel is soo good that it feels like home the physical fitness areas are well provided the fest culture is good offering a wide range of engaging activities | placement experience: placement cell is still growing in the recent years. the students are eligible for campus placement from 7th semester. companies include de shaw and co, maq, nvidia, google, fintech, zscaler. one female student was placed in google with 55lpa

review_text: [college infrastructure]: this is good since we have many building for all departments such as lecture theaters,science block for first year students , practical labs for all departments etc . in boys hostel we have oat at rooftop and gym etc. | [academics]: it is good since all the faculties do their best to provide us knowledge but some use ppts by which we face some problem but they make it understandable for us . and our curriculum is updated at every semester and we study only that thing that we need. | [placements]: they provide us many companies for placement but in my branch less core companies recruit us but our faculty and placement representative try their best . but we have good package for cse students and ece students. | [campus life]: this is awesome since we have all the required departments and sports ground for physical fitness, and we have gym also for both boys and girls . for cultural program seminar hall is uesd . the faculty member also support for technical fest.

review_text: [college infrastructure]: facilities and infrastructure available for our courses are well-equipped laboratories and fully wi-fi surrounded classrooms with all the latest technology. the campus and hostel are connected to high-speed wi-fi. asia's biggest library and auditorium are available. the hostel is very good. | [academics]: srm is known for good infrastructure, facilities and equipment. the facilities we have in our college is high tech with wifi on every classroom and they are well-maintained. currently i m studying cse in ai/ml | [placements]: the institute has successfully concluded its 2023 placement drive with more than 734 recruiters, who made around 7305 offers. srm university highest package stood at inr 57 lpa and the srm ist average package stood at inr 7.58 lpa. | [campus life]: campus life at college can be a vibrant and enriching experience. it's a time when students often engage in a wide range of activities beyond their academic studies.

review_text: [college infrastructure]: hi speed wifi campus wide and access point in every classroom. clean, hygienic conditions. well calibrated instruments and well maintained labs. hostels are moderated, one can't expect luxury out of a college hostel, but yes if you are ready to shell out more money, you can get luxurious hostels too. | [academics]: the curriculum and the evaluation method is in sync with the current trends, teachers are a bit biased about the native students, and few teachers are unapproachable, though its rare, overall the teachers are in sync with latest developments in their fields. | [placements]: placement opportunities offered here are one of the best in india. more then 300 companies come during placement, and it goes on throughout the year. there's intership fares too, where you can bag internships from a multitude of companies. | [campus life]: happening, zero ragging, strict behaviour control policies.

review_text: [college infrastructure]: the college infrastructure is good. we have good clean spaces for living in hostels and alse the food is hygienic and good. the classrooms have smart boards and projectors which also have the facility to attach your laptop directly. all the labs have amazing facilities, high end systems ( mac ), projectors, smart boards. all classrooms and labs are fully air conditioned. our college library is the biggest highlight of campus, it's a 3 floor library having all the necessary things present there. | [academics]: i was studying bachelor of technology in computer science specialization. all the languages and technologies which are latest are covered in the curriculum. the teachers are amazing and very helpful when it comes to clearing doubts and helping students to discover new technology and discuss regarding that. | [placements]: the placements quality is very commendable. 8000 plus offers were made from more than 600 companies. 90 percent students were placed. higest package was 41.6 lakh per annum which was offered by mocrosoft.

review_text: [college infrastructure]: infrastructure is very impressive. you'll enjoy being on campus. there are four blocks designated for each deanary. and the most important element of our college is that me have 18 food outlets within the campus where you can munch anything! | [academics]: professor are highly educated and knowledgeable. they make use of all the available resources to make us understand the concepts. they can also go out of their way to make your doubts clear!!!!!!!!!!! | [placements]: i have heard that students get very interesting placements after their graduation. i have a little less idea about placements after bachelors but i am well informed about the masters. companies like delloite, goldman sachs, l&t and many more managing firms give placements to our students. | [campus life]: amazing campus life and very happening campus indeed. in every corner of the campus you'll find a spot to amuse yourself.

[college infrastructure]: we have all the facilities and equipments.food is not good sometimes but its hygienic .there is a facility of library. smart boards are available. sports are also available.infrastructure is good and environment is also good. | [academics]: circulum is good and updated.quality of teaching is good but not perfect . faculty teaches by seeing the power point presentations just by reading it. this will make us moderately ready for jobs. if we read ourselves and practice more,it will be good. | [placements]: yaa the college is good and the placements are good only for few branches but not for all. there are restrictions for placements. students with certain cgpa are only allowed for placements. college is supportive . | [campus life]: we will come across a very good experience in life ups and downs ....but we learn more things which helps us to develop in future...the location is not safe actually but it can handle the emergencies

a technical and cultural fest is organized in the institute every year - corona and milange at around december. an annual fest, eccentrica is also organized every year around october. apart from these, many other festivals are enjoyed by students which are organized by different clubs. the library includes all the books necessary during the course for every year, every branch. journals and newpapers are also available in the latest editions. most of the classrooms are smart classes with projectors, screens, and microphones. all the classes have air conditioning and good ventilation. cricket, football, badminton, and other games are played on campus and students participate in different games in inter-nit sports meet. there is also a gym, music room, badminton court, and cafeteria to enjoy and chill. nss has a branch in nit patna that is run by the students themselves. there are many clubs robotics, coding, entrepreneurship etc.mechanical engineering opens a gate for a number of opportunities that include gate, psus, indian engineering services, and many other government services. students can also go for private companies. the faculty-student ratio in nit patna is around 1:20. there are adequate faculty members in the college. all of the professors and assistant professors have done ph.d. from prestigious institutes around the world. most of the faculty members have good teaching skills, but some of them are still preferring the years-old method of memorization which sometimes feels quite boring. exams are held two times in a semester, mid-sem and end-sem. class tests are also taken occasionally. passing the semester exams are very easy, but maintaing a good cgpa is not so easy.

[college infrastructure]: yes the infrastructure is updated and have all the necessary labs and equipment. and an lab with the help of isro is also under construction under a new scheme of govt. of india. all the hostels are equiped with lan/wifi. | [academics]: curriculum is recently updated which includes an 6 months internship in 6th semester to give industrial exposure to its students which helps in personality development which helps in campus placements of students. | [placements]: placements are very good in nit kurukshetra and they vary with the market situation and requirements last year placements were more than 90% in all the streams. college is very supportive to it's students and nit kkr has a very active placement cell. | [campus life]: campus is good but city life is not so good

[college infrastructure]: yes the college have all the necessary, infrastructure, facilities and equipment .all lab are equipped with all the equipment. the computer labs have all best computer. library has numerous book. the whole college campus is equipped with wifi. | [academics]: i am studying btech in specilization with ibm in big data. the quality of teaching is excellent. the curiculum is updated. there is a cdc which makes you job ready.cdc makes you do prepration for the placements. if you give your 100 percent it will make you job ready. | [placements]: the placment of cse is hundred percent where as other branches have low placment ratio. the avreage sallary offered for cse is 4 lakh per annum. the placment process is always very easy and pleasant. the college is very supportive and excellent during your whole period. | [campus life]: the college campus life is extra ordinary. the college is in the foot hills of mussorie the atmosphere is awesome. the weather is always pleasant. the staff and teachers are very supportive. it has collabration with maxx hospital so healt wise it is also safe.yes it can handle all emergencies.

[college infrastructure]: college infrastructure is pretty decent. but there is always scope for improvement. the play ground needs to be good. special focus should be given to sports infrastructure. additionally, parking space can be improved. cse buildings infrastructure is best including toilets. | [academics]: academics is all good. the teachers are very professional and knowledgeable. most of the professors behave well in class and are very supportive. lab instructors are also supportive and helps in experiments. | [placements]: currently placements are very poor. this may be due to recession! but if we see overall the placement percentage is very low. very few companies come with good packages. even the service based companies are hiring less candidates. | [campus life]: dayananda sagar college of engineering has a lush green campus with greenery everywhere. even there are 2 canteens and food trucks. play ground is available. so overall campus life is pretty decent. you can enjoy campus. | [anything else]: nothing more but college has 19 buildings inside 30 acres of widespread campus with greenery everywhere. 2 boys hostel and 1 girls hostel with 2 canteens, 2 food trucks are also available. in the same campus apart from be degree, bcom, pharma etc degrees are also provided. timely refreshing activities are also done. a big library is also available.

review_text: not so many companies are visited for internships. since the implementation of the new education policy completing an internship in every alternative semester is compulsory. but college not helping much with internships. fee structure: approx. 2.5 lakhs/year. late fine charges are so high and strict guidelines for fee payment on time. the college didn't focus on its scholarship program. mainly they consider national, state, and other private scholarships.the faculty of ece is so chill. i opted for ece because its covers smart electronic gadgets and almost every faculty of the ece branch in dsce are chill. in dsce you have 3 internals ( monthly exams) and 1 semester-end examination. besides it, assignment submissions, quizzes, and labs exam are also there. class size : 70 and course fees: inr 1000000 per year.

[college infrastructure]: infrastructure is a little above average. basic facilities are by and large available. classrooms and hostels are immensely facilitated by wifi. environment of the college is good. the laboratories are well furnished with all the equipments. there is no basketball court though. | [academics]: i am studying mechanical engineering here because physics & mathematics have been my favourite subjects since childhood. the professors are talented and enlighten students enough with the knowledge, although at time i feel the practice is getting old. the curriculum in my department is updated and anyways the concepts are evergreen with time. if you keep with everything going on in the university, you are job ready. | [placements]: almost 100% placements in jadavpur university in pretty much all the branches. well, there are also several students who pursue higher studies. the package we are offered is like ranging from 7 lakhs pa to 30 lakhs pa. companies like samsung, amazon, goldman sachs,etc visit our university. | [campus life]: i am giving two stars for 1 bad reason and its ragging. non-bengali students face unprecedented problems regarding that and at times it's tough to manage stuffs if you are not smart enough. else you will enjoy being the part of debating group, clubs, etc. srijan and sanskriti are one of the major fest annually.

[college infrastructure]: the infrastructure is great, with the fusion of modern-day requirements and amazing architecture, the experience is great. every room is well ventilated and have good lighting creating a cozy environment for the students to learn. | [academics]: academics are on point and have an amazing curriculum, the course structure is well designed. the courses give a good amount of exposure to the students to modern-day technology and piles of knowledge to catch up on. | [placements]: placements are nice, with a good amount of companies each year coming to the campus for recruitment. companies like amazon, goldman sacs land on college on yearly basis giving students ample amount of opportunity. | [campus life]: the campus life is great with amazing fest and concerts happing all around the corner in a year. there are a number of student organizations releasing a great number of activities and competitions.

mnit jaipur has a vibrant campus life with a diverse student community from across india. the campus provides a friendly and welcoming environment for students to socialise and make new friends mnit jaipur has numerous student-run club catering to various interests such as music dance, literature, photography etc. the campus has excellent sports facilities including a stadium gymnasium and various outdoor sports facilities like football cricket basketball volleyball and tennis courtsmnit jaipur provides many internship oppuritinites for its students enabling them to gain practical exposure to their respective fields. some of the companies that offer internships at mnit jaipur include tata motors, intel, samsung etc the internships provide students with valuable exposure to the industry enabling them to develop skills and knowledge that can help them in their future careers.

[college infrastructure]: lpu have massive and modern campus spared over 600+ acres it genuinely feels like a mini city you will find everything high tech classrooms smart labs 24*7 wifi and a mall hospital food courts and banks inside campus | [academics]: lpu is quite flexible and updated the university offers a wide variety of courses from agriculture and engineering to fashion design and hotel management one great thing is the industry linked curriculum faculty members are usually supportive and lpu also brings industry experts | [placements]: big names like google cognizant infosys amazon amazon bosch hul and even international companies have visited the campus the highest package's grab headlines especially in tech average package vary depending on your course

economics is one of the premier courses of snu, having a lot of people go to qs's top universities and business schools after graduating in econ from snu. the faculty is extremely competent, most of them have taught at top universities around the world before coming to snu. there is a lot of corporate exposure too as a lot of professors have worked in organizations like the world bank and imf before joining snu. however, there are very frequent examinations and assignments that kind of get overwhelming. all year-round studying is required to graduate with a good gpathe annual cultural fest is called breeze which is the biggest event of snu spread across 3 whole days. also, there are about 70 clubs that also keep conducting events and fests depending upon their budgets and sponsorships. but all in all the campus is very happening. the sports here are amazing. there is a state-of-the-art indoor sports complex. there is also a horse race track where one can learn equestrianism.

campus life is best. as the campus is about 780 acres of which 3 to 5 % area is covered through infrastructure. there is a huge sports complex with full facilities and anyone can play according to their choice. there are 35 clubs and all of them are highly laborious and due to that the connections and alumni network becomes strong.the best according to my rank i chose the chemical branch as per my interest. faculty are sufficient and proper in their field accordingly. they have a good sort of experience in teaching like 10 +yrs of experience. teaching is on point and a tutorial class is conducted once a week for the doubt solving

i chose be in computer engineering at thapar university because i always saw myself as a software engineer and have worked on some projects while was in school, the faculties are helpful and for every lecturer 35 students are there. the faculties here are great some of them have done their research works for 13-15 years and are alumni of prestigious institutes like iits, iiits, nits, etc, they have an approachable method tutorial that really helps students and gets more attention there. we had mid semester tests and end semester tests & lab evaluations and sessionals they all held good weightage in our cgpa and it is a bit hard to get good grades as the marks are relative.the biggest annual fest we have is saturnalia - techno cultural fest usually happens around november. thapar has the biggest library with a fancy infrastructure and has all the coursebooks and reference books available for the student's needs. the classrooms are fine the teachers use projectors, edu pen, and presentations to teach the classrooms are fully air-conditioned. we have 5 basketball courts,1 indoor badminton court, several outdoor badminton court,s and a well-maintained football field encircled by an athletic track. we have many societies some are tech some are cultural thapar has room for students with all kinds of interests.
college_name: Thapar Institute of Engineering and Technology - [Thapar University]

review_text: the course curriculum is pretty intensive. there are three theory exams in a semester ie two continuous assessments of 50 marks each and then one final assessment of 100 marks. the semester will also include multiple digital assignments and quizzes along with project reviews and lab assessments.they offer different criteria for star students education is free, only have to pay for hostel and food accommodations. for nris it???s pretty expensive, their only criteria are 12th percentage. they have to pay at least 5 times the fee of a norma student.

[college infrastructure]: the infrastructure of our college is very good. the campus has a huge library with books, journals, newspapers, textbooks of the latest editions, and previous year question papers for students. the college provides us with free internet facilities, and its speed is good. classrooms are very spacious, each classroom is air-conditioned which is very useful during the summer season. there is a huge stadium where we can play football, cricket etc. | [academics]: teachers in our college are well qualified, and they have good teaching skills. they are knowledgeable and hold many degrees like phd, m.tech, ms etc. teaching methods are good. teachers use projectors and show us live examples related to the working of each machine. they all encourage us to do projects and guide us really well. the student to faculty ratio is good. the course curriculum is helpful. | [placements]: the college provides very good opportunities for students. more than 100 companies visit our college and offer very good packages. our college offers us good training on how to crack the interview, and the training is really useful. mncs like infosys visit our college and recruit more than 100 students each year. software giants like tech mahindra, tcs, cognizant, microsoft, vmware, infosys, oracle, ibm and accenture have already visited our college.
college_name: NMAM Institute of Technology Karkala Taluk

review_text: [college infrastructure]: college infrastructure is beautiful. the buildings here are so big. there are many places to visit inside the campus with our friends and family. there are many food courts here. there are many blocks and places to sit. | [academics]: academics here are so good. we get to learn so much from our trainers and teachers. we also get to learn from our seniors. we have to give so much into the concepts and everything to grasp everything firmly. | [placements]: placements are so good. we get so much opportunities. we get many internship as well as job opportunity over here. many competitions and hackathons related to technology happens frequently in which we can take part and explore. | [campus life]: campus life is great. so many hostels where we can live who are far from their house. mess food was okay. there were many food courts if we don't want to eat mess food. we can chill with our friends in campus

[college infrastructure]: infrastructure of the college is good comparable to other private colleges. wifi facility is there but with average speed. classroom are big and look advanced. hostel facilities are very much okay,food in the mess is also of nice quality. | [academics]: i am a student of bca and most of my teachers are passed from renowned university and are well qualified, knowledgeable. they will help you understand the topics.you can pass semester exams by studying one week before. | [placements]: almost 70 % students got placed last year. the highest package was 16 lpa ,while the lowest was 3.2 lpa. top recruiters like wipro,mahindra,tcs, accenture also come. you will also get internship opportunity if you are good and studious.

[college infrastructure]: the college is very good. its infrastructure stands as one of the most appealing thing to everyone. it has hostels for boys and girls both. it has a capacity of nearly 25000 students to be accommodated inside the hostels. it is a big university with vibrant colors and structures. | [academics]: academically, cse is one of the best field to pursue in lovely professional university. there are hundreds of teachers for cse department. sometimes, when the classes schedule is disrupted due to any grieve reason, classes are taken in online mode also in the evening. it has very good staff and management. | [placements]: lpu's placement is good. it can provide placement not only inside india, but outside also. the university has hundreds of companies' partnership which come in the campus every year for recruitment. university also recommend top students to the companies in placements. capegemini, cognizant, tcs are some examples who recruit from here. | [campus life]: campus life is sometimes good, but sometimes it may feel bad also due to high number of students studying here. thousands of students live inside as well as thousands come from outside the campus due to which, this university may feel little noisy. | [anything else]: overall a good choice.

[college infrastructure]: bits provides clean and hygienic environment. the food provided in mess is of very good quality and better than most of the other colleges. overall infrastructure is excellent and wi-fi speed is also very good. | [academics]: the teachers in bits are very good if u attend classes properly. examination pattern is also very good. it gives you chances to maintain your cgpa. even if you are not able to attend classes due to some reasons then also you can attend it by using their special software known as impartus where all lectures are updated. | [placements]: quality of placement at bits is awesome. if one is able to maintain teri cgpa above 8 then they can get placed at a very good package. average placement at bits is of around 11-12 lakhs per annum. even if one is capable enough then they can get a pre-placement offer. | [campus life]: campus life is awesome. there arr lots of activities going on in the campus such as the treasure hunts, sports event, cultural event etc. there are lots of clubs and department of which the students can be a part of. these all activities provide a platform for students to know each other.

[college infrastructure]: yes, pes university have all the necessary infrastructure which has spread across 30 acres of land with all the required facilities in it. classrooms are well equipped with modern amenities like wi-fi, smart board, ac, better sound systems etc. our campus also includes sports ground, labs, hostels, libraries, banks, etc. hygiene is well maintained in whole campus and food hygiene is prioritized here. everyday campus will be cleaned. | [academics]: currently i'm pursuing mba in order to enhance my strategic thinking skills. my university is best at teaching with best teaching quality, their teaching level is exceptional and they provide practical insights and real world applications. yes, curriculum in our university is updated and includes all the recent developments in market. this program is making us to be ready for job by providing complete theory knowledge along with hands on activities to leverage our skills. | [placements]: the quality of placements is excellent with good percentage of students got placed in various reputed industries like deliotte, hp, kpmg, ey, grassim, etc. around 90% of students will get placed and the highest salary package is around 12 lpa. the average package offered is around 4.5 lpa and placement process is very smooth that they provide training for process and they also conduct mock interview with our mentor | [campus life]: coming to the best features is all about state of facilities they provide, library facilities, extra curricular activities, events, etc. worst part about this is college was under construction so we faced difficulties regarding that. students are from diverse backgrounds and teachers are well professional with phd holder. location is good and it can handle emergencies. college prioritizes safety and have first aid facilities, evacuation plans, etc.

[college infrastructure]: my college infrastructure is quite good with many facilities and clean classrooms spacious campus with skilled labs well qualified teachers spacious campus with internet facility throughout the campus.they also provide hygienic food in canteen with good hostel facility | [academics]: academics wise my college is good as my teachers are qualified and they guide me in a proper way in every situation they help us to study they encourage us to participate in hackathons and also they will provide us some internships with the help of aluminas | [placements]: we have good placements in our college with around 216 companies participating and around 3000 members are hired and the number keeps increasing every year they also help us in preparing for interviews so that we can crack the job easily.

review_text: [college infrastructure]: the infrastructure of the college is very bad. the facilities in the classroom includes normal boards. the college is near the city area. there is no wifi in the college campus. the living area is clean most of the time . the canteen food is okay you can get better and cheap food outside college. | [academics]: i studied btech in mechanical engineering from here. the faculty are very old and does have much knowledge about recent developments. the curriculum also remains the same every year. you have to find job in it after that or mba, which i am doing. | [placements]: the placement quality is worst. the percentage student placed is around 70-80 percent from the college which also in infosys and tcs where they hire in bulk. the average is 8 lpa and highest was 62lpa.

review_text: [college infrastructure]: additionally ,the college provides comforrtable accommodation options for studnets who choose to live on campus. the dormitories are well-maintained and offer a safe and supportive living environments. | [academics]: highlight of my college experience was the extra curricular activities.there is something for everyone at srm ghaziabad,whether you are interested in sports arts community service or joining a student run club. | [placements]: the placement cell organizes various activities throughout the year to prepare students for the recruitment process.these activities include resume building workshops mock interviews and guest lectures by industry professionals. | [campus life]: the college aslo recognizes the importance of community service and encourages students to engage in social outreach programs. various initiatives are undertaken to contribute to the welfare of society, such as blood donations.

review_text: [college infrastructure]: the campus of iit g is known for its beauty. you can see swans around and every hostel has its own stationary and juice centre. it has an impressive library and bus services that are available for travel around the city. sports complex fulfill all the requirements and medical facilities are free. | [academics]: faculty in my department is good; they are supportive. most of them give good grades compared to professors in other departments. many of us from our branch pursue roles like software or non-teaching roles. being in this branch gives them sufficient time to prepare as the courses are not so hectic. semester exams are easy; almost everyone passes, but exceptions are everywhere. | [placements]: iit guwahati mechanical department has been given a lot of awards for having a high passing percentage of students. its placement statistics are also good enough. the average package is around 10 to 15 lpa with top recruiters being tata, mahindra, bajaj, in core, etc. with roles of design engineer, project manager, production engineer etc. | [anything else]: good college in guwahati.

[college infrastructure]: the department of it has a very good infrastructure. wifi is available everyday with out high internet speed all the labs are full equipped with high-speed computer systems and internet connection.the hostels are a very good and clean and neat and also have all the basic facilities like electricity, water, internet connection etc. | [academics]: there are adhoc and also permanent faculty in it. all the professors are very well-qualified. they have good and excellent teaching experience. they are graduated from top universities the course curriculum is designed in such a way so that students can get good knowledge and maximum help in their placements.their teaching also so good. | [placements]: coming to my batch,in my batch there are total 83 students. the placements in it in my college is too good.the minimum highest package was 53 lpa. the average minimum package was 25 lpa.the top recruiting companies were deshaw, walmart, qualcomm, adobe, jio etc.every student will work hard when it comes to placements they will study and prepare very hard to crack the interviews.they took many technical and aptitude classes to crack the interviews.

i chose this course because of the high scope of computer science in the coming years. good programmers are in demand. the first semester has a class size of around 120 students. the faculty and teachers are highly equipped with excellent methods to make our learning process convenient. just appeared for midterms, and i have to say that the overall difficulty level was average. if a student is determined, he/she can score enough to get a good gpa.students are eligible for campus placements in 3rd year. but students can also get internships from 2nd year itself. students of our university have been placed at some of the highest-paying companies like google, microsoft, and infosys. the highest package was 32.16 lpa. students should make sure to maintain an 8+ cgpa and should also learn a skill to be noticed by the companies

[college infrastructure]: college infrastructure is very attractive and beautiful because the university is very big and all the facilities are available in the university. hostel food is clean and hygienic also living space is clean. library and laboratory are also available. canteen is also available for the students. | [academics]: teachers are highly qualified and they motivate the students but classes are not conduct properly so that syllabus can not be completed and students have to face problems in the exams. all the recent developments are included in the curriculum. | [placements]: galgotias placement are very nice and it assures that 90% students get places in well known organization or company. hhighest package was stood at 55 lacs per annum and average salary offered was 4.80 lacs per annum. | [campus life]: campus of the university is very beautiful and big. canteen are available and events are organized by the university for the students.

review_text: placements are really good. one among the best placements for cse and earth science branches. cse avg placement is around 20lpa almost 100% placement in both. in third year we get internships with almost 50% students getting industry internship. stipend for internship to industries ranges from 50k to 2lacks. some students also intern at foreign university / industry.numerous state government, ngo, industrial, central government provide scholarship for almost all students. mcm scholarship is availed by most. whereby entire tuition fees is waived off. sc/st students need not pay any fees. interest free lones are sponsored by government of india (vidhya lakshmi loan)

the labs in our college is good and a number of extra curricular activities are orgainsed. though the sports facilities are not so good as only good players are allowed to play the sport and no proper coaches are provided for the betterment of team only seniors take care of the team. overall sports activities are a bit below averagethe syllabus used has improved but still there are many irrelevant topic that make students disinterested towards the course due to lack in job seeking nature of the course provided.there are many conventional subjects which i don't think can create a lot of enthusiasm in students because the things now have got advanced

review_text: [college infrastructure]: everything is good. wi-fi is available in every room. the library is clean. the infrastructure and campus are beautiful and modest. all the necessary infrastructure, facilities and equipment are there. the living room is small and clean. the food is not very good. in the hostel, all facilities are provided by the college. food quality is also good which is available in mess. the canteen is open 24 hours. you can play any games and all instruments are available. medical facilities are also good. | [academics]: college semester exams are quite difficult. if you study properly and attend all classes with full concentration then it wouldn't be difficult for you. you can easily gain more marks. the pass percentage is 6 cgpa. all the teachers are well educated from well-recognised institutions like iits. my roi is very good in this college. i learned more than what i had invested in my college per year. | [placements]: the quality of placements is good enough for me. i think most probably mba and b.tech students get the best salary packages. approximately 60-70% of students got placed in my course. the highest package offered was 45 lpa, the lowest package was 2 lpa, and the average package was 6 lpa. the top class faculty are available with lots of experience in every area. it is an amazing campus with a lot of scope for academics, sports, and cultural.

the academic fee or tution fee is 1,95,000.there will rooms outside the college for stays or the college provide hostels for students which costs according to the room facilities like ac , non ac, six bedded,four bedded, 3 bedded,2 bedded and even 1 bedded.there are no additional charges are collected.there will number of companies which are going to place the students.international, national companies will hire the students from our college.there will be internships provided either online or offline.in the last semester, majority of students are going for internships

[college infrastructure]: one of the standout features of iiit bhopal is its infrastructure. though the institute itself is newer, it makes full use of the well-developed campus of manit bhopal, which is known for its state-of-the-art facilities. the campus is large, well-maintained, and equipped with modern amenities that contribute significantly to students? academic and personal development. | [academics]: the academic structure at iiit bhopal is robust, with a clear focus on quality education and skill development. the faculty members are highly qualified and experienced, with many having backgrounds in both academia and the industry. they are dedicated to ensuring that students not only grasp theoretical concepts but also develop practical skills that are essential in the tech industry. | [placements]: iiit bhopal has a dedicated placement cell that works tirelessly to ensure that students are well-prepared for the job market. while the college is still building its placement reputation compared to older iiits, it has already managed to attract several top tech companies for recruitment. | [campus life]: campus life at iiit bhopal is vibrant and filled with opportunities for students to engage in extracurricular activities. the college encourages students to balance academics with extracurriculars, fostering an environment where all-round development is emphasized. | [anything else]: iiit bhopal offers strong academics, excellent infrastructure (shared with manit), good placements, and vibrant campus life. while fees are high, it provides great value for aspiring b.tech students.

review_text: so the annual fest is rebecca, which is organized every year but was stopped due to covid-19 in 2020 and 2021, so it may start from this or 2023 again. for an entire year, students look forward to these 4 days of absolute ecstasy. there are clubs like reflexobeta for dance, euphony for music, rob darshan for robotics, catharsis for photography and many more, which are very active. all the classrooms are airy and well ventilated and have fans and ac. they have seats for 140 students. there are many sports events organized like inter-hostel football matches, cricket matches, inter-departmental football matches, or cricket matches. it is so exciting. we have two very big grounds called the oval and the lords, named after famous cricket grounds here. being civil, a website run by our senior, contains all of the notes and past year papers that were extremely useful during the pandemic and online classes. we have our ramanujan central library, which has over 10,000 books and journals.students are eligible for campus placements beginning in the sixth semester and internships beginning in the third and fourth semesters. many companies visited, like texas instrumentas, microsoft, tata, capgemini, etc. atlassian made the highest offer of 51.2 lakhs ctc, and the average salary was 12 lakhs. almost 80% of students were placed in almost every department. and many applied for higher studies in foreign universities and for gate, many secured very good ranks and went to iits for mtech. i will probably go for a corporate job first and then maybe go for an mba degree.
college_name: Indian Institute of Engineering Science and Technology - [IIEST] Shibpur

review_text: [college infrastructure]: college infrastructure is very good. infrastructure has all the necessary facilities and equipment which are required for a perfect engineering college. classroom have all modern facilities like a mic, speaker and projector.ventilation in the classroom is very good. hostels are also good and clean. some are old buildings but some are new like hall11 all 14 with all modern technology. | [academics]: i'm studying there b.tech in computer science and technology because i love computer and mathematics so much. quality of teaching is very good. the curriculum of college is updated and includes all the recent developments in the field. what is the students are studying that makes them job-ready. | [placements]: quality of placement in the college is quite good. most of the student get placed except those who are not studying properly during their college time. highest salary package offered is about rs.42 lack ctc per annum that goes to cse and it branch. placement process of the college is very easy. college has its placement and training cell.college is much supportive in the placement.

a student has to conduct majorly three internships. a social internship (end of 2nd semester), an academic internship (end of 4th semester), and an industrial internship (end of 6th semester). the first two internships are not provided by the college. it is the responsibility of the student to do the same whereas the training and placement cell provides the industrial internships to the students in some good companies.placements are an important part of any engineering college. in our college, placements are quite decent. some psus like nrl, oil india, indian oil etc visit on a regular basis. mass recruiters like cognizant and capgemini visit almost every year. the training and placement cell of aec does a good job of providing opportunities for the students.

there are several fests in college namely ruvaan, exodia, expect inter college tech fest. the library has around 40,000 bootboothelegelege has many clubs like pmc for photography, udc which is an an a dance club, and many more.the cost to study is not high. the college has many fee remission policies. and also it is a government college, therefore affordable to study the course. college also has a scholarship named merit cum means scholarship.
