review_text: placement experience: there are professional teachers who train you for the placement your skills like aptitude and soft skills are improved in those classes. most of the biggest company visited the campus every year and we have a very good placement record you can check on the college website too. we have a different dept. for encourage the students or entrepreneurship and startup called tbi. many of the students had started their startup from there. alumni support student gets to placed and many of them are placed too.
college_name: University Institute of Engineering, Chandigarh University - [UIE], Mohali

review_text: th? placement culture of dtu is also very very good. nearly 95 per cent of students get placed within the campus. and there is also a good scope for startups too. students can start internships in the second year while the official placement drive starts in the third year. companies like microsoft amazon sprinkler all the leading companies come here. the highest package was 1.8 cr last year and the average package is around 15 to 17 lakhi m in civil by choice. i had a passion from too early so i followed that and came into it. faculty here in dtu is well experienced in most of it and they know how to do things. the ratio in engineering colleges can never be justified as we all know. exam time for us was difficult as we had got only 3 months to complete a semester

[college infrastructure]: classrooms of the college are nice and different facilities are available such as board, lights, fans, proper seats, wifi. library is also available. laboratories are available with all the necessary equipments for the students practical. | [academics]: curriculum is updated and also it includes all the recent developments in the field which helps the students in building their career and enhance their knowledge. my course is m.tech and i am grateful to take addmission here. | [placements]: placement is quite good and for the placement the process is easy and pleasant because it is done through interview round. some companies conduct group discussion round for the selection. well known companies came in the college and select suitable candidates for the job role. | [campus life]: campus is very big and beautiful also location is safe so that it can handle all the emergencies. teachers and faculty member are helpful and supportive.

list of companies that visited the campus for their placement drives, for your course are honda, hero, godrej etc. the general steps followed in the recruitment drive of these companies are written test and interviews. the tentative percentage of students placed every year from your campus is 100%? yes the institution take special steps to prepare the students for the placement season.i got the admission in this college through jee. i opt for this course because i love mechanical engineering. the factors that made you choose this institution is because it is one of the india's premium institution. the steps followed as a part of the admission procedure for the institution is good rank in jee and counseling.
college_name: Dr BR Ambedkar National Institute of Technology - [NIT]

review_text: [college infrastructure]: the infrastructure of the college is awesome and we are having a separate building for all departments. the labs are equipped with advanced machineries. having a good library and research centers. the hostel is good providing shared or single rooms for students. they also provide all state food. wi-fi is available throughout the campus. the classrooms are having ac and projectors etc. | [academics]: most of the faculty in the university are from iits and having good teaching experience also. the course curriculum is awesome we are having three mid exams in semester and weekly on monday we are having tests which helps to get good marks in semester exams. the last semester we need to do internship in any company which helps us get ready for industry. | [placements]: about 80% of students are placed in top mncs and the remaining 20% are going for higher studies. the highest package is 21 lacs, avg is 10 lacs and the lowest is 6 lacs per annum. top recruiting companies are ongc, hp, bharat petroleum, l&t, etc. almost 100% of students got internships in top companies like ongc, western lines, and bharat petroleum, etc. top role offered in my course is production controller, manager, supervisor, and scientist, etc.
college_name: Vellore Institute of Technology Chennai Campus

review_text: [college infrastructure]: i was expecting that it have poor infrastructure but it was well above my expectations buildings were new.we have open air theater, sports ground for all sports and many more exciting things.we have wifi connected libraries with all necessary book available, classroom and laboratory is average but the best part is hostel, in hostel we got well spacious room and the mess food is excellent, they have proper hygienic routine, so overall our infra is well above good. | [academics]: our academic is chill. there is no load of cgp comparatively. plus our professor are well educated so it's good in aspects of academics.seniors arrange workshops for different aspects like coding. and professors help us in clearing our doubt. | [placements]: i'm in my first year and i have seen seniors being chill for their placement. this year two of our senior got placed in microsoft @ 45 lpa whereas avg of cse is around 15 while for all other branch it is in btw 8-11 lpa. | [campus life]: the best part of our college. we have very chill college life, and the whole college have truly find a takiakalam "first year hai be, koi load nhi h" like what it means seriously we have no load,we are very much safe in our clg, whatever you are interested in you get your senior doing well in that field and can get guide from them .we have friendly relations with senior. there are so many fest and fun events happening all over the year.so yes it's very dream life you can get in this college

pros/cons: campus is well large enough. it is equipped with several big grounds for football, hockey and cricket. on the basis of placement, nit allahabad ranks 2nd among all other nits after warangal. good intellect students from all over india choose to come to this college and from the foreign too. placements for top three branches cs, ece, ee are well and good and there averages lie above 20 lpa placements for other circuital branches is not so good like for mechanical, civil, biotech there averages lie almost 12 lpa and below boys to girls ratio is 70:30. one can find a good partner here if he/she wants to be in relationship half of the campus area is unutilised which should have been utilised. | placement experience: placements of this college is very good and ranks 2nd among all nits in india. electrical branch has placement percentage of 90%, computer science has placement percentage of 95% with 28 lpa and for ece 89%.
college_name: MNNIT Allahabad - Motilal Nehru National Institute of Technology - [MNNIT], Allahabad

review_text: [college infrastructure]: the overall infrastructure of the college is very good and well maintained. the pathways is covered with a canopy to protect us from sun and rain. the hostel has wifi access. there are lifts in all the buildings as all the buildings are tall. there is all kinds of laboratory available related to engineering. | [academics]: i am majoring in electrical and electronics engineering. the teachers have a very good knowledge of the courses they teach and often prepare presentation for the syllabus they teach. the curriculum is very updated. the teachers are also very updated. | [placements]: they have a very good placement record. there are many companies which come for campus interview. around 90 to 95 percent student are placed every year. the average package offered would be around 6 - 10 lpa. the college gives basic training regarding placement and interview. | [campus life]: campus life is very wonderful. the college is pretty strict regarding their code of conduct. but the college has many clubs and activities conducted by these clubs. since the college has a very diverse population of students it is easy to feel lonely but you can always find someone with same interests as you. the campus is in a safe and secluded location.
college_name: Vellore Institute of Technology Chennai Campus

review_text: the fee is modestly close to the? 2,00,000 per year for tuition fees, additionally you'll have to pay? 90,000 for the mess, hostel, sports, hospital and other facilities for an entire year. hence, the total fee for a year is closer to the? 2,90,000. it might seem huge, but you'll not have to pay a penny outside this and you'll get all the services at iit bombay included in this itself. normally free revision is done by a separate committee every year, and it is as per the policies which are quite legitimate. i did not receive any scholarships as they are only given to students from economically weaker sections and there are provisions for such scholarships. students whose family income is less than ? 8,00,000 and whose cpi>6.0 are not required to pay tuition fees under merit-cum-means scholarship. the full fee is waived for students with less than ? 5,00,000 income. there are plenty of other named scholarships by our alumni and believe me, funds won't be a problem if you want to study at iit bombay.clubs: consulting, finance, tech, f1 racing, mars rover, auv, cedrica asia's biggest cultural festival - mood indigo (dec.), asia's biggest technical festival - techfest (dec. or jan.), asia's biggest entrepreneurial summit - the e-summit (feb.), asia's biggest social festival - abhyuday (feb.) all kinds of books (digital and hard copy) are available at the central library of iit bombay. there is an online system as well to issue the books and find the exact location of those books on the shelves. classrooms have cushioned seats, acs, well lit, boards comparable to mit in the us. world-class olympic standard sports facilities for every sport, basketball, swimming, football, hockey, squash, badminton, tennis, table tennis, gym, kho kho, etc. we have 3 big auditoriums at student dispense to be used for all kinds of events, and a separate student activity centre (sac) where all the clubs and student bodies have dedicated rooms for an internal purpose, hence cultural exist.
college_name: IIT Bombay - Indian Institute of Technology - [IITB]

review_text: from seventh semester students can participate in placement drive. many companies had visited this year. companies like bpcl, hpcl, maruti, vedanta, exonnmobil, deloitte, oracle, accenture and many others have hired a good number of students. i assume the average package is 18lpa overall and the highest in chemical engineering is 14lpa (from vedanta). technically 26lpa is the highest in our class (software stream). more than 50% of the students are placed before the end of seventh semester.internships were offered through a platform called genskill. internship opportunities are quite good (not much process involved). both core and software roles were offered by different companies. i'm not sure about the stipend offered. internships mainly focus on solving real-world problems and exposing us to industry level problems.

[college infrastructure]: it has wifi all over the campus.yes our do have all the necessary infrastructure, facilities, and equipment, regarding the facilities we are provided with wifi in all the classrooms and the classrooms, libraries are well maintained. | [academics]: curriculum is nice, coming to the quality of teaching it's higher than a person would expect. yes, our curriculum is up to date and includes all the recent developments in this field. i did b.tech in automobile engineering | [placements]: placement are only good for computer science department.i would say the placement for this year is okay-ish around 98% of students were placed this time where the average was around 4 lakhpackage, though the highest package was somewhere around 40-50lakhs | [campus life]: campus life is nice
college_name: SRM Institute of Science and Technology Chennai

review_text: [college infrastructure]: the infrastructure is pretty good here, with all the necessary facilities such as smart classes, auditorium, hospital for 24 * 7 emergencies, sports complex, swimming pool, parks and gaming zone as well. | [academics]: i am studying computer science and engineering, and currently i am in 2nd year of it. as far i can say that the study here is up to dated accordingly to the latest industry needs. and all the facilities here are well educated. | [placements]: the placement of this college lovely professional university is pretty decent. with an average package of around 5-6 lakhs, the training and placement cell keeps searching for the companies through out the year so that students get placed.

after 6th semester, students are eligible for campus placements. a lot of companies come like amazon, maruti, honda, and companies like jp morgan sure take up a lot of students from our campus. the highest package has been around 70 lpa, and if i say for mechanical 80-90% of students are placed with the highest 43 lpa in mechanical. well for me, i am not sure yet what to do nextfaculty to student ratio is 1:60 . all the professors are quite qualified to do their job. they teach well and are dedicated. exams are conducted twice in a semester and the difficulty level remains from moderate to high level and it gets somewhat to score well because a good amount of weightage goes to assignments and practicals
college_name: Punjab Engineering College University of Technology - [PEC]

review_text: the mncs regularly visit the campus for providing a 2 monthly internship platform for the students. they will select particular students for the internship based upon the performance of the students in the university exams.the campus and the infrastructure is good enough. the campus is occupied by greenish trees. it's nearly an 800 acres campus. the library is too nice for a pleasant study in it. the sports are regular if you are interested.

pros/cons: it is the globally recognized university direct tieups with multiple mncs which higher the placement rate almost equal ratio of girls and boys which make it socially accepted university | placement experience: as i am new and online learner i am not sure about frequent visits of company and im hoping to get placed soon . recently i heard that various representatives came from amazon to recruit students from various job positions

[college infrastructure]: we don't go to college yet.so i didn't know anything about college.so i don't have any experience on infrastructure about nit rourkela.and that our seniors told our hostel is good.and we have good garden and good atmosphere.and for playing good grounds are there. | [academics]: in academics nit rourkela is the best.proffessors are excellent in explaining and very interactive to us.weekly assingment are giving so it is helpful in improving in respectieve subject.and in academics very good. | [placements]: i don't have any idea about placements.but my seniors told placement offers are very good.and if we should have skills then we will be placed.average salary offered 7lpa.and irrespective of our core branch we can apply for cse placements. | [campus life]: yet i don't go to campus so i don't have any experience.

the annual festival of aec is named pyrokinesis and the annual technology fest is named udbhavanam which are both held together in the month of march. the library needs a serious update but yes there are books available in the library and dates are given for the collection of books from the library. the classrooms in the main building are good and have smartboards and projectors as well. the scene of sports and extracurricular activities in our college is good. there are some social groups run by the students of our college along with a lot of clubs namely sovic, coding club, robotics club etc.i chose btech in electrical engineering because this allows me to go to core sector jobs as well as it jobs. the student-to-faculty ratio is 18:1 in our department. the professors are all phd and master qualified. just like any other college, some teachers are very good at their skills while others struggle a bit at teaching but overall it depends on the student. the class tests carry high importance and are done timely and the finals are also done timely and can be passed with a decent effort but for good marks, more than a decent effort is required.

there is son many internship available in campus you can do research internship under faculties member and you can also do it in so many companies, type of companies depend upon your branch, you can also apply to iit for research internshipthere is so many fest is happened in college like mindbend, sparsh these are the biggest fest happening in gujrat and the fest happen during even semester or in april month, a good opportunity in sports, there is so many culb for student,
college_name: Sardar Vallabhbhai National Institute of Technology - [SVNIT]

review_text: [college infrastructure]: very good learning with good faculty & infrastructure and class room facility is good and environment also very good with good lab facility and good lab technician and the surroundings are good to explore more | [academics]: i have a good record in academics and want to study civil engineering so i got admitted this college in the year 2013 and then got admission in civil engineering department in srm university chennai campus | [placements]: quality of placement is very good and the placement section is also very good and the faculty also very good and the placement review is also very good teacher also help in getting the placement and can check well | [anything else]: good college anyone can go for study with good knowledge & skills and will have a good exposure for good placement and faculty is very good in teaching and lab faculty also very good and campus infrastructure also very good
college_name: SRM Institute of Science and Technology Chennai

review_text: [college infrastructure]: college infrastructure is so good, big buildings, food courts, hostel, mess. the hostel are very comfortable. ac rooms and cooler rooms both are available. mess food is also so good, we get to eat many varities. | [academics]: academics is very good. we get to meet many teachers and trainers that not only teach good but also have good knowlexge about life. we get to learn alot about their experiences. good resources are provided for studyinh like labs with advance computers. | [placements]: placements are also good over here, we get maby good oppportunities. many companies visit daily to the university to hire freshers. package vary from company to company. it goes from 4-5 lpa to 20 lpa. | [campus life]: campus life is great over here. i get to spend good time with my friends over here. i can roam around with friends till 12pm at night, hop on my favourite food courts, sit in beautiful parks and chill with them.
college_name: Chitkara University Institute of Engineering and Technology Jhansla

review_text: [college infrastructure]: my college has all the necessary infrastructure, facilities and equipment. the classrooms have ergonomic sitting spaces. they have fully functioning wifi in the college as well as hostel campuses. the living spaces are clean and hygienic. | [academics]: i'm into instrumentation engineering. it's an interesting inter disciplinary course based on electrical and electronics engineering. our curriculum is totally upgraded and includes all the recent developments in the field. yes of course my study course is making me job ready. | [placements]: placement in our college is satisfactory. the electrical, electronics and instrumentation engineering departments can be seen to have better placements than other branches. the average salary is about 50k per month. | [campus life]: the college is one of the premier technical educational institutions of north east india. it's the oldest college in ne india. the teachers are very supportive and communicating towards the students. the location is the best.

[college infrastructure]: so good. it is well built with necessary things. also the campus is humongous. that buildings are best. it is so colourful and provides ample amount of space to play, and enjoy. overall it is the best. | [academics]: the courses offered are so good. we have many choices. every branch guarantees placement. teachers are highly qualified and friendly. they help in solving doubts and they teach so good. the curriculum is so good. | [placements]: placements are going good in my college, with highest placement in mechanical and cs branch. highest salary package awarded was like around 1.2 cr. i dont know about other branches by my branch guarantees a avg salsry of 8lpa. | [campus life]: it is so good till now. having friends around us makes us feel home. no ragging. emergencies are well handled. the staffs are also friendly.
college_name: Vellore Institute of Technology Chennai Campus

review_text: the internship is offered in the 5th semester by various companies on as well as off-campus. companies like accenture, microsoft, and uber take interns by providing high stipends of 1lacs. non-tech companies like sprinkler also provide a similar stipend. the project for the interview should be made using web development knowledge and any other so skill. every skill matter for the cv for interview cracking.the electrical engineering course is a mathematical course that is getting to realize in the subsequent semester. subjects get tougher and tenacious. faculty are greatly experienced in their field of teaching. every subject has likely to have different professors in their field. in terms of exams, they are conducted every semester (normally 4 months) in between regular class tests and mid-semester exams.

[college infrastructure]: currently we don't have our permanent campus so 1st year undergrads are currently in jut campus which is decent for 240 students . but the sports facilities are not that good . the hostels rooms are pretty good ,more than expected .but power cut is a major issue here , almost daily 1-2hour of power cut is noticable . class rooms are well maintained but not as you would expect . its a moderate classroom for 60 students.overall in 1.5 to 2 years when campus will be completed it will be very good . | [academics]: the teachers are very qualified and some professors are really good , but some faculties are not . most of the faculties are very friendly and helpful overall.but the academics are bit hectic ,extra classes ,assignments and class tests all together . but the hostel life is pretty good . | [placements]: the placement of this year is incredible almost 19-20 lpa avg with 84 lpa international package . lowest package is 7lpa .and in upcoming years it will improve a lot . so it is value for money the return of invesment is good if you study properly in this 4 years | [campus life]: campus life is not top- notch i would say .you have to walk 1 km to go to the market or to get auto. this is temporary campus but its big enough for 240 students . in this is year the campus will be shifted to iim ranchi which will be good .
college_name: Indian Institute of Information Technology Ranchi

review_text: pros/cons: college helped students with co-circular activities supported and have it a boost. if students want to participate in fests and competition at state and national level college even helps with monetary aspects. the exposure to various industries is quite great as there are multiple industrial visits throughout 4 years of engineering and many industrial experts are called for conducting seminars. there's a need for construction of more classroom and buildings as the college have expanded the field for admission over existing infrastructure, students are more as compared to available infrastructure. dedicated lectures for sports and extra activities for be provided as student participating in events have to compromise on theirs lunch breaks or has to stay back after college hours. 4 years back college used to organise industrial visits on a grandeur scale that is a need now as well so that practice should be reinstated. | placement experience: 7th semester onwards students are eligible for campus placements. many main stream companies have visited our campus this year including infosys, capgemini, l&t, mahindra & mahindra, bristlecone, etc. with selecting over 450+ students. the highest package for students graduating in year 2025 is 9.5 lpa with an average package of 3.5 lpa. the placement drive is still going of with 46% of students being placed right now and there are many more companies to come. for me i got an offer from one of the company that came for college placements, and i would be going for it.
college_name: Yeshwantrao Chavan College of Engineering - [YCCE], Nagpur

review_text: adhyay arambh are some annual fest tecnica and ecell are month to month fest approximately all books are available if some are not available then our library provides a portal where we get all books in soft copy approx all sports events are in our college like cricket football badminton table tennis chess etc our social groups and clubs are the poetry club kalakash aero club dc etc3rd to 4th semester we are eligible for campus placement jio, fiber, flipkart amazon oyo and more famous companies are coming 5300000 is the highest and the average is 180000 approx 80% are placed every year i want placement in a good company with a good package

[college infrastructure]: yes mnit jaipur has nearly all major equipments like library, lab equipments etc however wifi is very slow in some boys hostels and lan is also present only in 2 boys hostels. mnit jaipur has very poor cleanliness specially near boys hostels.... there's alot of garbage anf foul smell alot of students also get dengue because of this. | [academics]: i was told that mnit jaipur has very good academic record especially in electrical engineering but in my opinion apart from 1-2 teachers rest all teachers are very bad. most of the teachers are sc st like meena etc and therefore they don't have any specialization. | [placements]: placements are good. students who get involved in coding are very well placed but branches other than cs , electronics and electrical engineering have very poor placement stats. i will suggest you to code if you are interested in it. | [campus life]: i'm giving 2 stars only because your friends will make your campus life better. vltc & jaipur city will also add up to the flavour. college is overall safe, we have dispensery but it is not open 24/7 but yess nearby hospitals in jaipur city are overall very good.
college_name: Malaviya National Institute of Technology Jaipur

review_text: good. we have an ffcs system to set our own timetable and choose any faculty. we basically have 2 cat exams that fall under the category of internal exams, one final exam which we call fat. each course or subject has its own components like lab, project, only theory. in addition to cat exams and fat exams we even have digital assignments and quiz.admission is based on our 12th marks. the ranking system is purely based on the marks scored in physics, maths, and chemistry in intermediate board exams. in addition to this, our college has a unique system under which we have 3 categories. based on our marks we will be offered a seat in one of these categories.

[college infrastructure]: we ate having a huge campus llusegreen we also have cricketgrd footbaal grd basketball coart, badminton coat and all the sports facilities and orlur college have huge library which is open twenty four iinto seven | [academics]: our profession is highly qualified and knowledable the also conduct activity in class so that the student can ingage and enjoy the class profession is also having industry exposor which help us to know about corporate world | [placements]: more than two hundred plus company use to visit at nit kurukshetra capus placement drive and the companies are tcs, infosis, hcl, cisco, wipro, google, century, zentertainment, yahama, hdfc, icic, direct

[college infrastructure]: nit warangal boasts excellent infrastructure with modern classrooms, labs, and hostels. the central library and innovation garage are standout facilities. wi-fi is available campus-wide. the campus is green and well-maintained. some hostel buildings are old but functional. | [academics]: academics are rigorous, especially in core branches like ece, cse, and mechanical. the faculty is highly qualified and encourages research and innovation. the curriculum is regularly updated. students have flexibility with electives. exam patterns are fair but demanding. | [placements]: nit warangal has excellent placement records, especially in cse, ece, and eee. top recruiters include microsoft, amazon, oracle, and deloitte. average package is competitive, and many students receive ppos. core branch placements are improving steadily. | [campus life]: campus life is vibrant with tech fests, cultural events, and clubs like coding ninjas, music club, and e-cell. events like technozion and springspree are crowd-pullers. the campus is large and active all year. students enjoy a balanced lifestyle.

[college infrastructure]: college infrastructure is really big. it covers around 600 acres of land. it has a cricket ground, football ground, volleyball ground, etc. it has a library which consists of more than 50000 books. it has a mac lab. it has an open-air theatre, uni-hospital with doctors of almost every domain, auditorium, etc. it has a wonderful snooker lounge, fitness edge gym, etc. | [academics]: academics are really good, they have experienced teachers, mostly post-graduated from iits. it provides you 45+ departments for your career goal. for every department, they have dedicated building with dedicated staff members. even, for cs students, they have a mini library too in their dedicated block. faculties are available from 9 am to 6 pm, if you want to clear your doubts, you can meet them & let your doubts cleared. | [placements]: placement is better than other private colleges. if you want to get placed, then you have to work hard on your soft skills, it is the first thing that interview notices. they provide you, preparatory classes, & make it easier for you to crack online round & interview. | [campus life]: i had a wonderful experience there. i loved the diversity of students. in lpu, you get students from all across the globe. you get an opportunity to meet people from different countries. campus life is good for those who take hostel there. if you opt for pg, then it would become too hectic for you to maintain 75% attendance. pg life is good too, but to maintain attendance, it's not recommended.

[college infrastructure]: college infrastructure is average. all facilities are provided and maintenance is average. labs have only necessary equipment for experiments of the curriculum. wifi is supported in all the college blocks and hostels but no speed. living spaces are clean and there is no serving of non vegetarian food in college. | [academics]: academics of my course is good but the quality of teaching is not bad. there is a lot of self study to do and curriculum is aonly average because it doesn't have recent developments. the hod of my department is intelligent but coming to student issues he is not that good. | [placements]: our university have lovely placements. all the campuses students come to main campus for big companies. almost everyone gets a job at vit. core jobs percentage is less compared to it jobs. ratio of core to it jobs is 1:3. average salary for core companies is 8 to 12 lakhs per annum.

[college infrastructure]: nits is one of the best nits of india with full of greenery and lakes along with clean and hygenic.the college comprises all the essential facilities and laboratory equipments.sports facilities of the college is oustanding. | [academics]: there is a strict schedule in the college but with time it will be manageable.the quality of teaching of the professors are good. it syllabus includes all the recent developmnents in the respective fields. | [placements]: the placement of the college is outstanding.approximately 90 percent of the college students were placed in the placements with a good amount of package. the highest package was 80lpa secured by a cse btech student .

[college infrastructure]: the college is very big and huge in area it covers all the departments and even have a library and residents for facilties and staff working in the college. the college is covered woth greenery and is very beautiful | [academics]: i?m currently persuing mba from iiit allahabad and trust its one of the best woth great faculties who teach us each and everything very nicely. the development in placements is good and have huge opportunities for all the students | [placements]: placement is very good. highest package last year was 35 lacs and average was around 7 lacs which is still a good return on investment for the fees that we have paid for here. the placements are benefecial
college_name: Indian Institute of Information Technology Allahabad

review_text: we have an annual fest called elan & nvision which is conducted in february. there's no as such any tech fest but we have milan (inter hostel competitions) and diesta (inter-departmental competitions). there are quite a number of books available at the library but it's a bit small because iit hyderabad hyderabad being 2nd generation iit is currently under construction so the new library is still in the making. classrooms are small sized but the facilities are good. a new sports complex is being constructed and thus for now we have to play sports in a small area which is not up to the mark. there are many clubs such as aero, robotics, acm, etc run by the students.this course is the second best chemical engineering course in iits after iit bombay. that's why i chose this course. we have a 1:2 faculty to student ratio. it's quite good actually. all the faculties are post graduate or phd holders. the exams were like 2-3 in a semester per subject. so it was not that hectic because iit hyderabad has segment divisons in semester so we have exams at different times for different subjects.
college_name: IIT Hyderabad - Indian Institute of Technology - [IITH]

review_text: pros/cons: the environment of the entire college..it is comparitively chill and they give support and encouragement for various activites be it academic or non academic the teachers are good and supportive and help you a lot. the overall crowd in the college is nice and fun..you can find all types of people and haangout with those who best vibe with you...a good experience of my college life would be my friends too.. the worst part about bmsce has to be the management. they never do things properly on time and make decisions which is inconvient for everyone and stresses everyone out including the teachers...really bad management campus size i guess..it is comparitively small overpopulation...again maybe a consequence of small campus but over intake by management is ruining bmsce | course curriculum overview: the curriculum has the necessary subjects of the branch...it is constantly updated every year to adhere to relevancy and comphrehensiveness of the course..my department of aiml teaches us the necessary computer subjects such as nature inspired computing, deep learning etc and also the maths and stats whch is required for machine learning is though too ( like maths for machine learn and statistical modellign, inferential statistics, time series analysis etc)..these subjects also have lab components which help us prepare for real-world applications. but some of the older subjects on the other hand which might be core computer science or in first year..common subjects like caed and others are not required and outdated. the frequency and timings of exams is moderate..neither good nor bad

review_text: [college infrastructure]: college have all the necessary facilities. it has a good infrastructure. campus have proper labs of computers, good library, a high speed internet connection with a clean environment. mess provides a hygienic food. | [academics]: i am studying cse. quality of teaching is good. sometimes we have to attend boring classes for the sake of attendance. also, curriculum is well updated and it includes all the recent developments in the fields that are running nowadays. | [placements]: placement is good in this college. average placement is from 3-5 lpa. many mncs like infosys, capgemini, samsung, vivo visited our campus. many cs,it are placed in good and reputed companies. also, college is supportive in terms of placement. | [campus life]: college campus is good. college organised various hackathon, sports events, cultural events. also, faculty and staff are very much supportive.

review_text: the course for our batch is constantly changing sem by sem which is making it a bit difficult but it's making everyone more competent and b.com was a course where u could learn about commerce and a bit of management. students are about 250 in our batch, the faculty members are also approachable at times of any doubt or queries. there are regular tests after every unit in each subject. and it is cbtfor campus placement and employment opportunities, students must be in the 5th sem and there are a few sessions also conducted by the college on employment. there is a number of companies which come to college naming a few are accenture, amazon, intellipaat, london stock exchange and many more. the placement package would vary from 2.5l to 4l.

[college infrastructure]: infrastructure is good enough to attract students. the whole campus is wi-fi enabled, and jio fiber is also placed in the hostel buildings. fully computerised labs are available, and projectors-enabled classrooms are available. the library is good. the hostel has well-furnished rooms. the canteen has separate food options, like north and south indian food. a university hospital is also available for students. | [academics]: academics is also good. we have so many phd teacher with good teaching experience. there is a good management system here,proper classes timetable which include theories as well as tutorial classes in which students solves the question regarding their syllabus. our university follow ugc guidelines and our curriculum is updated every year | [placements]: placement services are good here. you can expect that two or three companies will visit here in a week, which is a very great opportunity for students to showcase their skills. the lowest salary package offered is around 3 lpa, and the highest salary package you can expect is around 16 lpa. companies conduct different rounds of interviews, and then offer letters are sent to selected students. | [campus life]: campus life is very enjoy full.students are engaged in cultural,sports and all other .students are supportive here and you can find good friends with whom you can share your thoughts.teachers are also very supportive.my campus is situated near the national highways 1,very safe and yes it can handle the emergencies.

[college infrastructure]: u don't find world class infrastructure as value of education is given more priority but all the required facilities are given to the maximum limit best college when coming to placements and cost of living. | [academics]: academics are given main priority in sastra. so we can find good theoretical education more than practical. anyhow it depends on student if he/she wants to explore then clg is ready to provide any help. | [placements]: you will get 100% placements for sure in the campus but it also depends on the student interest too if he/she is willing to sit for placements with good grades then there is a chance to get maximum no.of companies.

review_text: [college infrastructure]: yes, vit vellore has all the necessary infrastructure, facilities and equipment. vit vellore has well equipped labs with the latest technologies. the classrooms are huge with a maximum capacity of 65 students. the library is really huge with plethora of books & journals. there are outdoor & indoor sport facilities like swimming pool, badminton courts, etc. most hostels are comfortable, neat & properly maintained. the food is hygienic, tasty & has variety. | [academics]: i am studying iot specialization of cse branch because iot is a very in-demand & interesting field in this decade. the quality of teaching in vit is pretty good. faculties ensure students learn their stuffs & the testing process is quite commendable. the curriculum is regularly updated as per the current needs, thereby including all the latest developments in the respective fields. obviously you need to work quite a bit on yourself, other than the college stuffs, to make you job ready. | [placements]: the quality of placements is really good, considering it is a private college. the exact percentage is not known, but a vast majority of them were placed in decent companies. this year the highest ctc was 75 lpa, offered by microsoft to a cse core student. the placement process is smooth & very professional and meticulate. college is really strict and clear on the guidelines to be followed in the process. | [campus life]: the college campus is quite vast and populous. the buildings are beautiful, huge and well built. there are a lot of chapters & clubs for students to get involved in. vit is strict in cases of public display of affection (pda) between boys & girls. the students, staff and teachers are more or less really supportive & humble. there is no ragging culture prevalent. campus location is pretty good & safe. there are a lot of food outlets outside the campus. roaming in night after 9 pm isn't that safe.

my course is b tech and branch is information technology.and exams are done in 4 times in this college.first is sessional 1 then sessional 2 then internal and then external.thats the only one semester.and in every one year.2 year.and my course duration 4 year.i got my college by the process of counselling by uptu exam.they do not do fee consession.so i had to give whole amount of fee in one time.and i also had not take admission in hostel because hostel charges are very high.

choose this course out of interest. the faculty is professional and very supportive except few who are usually from other departments. all the professors are ph.d. holders, if not at least a master's holder with distinction. if studied and attended classes well the exams were easy, else it may not seem the same for others.the library is present in every department building and a central library which is open for all 24*7. the latest books weren't available, but can be accessed online via the computer system set up in the library. sports are for professionals unlike for other students.

review_text: [college infrastructure]: excellent infrastructure with sixteen+ hostel and messes. twenty two departments in total. one of the finest centre of attraction the james thompson builing also called the white house of india build in year 1857. | [academics]: i am a prefinal year chemical engineering undergradute student. the cirriculum here is good, covering the depths pf research and innovative expects. students are also given proper lab and industral exposures and labs. | [placements]: the training and placement office do well but can do even better when compared to several sister iits. one of the drawback in terms of placement is its location which is a hindrance for many officials to take on campus interviews. | [campus life]: the best part of the college life you get to live

placements are good at the national institute of technology warangal, this campus is named for its placements every year and maintains good records every year with high and good packages and placements. companies such as microsoft, ibm, uber, oracle, tcs, deloitte, capgemini, kpmg, infosys and a few more top companies visit and offer placements, highest package last year was 88 lpa and the average was 19.9 lpa, about 95 per cent of students get placed last year.the mechanical department has good faculties and all are highly qualified they have years of experience in teaching and they teaching can be understood by the students easily. faculty to the student ratio is about 4:20. we have two exams in a semester they mid-semester exam and the end-semester exam, and they are a bit difficult to pass with out studying.

pros/cons: teachers are friendly and so close to the student. they are put the mentor mentee system under the management the learning experience is obsulutely best nothing to say about that things that i may disliked | placement experience: 4 smester students are eligible for placement . the companies name list jio setharland infosys capgemini accenture ibm tcs wipro hcl mindtree dxc tech mahindra amazon walmart and etc. the percentage for eligilbe for placement is all clear only

review_text: [college infrastructure]: college is a known university in nagpur. it is located in hingna, it has different department as per the courses.classrooms has proper computer sytems, also the required instruments for engineering purspose. | [academics]: they have managed a good academics till now. they provide different courses,clubs ,hackaton etc. the faculty is well qualified they help to clarify doubt for the students. every year they keep on adding new things to explore for students. | [placements]: college has a good placement cell, specially for computer science branch. they have got specialisation that attracts several companies. they have low ratio for other branches but they are improving day by day. | [campus life]: campus life is good here.it has good exposure to people and involovement about different activities. it has good sports facility,grounds for cultural events.people spend their most times in college library too. | [anything else]: its a good college with good placement record also provide good academics.

review_text: pros/cons: there will be a good educational environment there will be a good exploration opportunity our faculties are too helpful which is a great part of our college our campus infrastructure is not as much good as other nits has there will no more option for mess facilities transportation issues from haridwar to our college is not as much good specially at evening time due to hilly area | placement experience: there will be a p2c cell which is placement cell of our college which take care of our college placements. student is in 3rd year are applicable for seat in placements. our college placements cell help us to call as much companies as much possible

review_text: [college infrastructure]: college is spread in a very large area.college have a very good infrastructure for students whether it being college or hostel.facilities like classrooms,laboratories,libraries and sports are well maintained. | [academics]: i am currently persuing bachelor's degree in ceramic engineering as i am having interest for the same since childhood.quality of teaching haas been upto mark.current curriculum is updated and includes all recent development. | [placements]: quality of placement have been very good in past few years.many big companies visit college for recruitment drives.on around 60-70 percent of students are placed every year through campus drive programmes with average salary 7-8 lakhs per annum.

[college infrastructure]: college structure is awesome ,it is a large campus about 1000 acres.the campus contains many stores and restaurants.it is a wonderful campus for students.this the best place to spend your four years of btech | [academics]: academics is very good.the staff is well experienced their respective subject.the college gives the the best of every thing.the staff is very good in interacting with the students.the overall curriculum is very in the national institute of technology rourkela | [placements]: nit rourkela has a placement above 90% in the campus placements.the campus placement percentage is increasing from past years continuosly.all respective departments have good placement percentage.it is overall good

[college infrastructure]: the college is equipped with all the necessary infrastructure, facilities and equipments . all the equipments are up to date with best working conditions. the best working environment is provided within the campus. | [academics]: academics are taken very seriously in the college. regular tests and quizzes are held to enhance the students knowledge of the subject. the faculty is outstanding with the syllabus and method of teaching. | [placements]: placements are quite the talk of town in the college with bjmc and btech having the best placements provided by the campus. all the best companies are seen during the campus placements provided by the college. | [campus life]: campus live is very happening inside the college with a lot of activities going around throughout the college . all the clubs are actively organising activities throughout the week. would totally recommend

[college infrastructure]: the library is well furnished with accedmics and reference books and also available to students. classroom are large and equipped with projects and wifi and the labs are clean with the necessary equipment for pratical classes. | [academics]: the course curriculum is relevant to which we need for examination and it makes students ready for industries and many more. the teachers in our institution are very helpful well qualified and have good knowledge | [placements]: the placement option for mechanical engineering branches are good. while the campus environment is decent. however very few students secure on campus internships in btech those in technical branches have better chances of landing roles.

[college infrastructure]: infrastructure needs massive development for this college. benches, chairs, etc need to be modernized. some classes don't even have proper working fans. living spaces are ok. but rooms could do with 2 roommates instead of 3-4 based on the room size. food quality for some hostels is good. but not same for all hostels. quantity is sufficient however for all. there are no smartboards in classrooms. summers can be very tough in durgapur. cooling arrangements can be made for the hostel residents. | [academics]: more effort on rote learning, passing the exams. not much adherence is given to knowledge gathering. only a couple of professors treat students humanely. best is to avoid being targeted. only one student or two are seen with good eyes. | [placements]: m.tech placements are horrendous, especially for electrical department. placement cell is not even bothered about it. often queries regarding such are not entertained, rather students are driven out from the office of the placement officer. | [campus life]: the best aspect of campus life is the fun that one can have with friends either in the hostel, or being involved in various clubs, to learn new skills, or the least to pass some time. else not much is present to look forward to.

[college infrastructure]: how much i saw online it looks great. due to covid19, i have never seen lpu physically so i can't say anything about it.i am studying online on codetantra from my first day. so i will review it later. | [academics]: the faculty is very good and cooperative but the bad things are 1: 75% attendance compulsory, which just ruins your whole day from morning to evening, sometimes there are classes till 6 pm. 2: they will not understand any kind of your personal problems, either you are seriously ill or have any kind of troubles you have to work according to them. 3: there are too many ca, practicals, projects, midterm, end term, and blaa blaa blaa which will not let you rest for a long time.4:syllabus is very bad | [placements]: although there is good statics, the money they charge, the effort they take from us, the promises they make don't meet the reality, not even around it. the placement they say and the records they show about 90%+ placement does not mean like from the total no. of students but the records are made from those students who were eligible to sit in placement cell. and if i am right then around 35-40 % of students are eligible to only sit in the completion remaining 60-65 % students are not there | [campus life]: it only depends upon you, if you know time managing and using it wisely then its best else it is hell, worst than you can think.

the course contains every thing like physics, maths, programming etc. in my first semester, our courses are ict(information and communication technology), calculus, language and literature, bec(basic electronics circuits), introduction to programming. all the faculty members are highly qualified and experienced.the campus is very green, there are library, cricket ground, football ground, basketball ground, badminton courts, table tennis, gym etc available for a very sport active campus life, there are also sports weekends, freshers' weekend's sports, concours.
college_name: Dhirubhai Ambani Institute of Information and Communication Technology - [DA-IICT]

review_text: [college infrastructure]: lpu offers diverse courses, modern facilities, and good placements. the campus is lively with cultural events. faculty is supportive, making it a popular choice for quality education and overall growth. | [academics]: lpu provides a wide range of academic programs with industry-relevant curriculum, experienced faculty, and practical learning. it focuses on skill development and research for holistic student growth. | [placements]: lpu has strong placement support with many top companies visiting annually. it offers training, internships, and career guidance, helping students secure good job opportunities across various industries.

this course is really good for further learning and growth. faculties are really nice and friendly. faculties are highly qualified with most of them having their own wikipedia pages. exams are held at regular intervals and some of them are pretty difficult to passthere are so many things going around it is sometimes difficult to decide where to go. you have so many clubs that i can guarantee you, you will find something that interests you. mood indigo is a cultural fest which is famous worldwide
college_name: IIT Bombay - Indian Institute of Technology - [IITB]

review_text: [college infrastructure]: i really like the infrastructure. it have comfortable classes .there is no problem of internet as college has vast network or wifi system . as well as it is well maintained . good hygien , nice hostel facilities , huge labs we get to do things manually. | [academics]: i am from b.tech cse branch . in this pendemic , college provided us many ways of teaching by which we get less difficulty in managing our studies . i found the way of teaching good . yes , the study makes me job ready. | [placements]: the placement quality of college is good . i have found many company come for the student by which we have the higher chances of getting placed . the placement process is pleasant and interesting also .

[college infrastructure]: the infrastructure of the university is of great quality, the classrooms in academic blocks are great but the ones in pragya bhawan are a little old. lab of every department is of top quality and is enough to make a good engineer. sports complex consists of badminton grounds, table tennis, football field, basketball fields, etc. you can play every kind of sport in our university. their is a different area for students to park their vehicles. the infrastructure of our university is on par with other famous colleges in india. | [academics]: the courses are a little outdated but there have been some changes and the university and administration is trying their best to improve the courses. some professors aren't that great but some are really good too. it honestly depends on your luck, if you get lucky, you'll get the best professor but if your luck fails, you won't understand anything in the subject. overall, if you can study by yourself, you'll survive in our college. | [placements]: the placements of our university are great, it's a well known fact all over india. if you have enough knowledge of the field you want to get a job in, you'll definitely get placed on campus. the highest package last year was 51lpa ctc and the average was 16lpa ctc in electrical engineering department. in electrical engineering, you can go for core as well as tech jobs.

[college infrastructure]: in our department all the things are good that can be anything library, labs, all the things are with the latest technology and books and classroom. also, have a projector and board for study and the quality is also good of food in the canteen and in mess also and there are 5 grounds. | [academics]: teachers are also helpful and qualified and knowledgeable. they know that all the trends of the industry what new is happening in the industry and the teaching quality is also good all the doubts are cleared on the spot and the teacher also make the students ready for the industry and placement too. | [placements]: : mostly 100% students get placed and the placement team is also very good, they are hardworking and dedicated the highest package goes around 7-8 lacs in healthcare and the lowest package goes around 3-4 lacs
college_name: Chitkara University Institute of Engineering and Technology Jhansla

review_text: the annual fest of this institute is known as vivacity (cultural fest) and the tech fest is known as plinth. they both were conducted in the month of january and february respectively. there is also a sports fest known as desportivo. all the clubs in this college are run by students.the cost to study is quite high at this institute. here you can avail of scholarships by scoring above 9 cgpa. the fee of this institute is a bit high. fees structure is 22 lakhs for the whole of b.tech. there are many opportunities for internships.
college_name: The LNM Institute of Information Technology - [LNMIIT]

review_text: i am not sure about other branches but for computer science and it, we had special training programs organised during our holidays. they did charge some nominal amount, which seems to be a lot when you are in college, but later on, you realised its importance. today, if i can write in my resume that i am ocjp je6, certified then the credits solely go to those training provided to us. apart from that in our 3rd year of engineering microsoft did come to recruit people for internships and even provided ppos to some deserving students. i am sure such programs must be organised for other branches as well. if not maybe you could start an initiative and bring in companies for internship. you just need to think big.i have chosen btech(computer science engineering) as my curriculum, my rank was 320 so i got the opportunity to select any of the courses provided by the college in a stipulated time frame. in kiit student ratio is 1:1, it's a healthy environment you will feel here. all the professors have phd degrees and many professors are from iit, and iiit and some are even from harvard. teaching is good they help us a lot. toral of 8 semesters are there with every semester there you have to give two exams, mid sem and end sem.

[college infrastructure]: yes my college provides all the laboratory needs . they have a high quality wifi connection and all the systems have 8gb ram which is very useful for running our software. they are well maintained by a supervisor. living place is clean and all the foods are hygienic . | [academics]: i am studying mca .i was very interested in computer field and have a high technology thirst. here they teach the latest technology and provide us with many materials to learn. facilities support us in learning new things.my curriculum is upto date and it covers all the core papers . it has all the fundamental fields that is mandatory for the it field. | [placements]: my college has a good placements. 50 percentage of the students have placed in descent companies.all the companies provide a decent pay for the students who have been placed .many companies provide only intern and few provide both intern and full time

[college infrastructure]: yes, we have all the necessary infrastructure, facilities, and equipment. we have great facilities in classrooms, laboratories, libraries, sports centers, and hostels (for eg. wifi, smart boards, water coolers) | [academics]: academics were great, teaching quality was up to the mark. the curriculum is updated up to the mark and includes all the recent advancements and developments in the field. the study here makes job ready. | [placements]: the quality of placements was nice in the college. 90% of students were placed grabbing the highest package of 30 lacks per annum in the cse and it branch. the average salary offered was approx 5-6 lpa. | [campus life]: the campus life was really great, there were many activities in which students can engage. we had a great library in which students can sit and read on various topics. the teacher and support staff were great.
college_name: SRM Institute of Science and Technology Chennai

review_text: [college infrastructure]: high speed wifi for every hostel and classrooms. ac in most of the classrooms specially of our department. we have a library of which one of the floor is for cse branch. we also have departmental libraries. we also have a stadium in which we organise various sports events . we have well equipped computers lab and also one nano technology lab. | [academics]: currently i m studing computer science as it has wide scope and huge industrial demand. our curriculum is updated and we put a lot of extra effort along with faculties to get industrial ready. faculties are helpful in matter of academics not in matter of attendance and marks. | [placements]: almost 90% of students got placed. highest package stands 42 lacs per annum grabbed by student of our branch and the lowest package stands around 3 lacs per annum grabbed by student of civil engineering branch thus average salary for our college stands around 8 lacs. our recruiters are adobe (highest package given by this) , tcs ,wipro, samsung , l&t and many more. | [campus life]: academics is the best part of college as it focused on practical skills mainly. also our sports won many sports tournament. many faculties and staffs are of supportive nature. the campus is located at the centre of city with high population density. it's location is beautiful as it resides near river ganga. we have one the largest hospital of bihar known as pmch so there may be no worry during emergencies situations.

pros/cons: faculty is very approachable and knowledgeable, unique way of teaching good facilities and infrastructure is provided they encourage students to take lead, many opportunities provided. personally liked the runway incubator and the campus merch store run by students the tuition fees needs to be more affordable administration is not very helpful, proper communication should be given and students must be able to reach out to admins for any help according to the fees paid, the return on investment is less | placement experience: the placement rate is around 90%. students become eligible for campus placements from the start of 3rd semester, although you can get in earlier through summer internship and ppos. overall average package is around 8 lakh. top 15% students get 14-17 lakh. highest package for this year was 33 lakh. many top companies like amazon, adani, ey, pwc, kpmg, accenture, adobe, microsoft, infosys, bluedart, dell, deloitte, genpact and more come to the campus. i aim on getting into big 4 consulting firms.

[college infrastructure]: my college has all the necessary facilities and equipment. the infrastructure is however not the best . the desks and blackboards are old. however it is hygienic enough and the surrounded by greenery all around which makes it a good environment for studying. | [academics]: i'm currently studying mechanical engineering. i understand all the concepts clearly. yes, the curriculum is up to date and includes all the recent developments in my particular field. i'm a first year student so don't have much idea about getting job ready but the reviews from seniors are good about practical knowledge. | [placements]: my college provides a good average package . almost 80% of the students got place. highest package was 32lpa and lowest was 3.5 lpa . top recruitments are tcs , infosys, wipro,etc. the is supportive throughout. | [campus life]: my college has a lot of clubs including different sports and activities. the virtual trip of college has been good enough and kind of i liked the environment around , it's safe and calm. i participated in esports competition and had a great experience with their clubs.
college_name: SRM Institute of Science and Technology NCR Campus Ghaziabad

review_text: fest like tech mela, robotics, tech mart, freshers welcome is organized in uiet csjmu. every subject books are available in library. classes are well-infrastructured with individual seats and digital boards. clubs like coding, film, literary are there to encourage extracurricular. a sports stadium is also available on the campus.the overall fee structure is expensive, especially the fees of computer science are too high but the overall fee structure is a little bit high. if we discuss scholarships then up government or central government is also interested to provide scholarships.

review_text: [college infrastructure]: infrastructure of college is well developed and well maintained. there is 24*7 wi-fi high speed internet connectivity , hostels at cheap rates, quality food in mess with good number of variety, modern classrooms, and hospital for any kind of medical issues. | [academics]: i am pursuing computer science and engineering because i had great interest in coding and wanted to become software engineer. professors of iit patna are experienced and expert in their field of study. curriculum of our institute is fully updated and matches with requirements of industries. | [placements]: best thing about iit patna is extraordinary placements in recent years. average package of our college is 28 lakhs per annum which was quite good and highest package was 1.4 crores per annum. top recruiting companies in iit patna are amazon, google, microsoft, infosys, and many more.

[college infrastructure]: nsut offers decent infrastructure to its students and various amenities like basketball court, badminton court, gym, cricket ground, table tennis table, student centre, and canteen. apart from that it also includes clean washrooms. | [academics]: academics life of nsut is also very good. it focuses on studies of college, as a result of which many studies opt for higher education like post graduation and phd. regular exams are held and regular classes are also held. | [placements]: it is okay to say nsut offers great placement opportunities to its students. students from branches like computer science and information technology get very high packages from on campus placement drive.
college_name: Netaji Subhas University of Technology New Delhi

review_text: i choose this course since this was the best college available at my rank... the teacher to student ratio is 1:52..the teachers have all done their phd and have great knowledge about their subject barring 1 or 2 teachers passing the term exams wasn't difficult at all and exams are conducted every 1/2 monthsthe tech fest here is called mindbending and it is conducted in march, the library has almost all types of books in it but they are very old and worn out, the classrooms are equipped with projectors and there are no ac's available
college_name: Sardar Vallabhbhai National Institute of Technology - [SVNIT]

review_text: [college infrastructure]: campus of dtu is quite huge with modern classrooms, plenty of labs, and a nice library. campus is also offering good enough sports facilities and hostels (i did not live in hostel tho) , though some areas could use more maintenance | [academics]: b.tech in biotech at dtu has a quite balanced course with plenty of labs. professors know what they are teaching and there?s a good mix of theory and practical exposure. however, the workload is quite hectic around exams | [placements]: i did not personally sit in the process as i wanted to for higher studies but i know that companies in pharma and biotech come on campus and they offer good packages. overall they have good placements.

[college infrastructure]: yes our college have all the necessary infrastructure , facilities and equipment. there is a big library and sports facilities are really very good .they have all necessary equipments . hostels are also really very good. | [academics]: i am studying btech computer science and engineering .faculties are really very good and very helpful. they clear all our doubts. all faculties are mostly have done phd. all faculties are very hardworking. | [placements]: placements are really very good . almost placements are 100 percent. it is easy to get placement in institute srm of science and technology. placement cell is very good. almost all companies visit here. | [campus life]: campus life is really very good.

review_text: pros/cons: the campus is beautiful. it's surrounded by the nature,which i love the most. faculties are understanding. they guide us well. this time microsoft has also hired interns from our college. drainage system is very poor. you can't walk after rain. library is very small as compared to number of students. clubs and societies are not that much here. | course curriculum overview: actually i always wanted to learn new things and wanted to that how these computers, mobile phones are working when we click on them, this inspired me a lot to learn and create something new in the field of technology.that's i choose this course.

the annual fest and tech fest are freshers fest kiit carnival and kiit fest. in the central library, our university gets every book they and even every branch have its own library so the students can study easily. the sports group are very vast every sport have there a place to play we have a cricket stadium badminton court and etc there are mast social groups in the kiit and kiit has run a website called sap portal.from the 5semester students become eligible for campus placements if you are lucky and talented you got an internship in 2nd year this year the highest placement is 84lakh in cse which is not realized yet but soon it will officially be the percentage of students getting placements is very high because the mast placement is great you got placement. in this

college_name: Vellore Institute of Technology Chennai Campus

review_text: riviera and gravitas are two cultural and technical fets respectively. and in october gravitas and feb riviera is conducted. books and journals are at ample amount in the library classrooms are not good as they are old fashioned and non-acs rooms only lab have ac sports activities are very lessthe fee hike policy is good as if they mentioned particular fees at the time of admission....no fees would be increased at an earlier stage of time. scholarships are given through viteee to the top 100 ranks of 75 50 and 25%

[college infrastructure]: college infrastructure is actually very good. there is wi-fi connectivity throughout the campus. there are basically 2 labs for my branch; apart from this, we also have a lab established by intel, which is the intel core lab, and a lab established by apple, inc. we have a library completely dedicated to the circuital branches, which holds a good amount of books and fulfils our needs completely. the hostel is okayish but can be adjusted. compared with other hostels or pgs, the college hostel is much better. the mess isn't that good, but that too is manageable. | [academics]: the teachers are indeed helpful and highly knowledgeable, but their knowledge is going to waste as they aren't allowed to showcase their talent to the maximum due to the restrictions set up on them by the college curriculum. i don't think that the college curriculum is up to the mark for what the industry expects from an engineer. i feel the curriculum is a bit outdated. of course, the curriculum has been revised and modern subjects such as artificial intelligence and machine learning have been introduced, but the teachers have little experience teaching those subjects. | [placements]: in my branch, information science, almost all students have at least one offer from big multinational companies like morgan stanley, jp morgan, apple india, and many other companies that offer a wide range of job opportunities with very good annual packages. top roles that can be expected are data analyst, software developer, etc.

[college infrastructure]: this college has almost all necessary requirements. classes are air conditioned some classes are quite big but some classes are quite small for the required strength of students . food is not too good not too bad here | [academics]: i am studying currently in not allahabad pursuing b tech from chemical engineering . here teachers are good and committed in thier subjects. they have quite in depth knowledge about their field . curriculum here is not so updated but new batches are getting updated curriculum . | [placements]: placement here are good , if you do hard work you can easily good package . placement percentage in chemical is most of the times 100 percent but sometimes it is about 90 percent also . the highest package this year was 60 lakhs | [campus life]: campus life is not too boring here but also not too exciting also . here we have culrav and avishkar as main events.

review_text: [college infrastructure]: college infrastructure is really good. well furnitured classrooms and labs . all equipments that are necessary for the classes are always available in the classes and are well maintained . good hygiene is also maintained . | [academics]: studying be cse . good quality of study . excellent team of professors are there. study material content is really knowledgeable and easy to understand . proper circulations are there . new camps are also there for knowledge about recent developments | [placements]: placements are there avg rate is 4 to 5 laks per anum . the main company is infosys . 33 lakh per anum is highest package in recent year . placements started 5 sem onwards . good internships are also there . | [campus life]: campus life is really awesome . everything is there inside the campus . the decorum of the campus os really good . cleaniness is also there . good security for the students emergency facilties are available and also free inside the campus .

review_text: [college infrastructure]: the infrastructure is good. but all the faculty buildings are not too good, having many problems regarding infrastructure. acs, fans, smart boards, projectors never work properly. it's too much painful too study during summer season. | [academics]: my college offers rigorous academics with a focus on practical learning and innovation. expert faculty, state-of-the-art labs, and a comprehensive curriculum ensure students are well-prepared for their careers. | [placements]: college provides 100% placement so last year everyone got placed. the highest package was 6.75 lacs p. a and the lowest was 3.45 lacs p. a, the top recruiting companies for the course were icici, decathlon, itc, gati. top roles offered was area manager. | [campus life]: the campus life is beautiful. | [anything else]: nothing

[college infrastructure]: our college is having a very nice infrastructure. all classrooms, labs, libraries, canteens, all are well designed and well equipped. corridors and quadrangles are very much nice for enjoying. i really like it. | [academics]: academics wise our college is really good. i love it. all lecturers are well resourceful and very much highly experienced. libraries are having a well acquainted with all good reference books. co curriculum is also good. | [placements]: placement facilities are very high in our college. for mechanical sciences it is quite less. but overall output of college is really nice and it is still more increasing. many companies visit us every year. | [campus life]: nice. peaceful environment.

pros/cons: the teachers are good at teaching and also have a doctorate. class are very near to every boys hostel. seniors guide in each and every steps to students. the electricity facility problems are being faced. network issue exists during holidays and sundays. the fruits in fruit shops inside the campus is not good. | course curriculum overview: i'm very interested in ece branch. my interest towards the core is from my 10 th when i know about this branch by my seniors, relatives and also from the internet. the time given for examination is 2 hours.
