review_text: [college infrastructure]: iem has all the necessary infrastructures, facilities and equipment. it has all the necessary laboratories for various btech and mtech curriculum. each classroom is fitted with smart boards well maintained. each floor has a fast wifi modem set up. living spaces are clean and food hygenic | [academics]: btech cse offers a multitude of courses such as dsa, electronics and many more essential in mastering the course. quality of teaching is good. curriculum is up to date. iem also includes extra subjects like matlab php to boost a student's knowledge and make us job ready. they offer sdp and esp (skills for professionals) making us job ready. | [placements]: placements serve to be the central purpose which attracts students. iem boasts of good placement. top companies like google and amazon visit to take handful of students. amongst the regular companies. oracle and deloitte tops the list. deloitte, cognizant and tcs also take part in mass recruitment drives. | [campus life]: campus size is a bit unsatisfactory and so is the campus itself. however from the academics point of view it is quite good. from the view of play and sports there are just a handful number of basketball courts and thats all. classes are average and clean. lab facilities are good though
college_name: Institute of Engineering and Management Kolkata

review_text: [college infrastructure]: the infrastructure of our college is excellent. the academic area, labs, hostels, all sports ground, all students activities centre, student gymkhana are provided. all cultural, snt clubs, hobby group and many snt teams are also there, and there is no problem with wi-fi facility 24/7 . all halls have a canteen, and food quality is excellent | [academics]: almost all the professors are good. they are helpful in courses and also a personal problem, and they are doing work hard for students. professors teaching skills and understanding are good. some courses curriculum is relevant, and they are too much good. | [placements]: in the civil branch, students are not getting good placements and also they also not offer the highest salary. few students got an internship in the core. so this condition is so poor. so many students are not interested in civil because they think there is nothing. and many students from civil going for civil services in top mncs

[college infrastructure]: our campus is undoubtedly one of the best college campuses in the country. it is one of the best places that i have been in my entire life. situated near the zuari river not only adds to beauty, but also enhances the overall on-campus biodiversity. campus enjoys an edge over other campuses as it's located at a fair distance away from the city life which not only ensure safe and sound environment to ensure smooth procession of campus functionalities but also keep all services at a hand stretch. | [academics]: the level and quality of academics is very good. not only is the campus well equipped with highly qualified professors but also have highly skilled technicians and experts to help students develop expertise in any skill of their choice. | [placements]: coming towards the placements, 95+% of students get placed by the end of their final year disregarding what stream or discipline are they enrolled in. college also boasts an overall campus placement average of 13lpa ctc across all branches.

[college infrastructure]: all necessary facilities and equipment are available. classrooms are very comfortable and the library is also good. the laboratory although good needs to be updated more. hostels and sports centres are excellent and very well maintained. food is very hygienic and the living spaces, bathrooms and rooms are also regularly cleaned. | [academics]: i am doing a phd in psychology from here. quality of teaching is very good and the professors are very well qualified. the curriculum is regularly updated and regular seminars, as well as curricular events, are conducted by the department. | [placements]: in phd we do not have placements as such, but vacancies from different universities are often circulated via emails. for bachelors (b.tech) regular placements are held and there is a full-fledged placement cell. | [campus life]: campus life is amazing. sports like tennis, football, badminton, swimming, and even skating can be done. regular jogging, marathon or cycling sessions are also conducted. plenty of places for delicious food is available well within campus. some eateries are open till late at night (2:00 am). we even have an open air theatre (oat) with lots of eateries like dominos. you can get urself a pizza and enjoy a movie night under the starry sky.

there are several clubs for extracurricular activities like dance club, arturo(photography club), undekha(dramatics club), vibgyor(fine arts club), monochrome club(photoshop), alankar(music club) etc. for technical, coding club, robotics club, cim club, automotive club, aeromodelling club, zenith club(astronomy), enigma(quizzing club), fincom club etc. sports are cricket, football, hockey, basketball, tennis, badminton, athletics, table tennis, chess.placements and job opportunities are different for different branches. departments like mechanical, civil, chemical are not having very good placements whereas departments like computer science, electrical are having very good placements. our college offers various internships in different fields of research. i am not doing any internship yet. so i don't know about stipend provided.
college_name: IIT Ropar - Indian Institute of Technology - [IITR]

review_text: [college infrastructure]: the campus has good buildings, spacious classrooms, and well-equipped labs. there is a library. overall, it has all the basic facilities needed for students to study and enjoy college life.these are sports areas and | [academics]: teachers are helpful, the syllabus is updated, and classes are regular with good lab support for learning all subjects. labs are well maintained, and workshops help students gain practical skills along with theoretical knowledge. | [placements]: many companies visit the campus, and placements are good. a high number of students get placed in reputed firms with good salary packages, and the college provides training to improve interview and job skills. | [campus life]: campus life is vibrant with cultural fests, sports events, and active student clubs. the environment is friendly and supportive, with facilities that encourage learning, creativity, and overall personality development.
college_name: Dayananda Sagar College of Engineering Bangalore

review_text: the facilities of labs are very cool. you can find every equipment here with well developed labs and knowledgeable lab instructors. the sports facilities are also good. thapar has synthetic track, swimming pool badminton court basketball tennis football and volleyball courts.on the basis of jee mains result i got admission in the college. it depends upon the seats remaining in that particular course and thus the counselling take place. on that seat allotment itself fees has to be paid with hostel facility if required.
college_name: Thapar Institute of Engineering and Technology - [Thapar University]

review_text: jee mains 1, jee mains 2, jee advanced, now a days they are conducting two jee mains and one have to qualify in one of these exams to write jee advanced. jee mains will be conducted on fours days with two sessions morning and afternoon and for every session they will give cummulative percentile and selection will be based on thier merit. in jee advanced one have to get a rank below 1500 to get seat in iit guwahati ece branch.in 1 st year for one division there will a total students of 250 members and classes will be held in lecture halls so they cannot concentrate on us. tutorials will be there in morning 8 am to 9 am in that phd scholars will teach the problems given by the faculty and for that only 40 students will be there at max so we can ask doubts there. they are also good but not best but professor will teach in a very good manner.
college_name: IIT Guwahati - Indian Institute of Technology - [IITG]

review_text: campus life is happening as we have a fully residential campus. there are two major fests every year - breeze and surge and a lot of events all around the year. breeze is conducted in the month of march after mid sem exams. the library is very big and has thousands of books. we have smart classrooms that are equipped with the latest technologies and air conditioners and heaters function in the summers and winters. attention to sports is the thing that i love about snu. it hosts a lot of sports opportunities including training. competitions are conducted regularly. there is a lot of cultural and technical club. i am a part of gdsc.i will become eligible for campus placements from the 5th semester onward. tons of good companies visit our campus every year. to name a few, we have amazon, amex, dell, goldmann sachs, hp, etc. the highest package this year is about 55 lpa and the average package is 12 lpa and the median is 11 lpa. i guess over 90% of students got placed. i am hoping to get a good placement after getting the degree.

[college infrastructure]: college infrastructure has been marvel in its own at present, in 2018 the college infra was still in construction stage, now the campus has good infra with shiru cafes and good football ground and the mess is somewhat better now | [academics]: academic side the mechanical teacher should improve their teaching style, they should bring the upto date industry technology.they should improve interactions with fellow students more which is lacking as of now. | [placements]: placements is good when compared to other iits except iit hyderabad. iit indore is known for its cse. mech students get placed annualy around 7-12 lpa. placements for civil depeartment needs to be improved. | [campus life]: campus life is one you'll cherish , you'll remember it forever as you make good connections, networks, peer bonds.try to get involved in events like fluxus,baha, sports events like intra and inter iit

[college infrastructure]: mnit have all the nesessary infrastructure,facilities and equipment in campus.the facilities provided that provided by department for laboratries are very good and mnit have own computer center and good classroom. | [academics]: i am pursuing b.tech in civil engineering department in mnit.at mnit faculties are very good and supportive .they have well qualified and they have good technical skill.they keep updating student with new technologies. | [placements]: the quality of the placement of the departments are very good .highest package in 2019-2020 is 40 lac.amazon, flipkart and other prestigious company come for interview in mnit.jaipur is the capital is a good reason behind placement. | [campus life]: the college campus large in area.it is around 320 acares .campus include a hill which is very beautifull.college provide extra curriculam facilities like sports,debats, and inter nit ,intra nit games.
college_name: Malaviya National Institute of Technology Jaipur

review_text: [college infrastructure]: absolutely, our college boasts top-notch infrastructure equipped with modern facilities and cutting-edge equipment. classrooms feature interactive projectors and fully stocked laboratories, the library offers vast resources, and the sports center caters to diverse interests. hostels provide clean living spaces, complemented by hygienic and nutritious food options. | [academics]: i am pursuing btech because of its dynamic nature and its potential to make a meaningful impact. the teaching quality is exceptional with dedicated professors fostering an engaging learning environment. our curriculum is meticulously updated, incorporating the latest advancements in the field to ensure relevance and competitiveness. | [placements]: placement opportunities at our college are exceptional. a high percentage of students secured placements across various industries. the highest salary package offered was remarkable, particularly in cse. the average salary is around 8.5lpa. the placement process was enjoyable | [campus life]: our college campus is a vibrant hub of activity, surrounded by lush greenery and modern architecture. the faculty is highly knowledgeable and supportive, while the support staff ensures the smooth functioning of campus services. | [anything else]: overall, my college offers an enriching educational experience with top-notch facilities, dedicated faculty, and abundant opportunities for growth. its vibrant campus encourages active participation in academics and extracurricular activities.

[college infrastructure]: rvce?s sprawling 52-acre campus is set amidst sylvan surroundings, located about 13 km from the heart of bangalore. library has extensive collection of resources and classrooms are spacious and digitalized. | [academics]: rvce offers a comprehensive curriculum that focuses on project presentations from the first year itself. this experiential learning approach prepares students for industry environments. students benefit from exposure to different industries through organized visits. | [placements]: rvce?s placement cell actively supports students in securing placements. rvce attracts top companies, including microsoft, uipath, hpe, oracle, and more. mama is very supportive and help alot to get jobs for the students.

[college infrastructure]: modern infrastructure encompasses computer labs with good equipment, big classrooms, and a large library. the campus has wi-fi which helps mca students easily find resources for their projects and research. | [academics]: the mca program is structured and primarily on hands-on learning and, quite naturally, programming skills. the instructors are highly knowledgeable and enlighten the students, besides all these things, like software development and data analytics. | [placements]: placement cell working for mca students to bring tcs, infosys, and wipro to the college. jobs usually pay around ?4-6 lpa. very strong focus on it roles too. and their are coding clubs also which will help you gain practical hands on leanring | [campus life]: the campus life is lively with many tech festivals, coding competitions, and cultural events. mca students can also join coding clubs and meet friends from different backgrounds, making learning fun and unforgettable. | [anything else]: as i like here the ghmraphic designer and animation club which will give you a chance yo delve into learn additional skills
college_name: Ajay Kumar Garg Engineering College Ghaziabad

review_text: pros/cons: infrastructure, placement opportunities, student clubs yeah its very friendly, i only have done academic study faculties are top notch. good research facility infrastructure could have been even more. its not 100% developed | placement experience: for placements student will be eligible after 7th semester in 4th year. the final semester duration thays when placements season happen. we got higher package like 60lpa for top cse students median is 13 like that.
college_name: IIT Indore - Indian Institute of Technology - [IITI], Indore

review_text: [college infrastructure]: we all know iit delhi is known by its name. infrastructure is no less than anything private universities. our institute is widespread over 330acres of land. iit delhi campus is divided into four areas for logistical and administrative functions. all the iit delhi hostels run in cooperative mode, wherein the operations are handled by elected student leadership under the guidance of designated faculty members. all the facilities which a student need is available in the campus. one thing to be notice which i dislike, is that thee unhygienic washrooms, no canteen and less strength in the auditorium are some of the basic issues that faced by the students. | [academics]: every faculty having a degree of well reputed universities. every one of them is highly experienced and having a ground knowledge of their subjects. some of them have achieved national award as well. | [placements]: iit delhi is famous for its placement as well so, during our placement, prestigious firms such as rbs, kpmg, bristlecone, vedanta, infosys, hcl, mazars, cognizant, icici bank, kelton tech, tcs, and others came to recruit with huge package. all you need to work hard for getting package more than 30+. | [campus life]: brilliant campus life. | [anything else]: work hard for your dream job.

everything is good. i got some new friends. my college organises technical and cultural events too for students' enthusiasm. it's great being there. college also organises events during festivals like holi and diwali.because this college is reputative and prestigious one in delhi ncr. as it has great faculty so i don't face any issue with my academics and shouldn't worry about my exams as they cover up all the things with time.

[college infrastructure]: i found the infrastructure of nit jamshedpur quite ok. in my point of view their can be some more developments in the hostels. the facilities of classrooms, laboratories, libraries all are present in my college. sports department is also very much active for the students to participate. | [academics]: it has some brilliant teachers which are very well qualified. the quality of teachers is very high. as we are having advancements in the technology at a very high pace i think the colleges should also change the curriculum accordingly very fast but it is not happening that much. | [placements]: the average salary at nit jamshedpur is around 12 lpa. which this year due to recession has quite a decreased. but overall it is having great placements over the last 3-4 years. in my branch i. e civil their are good no. of companies that came on campus.

the cost of study here is minimal in comparison to all the private colleges out there 3 lahks per year is the normal college fee roi of the college is good you invest 12 lahks for four years and the average package of college is 10 lpa so good roi. scholarships are available to the category students as i said.as i said average package is about 10 lakhs for this college so roi is much greater than other private colleges out there so many fang companies visited there so placement is huge with the highest package of 36 lpa but the average is good so best college.

[college infrastructure]: no , i don't think that our college have appropriate facilities and equipment like if we talk about infrastructure the buildings are not we'll maintained even the main building where all the academic work goes on is also not reinnovated it is going on from 1921, when our college was established. | [academics]: i am involved in chemical engineering department and its my 2nd year only so i could not really say if the things which are taught are helpful or not but i must be saying that college should focus more on practical s rather than theory | [placements]: placements in our college in few specific branches are excellent like 100% people get placed and also at average package according to their branches. as long as we talk about placement procedure then again i am only in 2nd year so can't have say on this | [campus life]: if we talk about campus life then our campus is nearly 77 acres and we have so what can you expect from this but like life becomes easier by people not by the place so ya college life i good i should say

[college infrastructure]: ithe campus of the college was quite good, with greenery all around. every facility offered at the college was of good quality, and all these facilities were properly maintained. the college has wi-fi, labs, library, canteen, etc. facilities on the campus are easily accessible. students can easily obtain books and other study materials from the college library. | [academics]: all the faculty members of this college were experienced, helpful, qualified, and knowledgeable. most of the teachers had great experience in the field of teaching. the course curriculum was absolutely relevant and aligned with industry standards. exams were a little challenging to pass compared to other. | [placements]: placements at our college were quite good, with almost 60-70% of students securing on-campus placements every year. all students receive equal opportunities for placements. the average package offered in our course ranged between 6-12 lpa. top recruiting companies in this course were hul, tcs, wipro, etc. | [campus life]: campus life is amazing and provided a good ground and all ground are green | [anything else]: nothing else

[college infrastructure]: srm is a very spacious campus with a neat and clean infrastructure..there are seperate block for every department..with labs, libraries,ground,many canteen..foods are very good in jawa canteen..well maintained laboratories are there | [academics]: i'm currently studying mca degree..and the studies are good..staffs are good and politely handled each and every students..if you get enough knowledge by studying in this course you can easily get job.. | [placements]: there are many companies came to our campus,and more will come further.. placements in srm is outstanding and many students are getting placed in many companies.. salary package is very good like 3-4 lak per annum for a fresher..and a highest salary package is 13-15 lak per annum.. | [campus life]: college campus is excellent as it has a neat and very good infrastructure with wifi facilities all over the campus..in srm there is hospital facilities also..in case any emergency for students there will be discount in medicines
college_name: SRM Institute of Science and Technology Chennai

review_text: [college infrastructure]: the university have classrooms, laboratories, libraries and hostels as well. the hostels having wifi facilities over there and also having hygienic food as well. the living space is clean. overall the university is good. | [academics]: the quality of teaching is good as the teachers provide good study materials to the students. the curriculum is updated and includes all the recent developments in the various fields of education. the study makes the students job ready. | [placements]: the quality of placements is good. approx 80% placements are there in the university. the highest salary package offered by the company is around 8 lpa and the average salary package is approx 3 lpa. the placement process is smooth.

pros/cons: the good part is the location, it is situated in a region where it companies are nearby, it also provide decent but pacakage to majority of students. quiet big campus life as compare to other private colleges. affordable fee structure as in 10 lakh whole btech is completed. infrastructure is really bad and the buildings looks very old , needs renewation. the classes are non ac which creates a lot of problem in summers. | course curriculum overview: the curriculum is not uptodated as this is an aktu based college , so syllabus needs to be revised and should be made in such a way that it should realte to real field scenerio. firstly the college should develop a competetive programming environment so that students gets excited and focus more on real thing rather than just academics.
college_name: Ajay Kumar Garg Engineering College - [AKGEC], Ghaziabad

review_text: [college infrastructure]: delhi technological university has a beautiful campus . the college has a lot of animals including peacocks, dogs and cats . we students feed them. the halls and all the academic block are peaceful and genuine. the classes of first year students are held in pragya bhawan which has ac and a bit uncomfortable seats. but after all the college is a good experience in itself | [academics]: academics of dtu is great . the professors whether it be the assistant professors all of them know what they are teaching and are easily able to tackle the questions by the students. there are many labs in our 2nd semester in electrical engineering and all the labs are going very smooth because the lab assistants guide us properly | [placements]: placements system of dtu is famous all around the nation. you can get highest packages from 2cr per annum to average package if 15lpa. electrical is a core branch and if u want a core placement then its average is from 12-15lpa which is good according to me. | [campus life]: best campus life , lot of hangout spots inside the college, lots of societies and fests which wont make ur college life boring at all

[college infrastructure]: the college is situated far from the main pune city. the campus covers a large area, and it is almost complete hill if you include the mba campus. the college has a football team, cricket team, etc. the college faculty does very little help to support you with issues like attendance, etc. it provides a decent football ground. it has good and maintained gym facility. i would rate 3 out of 5 mess food. | [academics]: teachers and other faculty members in our college are very well-qualified. some teachers are somehow not able to reach out to every student as it should be happening. i feel a college should focus more on how to create good human beings and give the students a little more exposure to the industry and work-life. for overall faculty members, i would rate 3 out of 5. | [placements]: as unemployment has increased in our country, so it has had it's effects on placements in colleges as well. for mechanical course, few companies visit our college from the technical field for placements. mostly software industry companies hire students, and they give 6 months training and then the real job. the average salary offered in this field ranges between 3-4 lpa.

[college infrastructure]: iit mandi is a very huge institution. with many facilities provided in for the students. buses go time to time from north campus to south campus as college is very big so no one can go without bus from one place to another. also hostels are very nice, classrooms are quite modern and big. labs are provided with many instruments. | [academics]: all teachers need phd degree to be a faculty member of iit so no doubt in the qualification of all teachers. students are always build industry ready here because of good labs and workshops and competitions. teachers also keeps doubt sessions to take doubt of all students and make them understand things easily. | [placements]: our college has best placement from the companies like microsoft, deloitte , google, samsung, adobe , flipkart etc visits the campus for placing the students and students gets placed in with good packages. students get placed around 50lpa easily. almost 90% of students gets placed here.

[college infrastructure]: iit patna is a developing iit and getting better and better in passing years. recently new lecture hall and hostels for boys is established and classrooms are modern equipped with smart board, projector and acs. sports facilities are also quite good and students have opportunities to learn any sports of their choice. | [academics]: i am pursuing mechanical engineering . i want to go in research field so i choosen this mechanical engineering. teachers of mechanical department are highly qualified and experienced and very friendly in nature. teaching style of teachers are also very imoressive and they put lot of efforts in delivering lectures. | [placements]: our college have good records in terms of placements. last year 154 companies visited iit patna campus for recruitement and some of the top companies were google, microsoft, amazon ,etc. average package of mechanical department is 20 lakhs per annum and highest package was 82 lakhs per annum.

[college infrastructure]: college has all the necessary infrastructure and equipment. classrooms are with ac, boards projectors. laboratories are fully furnished and have pictorial representations as well. sports centres very good having gym, basketball court, volleyball, tennis court and badminton court. hostels are well ventilated, have good mess food, wifi near all rooms and gym is also inside. living spaces are very clean and food is very hygienic. | [academics]: i am studying mechanical engineering due to my interest in automobile industry. the quality of teaching is good, but could be enhanced with more practical aspects. curriculum is up to date and we have many workshops and siemen's center to do practicals, which further make you job-ready. | [placements]: placements are good in our college and for all branches, percentage of students placed is from 85 to 95%. highest salary package is 54 lpa and it was provided to computer science students. average salary offered is 7,00,000 per annum plus placement process is easy and pleasant. the placement cell is very supportive. | [campus life]: college has a very big area and the roads are really well maintained. we have a very good academic block with ac, and has various labs excellence labs of siemens. we have many cultural clubs and technical societies for students to engage in and refine their talents. the teachers and support staff are very kind, humble and always there for you whenever in need. the college is situated a little far from city centre, but has all the required transport and medical facilities to handle any emergency.

[college infrastructure]: galgotias university, located in greater noida, uttar pradesh, is a premier private institution known for its commitment to academic excellence and holistic development. established in 2011 by the galgotias educational institutions, the university has rapidly grown into a leading center for higher education in india. it is approved by the university grants commission (ugc) and offers a wide array of undergraduate, postgraduate, and doctoral programs across disciplines such as engineering, management, law, pharmacy, media, and humanities. the university boasts a modern, well-equipped campus with state-of-the-art laboratories, digital libraries, smart classrooms, and robust infrastructure. galgotias emphasizes industry-oriented learning, with strong collaborations with top companies and a curriculum designed to meet global standards. its faculty includes experienced educators and industry professionals who guide students in both academic and practical aspects. galgotias university also places a strong focus on innovation, research, and entrepreneurship through various centers of excellence and incubation programs. with a vibrant student community, cultural diversity, and numerous extracurricular opportunities, it provides an enriching campus life. recognized for its high placement record and academic achievements, galgotias continues to be a preferred choice for students seeking quality education with strong career prospects in a competitive global environment. | [academics]: my time at galgotias university has been a mix of learning, growth, and self-discovery. the campus is vibrant, with modern infrastructure, clean surroundings, and all the necessary facilities. classrooms are well-equipped, and labs are up-to-date, making practical learning effective. one of the biggest strengths here is the faculty ? most professors are knowledgeable, approachable, and supportive, especially when it comes to project work or career guidance. the university offers a wide range of extracurricular activities. i joined a couple of student clubs and participated in g-quasar, our annual fest, which was a highlight of my experience. the energy on campus during such events is amazing. there are plenty of opportunities to network, explore interests, and develop soft skills outside academics. hostel life has been comfortable, though there are occasional issues like maintenance delays or limited ac hours, but nothing unbearable. the wi-fi could be more reliable, but i managed fine overall. the placement process is quite structured, and companies like infosys, wipro, and tcs do visit. some friends got really good packages. personally, i feel galgotias has helped shape my future and given me a strong foundation, both academically and personally. it?s been a worthwhile journey. | [placements]: galgotias university has built a strong reputation for its consistent and effective placement support, ensuring high employability for its students. the university?s dedicated corporate resource center (crc) actively facilitates interactions between students and leading companies through campus recruitment drives, training sessions, and industry workshops. in recent placement cycles, galgotias university has achieved remarkable results, with over 1,200 reputed companies participating and offering more than 8,500 job opportunities. top recruiters include multinational corporations such as microsoft, amazon, deloitte, wipro, infosys, tcs, capgemini, and kpmg. the highest package offered has gone up to ?1.5 crore per annum, while the average salary package ranges between ?4 to ?6 lpa, depending on the discipline and student performance. the university emphasizes industry readiness by integrating skill development programs like the wipro talentnext and cognizant digital nurture program into its academic structure. additionally, collaborations with corporate partners and institutions through memorandums of understanding (mous) help enhance student exposure and training. overall, galgotias university?s strategic focus on career development, combined with strong industry ties and continuous mentoring, makes it a preferred destination for students aiming to build a successful professional future. its placement performance reflects its commitment to academic excellence and industry relevance. | [campus life]: amazing | [anything else]: no

in this college all the faculties teaching is very good. hardwork done by teachers for teaching us is so fab. syllabus of the course is too difficult. it's having all the academics like civil engineering departments and many companies are visited for civil, computer, electrical etc.the campus life fabulous because many fest like technical and cultural is organized as aero vjti, inferno robotics, society of automotive engineering debate and literacy societies also available. it holds annual fest as pratibimb, technovanza.

review_text: [college infrastructure]: the campus is sprawling. there are individual buildings for particular beaches of engineering. the labs are well equipped. overall the campus is beautiful. there's a lot of greenery which creates a lovely atmosphere. | [academics]: they have embedded courses which have both labs and theory which makes the learning process easy and better. the fully flexible credit system which is followed here helps us a lot as we are able to manage our studies in a better manner. | [placements]: the number of companies coming in this college is increasing every year. i think among the private colleges vit has the best placement cell. a lot of students get placed in top multi national companies across all branches.

[college infrastructure]: yes, my college has all facilities like classrooms, practical labs, mechanical workshops, a big library, sports facilities, college canteen etc...which are very much cleaner and hygienic..overall a clean environment to learn n grow | [academics]: i am currently a final year student of b.tech in biotechnology ...yes of course there is detailed explanation of each n every topic of this course by our beloved faculty members..yes obviously it makes us job ready for various pharmaceutical companies n biotechnology based industries | [placements]: placement records are outstanding...almost 83 percent of the students are placed in various organisations n more than 75 percent students gets excellent job offers admitting package as more as 8/ per annum | [campus life]: college is fully well maintained by our staff and faculty members students can participate in various sports activities in the campus beside academics..they can use the e-library which is also available at our own library where they can discover new topics of interest n knowledge online

[college infrastructure]: good infrastructure, high end facilities and equipments. smart system as usual but best one is tvs auto lab, siemens lab, controller training centre, power electronics labs, controls and automation labs etc. and those days were still the greatest. | [academics]: covid time really made a crash in academic, which is still a lot of real time unused , but got back on course during 3rd and 4th year. final year was my biggest year in my college life, leading a project and completing it with a great recognition is such an accomplishment. | [placements]: placements were above 90% ,many of us got selected in core company like microchip, titan-teal, tata elexi, embedded ur , etc . it companies have got most of us placed into , with packages ranging from dream to super dream companies. | [campus life]: it doesn't give me any feeling of missing, instead i can live with its glimpses, glimpses of people i met , glimpses of people i wished to talk , glimpses of regrets, glimpses of downfalls, glimpses of those hard time that i came over, glimpses of motivation that made my attitude today. | [anything else]: college time were many can have an unexpected and path changing cameos of random people entering and changing your life, and the rest life is just going along those changes and thinking about those people in good times. tce?? made me one who can't deny this.

[college infrastructure]: infrastructure is good. contains all the things that a good clg should have and yes all are properly maintained. sports facilities are a bit less in number as compared to the amount of crowd in clg, but all kinds of sports and gym is also available. | [academics]: academics are not as good as most of the teachers are inexperienced. really not much to know if you are solely depended on classes, but better than most tier 3 colleges. curriculum is very up to date, but the teachers are not. | [placements]: placements are only good if you compare it with other tier 3 colleges. many companies come to hire giving decent amount of salary. the bad thing is the false marketing the clg does to attract students and they are doing it a lot. please don't fall in such traps. | [campus life]: campus life is full of fests, festivals, activities. you will definitely enjoy. the bad thing is you cannot go outside campus even during day without taking permission of your parents and warden. it is not a very big campus like other universities, it has decent amount of space only, but campus activities will keep you occupied.

[college infrastructure]: the campus of college is very lush with greenry and the facilities provide by the administration like ac classrooms,wifi connectivity,and pure environment is provides here.good paths and cleanliness is everywhere. | [academics]: the faculty is very good, they know antor their respective subjects and very well proficient. they also encourage the students to take part in co curricular activites. meanwhile the faculty is very supportive. | [placements]: the college is biased towards the placements computer science engineering although the placement of other departments are good but not up the mark. their is more improvement is needed in terms of placements. | [campus life]: the campus life is fine. the peer group is amazing.

[college infrastructure]: in college are infrastructure building are excellent because and all types facilities are available in college and advance level equipment having in college, classroom facilities having smart board and free wi-fi facilities | [academics]: academic in college are excellent because cirrrculum are excellent and also updated in current industry relevant to subject and recently development in pratical knowledge in course and they're providing placement training to get jobs | [placements]: placement in college are excellent because cirrrculum are updated and placement quality are excellent and ninty five percentages of students are getting placement and high salary package 8lpa avarage salary package are 3lpa | [campus life]: campus in college are excellent and best in sports extracurricular activities and culture events and clubs activities and staffs are supporting the students in good way to achieve goals and handling emergencies situation in cool way

[college infrastructure]: the college has best infrastructure. we also have gym, swimming pool, library, and many lakes. there is only one good hostel, but its food is avreage. the classrooms are in good condition, and ac works well in the summer.there is a sports ground in the hostel, and for girls, many sports facilities are available. | [academics]: teachers are quite qualified and very supportive. they understand students' needs properly. the course is good, and many things are taught apart from studies, which directly help with industry-level work or production-level code.semester exams are quite tough, as there are two exam first mid-sem exams and one end-sem exam.there are also practice subjects that have credit for each subject and weightage. faculty members are best for all courses. | [placements]: about 60% students were placed this year in computer engineering department of nit kurukshetra. the highest package was 55lpa, the lowest was 6 lpa, and the average package was 9 lpa . the top recruiting companies. these companies also provide stipends for internships.

[college infrastructure]: you can't expect much more than what it is. the hostels are okay shape, classrooms and are big enough and have sufficient ventilation. college library is a pretty conducive place for studies and other professional work. don't expect lightning wifi everywhere on campus. same for mobil data coverage. lan cables become your lifelines then. oh and mess food, well it's sub-par but if you can manage with what they have it's just fine. you'll get by so don't worry too much.. moreover, they have decent facilities for sports, music and other recreational activities so no complaints there though. but what it does lack is acs in most places (apart from library and a few labs) given mangaluru's humid weather in recent years. also, our swimming pool has been closed for at least the past 2 years if not more, so that needs to change real soon. | [academics]: most professors are really good and supportive. i have has the pleasure of learning from a few of them. real cool people. but there exist a few which really need to either up their game or be slightly more considerate towards the students. the syllabus, atleast for eee and the first year subjects needs to be slightly more updated i feel but again this needs time. if you do attend classes regularly, listen to the professors and are consistent enough scoring a good cgpa is not difficult at all. | [placements]: so this year the placements have taken a major hit due to recession, pandemic recovery, and a mix of other reasons. in fact, cse, it and other circuital branches (till eee) were also struggling quite a bit but core still endured enough to place most students. a good mix of companies like texas instruments, qualcomm, nvidia, analog devices and other come for electronics. microsoft, jp morgan, accenture, barclays, deutsche bank, walmart, accenture, goldman sachs are regular visitors for sdes. caterpillar, reliance, bpcl, ola electric, tata, ge, bajaj, l&t, exxonmobil and several different psus comd for core recruitments. deloitte, pwc, icici, thorogood, zs are all pretty cool recruiters for business roles. and lastly, wells fargo, sprinklr, and host of other startups come for varied roles. | [campus life]: probably the best part of nitk. fests are huge thing in college. you can find a college club for anything you want to explore or pursue parallel to studies. really supportive seniors and batchmates. they ensure you are the best version of you.
college_name: National Institute of Technology Karnataka Surathkal

review_text: pros/cons: nice campus, with gym, ground, library and everything that a student needs great professors who always supports students nice club culture which focuses on student skill development library time is too short, it will be great to make 24/7 | course curriculum overview: i got admission in mechanical engineering according to my rank in josaa. i actually like my course and i can use the knowledge of machines to solve real world problems i suggest that here in my college engineering graphics is thought in old fashion way in an a2 paper instead of modern tools like auto cad

pros/cons: i like the campus of the college which is very green i like the sport facilities in the college almost every faculty of the college is iitian i like that i didn't like the college's 70% attendance policy i didn't like the gender ratio of the college i didn't like the food facility of the college | placement experience: there is no rule for for the placements. you can see for the placement on second or third year or fourth year also and 82,00,00 and lowest package is something five lakh and average package is 18,00,00 almost 97% student is placed

review_text: pros/cons: there is very good environment in sikkim, mount kanchanjunga is clearly visible from hostel rooms . very peaceful place for study . most of professors are well qualified here . faculties used to teach industry relevant things . so, despite being soo much problem here , students used to placed in big mncs from here like apple, nvedia, microsoft..etc right now, infrastructure here is not well, in hostels there is fixed timming for water supply. but there is new permanent campus is setting up in namdong , so, we are hoping for better . some professors are literally so irritable here. they treat students like school going nursery kids . academic pressure is soo much here, professors used to give soo much assignments, projects, copy paste stuffs ..etc, they used to take viva , class tests , presentation regularly(every week). there is continuous evaluation process. | placement experience: placement is overall good here. students from ece/eee are better placed than cse here. here, companies like nvedia, apple has given the highest package. previous year highest package is 55 lakh ,which had given to two students from eee branch. this year highest package is 35 lakh . which is offered by two students. now ,i am concluding all branch avg and placement percentage - civil -70%placed mechanical- 100% placed eee-92% ece-90% cse/ai- 80% overall -86% average - 8.85 lpa median-7.5 lpa highest -35 lpa
college_name: National Institute of Technology - [NIT], South Sikkim

review_text: [college infrastructure]: the university infrastructure is very good and the facilities in labs and sports is great.all kind of sports are available and there coaches to train in you in your interested sports.the library is one of the great thing in university all kind of are available and it is very peaceful. | [academics]: i am studying b.tech(cse) 2nd year. the quality of teaching is very good for each and every subject there are many faculties so we can choose our faculty and curriculum is really very great.the curriculum they are providing is very useful to placements.. | [placements]: average package is 4.5 lakhs.more than 400 companies wii come for placements.the university is very supportive to each and every students. university is training every student in aptitude and coding skills . | [campus life]: campus life is awesome you can enjoy in the campus.there is an opportunity to learn new things to get know about new things.teachers are very supportive they wii help us get out problems and doubts.vit is a place to learn chance to grow.

pros/cons: that's a new iit so infrastructure is very good . it is better as compared to old iit it present in himachal pradesh so campus is very beautiful as it is in mountains. robotics environment is very good , i can say it is better than some tier 2 collges campus is located far from main airport city chandigarh , so it is hard to travel there campus is small i think as it is 2nd generation iit so it is in construction phase in rainy season it is difficult to travel the nearest city due to flood and landslide situations . | course curriculum overview: the curriculum is quite good . it is very relevant like we have course on thermodynamics, rigid body mechanics which is useful in mechanical engineering and there are also robotics course for all branches so that every one can know the basics of robotics . there are coding courses for everyone so that everyone can know tech field also there are extra curricular courses which are very relevant to our daily life like language speaking courses like french , german , english . also our college has started have semester exchange facility available to foreign colleges.
college_name: IIT Mandi- Indian Institute of Technology - [IITM], Mandi

review_text: i choose this course because i am interested in the healthcare industry. on average in this course, there are 15 - 30 students and for each subject different faculties are allocated. faculty members are quite knowledgeable with ph.d. qualifications. teachers are cooperative and understanding. a semester is of 4 - 5 months. with 3 internals and 1 external exam. the curriculum itself is easy, study a bit harder, and it's easy to gain a high cgpa.i am personally doing an internship at apollo spectra hospital, greater noida. it is paid internship. my students have joined different hospitals, blood banks, and labs for their dissertation work. the students who were unable to do their internship outside the campus were offered to do it under their mentor's assigned.

pros/cons: its lecturers and quality of lectures they care a lot. its infrastructure it is well maintained on outside. its cafeteria it is well equipped with everything. its hostel mess food it was below average. its hostel facilities bathroom were open . there are only three courses available so i think they should add more. | placement experience: from fifth semester internships start , many big companies come for recruitment but they all give job in india so if we want to go abroad we have to apply out off campus . the packages offered in campus placement are good max of students get the job.
college_name: Indian Institute of Information Technology - [IIIT-K], Kota

review_text: [college infrastructure]: the infrastructure of the college is good and well maintained here all the facilities are available in the college such as the wifi smart boards laboratories and library in the college and full of clean and hygiene space | [academics]: the academic of the college is good and here i'm studying m.com because this college is very well known and getting the best result every year and quality of the teaching is good in the college and study makes job ready | [placements]: the placement of the college is very good most of the students get placed by getting the good package from the college and the percentage of the students get placed is approximately 90% which is very good | [campus life]: the campus life of the college is good and i'm getting the good experience from here and all the faculty member and the students are very friendly in nature and helpful there location is safe and good for the girls

[college infrastructure]: the college is having the necessry infrastructure spread out in 70 acres!!it has smart classrooms which are regularly used !libraries are updated on regular basis with new journals and booksdifferents streams have different libraries here!!living spaces are clean and hygenic. | [academics]: i am studying cse btech>quality of teaching was the basic criteria for admission here!!curriculum takes care of the 4 cornered development of student !!it is regularly updated with interseting facts in addition with.it provides a great encouragement to students for research also | [placements]: the placements of the college as heard by seniors and observed till today are really good.85% is this years placements!!avg package of the college is 5 lakhs/year!highest salary offered this year was 32 lakhs/year!!being first year student i dont know about easiness of placement process

review_text: [college infrastructure]: the infrastructure is quite good compared to other colleges in patiala with this good reputation. the new computer science block is amazing with great interiors and facilities. the hostels are good too except for some old hostels. the hostel mess are decent. | [academics]: the course is good especially for computers, electronics and mechanical engineering. the facility ranges from decent to great. you get various opportunities to work on projects also with the faculty. the mechanics faculty is highly experienced. | [placements]: for a private university in engineering it's placements are rather great with only bits being better. the average package of computer students is highest with decent number of core competencies coming for other branches too. | [campus life]: the campus life is great. you have alot for fests and completions. there are many good hangouts throughout the campus, a decent market that provides all general products and some some decent food joints.
college_name: Thapar Institute of Engineering and Technology Patiala

review_text: the campus of our college is awesome and quite big in terms of area. you must have a cycle or vehicle to roam around the full campus. greenery is everywhere on the campus. no pollution inside the campus. the infrastructure of our college is quite good but is it also improving day by day. recently naac comes to our college for the college infra is quite improved a lot within some days and they accredited this time an a grade from a b grade in past. social life is pretty awesome and you can roam around with your friends anywhere anytime. our classes are fully renovated and smart. lab facilities are quite good but improvement should be required especially in electronics and electrical labs. we have other building called the r&d building for cse and it branch labs. the computer labs of the r&d building are best. now coming to clubs yes there are plenty of clubs are there in our college depending on your interests you can join anyone. you can join more than 1 club with no restriction on the number.i choose the best branch of this college that is computer science and engineering because it's none other than placements. no doubt you get what you deserve after graduating from this premier institute. the faculty here are highly qualified most of them are doing their ph.d. from iits and very good reputed collage . student-faculty ratio is also very good. the teaching method is ok-ok it depends branch-wise, for cse and it branches most teachers are very good than other branches. coming exams in every semester are two-semester exams mid-semester followed by end -of the semester and many quizzes between them. exams are scheduled and done at their scheduled time. to pass the exams you have to like start studying at least 1 week before the mid-semester and at least two-week before the end of the semester. for quizzes and other stuff just before night study is enough.

[college infrastructure]: the campus is sprawling and well-maintained, providing a conducive environment for learning and relaxation. the architecture blends modern design with green spaces, creating a pleasant atmosphere. the hostel accommodations are comfortable, clean, and equipped with modern amenities that cater to students' needs. the well-organized hostel management ensures a safe and friendly living environment | [academics]: the curriculum is well-structured, blending theoretical knowledge with practical applications. the institute offers a wide range of courses that cater to diverse interests and career goals. additionally, the emphasis on research opportunities and industry collaborations enhances the learning experience. | [placements]: mnnit allahabad's placements are remarkable, boasting excellent industry connections and high success rates. the institute's proactive training equips students with crucial skills, resulting in well-rounded professionals.
college_name: Motilal Nehru National Institute of Technology Allahabad Prayagraj

review_text: [college infrastructure]: infrastructure for mba, classrooms are well-maintained, ac-enabled with smart boards and campus wi-fi (can be patchy). library is huge and well-stocked. no course-specific lab, but computer lab access is available. overall, campus vibe is great, lush greenery, amazing and humongous sports grounds, and two cool canteens. | [academics]: most teachers are helpful and qualified. about half are genuinely amazing, engaging, interactive, and make learning fun. others are more traditional. the curriculum is relevant, especially for analytics, finance, and audit, but not fully industry-ready unless you take extra initiatives like internship. | [placements]: i am from mba 2024 batch. most of this information is from seniors and batchmates. about 60-70% of students got placed. average package is 7.5 lpa to 8 lpa, the highest salary is 17 lpa to 18 lpa, and the lowest salary is around 5.5 lpa | [campus life]: campus speeded around 50 acers of land. we can engage in indoor activities like carrom, badminton, chess etc. | [anything else]: no

i choose this course because i'm passionate about software engineering. there will be definitely faculty: student ratio that will be perfect, every teacher comes and teach their subjects with no issue with the faculty: student ratio. some faculties are doing ph.d. and a few teachers are also iit(titans), and all teachers cannot be good at teaching but yeah some of them teach just okay and some of them teach excellently.for tuition fees i mean the cost to study we get scholarships based on our ranks and percentage in certain exams and hostel fees are based on which kind of room you opted for and it ranges from 60000 to 180000. they provide scholarships ships on the basis of the lpunest exam if you reach a national level at sports if you score a great percentage in 12th grade.

pros/cons: i like the hostel rooms and infrastructure this college has many games to play like indoor and outdoor for every three room they kept water coolers the place of the iiitraichur is very less raichur place is very hottest in the karnataka state very less people and less courses they offer | placement experience: i think so from 7th semester they are eligible for campus place ments. amazon bouch infosys and some more other company they made many offers the hisggest package offered is 48lpa and averages is 21 and the lowest is 15lpa. 40% of students will be placed . after the degree i will keep a company

review_text: [college infrastructure]: nice facilities include wi-fi, huge ac library, gym, music club, game zone, hygienic food, etc. the classrooms are nice and well furnished. the food of the mess and canteen are also good. they also provide facilities like gym for the students. the students are comfortable reading in this environment. | [academics]: the teachers are nice and helpful. you can freely express your doubts to the teachers. the semester exams are not that hard if you remain up-to-date with the topics that are taught in the classes. you will surely like this college. they are supportive and kind by nature. | [placements]: there were a total 50 students in my cs branch. the highest package is 25?35 lpa and the minimum is 6 lpa. companies like tcs, infosys, microsoft, and amazon come to this college for campus placements. maximum 250 students get jobs out of 300 from the college. so the college having best placements records.

amity conducts chroma fest and sangathan. chroma is conducted in the month of feb and sangathan in october. they have multiple libraries and more than enough books available in the library for every stream. classrooms are air-conditioned with clean and comfortable amenities. they have dedicated grounds for each game, one can simply go to the sports room and issue the kit. there are various groups such as cultural, literary, etc.i chose this course because it was really diverse, and dealt with numerous interesting subjects such as radio, film and television, editing, political science, etc. 5:1 the professors in the university were ugc approved, some were ph.d.'s others persued ph.d. they had good teaching skills and experience. final exams would take half to one month to complete. the difficulty level of the exams was medium.

there are 3 fests, tech fest plinth, sports fest desportivo and cultural fest vivacity. they are conducted in january and february. almost all the books the courses are available in the library. sports facilities are really good we have courts and tracks for almost all popular sports and there is our club sankalp which tries to bring a change in the life of people by helping the needy and educating nearby villages and mess workers.students are eligible for placement from the 5th sem. more than 100 companies visit including google, amazon. out of 587 students, 579 had at least a single offer. the highest package is 53 lakh and the average is 14.6 lakhs. more than 98% of students were placed. i plan to do an mba after btech.
college_name: The LNM Institute of Information Technology - [LNMIIT]

review_text: [college infrastructure]: the institute building is about 100 years old. it has many facilities like gymnasium hall, swimming pool, etc..classroom?s seating capacity is sufficient enough to adjust all the students comfortably. hostels are provided with wifi. | [academics]: quality of the teaching is good. teachers are really experienced and are helpful as they provide notes required for the preparation of the exams by which student only studies what is requires instead of wasting time learning other things not relevant for the exam. | [placements]: placements are good specially for the circuital students as compared to the non circuital students. reputed companies like soben, goldsmith hire from campus. placement opportunities for civil students are limited | [campus life]: the campus life is really fun reason being a lot of events are held at the campus like the pecfest. there are many sports facilities like cricket, basketball, badminton court, lawn tennis, etc..

review_text: [college infrastructure]: our college infrastructure is out standing.the moment you step foot on this stunning campus, you'll be surrounded by cutting-edge technology, and a vibrant learning environment that fosters creativity, collaboration, and growth. from sleek and spacious classrooms to advanced labs, libraries, and makerspaces, every detail has been carefully crafted to inspire and empower students to reach their full potential. with its lush green spaces, modern amenities, and world-class infrastructure, geu sets a new standard for academic excellence and innovation. | [academics]: i completed my masters of technology is cse. faculty is very experienced and friendly . curriculum is industry relevant and updated and includes every recent development.we are empowered to think critically and solve problems creatively. | [placements]: graphic era university's placement record is truly impressive! top companies like google, microsoft, amazon, and more flock to campus to recruit talented students. with a dedicated placement cell, geu ensures students are industry-ready, with training programs, internships, and mentorship. the results speak for themselves: 95%+ placement rates, highest packages reaching 45 lpa, and a strong alumni network. geu's placement success is a testament to its academic excellence. | [campus life]: amazing and veru good environment

the fees structure is decent, the cost to study here if you are a day scholar is around 10,50,500. but if you are a hostler it's around 16,00,000. according to me, there is around a 5-6 percent fee hike every year for the next four years like for example if i get admission in 2021 my fees for the next four years are 10 lakhs for the student getting admission in 2022 will have total fees of 11 lakhs. there are scholarships but those are very hard to get they are based on jee advanced ranks and if you have that good jee advanced rank you will probably end up in a better collegethere are two campuses of jilt noida one sector 62 campuses and another sector 128 campuses the 62 campus is good it's in the prime location of noida but sector 128 is very bad it's in outskirts plus very small about half the size of 62 and 62 is itself 16 acres only. sports facilities are quite decent in sector 128 and 62 is average there are football, cricket, basketball and badminton and volleyball courts. there are several clubs and societies which you can join that is a very good part about jiit. there are curriculum books available in libraries but not any extra books

review_text: [college infrastructure]: as we are mentored by mnit , jaipur whose infrastructure is best . it has all the necessary requirements,facilities and equipment provided by mentored institute. it provides all neccessary labs,facilties from studying and they all are well maintained . we have a lab which is 24/7 open for studying so that studemt get personal space to learn or proper internet facilties. | [academics]: we have our own permanent faculties now from last two year and provide good quality of teaching. our curriculum is already updated and we are with best courses in semesters. we are one semester ahead from other institutes as we have all the necessary courses only not any course which is not useful. | [placements]: till now we have our placement cell merged with mnit jaipur and provide 80-90% placements. highest till now is 29 lakhs p.a. and average is 10-12 lakhs p.a. last year we got 100% placements in companies like amazon,goldman sachs ,gap,flipkart,etc.. | [campus life]: campus life is good , secure and safe and its location is also good .
