review_text: [college infrastructure]: the college has great infrastructure facilities. it has big classrooms. it has a computer lab. the college has two conference room and it also has a common auditorium. the college has a cafeteria for the students. it also have a big playground. | [academics]: the quality of teaching is very good. it encourages participation and real world application. the faculties are also very supportive and approachable. the teachings methods of the college is also very good. | [placements]: the placement rate here is high. most of the students get placed in good companies after their graduation. many multi national companies do visit the college every year. some of them include microsoft, bajaj, mercedes benz india etc. | [campus life]: the college provides a very enriching and rewarding experience to all students. the campus life here is very good. the college conducts so many activities and events for the students to make the campus life more good.

[college infrastructure]: overall good, but needs drastic correction in academic decorum. profs are good, if you want to improve you're at right place. no extra burden of classes, but need more extra curricular activities. thank you | [academics]: free atmosphere for students, fair examinations, but syllabus and exam pattern requires revision, as job market is changing curriculum should also match industry standard, overall decent academic scenario for research also | [placements]: currently startups are not allowed but if startups comes overall placement scenario will improve. you are allowed to try off campus placements, on an average if you are sincere you can get a decent job | [campus life]: need more extra curricular activities

[college infrastructure]: it is just amazing if we talk about the hostel facilities. also the academic section is well maintained. my college is fully equipped with facilities like wifi, libraries etc. their are smart classrooms in the campus.. | [academics]: it has a strong academic culture. the teachers are driven to make students placement ready and as the new technologies coming into the tech world, they are also being updated in the course. definitely, you have to learn some important things from outside. | [placements]: it is very important for every student to look for the college placements before choosing it. in nit jamshedpur the placements opportunities are very good for the main branches and if you give your best then you will definitely land into big companies.

[college infrastructure]: amazing infrastructure , equipment for playing every thing is well planned and arranged . to issue this is an easy task as well. you have to walk around 1km to reach out to your class. therefore most of students picked bicycle in their first year . | [academics]: being an it student i love programming they are providing lab , computer centre to excel in these fields. professors are too good they allow sometime mostly during fest to not take classes .this make us to love teachers . | [placements]: highest package 1.8 crore(international) of a software engineer girl .in my branch maximum is 62lpa .almost 90% placement is there . no tension to not getting placement .therefore we try to explore ourselves with better options. | [campus life]: campus is big being delhi a small institute that will this college shorter .otherwise it was bigger than iitd.

[college infrastructure]: well-equipped with modern instruments and technology. labs for civil engineering include structural engineering labs and geotechnical labs. classrooms are spacious and equipped with modern teaching aids like projectors and smart boards. | [academics]: the course curriculum for my branch could be made more structured and flexible. semester exams are difficult; it depends on the professor taking the course but overall, if you have prepared for the whole semester, it's easy and if you only do them two days before exams, it's going to be tough. | [placements]: top recruiting companies include larsen & toubro and tata. about 25% of students secured internships in both tech and core sectors. in the tech sector, most students were placed in companies like google and jp morgan. | [campus life]: campus life is amazing. | [anything else]: nothing
college_name: Jaypee Institute of Information Technology Noida

review_text: [college infrastructure]: this is the most negative part of this college, infra level is not upto the mark, for first year classes are held in nab which has good infra and every resource for a modern-day lecture requirement, but 2nd year onwards classes are conducted in old departments in which many are not air-conditioned,classes,labs are very old,i am giving it 3/5 because pec have ece and seimens ee labs(really next level),for mess and hostels, it will take time for adjustment but you will start loving it. | [academics]: i am in electrical, though academics of this college are really poor, this scenario is with most of the iits and nits and pec is at the same level as them, the thing is no one here cares much about academics, 8cg is a bar for placements and most of the students study 1 week before to cross it, at the end placements matter, students spend more time on learning required skills rather than old curriculum academics for a better career, and i believe this is the best pf tier-1 colleges. | [placements]: you can say pec is a placements machine, overall average package this year is 16.9 lpa, for cse 25lpa, for ece 18.3lpa,for ee 15.2lpa, you can calculate for others too by overall package, highest on campus was 84lpa given to 6 students, off-campus highest was 1.5cpa, elite companies like apple, microsoft, google, amazon, etc visit campus almost every year, so you can get an assured placement once you enter a circuital branch in pec(you have to work hard, students are very competitive in nature). | [campus life]: if you can manage pec's chandigarh college life, then it is heaven and if you can't that will be hell for you.pec's own campus literally has nothing inside it, but here comes its location, it is in the main centre of chandigarh, and everything is available in a radius of 10km, including hospitals, clubs, pubs, stadium, cinemas, malls, libraries, gardens, lakes, hills everything, you will get a peak to enjoy of your life in pec for sure(again only if you balance it with career building).

after third year students get eligible for appearing in campus placements. many great companies visit our campus like amazon, microsoft, wipro, tcs, etc. and offer great deals. maas recruiters also visit our campus. avg pacgkage is around 5-6 lakhs. about 85% of the students gets placed every year. my plan after taking the degree is to crack a big offer in reputed company.i didn't chose this course as i was given this course according to my jee mains marks. but after learning about the course i am satisfied from the branch i got(aeie). for per 10 students there are two faculties available. all the faculties are well qualified and have a great method of teaching.

[college infrastructure]: our college have all the basic infrastructure, facilities and equipment but the building is old. we have a central library , laboratories are well maintained and there are eight hostels . we have smart board in our classes and the living spaces are clean. | [academics]: i am doing b. tech degree in instrumentation engineering. the quality of teaching in our college is good all the teachers are highly qualified. yes our curriculum is updated regularly. yes what we study make us job ready. | [placements]: the quality of placements in our college is not very good. about thirty to fourty percent students are placed every year. the average package offered is around eight thousand per annum. yes the placement process is easy and plesant for me. | [campus life]: our college campus is awesome with very good natural beauty . we have greenary everywhere in our college. we have four field and a large pond in our campus.

[college infrastructure]: the college has all the modern facilities needed for engineering studies. every department has dedicated buildings and updated laboratories. the central library is well-equipped and has a peaceful reading hall. classrooms are modern and have audio-visual systems. hostel facilities are available with good security and basic services. the food quality is okay. for sports lovers, there is a football field, cricket ground, and badminton court. the campus is clean, organized, and has a very calm study environment. | [academics]: the faculty is a mix of young and experienced professors. most of them are qualified and explain the subjects well. teachers provide notes, arrange doubt-clearing sessions, and help students with project work. a few professors even help students prepare for competitive exams like gate and gre. guest lectures from industry experts are sometimes arranged. teachers take attendance seriously, and students are expected to maintain regularity. the internal and final exams are conducted smoothly and fairly. | [placements]: college has a strong placement record in nagpur. around 70?80% of students get placed in good companies. the average package is around 4 lpa, with some students receiving up to 10?12 lpa from top firms. many service and product-based companies visit every year. the placement team is active and conducts training sessions, mock interviews, and soft skill classes. students who are serious about learning and keep their cgpa above 7 have higher chances of getting placed. internship opportunities are also provided.
college_name: Yeshwantrao Chavan College of Engineering Nagpur

review_text: pros/cons: i like the place of my college very much because there is not any presence of summer all 12 months cool weather the campus i love most because it is green so much and you can chill outside anytime | placement experience: yes placement's are there because it's a nit from 3rd semester you are eligibile to apply for internship and from 7 sem you are also eligible for campus placements many companies visit our campus for the placements some famous names of coma pansies are adobe amazon flipkart mahindra infosys tata black rock etc and the no of offers made differ each year but the average of offers remains 150plus highest package of our college is 51 lpa which is bagged by a cs girl this year from amazon and the average package also differ by the branches but for mechanics and cs branch a the average package is as good as 10lpa percentage of students greeting placed is very good for the mechanical and cs branch like 95% placements are there and for others branches also 70% placements is there so placements is not a big issue in this college ???? my plans are simple mai have to maintains a good ointer to be eligible for campus placements and get a good job and settle in life
college_name: National Institute of Technology - [NIT] Meghalaya, Shillong

review_text: the admission process to national institutes of technology in india is through the joint entrance examination organized by national testing agency. over 12 lakh students participate in this exam. after the entrance exam result came,we submit our desired options. after that jossa will allot seat according to our rank in the exam. after the allotment they called us for the verification of certificates and after that they allow seats according to our preference i choose this course because i love engineering as my career. also civil engineering is my favourite branch. i am interested in making plans of buildings and making them real.the national institute of technology calicut host one of the most popular and massive technical and cultural fest in india the technical fest is called as tathva.students from almost all parts of south india came here for attending the workshops, events and lecture.the college provide participation certificates to them. the cultural fest is named as ragam held in january for three days which is one of the most biggest fest in south it is mainly started in the name of a student who studied in this college and killed by the police during the national emergency in india. these two fests are popular in whole india.

[college infrastructure]: college infrastructure is outstanding. it has the best infrastructure of all the iits. the hostels have single rooms that are fully furnished and air-conditioned. the labs are exceptionally well-equipped, and the sports facilities and games offered are top-notch.the only problem is food not so better. | [academics]: academics are the best part of this college.the faculty are very helpful & supportive. the courses are super relevant and structured similarly to the curriculum compared to other colleges.this structure is designed to help students think more critically and develop into keen thinkers.students get good grading percentage. | [placements]: placements are good.the placement percentage of our college is 85%. the highest package offer is 70 lacs & the lowest is 5 lacs per annum. the average is around 8 lacs. top recruiting companies are samsung, adobe, microsoft, amazon. many students also selected for internships.

placement stats are on of the best in india. various companies come for the recruitment some of them are p&g, itc, hul, dr. reddy in our department. first of all we have to create a cv and upload it on the training and placement portal. after applying for a company they shortlist students on the basis of cv after that there are some tests which are for further shortlisting students and after that there are interviews conducted in starting of december where the students are finally placed. 70-80% students get a on campus placement. yes, there are some workshops before the interviews so that the student get a better grasp on the interview and get a job. same method is also followed for the internships.one of the best faculty all over india in all the department. the tentative number of lecture in a course depends on the credit of a course. if a course is of 4 credits then we have 3 lecture per week of 1 hr each and also a tutorial of 1 hr. the average age of professors is quite high indicating that they are very experienced. most of them are graduated in one of the iits and then further a post graduation in a foreign university. one professor take 3-4 courses and they are perfect in that. they are either researching on that particular topic or they had done their post graduation in that topic. so they teach quite well and clear every doubt we have.
college_name: IIT Delhi - Indian Institute of Technology [IITD]

review_text: [college infrastructure]: my experience at this college is very good. the classrooms are clean and have projectors and smart boards. labs have all the required equipment. the library has many books and free wifi is available. sports facilities and hostel rooms are also nice and clean. the food in the mess is tasty and hygienic. teachers are friendly and helpful. the college also organizes workshops and seminars. i am happy with thiscollege | [academics]: the teaching quality is good. teachers explain topics well and clear doubts. the syllabus is updated and exams are conducted on time. practical activities help us understand better. overall, academics here are nice and helpful for students | [placements]: the placement in our college is good. many well-known companies visit the campus for recruitment. students get job offers in different fields like it, marketing, and core companies. the average salary package is decent. the college also provides placement training, including mock interviews and soft skill classes. overall, placement support is helpful for students. | [campus life]: campus life in our college is enjoyable. there are many events, fests, and cultural programs. students from different places come here, so we make many new friends. the college has good sports facilities, clubs, and student activities. the environment is safe and friendly. overall, it is a fun and learning experience.

cse is the trend and the future. anybody who wishes to choose to engineer should opt for cse according to me for a smoother future with a lot more benefits. for every 80 students, there is one faculty and there are more than 5 teachers for every subject. the teachers are all ph.d. with more than 6 years of experience in teaching. with this much experience the methods are good but a little orthodox for older teachers too. every month we have to give a sessional test and after every 6 months, we are required to give the end terms. the papers aren't much difficult and are set pretty nicely.algorithm and techlon are the annual fests and tech fest respectively and they are conducted in november and december respectively. all books are available in our library including e-books. there are extracurricular activities happening almost every day along with sports contests. and, all sports are played at the university. there ieee and acm student chapters, ceed, toastmasters international csi, gfg student chapter, and gdsc, and all these are run by students.

[college infrastructure]: the hostel offers excellent care with hygienic food, ensuring comfort and safety. shuttle services are available in case of emergencies. the campus architecture is impressive, and the rose garden and mba garden are standout attractions, adding charm to the surroundings. | [academics]: the teachers are friendly, supportive and skilled, creating a positive learning environment. their focus ison enhancing students' skills and fostering self-dependence, ensuring thatbwe not only excel academically but also become more confident and independent learners. | [placements]: the college has an impressive placement record, with a well organized team that streamlines the requirement process. students often land job of their choice, and last year ie. 2024, the highest package offered was 53 lpa. while 100% placement is uncertain, the opportunities are excellent. | [campus life]: my college life has been excellent and memorable. i have made friends from many parts of the world and had chance to step out of my introvert shell. it has been an incredible experience, as i have learnt to participate more and embrace new opportunities with confidence. | [anything else]: my college offers mun(model united nation). kiit's mun is considered as the second largest mun in the asia.
college_name: Kalinga Institute of Industrial Technology Bhubaneswar

review_text: [college infrastructure]: the infrastructure of the bennett university have all the necessary facilities and equipment. as the university was established in 2016, all the building are new and well maintained. all the classes have air conditioners, smart board and 24/7 wifi.the classes and hostels are cleaned on the regular basis. | [academics]: i am first year btech cse student, the academics here is pretty decent. the curriculum is fully updated and quality of teaching is good.they provide all the necessary facilities to prepare us to future competition. | [placements]: the placement of the university is average. around top 10% of btech cse students got package of 24 lakhs /annum and average package is 8 lakhs. highest salary of btech student in 2024 is 58 lakhs/annum. | [campus life]: the campus life in bennett university is pretty relaxed and safe. they organise events nearly every week to engage the students. they are many clubs in students can enroll and be member of it to make new friends and connection.the campus is highly safed and security on 24/7.

[college infrastructure]: look don't gonna lie, infrastructure of our college is one of it's weakest point. the academic building is old and vulnerable but are being under renovation. we are gonna get new lecture hall in the next semester equipped with every necessity. labs are good so as the library n sports culture. library has good wifi connection n well ventilated. but hostels are excellent. each n every hostel hostel j, k are mega hostels and i personally like the hostel i. | [academics]: i'm currently pursuing electrical engineering here. curriculum is not well updated but we get all kind of informations and materials mostly from our seniors through a whole lot of workshops. the seniors are really helpful. they are very kind. they give a very good environment and culture for us to be industry fit. a good coding culture is also one of it's renowned qualities. | [placements]: nothing to say about placements. if you are willing to work hard, you have the best place that you can get. excellent placements of the core branches too specifically electrical n mechanical. last year the highest package of around 43 lakhs went to an electrical guy in microsoft. the industrial belt makes it so good in placements and also the quality of students that we have. this year too around 75/78 guys are placed from electrical till now. and in other branches too placement is excellent. | [campus life]: very good campus life. great hostels with lan availability in the evening to midnight and 24 hour long during the weekend. we have pappu daa shop. the shop i personally love the most. you get all kinda eating things here at a reasonable price which is cool being inside the campus. we have amul canteen too. a night canteen for the mega hostels. they charge slightly higher being a night canteen. we have a common canteen called as nit canteen where you can eat with a large group of friends n girls.

i opted to study in amity university because i couldn't clear jee and i wanted a decent college with decent placements. furthermore , the lush green campus attracted me a lot and i wanted to be here for 4 years. moving on to admission procedure, students with percentage above 80 in their 12th boards can get direct admission whereas for others there is an entrance test which is easy to crack in. by the way , i had 82 percent in 12th cbse so i got directly admitted.the fee for my course is around 1.6 lakhs per semester and it increases by 5 percent every year. the fee structure is undoubtedly expensive but on a brighter side it's transparent. it can be paid online. moreover, no additional fees is charged to secure an admission except a sum of rs 20000 as security amount which is refundable and quite normal to collect from students.

every year annual fest takes place which has been named one india in the month of february and march tech-fest like hackathons and cyber programs takes place weekly or monthly there is a central library in every institute or building which is equipped with the librarian tables and chats and almost every material related to the course every classroom is equipped with smart boards and projectors there are different sports played on campus and for every different sport different coaches are allotted and every piece of equipment related to the sports is available on the campusas i had interested computer and technology since my childhood and in today's generation ai and computer is taking a great rise everyone teacher is allocated to the class of 60 students and theory lectures and teacher is one teacher is allocated to a class of 30 students in practical sessions the faculties are from top institutes like iit and nit the term examination final exam takes place after the teaching of 4 months of the semester and also internal exam takes place in the mid of the semester

[college infrastructure]: gla university have best infrastructure,it has many laboratory for different departments like science, engineering computer labs as well and approx 10 clubs of different kinds for extra curriculum activities. | [academics]: the professor here are excellent in their work , and teach us the in most lamen way so each and every students must understand the topic. the curriculum is updated and follow the ugc guidelines as well as updated when needed. | [placements]: this is the unique selling point of the university that it provides the 100 percent placements for thiers students. many mnc and big companies hire students from university. and the average package for bca is 4lpa.

[college infrastructure]: the infrastructure is really good.it does have hostel facilities and a good quality of food. every campus is surrounded by greens and the atmosphere is peaceful everywhere. wifi service is available and it does have sport centers. the laboratories and the classrooms were good. | [academics]: the teachers are wonderfull and they act like a friend ,they show the path for the better life and also teach us the moral of life and respect to the society ,how to fight with our downs in our life and create opportunities for us. | [placements]: the training & placement cell here organises various events like guest lectures, corporate meets etc to provide placement support for the students. however given the pendemic situation, what i have observed is that the placements have not been that good in the past few years.

i must say it is one of the best universities. the reason to choose this course: e&c is one of the best branches because if you compare it with other branches some branches teach only about programming they don't have any hardware knowledge, and some branches teach only about hardware. but in e&c you will learn both programs as well as hardware. in this college you will get one of the best faculties, best in the sense they too supportive and encourage you to do something great, the faculty-student ratio may be for every 10 to 15 students one faculty is there. most of the faculties have the phd degrees with a great experience. after every 1 and a half months, there will be an exam i.e internals, there total of 2 internals and an end sem exam. it is not too difficult to pass the exam but yes questions will be completely application based, but a student can pass easily.fests: there are no.of fests that occur every year, they conduct the fest at their convince. last month only we had a fest in college where many great personalities visited our university. the best thing about this college is library, you will get thousands of books, and whichever book you need, you will get that book. each classroom is near and clean and every class is a smart classroom. we have a big ground for sports, many students take participate in yearly sports. college has cricket, volleyball, kabaddi and many sports teams, and these teams won inter-level competitions. there so many clubs are there, like upsc club, automotive club and many other clubs.

it is the most valued course nowadays the faculty-student ratio is good we have a good amount of excellent faculty for each subject they are highly qualified exams are held two times mid and end-semester in 6 months it's easy to pass if we study and follow our classes and teachers provide excellent notesthere are fest at end of a year academic tech fests are conducted much more often books and journals are available in the library classrooms are full of amenities smart board ac projector sports of the national level conducted even ample stadiums dedicated to each music society drama etc

[college infrastructure]: in terms of infrastructure, the college has everything a ug student needs - a good hostel, 3 canteens, a tennis court, a football/cricket pitch etc. irrespective of the department, every classroom in the college comes equipped with a projector, and has a whiteboard. the labs in each and every department have a good set of materials (machinery, computers and other lab-related equipments) that would enable the students to gain that extra bit of practical exposure. | [academics]: i'm an undergraduate student, currently pursuing my bachelor's in computer science and engineering. having just over a year left, i can firmly assert that the syllabus is pretty up-to-date with the industry requirements and the subjects/courses offered aren't limited to just a few domains. through this, a student isn't only exposed to multiple domains that are prevalent in the industry but also paves them a path that would help them decide what they would potentially want to take up as a career. | [placements]: with placements currently going on, i feel like i'm in a very good position to answer this question. the college does attract companies from all three ctc brackets (tier 1 - <7 l, tier 2 - 7-20 l, tier 3 - >20 l). the companies/mncs that come are mostly software/it based, and a handful of core companies. as i'm limited to just 500 words, i'd suggest the readers to have a look at the placement stats of the 2017-2021 batch on the college website. | [campus life]: the campus is spread over 20 acres, and has pretty much everything a student would need. it has multiple libraries, a stationary store, xerox, 2 auditoriums, an amphitheater, a tennis court, a football field, loads of places to chill with friends, 3 canteens, and a parking lot for two-wheelers.
college_name: Dayananda Sagar College of Engineering Bangalore

review_text: [college infrastructure]: there is a management library which has vast syllabus of courses like case studies and research papers providing students free study resource and the computer labs have uninterrupted digital learning. | [academics]: the faculties in our campus are industry professionals who hold special expertise and knowledge and hold extreme skill set and are very helpful so academics are being conducted by guest lectures monthly. | [placements]: the placements are wonderful the pre placement talks starts happening in the first year and this is followed by set of training and personal interview skills which gradually leads to the conversion of pre placement offers.

[college infrastructure]: actually, due to this pandemic we haven't been to college . but as i am living in rourkela i have been to nit before and i know about its facilities and infrastructure. they are having a good set of facilities and equipments . as we haven't been to classes so i cant figure out the maintenance of facilities. but it is a good hygenic place. | [academics]: i am a chemical student. the quality we got through online classes is good . actually i am in first year so i can't be job ready now ,it will take me 4 years more to be ready. yes<curriculum is updated | [placements]: placements are good here . most of the students are placed in various companies . highest goes for microsoft nearly 40 lakhs p.a., mainly it goes to cse stream. avg is 9-12 lakhs p.a. i havent given a interview. | [campus life]: various events and ceremonies are performed. various clubs are here for different activities , staff are really nice. location is safe and secured .

[college infrastructure]: hostel rooms are well-maintained with daily cleaning, provided with ac, single or double beds according to preference, and best-quality food. breakfast includes paratha, dahi, achar, one meal, hot milk, cold milk, and chai. lunch includes roti, chawal, dahi, 2 veggies, drink, and salad. dinner is the same as lunch, excluding dahi and the drink but includes a dessert daily. | [academics]: the exams are difficult, with a passing percentage of 35%. people need to study a lot to pass and appear in exams. the internship scenario was not good; people have to work really hard for it. all faculty are well qualified. | [placements]: the top recruiters are apple, google, infosys, etc. 60?70% of students were placed. the total number of students placed this year was 1770; further, 70% of students were placed and the average package was around 5 lakh to 11.09 lakh.
college_name: Thapar Institute of Engineering and Technology Patiala

review_text: [college infrastructure]: yes, the college had all the necessary infrastructure, facilities and equipments, the facilities include wifi, smart boards, smart labs. the living space was clean and the food was hygienic and value for money. | [academics]: i was studying bachelor of business administration in finance, the quality of teaching was very good we even had doubt clearing sessions and feedback form for teachers. the curriculum was updated and included all the recent developments | [placements]: i had a wonderful experience at the college. i was placed in accenture with a very good package, and almost everyone in the college who wanted placement got placed. highest salary package offered was 25 lacs and average salary package was 6-7 lacs.

[college infrastructure]: infrastructure of the college comes in top colleges in delhi. it has almost every facility. free wifi with good connection is available. various sports facilities are provided. labs are well equipped and have projectors too. | [academics]: mathematics department have top notch faculty. they are qualified from reputed colleges and have great understanding of subject. they clears our doubt in seconds. curriculum of the course is updated and it makes student ready for the job. | [placements]: placement cell of the college is active and you will keep getting opportunities. good companies and institutions come for the recruitment process. highest package given was 14 lpa and the average package ranges between 4-5 lpa.
college_name: Netaji Subhas University of Technology New Delhi

review_text: i have chosen mechanical engineering because i have an interest in vehicles and machinery items. i don't have that much idea about the number of faculties. faculty members are graduates from the best institutes in india. and the pedagogy is outstanding. term exams were to be done after every 2-3 months and it was not that easy to pass them.the companies which come for internships are hiring at a good rate. they will check our projects and academic overview. many companies come to select students who are useful for students. companies like linkedin, infosys, etc

[college infrastructure]: there's a good amount of greenery around the whole campus, however it's not well renovated inside and doesn't seem to meeting up with expectations .the library is peaceful with a huge collection of books, journals, and digital access for e-learning. hostel facilities are safe and comfortable, and the canteen offers clean food at affordable rates. | [academics]: they explain topics with clarity and often use practical examples to help students. professors encourage students to participate in workshops, projects, and competitions. they also provide career advice and guide students in preparing for exams like gate and gre.the classrooms are the place where we can learn with activities. the workshops and the seminars also help to the students for their studies. | [placements]: a huge numer of companies come here to offer the best packages to the students. the placement cell also provide the internships with the help of the online internship platform 'internshala'.yes, we have good placement cell in our college and the management helps us to get placed in placement drives | [campus life]: students enjoy a balanced mix of academics, sports and extracurricular activities, fostering friendships, personal growth, and a sense of community on campus.all the faculties are well educated and disciplined.

[college infrastructure]: the college has everything that a college needs. ac, libraries, labs, smart classes and workshops are in perfect condition. the college also takes care of hygiene well. the canteen is massive and the food is tempting. the highly maintained labs and workshops have experts to work with. | [academics]: i'm studying b.tech in cs here for coding opportunities. the faculty teaches in a creative way and keeps us updated with the latest technological advancements. the teachers are capable of teaching a lot of topics and are of professor grade. all the teachers have a good experience. | [placements]: the college ensures 100% placement of students and at good mncs. the packages are very much flexible and great. i have seen my seniors backing placements of 10-20 lpa. the exposure is great here and the placement will depend on you caliber. | [campus life]: the campus life is very engaging and amazing here. student gets to interact in a number of hubs with expert seniors to gain the knowledge in creativity and curriculum.
college_name: Jaypee Institute of Information Technology Noida

review_text: the gender ratio is nearly 7:1. the institute has several clubs to facilitate extra curricular activities in which the students are interested. several workshops are conducted by experts all over the country. robotic competitions are a part of robotics club which organises several robotics events. the literary club called as illuminates is a very active club in the campus which organises several debates, writing competitions every week. every year, elections are held for the pists of the presidents for each of the clubs and students union body named as gymkhana union body.seniors in the college are very friendly and help their juniors in every possible ways. they guide us in the right dirction to brighten our carees in the way we want. the founder of go ibibo, the main architect of arogya sethu app is an alumni of our college. institute arranges an alumni meet every year which is very helpful for the students to gain maotivation and clear their doubts about their career.

[college infrastructure]: the infrastructure of the college is good and well maintained and im satisfied from there and all the necessities equipment are available in the college and wifi smart board etc in the college.....it. | [academics]: here from im studying btech to want to increase my knowledge and the skills and all the faculty member are friendly and the helpful in nature and getting the good experience in the college and satisfy. | [placements]: the placements criteria in the college is good and well maintained all the students getting the good package from the college a d also students are very satisfied from the college and maintain decorum | [campus life]: the campus life of the college and im getting the good experience from here and all the faculty member and the students are friendly and helpful in nature and giving proper satisfaction to the students

campus life is good at mnit . there is annual cultural fest called "blitzslag". many colleges take part in this fest . there is central library which is quite huge . there you will get almost every book of your course ,novels of your choice and also the journals. library is fully air conditioned. all the lectures are conducted in vivekanand lecture theatre complex (vltc), which is asia's largest lecture hall. it is very very huge with large sized classrooms , fully air conditioned. there are total 4 floors in this building. there is student activity centre in this vltc where there are many indoor sports for students. also it have gym with all necessary machinery but not trainer. there are various dedicated grounds for various sports like volleyball, basketball, cricket ,lawn tennis , badminton ,etc. there are many students runned clubs like dance , singing, photography, coding, nss, world heritage ,etc.i am pursuing metallurgical and materials engineering as i am interested in manufacturing industries like tata ,reliance and many other , so i found this branch appropriate for me. in our department there are highly qualified professors and assistant professors with minimum qualification of phd in many domains of research. all of them have worked and gained experience in major companies of steel making , materials processing , metal extraction etc. teaching method is quite good. all of them are very responsible for taking their classes and also quite flexible if students appeal them to cancel the class for an appropriate reason. term exams are conducted in proper time with complete submission of syllabus in class. if someone has attended majority of classes then it is not difficulty to get passing marks.

[college infrastructure]: vit has very good infrastructure compared to other private colleges. the library is well organised and has a large selection of books and guides. the academic blocks are equipped with common computer labs. all the blocks and surroundings are clean and well maintained | [academics]: b.tech computer science. the quality of teaching is on par with other colleges. most the assignments and submission are done online through vit portal. the curriculum also gets updated after every couple of years. | [placements]: vit has the highest percentage of placements offered among other private colleges. the quality of placements are good. placements from top companies are available. the average salary package is also decent. | [campus life]: campus life is good overall, everyone is friendly and ragging is strictly prohibited in vit. but the hostel timings can be very frustrating. girls have very strict rules and timings and the campus life can be bad.

review_text: [college infrastructure]: there are various facilities and amenities at such as a post office, bank, departmental store, retail shops located within the vicinity of the college. there's a play area for squash, basketball, tennis, a gym, a swimming pool, and a jacuzzi. there are in-house medical experts who take care of students in case of emergencies. the hostel can accommodate more than 1000 students, and there's room available for faculty members as well. | [academics]: almost all the faculty members, without any exception, are either engineering or science graduates from premium institutes, followed by masters and phd in management. they have industry experience of 5-10 years. the course curriculum consists of core and elective subjects over 2 years with 3 terms. | [placements]: amidst the pandemic, the institute managed to record 100% placements, where the highest international package offered was 56 lpa, and the highest domestic package stood at 51 lpa. the top international recruiters were african industries groups, landmark group, zynga etc.

review_text: [college infrastructure]: first of all,the infrastructure of bennett university is very well maintained and new. the university is established in 2016. all the classrooms have smart boards and have decent wifi connectivity.sports ground is also good. the mess food is hygienic. | [academics]: the academics of bennett university is amazing.all the professors here are so helpful and supportive.tge curriculum here is also updated and makes for job ready. the quality of teaching in bennett university is unique and good. | [placements]: the placement of bennett in btech cse department is average. the highest placements in bennett is 80lakhs per annum. the average package is around 8 lakhs per annum. the 10% of the cse students got 24 lakhs per annum package. | [campus life]: the campus life of bennett university is amazing. there are many clubs in which students can enroll and be part of it and make friends and connections.there are events around every week.the campus is safe as the security is on 24/7.

review_text: [college infrastructure]: infrastructure is pretty good, infact it's the main attraction of the university. this infrastructure is enough that the students don't even have to go out of the campus for any need, pretty much everything is available inside the university itself | [academics]: acedmics are good enough, and faculty is also very nice. the university adders many placements to the students they are enough for all the hardworking students to get a package that the deserve to get | [placements]: placements are good considering the entering criteria of the university. the number of companies that come to the college is amazing. there is a placement for every student who want to get placed after the graduation | [campus life]: campus life is also very nice, thanks to the amazing infrastructure and the events that take place in the university. such functions help the students to enjoy their college life way more

[college infrastructure]: the college has an amazing infrastructure must say, the college has its own mall, activity centers , hubs, clubs and many more. the hostel rooms and classrooms are well maintained and all are fully wifi enabled. the college has one main library and many sub-libraries in each blocks. the living spaces are very maintained and cleaned once or twice every week. | [academics]: i'm studying bballb hons. as i have interest in this field. the quality if teaching is very good and the teachers are well qualified with experience of many years in the teaching field and their respective subjects. the curriculum in the college is updated regularly whenevr it is needed and the courses curriculum also includes the recent development in the field. the course taught in the college is makes the student job ready. | [placements]: the best thing about college is placement all over india mainly join this campus by seeing it's placement the highest salary package is 42lakhs per anum and it came from the computer scuence student in microsoft company located in hyderabad and college is very supportive for the students to get placements, college faculty engage student build their profile by giving good teaching according to the trend in the world and encourage every student to participate in organization to build their skills. | [campus life]: campus life is amazing there as we can participate in so many activites related to our interests, acadmic and so on. we gain amazing experiences from each event organized by university. we enjoyed the campus life.

[college infrastructure]: there is no doubt that vit has one of the best infrastructure possible with every academic building divided by different courses which creates better environment for studies. it has a swimming pool, volleyball court, basketball court, cricket ground and many more facilities for indoor games. the hostel rooms present here are also decent and equipped with all the major facilities that a student required, and the quality of food was excellent in hostel mess. | [academics]: most of the teachers are graduates from nit or iit, and the professors are highly qualified and have a deep knowledge of their core subjects. there are two exams per semester, one is open book and the other is closed book. the open book exams are really hard and test critical thinking. they provide soft skills lectures from the first semester to make them industry-ready. | [placements]: companies like amazon, microsoft, intel, shell, robert bosch, infosys, wipro, cts, tcs, and many other companies visited our college for placements. roles like software engineer, electrical engineer, electronic developers, it software solutions developers, are the top roles offered by them. internships are available to students at the beginning of their third year at companies such as amazon, infosys, mahindra, google, bosch, and tcs provide internship opportunities. | [campus life]: diverse campus life and learning environment. | [anything else]: nothing

there is this one exam of comedk which is out of 180 there are 3 ways to get into our college 1.kcet for karnataka students(33%) 2.comedk for all the students in india(33%) 3.management (34%) anyone who can pay the amount demanded by management will get through the collegethere are technical as well as fun events in our college. at annual functional gathering many celebrities come to our college and perform our college also held kle premier league cricket tournament mib (make in bvb) pupa is one of the technical event held in our college

[college infrastructure]: good environment for students to be in a bit more than comfortable infrastructure has 4 large auditoria in the campus to cater to all cultural and extracurricular needs of students. each auditorium is a state-of-the-art structure with high-end technology visual and audio tools that offer unique space to accommodate a large number of audience. | [academics]: according to the placements available on the official website, reva university highest package stood at rs. 50 lpa. as per reva university placement 2023, 10 international offers, 112 super dream offers, and 1349 dream offers were made. with a 57% placement rate, the it/ites sector stood out as the top sector. | [placements]: the campus placement at reva university has a great reputation among the companies in various industries because of the well-trained, highly skilled and multitalented students from diverse backgrounds. | [campus life]: has a good campus where students can adjust themselves easily

[college infrastructure]: mnnit allahabad is a premier institute of technology that provides its students with a world-class educational experience. the institute's infrastructure is top-notch, with modern classrooms, well-equipped laboratories, and a vast library. the hostels are clean and spacious, and the mess serves nutritious and delicious food. mnnit allahabad is committed to providing its students with the best possible environment for learning and growth. | [academics]: i was studying information technology (it) at mnnit allahabad. the quality of teaching is commendable, with experienced and knowledgeable faculty members who employ various teaching methodologies to ensure effective learning. the curriculum is regularly updated to incorporate the latest developments in the field, and focuses on practical skills and industry-oriented learning to prepare students to be job-ready. | [placements]: the placement record at mnnit allahabad has been excellent, with over 95% of students placed in reputed companies. the highest salary package offered was inr 1.18 crore, and the average salary was around inr 19-20 lakh per annum. the placement process was well-structured and streamlined, and the college's placement cell provided valuable support to students. | [campus life]: mnnit allahabad's campus is vibrant and scenic, providing a peaceful learning environment. the best features include well-maintained gardens, modern infrastructure, and a dedicated sports complex. students can participate in various clubs, fests, and cultural activities. the faculty and support staff are knowledgeable and helpful. the location is near the city center, offering convenience, and the campus is generally safe with adequate emergency management systems.
college_name: Motilal Nehru National Institute of Technology Allahabad Prayagraj

review_text: [college infrastructure]: the college has good lab facilities and the quality of the food is also well taken care of. it's a green campus with enough basic amenities. there are two big grounds and the faculties support students in boh academic and non academic activities. | [academics]: as every engineering college in india cufe to has a very average and outdated learning system. but the learning environment is such that we get to develop and improve a lot of soft skills in the process. | [placements]: was extremely poor when i studied. but last year the placement officer changed and there has been a huge surge in placement numbers. the students of 2020 batch have reported that they have received offers from top companies. | [campus life]: the is in the outskirts of bangalore college and you might initially find it difficult to get used to. but trust me the campus life and student bonding is too good that you'll never want to leave this place. metro construction is coming along well. so transportation won't be an issue anymore.

annual cultural festival named vitopia has a huge hype in around cities. many celebrities were invited many performers, inter college and intra college competitions were conducted. the two day fest has many great performances. also many nearby college students atted this event. annual technical fest named vitaap is also a great palce to learn many new things. many project developers and on field workers and scients come and share their views on recent technology trends and share their ideas.i didn't get any scholarships or loans for my education. but there are few scholarships provided by the university for the university topper. also there is a program called as star where two students from each district are given completly free education and hostel facility. those two students should persue their intermediate level from government junior college and top in the final exams.

there are many fests in dtu like the cultural council's annual fest en'g fest held in february and the fresher week in december. and a techfest invictus held in dtu in february. the library is very large at dtu. and all types of books and journals you can find in the library. dtu is very good in sports and athletics and extra regulate activities did you have all types of a sports team that goes to different universities and colleges and date you also conducted enter branches sports competition called arena. due to has many societies and clubs for students the society are different types like technical and entertainment. society and clubs are ieee, scee, yuvan, step-dtu, cultural council, acs, sports council, e cell, etc.the course is quite interesting and knowledgeable. and the faculty members are very helpful toward the students. i choose this course because of my rank but now i like the course. the faculty and students are not very good but not very bad. faculty members are highly educated and the faculty members are iitian and highly recognized institution. the teaching method is good. the term exam has two times in 1 semester first 20 marks mid sem and 2nd 40 marks end sem.

[college infrastructure]: ya the college contain necessary infrastructure ,facilities and eqipment . in classrooms,laboratories,library,sports centres and hostels we have all type of basic facilities like water coolers wifi facilities and many more and these all are well maintained and also are in good condition . the living spaces and food is hygenic and clean. | [academics]: i am studying btech in civil engineering and i am in second year of the college . the quality of teaching is nice and the professors are very corporative and helpful. apart from this also the curriculum is based on recent developments and is up to date . also college provide us with not just bookish and theoretical knowledge but also practical which is necessary while doing job so it makes us job ready also. | [placements]: the placements are nice all the top companies comes to the campus for recruitment . the placement is 95% for a batch and the average ctc is 13 lpa for my coarse and the highest is 1.5cr which gies for cse or it batch . ya college is supportive in nature . it help us during our placements. | [campus life]: the campus life is best . there is many fest which are organised by the college engifest is india?s biggest cultural fest which is organised by the campus . not only this it also has inactus which is a fest in which every society organises a competition for students and also it gives us a huge exposure to the students in every field also help them to find their interest. | [anything else]: no

[college infrastructure]: hostels of this college is very nice and food served here is of very good quality. every new hostels room is two seater and washrooms are also attached in those rooms. we have acs in classrooms and well equipped laboratories. the surrounding of college is also very green and of beautiful environment. | [academics]: i'm pursuing my mba from this college and faculty of our department has their own personal different industrial experiences. fields of economics, marketing, hr, finance, business analysis, it and supply chain. there is a constant discussion about case studies in group of students which helps us as overall development of ours. the quality of teaching is very excellent here. | [placements]: i'm still a student of this department and hr, finance and marketing plays major role here. faculty members take care of each and every student . summer internships are majorly provided for the students for 2 months from the college. companies like deloitte, wipro , tcs, afcon, infovity, india mart etc. visits the campus for placing the students.

the college is well known for its placements and its college life. dtu has many societies with different choices like dance singing racing sports and some coding societies. dtu has a very big library which has books for studies and some great novels. engifest is the annual cultural festival of dtu which is one of the biggest and oldest colleges in north india it helps in february every year and attracts thousands of participants and spectators from all over delhi across every college. some other fests are aahvaan innovation and even small fests at dtu are bigger than the best of nsut's moksha.the total cost for 4 years of study is around 9 lakhs and it increases every year. like for me my first-year fee was 212000 but for my junior, it is 219000. but there are some good scholarships provided by dtu as well as the delhi government for dtu there is an interview of the student and his parents together and based upon that one can get the scholarship similarly for e-distict delhi there are multiple. scholarships based on merit and annual income by using these scholarships ones can get tuition fees refunded which is approximately 65 percent of the total fess.

[college infrastructure]: as i am in 2nd year i have experience many things which i can share with you let's start with infrastructure srm ncr have not a big campus but all the facilities provided by campus like ac in all halls, classroom, basketball court, nso another things , teachers are also very good & interactive in nature. srm ncr comes under tier 3 college thankyou | [academics]: very good academic, here we have less difference in age of faculties and students so that they can interact students easily and helping students to solving there doubts and also help's in non academic things guid students for corporate life. | [placements]: placements are just ok can be say because srm ncr comes under tier 3 no faang companies comes here for placements but they try to do 100% placements in mass recruiters companies so it can be say that they only can provide good placement from srm ktr | [campus life]: here campus life can be say not so good if you want to enjoying your college life because there are many rules for hostlers like they can't go outside the hostel after 8 pm , but you can enjoy of you are good in doing interaction with peoples

review_text: [college infrastructure]: kle technological university is one of the most developed and has advanced facilities and equipment for teaching. all the classrooms have been well equipped with digital boards and well-furnished benches. most importantly campus is green and clean with a great canteen service. | [academics]: i am studying civil engineering 2nd year. as the teaching concerned i wish we would have young teachers. and if the curriculum is concerned it is having one of the best teaching methods which make us ready for future jobs. | [placements]: kle technological university is considered as the best campus for placement but as i have seen my seniors saying it was in the past that placements were good. and as the package of placed students is great .. i have seen from 1.5lpa-12lpa. collage offers the best support for placement to the students with vikas program. | [campus life]: as said kle technological university has one of the best campus in north karnataka. with a green and clean environment and with lots of cultural and technical events for students like pleadies, spectrum and kaladevi etc. it's in the center of the city easily reached by any means.

[college infrastructure]: chitkara university is overall infrastructure is good and well developed. its provide all the facilities and equipment like hostels for both boys and girls. and food quality is good. and provide safe environment. | [academics]: i have done my bba in this university. and in my experience the teaching style quality is good. teachers provide us good information and knowledge. they helps us alot. yes our curriculum is up to dated and latest. | [placements]: overall placements is good but high profile companies does not conduct recruitment from university campus. but local companies visited our campus for placements. and offering three to five lakhs per annum.

may fest organised on the campus like janmashtami , navratri dandiya night, kaipoche, technit(3 days in february ) and biggest festival of nit jalandhar is utkansh ( most probably in march) and their are many clubs like cerimnlze dance club si dance club bhawre comedy club kalakar club literary club tca ( fest organise club) bhangra club rajbhasha club prayas (social clubs) or many tech or non-tech and culture clubs biggest library and study room are their most of the books or journals are, all sports also like basketball cricket match club, badminton, table tennis, or chess etc. hightak jim also with the new modern instruments3rd year and 4th-year students are eligible for campus placement, also 2nd 3rd and 4th-year students are eligible for internship placement. many companies visited manly like google, microsoft paytm, phoney, jio reliance, flipkart, amazon, olx, tesco, bharat petroleum and may biggest companies visited every year. and evey year almost 90 per cent of students are placed and this year highest placement is 1.2 cr the average placement is 13 to 15 lakh and the minimum placement is 7.5 lakh. my plan after my degree gets a placement in mnc.

review_text: [college infrastructure]: this institute has good quality facilities and infrastructure fo the students of the mba course. all modern facilities were provided by the college management to make students' learning interactive. wi-fi, labs, library, canteen, etc., were available for the students. sports and medical facilities were also available for the students. | [academics]: teachers of the college were helpful, qualified, and knowledgeable. the quality of the teaching was good. at this institute, students were receiving proper assistance and support from the teachers. the course curriculum of the college was relevant, and it makes the students industry-ready. exams at the college were not hard to pass. | [placements]: approximately 50% of the students get placed at this college in the mba course. the average package offered at the college was between 4-8 lpa. top recruiting companies for our course were icici bank, idbi bank, fincare, mrf, etc. top roles offered at the college were sales manager, sales marketing, hr, business development, etc. | [campus life]: i hosted a movie night that turned into a deep talk session. i got homesick, even when i didn?t expect to. | [anything else]: no

[college infrastructure]: yes the college has all the necessary and excellent infrastructure, facilities and equipment. the classrooms, laboratories, libraries, sport centers and hostels have all types of facilities such as wifi, smart boards, generators. and all used and well maintained. yes all living spaces clean and the food hygenic. | [academics]: i am studying in mind engineering but i want change my branch as per my personal interest. but the quality of teaching in this branch excellent. yes i think my curriculum is updated. yes this makes me job-ready. | [placements]: the of quality of placements is excellent.99% of students were placed. 2.5 crores was the highest salary package for computer science. the average salary package was 16 lakhs. yes the placement process was easy and pleasant. my college is very much supportive. | [campus life]: it has an area about 1200 acres. it has all type of facilities. student can engage in their own hobbies like all types of game are available. the other students, teachers and support staffs are excellent. it's location is good . yes it is safe and it can handle emergencies.

[college infrastructure]: one of the best nit's in north india , it comes as in top ten national institute's in india and it had all necessary infrastructure equipments and facilities required for the modern education and also it they are used and well maintained and living spaces are also neat and clean. | [academics]: i'm currently pursuing my masters of business administration from here and the quality of teaching offered here is also amazing and the curriculum is up to date and it includes all the recent developments in the field. | [placements]: quality of placements offered here is not that much up to expected mark and the percentage of students placed last year were around 60 percent and the placement process was not that easy but the college staff was supportive but the teachers were helpful but not that much supportive.

the campus life of mnit is what makes it the best. you will get ample opportunities to participate in various activities. the campus has 19 clubs including dance, literary, quiz, etc. mnit has an immense library with books on various topics by many known authors. in sports, the campus is well facilitated with almost all games including badminton, football, volleyball, etc.all major companies including google, adobe, texas instruments, dshaw, and jp morgan come to the campus for hiring students every year. the companies come to hire 3rd and 4th-year students for internships. for preparing students for the corporate sector various workshops are organised by the college.

students become eligible for campus placements from the 7th semester onwards. the companies which usually visit are hitachi, high radius, linkedin, ibm, infosys, accenture, deloitte, etc. the highest package as per the news is 60 lpa for the 2023 passing year and the average package as per the company is 6 lpa. the percentage of students getting placements is 100% for the cse branch. my plan after getting the degree is to go for higher studies.the annual fest is named as kiit silver carnival which happens once in 25 years. books are not always available in the library as librarians remain busy with their personal work. classrooms have good amenities like a. c., fans, lights, tables, chairs, etc. sports like cricket, football, basketball, etc can be played here. social groups like many societies and clubs are there which are run by students.

[college infrastructure]: the infrastructure of the college is decent at dmsiitd. we have well-equipped class rooms for lectures. we have a good medical facility and sports ground. the entire campus has wi-fi facility. the library facility is one area which can be improved upon. a new library facility is in progress. | [academics]: the faculty members are pretty good at our campus. the finance is taught by pk jain sir who is a nationally renowned professor of finance. we have very good professors for marketing, finance, it, operations and strategy. the curriculum can be updated to include the day to day intricacies of the world. | [placements]: the placements were pretty good regarding the pay packages and roles offered. hopefully, the same trend follows in the coming years as well. the companies from different domains that is finance, operations, it, consulting and marketing visit our campus for the recruitment.

[college infrastructure]: rns institute of technology is one of the well-established engineering colleges under vtu located in bangalore. as a current student, my experience here has been mix of academic rigor, supportive faculty, and active student involvement. | [academics]: the current curriculum follows vtu standards, but what makes rnsit stand out is the quality of teaching and faculty involvement. most of the proffessors are knowledegeable and approachable. there are regular internal assessments, labs are well-equipped, and students are encouraged to participate in paper presentations and projects | [placements]: placements training starts early, and reputed companies like infosys, tcs , capgemini, bosch, and some core and vlsi companies visit the campus. with good preparation and support, students can secure internships and placements. i have secured a ieee internship in vlsi domain. | [campus life]: the campus is peacefull and green, with a good balance between academics and co-curriculars. multiple technical and cultural clubs like ieee, cat, rsc and more active organizing seminars, hackathons, and fests. there's also good encouragement for sports and yoga | [anything else]: if you're looking for a college that balances academics, projects, placements, and student involvement, rnsit is strong choice, with a little self-effort and involvement in the right activities, you can make most of your 4 years here.

[college infrastructure]: the main thing which took my eyes was their cleanliness and maintenance. they provide us good projectors, study table with proper lighting and a spacious area. whole campus is been provided with wi-fi services. | [academics]: currently i am pursuing b.com in kiit as i was interested in management related stuff so i choose this field. all the faculty members are very cooperative, they not only helps us in our studies but also helps us to gain knowledge outside the syllabus. almost every faculty holds a ph.d as a degree. they try their best to make us understand things. | [placements]: placement rate is quite good its around 90% and around 92% of people are placed with good package of 6 lpa- 30 lpa. we have got good opportunities in placement. there is a great opportunity to get a good job through campus selection. | [campus life]: our collage provides fests like quiz fests, sports fests etc. we have a really good library containing various books of different genres and its open for all the batches. it also has e-books on multiple desktops.

review_text: [college infrastructure]: lecture theater is built well but hostels are not up to the mark, lan is quite slow sometimes, some hostels like aurbindo and ganga are well built but ganga too is not alloted to mnit students, and other hostels are not at all okay | [academics]: the good thing here is that in first year, batches are not allocated according to branch and are on random basis, which helps in knowing well the students of other branches too, some of our teachers are also quite renowned | [placements]: placements are similar to most nits, of anyone studies well he/she can be placed without much hassles, though good in campus internships are mostly for only cse and ece students, our alumni committee also helps in internships

review_text: [college infrastructure]: christ university?s campus is honestly amazing and such a nice place to be. it?s super green and peaceful, which makes it a great spot to just chill or study. the classrooms are pretty modern, with projectors and all that, so lectures are usually smooth. the library is a lifesaver?it has so many books, plus some quiet spots where you can focus when you really need . | [academics]: the academics at christ university are honestly pretty good, especially for our bcah program. the faculty is really knowledgeable and approachable, so if you?re stuck with something, they?re always there to help out. the course is well-structured, and we get a good mix of theoretical and practical learning, which keeps it interesting. there?s a lot of emphasis on skill-building, so we?re not just mugging up stuff but actually learning things we can use later. the assignments and projects can be a bit intense sometimes, but they really help us understand the subjects better. we also have guest lectures and workshops with industry experts, which give us some insight into the real-world applications of what we?re studying. the labs are well-equipped, and we get plenty of hands-on experience, which is super important for a course like ours. overall, the academics are solid, and you really feel like you?re preparing for something meaningful. | [placements]: placements at christ university are pretty solid, especially for my course bcah. the university has a dedicated placement cell that works hard to bring in good companies, and they provide a lot of support throughout the process. they organize training sessions for things like aptitude tests, group discussions, and interviews, which really help boost your confidence. a lot of well-known companies visit the campus, offering roles in different fields, so there are plenty of opportunities to explore. the placement team also keeps us updated on internships, which is great for building experience before we graduate. they?re pretty approachable too, so if you have any doubts or need guidance, they?re always there to help. overall, the placement process is well-organized, and if you?re prepared, you have a good shot at landing a decent job.

i had to go for upsc civil services exam. so this course seemed to be the most appropriate one for it. faculty to student ratio was really great. it is not fixed. it rather depends upon the course you are pursuing. could be anything like 30 to 600 students. usually, 120-150 students are in a class. there are about 850 faculty members. most of the faculty have some higher education from renowned foreign institutes. about 40% teach really nicely. 30% acceptable. rest is just to make you fall asleep in class. exams are held at regular intervals. passing is not a big deal. 1 day before the exam is sufficient. however, getting a good grade is really hard.rendezvous is the annual fest conducted on 9-12 march 2023. tryst is the tech fest conducted on 6-9 march 2023. dates vary every year. usually, from feb to april, these events are carried out. our library is one of the biggest in india. you can ask them to avail a book if it's not available. classrooms are simply world-class. they have projectors, biometric attendance and everything you can ask for. the sports facilities are really great. there is a sports complex and grounds for various sports. most of the work here is done by students. both the fests are organised by students.
college_name: IIT Delhi - Indian Institute of Technology [IITD]

review_text: [college infrastructure]: the college has a lush green campus of 160 acre consisting of 3 boys hostel and 1 girls hostel. the college have all the necessary infrastructure ,facilities and equipments needed. it consist 1 football ground, 1 cricket ground,1 basketball ground, 1 multiple badminton court and table tennis table etc. there are also a library which is open from 9am to 2am. there are multiple classroom and laboratories which are always well maintained. the living spaces are clean and the food is also hygenic. | [academics]: i am currently enrolled in a computer science course with bachelors's degree. since it's a new course started in 2016, the curriculum is updated and includes all the recent developments in the field. the curriculum is fully according to the industry and researches in the technical field. | [placements]: the quality of the placements is quite good. the average package for the passout for batch 2020 is 14.5 lpa. the placement was more than 90 %. the highest salary offered was near about 41 lpa and the lowest was near about 6 lpa. | [campus life]: there are many clubs in the college like technical club aasf, journalism club uthaan, dramatics club manchtantra, and social club rotaract. the students, teachers, and support staff are supportive and will help you in all ways. the location is also good(approx 6 km from the railway station and 10km for airport. yes, it can handle any type of emergencies.
college_name: Atal Bihari Vajpayee Indian Institute of Information Technology and Management Gwalior

review_text: hackathons, food festivals, la caminar (fashion shows), dancing clubs, singing clubs, sports, inter-hostel events, and inter-college tournaments are held annually. the library is vast and the quality of books is amazing. the facilities provided by the library are very good. photography clubs are very unique and creative. the labs are well-maintained with fully air-conditioned with the latest technology and devices.the reason i chose this course was because of the packages and job opportunities given by the college. the alumni are great, the infrastructures are great (needs a little makeover). the ratio of faculty: to students is 1:30 in labs and about 1:120 in group classes. the teachers are mtech/ph.d. graduates and the lab instructors are ph.d. students.
