review_text: [college infrastructure]: campus is situated at shabad daulatpur, not much popular area, also there are not much places to visit outside the campus. it is basically situated at outskirts of delhi, campus is so big to wander with friends, sports complex of dtu is so huge and every facilities is provided, life wi-fi at whole campus , only works on pc though you got a canteen , amul, nescafe, mic mac food corner where the price are not so high ,and the food varies from good to average | [academics]: i am pursuing computer science and engineering , it is the most demanding degree these days with many job opportunities.faculties are vary from okay to good, the old professors doesn't much approachable and understanding ,they only come in classes and just starts teaching, but some new and young faculties member are so understanding also they makes class interesting and there is no much worry even after you are lacking in particular subject. syllabus was same from past 5 years. | [placements]: dtu is well known for its placements and internships ,all were so out the box,internships in dtu are easy to get if your cgpa are greater than 8 or 8.5 and you have a skill. highest package were like 1.1 crore and average lies near 13 to 14 lpa. average for cse be like 25 lpa . my friends brother got package of 80 lpa at atlassian in 2022 at cse, so the placement ratio and package are very good of the campus, even it stand among and compete with top iits. | [campus life]: dtu rank among top iits in terms of placements, studies and opportunities. dtu is very chill about studies and academics, you going to get lot of free time for chilling out and for extra hustle. there are canteen , amul ,nescafe , mic mac night snacks for food inside the campus, campus is so big to wander with friends, sports complex of dtu is so huge and every facilities is provided, life wi-fi at whole campus , only works on pc though, also dtu organizes fest or competitions every other day ,

pros/cons: the placement ratio is quite good and getting better year by year. some faculties are really well and some of them are even hitting top 2% of worlds scientists. there is no case of very indiscipline action like ragging . the size of campus is quite less than what i was expecting from a college. there is no proper availablity of hostels for students girls to boys ratio is very less which is 1:4 , which is showing still inequality on base of gender | course curriculum overview: yeah ,the course in terms of comprehensiveness is really satisfactory. i have some issues with sequence of subjects which are covered ,but there is no compromise with the comprehensiveness. so i would rate good that too .

for us, the fee was 80000 for the present batch which is 130000 and there is a scholarship provided for the rank students where every sem after the exam they give three scholarships like dac, mrd, and cnr where the scholarship is given based on their cgpa.the placement will start in 5th sem and many reputed companies will come to hire the students. the companies like capgemini, accenture, london stock exchange etc. for placement, the students should have minimum 6 cgpa. 40% of students get placement.

[college infrastructure]: the university has a large campus with good accomodation.there are many food courts offering wide variety of food choices.hostels have different sharing arrangements as per one's needs.laboratories have all the machines and equipment required. | [academics]: quality of teachers is good.syallbus is updated to keep up with the latest development in the field.teachers also make an effort to let know the students about latest development in the specific domains. | [placements]: focus on placement is there with courses to enhance your communication skills along with your technical knowledge. learning materials are provided and test are regularly conducted to check tthe knowledge of students.

[college infrastructure]: yes,my college have all the necessary infrastructure. all the classrooms are equipped with smart tv and smart boards and hygiene is maintained. the campus is a smart campus with wifi facilities and is surveillance under cctvs. all the hostels are clean with good hygienic food. | [academics]: i am pursuing my b.tech degree in civil engineering. as i love drawing and designing i opt for civil engineering. faculties are interactive and teaches us well. the curriculum here is upto date with latest equipments provided. | [placements]: quality of placement in our college is quite impressive. almost 50% of students from every batch are being placed. around 20lakhs was the average package offered. our college is supportive in every way they prepare us the best way possible. | [campus life]: firstly, the best features of this college is students get ample opportunities to participate in every events to enhance their skills and the students gain lots of knowledge. the worst part is infrastructure here is getting little old as compared to other institutions.

[college infrastructure]: college infrastructure is good. classroom are so well furnished with ac, projector, proper ventilation. library has all the necessary books and study material. living space is proper clean. proper hygiene and sanitation is maintained. | [academics]: i choose this course because of my interest and future scope of career. teaching quality is good all the teacher's are well educated. yes, curriculum includes all the recent developments in the field and it made you job ready. | [placements]: placements in campus is decent. almost average of the students get placed with decent starting package. average salary is around 29-25k. college is so supportive it provided you the campus placement and internship very semester. | [campus life]: campus life is good. there are many different societies which are highly active. campus crowd is good. location is good and safe. yes, ofcourse it can handle the emergency situation well. hospital and metro station are near the college. teacher's and staff are so good and supportive. | [anything else]: the college is good. crowd is also decent. management and staff is good and cooperative. but the management is slow in working because of low work force. teaching methods are so good. you can easily pass the exam only by class notes and concentration in lecture. library, sports everything is well equipped. volleyball court, basketball court, badminton court are also there in campus.

[college infrastructure]: the infrastructure of national institute of technology jamshedpur is very good. laboratories, library, classroom etc. facilities provided by this college is very good.hostel of this college is one of the best hostel in all colleges. | [academics]: the academics of national institute of technology jamshedpur is very good. all faculties of this college are well qualified.theycover all contents related to sallabus in class. they also taught us about letest develop technologies. | [placements]: the placement of national institute of technology jamshedpur is great . this is attractive points of this college for fresher student. the placement record of all branches of this college is above 90%. highest pacageofthis college is about 50 lakhs. | [campus life]: campus life of national institute of technology jamshedpur is very good.the campus of this college situated in jharkhand which has large no. of hill . hill are very attractive place.the senior of this college are also very supportive.

[college infrastructure]: the infrastructure is truly beautiful. the campus is surrounded by greenery which makes us feel happy but calm. it's inclusive of all the amenities as well as high-speed intranet leased line connectivity. | [academics]: the syllabus is well acquainted with the latest trends in the industry. the quality of teaching is pretty good. the curriculum gives us theoretical of what companies expect us to know. whatever subjects we are studying at the moment is truly really important from the job prospects. | [placements]: in the end, it all comes down to placements. students with good gpas are placed in renowned companies. as per my knowledge, the highest domestic package was 30lpa. it was offered to a few students who pursued computer science. it's never a piece of cake to get placed in good company. students who are diligent and nimble surely get placed. | [campus life]: as i said earlier, the campus is stunning. it is well equipped with all the facilities. it never seemed unsafe to me.

[college infrastructure]: kiit university in bhubaneswar boasts a comprehensive and modern infrastructure designed to support a diverse range of academic and extracurricular activities. here's an overview of the key facilities | [academics]: classrooms: spacious, air-conditioned classrooms equipped with multimedia systems and wi-fi connectivity to enhance the learning experience. laboratories and workshops: specialized labs and workshops cater to various disciplines, including engineering, architecture, and management, providing hands-on learning opportunities. libraries: extensive libraries stocked with national and international journals, magazines, books, and digital resources to support research and academic activities. | [placements]: high placement rate: kiit has consistently had a high placement percentage, with most students securing positions in reputed companies across various sectors. top recruiters: many top companies from it, engineering, management, and other fields participate in kiit's placement drives. some of the notable recruiters include: google microsoft amazon deloitte infosys wipro accenture tata consultancy services (tcs) l&t flipkart | [campus life]: amazing campus life and hostel life.
college_name: Kalinga Institute of Industrial Technology Bhubaneswar

review_text: [college infrastructure]: yes, the infrastructure, facilities and equipment are one of the best parts of the college. all of the places at the campus as well as the hostel are well maintained. they also have phone repairing shops, amazon pickup point, myntra pickup point, etc. | [academics]: the faculty is very experienced and they provide great study material. large numbers of research papers are generated from this college because of which it is one of the highest ranked colleges in india. | [placements]: the quality of placement is great. they offer average placement of 6-7 lpa in cse branch. all the established and big mncs such as microsoft, google, infosys, etc. come here to hire students in large numbers.
college_name: Vellore Institute of Technology Chennai Campus

review_text: pros/cons: the university infrastructure is very clean and well managed and also provides countless opportunities for students . the greenery and bio diversity of the institute is very refreshing and makes the environment very friendly and economically and environmentally healthy . the university has very great faculties most of them are phds and those who are not are pursuing for phds too the college is very strict against ragging and takes action on every non civic or unappropriated behavior which could harm students. the fees of the institute is very unaffordable for average families and regular homes though provided better place and everything . college is very stirct towards their rules and regulation which would stress the students and makes them uncomfortable for feel of the school rather than of a college . university only allows more than 85% attendance which is very low considering events and real life problems . | placement experience: the college has very good placements . one of the main reasons behind this college being popular and has high demand and dream college of many is due to its good place ments .there are more than 75 compnies who have visited and visit nirma university like nvidia , google , microsoft , meta , tcs , tata , adani , tcs , ardino . also has very aluminies . in 2024 placemnets the highest package was 52 lpa , 2025 highest package was 95 lpa . nirma has 80-87 % placement ratio. and provides very good situation to grow.
college_name: Institute of Technology, Nirma University, Ahmedabad

review_text: [college infrastructure]: excellent lab infrastructure with all the equipments well maintained. our college library has excellent wide varieties of books and a nice environment to study. one can easily gain knowledge equivalent to iitians if he/she is really interested in gaining knowledge. | [academics]: yes most of the teachers are very good at teaching. they provide everything including proper notes, question bank etc and conduct tests on weekly basis. very few teachers couldn't teach well and students lost their interest in that particular subject. | [placements]: placements are good because lot of it companies come every year to recruit. almost everyone gets placed in tcs,infosys,cognizant and other it companies. but when it comes to core companies very few gets placed. | [campus life]: only one problem is there. they conduct lot of internal exams hence students don't get time to carry out extracurricular activities or learning some new skills. you need to sacrifice one thing either gpa or learning new skills.
college_name: SRM Institute of Science and Technology Chennai

review_text: [college infrastructure]: totally it's very good infrastructure beautiful class rooms, smart boards, wi-fi connection, sports center, laboratories, library facilities. and large aditorium for conduting events vehicle facilities, hostel facilities are available and well maintainace. | [academics]: academic is good for providing quality teaching. i am studying mba program. conduting certificate course , presentation, seminars for improving students communication. updated day to day development i hope getting job in this college. | [placements]: placements was too good in this college, 70% students get placed in every year for taking hiegest salary package 8 lakh per annum.providing database,phyton course interview purpose placements process is difficult. | [campus life]: campus life is best experience for conduting business related activities in campus facilities are support for students. | [anything else]: good experience

[college infrastructure]: we have a top-class infrastructure and facilities in our college. the teaching staff is highly efficient and superb. we have a top-class infrastructure and facilities in our college. teaching staff is highly efficient and superb. all classrooms are equipped with smart boards and wi-fi. labs are well-maintained. the hostel provides good food, sports facilities. | [academics]: teachers are helpful and highly qualified as required. semester exams will be tough but can be scored. teachers are helpful, friendly, and highly qualified. they explain concepts clearly and support students well. the curriculum is updated and industry-relevant, with practical exposure. semester exams are a bit challenging but manageable with regular study. | [placements]: every student who has maintained a cgpa of or above 7.75 will get placements. as of the ece batch of last academic year around 300 students got placements. the average package is 6 lpa - 8 lpa. i don't have any idea about the highest and lowest. top roles include management trainee, software management, etc. | [campus life]: my days in this college were filled with happiness and unforgettable times. | [anything else]: nothing

the infrastructure is nice. it has all campuses surrounded by cctv and the environment is green and healthy. the building is nice. the washroom is hygienic and clean. the drinking water facility is there. there are many clubs run by the student such as humans of galgotias.fees structure is quite reasonable compared to any other university. apart from regular fees, there are no extra fees that are to be taken by students. the cafeteria is there for refreshments and stationery shops were also there to help students.

[college infrastructure]: the college entrance is full of green trees. but there is a bad smell that is unbearable; it must be cleaned every day to prevent that. the college is away from the city, so there is less pollution. the college has wi-fi, but speed is an issue. the college library has many books, newspapers, notes, and study materials. the hostel has separate blocks for girls and boys; in one room, 2 people stay with attached washrooms. | [academics]: the teachers provide high-quality education, making students industry-ready through skill development courses. all faculty members are friendly and approachable, helping us solve any problems and relieving stress. well-experienced professors guide the students well. | [placements]: the department conducts programs that help the students enhance their knowledge and equip themselves with industry-relevant skills and technology. soft skills training is arranged to help the students ace the selection process and give them a superior edge in the competitive job markets. non-placed students are assisted with placements for a year after their graduation through 'off-campus' initiatives and referrals
college_name: NMAM Institute of Technology Karkala Taluk

review_text: [college infrastructure]: the infrastructure in iit is world class. library is open till midnight, students lounge is available till 5:00 am and new core lab is opened till 8:00 am where students are provided with computers. m.tech students are provided with their separate labs.seprate labs not to disturb other streams | [academics]: m.tech students have course work in their first year only and in the second year of the course, they just have their thesis work to do. they are given stipend of 14000 per month. in the duration of two years they are provided with opportunities of attending conferences on national and international levels.other activities are provided | [placements]: the students in m.tech usually don't apply for the core companies. they apply in tech companies and companies prefer b.tech students over m.tech students. out of all the students only 3 students got placed in this placement season in which the highest package was 23 lacs and the lowest was 9 lacs.having high placements and good mnc companies

[college infrastructure]: college has very large campus with buildings have all the necessary facilities like air conditioner facility and smart boards in the classroom. there is also a football playing ground and external activities ground. | [academics]: the curriculum of the school is up to date most of the teachers here are well qualified and knowledgeable. the college gives us opportunities for learning practical skills that was needed in the industry in today's world. | [placements]: placement is also good enough most of the students are getting place at mnc with good package. companies like wipro infosys and bajaj come to the college campus for hiring the students in various domains.
college_name: Ajay Kumar Garg Engineering College Ghaziabad

review_text: [college infrastructure]: nit trichy provides a solid learning infrastructure. the classrooms are equipped with fans, normal boards, and projector systems, ensuring a comfortable and effective learning environment. labs are well-maintained, though some equipment is somewhat old. the campus is expansive, featuring a huge library with unlimited resources, including extensive online materials. sports facilities are excellent, offering various options for physical activities. hostels, while spacious and set in a calm environment, are older and relatively low maintenance compared to other facilities. overall, nit trichy offers a robust infrastructure that supports both academic and extracurricular activities. | [academics]: the quality of teaching is exceptional, with professors who are both knowledgeable and approachable. the curriculum is well-updated, incorporating the latest developments and trends in the field, which ensures that students are well-prepared for industry demands. practical learning through labs and projects is emphasized, making the academic experience comprehensive and job-ready. overall, the academic environment at nit trichy is rigorous and geared towards producing competent professionals ready to tackle real-world challenges. | [placements]: the quality of placements at nit trichy is impressive, with a high percentage of students securing jobs each year. approximately 80% of students are placed annually. the highest salary package offered went to a student in the computer science department. the average salary offered across all departments is about inr 8-10 lpa. the placement process is well-organized and relatively smooth, with ample support from the college's placement cell. they provide necessary resources, training, and guidance, ensuring a pleasant and successful placement experience for students.

firstly i will say that this university provides a good scholarship to you. this scholarship depends on you. they will see your for intermediate marks or if you are interested to write the exam in vel tech you have to write and get good marks. if you get 75 percent above the college provides 170000 thousand to pay if you will get less percentage fees will have more for you.actually, i am interested in ece to do different and new things. so i choose ece. and i am very afraid of the faculty before joining after joining in university i am very happy to get a good faculty. they are very responsive to us and make friends with us and teach. i thankfully to the vel tech to gave a good opportunity to study.
college_name: Vel Tech Rangarajan Dr. Sagunthala R and D Institute of Science and Technology - [Vel Tech]

review_text: [college infrastructure]: the college have great infrastructure... with the development of new block it with advance technology help in growth and development.. the university looks so great with its infrastructure and attractive... | [academics]: i have great and positive experience in our university... hear the faculty are so experienced and the environment of the university is to positive and knowledgeable... i enjoyed hear so many new things.. | [placements]: university is so good have great infrastructure and experienced faculty... in the university many typ of classrooms are involved with many learning activities and events or programs with help in overall development

[college infrastructure]: gla university infrastructure is very nice, placements are of high package. management is also very good. teaching pattern is very understandable also students are free to ask any query. examination pattern is very fruitful | [academics]: gla university focuses on personality development, also gla got naac+ from ugc also curriculum also updated according to corporate demand students are also being prepared for and competative examination | [placements]: gla university also give high packages recent highest package is 55 lpa also students have many opportunities for choose companies according to there domain and also gla prepare for interview for the big com.

euphoria is our annual fest. my college has a big library, and there are so many other sectors for extra studies every classroom has its own wifi and ac and they also have a projector we have sports building. and the sports management arreges something exciting in every month. we also have many social groups and a swimming clubin 6 semesters students become eligible to do jobs. microsoft, disney, pixar etc. companies visit our campus. 15 lakh is the highest package as per any company and profiles offered. 78 % of students get placement in our department. i want to be an animator after getting a degree

[college infrastructure]: the college infrastructure is really mesmerizing. everything is built very beautifully. there are a lot of advanced equipment and really well maintained in every way. the only one disadvantage can be that it is situated in outer areas. | [academics]: i graduated from mechanical engineering. the quality of teaching is very professional including all the practical concepts along with theory concepts. it can make us job ready but most of the people want to go in tech. | [placements]: placements are awesome because everyone almost everyone gets placements unless you are the lowest on the food chain. the average salary can be 8 lpa. the college supports us very much in terms of placements.

[college infrastructure]: the infrastructure here is really good. sports facilities are present in abundance and very much encouraged . labs and classrooms are well maintained . libraries are very good , great for self study or even group meetings . wifi present in all hostels and class buildings . | [academics]: im studying computer science here . quality of teaching is okayish . few teachers are very helpful and nice . curriculum has a lot of code fundamentals of computer science like operating systems , oops concepts, dbms , computer networks, etc ., so its quite relevant . | [placements]: placements are good almost all students get placed . highest package last year was 52 lpa offered by yugabyte . 90% students are placed . average salary offered was 6 lpa . college training and placement cell is quite active and good . | [campus life]: the campus life is very active , lots of societies and clubs present, both technical and non technical . almost everyone can find a club or society to join . fest happens once a year and campus engagement programs happen throughout the sem . the teachers here are good and helpful . campus location is good , lots of medical stores outside and hospital is there very close to our college to handle emergencies .
college_name: Kalinga Institute of Industrial Technology Bhubaneswar

review_text: [college infrastructure]: infrastructure is very good , most classrooms are air conditioned, with wifi in every building, parks are well maintained and sports facilities are also very good. laboratories also contain every required equipment for different branches and for cse batch one building is equipped with computers in every classroom. | [academics]: the teaching quality is excellent, with extremely hardworking and knowledgeable teachers having 1-2 phds. the curriculum is designed considering industry requirements like python, java, awt, with great specializations and market-oriented subjects. great coding and hacking competitions are held.they also guide students. faculty members are good and help students in all mattersso, it is a good campus, and you can visit it and check it. | [placements]: placements are good but mostly mass recruiters arrive. most students don't find it difficult to take placements. to get a good placement or to sit in a good interview, one must keep their average cgpa above 9.0. | [campus life]: campus life is great as we students have so much to do in the campus like playgrounds,cafeteria and all essential shops like tailor,salon and we can go off the campus for enjoyment it's a good experience to live with.
college_name: Chitkara University Institute of Engineering and Technology Jhansla

review_text: pros/cons: our college have society of almost every niche whether it's tech, consulting, dance, singing or self improvement etc. senior are very supportive and they guide their juniors very well. college infrastructure is pretty good like we have fully furnished classes with air conditioner etc. our college only have one common badminton court for every one and its outdoor. college scholarships official are not cooperative and they don't guide well. college canteen is always flooded with students. | placement experience: placement of my college is good if i compare it to other colleges except iits and some nits. students get eligible in 6 sem for college placements. many company visits my college during college placements like google, microsoft, amazon, flipkart, uber etc. they offer good packages highest package which i remember is around 1.2 cr and the lowest is 4lpa. percentage of students who got placed in my branch is 57 percent where this no. becomes 80 or 90 percent in case of tech branches. my plan after getting degree is to get placed in any company with around 15-20lpa or i will prepare for government exams.
college_name: Netaji Subhas University of Technology - [NSUT], New Delhi

review_text: [college infrastructure]: college has a good infrastructure. it is modernised, clean and regularly furnished. it is a very big private university. there are whsmith shops inside, bakeries, food shops, and much more. hostels are very big. nearly 8 hostels, each for boys and girls. | [academics]: academics is good in this university. teachers helps students to make something new and university helps to get it patented. lpu shines in physical education department as the students of lpu have represented india on international level in many sports. | [placements]: rate of placement for physical education department is good with 70% students getting placed every year. most of the students though, look for representing india. lpu completely supports physical education department in every aspect and advertise about it the most. | [campus life]: there are many benefits of living inside the campus of lpu. it has a capacity of accomodating nearly 28k students in hostels only. sports fields are very big and green. there is a sport complex where chess, martial art, squash, badminton, handball and basketball are played. there are two swimming pools also beside the sports complex. | [anything else]: best university for students who want to pursue physical education courses.

[college infrastructure]: overall infrastructure is average, some more facilities should be added. some of the departments should be renovated because they are old. infrastructure should be improved so that students get all facilities. | [academics]: academics is fine, teaching is average. practical application is less. this should be increased so that the person learn more and get good knowledge. curriculum is fine and not too good, not too bad . | [placements]: placements are good as per seniors, maximum students are placed, few of them choose higher studies. highest package was 53 lpa ctc according to my knowledge and in cse. average package is good and mainly college has it's name because of placements and that matters in india currently. | [campus life]: campus is not too big, nearly 54 acres that hits the most. also cultural fest is held once in two years but it should be held every year. it is safe.

[college infrastructure]: talking about infrastructure its at its best, providing all possible facilities and equipment and coming on to classrooms, libraries, sports centres and hostels its all at its best and all the living spaces are clean and food is hygienic. | [academics]: the quality of teaching is at its best and the faculties teaching skills are perfect, teachers are friendly but at times they are strict also, talking about curriculum it is updated and includes all the recent developments in the field and studying here makes you future ready. | [placements]: the quality of placements at our college is good and the percentage of students are selected is also very high and the highest salary offered keep's on fluctuating, the placement process is easy and pleasant for students and the college is supportive and helpful. | [campus life]: campus life is equivalent to second home, college has so many activities in which students can engage in and the students, teachers and support staff is very cooperative and helpful, its location is very prime, and it can handle emergencies.

[college infrastructure]: chitkara university lacks basic infrastructure. everything they advertise is not available in reality. sorry to say but labs are poorly maintained and internet facility is really bad. library is extremely small and books are never available. also the library gets closed at 3 p.m. | [academics]: it's really disgusting that quality of education is very poor, not even close to something acceptable. curriculum is completely outdated and is illogical in every manner. teachers are highly unskilled and do not value quality education and all this does not make you job ready. exams are taken 8 times in a semester of 5 months. you do not get time to learn anything as most of your time is spent in giving exams. even saturdays are working and you are never able to learn any skill or get exposure. | [placements]: extremely disturbing that the average package is just 3 lac p.a. not enough companies visit the campus. also they do not make the students job ready at the end of graduation to get properly placed. if you want to get placed then you have to do hard work on your own and apply for off campus placements. do not expect a good job even if you are the best. | [campus life]: campus life can't be any worse than this. you do not have any sports or any other activity indulge into. you can not leave the campus without a gate pass at any time of the day and it is impossible to get a gate pass. you can not leave your hostel after 10 p.m. and there are so many pointless restrictions that most of the students are frustrated badly and even some go into depression.
college_name: Chitkara University Institute of Engineering and Technology Jhansla

review_text: the college seniors are friendly and are ready to help if asked. they are the ones who taught us a lot of hacks to live in hostels. the alumni network is also solid in our college. many alumnus have given scholarships to needy students and help in uplifting teaching standard in the college.i got admitted in this college after rigourous learning and cracking jee mains and advance. i had coaching for 2 years after which i was able to give the exam and cleared it in first attempt. i got air 86 in jee advance which made me eligible for getting computer science as the course.
college_name: IIT Delhi - Indian Institute of Technology [IITD]

review_text: [college infrastructure]: good college to have. as all the necessary equipment are available and facilities are also good in college. wifi is not that good in college complaint a lot of time but they don't do anything on this. | [academics]: quality of studies are poor teachers are not good that much. curriculum is okay not that good. i'm studying here from so much time it is so restricted. i don't want to be here much. teachers are not that good. | [placements]: placements are okay here not much good not that bad in college. around 80% students are getting placements but the average package is not that good. average is around 5 lakhs per annum. highest went around 7

[college infrastructure]: infrastructure is too good here we have all the modern equipment with all the necessities where the student needs.we can use all the facilities for free and even after our graduation we can use these facilities lifetime without any kind of restrictions here, labs are also modern with new things.i really love the all the facilities they are providing like drinking water, sanitation etc... | [academics]: the semesters exams are very very easy to study compared to jee exam you can pass in the exam if you study one day before the exam that much easy our syllabus course was.you can pass very easily in the exam of you study like that.the academics is also great here the faculty are also from a well established background. | [placements]: almost every student gets placed in iitd, with an overall placement percentage of 98 percentage this year. the minimum highest package was 54.65 lacs for three students by deshaw company. almost every company like google do visit our college regularly. the placements are also good.many top companies visited our college for the recruitment.every one registered and got the good placements.

[college infrastructure]: it's average college, having wifi facilities like high tech laboratory. bajaj and 5 g labs are there. each building of department have different own laboratories. hostels are non ac, but can manage. wifi is 24/7. | [academics]: i'm aerospace engineering student. the syllabus is more oriented on aeronautics here. i feel the syllabus should be more on aerospace as name suggest and course should also be. but they are good in aeronautics perspective. | [placements]: placements for aerospace is nil literally. so don't rely on campus placements for core. but software and it placements are there people can opt for it irrespective of branches they are studying here in sastra. | [campus life]: for girls it is very strict no freedom. dress code is compulsorily formal with shawl for girls and formal shirts only for boys. skinny jeans and cargo pants and all are so prohibited. people here are of different fashion sense in accordance to this era. | [anything else]: if you people are interested in biotech, electronics related then it's very good college the best ones for all type of reasearch works top notch. but for other, it's not
college_name: Shanmugha Arts Science Technology Research and Academy Thanjavur

review_text: [college infrastructure]: the infrastructure of our college is very good. as our college was established in 1997, it had enough time to develop. each department has a special block, called a, b, c block. the college provides excellent wi-fi connectivity and lan ports in hostels. the labs in our college are good, having been maintained well over the past 25 years. for the eee course, which is newly added for b.tech, we have all the necessary lab equipment. | [academics]: only some of the teachers are skillful and dedicated to their professions, but others are just useless. however, in engineering, you need to learn stuff yourself through online resources and books. everything is available online now; you don't need to depend on the teachers. the courses here are very relevant to your life, but in the 1st year, you will have to learn some useless subjects that don't help you in your career but help you in life. | [placements]: this year top companies do visit our campus like oracle, slice. college does provide the information reg offline opportunities available. mostly students got placed. this year ipg-m.tech branch has the highest average package. i guess if you are serious about your courier than no one can stop you from grabbing golden opportunities. | [anything else]: superb college.
college_name: Atal Bihari Vajpayee Indian Institute of Information Technology and Management Gwalior

review_text: pros/cons: well maintained and modern equipments in lab and sincere teaching methods which makes a student exam ready. the exam structure is very well patterned. it aligns perfectly with the study schedule. teachers are very liberal and helpful. the campus life is also perfect. playgrounds and sport facilities is top notch. the canteen also has a great variety of items everyday for students. the campus is pretty clean. there are many clubs for students to engage in other social and cultural activities. it really enlightens the mood and competitive spirit of one. | placement experience: students are eligible for campus placement in cse, it ,ece and sometimes elec branches. the others dpt also offers a quite unique variety of placements from different companies. nearly 60 percent of the students have been placed in this year and others are still on board for a positive response.

[college infrastructure]: institute has 1 gbps (1:1) dedicated leased line for high-speed internet connectivity wi-fi campus keeping in mind the refreshment and fitness of the students a rooftop mini-golf course, cricket net practice area, table tennis boards, carrom boards, two basketball courts and gymnasium are made available inside the campus more than 5000 computers available for students | [academics]: am persuing b-tech in computer science engineering and i feel professors are very good and helpful. main goal is to focus on placements and higher education. you will also be getting training for your placements in 3rd year. almost every student gets placed. | [placements]: terms of placements, iem is a very good college in west bengal. ... all market-leading companies like tcs, infosys, wipro, capgemini, cognizant, ibm, nri fintech, oracle and many others also visit here to hire students. | [campus life]: it has a not so big campus but still one can enjoy here none the less. the best features are the cafeteria and the ground. the worst being the campus is small and everything here is very packed up. the students, teachers and seniors are friendly and helpful. the location is at prime salt lake, it's an it hub in kolkata. and it is absolutely safe and handles the emergencies very well
college_name: Institute of Engineering and Management Kolkata

review_text: [college infrastructure]: the department has a state-of-art infrastructure pertaining to its labs. various research facilities are available along with the iit delhi supercomputer for major computational work which was used in drug discovery for covid. the campus has a good wi-fi speed with airconditioned and technically equipped classrooms and one of the best libraries in the country. iit delhi boasts a great hostel culture with inter-hostel games and hostel festivals. mess food is good and eatable. | [academics]: teachers of the departments are most qualified in their respective fields. these are well-trained faculty members with international relations and good quality research outcomes and citations. the curriculum is rigorous starting from basic biology to bioinformatics and genomics. exams at iit delhi are conducted thrice in a year known as minor 1, minor 2, and majors. the evaluation is spread across quizzes, minors, majors, and lab activity. the pass percentage is 30% generally. | [placements]: almost everyone who opts for placement is placed in sectors ranging from core to non-core, from consulting and finances to the technical and analytics. many students opt for higher studies and most get admissions at top universities in and around the world like the ivies. the startup culture is also making its way with 4 startups from the 2019 batch of biotechnology alone. the highest salary package offered is around 30 lpa and the lowest salary package offered is around 5 lpa-6 lpa.

pros/cons: the campus infrastructures are good and well maintained,the hostels are also neatly maintained even though they are old buildings. the securities cleaning staffs ,shopkeepers vendors all are very friendly and cooperative. the academic schedule is so effective that we get a lot of free time so that we can boost our skills in self learning and skill development,also ther are two long vacations summer for around 3 months and winter for 1month which is so good the transportation inside the campus, all are said to use cycles of course they are good for health but a longer time we might get bored of cycling there are some professors who are very much qualified but they lack in methods of teaching which quite upsets me , also some lack in language also ,the main language used locally is hindi but the classes are taken in english but in an indian standard there are no good south indian restaurants inside and outside the campus | placement experience: from the 6th or 7th sem one can go for pre placement or internship their cgpa and skills are measured for this. there are a lot of good companies coming for placements in our college , companies like google , amd , qualcomm, amazon, oracle, ola , microsoft , apple etc comes with a higher offers there was a total of 1274 placement offers this year. the highest package of this year was 62.44 lpa and average package was 14-15 lpa the placement rate of btech program was about 82.20 percentage . also this year our college up ranked from 19 to 13th in engineering becoming the second best nit in india

[college infrastructure]: delhi technological university (dtu), one of india?s premier engineering institutions, is widely appreciated for its excellent infrastructure and vibrant campus environment. spanning over 165 acres in rohini, delhi, the dtu campus offers a blend of modern architecture and natural greenery, providing an ideal atmosphere for academic and personal growth.the university?s infrastructure includes state-of-the-art classrooms equipped with smart boards, projectors, and air conditioning to ensure a comfortable learning environment. each department has its own dedicated block with specialized labs that house advanced equipment and research tools, rivaling those found in top-tier institutions like iits. students often praise the hands-on exposure and practical learning experience made possible through these well-maintained facilities. | [academics]: i am pursuing b.tech in biotechnology at delhi technological university (dtu) because of the program?s interdisciplinary focus and the growing demand for biotech professionals in healthcare, agriculture, and environmental sectors. the course integrates biology with engineering, making it both innovative and application-oriented. dtu offers strong academic support through its modern labs and research-driven environment, which is ideal for students interested in real-world problem solving through science and technology.the quality of teaching is generally commendable. faculty members are well-qualified and many are involved in active research, often encouraging students to participate in projects and conferences. professors focus on both theoretical understanding and practical application, using smart classrooms and well-equipped laboratories to deliver effective learning. while some students feel certain faculty members rely heavily on textbooks, others appreciate the mentoring and industry exposure provided, especially in final-year projects and internships. | [placements]: the quality of placements for b.tech in biotechnology at delhi technological university (dtu) is decent but not as strong as core engineering branches like computer science or electronics. on average, around 50% to 70% of students from the biotechnology branch get placed every year, though this percentage can vary depending on the batch and market conditions. some years, the placement rate has been lower, with students relying more on off-campus opportunities or internships to secure jobs. the average package offered to biotechnology students typically ranges from ?4 to ?6 lpa, with a few exceptional cases reaching up to ?14?20 lpa. core recruiters in this field include renowned pharma and biotech companies like mankind pharma, biocon, cipla, serum institute, and dr. reddy?s laboratories. while these companies offer valuable experience and a strong career foundation, they may not offer very high salary packages compared to it or finance firms. | [campus life]: the delhi technological university (dtu) campus is widely admired for its spacious, green, and well-maintained environment. spread across approximately 165 acres, the campus blends modern academic infrastructure with natural surroundings, offering a peaceful yet vibrant atmosphere for students. | [anything else]: yes, one important aspect worth mentioning about delhi technological university (dtu) is its strong student community and networking opportunities. the college has a highly competitive environment where students are driven, ambitious, and often involved in multiple activities outside academics?like hackathons, research projects, startups, and national-level competitions. this vibrant peer group plays a big role in shaping students? personal and professional growth.

[college infrastructure]: the college infrastructure is improving, the aravali hostels are in a bad state, and the admin building is not painted. the buildings which are new are very good. there is no cctv in the old academic block. cctvs are there in the new academic block. | [academics]: i am studying mechanical engineering. the relative grading system is killing the college. but the curriculum is always updated in accordance with industry standards. the faculty is good. but there is a shortage of staff in labs. labs are not good, many of the boilers don't work. a lot of improvement is needed in labs. | [placements]: the college stands out in placement. i am personally assured that the college placement gives excellent job opportunities for the core as well as circuital branches. the placements are equivalent to mediocre iits and the top nits. the average package for the mechanical branch for the year 2023 is 12-13 lacs per annum. | [campus life]: campus life is only good during fests and events. rest of the time it feels more like school.

review_text: [college infrastructure]: nsut has a beautiful landscaped and fully residential complex of around 145 acres. it has various admin blocks comprising rti cell, st/sc cell, training and placement cell, and auditorium. other than these it has medical facilities, power backup, yoga and meditation centre, gym facilities, free internet facility, sports complex, two banks, atm, post office and many more such facilities. | [academics]: soo i am a fourth year student from computer engineering. their are three types of courses i.e. core, elective and foundation. elective courses are divided into discipline centric elective, generic elective and open elective. foundation courses are divided into compulsory foundation and elective foundation. the university has credit based system. the curriculum has not been updated since few years soo it's not that up to date curriculum but what is taught is enough to grab a good placement. | [placements]: in terms of placement it is equal to few of the iits. in 2019, 172 companies participated in placement process choosing about 640 students. the highest ctc was 1.25 crore but the average was a bit low around 7.75lpa. it has a placement percentage of about 90% which is great. the top companies which come to the campus every year are google, facebook, microsoft, amazon, maruti, samsung etc. i myself is placed in samsung with a package of 15 lpa. | [campus life]: a prominent feature of the campus is the vast expense of greenery. the campus is divided into clusters of buildings. the campus contain admin block, post offices, banks and a vast auditorium. the library is situated behind the five main blocks. the campus has five boys hostel and 2 girls hostel. the techers are supportive amd help in placement and other things. also it is located in dwarka which is a very development area in delhi soo it is very safe in the campus with police always available.
college_name: Netaji Subhas University of Technology New Delhi

review_text: [college infrastructure]: good infrastructure and tree filled campus. the facilities provided in the campus is one of the best that any university has to offer. they are also well maintained. the hostels are average on the other hand. the mess food is not good and the rooms are crammed up for the price they are taking for them. | [academics]: i am studying btech in computer science engineering. the quality of teaching is average at best. the teachers here only rush through the syllabus and don't focus on the learning bit. although some teachers are very good and will help you a lot if they see that you are a good student. | [placements]: above average is the quality of placements i would say. higher paying companies have been coming every year but most of the student get placed in mass recruiting companies. in short if you know how to code and basic other skills you'll be placed for sure. | [campus life]: the college campus is very beautiful and vast. it extends in a huge place and is equipped with the latest features and amenities that can be provided in any institution. it is located slightly far away from the main city and this could be a problem for daily commuters.
college_name: SRM Institute of Science and Technology Chennai

review_text: [college infrastructure]: the college has great infrastructure. from fully equipped laboratories, libraries to gym, badminton court, tennis court, 2 playgrounds for cricket and football. great cafeteria and other food outlets like rd and many more. the whole campus is wifi-friendly. there are 11 hostels which accommodates ug and pg students. | [academics]: i am pursuing b-tech in civil engineering. the quality of teaching is good. many workshops, fests, hackathons, etc are always in the row, to let the students understand the current advancements of technology and improve themselves. | [placements]: the placements in our college are quite good, specially in recent years. normally, average salary offered is 10-14 lpa; with the highest being 48 lpa. placement percentage is 65-78% in recent years. with coming years, its only going to improve. | [campus life]: the campus is lush with greenery, beautiful buildings, parks and much more. apart from the academic activities, the students engage into various co-curricular activities like public speaking, singing, sports, debates, poems, arts, etc with many cultural club and technical clubs to boost not just the academic life but also the social life.

review_text: [college infrastructure]: the infrastructure of our college is good. there is comfortable furniture in the college. our campus is high-speed internet enabled. there is an excellent and well-stocked library with a silent atmosphere of self-study. the hostel is average. the hostel furniture is good. the food served in the hostel canteen is expensive. medical facilities are good. | [academics]: our teachers are highly qualified and experienced. they know how to deliver content to students. they have good teaching techniques. they solve all doubts of students. the course curriculum is relevant and makes students industry-ready. semester exams are moderate, around 95% of students pass the exam. | [placements]: our college is well-known for its placements. around 90% of students got placed in our college in summer placements. the highest domestic salary package offered is 60 lpa. the average salary package offered is 50 lpa. the lowest salary package offered is 30 lpa. top recruiting companies for summer placements in 2022 are tata consultancy, axis bank, boston consultancy, jindal steel, etc.

as we come from campus it is best for college to enjoy our campus life. we have the annual fests like kashi yatra and tech fests like technic they will celebrate every year. we have the big libraries one is a central library and another library. the college provides so many books in the library and we have the central ac in the library. we have three playgrounds in that famous one i s gymkhana ground. we have the cricket ground, football, tennis, table tennis, indoor kabaddi, indoor badminton and boxing ring, etc. and every year they will celebrate the fest call as sparda. it is one of the largest sports fests and it is conducted by our college. and we have so many clubs like cine, photography, music, business, etc like that around 20 clubs to explore.i am from the mining department i choose this court because of good job opportunities in as private and government sectors. for every 20 students, 1 teacher will be available. all professors are ph.d. qualified professors.they will teach very nice manner. the exam will be for every 3 months we have mid and sem exams and also we have some quizzes and vivas in between these exams. we have to little bit work hard to pass the exams
