review_text: [college infrastructure]: the infrastructure is pretty moderate, but it includes all the facilities from sports centers to 3 to 4 libraries, clean hostels, high speed wifi and everything is always kept well maintained. the food is pretty moderate as well. | [academics]: you get a lot of opportunities to learn technologies from different fields through clubs and workshops that are happening most of the time and professors are also very helpful in terms of helping us make the right decisions and writing research papers. | [placements]: as far as i know, the placement are pretty good and most students get placed in the in-campus interviews and don't have to look for interviews outside campus. as i'm still in 2nd year, i haven't gone through the placement process so no comments.

freshers happen ever year to give welcome party to students who came new to college,fests take place,dj nights are best of them all,nascent programs are there,fashion club is also there,you can expect to have much awaited fun in college fest when celebrities come and entertain us.placement and job opportunities are really impressive for computer science,mechanical,information technology students,we get enough campus placements every year,can say anything about stipend though.you can expect high grade companies to come in college too

[college infrastructure]: nsut offers a modest-sized campus with ample greenery and decorative spaces, along with a well-stocked library. while the older classrooms lack air conditioning, the newer buildings are equipped with it. the campus also features a small sports complex and a canteen serving satisfactory food. | [academics]: the academic rigor is notable, with strict attendance policies enforced by the professors. the curriculum for ice branch is extensive and challenging, necessitating careful consideration before choosing this specialization. practical learning is supported through lab sessions that complement the core subjects, accompanied by stringent viva and examination processes. | [placements]: for the instrumentation and control engineering branch, placement opportunities are promising, with a majority of companies welcoming ice students for interviews. students have the flexibility to pursue both technical and non-technical roles. the average annual salary package for graduates ranges between 8 to 10 lakh, varying according to the individual's capabilities and performance.
college_name: Netaji Subhas University of Technology New Delhi

review_text: [college infrastructure]: our college boasts top-notch infrastructure, including modern classrooms with smart boards and wi-fi, well-equipped labs, a vast library, and clean, safe hostels. food is hygienic. we maintain and actively use these facilities to enhance the student experience. | [academics]: i am currently pursuing electronics and computers engineering. the teaching quality is exceptional, thanks to our excellent teachers who provide helpful handouts. our curriculum is up-to-date and includes recent developments, making us job-ready. | [placements]: thapar university boasts strong placements, high placement rates, varying top salaries by field, competitive averages, and a supportive placement process. specific stats may fluctuate, so refer to the latest reports for precise information. | [campus life]: our college campus offers a vibrant environment with excellent infrastructure and a wide range of activities. faculty and staff are supportive, and safety measures are in place for emergencies, though parking can be limited.
college_name: Thapar Institute of Engineering and Technology Patiala

review_text: net to the type of fee payment annually and a half and only those who are financially sound can pay annually while others can't be normally gla also provide two types of scholarship the one based on merit in class 12th that is above 80% and the second one is on the performance in end term examination they also except scholarship by up governmentgla provides placement from the first semester of the third year the highest package is of 44,00,00 rupees in btech and the average package is between 7 to 8,00,00 rupees almost every student gets a place according to their skills at the companies which often visit the campus on microsoft's cape gemini and amazon

[college infrastructure]: the college has a very good infrastructure. there is a temple on campus. hostels are available on campus. there are different buildings for different courses. wi-fi is available. a computer lab, chemistry lab, and mechanical lab are available. there is also a huge library. the facilities available in hostels are not so good. there are many restrictions. | [academics]: the teachers here are quite supportive and qualified. they prepare you well enough for exams and internals. most of them are really friendly and encouraging. they give out study materials and papers well in advance. even the teaching in classroom is great and might endup not needing notes from teachers. | [placements]: this year we had almost 80% of student placed. top recruiters are it companies from india and many foreign companies. even internship opportunities were good in number and most of them with a decent cgpa got job offers. the roles that were offered varied from software developer to testing roles. even core companies were quite a handful this year and they ask for a bond for 1-2 years. also the college has a tie ups with different testing platforms like cocubes, elitmus and bizotic.

[college infrastructure]: the class rooms are good and clean . the management staff was very good at keeping the classroom clean and tidy although some rooms get really hot and humid during summers but winter are quite warm and unbothersome. | [academics]: the teachers are quite knowledgeable and strict in a good way they prepare you for life. they never sugarcoat their words and know what they need to do in order to get the best out of you. good luck to you all. | [placements]: though there are placement drives but they hardly provide great placements as the college has less scope for interview training and lectures from advisors . it would really be helpful if there was more of that sort

many companies like amazon, jp morgan, delloite, adobe, etc visit our college and the college provides us with ample internship opportunity and placements. it all comes down to the individual and how he performs in the interview rounds. the college also conducts mock interviews and gd's to prepare the student for the placements.the societies here are pretty good actually and people are so talented here. our dance society is i suppose the best because they have won many competitions beating other colleges like the iits, nits and du. the society provides every student with loads of opportunities and it's pretty good.
college_name: Thapar Institute of Engineering and Technology - [Thapar University]

review_text: [college infrastructure]: infrastructure of college is really good ,honestly it is good for labs and class room,with good environment of students campus ,hygienic is average to university the decoram of college is good about . | [academics]: i am pursuing btech in computer science and engineering form the gla university matura,because good academics environment i think the cirrclum is pretty god but need to be updated so that student can work on thier skill with high proficiency,. | [placements]: the placement quality is too good student getting placement offers and many internships in second year in 3rd year many student getting preplacement offers now number of students are increasing in gla so the competition is getting tough . the highest package offered is ....of 55 lakh average package is ..of 6 lakh | [campus life]: campus life depend on individuals habits and discipline but ideally gla campus life is too good . student enjoy as the staff here is too supportive. most of the things that are used by student are available without any prerequisite.

[college infrastructure]: our college infrastructure is fully developed and maintained. the infrastructure of the college is excellent. the classroom, lab and auditorium are well designed and equiped. the hostel are well built and have all the necessary things that a student requires during his studies. | [academics]: the curriculum is fully updated according to the industrial needs. all the faculty are of at least minimum ph.d. and have a minimum experience in teaching field. teachers are really knowledgeable but it depends on you make the best use out of it. | [placements]: placement is great for it , cse ,ece,eee . you will get placed in super dream if you work hard enough. the highest salary package of 44 lpa offered by microsoft is so far the highest ever in vit vellore. recently given that vit vellore has got more than 8000 offers of job placements. the process was online but placement cell helped in every aspect. | [campus life]: vit also has different types of cafes along with dominos in campus. there are two major events in vit called rivera and gravitas (technical event). both the events are conducted on a huge scale.
college_name: Vellore Institute of Technology Chennai Campus

review_text: pros/cons: the library of the college which has been constructed recently is one of the biggest in bangalore and is a go to place the canteen gives you a variety of food from north indian to south indian the vibe of the college is very nice, although mostly academicly oriented nothing as such everything is nice and chill academically oriented but everything is fine not a very/less sports oriented collegee | placement experience: placement statistics is one of the major reaoson why students get attracted to rvce. the placements are great with average pacakge of cse and related branches to be anything above 17 lakhs per annum. hence overall placements are good
college_name: R V College of Engineering - [RVCE], Bangalore

review_text: [college infrastructure]: the course is so easy if you are an average student. it is as interesting for me as it can be for you as well. the physics department is so helpful and supportive. the physics department is open for 24 hours. so you can keep working on your project, as it is so amazing. | [academics]: the teachers are really helpful and every professor here has a different personality and vibe. we love to spend some time with them. the textile department is required for every department present till now. the students are obviously industry ready. the semester exams are really difficult and it is hard to pass but vary from student to student. | [placements]: i think 80% of the batches were placed during the first phase. the highest package offer in mnc is inr 75 lacs; the lowest can go below inr 5?9 lacs pa too; and the average package is around inr 10?12 lacs pa. the top recruiting companies are gravity, sprinkler, and world quant. i think 95% students got internships by the end of phase 2. roles offered are sde, finance, hft, and consulting. | [anything else]: good college.

[college infrastructure]: nitt has a campus infrastructure that very few institutions can match in terms of sheer size and facilities. it is self-contained for all if its requirements. every conceivable need of students and faculty are taken care of. | [academics]: the curriculum stays up-to-date. at the end of the course you will be made competent in the international platform (well, at least i do). it becomes imperial to mention about the flexible curriculum system - it does work great! | [placements]: it is one of the finest colleges in india. but, i would say the placements are departmental based. if i should talk about my department (material science), i would say that i have a mixed opinion. there are lot of factors that affect placements, so we cant blame the institution.

[college infrastructure]: unlimited and free high internet facility free is provided to every student. we have an air-conditioned huge library that has a good stock of books. good classrooms with great audio systems and seating arrangements but lacks air conditioner. hostels are old and are not in a good position. the food served is amazing. there are great sports opportunities and free access to a super specialised hospital.the electronics department of iit (bhu) offers four-year b.tech degree, m.tech degree in four di | [academics]: the teachers at iit (bhu) are highly qualified and expert in their teaching subjects. the entire curriculum is designed to make the students industry ready. the course content include subjects like digital circuits and system, microelectronics, digital electronics, digital signal processing and many other subjects. the curriculum also include many exploratory projects which are to be done after fourth semester. | [placements]: around 90% of the b.tech students were placed. the highest salary offered is 210,000 usd. the average salary package offered is 15 lpa. the lowest salary package offered is 8 lpa in the first phase of placements. companies offered software, consulting, analyzing and banking jobs along with core engineering jobs. the top recruiters were nutanix, goldman sachs, google, to name a few. around 200 students were offered pre-placement offers from the top tech companies and banks. the top recruiting com | [campus life]: we have better college campus and its geeat,we enjoy alott
college_name: Indian Institute of Technology Banaras Hindu University Varanasi

review_text: the fests that are conducted every year in iith are mila, elan, and nvision. you can show yourself any kind of talent there. it is a golden opportunity to showcase your talent. sports and extracurricular activites go hand in hand with acads. there are cricket grounds, basketball grounds, badminton courts, a swimming pool, etc in iith. the library is one of the largest and any kind of books can be found there. some of the clubs that are run by students here are cepheid[ the astronomy], prakriti[the nature club], infero[programming related], rangdemanch[the drama club], and so on. there are plenty of clubs in here and you can definitely find the club that you are interested in.from the 7th semester, students become eligible for campus placements. many mnc and large companies visit too. for example, google, microsoft, amazon. the highest package offered last yr is 61.5 lpa. more than 650 students and 210 companies had registered for the placements during the last yr. iith has jumped to 100% in placements last year. i plan to go for higher studies after getting the degree as it provides me the opportunity to learn much more about the subject that i am interested in.
college_name: IIT Hyderabad - Indian Institute of Technology - [IITH]

review_text: [college infrastructure]: as a student at srm ghaziabad i have been fortunate enough to experience an expectional leaerening enviroment suppoorted by top notch infrastructure. from well maintained classroom advanced laboratory. | [academics]: in addition to its remarkable infrasturcture , srm ghazibad also excells in providing quality education through its experience faculty members and diverse range of courses. the college encourages many activities. | [placements]: srm ghaziabad consistly excells in providing successful placements . strong industry connections and a dedeicated placement cell. placement cell ensures that student procures promising job offers . the college provide many oppurtunities. | [campus life]: one of the highlights of srm ghaziabadis its remarkable library. boosting an extensive collection of books , journals, and research papers, the library catres to the diverse interests and academic needs of students .
college_name: SRM Institute of Science and Technology NCR Campus Ghaziabad

review_text: a total fee of 24 lakhs (as of 2023), 12 lakhs being the tuition fee and the rest 12 is the hostel and mess fee. the scholarship is for merit students, and sat scholar and sports scholarships are also there. someone coming from an underprivileged background or a financially unstable background will also get support from shiv nadar foundation.snu offers a rich campus life. with best-in-class facilities, one can experience diversity and a great class of life on campus. 284-acre campus will have all the needed staff. fests and all are very enjoyable and good you will get to learn many different things

course curriculum is very much upto date and provides many chances to learn practical knowledge.about your interests.the exam structures is also very fine , doesn't put much pressure on students. there is one mid sems exams in each semester which consists of around 30% marks then comes the end sems which weighs 40% marks. other 30 consists of : 15% of attendance and assignments other 15% of lab and vivas.the college is best if you wanna have fun and study hard simultaneously. its in delhi which itself provides lot of opportunities for living a happening life and the college doesn't put much pressure on the students whereas let the student learn anything of their interests and let them engage in the extracurricular activities of their choice.

[college infrastructure]: i am not a hosteler, i am a day scholar so i don't know about the hostel facilities. in our college, wi-fi facility is very much good. we can use 11gb per day free for one year. we have to the chemistry lab, computer-aided engineering drawing lab, and computer lab up to today because we are still in 1st semester. we haven't seen the workshops or aerospace labs, they will show us after the 1st semester. classrooms and library facilities are very good. | [academics]: teachers are very helpful. all are ph.d. qualified teachers and they have good knowledge and experience. curriculum is relevant to the students and makes students industry-ready. exams are not that difficult. if we gain depth and concentrate on the studies, it will be easy. pass percentage is 40%. | [placements]: in our college, aerospace engineering opened for the first time in [2024], so our is the first batch. the average package is 6 lpa, and the highest is 18 lpa as our lecturer said. students are not yet placed and didn't get any internships for this course because i have mentioned earlier that it is the first batch. so, we will get to know how the internships and placements after we go to that place.

[college infrastructure]: yes the college has all essential infrastructure, facilities and equipment. wifi is also good. library is also up to date. sports facility is also proper having enough space for everybody.we also have a gym. the institute also has a clean campus. | [academics]: i am a student of b.tech mechanical engineering. this college has good professor having many patents & have very deep knowledge in their respective subjects . yes the curriculum is ok. it's updated but not latest. the institute does make students job ready. | [placements]: placements have been excellent . almost everybody eligible for placements is well placed. highest package goes around 40 lpa & average is around 7.25 lpa. yes, the college will help you getting well placed. | [campus life]: its located in the main city of jaipur.i think it is best at handling emergencies.
college_name: Malaviya National Institute of Technology Jaipur

review_text: kiit fest is one of the best to name a few! it takes place in the month of august or september and it is the best; i must say. kiit conducts the fest very lavishly and with a lot of extravaganzas. kiit library is one of the best technology-oriented libraries i've come across. it has books from all branches and courses. the book issuing policy is also easy and convenient. classrooms in kiit are all air-conditioned and the buildings are all centrally air-conditioned. all classrooms are smart classes and there are many plug point's to connect your laptop charger without any hassle. sports and games are the best when it comes to kiit. it promotes your sports interests and allows you to take it further by utilising the campus facilities as much as possible. yes, there are many extracurricular club groups and websites run by the students for the students. they are 'tph' 'kzar' etc.today's generation is all about creating new ideas and methods to make our day to day life more feasible and easier. in order to do this, the software has a major role, the reason being why i chose this course. the faculty: student ratio is also very effective. the ratio is 1:60 which is great for an engineering college. the teachers are highly qualified and educated, they teach us the part till they reach the level of satisfaction by their teaching which is the best part in them. we hardly leave our doubts uncovered, they clear them with enthusiasm and motivate us to ask more. term exams take place in 5-6 months. mid sem takes place between 2 months and the semester exam at the end. the level of the exam was moderate. we can say that if you have read the class notes and practised it you'll easily secure good marks.

[college infrastructure]: there are 2 huge lecture halls, many tutorial and other classrooms. our college provides a very good wi-fi facility in our hostel. the food served in our mess is not appreciable. sports activities are conducted, but due to less number of grounds, it affects environment is quite good with very pleasant atmosphere. | [academics]: faculty members here are well qualified and helpful, but their teaching skill is not that effective. so it depends on students what kind of teacher they prefer. our course curriculum is very relevant and is inspired by the massachusetts institute of technology.but faculty is very friendly with the students. | [placements]: in this semester, almost 90% of the students were placed with the highest salary package of 19 lpa and the average salary package of 10 lpa and the lowest salary package of 6 lpa. the top recruiting company for our course was amazon. we also got placements in other iits under other those professors who are from iits and nits. i don't know much about top roles offered in our course.recruiters are from mainly top mnc's.

[college infrastructure]: infrastructure of the college is very good and hygienic. it has all the equipment from smart classes to acs and a dedicated language lab. central library along with department library with cyber library. | [academics]: faculty and teaching is very good. i studied mba with dual specialization. the curriculum is updated and so is the teaching methodology. they provide you with the latest case studies to match the industry. | [placements]: average placement ranges between 3.5 to 4.5 lakhs. most of the students were placed, to be precise around 90%. college was supportive in the placement process but mostly banks and nbfc came for the placement drive. | [campus life]: campus life is good. best part is the campus location and greenery all around. students can emgage in sports as well as intercollege activities. the staff and teachers are very supportive. it has a dedicated dispensery with highly qualified doctors and support staff.

pros/cons: the freedom that the college provide is so immence. we can litterally go out anytime we want without any disturbance from the authority the time given for working on self is also a positive thing. we are litterally given 4 months out 12 as a holidays or breaks to work on your skills. the placements of the college is so good. the academic is very tough. you have to grind those 4 months real hard in order to get good grades | placement experience: so the placements of iitk is so good. as it is one of the top colleges of engineering in india, the placement here are quite good. the average pakages according to last year stats is somewhere around 22 lakhs. and then the we have branch-wise average pakages too. the students becomes elgible for interhsip in his/her 5th semester and for the placement in his/her 7th semester. the american express & jp morgon visited iitk and has made 11 and 6 offers respectively. the percentage of students getting placed are high , usually higher than 85 percent. i planned on preapring for upsc after the my degree.
college_name: IIT Kanpur - Indian Institute of Technology - [IITK], Kanpur

review_text: [college infrastructure]: they have good infrastructure and the campus is clean and well maintained. college provides good facilities to the students and they care about cleanliness. classrooms are well equipped with the smartboard and projectors | [academics]: the course is really good. the curriculum is very updated and includes all recent developments. the quality of teaching is good at our college. all the faculties are good and help students to develop our knowledge and learn new skills. | [placements]: i'm doing my bachelor in psychology so i don't have much idea about this. but the placement quality in our college is outstanding. i have heard from many students around the campus and seniors the placements are fantastic and placement percent is also high when compared to all other colleges | [campus life]: it is amazing and you will get a lot of exposure through fest and competitions

pros/cons: great peer group who are just like me, really interested to pursue research some professors who are very reachable at anytime to ask our doubts clubs which conduct events to make us learn more about the fields we are interested in it is necessary to study at least three subjects from pcmb for first three years | placement experience: most of the students after completing four years, continue to stay here to get masters degree after one more year and pursue phd from world renowned institutions. very few people (<7/100) per batch will sit for campus placements and most of them will be selected with a good annual package of 30000 at an average. some students, mostly physocs majors can give government exams like icrb, gate to join isro and barc as scientists

[college infrastructure]: institute infrastructure is sober. classrooms are good with space and projectors attached. library is a huge house of textbooks accommodating materials of every department at the institute. high speed wifi is available 24/7 in the campus as well as hostels. both boys and girls hostels are established in the institute, though the number of them is short. canteen and snacks store is built for the students and faculties alike. | [academics]: teaching quality is on par with most of the best nits. it is the diligence of students that works wonders along with the guidance of faculties if you want to perform extraordinary. course curriculum seems relevant to me although not so much of practical knowledge imparted. | [placements]: more than 70% of the total enrolled students get placement offer during the on-campus placement drives. companies and visiting the campus are samsung, wipro, vedanta, texas steel, mahindra etc. average package offered goes around 6-7 lpa.

[college infrastructure]: college has all the necessary infrastructure. labs are well equipped and air conditioned. library has vast range of books. whole campus has wifi. campus is generally clean and food is hygienic. there are various facilities like gym, playground, sports equipment etc. both ac and non-ac rooms with 1/2/3/4/6 bed available. | [academics]: all teachers have phd. they know the content very well. but sometimes they are not able to explain it to students properly. teachers clarify doubts whenever asked. curriculum is good and updated. to be job ready, students need some extra practice beyond curriculum syllabus | [placements]: placements are good. every year more than 5500 students register for on-campus placements and more than 700 companies visit. average ctc is around 7 lpa and around 20 percent of students get ctc of more than 10 lpa. placement process is smooth and college is helpful during it.

lpu conducts freshmen induction only for freshers every year and also conducts lots of events like one india etc..... there are more than 20+ lakh books and e-books on all subject fields are available in central library lpu. lpu classrooms have white board, projector, security camera, charging points for every seat, 1 or 2 air conditioners and etc.. sports facilities are also available in lpu. but, we need to book what we want. lpu have websites like ums, my class, oas, lpulive, lpu touch etc.. everyone in the university having their dashboards in ums and can login. during covid, lpu conducts online classes and exams on myclass.lpu.in. where only particular class students and subject faculty can login. oas is used for conducting assignments and etc. lpu live is like a whatsapp where only particular class students and subject faculty are in groups. lpu touch is for checking our attendance, where is our class, assignments upload, checking cgpa, university announcements etc.from 6th semester students become eligible for campus placements. companies visited to lpu and offered placements like cognizant - 670+ capgemini - 310+ wipro - 310+ mphasis - 210+ accenture - 150+ and etc..... the highest package offered during lpu placements 2022 stood at inr 64 lpa. the highest package was grabbed by a btech cse student of lpu, and the offer was made by google and average package is inr 4.5 lpa in lpu 2022. more than 8,400 students have received placement and internship offers till now during lpu placements 2022. after getting the degree my plans to study in abroad or to get placed in a good company.

[college infrastructure]: the infrastructure here is very good and all the classrooms are air-conditioned. there are well-maintained computer and digital electronics labs and every classroom is equipped with digital learning facilities. our institute also has a good internet facility. there is a vast library with a wide range of books and online resources. there is a lot of greenery throughout the campus which gives it a pleasant atmosphere for learning. | [academics]: professors in our college are well qualified and are holding phds from top institutions. they are very helpful and guide students on their research topics. the course curriculum is very relevant. it gets updated every time to meet the industry's needs. | [placements]: every year about 95% of the students get placed in our college placements. students are recruited by top mncs like microsoft, amazon, goldman sachs, facebook, jp morgan, etc. the highest salary package offered this year was 59 lpa, with the average package might be around 15 lpa. top roles were offered to the students. this can be applied to both technical and managerial positions.
college_name: Atal Bihari Vajpayee Indian Institute of Information Technology and Management Gwalior

review_text: alcheringa is the annual cultural fest generally held in the month of jan or feb. also, spardha ( annual sports fest ) among the hostels is conducted. manthan(annual cult fest among hostels) and spirit are conducted along with many mini-events. all the books related to every topic are present in the library. classrooms are awesome with good infrastructure and are fully furnished. the sports culture is good. yes, there are many clubs including tech, cultural, finance etc.i was very much interested in mechanics and mechanical-related things. faculty to student ratio is awesome. it's about 1 faculty/ student. all faculties are highly qualified. most of them are having phd degrees in the specified field. exams are very regular on average, you have about 1 exam every 6 days, including end sems, mindsems and quizzes. the exams are of good level. need to have good knowledge to pass them.
college_name: IIT Guwahati - Indian Institute of Technology - [IITG]

review_text: students become eligible for placements after 6 semesters. big companies like google amazon samsung come there with huge packages. there are about 450 companies visiting every year. including core and tech branches. the highest package is about 54 lakh and the average package is about 13 lakh. cgpa for placement is 6 above. my plan after getting my degree is to get a placement.i chose this course as i want to be a civil engineer and also as it is known that nits are one of the best colleges in the world for pursuing btech. teachers are highly qualified and all are very knowledgeable in their fields and also very helpful and supportive. term exams are held every 6 months they are not as much difficult to crack.

i think this college has the best teaching and official faculties. they support in every manner they can. they even provide their number numbers for help out of campus. they support in all of the things like how to prepare practical copies, how to get in interviews and all the things.fees i can say are a little higher for middle-class students but this college provides up to 100% according to your results and also avail the government scholarships. fees structure is 50k per sem. but one thing is this college accepts the fees only for the online method.

[college infrastructure]: labs in our college were state-of-the-art with the latest tech and equipment. the automotive department, along with ai, were top class specially imported from germany. hostel facility was nice with three students sharing a room along with attached bathroom and toilet. quality of the food served was nice when the semester started but degraded with time. by the end of the semester, it was good again. | [academics]: teachers here were helpful to share their knowledge. some teachers were exceptional, well-read and were amazing role models to have, while some were just reading through notes and finishing the syllabus. the course curriculum was relevant. they used modern approach to teach mechanical engineering and used examples of 21st-century, which made things relevant while studying. | [placements]: around 10% of the total eligible students got placed, but not in our respective core branches. the highest salary package offered was around 6 lpa. the lowest salary package offered was 3 lpa. the top recruiters of the college were tcs, ibm, dell, and l&t. roles offered were as a junior manager and associate engineer. everyone who applied got an internship in the mechanical field from companies like tata motors, general motors, and mercedes.

[college infrastructure]: college infrastructure is very good. everything is present inside the campus. there is a shopping mall, libraries, tuck shops inside the campus. the whole area is safe and secure. hostels are also very good and well maintained. | [academics]: lovely professional university is very good career and academics wise. the syllabus is industry mapped. syllabus of courses is updated frequenty as per current industry requirements. teachers are very supportive. | [placements]: lpu is known for its placements and opportunities.big multinational companies like amazon, bosch, capegemini visits regularly for placement drives.training and placement cell is very supportive.!!!!!! | [campus life]: campus life is very vibrant. there is one india, one world, youthvibe, spectra and many more other activities. | [anything else]: lpu is a great experience. infrastructure, academics, placements- everything is top-notch. lovely professional university helps you to gain experience. lovely professional university helps you to explore things. there are lot many activities which can be done to enhance the career. lpu helps in professional enhancement. infrastructure, curricular activities, non-curricular activities- eevrything is top notch. lpu provides great experience. you must join lovely professional university.!!!!!!!!!

[college infrastructure]: the infrastructure seriously lags behind modern standards. many buildings appear outdated and poorly maintained. classrooms often lack proper ventilation, and some even lack functioning fans or projectors. the hostel facilities are below average, with issues like old furniture, unhygienic bathrooms, and irregular water supply. wi-fi is unreliable, and basic amenities like clean drinking water and proper sanitation in many blocks need urgent improvement. the campus has potential but clearly needs significant renovation and modernization to match the level expected from a reputed government engineering institute. | [academics]: the institute follows an absolute marking scheme, which means your grades are based solely on raw scores, regardless of how tough the exam was or how others performed. this is very different from iits and other top institutes that use relative grading to fairly assess students. what makes things worse is the attitude of many professors. a lot of them seem frustrated or disinterested, and this reflects in their teaching and evaluation. even after putting in genuine effort, it?s extremely difficult to score well because marks are deducted harshly, and there?s barely any scope for partial credit. it's not uncommon to see students demoralized not because they didn?t study, but because the system is unsupportive and rigid. | [placements]: computer science & it: these branches have seen robust placement outcomes, with average packages around inr 11?12 lpa and the highest offers reaching up to inr 35 lpa. core engineering (mechanical, chemical, electrical): placement rates are strong, with average packages ranging between inr 6?8 lpa. notably, chemical engineering has achieved near 100% placement in some years. specialized branches (paint, food technology): these departments have maintained consistent placement records, with paint technology reportedly achieving 100% placement in certain years. | [campus life]: the campus is peaceful and academically focused. while infrastructure could use some upgrades, the environment supports learning and personal growth. clubs, tech fests, and student societies give plenty of chances to build leadership and soft skills.

[college infrastructure]: the overall design of the college is good. every basic requirements of students studying is fulfilled. basic needs are there. library,canteen and a playing ground. the college has basic blackboard in classrooms. college campus is neat and clean. | [academics]: the faculty here at our university focus on providing theoretical knowledge rather than focusing on practical uses. i was enrolled in b.tech course and faculty here are welcoming and have a good background knowledge of arts programs. | [placements]: placement experience is pretty good where they offer good companies to the students from mnc and other local companies. placement process in the college was easy and they give tips and training to the students. so, they have 85% of placement and 4.2lpa average.

[college infrastructure]: infrastructure is the worst. hostel fee is very expensive, and they don't provide the same facilities (not worth it). food is okay. they will be increasing the hostel fee year by year. common washrooms for girls, and no proper care in the hostel. infrastructure is not good. | [academics]: faculty is okay. you will be writing exams once a month. a 7.5 cpa is enough for getting placements. some teachers teach well, but some don't. semester exams are very easy. you will be asked every question from your pdfs itself. no worries about exams. | [placements]: placements are good. if you study well, you will be placed. people who don't have any backlogs will definitely be placed for at least 4 lpa. people from karnataka joining through kcet can choose this college. the highest package in 2024 is 54 lpa. the average is 6 lpa.
college_name: Dayananda Sagar College of Engineering Bangalore

review_text: [college infrastructure]: in our college medical facilities are available on campus. there is a nurse present during the day and the first aid kit is always stocked in emergencies. the college helps get a doctor or arrange transport. it?s a relief, knowing health issues or taken seriously. | [academics]: coursework is demanding, but rewarding from marketing plans to financial modelling are things strategically. i especially liked how every subject ends with a capstone project to apply all that we are learned in real time situation. | [placements]: startup also visit for placement, especially in sales marketing and product roles. these offer fast learning and multi exposure salaries may be lower than mncs. some students prefer start-ups for better growth opportunities. | [campus life]: even thought we have a packed schedule. the campus is never feel stressful. faculty are approachable, and the overall culture supportive everyone?s pushing each other to do better, but in a friendly way. | [anything else]: there is a culture of healthy competitions. people are serious about success, but not at the cost of collaboration.

[college infrastructure]: labs having extensive facilities, extensive library, vibrant hostels, green campus for holistic learning. campus provides us sports facilities, also shopping complex and canteen is there. overall good. | [academics]: college provide us a holistic environment to learn new things and there are excellent faculties to guide us through that. research facilities are provided to students and you can get into interdisciplinary things also. | [placements]: here in mnit campus placements are good. for masters they provide us internship and later that gets converted to ppo. as many top notch company visit our campus so it's a great place to kick start your career
college_name: Malaviya National Institute of Technology Jaipur

review_text: [college infrastructure]: it's having a huge college infrastructure with best library having more than one lakh books . a great administrative building and for each courses and seperate building for eg management has a building . | [academics]: average academics it's not like every one force you to study or what ... it's your wish whether to pass the subject . facilities are ok not that good nor that bad but most are like this so the academics is average | [placements]: average placement every year final year students will be able to get a chance in attending the placement which is being conducted by the placement cell of college . many companies with a minimum number of 40-50 will come | [campus life]: average campus life the campus has got variety no of programs like shuru aarush melam baazar milan etc the college itself has a hospital inside the campus so it can handle any kind of emergencies like accident etc
college_name: SRM Institute of Science and Technology Chennai

review_text: one of the positive remarks is there was no first year common so it os great. placement is what our college known for. the negative remarks is fee structure which is very expensive for middle class family. seniors are very good they make committes. they are our first friend on campus.there was many events in our college like raaga and rhyme, i.fest, synapse, tarang, concours, maniere, halloween day celebration, etc. i.fest, synapse, tarang, concours are 4 major festival of my college. i.fest is technical fest, tarang is navaratri, concours is sports fest.
college_name: Dhirubhai Ambani Institute of Information and Communication Technology - [DA-IICT]

review_text: i choose this course because i had an interest in the semiconductor field and this was a very better option also, the faculty of this course is very good, for each and every type of field there is a different faculty member who is researching in that particular field and you get to learn under their guidance. the faculty members are graduates from higher colleges like iit and did their ph.d. in their particular field from out-of-country universities.there are about more than 30 different kinds of clubs. there is our cultural fest named kashiyatra which happens in the month of january and is a very exciting fest in which very famous people come and perform in our fest also every club of our college conducts its own mini-fest like b.a.s.h of business club, fmc weekend of film and media council and many more.
college_name: IIT BHU - Indian Institute of Technology

review_text: [college infrastructure]: the college infrastructure is excellent .the building labs are excellent and hygiene.the whole campus is enabled with wifi.the library has all the books including the course book and other also.the hostel are very clean and hygiene .there 2 seater,3 seater and single seater room also available in the hostel. | [academics]: the academic of this college is excellent.i am studying cse in collaboration with ibm in specialisation in cyber security.the curriculum is updated and includes all the recent developments .the college academic and extracurricular activities makes you job ready.if you give your best in 4 year of course it will make you job ready. | [placements]: the placement of cse is excellent whereas other branches have weak placment ratio in comparison to cse.the average package offered to cse are 4 lakh but some of the student from other branches like petroleum and civil gets high package like 22 lakh.the cse student also gets this type of package if do well within 4 years of course. | [campus life]: the campus life is awesome.the college is situated between foot hills of mussorie the weathet is always excellent and pleasent .the campus has facilities for all extra curricular activities to be involved.the college is also going to get naac ranking as well.the college campus is safe it also provides all facilities needed by one.

[college infrastructure]: the facilities and infrastructure like wi-fi, labs, classrooms, and library are nice with all facilities. our labs are better compared to others. the library is also good with all books. the hostel facilities are good; the mess food is not good, and the canteen food is good. the medical facilities are also available. | [academics]: faculty members were cooperative. the teaching quality was great so that we could understand every topic easily. i would like to thank faculty members for their support. they always clarify our doubts. the course curriculum was relevant. they also help us to gain in-depth knowledge. | [placements]: the campus has a well-functioning placement cell that assists students. students are eligible to sit for placements in the last semester, given that they have completed the required number of credits. however, a unique point about the institute is that since it is a research-oriented institute, most students prefer to go for higher studies. last year's data shows that only 6 students sat for placements, out of which 5 were placed with an average package of 15 lacs per year. | [anything else]: superb college.

i am doing be in eic (electronics instrumentation & control), and the course curriculum is good as it is set according to the need of the time. i chose this course because this branch of engineering studies the measurement and control of process variables , and design and implementation of systems that incorporate them. choosing eic pays off well as the placement of tiet is good. the faculty: student ratio of lectures is 1:120 and for practicals 1:30. all the faculty of tiet are well qualified and studied at iits or abroad. they mainly are doctors in their respective fields and teach in the most effective ways using projectors and different visual methods. they clear all the doubts of students and help them in every way possible. the exam papers are difficult in ests and easy for msts and always take place timely.campus life tiet is very nice and students get to experience a lot of things and get to grab many opportunities. students from different states come here so you get to know about different cultures. the annual fest here is saturnalia which goes for 3 days in which we have different events in which we can take part and on the 3rd day we have bollywood night where a celebrity is invited. tiet has library which is of 4 floors and have different section for different departments. nava nalanda is one of the largest library in north india.
college_name: Thapar Institute of Engineering and Technology - [Thapar University]

review_text: [college infrastructure]: the college infrastructure is good. it provides excellent facilities to learn. it will provide us wifi faculties to learn. the facilities will explain the class using smart boards. good laboratories, library. | [academics]: the academics in this college are upto the standards. it has good infrastructure. library is good for students to learn in form of digital library for e-learning. we can make ourselves job ready. thus providing a good facility. | [placements]: the campus will be getting more than 700 companies every year for placements. we will be top product companies like amazon, microsoft. if we have talent we can get easily placed in top product companies. campus provides us good opportunities. | [campus life]: campus life is extraordinary. each and every thing we will enjoy the most. the location of college is safe. it can handle any situation of emergency. so we will enjoy the most. we will have a memorable campus life.

[college infrastructure]: very good infrastructure. had access too everything i needed. the clubs were very well funded as well. the mess as well as shops available to the students were very well equipped. medical access was also always available | [academics]: the course outline covered all the most important topics that are required while pursuing my course. faculty is top class as well. always ready and willing to help students at any point. the library too had a vast array of books. | [placements]: the college has a 100% placement record so that always brings about peace of mind. not only do they guarantee placements but also ensure that the company's that come to the campus are of highest quality.

the name of the annual fest is kiit fest where both technical and non-technical fests are held, generally in december. kiit central and departmental library has an ample number of books and journals on various topics to be availed to the students. all classrooms are decorated with smart boards and projectors. kiit has excellent infrastructure in sports with many campuses and grounds with stadium. ksac (kiit student activity centre) is the body that holds all technical and non-technical groups of kiit.in general campus, placements begin from the 6th semester onwards and continue till the 8th semester. 400+ companies visited kiit like accenture, wipro, cognizant, delloite, yugabyte, highradius, and tcs, with 5000+ job offers. the average package varies between 6lpa-12lpa, many get above that too. the highest package offered was 52lakhs in 2022. 92% of students have palced to date and about 45% placed in day-zero with many in dream companies.

[college infrastructure]: the quality of facilities that we get here are really amazing.we have smart boards ,air conditioners, digital electronics and many other.students will get all the facilities whatever they required.also the hostel infrastructure is also amazing.the quality of mess food is also pretty good with decent balanced diet. | [academics]: the teachers here are extremely qualified and knowledgeable. they have plenty of knowledge on their course.they are very strict and friendly too.the teaching quality is also pretty amazing with presentation.they will clear everyone's doubt.they are very very supportive. | [placements]: nit ap has a great placement record many top students got highest packages they worked a lot to get into that position.some of them became entrepreneurs.they developed their own companies.some also doing mba, upsc after placement team are so supportive.
college_name: National Institute of Technology Andhra Pradesh

review_text: choice: due to the brand name and alumni network. also, product design placements and opportunities are better and more versatile. also, intake is low (although intake competition is high) and opportunities are better. faculty: the student ratio is very nice. 30:1 and there is much attention on all. as the course is new so there is no such permanent faculty. although there are guest faculties from iits, nids, and nifts with versatile qualifications.there are multiple technical and cultural fests throughout the year that you can enjoy. books are ordered according to authorities and no one knows when they will arrive design books are not in libraries. acs are installed in all classrooms. there are various societies and sports you can join and they are very active and have connections with other branch peeps.

[college infrastructure]: the college is very very good in terms of infrastructure. the campus is very big and have almost everything. the library is very big and have latest edition of all the books. the campus is wifi equiped and have a good speed. | [academics]: the academic of the college is good. the teachers are highly educated and experienced. they can clear any of your doubts. i am studying computer science in iit delhi and the course includes all the recent developments and technology | [placements]: the placement cell of iit delhi is highly active they always bring all the top companies to the college. they also try to make us get placed in these companies. the highest placement of the college is 1.17 crores per annum. | [campus life]: the campus life is amazing. you can enjoy yourself in complete campus.

pros/cons: i liked all the accomodation they have provided. better opportunities like swimming, badminton court, 2 stadiums and food, laundry and canteen services . have a separate hostel for the 1st freshers and strict anti-ragging policy. counsellors should inform about the activities, scholarship programs and. events. should increase the girls and boys ratio which is currently 1/4 . some time should be provided to club activities during vacation time. | course curriculum overview: the course they offer is very specifically modified for each branch.also they have very sophisticated curriculum that helps us to prepare for real-world.teaching parts that i would like to recommend improvement are like they should provide more practical stuff than theory.

[college infrastructure]: college is built on a 70 hectares of land . there are wifis all over the campus . there are so many activities to do in college and day time . there are fountains to enhance the beauty . there is a library containing over thousands of books. | [academics]: academics are good . here many things are being taught practically rather than theory . it also helps us to encourage more stamina , more attraction , more talking to the industry people . the quality of teaching is so good. | [placements]: placements are so good .here many companies offers a great and vast opportunity for us . it totally depends on skills and talent of students and amny factords depend . placements in chitkara are totally depends on the reputation of college which it has made before years.
college_name: Chitkara University Institute of Engineering and Technology Jhansla

review_text: the curriculum is vast and provides good information regarding the scope of this field. they provide good lectures and seminars. the student ratio is 75:1 and i think it is a bit bigger ratio and can have different sections and not such crowded spaces. the faculty is qualified and have great years of experience. they provide good opportunities and exposure for the same.the fee structure i think is a bit expensive. but the department provides scholarship facilities for the top scorers. they consider delays in finances and payments. different timelines are set for those who cannot afford exact-date payments.

the campus is about to 10acres campus is very beautiful and well maintained nascent is the biggest tech fest conducted by heritage. actually, this college is not famous for its fest there is a big library in college where you can study and there is a separate digital library for the heritage, students have access to iit kharagpur online library in heritage, there are separate classrooms for every brack and every year students the classroom is clean and has good lighting with good ventilation and air quality every sport is available in the classroom like table tennis basketball football volleyball cricket and badminton. there are many clubs that are run by students and teachers some of them are 1) rotaract - social services club 2) resonance - music club 3)ghungroo- dance club 4)gdsc- coding clubi choose computer science because i love to code and i have a very much interest in web development. for every module there is a separate teacher suppose that there is 3 module in maths then there is 3 teacher for completing the module. teachers use the green board and chalk for teaching and for complex structure teacher use projectors. all classroom have their separate projectors all teachers are well qualified and come from iit or jadhavpur like prestigious universities this is an autonomous institute so all papers and syllabi are conducted by heritage itself there is no involvement of maulana abul kalam azad university of technology. semester papers are easy not so difficult

the campus of our college is extremely small in an area with almost very less places to hangout and next to no playground. besides this infrastructure of our college is well maintained with lifts in every building. there are plenty of activities and annual fest like youthopia. our college has a well-maintained library. there are also several technical and social clubs but not up to the mark.the fee structure for btech cse is 2.4 lpa there are several scholarships provided at the time of addmission based on the merit of jee/12th marks. you would also get a scholarship if you perform well in exams and several other awards are also there there is no fee hike throughout your btech. companies like adobe, fiserv gives internship opportunity to 3rd year students with stipend of 40k

[college infrastructure]: the college is established in 2016, therefore the college's infrastructure is pretty new and well maintained. all the classrooms and labs have proper facilities with a.c. and wifi connectivity. there are ground for almost every sport. the mess food is hygienic and eatable. | [academics]: the professors here are well educated and d supportive. the curriculum here is fully updated and includes all the recent developments in the fields. the study here makes you job ready. the quality of teaching is unique and fun. | [placements]: the placement are average. but better than other private colleges. the highest placement in cse branch last year is around 70 lakhs per annum. the average package is around 7 lakhs per annum. the top 10% students got around 24 lakhs per annum. | [campus life]: the college life here is amazing. almost every week there is some events or fests is there to engage students. there are many clubs in the college in which students can enroll in it and make friends and connections. the campus is safe as the security is on all the time. there is one pharmacy and some doctors are available on the campus.

we have our technical fest, instruo the second largest in west bengal and largest in kolkata our cultural fest rebeca, the four nights have plenty of unforgettable memories our drama fest anuranan,4 days, different production,home production and obviously theatre productions by famous theater groups and also inagurated by a really famous personality. our music fest oikotaan every department has its own fest like initium for mining, vaidyutak for electronics, udbhabani for civil.the gender ratio has increased after the 14 percente reservation for girls.we have workshops of web development, robotics, app development, etc etc.we have different cultural societies like robodarshan for robotics, les thespians for drama, uphony for music, reflexobeta for dance.
college_name: Indian Institute of Engineering Science and Technology - [IIEST] Shibpur

review_text: [college infrastructure]: nit hamirpur has a vast campus area of approximatly 350+acers. the campus can fulfill most of your necessity as it provides many shops and cafes. every year students have their own hostels axcept the fisrt year and second year girls which live in same hostel. | [academics]: i am an student of computer science and engeneering branch. first year students have their classes in lecture hall while all the other years have them mostly in their departments. and most of the departments have their own buildings. | [placements]: placements at nit hamirpur is quite good. students can easily beg packages of approximately 20 lakhs per annum. this year average for computer science students was approximately 17 lpa with an overall average of 12 lpa.

[college infrastructure]: the college is well equipped with infrastructure and equipment. the classrooms are digitalised and libraries are well equipped with web searching and laboratories have latest technologies and safety measures. wifi facilities is also widely available. | [academics]: msc chemistry is one of the integral courses for core sciences. a lot of emphasis is given to the research attribute of the course and curriculum. the curriculum is updated but is incompetent for the entrance exams. | [placements]: for the msc chemistry graduates there are no such placement offers as recruitment is through exams like gate. hence the only way to get a job is through clear these exams and then prepare well for the interviews. | [campus life]: the campus life is amazing , the cultural and technical fests provide a wide range of opportunities. the student teachers and staff are really encouraging and supportive for students welfare.

from the second semester's end, the students will be eligible for the placements by completing the semester with a good percentage and our senior of 750+ students got placed in their business roles in cognizant and different companies like asian paints, amazon india, vodafone, loreal, etc these are the some of the visits are visited during the placement season and high package of 78 lakhs to 1 cr can be possible if the student participates well in the interview or placement rounds. my plans after the degree are to get placed in one of the maang companiesdifferent people from different locations will onboard this campus. we can see different talents among people. and this university is too huge and there will be fests every 3 to 4 months organized by the students and it has a wide range of books and a central library for it. capacity in 2500 and the whole classroom are on another level with good interior and maintenance. there will different sports and games available here and everyone can register for those activities

pros/cons: svnit surat is standing on very vast land of around 250 acres. the most fascinating thing is svnit is situated in the porshe area of the city surat. generally a class comprises of around 60-70 students coming from different parts of india. talking about my class , we are the class of 65 student where there are 13 girls and rest are boys. so it is 1:4 gender ratio. our most of faculties are done with phd from iit and nit. some of them are from iisc also. they forward their conceptual knowledge very easily, they communicate to students very friendly and are very lenient. the only thing i found dislike about is our classroom structure. classroom are big with no sound system where some professors speak so slow that we are even not able to listen them. so this should be the point of consideration in svnit , first year students are not allowed to take part in any of the club due to ragging ands so on. on forward to second year , they can participate. so this is one point which is also good and bad. in svnit , there is less sports facilities in the campus. although students of svnit had won several medals in inter-nit meet. | placement experience: talking about the placements , svnit stands in front like other nits. recently convocation was held to honor the degrees. talking about my branch, various companies arrive and offer decent packages. these companies include reliance, aarti industries etc. various students prepare for gate and join psus like kribhco, ongc and more .. in previous year , chemical engineering branch holds the highest rate of placement in the institute of atound 85% in which highest package was around 14 lpa and average package being atound 9 lpa.
college_name: Sardar Vallabhbhai National Institute of Technology - [SVNIT], Surat

review_text: there are different fests organized in different months like summer fest in june july gra fest one of the name fest organized during sep oct winter fest in dec and competition and quizzes are too organized in different months. the college consists of 3 huge libraries consisting of all useful books regarding the course, in addition, it consists novels and other books amenities in the classroom is a good furnished cushioned seat with proper rooms and projectors and well-built labs to do study sports college consist of basketball ground football ground volleyball cricket table tennis chess pool table every game has it a suitable place to play and so the competition is organized. different groups are nss ncc.i chose btech cse with a specialization in aids because its sector has a huge scope in upcoming times and it provides info about every tech thing i am from icse i have command in coding from starting. the facility is good the ratio is 60:1. the facility is qualified and educated with better ideas for the education they make our learning process easy facility is always on time in class punctual and good in talking no harsh behavior. in each semester consists of two exams mid sem and ends sem each of 50 and 100 marks respectively each exam consists of practice before the theory exam and it's tough to pass because the question can be from anywhere all on logic.

[college infrastructure]: yes my college have all the necessary infrastructure,facilities and equipments. we have well equipped facilities in our classrooms there are projector in every classroom .there are laboratories with all the necessary equipment and they are well maintained. the college library have a good collection of books but it remains open only during the college working hours. we have the opportunity to play almost every game. every hostel have working wifi network. the living spaces are clean and food is h | [academics]: i am doing my b.tech in electrical engineering and currently am in 4th semester. the quantity of teaching is good all the teachers have done their graduation from reputed colleges and have a good teachiing experience. yes our curriculum is updated. yes what we study make us job ready to some extent. | [placements]: the quality of placement at my college is good. almost 25 to 40 percent students were placed last year. the average salary offered is around 6 lakh per annum. yes the placement process is easy and pleasant and college is supportive | [campus life]: campus life is wonderful . students can engage in almost any activities they want to. the college is located at a very peaceful area far away from the city crowd.

pros/cons: the atmosphere here in bengaluru is so pleasant and calm and campus is very green and calm which makes it very easy to concentrate and study as the campus strength is very low and the area is so large most of the campus will be of big trees and animals and everyone here will participate in atleast one extra circular activities the rankings this campus holds is unbeleivable and the study atmosphere is so good , so u will also adopt learning something new from the atmosphere in iisc the main thing i disliked is the mess allocation on the first time which i got north indian mess but i couldn't adjust there but after a month i got successfully changed to south indian mess as the b tech people are just a minority here and since the course started only in 2022 so some recognition will not be there apart from that there will be no problem | course curriculum overview: i choosen this course because of 2 factors i am instrested in computers and chemistry but i am good at maths also . in my josaa counselling i got iit kanpur ee which is based on only electrical engneering i am not that much instrested in it so taking math and computers , i thought taking maths and computing in one of the best campuses in india is much more better (air 1 jee advanced also took the same course) rankings : in prestigious qs world university rankings : in overall : india's second best iisc in reaseach : worlds best ,in csa : indias no 1 iisc's m tech csa programme has higher ranking than iit bombay csa faculty student ratio is higher than all iits faculty are the best in india (arguably) bcz its india's prestigious reaserch university in each semester there will be two semesters and in each semester we will have a mid exam , a final exam , and a quiz alternative perweek or sometimes once a week based on subject (grading tougher than iits )

[college infrastructure]: the infrastructure of this college is decent.the college is currently functioning in transit campus which is in middle of imphal city.the hostels are well furnished with wi-fi.labs and classroom are good enough with well- equipped equipment. | [academics]: teachers are very good here most of them are supportive in nature and also well qualified.and the curriculum of the college is according to the latest industrial norms and matches the iiits standards. | [placements]: our college provides good placement.almost all students got placed.this year the highest salary offered is 46 lpa,average is about 12 lpa and the lowest is 8 lpa.the top recruiting companies are amazon,jio,infosys,public sapient and many more.
college_name: Indian Institute of Information Technology Manipur

review_text: [college infrastructure]: chitkara university, with growing student numbers, faced maintenance issues in facilities. hostel rooms were a highlight. the campus had functional wi-fi but underutilized smart boards. hostel spaces were well-maintained, but mess food quality needed improvement, and toilet cleanliness was lacking. the academic experience was comprehensive, with smart boards depending on teacher proficiency. with refinements, campus can enhance its educational environment for a balanced growth and experiences. | [academics]: i pursued be in computer science engineering at chitkara university because of my passion for technology and the college's reputation as one of the best in punjab. the teaching quality was commendable, with knowledgeable and cooperative staff. the curriculum was regularly updated to align with industry standards ensuring we were job-ready. to enhance readiness, a focus on non-technical skills through individual and team projects, could further prepare students for the industry. | [placements]: the quality of placements at chitkara university was notable. a significant percentage of students were placed, with a range of job opportunities. the highest salary package offered was impressive, particularly in courses related to computer science and engineering. the average salary was competitive, contributing to a positive placement experience. the placement process was relatively smooth, and the college provided support throughout. | [campus life]: campus blends modern infrastructure with beautiful green spaces. students enjoy a variety of activities, from cultural events to sports. the diverse and enthusiastic student body, along with knowledgeable and friendly teachers, adds to the vibrant atmosphere. support staff, while generally helpful, could be more responsive. located in punjab, the campus offers convenience and a peaceful environment. safety is addressed with cctv surveillance.
college_name: Chitkara University Institute of Engineering and Technology Jhansla

review_text: [college infrastructure]: college infrastructure is nice with some beautiful trees and a lake. there is a dominos inside the campus and several awesome eating spots. you can enjoy eating at several places and can order pizza online at your hostels. | [academics]: academics is really good with theory classes and labs both given equal importance. project based assignments are given so that you should learn. there are several hackathons conducted by all the clubs. though the schedule of classes is hectic. sometimes starting in the morning till evening 7:00 but breaks are also given. | [placements]: placements in vit are good. even placements in every college depends on what you did or how much you worked hard and learned things . here in vit students learn a lot there is competitive environment. all the students who have worked will surely get very well placed in good companies. | [campus life]: campus life is a little hectic. the classes have a hectic schedule. there are several restrictions in the colleges like we have in schools but though if you got your friends nothing and no one can stop you from enjoying campus life

[college infrastructure]: yes,our college has all the necessary infrastructure,facilities and equipments..we are now in online mode classes.still we can see the facilities in many photos..workshop class is like overwhelming..all machines,the environment..i found it great..and there is swimmimg pool..there is facilities for internet in every hostel and free wi-fi in library..we have not got the chance to enjoy food till now..but as far as i have saw in college photos and videos living places are clean and hygenic. | [academics]: i am currently studying in food process engg. branch 1st yr..i am actually little fond of agricultural studies and processes in food technologies like how they are producing amazing food from simple crops etc. so i have interest in the branch i have chosen.quality of teaching is so good.teachers are helping and clear doubt anytime we ask.they also take test sometime and give us ample time to review our lessons.. | [placements]: i am in 1st yr of graduation..don't know much about placements and all.just from sources i have got to know that placement is really good at nit rourkela.in the year 2019-20 total 909 job offers were there.the avg ctc was 8.75 and max. ctc was 42..and only in b.tech there were 499 job offers..so i have a positive opinion about the process here. | [campus life]: i have not got the chance to go to college still..but online classes are going on..the teachers are good,helpful and supportive..they help us clear our academic doubts and all..there are menters for us to help in academics and other things..

you have to firstly give the entrance exam of amity university at their own campus and they give the result the same day . the admission process is very easy thats why anyone who has money gets admission easily . after that they interview the candidates and then they give the result the same evening . you have submit the semester fees then only you would get admission.our college celebrate various events . amity noida fests are famous all over in delhi - ncr . many bollywood celebrities usually come to promote their films in our college . sports and camping facilities are also very good . for the coding , if you are interested you would participate in various events .

the course curriculum is up-to-date, and in addition to the practical and the lab sessions, make the students enjoy their subjects. faculty members are well qualified and experienced. teaching quality is also very good, teachers are helping and providing us with proper knowledge. mid-semester examinations and end-semester examinations are moderately tough, which checks students on various aspects, and it comprises of questions from all over the syllabus.nsut has great infrastructure and facilities, including air-conditioned classrooms only for first year though, each department with respective well-equipped labs of each subject, and a library with a huge collection of books. annual cultural fest [moksha] is on the doors now (24th to 26th march) and every fresher is super excited. after 2019, the fest is being conducted.

review_text: pros/cons: the college is lush green there is zero pollution and the campus is very clean too, there are too many types of birds in our campus,due to clean nature there is no inconvenience for me as i am an lungs patient., the campus looks heavenly during rain. the campus has various eateries,canteen and restaurants like walking,moxie,dominos,senate hall canteen,cafe and various juice corners and there are many wending machines across the campus so the campus is filled with trees and food and both things. the campus has good seniors,they support juniors and there is zero ragging and there is mutual respect between seniors and juniors they support us and guide us through various things ,they arrange various workshops to teach us things. the one thing i didn't liked is that there's a network issue in the campus the jio and other networks are pathetic you can't even call inside the campus with this sims although there is wifi and lan facility but however this is the thing which cause the hostel facilities are quite old but manageable sometimes things don't work so we have to wait to make it repair and maintenance. the college is situated almost on the brink of city that's why the outside campus life is very dull,there is no film theater nearby the campus. | placement experience: 6th semester students are eligible for placements while off campus any student can apply anytime;the highest package went above 63 lpa while the average was 13 lpa ,the highest package is from ms. here various companies visits like google,ms,meesho and placement rate is above ninety for cse grads and above eighty for ece grads

review_text: there are tons of extracurricular event going on every week through out the year. just name the field you have interest in and there is a club organising an event for in that field. every semester has 3-4 lab works included in the course. they arent anything great, just typical labs you get at your college. there are quite a few number of tornaments that take place in college. there are inter hostel, inter branch, intra branch olympic fashioned sport weeks. the most commonly played games are cricket, football, basketball, table tennis, lawn tennis, chess and badminton. inter hostel video game competitions are also organised with rainbow seige, cs go, fifa, cod played most commonly.the course has been recently improved and is in quite with other nits though subjects like mechanical workshop, environmental science are not neccessary for computer science students in my opinion. we write the mid sem exam which is of 30 marks, end sem exam which is of 50 mark and 20 marks are given by evaluating attendance, minors, quizes and assigments. all the marks are added up and we are given a grade in accordance to total scores out of hundred
