well, this was the best course i could avail as per my jee rank. so i had no other option than to choose electrical engineering. here the faculty-to-student is pretty good and is as per the nirf guidelines. i must say that the faculty here are very qualified and educated. however, there can be improvements in the teaching methods and it can be more proficient. as of the 2022-23 curriculum for 1st year the exams were held every 1.5 months. first, it was mid-sem exams and then the end-sem exams. also, there are class tests which are held in like 2 per semester i.e. one before mid-semester and one after.the annual fest is moksha in march or april. tech fest is resonanz in october or november. the majority of the books which are related to courses are available in the library. the library is pretty huge, you will find here nearly every book u need during our 4-year tenure. classrooms are filled with automated air-conditioned systems and fans, smart boards, blackboards, and a projector are also available. society has around 37 societies/clubs which are related to different domains and interests. cricket, football, volleyball, basketball, and many other sports have well-equipped facilities.

there are numerous event held in our campus some of them are spectra ,one india etc where different types of cultural shows are held apart from that there are many sports event .last year it also host all india science congress meet ,which is one of the biggest event.feasible as compared to other universities and it provide scholarship also on the basis of marks secured in the entrance exam,it also provide scholarship on the basis of class 12 marks and jee mains and advance marks on the basis of different criteria.

pros/cons: the professors are highly educated and well versed with fields and have exciting opportunities for the students the placement and internship and opportunities are very good with a very good pay the campus culture in all types of technical fields like web development, competitive programming, product management, ai/ml is very good the hostels are a bit old so students might struggle to adjust the mess food is average and it is quite hard to survive on mess food alone the campus administration has a somewhat backward mindset like forcing compulsory attendance and not having enough attention on mental health of the students | placement experience: from 7th semester the students are eligible for placements. many companies like google, microsoft, quantbox, adobe, jp morgan come to our college and on an average hire 6-8 students per company. average packages were around 15 lpa. more than 80% of the students who applied got placed. i will pursue mba after my degree
college_name: IIT Roorkee - Indian Institute of Technology - [IITR], Roorkee

review_text: [college infrastructure]: campus is very small . hostel is not sufficient for all. food is not nice. sports facilities are also not available. lab facilities are also not proper. very less number of sports are available so not sufficient for all the games. | [academics]: i am studying computer science and engineering . as i am interested in that i have taken that stream. quality of teaching is average. curriculum is not updated and very old . so it does not make us ready for the job. | [placements]: the quality of the placements is average . it is good in computer science and engineering and very less in other branches . in computer science and engineering around 90% members get placed . highest salary is around 40lpa and average is around 8 lpa.

placement in here are the best. various companies come they take as many as they could. our university also got the limkha award for placing most student in last year. if go for internship that is also good they provide internship or various student organization provides internship. right now am in first year so am bot eligible. but many of my seniors are doing it and they earn much.when looking for other private colleges our college fees is little bit less and they also provide many kind of scholarship and everyone is eligible for getting that. according to the entrance exam mark you will be provided with scholarship. i have already got 30% of scholarship. my roommate got 40% and other one got 50% scholarship from the college itself.

the fee structure is basic and self-explanatory. many banks give loans to iit scholars during their stay at iit so that they can excel in their field without being a burden to their parents. there are great job opportunities once you pass out because many great companies visit us for interns.campus life is great. being a campus spread over 800 acres. you will find everything you need on campus. seniors are helpful and friendly. and a whole year is full of fests so you get an ample amount of time for social interactions.
college_name: IIT Jodhpur - Indian Institute of Technology - [IITJ]

review_text: [college infrastructure]: good infrastructure as compared to the other universities in india and one of the most prestigious university for the studies and the hostel facilities are also very good the buildings of hostel and the academic blocks they are made is also good | [academics]: the academy facilities at the gla university is also very good as computer to the other universities in india and also they have made a very good environment for the studies to give better environment | [placements]: the placements in gla university is good as they have cleaved that about 86% of the students has been placed last year in ibm department in a very good companies which have visited the university during the time of placement | [campus life]: good

[college infrastructure]: college infrastructure is too good as it having good facilities , equipment and many more our campus having all amenities available , hostel in campus facilities are also available all living spaces neat and clean with food hygenic. | [academics]: i had done the bba hons from here as the quality of placement is really too good our faculties are too much helpful in development of different skills and makes our skills developed which makes us job ready. | [placements]: placement quality of my college is really good as almost each students are placed moreover the highest salary package offered is 10lpa and average salary package offered is 4-5 lpa and our college is too much supportive. | [campus life]: college life is really too good as its really memorable and enjoyable . | [anything else]: overall a highly satisfied from college .

[college infrastructure]: college infrastructure is very good ..it has all the facilities that are required to a student... a big library is also their with heaters , air conditioners and with good availability of free internet ... | [academics]: i am doing btech in material science branch .. i am in first year so i don't know much about my department faculty because in 1 year all students have same subject so teachers are same.. but i listen from my senior that this branch is new and facilities also not have much experience... so they are not good enough... and their study is also not placement oriented.. so student have to work himself for placement.. | [placements]: the quality of placement in this college is good ... the placement percentage is 84.60% that is good ...and highest placement percentage is of computer science branch....and average placement percentage is different for each branch ... placement process is easy for cs , ece etc students but for lower branches it is not that easy their subject are different from the skills required for placement....

[college infrastructure]: the college's commitment to maintain and upgrades reflects a dedication to providing a top educational experience, making it a favourable choice for students seeking a well-rounded academic environment. additionally, sports facilities cater to diverse intrests, enhancing overall student development. campus is well maintained as well as well equiped classrooms with advanced laboratories, and extensive libraries overall creating the best learning environment. | [academics]: pursuing b.tech in computer science, immersing in coding, algorithms, and cutting edge technology. passionating me about to shaping the future through innovation and problem solving. overall exprience is good. faculties are great and cooperative, they helps us in dealing what so ever problem i faced during studies. | [placements]: as much as i know placement in this college is average, because of the less visiting of the companies. and their packages are also less on an average 7-10 lpa. number of recruitment is not so good. internship facilities are also less. | [campus life]: vibrant college campus life with diverse activities- academic events, cultural fests, and sports. a dynamic community fostering friendships and holistic growth. thelively atmosphere encourages creativity, collaboration, and lifelong memories. college location is good and yes security of this college is best in any emergencies they easily handle the problem.

students of electronics & computer are allowed to sit for cse&it companies as well as electronics core comapnies(ex-texas instruments). the faculty here are all ph.d. holders. each semester has 2 mid sems(cat) and 1 final assessment for theory and for labs 60% weightage on an internal quiz, lab notebook, experiment performance and the rest 40% is final lab assessment.for 2022 batch highest ctc offered is 75 lakhs by dyte to 2, 51 lakhs by mtx to 1, 48.5 lakhs by adobe, 45 lakhs by microsoft to 21, 35 lakhs+ ctc was offered by appdynamics, codenation, de shaw to 3 students,udaan to 3 students,work india to 8 students,30 lakhs+ ctc was offered by amazon to 13,paypal to 13 students, swiggy, zynga. the average ctc is around 8.19 lakhs.

[college infrastructure]: college infrastructure is decent. wifi is available, but not everyone can access it. it has a big central library for students. campus is beautiful,full of trees. food of the canteen is not so good to me. but pretty much all necessary facilities are available. | [academics]: there is no question about the academics. academic wise it is one of the best colleges in india. teachers, professors all are very helpful. you will get help whenever you need. the professors of my b.arch department are excellent. | [placements]: once you get admission in this college, you don't need to worry about the placements. almost everyone gets placement. the average package is 9-10 lpa. the placement cell of the college is also very supportive ana will help as much as they can. | [campus life]: campus life is ok. sometimes you can face a little bit of ragging. not much though.

[college infrastructure]: good buildings with electricity supply tech park is the hub for cs students and the building has 4 lifts tech park 2 is the better version of tech park 1 and has very nice labs with appropriate equipment like up to date computers | [academics]: teachers dont know what theyre teaching and for some reason have a bias against north indian students. examinations are easy but you need to study a lot to get good internals. end sem exams are easy tho | [placements]: you pay to get a job. you wont ever recover financially if you go for placements from this college. this college will lead you to financial ruin. youll go broke after a week of buying a4 sheets and printouts for projects | [campus life]: potheri and trs will be your go to spots for certain reasons that youll find out soon enough. the campus life is plenty good since the crowd is nice. however the south indian crowd is something you should stay away from. | [anything else]: no
college_name: SRM Institute of Science and Technology Chennai

review_text: the course of it at heritage institute of technology has a really good curriculum and is valuable for the future. the college has really good faculties who encourage you and are extremely knowledgeable. the faculty: student ratio of the course is also good approx(1:30).the fest is one of the best college fests in kolkata. the library is big enough and is well maintained with varieties of books. the classrooms are big enough and the labs have all basic amenities. the college has its own football/cricket grounds and basketball court.

[college infrastructure]: each class is equiped with central ac. and each room have projectors used as smart boards. all the places in an out of the campus are hygienic with greenery. labs are also equipped with all facilities. | [academics]: i'm student b-tech 1st year in civil department i'm interested in construction side,moreover my jee rank also not a good one so i choosed civil engineering. here the ciricullum is very fine which was made by iim kolkata. of course we can get placed if you give your 100% effort. | [placements]: the placement cell looks fine. nearly 80-85% were placed, generally cse students got high package. according to me the placement process may be an easier one. but our college give their maximum support for it. | [campus life]: overall campus life gonna be an excellent one, you can explore many new things in your life. the location is little bit hard to reach but it can handle emergencies

[college infrastructure]: the collage infrastructure is outstanding and exceeds one's expectations as it has very very well maintained laboratories and classrooms with updated equipments for students to utilise and succeed. the hostels also are very clean and well built with good internet speed at all times. the food is also very hygienic and tastes amazing. all in all the college has an excellent infrastructure. | [academics]: i am currently pursuing my btech degree in computer science and engineering and the quality of teaching here is excellent. the professors/teachers here are extremely helpful and are also very well experienced in their respective subjects. the curriculum here is also updated and meets the day to day demands required in the field of computer science and engineering | [placements]: of what i have heard from the seniors here, the placements here are excellent in all the courses offered by the institute and particularly for the computer science and engineering department. the highest salary offered here has been in excess of 50 lpa and the average package for the cse department is amazing and stands at around 8 to 9 lpa. all in all, the packages and placements in srmist ktr are excellent. | [campus life]: campus life at srm institute of science and technology is just amazing. the campus is always vibrant and dazzling with students. from cricket to football, from dancing to singing, there is a hype around everything with necessary equipments available for all. the gym is also very nice. library is also amazing. also some amazing eateries are present around the campus which serve some tasty food and hence the campus provides for an excellent entertainment arena.
college_name: SRM Institute of Science and Technology Chennai

review_text: [college infrastructure]: the college is just modern-like with a beautiful layout. the classes are equipped with air conditioners and the building is functional with a centralised air conditioned system. the wi-fi facility is available throughout the campus. the library has a remarkable collection with a well-defined structure. there are large playgrounds and the sports facilities are duly available. there are many eateries to go to, and the food is hygienic and affordable. the smart boards are also installed in classes. | [academics]: i am pursuing mechanical engineering due to my love for machines. the curriculum needs some updations, but ut definitely makes the students job ready. the teachers are highly experienced and qualified. the internal processes are smooth and there's more emphasis placed on research and practicality of the subjects, unlike some other colleges where rote learning is encouraged. | [placements]: the recruitment drive is held in the college. the placements are sound with the average package being around 12 to 13 lacs p/a, which is a humongous amount and worthy enough to give a kick start to a career. there is a placement cell which is responsible for inviting big players of the market like google, facebook, microsoft etc. hence, the college is supportive in this respect. but, the placements should be more course friendly,as some courses' students don't have companies with their profiles. | [campus life]: the college has a beautiful campus. there are spacious lawns and clean work spaces. the location of the college is a bit depressing as it is isolated from the main part of city, but one would not feel any limitations inside the college. the support staff is cooperative and the teachers are the best mentors. there is a medical room to handle the emergencies. there are various societies in the college, like the dance society is pretty amazing, for the students to engage in. sports is also good.
college_name: Birla Institute of Technology and Science Pilani

review_text: [college infrastructure]: very good infrastructure.everything is very good.the entire college has wifi labs with modern equipment a and 24?7 library,huge classroom and playground hostel and bus facility also available here.cantine | [academics]: teachers here are very supportive and skilled.their teaching style is also unique.the course curriculum is good and they trained student at unique level.from time to time industrial visit and webinar are organised | [placements]: approximately 75-80% students get placed from this collage. the highest sallary package offered 40 lpa, average 3.5-6 lpa.top companies like microsoft and google also visit here.almost 80-85% students golet internship
college_name: Institute of Engineering and Management Kolkata

review_text: the social life is very good in college it does organize superb fests like engifest, yuvaan fest, e summit, and many more technical and other fests, and its a lot of fun, and most of the fests are conducted in february itself. the library is a plus point for dtu because the books suggested for us in the course are available in the library but students generally issue the books at the beginning so you need to issue them at the beginning of the sem. different kinds of the classrooms are there (sps pragya bhawan and departments classrooms) but all have ac and are properly ventilated with good lighting conditions and enough space for students to sit. the sports ground is too good it has an indoor badminton court tt court even pool tables and has a football ground cricket pitch basketball court lawn tennis court outdoor badminton court volleyball ground kabaddi dedicated ground and arenas are organized every year.the fees of dtu keep hiking every year but in my case, for the first year it was 2,06,000 and for the second year i paid 2,19,000 and i am availing a student education loan from the sbi bank which is inside the dtu campus only at a 7.65% interest rate and you have to start paying the loan amount only after 5 years no need to pay anything now. this year the fees had a hike of around 10k for a year in first-year fees. apart from the fees i have rented a flat nearby dtu as my home is quite far and i dint get a hostel so my monthly expenses apart from studies are 15k including rent electricity water all time meals and some miscellaneous expenses which total around 1.8 lakhs a year. so my total expenses are approx. 4 lakhs per year. it is quite high compared to many other courses and all but also low if compared to iiitd or bits pilani where per year fees are 4lakhs+.

[college infrastructure]: iit boasts world-class infrastructure with modern labs, digital classrooms, libraries, hostels, sports facilities, and a green eco-friendly campus that fosters learning and growth.cafeterias and mess facilities provide hygienic food options, catering to students from diverse backgrounds | [academics]: iit offers rigorous academics with expert faculty, cutting-edge curriculum, strong research opportunities, and a focus on innovation that prepares students for global excellence. the flexible curriculum allows students to choose electives across departments, promoting a culture of innovation and entrepreneurship. | [placements]: iit placements are highly rewarding, with top recruiters, global opportunities, excellent packages, and strong industry connections that ensure a bright future for students.placements at iit are among the most sought-after in the country, known for opening doors to prestigious careers both in india and abroad. | [campus life]: iit campus life is vibrant and diverse, filled with cultural fests, clubs, sports, and innovation hubs that create a perfect balance between academics and personal growth | [anything else]: no

pros/cons: the clubs culture is good and the fests are reaaly good the coding clubs and fests are good and teacher very supportive the college infrastructure is very good and hostel mess food was very good college is outside the city and not easily to get things the gender ratio is very poot 1 girl to 15 boys the college has no placement ratio is not much high as expected | placement experience: third year college students are eligible for placements and intership and campus placement is good and amazon , google such big companies are visited the highest pacakage is 43 lpa and median is about 9 lpa and placement percentage is 70 and i got placement in such big companies
college_name: Indian Institute of Information Technology - [IIIT], Una

review_text: [college infrastructure]: graphic era owns a modern well-equipped infrastructure in dehradun. classrooms are engaged with projectors and speakers for engaging lectures. sports facilities are abundant with courts for cricket , badminton and many more. | [academics]: graphic era university offers a comprehensive range of programs across various disciplines including engineering, management, humanities and sciences. curriculam focuses on combining theorotical knowledge with practicle knowledge. | [placements]: grapich era has a strong placement record . major recruiters are some industry leading companies such as google, adobe , amazon , tcs, flipkart and many more . designated career service team is their to overlook all the queries related to placements.

[college infrastructure]: the infrastructure of galgotias university is quite good and the campus life is gud . you will get all kinds of facilities there like well furnished classrooms , libraries , laboratories where all the equipment are well maintained. hostels are there but only for boys and ofcourse they will provide well furnished rooms and hygienic food . wifi is also there in the hostel and in the university too. | [academics]: i am persuing bachelor of technology in computer science and engineering . the quality of teaching is good and you will get all kinds of opportunity which will help you to grow individually in your field and ofcourse you will surely get job after completing this particular course. | [placements]: the placement is okay . almost 90 percent students got placed every year . the highest package ever gone is 44 lakh on campus and 1.5 crore but it's off campus . the average salary offered is 4 lakhs per annum . obviously the placement process is not going to be that easy but that totally depends on your potential and the university is always going to support you . | [campus life]: college campus is good. the university always organised events so time to time the university always provides opportunities to the students . the teachers are well qualified and supportive. talking about its location it is situated on yamuna expressway highway . this university is situated at the outer area like it's its not in main city noida . so sometimes it's not safe for students at night . but yes you easily get public transport there.

[college infrastructure]: college has many necessary infrastructure with many facilities and equipments related to the course, classroom, libraries all are well maintained, all the spaces are clean and hygienic. the classroom has smart boards. | [academics]: i pursued b.tech here, had the good experience, all the teachers are very helpful and they ensure if the students are understanding all the things are not and also help the students in case of any misunderstanding. | [placements]: talking about placement facility, it is ok not as expected, the college doesn't provided any placement facility at that time and in present i'm not sure about the placement facility (if they are providing or not).

[college infrastructure]: yes it has all the facilities the infrastructure is very good the atmosphere of the campus is very healthy the the labs are full of equipments,. campus is fully wifi there are libraries spots complex food coarts etc | [academics]: i am currently persuing btech in biotechnology and i must say the quality of education is vey good it is well known that biotechnology is still in developing stage in india ,so the courses being tough are very helpful | [placements]: the placement rates are very high , the cse and mba departments are the most highly paid departments there on campus placement rates are 90% but in other departments also placements are high talking about biotechnology placement are low | [campus life]: campus is very good and clean

[college infrastructure]: the college infrastructure is good and excellent it provide a scenic view and roi of this college in terms of placement is average as about 55% stydents are placed through on campus placement but has a good geographical location | [academics]: most of the teachers do not come on time and students need to do mostly self study for achieving their goal the faculties are mostly graduated from the private and state university and did not have proper command in their respective subjects | [placements]: the placement in this university is not extraordinary but similar to various private university but it stand far better than most of the state goverment college and most of the lower 3 nit's it's as plcement cell is increasing on the regular basis | [campus life]: the students are provided to paticipate in various activities other than studing which helps them for the overall development iincluding skill development and the interpersonal development of the student | [anything else]: this college is good if you work hard and develop the skills

[college infrastructure]: facilities and infrastructure are excellent. all classrooms are wi-fi enabled, and projectors are available. the mess quality is good in our university hostel, which is average for our university but they can make better. | [academics]: the academics of our college is good .our faculty members are cooperative. the course curriculum is easy. semester exams are purely from notes with minimal study, and we can score good marks. overall good academics. | [placements]: in our college, almost 94% of students were placed in cse. the highest salary package offered was 18 lpa and the average salary package offered was 4 lpa - 5 lpa in cse. top recruiting companies like adode, hcl, tcs, wipro, hp, and many more visited our campus. almost 90% of students got internships from wipro and tcs. top roles offered were developer, software engineer, and many more. | [campus life]: campus life of my college was memorable. everything needed for placements is taught at the university. semester exams are easy in our college and the pass percentage is 80-90%. i really missed my college days . | [anything else]: you can consider it for your further studies.

gender ratio girl/boy = 1/8 .i.e, there are 14% girls present in college. this 14% is said to be taken upto 20% in a succession of 8 years i.e. till 2026. apart from academics, this college also works on overall development of students. there are many clubs present in college, where one can nurishes his/her talent simultaneous with academics. a huge platform is available for student in sports. the college faculty work very hard to bring the college beyond its potential limits.one has to clear jee mains exam first and must have to come in the cut-off range. after this, he/she has to appear for jee advanced exam. (yhe syllabus of jee mains and advanced ecam papers is the course of 11yh and 12th class)the cut-off marks for jee advanced paper is announced after 3-4 weeks. and on yhe basis of this a rank list is made by athourities. then 7 round cunselling is held for college selection. and admission process begins.
college_name: ISM Dhanbad - Indian Institute of Technology - [IITISM]

review_text: [college infrastructure]: decent infrastructure and more development is going on. well equipped normal classrooms and high tech rooms for lectures and special sessions. when it comes to tribology , nit srinagar has one of the best labs in country and a central research facility dedicated to research in tribology and materials technology. | [academics]: teachers teach very well , highly qualified faculties are there and have lots of experience in teaching and research, providing good guidance to students whenever they are in need. quality of teaching is good. | [placements]: when it comes to mtech , placements are not upto that mark when we compare to btech. majority of students prefer to go for higher studies in india or abroad. improvement is required. the placement cell is very well managed and always looking for great opportunities for students. | [campus life]: the campus is situated near the banks of legendary dal lake of srinagar and walking distance from hazratbal shrine and kashmir university. good markets are nearby for shopping and good restaurants. one of the most beautiful ambiance in all of india. the lake, western himalayan mountains, chinaar tress and yes ..snowfall !

the main fest of our college is corona and melange which is held in between january and february every year in this fest about 100 event happen in which some of them are technical and some are non technical in the fest all of enjoyed so much and in the fest some big celebrity came on band night or edm night and in the fest time college looks like a fairy place and workshop is also held like after 15 days there is a workshop in our college.extracurricular activities is compulsory course in every semester for the personal development of the students. sports is also happen from college level to national level institutes wise. gender ratio is not good at this college it is about 100:12 means for 100 boys there is only 12 girls is present but now a days it will improve. so many cultural society is present in the college like dance club,drama club,music club and etc

makkar night and paramb and many more events are conducted. the availability of books is good in our college we have 3-4libary to study. yes, there are many sports activities in college with good couches all sports are played at our university. galgotiastudentconcil is the group and so many clubs like gu dance gu sob gu singing and many more clubs are available for students and this club is run by students.i think form 6 sem student becomes eligible for campus placements. companies like air asia, banks, and all types of companies come. the highest package was 1cr+ and the average package is 2-3 laks per annum. percentage of students getting placement is 60%. after i get the degree i go for mba.

[college infrastructure]: the institute offers decent infrastructure. the old buildings need some makeover but the more recent structures like the library, new gallery, and cs labs are in excellent condition. the labs are also quite excellent with a myriad of equipment. the hostels are also decent, they have good lighting and ventilation, and there are water filters on every other floor. the washrooms could be better though. | [academics]: i am pursuing my bachelor's degree in electronics and instrumentation as it offers to teach me something which has fascinated me since 8th grade. the teachers of the eie department have excellent qualifications and plenty of teaching experience. they are also open to receiving your personal doubts via e-mails. the curriculum contains a lot of things that i feel are not related to the end goal in the first year, but all in all, it is fairly recent with the latest update in 2018. | [placements]: the placements are absolutely top-notch here. 90% of the students found campus placements. the highest package was 80 lpa and was offered to a cse grad. the college average ctc stands at 14.39 lpa and the median at 12.61 lpa. the t&p cell takes great care of the entire procedure and is ready to support you at any time. | [campus life]: one of the best aspects of this college is its campus life. with its huge area of 625 acres and more than 20 lakes, you will get your fair share of nature here. also, there are multiple events going on inside the campus held by different societies and clubs of the college most of the time, you will hardly ever feel bored. the campus is completely covered with street lights, and the backup generator starts working about 30 seconds into the power cuts, so the campus is always well-lit at night.

i don't get internships till now but they provide internships/ paid internships many seniors told me that their placement cell is very good above 90% of students of cse get placed over a package of 500000. college also gives marks for your project in the internal assessment.fees for any b.tech course is 159000, which also includes 2000 registration fees and 10000 examination fees. colleges provide scholarships to home-state students if he/she scored more than 93% on boards and if they have a good rank in jee then they also give scholarships.

[college infrastructure]: beautiful campus with really nicely build spacious buildings. hostels have gyms, laundry rooms, parlours, badminton courts, canteens ,etc. classrooms are air conditioned. sports facilities are also very much available for almost all sports. | [academics]: curriculum is a little outdated, but that goes for almost all iits, good part is you can opt for minors in any dept. however , some professors are extremely difficult to work with and strict. research work is good too however not that high. | [placements]: good and smooth experience.95 percents students get placed. highest package was around 1.2 cr and went to cse. average was around 12 lpa for non circuital branches. and for circuital around 15-17 lpa . | [campus life]: the culture is just wow. the students make the campus. had the best time here , late night hangouts, chat sessions,chapo sessions, library time, movie nights.

[college infrastructure]: it has a nice infrastructure which is spacious and hygienic campus with a lot of greenery around . offers wi-fi and other digital feasibility . they have well maintained labs , libraries and sports grounds . | [academics]: as far as studies concerned , they have an updated curriculum which is covered by well experienced and guiding teachers . teachers are co-operative and prepare individual properly for their corporate life ahead. | [placements]: the college offers some good placements at esteemed top multi national companies and consulting mnc companies .most of the students get placed through college placement and others also gets nice exposure in the job field.
college_name: SRM Institute of Science and Technology Chennai

review_text: the social life at jadavpur university is the best part of the university. there's almost at least one fest every month. like u-turn, ibtida, sanskriti which is the biggest cultural festival of ju which last for 9 days for the fet( faculty of engineering and technology) books and journals are abundant with lots of copies both in hard and soft copy. there are also a lot of sporting events and clubs that are interesting as they're very active and vigorous.the placements in ju are very good. it happens throughout the whole year and you can sit for it if you have the required skills or experience. and if you didn't get placed on-campus you can always opt for off-campus and prepare yourself for further education which is also a very good option. students can sit from the 6th semester for the pre-placements. and the percentage of students getting placed is like 95/100.

[college infrastructure]: i have thoroughly explored the college and have seen the facilities and equipment available for the students. the wifi is available throughout the campus using a student id and password. the food is tolerable. | [academics]: i have taken cse(core). academics are taken care by teachers who have much knowledge of the subject they are teaching. students may find it hard to follow at times, due to some of the teacher's pace or way of speaking. resources are uploaded timely by the teachers on google classroom. | [placements]: being a fresher i can't comment much on this, but from what i have heard and seen where some of the graduates have been placed, there are loads of companies visiting here for offering placements. not really sure about the percentage of students placed.
college_name: SRM Institute of Science and Technology Chennai

review_text: [college infrastructure]: the infrastructure here is excellent. the new science labs are equipped with advanced technology, making experiments both fun and educational. the campus is also very green, with plenty of outdoor spaces to study or relax. the dining halls offer a good variety of food | [academics]: the academic experience at my college is rigorous and challenging. the professors are knowledgeable and supportive, fostering a collaborative learning environment. the workload can be intense, but the diverse curriculum and academic resources available make it manageable and rewarding. | [placements]: the college placement process was a seamless experience. the placement cell's commitment to student success is evident in their thorough preparation programs. i landed a role at a top tech company and couldn't be more grateful for their support | [campus life]: the proximity to the city offers the best of both worlds. you get the lively campus vibe with easy access to urban amenities, internships, and cultural experiences
college_name: Institute of Engineering and Management Kolkata

review_text: [college infrastructure]: college infrastructure: 4.5/5 kiit university, bhubaneswar, boasts a modern and well-maintained infrastructure. the campus is equipped with state-of-the-art facilities, including smart classrooms, fully-stocked libraries, and high-tech labs. hostels are spacious, well-furnished, and provide a comfortable environment for students. the lush green campus offers a clean and serene atmosphere, perfect for academic and personal growth. recreational spaces like sports complexes, gyms, and cafeterias enhance the overall campus experience. with excellent wi-fi connectivity and 24/7 medical facilities, kiit ensures a seamless student life. the university consistently upgrades its infrastructure to meet global standards, making it one of the top private institutions in india. | [academics]: academics: 3.5/5 kiit university provides a robust academic structure with a diverse range of courses and experienced faculty members. the curriculum is designed to be industry-oriented, ensuring students are job-ready upon graduation. regular seminars, workshops, and guest lectures by industry professionals enhance learning. the university adopts innovative teaching methods, blending theoretical knowledge with practical applications. it offers ample research opportunities and encourages participation in national and international conferences. with a strong focus on student development, kiit ensures that academic rigor is complemented by skill-building initiatives. continuous evaluation and mentoring systems further contribute to the holistic academic growth of students. | [placements]: placement: 4/5 kiit university has an excellent placement record, with top companies like microsoft, accenture, cognizant, and deloitte recruiting students annually. the university boasts a dedicated placement cell that ensures students are well-prepared through training programs, mock interviews, and aptitude tests. high-paying roles in it, core engineering, management, and other domains are consistently offered. many students secure multiple offers, with packages ranging from decent to impressive. kiit?s strong industry tie-ups and alumni network further enhance placement opportunities. the university's commitment to bridging the gap between academia and industry ensures a high success rate in career placements. | [campus life]: campus life: 4.6/5 kiit university offers a vibrant campus life, fostering a perfect balance between academics and extracurricular activities. the sprawling green campus is lively with cultural fests, sports tournaments, and various student-run clubs for music, dance, drama, and technology. events like kiit fest and kritansh bring students together, encouraging creativity and collaboration. the hostels are comfortable, with friendly and diverse peers adding to the enriching experience. facilities like gyms, sports complexes, and cafes ensure students have avenues for relaxation and recreation. the inclusive and dynamic environment ensures every student feels at home while building lasting friendships and memories.
college_name: Kalinga Institute of Industrial Technology Bhubaneswar

review_text: [college infrastructure]: college infrastructure have all the facilities necessary provided for the students. the college has well equipped building and greener environment. the overall campus is situated in nice place which gives a overwhelming experience. | [academics]: i am pursuing engineering in cse department. the quality of teaching here is awesome. faculties have great subject knowledge and experience in their respectively fields. curriculum provided to us is updated. | [placements]: the quality of placements at our college is up to the mark. the 100 percentage of students were placed the highest salary package offered was 28 lakhs per annum and placement department is very supportive.

[college infrastructure]: lovely infrastructure with adequate facilities academically as well as other curriculum activities. good facilities in term of libraries hostels sports center and good living spaces and food hygienic. | [academics]: the curriculum has the diverse range and it?s updated with recent developments, it has more details and information from thoughts to practical knowledge of remote sensing and the curriculum makes you job ready in academics and well as higher studies. | [placements]: there is special classes for placement, and average placement in our field but if opting for computer sciences the packages are good. industrial visit and separate classes for placement to enrich students in placement drives.

[college infrastructure]: the college is very vast and have a numerable number of courses. they also conduct various sports activities such as cricket, football, volleyball, tennis,etc. the college has ac classrooms and well maintained laboratories,libraries. | [academics]: teachers are very helpful and are a great mentors for students. faculty members have completed their degrees from colleges like nits and iits. the semester exam are not that difficult which helps the students to pace up with their courses. | [placements]: the highest package offered is 64 lpa and the average package is 6.5 lpa. over three hundred and fifty recruiters participate and offer upto 4000 different jobs to btech bachelors. the top recruiting companies are tata power, accenture, tcs, nippon steel and many more. | [campus life]: it has a two sharing ac hostel with power back up,parking facility, and a canteen. tv is also provided for entertainment. there are different clubs like nukkad club, dance club ,etc
college_name: Kalinga Institute of Industrial Technology Bhubaneswar

review_text: [college infrastructure]: yes , my college has all the necessary infrastructure, facilities and equipments . the facilities that are provided by the department for laboratories are good and updated computer systems and for the classroom there is projector and white board with smart t.v etc and there is wifi facility in the whole department. | [academics]: i am studying b.tech there, faculties are very good and supportive .they have excellent teaching skills . they keep updating students about the latest technologies and topics. teachers prepare student for the real world jobs by teaching them through presentations. | [placements]: the quality of placements of the department is not very good because of few reasons. the number of private companies is good in lucknow comparison to the other metro cities. but it is supportive for the placement of the students. | [campus life]: the college campus is large in area , campus has library , sports ground , hostel facilities , medical facilities , children's park , asia's largest lecture hall (vltc) etc. especially it is close to the shopping centre wtp , gt etc
college_name: Malaviya National Institute of Technology Jaipur

[college infrastructure]: the college has an alluring infrastructure with the needed facilities in the hostels and sport centres, sufficient equipments in the laboratories of the departments, and libraries are always clean and has enouogh books to read in the college life. | [academics]: the academics is strong and competitive here and this is learning process makes the student overcome the problems himself. this makes the students self sufficient and the personality that they grow in themselves makes them ready to tackle the battles in their life. | [placements]: the placements are really amazing with the highest placement offered as 43 lacs, with a lot of new companies and outstanding packages this year. this year, the average package has been increased by approximately half the last year. except the ones who did not sit for placements, almost all of the rest students are placed with good packages. | [campus life]: the college has a lot of clubs focusing on chemical innovations, coding, racing, dance and music, charity, entrepreneurship cell, etc. this helps in overall development of the students. the teachers are not different than any other college of the same level, but they support the students in the research and other parts of the academics.

[college infrastructure]: our college have all the necessary infrastructure and equipment infact there are more than the things we require. our college is one of kind. it have smart classrooms, laboratories are also well equipped. sports centers are also available. overall no missing link is there. | [academics]: i am studying b.arch from nit, quality of teaching is great, teachers are very good at what they do and are also well qualified. yes the curriculum i also updated and includes various recent developments but not all as per my knowledge is concerned. | [placements]: placements are quite average in our field, but still their are students who are also very good t what they study and get decent amount of package from the campus, highest package offered in my knowledge is 12 lacs per year. and of all the students who got placed average package would be 5 lacs. | [campus life]: campus life is awesome, as it is a huge campus, and lot of it is green, which in itself creates a very good atmosphere around the students, teachers and support staff is very helpful as most of them are well educated but you know exceptions are everywhere.

many fests happen in college every year two big fests are cultural fest and technical fest. these are the main fests of college other than ganesh puja, saraswati puja, and many more celebrated in the college. overall every month u will get fests. a central library is there in the campus which is one of india's biggest libraries. sports activities are avg on campus. it depends on u if u are interested then everything is there for u.nit warangal is one of the top colleges in india and comes in tier 1 college. getting a sit-in at this college is the dream of millions. there's a ratio of 1:20 between faculty and students. all faculties are the best faculty in india. nit warangal is the most strict college in all iits and nits getting a good grade is difficult and this is the best thing. companies always say about the talent produced in this college.

[college infrastructure]: the college infrastructure is really good. people with interest can easily learn new skills, get into new projects and get well versed in various tech skills. it is really a great place to start or boost ones knowledge. the infrastructure the college provides meets the international standards. | [academics]: i am a fina year student doing b tech, computer science engineering with specialization in ai and ml. the quality of teaching is very good and faculties are very helpful and knowledgeable. they are very supportive. | [placements]: placements in the year 2025 were a bit less due to the recession period going on but as such placements are very good. if one maintains a good cgpa then that person can land into their dream company and with a very good salary.
college_name: Vellore Institute of Technology Chennai Campus

review_text: my jee rank was not so good that can provide nit atleast then by seeing ranking in wbjee college list, i found an autonomous college with good reputation about placement, attendance ratio and there is no special uniform for collegeyou all will enjoy the campus life, branch wise events will be held, in every 1 or 2 month atleast one event will be there. here are many club in college bt rotract is most active club of our college,

[college infrastructure]: dtu has a well planned infrastructure with proper modern technology filled labs and classrooms , stable wi-fi , spacious study areas. the campus provides a comfortable and efficient learning environment with proper timetable and routine. | [academics]: dtu offers a structured and proper academics with knowledgeable faculty and updated course content . the teaching approach is balanced , and resources like labs and libraries support effective learning. it's supports and look after every student. | [placements]: placement oopportunities are growing , with decent packages in core branches and high packages in tech branches with good industry exposure and connections. training sessions and skill - based workshops help students prepare well. | [campus life]: campus life is lively with events , ckubs , and activities that keep students engaged . the environment is friendly and the campus feels active and enjoyable. other than this other activities including sports gives the students a chance to enhance their skills.

gravitas is the technical fest held on the campus. here, there are many workshops, events, etc. that make children well equipped with knowledge related to technical things. it provides a lot of exposure to students and encourages students to have healthy interactions with their juniors and seniors and share brilliant ideas. also, riviera is a great cultural event celebrated with zeal and zest. various artists that include great singers and comedians make the event a memorable one.the placement opportunities are nice. the average package last year was 6.05 lakhs which is quite decent. here, we have super dream packages which are above 10 lakhs per annum, dream packages which are above 5.5 lakhs per annum, and regular packages which are around 3-4 lakhs per annum. there has been a considerable rise each year of students getting super dream package. the college also provides good internships.

[college infrastructure]: we have excellent college amenities .very well developed and spacious infrastructure .classrooms are wide enough to accommodate large number of students and well designed labs for each department with all the required equipments required for making of any projects or research activities. we have vast sports area dedicated to all the sports. hostels are well maintained and hygienic. food is served by two different caters where they provide veg ,non-veg and special meals. | [academics]: i am pursuing b.tech in ece as i have passion in electronics field. the quality of teaching is good ,all teachers have done doctorate degree in their field of specialization. yes we have a updated curriculum with al the recent developments included in it. what we study is to gain knowledge in our field of passion ,but we need to have hands on experience to be job ready. we have to keep implementing what we study into some useful projects which serves the needs of the world. | [placements]: a college is always judged on the basis of the placements ,that every student secures a job. i am yet to get graduated but we have all elite companies coming for placements .a good range of packages are offered by the companies and it is mostly bagged by the cse students .on the other hand ,other branches also have a decent average package offered. i have heard good reviews from my seniors. but the new normal ,virtual placements is a new experience for everyone. chennai is a hub for automobiles. | [campus life]: overall i guess i had stayed there for about 7 months and then we had lockdown. my experience in the time i spent there was splendid. i had great fun with my friends .we have long walking paths filled with greenery ,where we can spend some time calmly. many clubs are present where students can enroll themselves if interested. we had marvelous fests like technovit and vibrance .many events keep happening to keep ourselves engaged. even during online teaching many activities were conducted .
college_name: Vellore Institute of Technology Chennai Campus

review_text: [college infrastructure]: infrastructure is average of srm institute of science and technology, delhi-ncr campus, ghaziabad. there is greenery all around the campus and one thing is only best here that is beautiful flowers all around. | [academics]: more than academics all the faculties focus on the promotion of college.showing off in the videos of college. the reality is totally different they do not have management at all.they unable to complete the syllabus on time. | [placements]: few companies come in the srm institute of science and technology, delhi-ncr campus, ghaziabad. various companies come in the main campus of srm institute of science and technology.this college do not have good placement. | [campus life]: there are only some events provide by the college . in one year they celebrate rubaroo if two days in which star comes . most of the time they do not have budget to take the star here . there are 2,3 dj nights performed in one year that's it . campus life is not good here.
college_name: SRM Institute of Science and Technology NCR Campus Ghaziabad

review_text: my campus life so far has been one of the cherishable experiences. i have enjoyed every day of the journey to the fullest and can say that it's the best, full of ups and downs, refreshment and challenges. the college organises several events throughout the year with two major headlining events, annual technical fest tecnoesis and cultural fest incandescence. the technical fest " tecnoesis " brings a huge no of events and competition with a huge no. of participants across and beyond the college.coding competitions like hackathon, nibble are conducted online and brings huge participants. robotics competition like sumo wars, robowar etc excited huge participants and audience as well.competition like smart city exhibition, bech ke dikhao, who would be next ceo, ipl auction various quizzes are organised. closing event called spark night is a cultural night which brings big fame from bollywood. annual cultural event "incandescence" is also one of the flagship cultural events of college which helds various cultural events and seminar by many big techie and renowned alumni. competition like indie lake(a music competition), nits mun, cultural events like comedy night, kavi-sammelan, ramp walk etc. are held. many bollywood fame singers and renowned archestra team comes for live performances . my college has an average class of infrastructure, neither too modern nor too primitive. some building, classrooms, hostels are old, but some are built new and equipped with all latest technologies and facilities. like my college has asia's biggest library named as "dr. apj abdul kalam learning and resource center". it has huge collection of books, journals, research papers etc. , study space, wifi, online learning resources etc. college also has a separate ground and kits an for all the sports like cricket, basketball, volleyball, lawn tennis, football. it also has a badminton court, several table tennis boards in each hostels and many more! coming to lab infrastructures, most of the equipments and apparatus are latest and updated, and sufficient in numbers. college also has a huge auditorium for conducting several events, and mass seminars.

vit is now breaking records in each field. it offers 100percent campus placements which no college manage to do. from 7sem onwards you are eligible for the job. companies like microsoft, amazon, apple, google, tcs, and adobe are coming. this time 913 companies visited with a total of 12000 offers. 1.02 cr is the highest package offered to two students. average placement rose to 8.5lpa for whole branches and 12lpa for cs and its students. i will definitely do the job for some time.rivera, one of the biggest fest in india is held around mid-february. it starts with a few technical events in college, then 4 celebrities come for 4 days, each one day. indeed a great experience to watch. a huge tech event gravitas held a week ago. there were more than 150 events. students are enhancing their skills, learning new in life, and enjoying life.

[college infrastructure]: high-speed wi-fi is available throughout the campus. the lecture halls are big and spacious, with large screens for the professors to use to teach. the library is the go-to place to study before major exams and quizzes and is well-equipped with all the resources. hostels are decent except for plumbing issues in some areas. sports facilities are also provided inside the residential halls.good infrastructure | [academics]: teachers are highly qualified and very enthusiastic to help. teaching is only good beneficial if students put in their hours outside of class to study, as academics are a bit rigorous. the course curriculum is highly relevant and makes the students industry-ready. semester exams are quite hectic and depend on the nature of the specific course. | [placements]: more than 90% of the students sitting for placements get placed in phase i and it increases to 97?99% till the last phase. the highest package offered for placement season 2023-2024 was 1.37 crores and the average is 26.27 lpa. in my course, people target different roles such as sde (software development engineer), investment banking, and core job roles. about 80% of people from my course got internships at companies such as goldman sachs, qualcomm, nvidia, amazon, and google. good mncs

there are a lot of clubs and they all take care of the extra curricular activities. you can join them according to your interest. the robotics club have won at national levels.the gender is really good and people from almost every state study here and even we have international students studying at the college.every small and big festival is celebrated. the annual fest youthopia is connected where cultural technical events are conducted. a sports fest is also conducted once a year. the fest sees participation from colleges across the state.it is one of the good enginneeing colleges known. and there is no such necessity like a particular mark should be obtained to get into the college, they take into account the board marks and also the cgpa. as i didn't get good marks in jee mains but had good percentage in my boards, i opted for this college.

[college infrastructure]: the rooms are spacious enough for two people, and the wi-fi is decent. if we need more bandwidth, we can use the lan. the lecture halls are also pretty good, with six of them, the largest holding 180 people. the mess food is decent, and much better than what i've heard about other colleges. there's a main canteen with several outlets and a medical office that's always open in case of an emergency. | [academics]: the teachers and faculty members are highly qualified in their respective domains. every professor has certain ph.d. students who work as teaching assistants (ta) under the professors. these tas generally evaluate our quiz papers and exam answer sheets. | [placements]: in the computer science and engineering (cse) department, over 80% of students were placed. the average package offered was 28 lpa, and the highest package was between 50 and 60 lpa. top companies that recruited from iit ropar include oracle, jp morgan, google, ebay, amazon, and arista.
college_name: Thapar Institute of Engineering and Technology Patiala

review_text: [college infrastructure]: the college infrastructure is very pretty and it's green everywhere. the facilities that have been provided is airconditioned classes, a very hug auditorium, a library which is way too big with everything available. | [academics]: i'm currently pursuing mba from iiit allahabad and trust me when i say it the faculties and the curriculum is very good. there are no burdens on student and we are allowed to live on our ow. they make us job ready which is another benefit of studying here. | [placements]: the placement is nominal and provides average placement of 7 lacs. the highest package that was given was 35 lacs per annum. the placement process is easy and they really hel us to improve all the possible things we can in order to gain a good placement
college_name: Indian Institute of Information Technology Allahabad

review_text: there are many annual fests such as engifest, yuvaan, and aahvaan. tech fests are very interesting and cool. engifest in february, yuvaan in february before engifest, and aahvaan (sports fest) in march. sports complex and a cool campus. many sports and too many (in a good way) societies for music, dance, poetry, and tech societies (robotics and stuff). freesources is a website run by students (seniors) and volunteers which provides notes and assignments, it is a very important thing to have as it helps everyone on their exams and academics.i can handle physics and you are allowed to appear in the placement of all kinds of firms such as tech companies, and non-tech companies, and core is also an option. the faculty is fine, not too involved, and rather strict in terms of exams and marking, labs are cool. the student ratio is very few girls compared to guys. the qualifications of the faculty are good. exams are held every two months and they are manageable if you study properly.

[college infrastructure]: chitkara university does have all the necessary facilities and equipments in the campus. the infrastructure of the campus is really good as well. the classrooms are fully air conditioned and the whole campus is equipped with fast wifi within the whole campus. | [academics]: i am studying be computer science at chitkara university institute of engineering and technology. the curriculum includes several computer languages that one might need for college placements and make us job ready. | [placements]: the placement rate in our college is upto 85% with average package upto 7-8 lacs. the placement process is divided into various levels including the written tests and interviews with the company's team. | [campus life]: our campus is designed very aesthetically. the infrastructure and the atmosphere are both really good. the staff and students are all very supportive and always ready to help. it is very safe and also has an emergency department.
college_name: Chitkara University Institute of Engineering and Technology Jhansla

review_text: dtu (dce) is unbeatable when it comes to fests. i've been at the university for about 6 months now, and there have been at least 8 large fests till now. there is a fest every month. invictus, engifest, homecoming, kalakriti, and fortune are some of the large fests held here. the library is huge, with literally millions of books. classroom amenities include a projector, high-speed wifi (300 mbps), centralized ac, and large comfortable benches. there are about 80-90 clubs, teams, and societies run by students, including some world-famous tech teams like dtu-smv (guys who make hyper mileage cars, that run 300 km on one liter of fuel). campus life is amazing and will be a memory for a lifetime.students are eligible for placement from the 5th or 6th semester onwards. large giants like maruti, amazon, microsoft, larsen&toubro visit for recruitment. 300+ companies visit the campus. the highest package stands at 1.4 cr ctc. 80%+ students get placed in the mech dept. a large number of students opt for higher studies and/or research after graduating.

[college infrastructure]: the overall infrastructure is good, the campus is having healthy environment and is hygienic as well but the only thing where it lacks is its transportation facilities and lift facilities in some buildings. | [academics]: in terms of academics the university is having well educated and experienced teachers. the university has well up-to-date curriculum designed for each course it offers to the students. the teachers are expertise in their field. | [placements]: the placement that is being offered by the university to the students are very competitive among the area. numerous top companies visits the campus and the students are given training for cracking the placement interviews.

pros/cons: strong academics and faculty maintanence and discipline good infrastructure and constructions going on campus life and environment around the college fee structure and expenses and also maintainance charges hostel facilities and room management around crowded labs and classes and no proper lab facilities | placement experience: placement starts at 7th sem company like bosch,tcs accenture and infosys hire top package of 28lpa and average of 5lpa about 85% of students get jobs roles like it,core and r&d plan:higher studies or core job

i chose this course because of the growing demand in the cse branch and ai is a very powerful tool. talking about the faculty-student ratio there are around 55 students for a single faculty given by the college. the faculty over here is very talented and qualified. most of them have a ph.d. degree or have completed their master's at least. over here they follow a term known as ffcs which is a fully flexible creditable system that is very helpful for the students for securing marks. there are 3 exams over a single semester. if you only study the ppt and the pdfs sent by your concerned faculties you can easily secure good marks.the quality fee structure is divided into five categories fees increase with each subsequent category. the category is given by the college based on the rank secured by the student in the viteee entrance exam. the fees remain the same for the entire tenure of education. you can get much financial assistance from banks named as educational loans with the help of the college. they make sure of the placements as well as the internships for the students. considering the facts the placements of this college are quite good and they provide multiple numbers of internships too for students.

[college infrastructure]: the college has one of the best infrastucure in india.the college has some world class classrooms equipped with high technology computers.it has all the facilities including libraries,sports,wifi,hostels etc. | [academics]: i am studying here m.sc mathematics and statistics.i am studying this because it has great scope in data science.the course curriculum is updated every five years.the college has one of the best syllabus for m.sc maths and stats. | [placements]: the placement is really good here like other iits.every year more than 90 percentage student get placed and whoever not they opt for higher studies.the average salary here is around 15 lakhs and the placement cell is really good here.

[college infrastructure]: dtu boasts a well-equipped campus with modern facilities: laboratories: state-of-the-art labs supporting advanced research and practical learning. library: a vast collection of books, journals, and digital resources to aid academic pursuits. hostels: comfortable accommodations with necessary amenities, though some students suggest that certain facilities could benefit from upgrades. sports facilities: extensive grounds for cricket, football, basketball, and other sports, promoting a balanced student life. | [academics]: m.tech curriculum at dtu is designed to align with industry standards: curriculum: regularly updated to incorporate the latest technological advancements and industry requirements. faculty: experienced professors and industry experts provide quality education and mentorship. research opportunities: students are encouraged to engage in research projects, fostering innovation and critical thinking. | [placements]: dtu has a strong placement record for m.tech graduates: recruiters: top companies such as microsoft, google, amazon, and tcs participate in campus placements. salary packages: the average package ranges from ?7 to ?10 lpa, with top offers reaching up to ?51 lpa in certain specializations. placement rate: high placement rates, especially in core engineering branches, reflecting the university's strong industry connections. | [campus life]: extracurricular activities: numerous clubs, societies, and events, including the renowned 'engifest', enhance the student experience. student community: a diverse and active student body fosters a collaborative and engaging atmosphere. | [anything else]: location: situated in the capital city, dtu offers exposure to various industries and networking opportunities. alumni network: a strong and supportive alumni network provides guidance and opportunities for current students.

i am in electronics and computers branch, it is a pretty good branch as if offers both electronics and computers, we get dual options for placement too. the course consists of 60% electronics and 40% computers. this is my second year and so far i can say that this is an amazing branch. in the first year we studied all the basic subjects like physics, chemistry, mathematics, c++ etc. from the second year onwards we started to dig in our core subjects like analog electronics, digital electronics, etc. one great thing i find about my course is that it also offers me to study subjects like manufacturing processes, in this subject we get an experience of field work which we expect only from mechanical engineers. we were taught how to do welding, milling and many other. we also have to make projects like building a line follower robot, mangonel, and in 3rd year we have to make a cap stone projects too.i gave jee exam, scored average marks in that. i also have other exams like comedk, entrance exams for colleges like manipal, vit, etc. thapar university take admissions on the basis of your jee rank. i also cleared vit and manipal. i checked nirf ranks and saw that thapar has was on 19th rank and others were in 30s or something. i was offered electronics and computers in thapar, it is a pretty good branch as if offers both electronics and computers, we get dual options for placement too. this branch made me make my mind for joining thapar institute.
college_name: Thapar Institute of Engineering and Technology - [Thapar University]

review_text: [college infrastructure]: college is providing good infrastructure. even in all the labs we are having lab assistance who will highly guide us to be more perfect in that current lab.the class rooms are alsoo provided with proper projectors...soo overall it's nice. | [academics]: good. proper examinations are done and the digital assignments are doing well.lectures are providing proper informations when we are in the need of their response.providing proper studying materials in form of ppts...helps us most. | [placements]: once we are completed some certain credits we are able to attend the placements.as we are from the 5 years course we are getting placements after 4 th year itself.even b.tech students are getting from 4.1 sem | [campus life]: superb
college_name: Vellore Institute of Technology Chennai Campus

review_text: total fees are 2,19,000 rupees in total including tuition fees which is 1,44,000 and various other parts like medical assistance, minority section relief donation and such. there are various scholarship opportunities if you are in need of it with enough low income. dtu concession (tuition fees return ), merit cum means (100%/50%/25% tuition fees according to condition ), post matric scholarship ( for sc/st students only & 100 per cent fees return )except for one or two professors most of the staff is top-notch and have a lot of knowledge. there are different experts in different fields. so they cover a vast area of knowledge. most assistant professors are relatively young from their late 20s to early 30s and others are above 40-50. lectures are relevant to the placement but not enough practice. you have to learn everything and apply it in real on your own.

pros/cons: the campus life sure gives a lot of experiences and it has its own positives and negatives i had good social interactions with students and made a healthy relationship with my faculty and my batch the faculty is average some are good in their fields and some do lack but the infrastructure is improving will become a great insitute the facilitites are limited as it is in arunachal pradesh things are costly there is no water in the january because of that we have holiday in february the placements are not so promising companies have started to visit and those who visit are not that big of a company | placement experience: from 7th semester students are eligible for campus placements if they dont have a backlog as many companies do not allow arrays in the semester. the companies visited are deloitte , alstom , hcl , tcs etc. almost 100 percent students are placed in my college i would join an mnc after getting a degree
college_name: National Institute of Technology - [NIT], Papum Pare

[college infrastructure]: i think there is lot of places where improvement is necessary. there are smart boards available , but they use it very rarely. and the wifi is given for certain period of time for a day. the living space are not that clean. | [academics]: i am doing my b.tech degree in electrical engineering. the quality of teaching is good with highly qualified teachers . yes our curriculum is updated regularly under astu regulation and includes all the recent development in the field | [placements]: reducing from time to time. around 30 percent got place. around 14 lakh per annum was the highest package offered. average salary is about 5 to 6 lakh per annum. yes the placement process is easy and the teachers are supportive. | [campus life]: best part is that it is spacious, isolated from the city environment. no proper boundary, lack of dustbins and no proper securit is the worst part.

well-ventilated classrooms, many of which are equipped with modern digital smart boards and reliable wi-fi connectivity across all academic blocks. science students benefit from well-equipped, into medical device innovation. this program has been a fundamental pillar in my academic journey, providing me with the necessary tools to pursue a career in cutting-edge medical research and development. the minimum 200 character requirement has been met and exceeded in this description. | [placements]: both academic performance (often represented by cgpa or marks) and qualitative decide whether a candidate is hired. the 200-character description requirement forces candidates to articulate these unique qualities.

the campus is lush green with good outdoor sports facilities. there are over 300 societies that conduct regular events and actively participate in the state to international-level of events. various sports competitions are held regularlyfees for the first year are 2,19,000 with a hike of a few percent every year. e-district and merit cum means scholarships are provided which can be availed by students to fund their degree. the internship starts at the end of 2nd year

here students can sit for placement from their 3rd year of b.tech. a student must have a cgpa of 8 or above to sit for placements. the average placement here offered by the visiting companies is 4-5 lpa. the highest package can go above 50 lpa as well. few students who are exceptionally well grab higher packages above 20 lpa. only a few percent of students sit for placement because most of the students drop out before completing the degree and many students do not sit for placement because they pursue higher education or start their own business.there are a lot of courses offered by the university. i opted for b.tech in computer science as it is the most popular course offered at lpu. the faculty here are decent with a few very good ones. the student ratio is also okayish here. there are two major exams conducted in one semester. one mid term exam and end term exams, also there are three continuous assessment conducted for each subject out of which the best 2 is chosen. the papers are neither too tough nor too hard, one can easily pass these exams and score good marks with some effort.

review_text: pros/cons: college hosts various events and programs for students to showcase their talents. college also host lots of guest lectures and brings lot of famous people which helps us find correct career. teachers are also very helpful and caring which provides student with support and encouragement classes are bit too long, they have one hour lecture with 6 lectures everyday minimum attendance required is 85% which is too much compared to other colleges. college has lot of events but most of events held are by psychology department, btech department mainly focus on classes than practical | placement experience: there is 100% placements for btech course with average of 600000 per annum package. different companies come for campus interviews mostly during 7th and 8th semesters and they conduct different rounds of exams and interviews for placements. some companies also provide internships and placements before 7th semester and give opportunity to students.

there is a 10% hike in fees every year. and fees are above 2 lakhs where 1.5 lakhs are tuition fees and 50k is the hostel and mess charges. the scholarship is based on your academic performance and the average package is around 11 lakh, many know companies come to campus for placements like google, oyo, olx, barclays, byn, makemytrip, etc.the student becomes eligible for campus placements in 3rd year 2nd semester. the companies visited are byn, deloitte, oyo, olx, makemytrip, barclays google, tekion, samsung, media.net, conde nation, mittal, etc. the percentage of students who get placed is 98%. and the highest package is 30 lakh and the average is around 11 lakh.
