review_text: the course is very well defined and is intricately curated by keeping the industry standards in the mind. it enables the students to learn the latest technologies and keep up with the industry requirements. the faculty: student ratio is approx. 1:20. the faculties are mostly phd holders and are well qualified in research and education. the teaching method is quite insightful and very up-to-date. it is quite interactive. there are regular assessment tests that are held at regular intervals to check the progress of the student. also, mid-semester exams and end-semester exams are held which are quite challenging to pass and score good marks.tech fest is conducted every month here and the annual fest is conducted approx in june. every type of book is present in the library here e.g competitive exams books, journals, textbooks, programming lang books etc. lpu is most widely known for its sports. the lpu team everywhere they go they always make lpu proud. there are too many big names in sports from lpu e.g neeraj chopra.

[college infrastructure]: my college has all the necessary infrastructure, facilities and equipment to support a well rounded educational experience. the classroom are equipped with modern amenities, including smart boards. the library is extensive, housing a vast collection of books. | [academics]: our academics are great. i have successfully completed two years of my bachelor degree in computer science and engineering.our college boasts an exceptional in computer science department, housing an extensive collection of over 100 different species. | [placements]: while our department, specializing in cse may offer direct placement opportunities but there is a promising path way for students to secure their futures. the college?s approach aligns with the college?s commitment to ensuring that students are well prepared for their carrer.

pros/cons: the faculty is highly knowledgeable and supportive. the campus infrrastructure and labs are well equipped placments are strong with good industry connections hostel facilites need better maintenance the girls and boys ratio is quite low... night canteens are not availableif you want something to eat then you have to order it online | placement experience: campus placement for m.tech students usually begins in the 3rd semester, allowing students to build their technical knowledge and complete relevant projects. the tpc is active and brings in a mix of core and it giants and research-driven organizations. qualcomm, texas instruments, microchip, marvel, intel, samsung, and amazon regularly visit the campus. the highest package will be 30 lpa, mid and avg are approximately the same, about 24 lpa, approximately 80% students get placed through campus drives, while others pursue ph.d and research projects. personally, after completing my degree, i aim to expand my embedded system knowledge to work in the semiconductor industry, while also keeping the option of pursuing doctoral research abroad if the right opportunity arises

review_text: i have got the cse branch and the course structure is according to new education policy 2020. most teachers are helpful in nature and all are well qualified. the girls to boys ratio is 1:4 in our branch and batch strength is 102. we have two exams per semester with viva one midsem and the other endsem. the marking scheme is average except for for some teachers who are very strict.campus life is satisfactory our campus is a bit small as compared to other nits. we have college fests every year like freshers party and all. we have medium size grounds and basketball, and badminton courts and almost every sport is available. we have a bank of ganga beside our campus to enjoy. there are many clubs also like hackslash, natwansh, and many more.

[college infrastructure]: hostels are old. wi-fi is excellent and the library is amazing; it provides various facilities. there are separate hostels for boys and girls. the library is centrally air-conditioned and open 24 hours a day. there is wi-fi everywhere on campus . | [academics]: exams are very difficult and the pass percentage is around 35%. the exams are difficult, with a passing percentage of 35%. people need to study a lot to pass and appear in exams. the internship scenario was not good; people have to work really hard for it. | [placements]: average placements recently are not nice. the top recruiters are apple, google, infosys, etc. 60?70% of students were placed. the total number of students placed this year was 1770; further, 70% of students were placed and the average package was around 5 lakh to 11.09 lakh

review_text: [college infrastructure]: wi-fi generally available in campus in different sections. except the pg students & faculty members ( 4gb/day), one b.tech student can avail 2.5 gb/day high-speed internet facilities labs are well decorated with equipments & instruments. various labs are available for different courses in different departments. wi-fi facility also there. one student can easily use all the equipments without any problems. this should give the knowledge on the various topics & new ideas & also get connected with t | [academics]: teachers are qualified enough with ph.d. degrees & have experienced with various workshops & other programs. they are student friendly & have well behaviour. one can easily get their opinions on different topics & solve any type of queries from them. they have immense knowledge to share among students. their teaching quality is very modern with projector based 3d visualization with ease, also compared with practical works with theories. 2. yes, the course curriculum is very relevant. they give | [placements]: in my course, approximately 85% of the students got placed. 2. the highest salary offered is 10 lacs per annum, the average salary is 6 lacs per annum and the lowest is 3.8 lacs per annum 3. some of the top recruiters of our course are larsen and toubro construction, alstom, maruti and vedanta ltd. etc. 4. most of the students were offered with graduate engineer trainee role. 5. the highest package is 10lpa, the average package is 6lpa and the lowest package is 3.8 lpa 6. around 40% of students | [campus life]: yes the campus life plays an important role and ofcourse its very good here and i love this place .

[college infrastructure]: the infrastructure is developing and quite good. there are two campuses, one old and one new, spanning 33 acres with academic blocks and hostels. the condition of the buildings is quite nice, and new labs are being constructed | [academics]: the faculty is good, and the curriculum is up-to-date. there are a good number of teachers, with professors being well-educated and experienced in their fields. the curriculum is well-developed and up-to-date, covering all necessary subjects. teachers are comfortable teaching in both hindi and english. | [placements]: 90% of students were placed, with the highest package at 22 lpa, an average of 7 lpa, and the lowest at 3.95 lpa. the college boasts good placements, with a median package of 9 lpa. top recruiting companies include microsoft, capgemini, google, tcs, etc. the top roles offered are data scientist, web developer, etc. | [campus life]: great campus life
college_name: SRM Institute of Science and Technology NCR Campus Ghaziabad

review_text: placements of our college is really good bcz of it brand and one of the oldest college of delhi and specially in tech branch placement are really good like of my batch (software engineering) previous year average package was 18lpa .there are more than 100 companies which visit in college and highest package offer last year was 1.5 crore which was abroad and highest domestic package offered was 59 lpait is like mid sem and sem and it's not that difficult u just have to study one week before mid sem and end sem and u can clear it very easily. and curriculum here is not that strict so u don't have to take tension of exams moreover faculty here are well qualified but they didn't pay much attention so most of the work u have to do by your own.

[college infrastructure]: shiv nadar university has state of the art infrastructure which includes well maintained sports facilities, a brilliant library, a gym, and clean hostels. the dining halls, and cafeterias are completely hygienic. | [academics]: shiv nadar university follows an academic system in which students need to fulfill credits not just from their major but from other departments and life skills as well. the credits are broken up between core courses, university wide electives - core courses of other departments, and core common curriculum - life skills. snu is a research orientated university. it provides a well rounded education for students. | [placements]: a large chunk of students prefer to opt for higher studies. almost all of the students who opt for placements get placed. shiv nadar university has a career development cell which works tirelessly to give the students the best opportunities their field has to offer. as for the average salary offered, it can be found on the university's page.

yes, there is 3 fest conducted in a year and another cultural program also. college classes rooms well lit and a huge library is available there in the college. classrooms are all maintained clean and fresh. there is also available a huge sports ground and conduct intercollege championships.the course is very interesting to me and the college is referred by our one teacher. the student ratio is above 2000. faculty all are well qualified and students friendly. the teacher is very polite to the students. examination level is not so hard if someone study regularly

[college infrastructure]: decent building, ac equipped classrooms with proper green and black boards along with projectors and digital screens and overall you are gonna have a nice experience and you are gonna have decent and unforgettable memories | [academics]: iit and nit graduate professor intertwined with years of experiences also the phd scholars are the one with whom you can share your doubts and problems if arised after class disciplines and discussion | [placements]: the placement are decent but vary depending upon tendency of skills and catalogue of learning and ideas that you withhold with you. average placement range lies between 8-10 lpa but vary according to your depth of knowledge particularly in dsa and algo.
college_name: Dr B R Ambedkar National Institute of Technology Jalandhar

review_text: [college infrastructure]: college have all facilities include pharmacy canteen dispensary (with experience doctors) sports complex for indoor games separate grounds for football cricket tennis dance activity zone we mostly chill at pratap sathal. | [academics]: we have professors who have studied in iims some of them from iits also in most of the subject we use to do activities during class so it's not only subjective academic mostly it's practical, presentation in almost every week. | [placements]: we have a good placement report last year report suggests it touches 90 percent but to be precise its in between (80-90) talking about average it's in between 7-8 lakhs most of the opportunity comes in hr and marketing. | [anything else]: you will get everything with in the campus, you have to take you student id every time when ever you go outside the campus for boys there is no time bound but for girls you have to report to hostel before 10 pm night. college is located at very prime location of jaipur.
college_name: Malaviya National Institute of Technology Jaipur

review_text: [college infrastructure]: the department has all the facilities, like 24*7 wi-fi, air conditioning, good classrooms and a central library as well. the quality of the facilities in the hostel is decent. the food available in the mess and canteen is good and has a good variety. there are many sports available as well. all equipment is made available to the students. | [academics]: faculty members are very kind-hearted in nature toward all the students. most of the faculty members are ph.d. holders from different iits and have great experience, which helps us in every possible way, whether it is academic-related or not. in order to just pass exams, its not that tough but to get a top rank here is not everyone's cup of tea. | [placements]: as you know, iit is known for their packages in reputed companies, as i am in the electrical branch, so the lowest package is around 15 lakhs and the highest goes up to 1 crore and above; the average is around 22 lakhs. most of the students get internships from my course. | [anything else]: superb college in delhi.

[college infrastructure]: yes, our college have a well built infrastructure, facilities, and equipment in our labs and classroom well built classrooms and labs which gives a good learning experience. we have ac classrooms and hostels have ducts one of our new hostel also have ac rooms and wifi connectivity is good and have facilities of smart boards also. we have a clean hostels and good mess food and hygienic environment. | [academics]: i am currently pursuing btech in electronics and communication engineering here faculties are good teaching skills but they are strict and very serious about studies. there is also 75% attendance rule which is a good example of how serious our faculties are about studies and yes our faculties gives good knowledge about new technologies and research and development. | [placements]: quality of placement in our college is very good our college have a good reach of tech companies core, core department do not have that great reach but most of the students goes in tech domain so placements are good in our college with a average of 11 lpa and 10lpa for ece. there are big companies like amazon, microsoft, goldman sachs, adobe which visit our college our college for placement. almost all the students get placement here and our tpc also function well at time of placements.
college_name: LNM Institute of Information Technology Jaipur

review_text: [college infrastructure]: the university have good infrastructure and having various facilities also. the classrooms have laboratories, libraries, classrooms and hostels as well. the hostel food is hygienic and also having wifi facilities. overall the university is good. | [academics]: the curriculum is updated and includes all the recent developments in the various fields of education. the quality of teaching is good as the teachers provide relevant material to the students. the study makes the students job ready. | [placements]: the quality of placements is good also as many companies come within the campus for campus drives. around 80% placements are there in the university. the average salary package offered by the company is around 3 lpa.

[college infrastructure]: here we have pretty good computer boards.coming to the campus infrastructure, its the best. this is not to say the staying accommodation isn't comfortable and we have all the basic facilities land canteens but you wouldn't get the swimming pools and squash courts like you imagine in iits. but the permanent campus construction is on good pace and the shift might happen in late 2022 ,so all of this wouldn't be relevant in 1 year because as far as i know the permanent campus is very big and beautiful, it'll remind you as your own home | [academics]: teachers are very young and knowledgeable. although the curriculum can be hectic because of the fractal system we borrowed from iit hyderabad. the experience of 2020 batch has been extra rough in this regard because our semesters were 4-5 months long because of the covid circumstances and them waiting for the right time to call the students offline. | [placements]: the placements are going on an excellent pace considering the third ever placement season of this institute is going on right now. just after 1-2 years of passing out many of our alumni and even seniors currently in college have gotten jobs and internships in the dream companies like amazon, google, microsoft. several people are doing very well in competitive coding.studenta are attending coding ninzas and various other competitions regarding coding

[college infrastructure]: my college infrastructure is pretty decent . classrooms are smart and good, neat and clean. their is well stocked library with physical and digital resources study areas and research journals. they support both independent and collaborative study | [academics]: as a student i see college as an important phase of both academic and personal development. i feel my college is a bridge to my career as college provides various resources and prepare us for our future growth. | [placements]: placements are good there is almost 85% placements. also many companies visit to the campus for various recruitment. college also offer pre placement training etc. effective training is very important for students for their job.

the total fees of 8 semesters is approximately 10 lakhs.the fee of the semsters in birla institute of technology mesra varies from 1.5 lakhs in semesters 7 to 1.2 lakhs in semester 2.overall, the facilities and placement opportunities provided by the college compensate the fees.apart from this we have to pay mess and hostel fee as well which is 15000 ruppees.birla institute of technology mesra is amongst the most reputed college of india and pursuing your graduation from here is a matter of pride, nd the 4 years one spends here will surely make a huge impact on your life and of you are sincere and honest enough, you will surely get a good job and be ready to face challenges ahead.

[college infrastructure]: for the college and its facilities, it has the best campus in chennai which is huge. it has majestic looking buildings and really good infrastructure. the labs are awesome and right now they built a new mac lab which apparently cost them about 3-4 crores. it also has a very big and really good looking library where we can borrow books, study for exams, and even chill out in-between our classes. | [academics]: the teachers are helpful, qualified and knowledgeable. the teaching quality is also good. the semester exams are not too difficult to pass. you need to attend classes regularly and keep track of all the assignments and projects to score well in semester exams. | [placements]: the placements of my college srm institute of science and technology, chennai in btech department was good . the top recruiters were aditya birla group, air asian, apollo tires, hul, honda, hyundai, infosys, informatica and more.
college_name: SRM Institute of Science and Technology Chennai

review_text: [college infrastructure]: i feel that my college has a good infrastructure from interior and exterior both and it has all the necessary facilities. the labs are well maintained. however, i feel that the food served is hygienic enough. | [academics]: the facilities of our college are very talented and professionally trained and very helpful toward us. students are provided with notes. they are highly trained to make us understand every topic with the least difficulty. | [placements]: almost 55-80% of students get placed every year. the average salary package offered is 4 lpa. the highest salary package offered varies between 10 lpa - 16 lpa. many top recruiting companies visit our college for recruitment.

[college infrastructure]: college infrastructure is good not bad as its improving pretty fast with new buildings and shops being built this year .playing ground is huge but a little away from college has a gym not that good i must say | [academics]: academics wise nitte is fine as teachers are pretty strict here.(only some of them..some lecturers are kind here too)and notes will be provided whenever needed but in pdf form . xerox centers are there nearby if you wanna take printouts | [placements]: nitte assures 100% placements as i am new here as a first year student i can say to my knowledge it has good number of companies visiting nearly 300? so i got to know that some of my seniors have 4 to 5 offers in hand | [campus life]: its great here .hostels are well accomodated but as i said before you can forget about going out at night but the fest of the year in incredia is just a blast .we as classmates enjoyed it alot and made alot of memories
college_name: NMAM Institute of Technology Karkala Taluk

review_text: [college infrastructure]: the infrastructure is huge and is well maintained, and cleanliness is maintained very well. the hostel people have their food in the college canteens which is very hygienic and there have been no complaints regarding the food in these years. the discipline is also maintained by the students which help to keep ycce a clean campus. | [academics]: teachers are all well educated and have great knowledge not only about the subjects they teach but also about other subjects. teachers are always there to clear the doubts of every student. the curriculum is relevant and they also take us on an industrial visit where we are shown how the industry is. | [placements]: placements in ycce have always been improving, moreover this year we have received an a+ grade from naac with a score of 3.6 cgpa which is the highest among all the colleges in central india. ycce has made placements easier with the help of crt - campus recruitment training which is provided every year to the 3rd year students before the campus placements start.
college_name: Yeshwantrao Chavan College of Engineering Nagpur

review_text: [college infrastructure]: the food served in the canteen is really good, and you don't feel like you are staying in the hostel and eating mess food. hostels are really good, especially 14, 15, 16 and 17 blocks for boys. you will get hostel based on your cgpa from 2nd year onwards. for mess, i will recommend annapoorna mess for 2nd-year students. | [academics]: the teachers are as what you would expect from an engineering college. some are really great, while some are really average. the bonus of learning is on the student, as is in any other engineering college, and you need to work hard. can always approach a teacher for help if required. | [placements]: every student, especially from cs, it and ece branch gets placed with an average salary package of 3 lpa-5 lpa. placements are not good for other branches. if you know coding, you can easily get a placement. i suggest you to try to learn coding from 2nd or 3rd year onwards if you want a good salary package.

[college infrastructure]: the nitr is a big institute which is 262 hectors or about 650 acers which is the 2nd biggest institute after iit kharagpur. so you can assume how big it is and there are also new buildings that are being build. there are also big hostels canteen area and hostel area big library and any other thing u ask about. even the garden is quite big. there is also places for extra curricular activities and places like football court basketball court and a swimming pool also for indoor games places. | [academics]: nitr has quite a lot of academic career choices mainly based on engineering but also available many other like msc. and phd programs and they are pretty good. in first year you have all the branch's classes in common so you have all the ideas of how all branch work so you can also do our branch change after 2nd semester on end of 1st year. all the lecturer are pretty good as well. but the thing is you have to study. all is good then. | [placements]: nitr has ranked 16 in all indian engineering colleges and 30th rank on overall university on nirf rank 2019. so you can know how hard it is to get into the college. the placement is quite good you can get pretty good placements with salary jobs the higest was 42 lpa in cse in the past which is pretty high. | [campus life]: the campus life is quite good new buildings are also added now which will help in the living the campus even for married people and even for lecturers and it is pretty good. they are pretty clean good big so no problem there

it has two big fest technical is gravitas and cultural is rivera it's on a very wide scale and participation is also too large like students from iits and nits comes to participate and singers and dancers come from bollywood and tollywoodinfrastructure is too good sports facilities are superb wifi is available all time lab is well equipped and size of library is also big three floors with digital reading is available too and has a large collection of books

[college infrastructure]: there are all type of services and wifi is also available in every hostel rooms the infrastructure in our collage is very attractive, itsold british design which is great for seeing the building iit roorkee is only iit with having sports such as rafting | [academics]: the professors over here are well trained and they help every student to achieve big and the teachers here are very friendly to the students. the credit system is one of the best system over here to choose some subjects | [placements]: almost 99% of the students gets placed from our collage . the highest salary package offered in computer science in past two years was 1.54 crore per annum as international package ,its 40 lpa in annum | [campus life]: campus life over here is one of the best , life is very good with much positive environment there are many technical and cultural clubs here which provides exposure to the students our collage organises two major events thomso wnd cognianze

[college infrastructure]: gla university has one of the best infrastructure among private universities in uttar pradesh. wifi access is available everywhere at the campus. the classrooms have projectors and a computer. the library has a webinar cum cyber section. the campus has various computer labs, but generally byod concept is used in lectures. | [academics]: i am pursuing b.tech in computer science and engineering. the faculty members are well qualified but only those associated with the training and development department provides the best experience, almost all other staff can't reach up to that level. | [placements]: placement team is very good. even those students who don't even study until 3rd year got placed in good companies due to the rigorous training provided by the t&d during the placement season. 74 % average placement over the last 10 years. 32lpa highest package offered (on campus). salary packages ranging from 4.5 to 32 lakhs pa(batch 2020). college provide support very much at each and every step of the placement process | [campus life]: the campus life is good but the strict attendance rules and frequent exams ruin the self study process here.

campus life is very good this the most wonderful life which i am living and after completing my graduation and post graduation from this college i will miss this if you talk about gender ratio so in iit bhu 10:1 is boy: girl and about diversity student from all over india come from all the states of india stair live together to celebrate together make environment happier and if you talk about extracurricular activity more than hundreds of activities are there-there are 5 council which are sports and gymkhana council, cultural council, film and media council comma social service council and science and technology council.since or colleges among the top institutes of india we celebrate 3 major events and many minor events also held accordingly 1.technex: it is annual techno-management fest in which more than 20000 participants come and participate in this competition of technology science and engineering 2.kashiyaatra: it is an annual cultural event held every year which include dance music play street play art and craft etc. 3. spardha: paradise annual sport fest
college_name: IIT BHU - Indian Institute of Technology

review_text: [college infrastructure]: i have joined my college on 2019. the experience has been great. the campus is like a feast to eyes. and the teachers are helpful. sometime regarding exams they give too much pressure. but regarding overall infrastructure it is good | [academics]: academics in some branches, they follow old syllabus. but most of the branches it is up to date. almost all the teachers are eager to help the students. and the teaching is not bounded inside the for walls of classroom | [placements]: placement in my college is improving. putting that aside it is better than various colleges of india. the main companies are google, microsoft, tcs etc. and as for a government college it has a moderate placement record. | [campus life]: campus life is too good. it is the college with most no of trees in west bengal. seniors are very helpful and caring towards the juniors. there are various games and big fields to keep us engaged in games
college_name: Indian Institute of Engineering Science and Technology Shibpur

review_text: there's one after another event happening on campus. there are a lot of events that happen in a year. most of the events will be conducted in october month. the classrooms are also good and clean and the library is a mountain of books there are a lot of books for your selected topics. there is a program organized by the students named ndnv( ninad drishti natraj vihiti). and a program with a high hike will organized by ndnv which will be a memorable program in the history of gla.gla university is mathura's no.1 university students come here from all over india for better study. that's why the hike in fees on the campus is high. for some reason, people can't afford this university the fees of the campus is one of the main reason. but for those people there a chance comes our college supports an scholarship program name (samaaj kalyan yogna). this is golden chance for those students who are not able to pay their fees properly.

[college infrastructure]: yes, my college has a lot of facilities including good laboratories, clean classrooms and sports centers. our college also provides good hostels including tasty mess foods. but the library facilities of our college is not that much good, there are no enough books which is in our syllabus and also there is no enough copies and existing copies are of an older edition. there is both indoor and outdoor facilities for sports activities. | [academics]: the quality of teaching is good in our department. but even though, some of the subjects are taught by the visiting faculties who don't have proper teaching skills. also, even some permanent staff don't cover the portions properly. so overall academics is just ok and it's not up to the national institute level. | [placements]: the placement of our department is also not up to the national institute level. only 60% percent of students will be got on-campus placements, but that is not with a satisfactory salary. nit campus is providing less number of placement. | [campus life]: the experience of the college is really good because there is a lot of good events and a lot of activities in the college. students will get a lot of opportunities to participate in different activities, and everyone can utilize the college facilities.

[college infrastructure]: our college provides good facilities for students, and the infrastructure is also good. there are more trees inside srm college. hostel facilities and infrastructure are bad, but the food served in the hostel was the worst. there are no playgrounds in our college, and only two small basketball courts are available. there are less elevator facilities. | [academics]: teachers here are good at clarifying doubts of the students, and they are very responsible. they are well qualified, while some are less qualified. they are knowledgeable in teaching and conducting lab activities. this course curriculum is relevant, and it makes students industry-ready. | [placements]: other than studies, many events are conducted in which certificates are also provided. they are useful for our jobs. placements are provided for students according to their cgpa ranging from higher to lower in 4 years of the course. based on that, salaries are offered by many companies like it companies, mobile companies, airtel, etc. | [anything else]: placement should be improved
college_name: SRM Institute of Science and Technology Chennai

review_text: b.tech(information technology) is the highest demanding course at the current time. a lot of students are trying their best to get into a good college and pursue it and cse courses. iem is one of the best colleges in west bengal. the teachers are great. they help in every aspect, especially the mentor. mentors are the best part of iem. mentors also help you with other issues(other than college related). the student-to-teacher ratio is great. we have a lot of teachers. all are experts in their fields. every subject is divided into modules and for each module, different teachers are specialized in that field. the exams are timely and the questions are of average level. if you follow your teachers and attend their classes then it shouldn't be hard to pass with a good score.the college has a large library which has a large pile of books from many global authors. life at the college is awesome. the college conducts many fests including the annual meet. iem has three buildings named ashram building, the management building, and the gurukul campus. according to the year, students will be shifted to different buildings. the classroom is very large, fully equipped with projectors and basic items. teachers use projectors often to demonstrate topics for a better understanding of concepts.

[college infrastructure]: the infrastructure of our college is awesome, with a beautiful green campus. all the classrooms and labs are fully air conditioned and are fully furnished with internet services provided to all the students. sports facility is really good in my campus. | [academics]: faculty are good and they teaches in a very good style. some teachers has their own different unique ways of teaching. the curriculum was also updated and the syllabus was always use to be relevant to us. | [placements]: the placements of my college are fantastic. ece branch always got the highest packages. almost 90% of students of my branch got placed in many good companies. the highest package was 64lpa offered to the ece branch. also college is very supportive regarding placement processes.

[college infrastructure]: iit roorkee has a great infrastructure..... it has a lush green campus... james thomson building is pride of the whole campus and is one of it's kind in nation... it's library is great and the lecture halls and convocation hall are just outstanding. | [academics]: iit roorkee has a great academic structure... it provides branch change for the first yearites only in the first semester therefore not wasting much of their time... and also it has a variety of additional courses one can opt.. even in different branches. | [placements]: iit roorkee also has great placement opportunities... as more than 450 companies visit every year on the campus for recruitments.... mnc's like amazon, microsoft, goldman sachs... visit here on campus for recruitments, giving students much chances to get placed.

i study in the state karnataka which has a common entrance exam (cet) held all across the state thourough which we can get admitted to various engineering colleges under vtu (visvesvaraya technological university). after the merit list is announced there will an online portal thourough which we can opt 3 courses in any of the college present in the list. after this there will be 3 rounds of admission process where the ranks will be called according to the merit list and we get our preferred college (of the 3 options selected online) based on availability. if we are not satisfied with the college/course that has been alloted then we can opt to keep the obtained seat as "hold" and try for better options in the following rounds of admission.the gender ratios are not balanced. the number of boys exceed the number of girls by ratio 2:1. there are several technical clubs which participate in various activities all over the world which help us gain some on field experience. the sports and cultural activities in the college are also splendid and the college provides ample opportunities to showcase ones talents. the college strictly bans any form of ragging/harrasment and takes strict action of expelling the student in such cases. students from all parts of the country come and share their culture with others and also learn various other cultures thereby having a healthy scenario in the college. students from every religion, caste, gender, race are welcomed and treated equally.

campus life if overall is very good in comparison to other universities. there are different societies for different purposes like cultural societies like madhurima, pratibimbh,kalakriti etc and various tech societies the annual fest of dtu is engifest which is usually held in the month of jan-feb every year. talking about no. of books in the library you will get 5-10 types of books on each topic written by different authors and publishers and even dtu has an online library which contains almost 450,000 e-books. aminities:-every classrooms have enough space to hold the sitting of 70-80 students at a time and also has some large rooms too whose capacity is to accommodate even 120-150 students. every classroom has a projection system too. sports and extracurricular activities are somewhat nice and compulsory too if you opt for sports in electives and even you can play on your own because sports facilities are soo good in dtu. there are different societies which are fully run by students only.the placement of dtu is far far better than any other college. even though most of the best companies visit, students apply for off-campus to get a better payout and wide options. after 3-year students are eligible for campus placement because some companies after the third year get the best students before every other company visits. nearly 300 companies visited and 2082 offers were given by them in the year 2022. highest package-1.2 cr per annum lowest package-11 lpa profiles are software engineer and data analyst etc. on average 89 per cent of placement is in dtu but varies according to branch too. i am gonna get on campus placement.

pros/cons: the faculty of srm university is highly qualified with many holding phds and having solid research or industry experience. the campus is modern. and well-equipped.the library is huge with digital resources,labs are upto date , classroom are smart-class enabled. the placement cell is active with many big companies visiting especially for sce and it branches .packages vary but for top performers, opportunities are impressive. the tuition fees are quite expensive compared to other private collages and on top of that additional charges like hostel,message and lab fees add up. sometimes the administration is slow when it comes to document processing, approvals,or resolving student concerns. while the curriculum is industry -oriented at times it feels too theory heavy or outdated in certain electives. | course curriculum overview: the course curriculum at srm university is quite comprehensive and industry -oriented.one or the reasons i chose this course was the inclusion of modern subjects likes ai,data science,a nd elective options that allow flexibility.the curriculum balances theory with practical labs, projects and internships which helps in applying knowledge to rela world scenarios and also builds a strong bas for higher studies.
college_name: SRM Institute of Science and Technology - [SRMIST], Chennai

review_text: the course offers great career opportunities. the faculty staff are highly qualified and well experienced. all the staff have master's and doctorate degrees and have good teaching experience. exams were held after each 1.5 monththere are several internship companies which offer internship programmes to students for ex tcs asian paints maruti adm cognizent paytm exxonmobil and many more. further students can also get placement in these companies

[college infrastructure]: the college infrastructure is very good, there are 3 big academic blocks with labs and classes. also there is an in campus hostel for boys. there is also a big cafeteria and a big mess for students to have food. there are 2 main play grounds and several gardens to sit and relax. | [academics]: the academics here is pretty decent, the college provides you with best possible faculties and interesting subjects to study. the examination here is also divided into two parts 1.mte and 2. ete. the academics is good. | [placements]: the placements are good and many companies often visits here for hiring students for offering jobs to students. big mnc comes to campus for mass recruitment like delloit, wipro, infosys, lenevo, byjus etc. | [campus life]: the campus life here is pretty amazing because there is a club for every thing from dance to music to event management also the cafeteria is good to pass your time with many different kinds of food shops and mini store for everyday commodities.

the average package provided by my university was a bit higher than other universities. there are a lot of faculties in my department. each subject has 4 different faculty. there is one faculty for every 17 students. the majority of faculties are from iits and nits. every two months, cat examinations are held here with lenient difficulty and ias are held every week. at the last of the semester, ete is taken.no such hike in fees. fees are constant till the last year. the scholarship is provided by the government for students whose family income is less than 2lacs. many companies arrive on campus with a good package and nearly every student gets a good placement with a good salary.

[college infrastructure]: i feel that attention should be paid to the advertisement of the college because of the kind of facilities this college provides to the students is excellent.the size of the campus here is very big and different types of playgrounds have been built inside the campus and the library, labs are also well taken care of. | [academics]: the academics of the college are also good, the teachers here teach us well. apart from studies, we also get the chance to learn many things from the professors here.the curriculum is always updated here and the curriculum is very well designed. | [placements]: if we look at the placement, almost all the students get it and the highest package here is around rs 15 lakh and the average package is between rs 4 to rs 6 lakh.the placement process is easy and these people also give 2 months extra training for placement. | [campus life]: the size of the campus is large and the special thing about the campus is that the environment has been well taken care.the campus looks very nice and different types of food are also available in the canteen. students here are enjoy a lot. this college is located in delhi. | [anything else]: overall college is good.

review_text: bcs i was interested in technology so i opted for this course. it's about 70:1 in this collage. all teachers are well qualified and the teaching method is also easy if there is an international student they can teach in english or in both english and hindi. exam terms were held timely there is not too much difficulty to pass end term examination.7th sems students are eligible for placement. too many companies are coming company like cognizant, infosys many companies are coming cognizant, infosys, the highest package is about 12 to 13 lakh and an average of about 4 lahks. almost most of the students get the placement. 80 percentage. nothing.

campus life was too good there is no force from the authority to study study and all. the university helps you in the overall development not only in the academic part but also in the sports. and there are labs which gives us the practical knowledge and the hands on experience and even the student organizations like sae and all helps you in the overall development.the faculty really helps you out in making you a professional the best infrastructure and the best faculty ever who were so friendly to you. the examination structure is same as the other competitive exams with the negative marking and all here we come to know that while giving an exam we have to be fully prepared for it.

campus life of bit mesra is awesome. you have a lush green campus to live and enjoy. the campus is just beautiful and very large. no pollution, no noise just pure vibes of a green campus. the infrastructure is also beautiful. classes are smart, we'll be equipped and highly maintained. we have high-class lab facilities. the canteen area is nice. the hostel infrastructure is also good. and sports facilities are also very decent in bit mesra. a proper stadium is there for football, badminton, basketball, and volleyball. the gym facility is also very good.course curriculum is excellent in bit mesra. faculty members are highly qualified and knowledgeable. good care is taken toward academics. all exams and quizzes are held timely and teachers are very strict. it's difficult to score well but you can manage if you are little smart. attendance is taken very seriously. you need to have more than 75% attendance to appear in exams or else you will get an f in the subject which means you have to attend classes again in summer break to pass.

review_text: the campus of bit mesra is one of the best campuses in india. it's spread over 780+ acres with forest cover all around it. it's really a treat to walk around the campus on holidays. having a cycle is a must in our college because of the distance between hostels and main buildings and food joints (ofc girls hostel too. our annual cultural fest is bitotsav held in february this time bitotsav 23 was held after 3 years and it was worth the hype with papon's performance in pro night. the annual tech fest is known as pantheon, it has a huge scope impact me. we have a big library with almost all kinds of academic books available. the classrooms are all air-conditioned. the sports culture is pretty average. the sports complex is big and also with a gym. there are many cultural and tech clubs all organizing some events throughout the year. but our administration is very student unfriendly and struct that's a big con!students are eligible for placements from the 7th semester onwards 6th sem onwards for internships. placement for circuital branches here is comparable to the top 5 nits with cse average package being 22 lpa and the highest being 58 lpa overall average package was 13.5 lpa. core companies also visit our campus and offer jobs to core branch students like mechanical, chemical, civil etc. but they are fewer in number. top recruiters are atlassian, microsoft, tata steel, hero motor corp, hyundai, genpact etc

review_text: motilal nehru national institute of technology popularly known as mnnit allahabad is quite famous for its placements. students are eligible for internships from the fifth semester. and hundreds of companies visit this college and almost all students get a good placement depending on his/her skillalthough the fee is very high you can avail of a lot of scholarships here depending on your academics and family income as well. if your family income is less than 8lakhs but greater than 5lakhs you will get two third waiver on your fee and if it is less than 1lakhs you will get a 100% fee waiver
college_name: MNNIT Allahabad - Motilal Nehru National Institute of Technology - [MNNIT]

review_text: [college infrastructure]: there's 52acre green campus situated in greater noida. there are spacious and equipped classroom and well facilitated labs. every faculty member is highly qualified and are from reputated college yes. | [academics]: most of the faculty member are highly qualified and trained . hardworking and friendly. they give proper attention to theory as well as practical knowledge to focus on industrial interaction. they focus on project works. | [placements]: placement senario is good. college try to attract as many companies as possible. all reputated companies like amazon and ibm took students from here. student bag dream package of 35 lack from amazon . yes. | [campus life]: campus life is good . there are several clubs and activities are always happening in hush area . you just have to take time to attend them. hush area is the canteen area . lot of food stalls and fun activities are always happening.

[college infrastructure]: collage infrastructure is excellent and collage campus is outstanding from outside and inside overall the college is excellent and well provided. the teaching staff infrastructure is also good. highly recommended. | [academics]: academics are good. teaching staffs and all the management helping us for the developing the skills and organises extra activities. also be helpful for the students to prepare for interviews and also helps students having good knowledge. | [placements]: there were multiple companies and opportunities who comes for the placement drive to the campus and also recruit students who are capable, well deserved and talking about the numbers the average placement as per my knowledge.
college_name: Motilal Nehru National Institute of Technology Allahabad Prayagraj

review_text: the campus life of mnit is what makes it the best. you will get ample opportunities to participate in various activities. the campus has 19 clubs including dance, literary, quiz, etc. mnit has an immense library with books on various topics by many known authors. in sports, the campus is well facilitated with almost all games including badminton, football, volleyball, etc.all major companies including google, adobe, texas instruments, dshaw, and jp morgan come to the campus for hiring students every year. the companies come to hire 3rd and 4th-year students for internships. for preparing students for the corporate sector various workshops are organised by the college.

[college infrastructure]: the college has an amazing infrastructure must say !! the college has its own mall, activity centres and hubs, clubs and many more !! the hostel + classrooms are all well maintained and all are fully wifi enabled. the college has one main library and many sub- libraries in each block. the living spaces are well maintained and are cleaned once or twice every week. the mess and food services are actually very good, better than any other colleges that i have seen. | [academics]: the curriculum is upto the ugc mark and i don't find any difference between my university's syllabus and a top notch iit and nit's syllabus. the recent developments is always made up-to-date to the students with the help of academic course syllabus and the teachers are well certified in their own field which helps us even to work on better stuff such as review papers etc. | [placements]: placements are also good. as i am studying electronics and communication engineering there, i am satisfied with placement department. they offer placement for all those students who are passed in all the subjects without any re appears and any backlogs. | [campus life]: the university is as big as we cannot even imagine, a person would take guts to walk from the entrance(main gate) to the last block(polytechnic). also, the life around is the best. the location of the university is best and it has all of the necessary things in it. we do not have to look out of the university.

the fees hike here is 10% per semester. cost to study here is same as in other iit's or government colleges. including all the charges it will be around 15-16 lac for whole degree including hostel mess etc . financial assistance is needed to given . just fill the form and attach the required formsif you work hard on your skills you will surely get internships in top companies. many opportunities are here both in sd and core side. compamies like microsoft, amazon hired interns in sd and i don't know much about core department. but there were my friends who got internship in core side also
college_name: IIT Ropar - Indian Institute of Technology - [IITR]

review_text: [college infrastructure]: college is very good and it lacks some of facilites but it is better option studying here. it has everything such as food classrooms, library and hostel and well equipped lab to. food are good and hygienic. | [academics]: most of the teachers are qualified recently and they are learning. although the teaching quality is average. talking about curriculum it is not to date. they aren't updating the subjects with the recent changes in corporate world. | [placements]: placement is average here. almost every student is placed in a very less packages. highest salary offered was 21 lakh per annum in cse branch. college authority is doing well for placement drive but theirs a room for improvement.

i'm passionate about python language so i took cse ai ml and counselling is offered to me in this college. the faculty members of my college are very supportive and always ready for help. in a class, 60 students sit in the classroom and when we compare it with other colleges strength of students is very large so at the time of placement, you have to fight too much. in aktu i think this college is best because since last year the placement cell growth is increasing exponentially. i only dislike one thing in university ie exam will be done every month you feel that yesterday i have given the exam and next day again exam like this.in every college, i think you will enjoy your college journey in this college as well you will meet all different kinds of people who are good in sports, co circular activities, coding, etc. every semester book will be available from the library and after the end sem, you have to return it. after 1 year you can participate in any group like there are many groups ie v verve, goonj, tech related and many more. our college is nba accredited which prefers to your placement journey. as i came after corona so no fest had been done yet but before corona every year tests always be done but now no fest is being organised.

we are still in the first year and going to complete it in a month. so we don't have any jobs but yes many of our friends have applied for scholarships from the up government. we can apply for a scholarship in any year but get it only once. i think there should scholarships for those too who score good marks in academics.we are provided a nice library. there are many competitions organized here and we get many opportunities to showcase our talent. but the participation fees should be below i think and they should also contribute a little amount from the audience to cover up the things and no bad audience would be present.

[college infrastructure]: a. yes, ramaiah institute of technology (rit) has excellent infrastructure, facilities, and equipment, supporting both academics and extracurriculars effectively. b. classrooms are equipped with smart boards, projectors, and wifi, ensuring a tech-enabled learning environment. laboratories are well-equipped with modern tools, libraries have vast resources, and sports centers offer indoor and outdoor facilities. hostels provide wifi and recreation spaces, and all facilities are well-maintained. c. hostel living spaces are regularly cleaned, ensuring hygiene, and the food served in mess facilities is generally clean and decent in quality. | [academics]: a. i am pursuing b.e. at rit, focusing on technical and practical learning. the teaching quality is robust, with experienced faculty guiding both theory and application. b. the curriculum is regularly updated, including the latest advancements in the field, ensuring students are industry-ready. the program includes practical training, workshops, and seminars that align with current industry needs. | [placements]: a. rit has a strong placement record with top recruiters visiting every year, offering diverse roles in engineering and technology. b. over 95% of students get placed. the highest salary package offered last year was around 50 lpa in computer science. c. the average package is approximately 7-8 lpa. the placement process is smooth and well-organized, with immense support from the placement cell, including mock interviews and resume building. | [campus life]: a. rit?s sprawling campus is a blend of greenery and modern buildings, offering an inspiring learning environment. it has excellent hangout spots, sports facilities, and annual cultural fests like udbhav. however, parking is limited. b. students, faculty, and staff are cooperative and approachable. located in a prime area of bangalore, the campus is safe, with 24/7 security and first-aid facilities ensuring readiness for emergencies.

[college infrastructure]: iiest provides with all the necessary infrastructure. the classrooms and labs are clean, well light, and well equipped. our library holds a huge collection of 12000+ books and dissertation papers. the campus hosts four fully functional canteens along with a ccd and a nescafe outlet. we also have a dedicated sports centre. the hostels are decent but some of them require renovation which we are working on. overall, iiest provides you a good infrastructure that ensures a great learning experience. | [academics]: i'm a student in the civil engineering department, but i also have friends in every other department on campus. most of our teachers are extremely qualified and passionate about education, barring a few. they make you love the subject rather than cram needlessly. iiest treats education as a priority and provides great exposure to a variety of projects. however the curriculum is outdated and has little relevance in the industry. hopefully that'll change soon. | [placements]: the placements have been good so far on campus. our highest package for 2019 was 40 lpa, offered by microsoft to three of our students, 2 of them from our computer science and 1 of them from our it department respectively. the average package for core branches has been around 6-7 lpa, and non-core has been around 10-12 lpa. we have an active placement cell that ensures great participation from the industry in every placement season. | [campus life]: we have an extremely vibrant campus life. we have a wide array of clubs for you to choose from, be it dancing, dramatics, writing or singing. you'll also have the opportunity to participate in a multitude of competitions and other events organised by these clubs. the campus is extremely safe with a dedicated hospital that caters to students 24*7 with a doctor always on call. the campus is located very close to the hooghly river and is serene filled with greenery.
college_name: Indian Institute of Engineering Science and Technology Shibpur

review_text: [college infrastructure]: in terms of providing facilities, it is the best campus. wi-fi facility should be provided on the entire campus.the hostel are improved a lot than before.rooms should be well designed with a balcony. overall, certain things are very improved.now i really loved the college infrastructure and the facilities providing by them are awesome. | [academics]: some teachers are very talented and encouragive.some are preparing he syllabus and trying to give their best. courses need to be redesigned now as the world is continuously changing. courses need to be more creative, and it should include group task.there are some really excellent professors to whom i really salute. | [placements]: our college will definitely provide more core companies for every branch for placements. students should be encouraged from the beginning of their course for the placements. hardly many of the student got a chance to get placed in a core company.many students got placed in it sector in very big companies with highest packages.they really work hard to get that.
college_name: National Institute of Technology Andhra Pradesh

review_text: [college infrastructure]: infrastructure of our college is really bad. the space is very little. we don?t have a permanent campus. small grounds for sports are available. there are no separate departments. wifi is not working half of the time . we do not have enough books in the library. teachers rarely use projectors. | [academics]: teachers are helpful and knowledgeable. they are qualified enough to teach us. the quality of teaching is good. they sometimes use the projector to teach some particular topics. but we do not get trained for companies or industrial training. curriculum is not good enough. it's mostly theory. | [placements]: placement is really good especially for cse. the average salary package offered for cse students was 8 lpa, and for the students of eee, it was 5 lpa. for the students of ece, the average salary offered was approximately 6.5 lpa. | [campus life]: tech fests and other fests do take place. alumni, seniors and teachers are helpful. students engage in different extra curricular activities like sports, dance, drama.

[college infrastructure]: lovely professional university infrastucture is one of the biggest & best in the world with 600 acre.university has almost al the facilite that must be available for student.facilites in classroom are very advanced like smart classes with projectors. it provides all the facilite let it be form restaurnts,atm's,bowling alley,hospital ,bank ect. | [academics]: i am pursuing computer science and engineering .because in the university the scope of computer science is excellent compare to any other university. in this university very experienced faculty.about curriculum is updated and includes all the recent developments in the field. | [placements]: the university provides a huge scholarship to the students performance in jee mains and lpunest entrance exam.the campus placements in the computer science almost 90 percentage above.and depend upon you how much you can explore the our field.so packages should be more. | [campus life]: in the this university we get all the facilities like swimming pool,indoor stadium ,out door stadium ,class library, biggest auditoriumect. in this university the best thing is diversity.i am happy to become a family of lovely professional university .

[college infrastructure]: the college campus of this college is good , the college provides the all the necessary facilities in addition to that it also provides the cultural clubs , other clubs and events to the students for the creativity . | [academics]: the academics performance of this college teaching faculty are average . we do not have the much teaching faculty for our course , we need more of the teaching faculty and the teachers teaching quality is good apart from that . | [placements]: the college campus placements are good in the national institute of technology kurukshetra college . the college provides both the internships and placements to the students in the college in the final year .

[college infrastructure]: with recent modifications made to the building, the libraries and classroom are all getting better and better. labs have always been sufficient. the playground and indoor stadium is good too. otherwise you can't take part in activities much if you don't stay in hostel since it gets too late to get back home after practice. | [academics]: well the curriculum is satisfactory. teachers are always unique in their abilities. but as a whole they are pretty good. in terms of being job ready, it's slightly hard to say since each company focuses on different concepts and students may not always be trained in classes for it. so here we might have to be prepared on our own. | [placements]: one of the best college when it comes to placements. we get chances over and over with the number of companies that show up. the packages range so wide that you will definitely get places in atleast a mass recruiter with 4lpa if not higher based on your capabilities. | [campus life]: a lot keeps happening every now and then. students take up the initiative to form clubs for various things. from education to art or adrenaline there's always one or the other club you can join. the events are also always there. the location is perfect with all the good places to eat and have fun around.

[college infrastructure]: the college does have all the necessary infrastructure and they are even creating a whole new block which will be completed by the end of 2022 which is set to house swimming pool, a race track and huge rooms for various clubs of pes | [academics]: the quality of education is pretty good. there are 2 cbts before the main end semester exam. the papers are checked very strictly tho but it's not very tough to get 9 pointers when u join your respective branches and pes even offers a load of scholarships | [placements]: pes has one of the best placements statistics among all the other universities in not only bangalore but also the whole of india especially the cse branch which is the most sought after branch in pes. highest salary package offered till now has been around 4000000 | [campus life]: there are a ton of activities that organised every now and then and clubs that the students can join and learn different skills

[college infrastructure]: infrastructure is awesome .campus is very large and lush green .classes and lecture halls are very good mentained and well equiped with all the modern facilities. hostels and sport facilities are good . | [academics]: acads are very highlighting features in lnmiit. our syllabus is very well designed .it gives us modern day practical knowledge and make our thinking process future ready for corporate world. profs. are very knowledgeable. | [placements]: placements are the main reason why i choose it .avg pakage of 12 lpa ,highest package of 63 lpa & median of 10 lpa is more than enough for me to write about our placement. almost every big coampany come to recruit students from campus.

review_text: [college infrastructure]: gla is having very fantastic infrastructure facilities and equipment available. facilities like secured wifi digiboards for covering syllabus and they are well maintained also availability. gla provide hygienic food and clean sanitation | [academics]: currently i am studying bba because it will enhance my business skills the quality of teaching is very efficient as faculty is teaching through digiboards our curriculum is perfectly updated accordingly to recent trends.yes my study is preparing for the job | [placements]: the quality of placement of my college is very good. approx 95% students are placed from our college in big different companies. the highest salary package offered is 7 lpa this was by our top students from bba. | [campus life]: gla university have may best features like it's infrastructure football ground basketball court auditorium for events library digiboards classes also many skills developing clubs for extra curricular activities organising events.

pros/cons: the professors, activities, and hackathons in the college makes it special. labs are too good in this college. there are more practical works that are done by us with the help of professors. this thing makes this college better than other colleges. there are some placements regarding classes that are too much good for our placements as well as for the skill developments the things that i personally dislike is the timing of this college. classes starts from 9:20 am and ends at 4:00 pm, which makes it too tough for us to do our personal works. the criteria of 75% attendance is one of the worst thing in this college. the lunch break is just for 40 minutes, which is too bad for students and their health also. | placement experience: from 7th semister, student is eligible for the campus placements. if we talk about the internships, student can get the internship offers from 5th semister onwards. there are many companies that come in this college. there are arouund 1000+ companies that visits college for the placements. these companies includes jp morgan, microsoft, amazon, boeing, deloitte, etc. the average package is around 7lpa and the highest package is around 45lpa. the percentage of students getting placements is around 75%. some students prefers to study further and some leave the placements for the other reasons. my plan after getting the degree is to be placed in a good company with the good package.

the campus is huge. it's all about the ramaiah educational institutes. the engineering campus is lil bit smaller as compared to the medical college here. the main gates will be opened at 6 am and closed at 11 pm. students can have all kinds of facilities which could be afforded them easily. also, there are 4 libraries in rit. even they conduct fest but rare although club events took off often...in 2020 mechanical department started a start-up of designing an electrical cycle for the students to ride across the campus with charges made for an hour. it was so helpful for zomato and swiggy delivery people who used it in a meaningful way and it's growing well... there's also the multi-purpose building where students in their final year are allowed to research...

[college infrastructure]: iit delhi has one of the best infrastructure in comparison to all other engineering colleges. it has a large campus with modern technology with well equipped classrooms and hostels, high speed wifi and more.. | [academics]: iit delhi excels in academics with high class faculty. it has one of the most experienced and brilliant teachers who are masters in their subjects.they use innovative teaching methods to fosters learning for the students. | [placements]: iit delhi has a high placement rate with outstanding packages. top firms like google, microsoft , tata , mckinsey recruit here, offering 25lakh average ctc, 3.6cr top offer.+ startups also hired proving iit delhi's dominance

[college infrastructure]: college have all important areas like library, smart classrooms, laboratories, sports area small shopping centres, cafeterias and hostels . hostels are cleaned on daily basis also have facility of wifi. | [academics]: i am student of food technology . the course is according to gov gate exam . the quality of teaching is excellent. curriculum is updated as per recent developments. there are any lab subject also because of this we have a better idea for our theory courses. according to job requirements curriculum is very appropriate. | [placements]: average placement is of 5 to 6 lakh and highest placement is of the 40 lakh per annum. students are placed on known multinational companies. 70 percent of students would be placed. placement process is easy and for placements our college have training facilities also. | [campus life]: campus life is very qualitative hostels are surrounded by lot of greenary in morning cycling and joggings are best options to retain healthy lifestyle.

[college infrastructure]: the college is well-equipped with all the facilities that a student requires in modern times. it has a well-rounded infrastructure that is on par with many other prestigious institutes all over india. the classrooms, labs, libraries, and sports centers are well maintained with the library having free wi-fi. the hostels are a bit on the lower side of maintenance but it all depends on who the resident of the hostel room is. the rooms are equipped with a high-speed lan. | [academics]: the professors at nit rourkela are experienced and knowledgeable with many of them constantly trying to make the subject seem interesting to learn. you may face problems with some of the teachers but in the end, it's all about the rapport between the teacher and the student. the curriculum is up-to-date and the professors try to teach from the industry point of view. so by the time you graduate, you are good to go. | [placements]: placements are entirely branch-specific with cse having the highest percentage. but that doesn't mean the others are left out. well renowned companies like microsoft, adobe, etc. come for recruiting. you could always try out for the company you always wanted to work for. throughout the years, placements for mechanical have been consistent so that's one less thing to worry about. working hard can get you the job you want. | [campus life]: the campus life in nit rourkela is really good with all the students willing to reach out to those who require help. it is a good podium to network with people and build good relationships. the students can join clubs that catch their attention or the ones that suit their needs. you get the best support from the seniors in the clubs.

[college infrastructure]: campus is ver nigh and beautiful. it provides all the facilities like library, mess and canteen and hostel facility is also provided . they have wifi and the whole campus is very neat and clean and food is very hygienic. | [academics]: teacher help students with notes and library have all the required books and teachers are highly qualified but they don?t take much for the industrial visit and practical discussion about cas studies took very often . | [placements]: placements here are good tap recruiting campanies come here but only limited companies and approx 50% students gets placed here and the average salary package for bba graduates goes upto 3-4 lakhs p.a. | [campus life]: the campus is great and have multiple events goes on and the food quality of the mess is good the food is tasty and hygienic and students does not face any discrimination here . all the teachers and seniors are very supportive. | [anything else]: my overall experience is good so far i didn?t face problem here and teacher help me with my problems and during the events students enjoy a lot here but placement wise they should bring some more campanies .

[college infrastructure]: good infrastructure. very mordernistic and international level of architecture fully air conditioned classrooms and very big central library with latesttt book sets. the campus is very neat and clean . | [academics]: great academic life and wonderfull and supportive teachers. the university follows latest engineering syllabus and improved customised course content. the the mid semester and end semester exams are conducted in a very faithfull manner. | [placements]: decent placement record with and average of 8.5lpa cse branch and the university has a great track record of good companies visiting for the placement round the student placement percentage is approx 100%. | [campus life]: grt8 life

review_text: chitkara university hiamchal pradesh the fee structure is per semester 70k and the total fees are 5.6 lahks. scholarship provided college nsp, post-matric. any scholarship helps the college and provided. and the job will be provided for 7thsem start placement and all students are placed on last semester. and campus himachal pradesh 20 acresannual festival lohri, dandiya dance, etc, any type all fest are enjoyed, available books are all type on library books ex:c, c++, java, discretmathematices, etc all classroom very good, and all classrooms available ac, fans, lighting, the full facility on classroom on the university level.

[college infrastructure]: vit has high class infrastructure in terms of laboratories, library and hostels. they are very well maintained too. we have very good sports grounds as well. hostels serve hygiene food across all the hostels. | [academics]: the academics here are very challenging and innovative. we follow project based learning. projects we do here help us to get all the fundamentals right and some projects will take shape to startups as well | [placements]: vit has its own records when it comes to placements. vit has a dedicated placements and training cell (pat) which ensures smooth process in placements. large number of companies across all domains visit the campus. packages also sound very good. the average package for a student is quite good too. | [campus life]: campus has cafeteria, swimming pool and gym facilities. there are playgrounds for boys and girls. teachers are also supportive. it takes an 1 - 1.5 hrs from chennai cmbt bus stand or the central railway station by public transport. vit is located near vandalur - kelambakkam road. campus has in and out times for students and is well secured.

review_text: [college infrastructure]: nit agartala has a sprawling campus with a mix of traditional and modern infrastructure. as a b.tech student, i benefit from well-equipped classrooms, a comprehensive library, and dedicated spaces for group work and study. | [academics]: the academic environment at nit agartala is rigorous and focused. the mba program covers key disciplines of engineering. the faculty is knowledgeable and brings a wealth of industry experience to the classroom | [placements]: the placement is quite good at nit agartala but not top-notch. placement cell is dedicated to connecting students with industry opportunities. it organizes placement drives and invites companies to the campus for recruitment.

it's good. the exam structure is very good. there are three exams in the semester. it will be cat-1,cat-2, and fat. fat is the main exam.cat-1 and cat-2 are the internals.cat-2 is the open book exam.cat-1 and cat-2 are 50 marks exam 15percent will be taken.it is the best place for everyone who is interested in labs and sports.if you are interested in any particular sport there will be a club on the sport u will join and enjoy. and labs are very good. all types of instruments are available.

alumni are well settled as they come regularly to our college and gave us inspirational speech to motivate us with their views and experience that they have gained and senior are very helping in nature as they always try to motivate us with new kind of ideasplacement is very good and large variety of jobs are given to us also internship is also provided to us after 3rd year so that we can gain some experience and we have also placement regarding counseling so that we can chose perfect job

campus life in college is an exciting experience filled with opportunities for personal growth, academic advancement, and social connections. students can participate in a wide range of activities, including clubs, sports teams, and events, while also taking advantage of resources like libraries, study centres, and career services. living in dorms or off-campus housing allows for independence and the chance to forge meaningful friendships with peers. the college environment provides a unique and memorable period of life that helps shape students into the individuals they will become.the internships can range from short-term projects to longer-term assignments that last for several months. some popular companies that offer internships include google, amazon, deloitte, goldman sachs, and microsoft. the roles offered under internships can vary based on the company's requirements and the student's skills and interests. they can range from software development, business analysis, financial analysis, marketing, and more
