review_text: [college infrastructure]: yes, my college has all the necessary infrastructure and facilities and equipments. it has the best infrastructure in terms of design. smartboards, hd cameras and iot devices are installed with a good quality. they are well maintained. yes the living spaces are clean. | [academics]: i am studying bachelors of engineering in computer science and the quality of teaching is top notch. the curriculum is always up to date and includes all the recent developments in the field. the curriculum is based on the job-readiness and helps us in placements a lot. | [placements]: the quality of placements are quite good. all the students in the graduating year get placed. 100% of the students got placed. the highest salary package offered was 21lpa and it went to the b.e - c.s.e course. the average salary offered was 6lpa. the placement process was quite smooth and easy and pleasant for me. the college was quite supportive. | [campus life]: the best features of the campus is the quality teaching and good infrastructure. some features such as congestion is a problem else everything is good. students can engage in a lot of activities such as debating clubs, sports club, singing and dancing clubs. the staff is quite supportive. | [anything else]: everything is good

[college infrastructure]: yes, my college has all the necessary infrastructure facility and equipment. well furnished classrooms many students nice teachers , everything is very nice here. wifi connection is not so good it need to be upgraded | [academics]: we have good classrooms here but the number of students are a little more so we sometimes feel a little crowded... teachers are good and take classes properly.. we may ask for help from them anytime we need. | [placements]: placements are average.. the thing is if you study nicely and have confidence to face the tasks then you can get placement easily, nothing comes to worthless people so study well, the placements are good for deserving students

[college infrastructure]: it is one of the best in all over the infrastructure ane so lovely and clean you should definitely go there and check out ...the campus is so cleaned and you will not get any trouble there so thumps up for this. | [academics]: our teachers are highly qualified.the quality of teaching is quite good than other colleges in punjab,although you will not only get classes but also will get online classes during pandemic you can go to the department at time if you have doubts in any question. | [placements]: our placement staff takes more interest on each and every student.in mathematics you will not get placement but you can choose other subject for it ..i am sure you will definitely get ...have a enjoyable life ..go ahead ..yes if you love maths then there is no issue i guess.

[college infrastructure]: wi-fi facility is available in the library and everywhere in the college and with high internet speed too lan ports are available in every hostel room. coming to the latest equipment it is installed in laboratories. sports facilities are awesome with a gym, yoga room, zumba room, cricket ground etc..classrooms are very well maintained. sweepers will clean every day. | [academics]: professors and assistant professors are highly knowledgeable and qualified too.the teaching methods include various activities like projects, assignments, presentations, term papers etc.industry experts visit the college to interact with the all of the students.teachers will always strive for students progress only.they are very strict when it comes to students and their academics. | [placements]: in our college there is a separate teams to look after internship and placement.probably,electrical engineering students get many placement opportunities. the placements for my batch were very very good. the packages offered to the students of other branches are very high.it is the best college to study i think so.

review_text: [college infrastructure]: christ university offers world-class infrastructure with modern classrooms, well-stocked libraries, advanced labs, spacious auditoriums, and excellent sports facilities. it also provides comfortable hostels, dining options, and recreation areas to support holistic student development. | [academics]: christ university is renowned for its academic excellence, offering a diverse range of undergraduate, postgraduate, and doctoral programs across disciplines like arts, science, commerce, management, law, and engineering. it follows a multidisciplinary approach, emphasizing experiential learning, research, and innovation. the curriculum integrates academic rigor with co-curricular activities, supported by highly qualified faculty and industry collaborations. | [placements]: christ university has an excellent placement record with top recruiters like deloitte, ey, kpmg, tcs, and amazon offering roles across diverse sectors. the university provides career training, internships, and competitive salary packages, ensuring strong industry connections and student readiness. | [campus life]: campus life at christ university is vibrant and diverse, offering a mix of academics, cultural events, sports, and extracurricular activities. students enjoy state-of-the-art facilities, active clubs, fests, and a multicultural environment that fosters creativity, collaboration, and personal growth.

[college infrastructure]: our college has all the necessary infrastructure, facilities and equipment. we have vast classrooms, and we are also provided with lan in the campus. proper hygeine is mantained in the college and the college is filled with greenery. | [academics]: i am studying b.tech mechanical engineering in nit rourkela. the teachers here are very experienced and helpful. it is updated with new curriculum. it is ranked as 3rd best colleges among nit. the clubs here are the next most important which will help you to get a practical vision of what you are studying. | [placements]: most of the students studying here got recruited in large companies like microsoft, infosys etc. the placement process is easy and pleasant here. it runs amooth. teachera here help in getting placed into good companies. | [campus life]: campus life is quite pleasant and the student activity club is the most important thing which we have to refer over here. the college is having a hospital as wel as a doctor so in case of emergency we can handle it.

this was the best course available at my jee rank, so i chose this college over my choice of branch. the faculty-student ratio is about 1:20. most of the professors are pretty much well-qualified and experienced. but there is a chunk of young training assistants that are new to the job. exam time is the most hectic time of the year, the entire process is very tiresome and very strict. the evaluation is too strict too.moksha and innovision are the cultural and technical fest of nsut. conducted in march. one of the best college experiences is through the fest. the sports authority in college keeps on hosting regular sports weeks throughout the year.

review_text: [college infrastructure]: bit college is the best college i ever study. college infiltration is very good. all types of facilities are available. libraries, classrooms, laboratories, sports ground, gym are available for the students. | [academics]: the quality of teaching colleges is best. teachers are strict and kind towards the students. assignments and project work are given to the students. in this college, teachers focus on practical work more than theory work. | [placements]: the quality of placement in the college is good. up to 60 to 70% student get placed in good company or average company. the highest charity package offered by the company is 6lpa. the policeman process is not too easy not too tough.

we have two annual fests in our college, one is a technical fest called gravitas, and the other is a cultural fest called riviera. the fests are very well organized and they call a lot of big-name celebrities in our fests. our library is the best i have seen in my whole life. it seems like there are billions of books in there and it has a great silent study environment. all the classrooms are equipped with smartboards and all labs have the latest technology equipment. we can play all the popular sports here on campus and there are gyms available as well. there are also more than 100 clubs and chapters where your seniors guide and train you to gain more skills.i always had an interest in cse since the 10th grade when i was first properly introduced to coding i always had a keen interest in statistics so i chose the specialization of data science which is an emerging field. the faculty-student ratio is about 15:1. the faculties are very well qualified and have a lot of knowledge however, there are obviously a few exceptions and some are really bad teachers. we have term exams at the end of each semester and we have our continuous assessment tests almost every 45 days, however up until now, i have found them relatively easy as you can study only one night in advance and still get decent marks.

[college infrastructure]: yes iit kanpur is well equiped and has all the necesaary infrastructure, faicilities and equipment. also class contains wifi and smart board and mainly professors teach with the help of them only. yes the living spaces are clean . | [academics]: i am currently enrolled in material science and engineering. the quality of teaching in iit is top among all other engineering colleges. yes, iit kanpur has updated curriculum and includes all recent developments in the field. | [placements]: iit is premiere insitute in india , threfore placements rate are high and every year almost every student get placed. in this institute there are lots of opportunities to gain knowledge and pursue into career.

review_text: pros/cons: i like the hostel facilities which id given to students i like the main academic builiding in which we study i like that the college is not that big campus the college is open so anybody can roam in the college this does not allow us to keep vehicle with us the number of fest are ok as compared to other colleges | placement experience: the placement of this college is actually good, people come here for placement , because rest thing s i cant say much, but for the placements this a bery good college to do btech and get a job in 4 year

review_text: [college infrastructure]: yeah, college have the good infrastructure with all the good facilities. college have all the practical required equipment. library contains more than 10000 books. e-library / digital library is provided to a student. projectors are installed to each classroom. the area of it is clean and greenery and also gets hygienic food. | [academics]: the professor of this college teaches very well and also makes clear the doubt of the students. all the professor's of each department motivate to the students. our curricular activities are also up-to-date. | [placements]: the placement records of our college is good. every year minimum 80% students got placed. our college is supportive regarding placement cell. the maximum package goes around 10-15 lpa and average package around 5-8 lpa. | [campus life]: our college is fully evergreen. campus life here is very enjoyable as the people around are very helpful and friendly. the location is very safe . the staff and faculty members are really supportive.

review_text: [college infrastructure]: this is one of the best private universities in india with modern infrastructure.it provides good facility here , you can visit here. you will see all the things here. class rooms are fully furnished with air conditioning. | [academics]: i am pursuing b. tech cse. i have always been a fan of technology, that's why i choose this branch. i truly believe that my curriculum is updated. in addition to this, we also get some workshops and guest lectures by industry experts which is really very beneficial. almost all of the faculty are pg holders except few. one negative aspect is that sometimes faculties tend to do a lot of teaching through ppts which seems so boring. | [placements]: almost 80% of the students got placed in our on-campus placements. capgemini and cognizant are top recruiting companies. top roles offered are software developer engineer and web developer. recently tanya arora got placed in microsoft with a salary package of 42 lpa, which is the highest. | [campus life]: we have full-time access to library. it is under 24/7 cctv surveillance, and security guards are everywhere. internet access is available in every hostel and building. food is hygienic and sufficient in quantity (although only vegetarian), tea and snacks are also provided in the evening, and house-keeping staff come to our room to clean every 2nd day. there are smart classes, and the faculty members teach us via presentations. feedback and complaint systems are there, and you can also request fo

[college infrastructure]: nit silchar offers great infrastructure and facilities. there are 10 boys hostel and 3 girls hostel(one more was proposed to be built). the newer hostels are good and clean but the older ones need some work. the food quality is good except for 1st year hostels(they are trying to improve now). library is well equipped and is the best structure in nit silchar. | [academics]: most faculty are good what they teach and care about the students. you will meet some wonderful faculty here supporting you in extracurricular. the academic work load here is a bit large, but so is the education quality. | [placements]: the average placement package this year was 14.39 lpa with highest being 80+ lpa from csa. the overall placement percentage is about 89 percent. placement of branches like mechanical and civil has also been very appealing this year. | [campus life]: you will really enjoy the campus life here. in summer, you might sometime regret but the solution is there in library. the green and blue view of the campus. student life here is pretty enjoyable with so many fests and events to attend.

pros/cons: my college experience is enriching, with a well-structured curriculum , knowledgeable faculty, and hands-on learing opportunities . the vibrant campus life , active student clubs. supportive peers made social interactions enjoyable the administrative processes were sometimes slow and inefficirnt some courses felt outdated and lacked practical applications additionally, campus amenities like wifi and hostel facilites needed better maintenanv=ce and upgrades | placement experience: placement at my college were decent , with students becoming aligible from the sixth semester .several reputed compani es visited, offering roles in it and core engineering fields. companies like samsung etc visites my college

review_text: the annual festival of aec is named pyrokinesis and the annual technology fest is named udbhavanam which are both held together in the month of march. the library needs a serious update but yes there are books available in the library and dates are given for the collection of books from the library. the classrooms in the main building are good and have smartboards and projectors as well. the scene of sports and extracurricular activities in our college is good. there are some social groups run by the students of our college along with a lot of clubs namely sovic, coding club, robotics club etc.i chose btech in electrical engineering because this allows me to go to core sector jobs as well as it jobs. the student-to-faculty ratio is 18:1 in our department. the professors are all phd and master qualified. just like any other college, some teachers are very good at their skills while others struggle a bit at teaching but overall it depends on the student. the class tests carry high importance and are done timely and the finals are also done timely and can be passed with a decent effort but for good marks, more than a decent effort is required.

[college infrastructure]: the environment of dsce is very pleasant with greenery all around. you will fall in love with the campus. the classrooms,labs,canteens,hostels,library,washrooms are all well equipped and maintained well. the mess food is not so good but you can manage. the library of the college is the best part with a huge variety. it is open from 9 am to 9 pm for students from monday to saturday.the sports area should have been bigger.the only demerit for the hostel is common washrooms and the price - 1.22lpa | [academics]: i chose dsce based on my comedk rank. it comes under one of the best colleges in karnataka.one can easily get dsce with an average rank. placements are quite okay compared to other private colleges. the faculty is peace. they are friendly to everyone. overall it's a decent college for an average student to excell. best thing about dsce is the students are very friendly. the environment is diverse. we get a lot of exposure and extra co-curricular activities and workshops. | [placements]: i am in first year now but i have heard from my seniors that the placement for computer science is very good i.e. about 100% . the college is growing day by day and now the placement of telecom which is my department is growing. overall 75% placement we can say. | [campus life]: in terms of campus dsce is best. the area around dsce is very good. the campus has it's own gym also. the environment inside the campus is very beautiful. it feels soothing sitting in the campus. students and teachers are very friendly. and we all know that there are some strict teachers too everywhere but it's fine. we can see diversity inside the campus as there are students from every corner of india. everything is available just outside the campus from flats,pgs,restaurants,to stalls.
college_name: Dayananda Sagar College of Engineering Bangalore

review_text: [college infrastructure]: infrastructure is really nice.the hostel amenities are adequate for students and the classes are good but uses outdated chairs and desks and architecture is not that great and intuitive as well. it has got three hostels, two inside the campus and one outside the campus at a walking distance. the hostel outside the campus has better facilities then the ones in campus. | [academics]: the faculty members are helpful whenever students want guidance or have a query. the curriculum is upto date and recent case studies are incorporated in the course. the faculty members use a presentation approach and take into account the recent happenings while explaining topics making it easy for students to understand and adapt. | [placements]: the final placements at are really great with companies from different domains such as finance, marketing, strategy, operations and trade as well offering a variety of roles. the recruiters attending the placements include big names like jp morgan chase, goldman sachs, amazon, godrej and itc. similar is the case for summer placements.

[college infrastructure]: the infrastructure is great with wifi classrooms, technology upgraded teaching tools and techniques. alongvwith ac centralised classes, it have projectors, tutorial rooms, multiple libraries, a state-of-the-art seminar rooms along with multiple fully equipped auditoriums. | [academics]: it provides everything including practical and theoretical knowledge as per the subjects. with various assessments, hands-on projects, and research opportunities it enrich learning in a better and interesting way for students and makes them career ready. | [placements]: the college have good alymni networks, which helps in mentoring and supporting students in their career development. ithave great connections with mncs, which provides them internships and career counselling events. | [campus life]: campus life is great, everyone is fun living and friendly, including the staff, classmates and other people. it takes care of students in every possible way through providing them basic amenities like, sports fields, hospitals, canteens, cafes etc.

[college infrastructure]: iit bhu during my time had all the basic amenities in hostel. we had access to centralized ac library which had access to internet enabled computers. the sports ground was just in front of my hostel, which i liked the most. | [academics]: professors are top notch in terms of their knowledge, however, they may not be giving their best in teaching since they are more involved in research work. if student approaches them for anything, professors would surely help in academics. | [placements]: iit bhu offers one of the best placements in india, i myself had bagged a job of around 10 lpa during my time in 2014. most my batch was placed by the end of feb, 2014. but one needs to be serious in their studies, only then college can help you get good placements. | [campus life]: just one word awesome, i changed myself completely during my 4 years spent at iit bhu. i participated in technex fest, made some awesome friends. and those ghats of river ganga, the peace that one can find there, it is possible only at iit bhu, varanasi. | [anything else]: overall it was a good experience. would love to spend the same time again if it is possible by travelling back in time.

review_text: [college infrastructure]: the infrastructure of the college is good and some facilities are also very good. equipment are also good in conditions. classrooms are also very clean and hygiene is always there in college. sports centre is also very good. | [academics]: i have done my mba from there this year only and the placements are not good. the quality of teaching are not good. teachers are very poor in their skills, they should change their teachers then only the quality of study will increase there, otherwise this college will remain same as it is today. | [placements]: the quality of placements are very poor here. only 50% of out batch got placed which is very bad. average was only 6 lakhs which is very low what they charge in comparision. placement process is very bad here.

pros/cons: its a beautiful place to study in with so much of nature in and around manipal and the boy girl ratio is a little weird there are so many boys than girls there are a lot of perks like getting discounts in the hospital which is kmc and also everything is free except the medicines on which 10% discount can be availed on being a student the labs, libraries and the teachers are very friendly, and the labs & libraries themselves are really well maintained the weather is unpredictable in the first semester so much of rain, can't wear shoes, all ways have an umbrella and i mean its kinda an advantage and disadvantage cuz one thing the rain makes manipal really beautiful the heat here is so much in the summers, but it makes sense cuz its a costal city i guess you can take it as an advantage and a disadvantage that the campus is big, to get from one place of the campus to another place is an adventure in its own but yes it is quite a journey going to architecture building for a stroll | placement experience: from what i have heard the min cgpa required for campus placements is 7 and the average package was around 10.49 lpa the highest however was 51lpa. the number of recruiters were around 200+ , the companies that visited are accenture, wells fargo, tcs, deloitte, amazon, microsoft, google and many other companies. the placement rate was around 72% to 73%. my plan after getting my degree is to continue with my job in australia for around 2 to 3 years and pursue my career in aviation i.e. become a pilot

pros/cons: most of the holy and sacred places are close to our campus and that's to me biggest novelty that our university has. also our university has the best security as nobody can enter without showing their i card. lastly our faculties who are hold accountable for students performance. hostel is good but mess is too worse as i don't know what kind of food do they serve. | placement experience: placements for law school are very very low indeed and out of total 180 students not more than 20-30 even get placed. seminars and top brass are invited to guide students how can they take their career forward but not many direct placements happen.

[college infrastructure]: our college infrastructure is one of the best i have seen. all facilities available . all are good . classrooms , laboratories, libraries, sports centres and hostels are good . no one feel difficulty in our campus. we can access free wifi. smart boards are also avilable and they are well maintained. and all places are hygenic | [academics]: faculties good and experienced. but the curriculum lacks the practical implementation needed for the industry. including recent developments in the specific field would help students more in securing the jobs. | [placements]: the placements are good , the college has placements in the companies of food like nestle , biocon etc they their average salary depends on their skills and they have a placements cell where a student can easily come up with his queries. | [campus life]: the campus is amazing it has a basketball ball court , amphitheater, and a huge auditorium they encourage in cultural activities and there's a park the canteens are also good but a bit expensive , the location is safe and for emergency there's a hospital nearby and there are many amazing restaurants besides you can have much fun.

review_text: [college infrastructure]: the campus serves one of the best experience to eyes.the infra fulfills all the basic amenities like the air conditioning ,wifi etc.so overall the infra is up to date for the comfort of students and all the staffs. | [academics]: the academics is top notch without any doubts also because the professors do their job well in giving out the best and updated knowledge to the students making the students prepared to fight the world better. | [placements]: also because the academics holds the student in their right minds ,every year the students grab the best placement opportunities as well making it the right place for assured placements as the students become skilled and independent.

udbhav is the annual feast that happens in our college, and we also have our kannada rajyotsava fest at the end of the odd semester. our college has a vast library facility, and most of the classrooms are well equipped with projectors and stuff. we have a deca office which looks after the cultural stuff. and for the sports and all, we have good playground facilities and also have annual sports. we have a lot of technical teams for race car building, aircraft building and drones as well names of them are quatlas, velocita, stire racing, editha, and volante. all these clubs are run by students and for the students.mechanical is a well-known branch in ramaiah and also it has good placement which is the reason i joined this branch. ramaiah has good strength of faculty. all faculty are highly qualified but the teaching methodology is not good for all the faculty, most of them are good. due to admission during covid we won't get enough time for our exam preparation and the difficulty level of the paper is medium it's not too easy nor too difficult.

[college infrastructure]: the infrastructure was excellent. it was built in a good area with zero traffic zone. the campus was 2 acres and provides separate hostels for girls and boys. they also provide good gardening on the college premises. the climate was good, and the food in the hostel was not up to the mark but students can manage it. | [academics]: the best faculty members in the world. the staff had international exposure where students can earn much knowledge from them. they will help students if they were not able to understand. most of the faculty members were ph.d. holders who had a lot of knowledge and experience. | [placements]: this college will provide students with the best companies for applying for jobs. even in a hard time, i.e lockdown students use to get a lot of opportunities from the campus itself. i am from marketing specialization and i got placed in of the reputed it company for corporate sales | [campus life]: the college campus is best for students and teachers are very supportive to students in making the events and activities in college surrounding | [anything else]: no

[college infrastructure]: yes it has a library , medical unit, sports centre and fields , classrooms ,hostels and wifi and other net connections are being provided. moreover there are cafes and food stalls inside campus for refreshments and these areas are regularly cleaned ,are well maintained and hygienic. | [academics]: mechanical engineering bcz that was stream i was alloted to. the teaching quality is good many teachers opt for one on one conversation and doubt planning and are extremely supporting . and yes it makes you job ready provided u also give in effort and the curriculum is updated | [placements]: avg salary value is 7-8 lakh per annum . college is supportive but students will also have to try on their own to be completely safe . the highest % was 80 approx. mostly the quality of placements is good. | [campus life]: college campus is very good and spacious enough to hold large scale events. many activities are organised in which students can take part like quizzes, hackathons, competitive events including arts , treasure hunts and many more. everyone is friendly and the location is also good and has many nearby facilities and can very well handle emergencies

i got a rank of 1298 in jee advanced exam and chose electrical engineering. the faculty is great and helpful and the main thing which helps you to get good score in exams is the previous year's paper. some exams are easy whereas some are difficult. in iit kanpur roughly 200 students are there in the electrical department.life on campus is great. there is a club for every sport and activity and you can enjoy whatever you want. there is a music club, dance club and many more. the facilities are just awesome. currently, the swimming pool is under maintenance.

review_text: [college infrastructure]: since our college is a private university it has all the necessary infrastructure, facilities and most of the equipment required by its students. our college campus is fully connected to wi-fi. our classrooms are well maintained and its laboratories are well equipped. moreover our university has a separate block for sports and gym. the hostel facility is also very good and the food served to the hostlers is also of very good standard. | [academics]: our faculty of teachers is well trained and learnt. since i'm currently pursuing computer science, our most of the daily task is done on the personal laptops. in college most of the task from learning to making assignments is done by the students but it is very grateful that our teachers help and support us the at most they could do. our professors has experience in almost every aspect of our field. | [placements]: the placement cell in our university is very good. our university arranges special classes for the students who are preparing for the placements. the top recruiters in our university are tcs, infosys, wipro. mncs like amazon, adobe, microsoft also comes to our university for placements. | [campus life]: the campus-life of our university is just amazing. various clubs of our university organises various events like dj-nights and stand-up comedy nights which are full of fun and excitement. our university also conducts many hacking events and students get very good exposure.
college_name: Chitkara University Institute of Engineering and Technology Jhansla

review_text: [college infrastructure]: the college infrastructure is just awesome and has all the necessary facilities like sports complex, labs, lawns, etc. and having labs for all the students. all the classrooms are in very good condition. | [academics]: i am currently pursuing btech in computer science because i love coding and i have an interest in it. quality of teaching is very good and proper curriculum is there for everything. our placement cell has been built is very nice. | [placements]: quality of placements is just fantastic. around 70% of students got placed this year which is a very good thing for the very first batch. average salary is around 7 lpa and highest packaged offered is 21 lpa.
college_name: Indian Institute of Information Technology Pune

review_text: [college infrastructure]: yes ,it has all necessary infrastructure facilities and equipment like hostel,cricket ground,basketball court,badminton court,volleyball court,library,lift in buildings,wifi area available everywhere in hostel, classroom and library and main building. 4 canteen is available inside the campus. mess food is good and quality is also good,3 lakes are in the campus. swimming ,gym , is also there in the college. | [academics]: quality of teaching in our college is excellent. teachers are very supportive and if you follow all class and teacher's guidance you will got good cgpa and good for your job as well. i'm currently studying in mechanical department, where teacher's are very good. | [placements]: placement scanerio of our college is also good. in mechanical branch, last year(in 2022) one student get package of 1.2 crore(international offer). and average salary of our branch is around 6 lpa and overall is also around 5 lpa. college support in placement and it is easy for students to get placed in good company. | [campus life]: campus life our college is also good, seniors are very supporting. best thing of campus is fully greeny campuand worst thing is the old building because this is 2nd oldest engineering college of india. yes location of our college is also good and it is safe for students as well.
college_name: Indian Institute of Engineering Science and Technology Shibpur

review_text: [college infrastructure]: the college infrastructre is amazing. wifi is good here and yes the college does have smart boards and a cool sportorium. the college's hostels are very very clean. the library is really cool as well. overall chitkara has a very good infrastucture. | [academics]: i am currently doing b.e (cse). the teachers here are experts in their subject. the curriculum is very good and is updated. we get a lot of free time too so that we can focus on building our personal skills as well. | [placements]: the placements of chitkara are fine. i know that my seniors have got placements averaging 5-6 lakh and some have even got 10-20 lakh. the placement totally depends on you. you'll ofcourse get the platform, but your package depends on how good are you in the interviews. | [campus life]: chitkara's campus is quite good. we have places like sportorium, a big auditorium, football and cricket grounds etc. that are basically the soul of the campus. the staff is really really supportive. .
college_name: Chitkara University Institute of Engineering and Technology Jhansla

review_text: [college infrastructure]: canteen is not so good, but i would say that the rolls station is the best i have had till now, and if anybody is reading then there is a hawker outside the campus who sells the best chicken biryani. classrooms and libraries are well maintained and fully air-conditioned. there is no internet problem even if you are at a corner of the campus some of the other wi-fi will catch you to provide connection. | [academics]: the basic curriculum here is that teachers are helpful if you approach them and if you don't then no one will, it's a simple life rule and that's what is being nicely followed here and i like it that way. the teaching quality is more effective here because most teachers are young and they get into student's mind of this era quickly. | [placements]: most recently 86.9% of the whole batch students got placed, and the rest chose further studies. talking about the salary package, a regular person will get a regular package, but if you have the caliber and if you have collected all the information and strong concepts then you will touch every endeavor of your life whether it private university and government college no doubt the companies here are the best. although their motive is that no one remains unpaid, but you have to show your caliber.

[college infrastructure]: nmamit's well-designed campus supports learning through fully digitized classrooms, dedicated research zones, campus wi-fi, libraries, cafeterias, clean hostels, and athletic amenities for a balanced student life | [academics]: courses are designed for real-world relevance, blending academic knowledge with fieldwork and lab experience. continuous assessments, faculty feedback, and workshops enrich the student learning journey. | [placements]: the college has built a strong placement record. students are recruited by tech giants, and support from the placement cell includes skill-building session and internship from early semesters, with competitive salary packages.
college_name: NMAM Institute of Technology Karkala Taluk

review_text: [college infrastructure]: nitw has good infrastructure like mega hostel (1.8k) for 1st years. we have decent lab equipments and all basic facilities. college wifi is excellent in terms of speed, sometimes it will be slow. coming to libraries,sport centres,hostels are good nothing to complain. food for 1st year students 2 out of 5 rating and remaining year students 4 out of 5 rating . everything is well-maintained , if there is an issue ,then it will dealt as soon as possible. living spaces are clean and food is hygienic. | [academics]: academics are excellent in nitw. professors are good at teaching and they are friendly towards students. seniors help juniors not only in academics but also other stuff. as i am cse student , i felt that pscp professors ( first years ) are not extraordinary and professors for second,third and fourth years are too good. i think we should not have labs until offline sem. what professors teach is okay to get a job , but to get good package they learn more stuff. | [placements]: in nitw , placements are outstanding. in 2020 ,placements are 100 percentage and the highest salary package offered is around fifty one lakhs , i do not know exact figure and it is for a eee student. the average salary offered for a national institute of technology warangal student is around thirteen lakhs . i do not know about placement process because i am first year student. i guess college is supportive , which was confirmed from a outgoing senior who got good job and a good salary 15 lakhs. | [campus life]: as i am in first year , studying in online sem , i do not know about campus life. my seniors told it's excellent . about its location, warangal, a very good place . i hope to have a offline sem to enjoy my college life.

every year amity organises aura where there are numerous events for days and there are many fests for technology, fashion, management etc quarterly. our library has 13000 approx hard copy books and many soft copies. the library is made of two floors where a student can study with peace of mind. each classroom has a mic with a speaker for faculties with comfortable chairs for the student where a student can seat in class with relaxation. the classroom contains a whiteboard with a projector, ac, fan, lights and internet wifi for the students. there are numerous extracurricular activities which are organised every 15 days and there is an annual sport named sangathan where every player from each campus of amity comes to the noida campus for the match. and there are sports competitions which is organised quaterly. when we talk about social groups. clubs. there are many clubs for dance, music, coding, robotics etc. made by students.i have an interest in coding that why i have taken admitted to btech cse in amity they offer a variety of courses for every degree. for example, i am learning french for the past 2 years. the course provides us best knowledge for the industry fit level. faculties are highly qualified and they provide us best knowledge according to the student. btech students are taught by the faculties who have completed their phd and the methodology of the faculties o teach the students are best as they understand the student thoughts. exams are conducted at the end of the semester, faculties also take tests once in a month. the level of the exams is normal not very easy not hard, if the student had attended the class they can clear it.

campus life here is awesome. every time something is going on at the university. which includes celebrities in it. unifest is one of the main events organized by the student council in the university itself. we have three libraries with ac in them which have plenty amount of books. classrooms do have ac, projectors, fans, lights, etc. sports and extra curriculum activities are good here which are handled by galgotias student council. many clubs come under the galgotias student council. ncc training, photography club ( cam circle), dance club, debate club, management club.i choose this course because i was already studying pythons in my 12 class due to which i developed an interest in this field. this university has good faculties it all depends on how eagerly a student wants to study. all the faculty here have done ph.d. in their specific subject they are highly qualified. per semester, there are 5 exams. 2 cat exams, 2 ias, 1 et, these exams are held in a gap of approx 1 month. cat- common assessment test. ia- internal assessment, ete- end-term examination.

course curriculum is really nice . those people will set certain guidelines what we need to do and study and also provide guidelines to faculty members what to teach and how.and coming to exam structure it was nice because once upon a time if you have knowledge of 50 percent of syllabus you can get good marks but now the situation changed if you want to get good marks you need to have nearly 85 percentage of knowledge which is required for the good engineerthat's pretty interesting to discuss every year we have fests and cultural programs and annual day which are mostly celebrated in open auditorium which is really nice..and we mostly celebrate january 12 national youth day..and engineers day kind that those are really inspiring because various ips and other delegates come to inspire you to better yourself as a good engineer

techo blitz is the annual feast in the college there are 3 days 1st is the traditional day, 2nd is bollywood day, 3rd is sports day, those are conducted mostly in the 2nd semester. mit has the biggest library in the region. projectors and fan's light benches are available in the classroom. extra curricular activities are conducted as per students' requests. nature and eco-club and many more clubs are available.my goal was to do chemical engineering, so i chose a sub-branch, there are sufficient enough faculty members, and overall faculty is good but some are not helping in nature, most of the faculty members are phd holders. term exams were taken after every two months and their difficulty was good enough.

[college infrastructure]: in terms of infrastructure , facilities iit hyderabad is one of the best college. there are all necessary facilities, banks, stationery,cafe,post office everything is there. it was my dream to study in one of the iit and finally i achieved it. college environment is very good. | [academics]: i had a decent academics experience. there are many things to do. campus is very beautiful. professor's are so good and makes us understand everything. the curriculum is flexible and provides a student with the chance to explore different things . it is updated and includes all the recent research and developments. | [placements]: placements are damn . more than 80% students got placed in big mncs with a fair salary package. placement process is quite good their is placement cell which helps students in every aspect. the college is also very supportive. overall you can find a good quality of placements here.

[college infrastructure]: superb infrastructure there is lot to explore in it ...and good facilities and cooperative faculties and nice mess and hostel facilities and separate labs are good enough specially lecture hall is amazing..... | [academics]: good and amazing facultie,can get help from teachers at anytime goodstudy materials and good understandable laungauge of teachers ,skill development programs are specially good for placement and other sources... | [placements]: almost every student will get placements ,the skill development programs and internships helps to secure good progress in academics and placements and good compines approach and top companies hire the students from this clg

review_text: pros/cons: first thing the campus environment was so good teaching faculty, the professors were amazing library and other facilities were really good felt bit of peer pressure as every one will be behind marks discrimination based of marks we get in the exams hostel fee was sky rocketing every year as they started increasing every year | placement experience: the placement opportunities were so good. as per my knowledge is concerned every year more than 300 companies visit campus and most of the students get their jobs in the campus itself which is a great thing about the college

[college infrastructure]: college have all the basic necessary infrastructure that a student requires. the classrooms, library, laboratories, hostels, sports facilities all are of top notch. overall , the college infrastructure is well designed and can help students in their growth. | [academics]: currently pursuing bemba(ece) as i have interest in both the streams. the quality of faculty members is a significant indicator of academic strength. highly qualified, experienced, and dedicated faculty members are there in the college. | [placements]: the campus placement is really good. placement generally refers to campus placements, which are conducted by colleges and universities to connect their students with job opportunities. it is an important aspect of the career development process.

review_text: [college infrastructure]: iit roorkee has the best infrastructure i have seen ever. you will have all the necessary equipment available there which you will need throughout your research work. the james thomson building will be one of the best thing you have seen. | [academics]: i am studying in mechanical department ( production and industrial engineering ), currently studying in 2nd year i have a good experience regarding the teaching in my first year. but as the things go online due to pandemic the screen time of nearly 7-8 hours a day goes worst for us. | [placements]: comparing to other iits i will refer iit roorkee as the best institute regarding placements, the reason for that is you will get placed and your branch will not be any obstacle in it. i have seen many students of other iits who struggle for placements because their branches are not cse, iitr is not between them. | [campus life]: campus life is awesome! just come here and you will get a 'chapo'.

pros/cons: when i arrived here , i liked the hostel and the mess engaging in various activities , clubs and participating in campus life. the placement rate of this college is awesome. this college is running on the other campus. lack of infrastructure but placements of this college is very good the attendance (75 % ) is compulsory . you have to maintain your attendance. | placement experience: the placement of my college is exceptional. students become eligible for campus placements from the 6th semester onwards. companies and offers : google microsoft atlassian tcs amazon highest package around 82 lpa(atlassian) median package 11 lpa around 80% of students secure placements. pursue higher studies , enterpreneurship.

review_text: placements in nsut are the crazy maximum number of students who got placements. 2nd the year onwards companies started to come for internships. the highest package was like 1.2cr average package for cs was likely 20lakh.my plans are not decided yet after getting a degreethe fee structure is a bit expensive as it is a government college, the college provides some scholarships for the top 5 percent of students and there are plenty of opportunities for jobs in college. overall it is a nice college.

[college infrastructure]: yes, collage has good infrastructure with requires no of labs and classrooms classrooms are air conditionered. there is a central library with many useful books. it's very hygiene. cleanliness is maintained properly | [academics]: i m studing electrical engineering branch here. the professors are enough qualified and the curriculum is upto date and if we follow the guidance of the professors and seniors then it will lead to a good job . | [placements]: i m a 2 nd year student so dont have in depth knowledge but as far as i have heard yes its good for all branches rest can be checked on website this year the highest package is 39 lakh given by amazon and microsoft | [campus life]: campus life is remarkable. there is greenry and fresh air all over the campus . many clubs are there including sac, coding clubs ,dance, music drama etc there are also cultural fests like utkansh and technical fest like techniti.

review_text: [college infrastructure]: the infrastructure of our college is good. it provides facilities like wi-fi, labs, classrooms, and a library. the quality of hostels is at the next level. everything is good. the food served is good. every room is equipped with wi-fi and lan. the internet also has a good speed. it provides 24x7 electricity for students. | [academics]: staff members in our college are well-experienced and knowledgeable. the course curriculum is relevant, and it makes students industry-ready. semester exams are a bit difficult, but the difficulty level is medium. the pass percentage of the college is 70%. | [placements]: almost all the students get placed in our college. the highest salary package offered is 15 lpa. the average salary package offered is 7 lpa. the minimum salary package offered is 3.5 lpa. the top recruiting company that visits our college for placements is tcs. almost all the students from our course got an internship in companies like onestop and spark foundation. roles offered in our course are web development and cyber security.

my branch is enc ie electronics and computer. this is a new branch and aanuup growingone. this course provides both knowledge and skill in electronics as well as computer fields. the faculty here are ok. but still, in the end, you have to work out yourself. quality teachers are there but only oneper branch. teaching methods need improvement. due to covid mid term exams were held within one and a half months after arrival. this course is very expensive though, at least you need to have 30 lakhs in your pocket to complete 4 yeats least east in renowned branches.campus life is good. there are various societies in thapar. various events happen every year. sports facilities are not up to that level, only one badminton court, one main basketball court, swimming pool is also there. the lecture classes are having ac but only that which are built recently there are many societies both tech as well as nontech. such as mlsc ( microsoft learning society ), mudra edc( internship development cell ), etc. tech fests are held every one and a half months.
college_name: Thapar Institute of Engineering and Technology - [Thapar University]

review_text: [college infrastructure]: yes, it has all the necessary infrastructure, facilities and equipment. we have all the books we might need in the libraries, pc in laboratories are all well-maintained and we have college wi-fi available 24/7 on student id. yes, the spaces are quite clean and hygienic and food is also good. | [academics]: i'm currently pursuing masters in computer application because i've always had an interest in computer application. quality of teaching is good too. we are updated in some criteria and some we're not but yes i think what we study makes us job ready. | [placements]: as far as i know the quality of placement is good as most of the students get placed and some even get a very high paying job. highest package yet is 84.2 lakh and it was allotted to a btech cs student. average is 5-8lakh. yes it was easy and my college was very supportive. | [campus life]: we have many clubs student can join to have a good experience and we have fates, fest, annual carnival and many more things around the year. students are helpful and friendly. teachers are very helpful too. location is quite safe. i've been in this college for approximately 4 years and i never felt unsafe due to any reason or anyone. yes it can handle emergencies.

[college infrastructure]: the college has limited wi-fi, excellent library with 10,000 plus books, and good classroom environment. the hostel facilities are excellent, and you get healthy food and water. food will be provided both in south indian and north indian style. medical facilities are available. a canteen is available, but there is no night canteen. maybe, there will be a tender that may pass on in the future. sports facilities like basketball and volleyball courts are available. | [academics]: good faculty members who are great mentors for us to succeed. very nice atmosphere and training system for students to understand and get real world exposure.make sure us to internship in respected field | [placements]: the placement cell and team was very supportive and they were happy to support us at any level for our success. i highly recommend this college to everyone for their great career to achieve their goals. every year, the number of placements and percentage was very high.

[college infrastructure]: l.p.u is made on 600 acres of land. the infrastructure is amazing. all facilities are available. including its own mall , bakery ,gaming zone ,gym , cafe coffee day , playing grounds , all class room furnished with ac and projectors , full of greenery. huge auditoriums. | [academics]: l.p.u offers more than 300 courses or programs.all classes are held in english language for the convenience of all the students from all over the india and world. lactures and tutorial both helds seperately for convenience of students.all labs have the latest machines and instruments. | [placements]: placements are amazing. students of l.p.u are working all over the world in companies of very high reputation like google, microsoft, facebook etc. college gives full opportunities to students to get placed. | [campus life]: campus life for student is full of fun and enjoyable. l.p.u is full of adventure. in l.p.u celebrities always pay visit regularly. coke studio , sunburn edm comes every year.

[college infrastructure]: college has necessary infrastructure and equipment.it has big ground with well maintained hostel and classroom.food of hostel are hygienic.college has laboratories and research centre .hostel gives wifi and common room in which they play indoor games and watch television. | [academics]: i am studying computer science and engineering because i am interested in learning about computer application from childhood.college has experience and expert faculty.curriculum is updated with recent development. | [placements]: in malaviya national institute of technology almost all student are placed with good package. in my course computer science and engineering almost all student was place with average package of 10 lacs and highest package of 35 lacs .one can go through placement statistics. | [campus life]: campus life is very enjoyable.senior are very helpful .guards are very active at day and night .
college_name: Malaviya National Institute of Technology Jaipur

review_text: i chose btech cse as i am fond of coding and have some great ideas, the class ratio is 70:5 there are men boys and fewer girls the professors here are top-notch and very experienced there are 2 exams in a sem, one mid sem and another end sem and like this, we have 8 sem,2 sem a year for 4 years of college.this college is famous for its fests and all, it happens in jan and feb. there is a big library full of books and lots of amenities for the classes there is a huge sports complex which has everything one needs, the societies are also very famous here.

[college infrastructure]: yes, our college provides all the necessary equipment and facility to students. it is one of the most beautiful campus with greenery spread all across the campus. laboratories, classrooms are very good and clean daily. food is hygienic. | [academics]: i am studying civil engineering because i have interest in buildings and construction. curriculum is not so updated but it needs some changes. quality of teaching is good. all teachers support students. | [placements]: placement is approx 80% in this college. not all gets placed. those students who work hard gets placed in good companies. our campus placement cell is supportive and call many companies for recruitment. | [campus life]: students, teachers and staff are supportive. location is also safe.

campus life is chill with a focus on studying, and well being of students. the annual fest engifest always happens in the 2nd or 3rd week of feb with over 50,000 students attending the fest last year. there are various books available in the library and university also organizes various sports (interdepartmental - arina) and technical fest (innova).the placement is excellent at the university for the b.tech course. students can participate in internship opportunities from the third year and placement opportunities from the fourth year. the average package is also about 15-20 lpa for cs students. various companies like google, microsoft, and atlassian visit the college.

[college infrastructure]: classrooms are nice overall. hostels are available for both boys and girls but are less in number. labs have all the major essential equipments and reagents. labs are a little small in size. there is one library in institute. sports centre has been recently established. 24/7 wifi is available at college and hostels as well. | [academics]: faculties teach well but give a lot of attention to class attendance. i am in biotechnology department of nit raipur. teachers particularly emphasize on the academics of the students. students are made to visit industries related to the field of study. | [placements]: highest placement offere at the college was 32 lpa to the students of it/cse department. average placement in biotechnology department goes 5-6 lpa. 50-60% of total students get placed during the placement drives.

[college infrastructure]: the classrooms are huge.they are equipped with speakers. they are spacious and have very good ventilation. the departments look fine, and the labs are equipped with almost all equipment. the apparatus and instruments are a bit old but are fine for learning. | [academics]: faculty members in our college are really talented. they teach really well. they make use of the technology available to explain us so that we can understand the topics well.course curriculum is good. | [placements]: placements in our college are remarkable. various top-notch companies recruit our college students for internships and full-time work.the highest package is 30 lpa and the lowest package is 6 lpa . placements are very good.

[college infrastructure]: college infrastructure is excellent.the campus area is very large.they provide wi-fi for students, many labs which are enrolled in the course itself, and the library is big and contains almost all the books. the best thing is that they provide single occupancy with ac from the first year itself.there is a hospital if the students fall ill, and an ambulance service is also available for students. many sports activities are also provided. | [academics]: academics are great part of this college.the faculty is well-experienced and qualified, with ph.d., and involved themselves in research with respect to their field. they guide us whenever we want and also keep extra sessions for doubt clearing, and all the teaching quality is good. the course curriculum is relevant. semester exams are not that difficult, easy to pass and secure good grading percentage with help of best teaching faculty. | [placements]: college placements are good.placements are highly offered for non-core branches, and very few placements are offered for core branches. the highest package was 54 lpa, and the median was 14 lpa. microsoft, amazon, cisco, flipkart, etc., visit our college. internships are offered from the 3rd year onwards.

the campus is pretty good but great though because it lacks in so many things such as better infrastructure. most of the time lift don't work properly. gender ratio is not also that much good. male to female ratio is around 6:1 which is not a good number. but for now there are so many clubs to join for extracurricular activities. some of them are:- techno jam for technical stuff. gmt for management note veda for music etc. the labs for every subject is present here and are in pretty good condition. sports clubs are also present here and they participate in many tournament also. there are most the sport team present here. so, many competition are also organized here like recently a hackathon was organised.b.tech is of 4 years each divided in 2 semester. the class are 5 days in a week and 2 day off. exams are divided in 2 for each semester. mid term exam are in the mid of each semester and end term are in the end and after the e.t. exams new semester registration starts. it is not much research driven.but sine students are research thing. and the curriculum is groomed to provide industry specific knowledge

review_text: there are many tech fests held weekly and many other fests held. all the important books are available in the department library which we can issue them. amenities in the classroom are best. they provide decent opportunities for sports and extra activities we have very much program almost every week. we can play any sport and also get all the required support we need. and have many social groups like ninad and natraj clubs which are organized by their leader.from the last 1-2 semesters students become eligible for campus placements. uflex, jcb, atv, and tata-like companies visited the campus and provides good offers. the highest package of our department is 7lpa and average package is 3lpa and the lowest package is 2.5 lpa. about 85% of students get placements. my plan is to get a good job after getting my degree.

[college infrastructure]: in coep having best infrastructure. there are currently 4 academic blocks, including the boys hostel out of the 3, one is the engineering block, and there are ac classrooms and labs the labs are up-to-date with the latest equipment; moreover, there are 2 mac labs for internship students. in hostel, you are provided with a bed, an almirah, chair, and a balcony. there is free electricity in the hostel, no restrictions on any kind of electric appliance. the allotment is of 3 types: single-seater, double-seater (ac), and double-seater (non-ac). | [academics]: the teachers here are highly qualified; all teachers here are ph.d. holders, and the faculty is a little strict. the course curriculum is updated every year according to the needs of the industry. in some courses, the syllabus and subjects are set according to the requirements of the companies. the password percentage is 60%. the semester exams are a little difficult to pass as there are no sample papers or practice sets provided. you need to study from the notes and content provided by the teachers. | [placements]: placement percentage is approximately 70 to 85%. the average package is 500000 lpa, whereas the highest package till now is 1.5 crores, which was offered by zeppelin. the other companies that come for recruitment are infosys, amazon, hero corp., deloitte and tcs. best placements are given to students.

[college infrastructure]: the college has really outstanding infrastructure. the buildings are spaciously built. each department has its dedicated block. with computer science at the center of the university, it has some real importance. msob also happens to be a very integral part of the university. it is a very planned university. construction is always there each time of the year. dedicated labs are availible for respective departments. mac lab is also there in library block. there are 3 libraries . outstandong librar | [academics]: academics here are good.it all depends on you ,how you are going to respond to the teacher. it is certainly not spoonfeeding like 11 and 12th classes. nice curriculum is there. the weightages of exams are divided in a very student friendly way | [placements]: i can say that placementals here are good because almost everyone here is placed in good companies. most people dont opt for placements as well. some people choose higher studies. many reputed companies visit the campus | [campus life]: the campus is like a different city to live in. it feels like you are in a sperate and beautiful space. people are always in harmony with each other. students and staff are also mostly in co ordination. there are there large in grounds to play whatever you want.

[college infrastructure]: lab and infrastructures are very good...vit is having a lot of new instrument in their labs and modernised library with availability of many ebooks in vit chennai library website..u would to able to access wifi all around the college | [academics]: frequency of teachers and students will be matching very well.. anytime students would be able to contact their desired teacher for queries.. faculties are very soft and student friendly..vit is allowing ffcs that's fully flexible credit system allowing the students to take the courses on their own | [placements]: amazing placements with lots of training is given for placements through softskills every year and allowing the students to make the projects with professor and allowing the students to publish it as a research paper with teacher's guidance | [campus life]: it's a outstanding college..we get to expose a variety of culture with beautiful students..

review_text: pros/cons: girls to boys ratio is 2:5, there are students from all over delhi - ncr and other states as well, thus promoting a comprehensive culture within the college. faculties have adequate subject knowledge, and use personal notes for teaching. they also regularly provide notes for students to study. the course structure is relevant to the subject. especially, if you choose a "specialisation" course, the elective subjects add up to be all connected and thus systematic. regular examinations are conducted : similar to unit tests : (2+3 units), instead of midterms or semester exams. there is certain rigidity regarding college hours for cse courses: 9 - 4 regular classes, the course can be a bit too theoretical at times. so students have to continue with their own skill development of revising placement | course curriculum overview: course curriculum is relevant, especially with aiml currently booming all over the world, the curriculum is highly relevant. students choosing any course: try out for courses with specialisations: the spec subjects eventually add up and provide more specific domain knowledge.

parakram is the sports fest of iit dhanbad. pratibimb the inter-departmental cultural fest of iit ism dhanbad. recently concetto was held in the month of october which was huge and several events/competition was held. srijan is the biggest socio-cultural fest of eastern india presented by iit ism dhanbad. iit dhanbad has asia's second-biggest library which has several books that students may borrow for a monthly duration. generally, all the classroom has fans, a computer, a smart board, good benches along with ac, and a tv in some classroom. we have two big grounds one for football and the other for cricket and hockey. we also have sac where we have 4 table tennis tables and 4 badminton courts, gym, a boxing court, a squash court, etc. there are many clubs like cyber labs, roboism, kartavya,fast forward india, etc which work for the student by students.the fee in iit dhanbad varies on a semester basis but nearly 1.25 lakh a student pays each semester and there are 8 semesters in total. iit dhanbad offers you a scholarship of fee waiver which give 100 % off on tuition fee if your family income is less than 1 lakh. 33.33 % off on tuition fees if your family income is less than 6 lakh. iit dhanbad also offers mcm ( merit cum means) scholarship if you score a decent cgpa above 6 and give you back your fees and 6000 rupees per year if your family income is less than 5 lakh. iit dhanbad offers you great opportunities via intern, hackathons, events by which if you work hard you will earn a lot and cover your fees in one month.
college_name: ISM Dhanbad - Indian Institute of Technology - [IITISM]

review_text: [college infrastructure]: facilities and infrastructure for my course are very good, like they have wi-fi, ac, charging ports in every classroom and lab. faculty is also very cooperative and helpful if you want some help. the quality of the food in the mess is above average, but it's good compared to other pgs and hostels. bms sports facilities are the best thing i came across so far. they always have some kind of tournament coming up, and you will get all the facilities for training and playing. if you get injured, medical facilities are also available. | [academics]: the teachers in this college are very good and helpful. if you have any doubts, they will take extra classes for you to understand the concept, give you notes, and assign tasks for better clarity. semester exams are of decent difficulty. if you have attended the classes, you won't have any problems scoring good marks. | [placements]: almost all of the students in our course got placed, and the highest package was around 30 to 35 lpa as per my information. amazon, wipro, infosys were some of the top recruiting companies. all the students got internships except a few. faculty will make sure that you will get placed. even some people got internships from the 2nd year.

[college infrastructure]: yes,in our college all the necessities are there like infrastructure, equipment etc. we have well equipped laboratory with central ac also in class room.there are various sports stadium in our college like cricket, football, hockey etc...and also indoor sports stadium like badminton, table tennis are also there. | [academics]: i am studying in computer science and engineering in this college.i am studying in this trade because i am interested in software developing.quality of teaching is also very good.yes, our curriculum is updated. | [placements]: in our college there are approximately 95-100 % placement in all the year.highest salary package offerd by microsoft it is 42.5 lpa and it is a computer science student. average salary offered by company is 10-12 lpa .

[college infrastructure]: iit bhu has most of the essential infrastructure and facilities needed for academics and campus life. the classrooms and laboratories are well equipped and functional, supporting both coursework and research. the library, sports facilities, and wi-fi connectivity across academics and hostel areas adds to the convenience. overall, the campus provides reliable facilities that meets day to day academic and residential needs. | [academics]: the academics at iit bhu are strong and well structured. the curriculum is rigorous and gives a solid foundation in core subjects, while electives allow you to explore areas of interest. most professors are knowledgeable and supportive, and they explain concepts clearly, though teaching style can vary across departments. the workload is manageable with consistent efforts and the institute provides good opportunities for projects, labs and research. overall, the academic environment is engaging and encourages learning. | [placements]: placements at iit bhu are quite strong, with top companies visiting the campus every years for roles in software, core engineering, consulting and analytics. the placement cell is active and guides students through resume building, preparation and interview support. while the best packages are grabbed by students with strong academics and skills, most students who prepare well finds good opportunities. the alumni network also helps in creating better prospects. overall, placements are impressive and open up solid career paths for students. | [campus life]: campus life at iit bhu is vibrant and engaging, with active clubs, fests and a friendly student community. the blend of academics, activities and varanasi's culture makes the experience memorable.

review_text: our university is quite active with various events, festivals, and cultural activities happening throughout the year. the famous unifest is the biggest and most exciting fest in north india. the infrastructural at the university is top notch with well-equipped laboratories, libraries, and computer centres. the university also has excellent sports, facilities, including a multi-sports complex, indoor sports arena, and gymnasium.the placements of the university are quite good with the highest package of 35 lpa with lots of companies visiting including amazon, tcs, wipro, accenture, infosys, tech mahindra, cognizant, and capgemini. the university also a collaboration with various industries and organisations, providing students with opportunities to gain practical experience. the average salary package offered to students ranges from 3.5- 6lpa.

pros/cons: it is very affordable and not much formalities or any limitations and all as you know its a technical based collage the person who running the collage is very kind and trying to help everyone he can i personally very crazy about his behave i never see he making any issues regarding the late fees with any one this is the most important i have nothing much to say about negatives, still the size of the class rooms and all should be little more big also the staffs they are not much supportive or trying to help the principal he struggles sometimes they can still get some more facilities like mess or food stations near, | placement experience: they have already informed us regards the placements and details of the places if we reach the criteria also i have seened 4-5 percentages of the students get the placements as i told you he was running the collae with kindness and help

review_text: the course structure is very well planned. the micro schedule and the number of lecture hours for each topic are included in the lecture plan. the faculty members-to-student ratio is good enough. the professors are well-qualified, learned and helpful to students. however, some professor cannot deliver their knowledge properly to students. teaching is done in hybrid mode using both a smart classroom and a blackboard. quizzes are conducted regularly throughout the semester and they carry marks to the end semester. exams are conducted timely and strict discipline is maintained during the exam so that no one can do cheating. even bio breaks are not allowed during the exam.the fee structure is similar to other iits.even the fee of iit ism dhanbad is lower than most of the iits.the course fee per semester is around 1 lakh. the mess fee is 23 thousand and another fee is 8 thousand. so, per semester total fee is 1 lakh 33 thousand. a total fee waiver is given to those students whose family income is less than 1 lakh per annum. those students whose family income is upto 4 lahks, have to pay only mess fee and other charges that totals to 33 thousand only. the scholarship amount of 6 thousand was given to tuition fee waiver students. other scholarships are also given by the institute to the sc and st students.
college_name: ISM Dhanbad - Indian Institute of Technology - [IITISM]

review_text: yeah our seniors had said that so many popular companies visit dsce to recruit students and they also provide some internship work in there company itself there and approximately 95 per cent of students get placement every yearthe campus is very wast it has nearly 50 acres of campus in addition to that it has 3 campuses of which one is a university and a green campus it's a student-friendly campus over the life of dsce is nice.
