review_text: [college infrastructure]: lpu's campus feels like a mini city - spacious, clean and full of energy. classrooms are smart and air-conditioned, labs are well equipped, and the library is my go to place for peaceful study. the campus is wi-fi enabled and beautifully maintained with green areas and open sitting spots. the hostels are secure and comfortable, with decent facilities and regular maintenance. we also have multiple food courts, unimall, medical facilities and a great gym. overall the infrastructure truly supports both academics and campus life. | [academics]: i am pursuing b.tech in cse at lpu because of my interest in technology and coding. the course offers a mix of theory and practical knowledge, and the teaching quality is mostly strong, many professors are well-qualified and approachable. we have subjects like ai, data science and cloud computing which align well with current industry trends. the curriculum is regularly updated and includes hands on projects, certifications and lab work. it definitely helps build job ready skills, though more live industry exposure would make it even better. | [placements]: the placement process at lpu is quite smooth and student-friendly. around 80-85% of eligible students from my batch got placed. the highest package offered was 64 lpa, which went to a b.tech cse student from microsoft. the average salary for cse students was between 5-6 lpa, though it varies across branches. for other branches the average was slightly lower than cse. there are regular placement drives, mock interviews, and resume building workshops. i found the career services team to be very helpful and supportive throughout. overall, the placement experience was positive and made me feel confident about stepping into the job market. | [campus life]: lpu has one of the largest and most vibrant campus in india. the best part is the modern infrastructure-wifi enabled campus, smart classrooms, high-tech labs, huge library, food courts, gyms, sports complexes, and a mall inside the university. there are many fests and events like youth vibe, one india and hackathons that keep student life active and engaging. the worst part would be the crowd during the peak hours and a bit of delay in admin processes. but overall, it's well-managed. the students come from all across india and even abroad, making environment diverse and energetic. most teachers are qualified and helpful and the support staff is polite and responsive. the location is safe and security is taken seriously with 24/7 guards and cctv. medical help is available on campus and there's an in house hospital for emergencies. i have always felt safe and supported here. | [anything else]: lpu is a place where you grow personally and professionally. the exposure, diversity and range of opportunities here are amazing if you are willing to explore, so i feel i glad i chose lpu for my b.tech journey.

pros/cons: jd birla college is one such place where there is place for everyone and helps to nurture people's passion and love for academics, extra curriculum activities. jd birla helped me for studies, my love for dance. the environment was very conducive for a holistic development and it was very protective simultaneously. there was nothing really to not like about my college. the expenses for the subject could have been reduced a little. the campus could have a little more big. | placement experience: from 5th semester, the students become eligible for placements. there are a lot of companies hiring students from our college including delloite, cry, small wonders. students who were genuinely interested to work after studies went ahead with placements. however, most of the students go ahead with higher studies.

the course curriculum is as always from the past, not changed. faculty members are well educated and have ph.d. completed. and exams are easy to pass students pass exams just studied for 1 week before. you will get notes and support easily.provides placement in placement season in the 4th year of your course. you will get placement because there is a 95.7% placement ratio and if not satisfied with campus placement then you will also apply for of campus placement.

the fests are held around the time of march- april including the tech fest invictus. the libray is amazing with various books to help study. the classrooms are fitted with ac and smart boards. the sports facilities are also good with almost every sport available to play. societies and clubs are a huge part of campus life, they organize various events throughout the year.the students become eligible for placements in the 4th year. many companies visit including microsoft, google, amazon, etc with a package of 18lpa. the highest package last year was 2.02 cr per annum with was an international offer. the percentage of students getting placed is very high.

[college infrastructure]: national institute of technology (nit) silchar had a decent infrastructure for an academic institution. however, please keep in mind that infrastructure can change and improve over time. here's a brief review of the infrastructure:nit silchar has well-maintained academic buildings with classrooms, lecture halls, and laboratories equipped with modern teaching aids and equipment. | [academics]: the national institute of technology (nit) silchar is known for its strong academic programs, primarily in the fields of engineering and technology. here's an overview of the academic aspects of nit silchar: nit silchar offers undergraduate (b.tech) programs in various engineering disciplines, including computer science, electronics and communication, mechanical engineering, civil engineering, electrical engineering, and more it includes various pg programs as well | [placements]: national institute of technology (nit) silchar had a good placement record, with many students securing job offers from top companies during campus placements. however, please keep in mind that placement statistics can vary from year to year, and it's essential to check the most recent data for the year 2023 or later to get an accurate picture of the current placement scenario at nit silchar. | [campus life]: extremely good campus life. students enjoy campus life along with studies getting all the facilities from the campus

[college infrastructure]: the college infrastructure is impressive, offering a blend of modern facilities and well-maintained amenities. spacious classrooms equipped with smart boards and high-speed internet create an environment conducive to learning. however, some areas could benefit from better upkeep, especially outdoor seating and parking spaces. | [academics]: the academic structure of the college is robust, with a curriculum that balances theoretical learning and practical exposure. the faculty comprises experienced and knowledgeable professionals who are approachable and supportive. while the coursework is rigorous, there is room for improvement in integrating emerging technologies and interdisciplinary modules into the syllabus. | [placements]: placements at the college are one of its strongest features, with a dedicated placement cell ensuring students are industry-ready. top companies visit the campus, offering roles across various sectors with competitive salary packages. the college provides training sessions, mock interviews, and aptitude tests to prepare students thoroughly.

i want to become a good engineer as i am interested in. the faculty for students is good education is good here labs are there and teachers are also good they support us very much they do hard work for us. exams are held after one to 2 months and teachers complete their syllabus and easy to passthe annual fest is manifest conducted in april tech fests are ones in two months books are available in the library sports facilities are available for all .all games are available many clubs are there management club tech club etc

pros/cons: the college basically provides you alot of freedom, the restrictions are very less the faculties present here are well qualified and got graduated from iit's and nit's. the course cirriculum is specially prepared for each course and is maintained and taken care well it is a little far from the city, so the transportation is alittle difficult the college timings are too vast i.e from 9-6pm, you get enough breaks, but still it is the campus area is fully utilised and there should be focus on sports department too. | placement experience: usually the placements here are very good, but due to mismanagement in last few years, it had dropped alittle, but now the management has changed and the director too, cirriculum and everything changed and companies are slightly getting attracted, the highest recorded as of now is 1.2 crores per annum

review_text: pros/cons: the anti ragging rules are strictly followed. hence, there is no ragging in the campus. there is a lack of support and guidance. we as students require proper guidance from our faculty members to do what at what time in what duration, what skills we should learn, what to do , when to do , from where to do, so this is something i dislike college hours... 8:30am to 4pm, whole day we are in college and when we return by 6pm in evening, tired, exhausted , no time for self study. attendance maintainance.... they don't check attendance by the end of semester they check that in range of 15 -20 days.... they should consider the factor that whosoever is focused will manage the attendance accordingly, rest check by the end of sem. | placement experience: the placements right now are not that good as there is a large competition in it sector and hence the placement is not that good.... not even 25% of final yr students get placed and those placed , are placed at very average lpa... about 4.5-5 lpa . hardly 2 or 3 students get package of 20+lpa . if not placed on campus then one can go for gate exam and can sit for master's degree and then will get a better placement otherwise off campus placements. after 4th or 5 th semester students can sit for the campus placements. companis like tcs, accenture, hcl, tata, google, microsoft , etc visits but the number of offers made are very less about 15%-20% of total students sitting for campus placements. highest package are about 25-30lpa average package is 5 lpa percentage of students getting placed are about 20-25% through campus my plan is to get the on campus placement... if somehoe i fail, the off campus placements...

review_text: the fee structure is quite high though i.e. 2,19,000. this amount is somewhat unaffordable for those who aren't that well off but wish to study at this college. however, students belonging to poor families are provided with fee waivers and scholarships.the course curriculum is quite tough but interesting. it is very new for me and i am looking forward to learning many new things via my btech. the faculty is okay and they are quite understanding in terms of our attendance.

life at the campus is amazing that most of the universities in india we have 3-4 festa engines yuvaan abhivyakti and then freshers' party they all are amazing and students from the whole of delhi come to these fests the biggest fest is emgifest happens in february last time sunidhi chauhan, amit trivedi and nuclei were there in the 3days fest 3 dj nights and there are all the clubs and societies u can imagine for robotics dor dance for drawing for photography anything you can imagine and we also do have a filthy large campus of 165 acres and a very big sports complex which includes all the games other than a swimming pooli got this course because it was the best available in my rank faculty is very good and helpful for the whole university there are 75 students in each class and course all the faculties are well qualified and experienced at least 15-20 years as the college is very old so it carries a legacy and exams are between 2 months midsems and endsems.

two months internship is compulsory after the sixth semester. companies do visit for two months of internships but the scenario is not that good companies don't prefer two months of interns. but the campus placements are good. all major tech giants like google, microsoft, and amazon do visit our campus for the placement and they allow circuital branches to sit in their recruitment drive. avg package is around 16 lpa with the highest package from the ece branch in the it company. core placements are also improving. around 90% of ece students get placed every year.two annual fests are organized here. techniti is the name of the annual technical fest and utkansh is the annual cultural fest of nit jalandhar. every engineering branch has its own society and there are many clubs that cover vast activities like kalakaar and baware are the theatre clubs, octaves is the music club, etc. the library is not that good but it has almost all the books needed for curriculum coverage. classrooms are air-conditioned and have a blackboard, projector, and samsung flip touch display board.

review_text: [college infrastructure]: offers an astonishing infrastructure for the students, the labs and the classrooms are top notch and you will find the most organized hostels which are way more cleaner than any hostel you ever visited. the best thing about gitam is when you look around it is all green because of the plantations we have in our college and you can get almost all kinds of food items that are sold in the campus | [academics]: the professors are well educated and they know their subject very well and they are always trying to teach new things to the students, and when it comes to semester exams professors are always helping in the preparation and more care is given to students that are slow learners. | [placements]: it is well known for its placements and infrastructure. from my batch there are 63 students and out of them 50 are placed in top most companies like accenture, tcs, delloite. etc. and the highest package was of 7 lpa and most of the candidates that applied for jobs got selected through our college.

[college infrastructure]: yes,college have all the neccesary infrastructutre, facilities and equipments. laboratories are well equiped. our librabry is one of the best library in india .hostel are also very good, neat and clean. | [academics]: academics is the 1st class one here. the syllabus is ogten updated according to the introduction of new fabulous technologies which is used currently along the entire world universities.staffs are very well qualified and they are very friendly with students. | [placements]: placements are good enough.our college provides a nice campus placement offers and are in good training for developing many skills for final year and pre final year students.the coolege has a good reputation. | [campus life]: outstanding. you will feel the heaven when you join to this college. it can't be decribed in words.

[college infrastructure]: on the aspects of infrastructure , it's pretty good and our campus is green friendly.all our academic blocks are neatly maintained too!!!our classrooms,labs and buses are air conditioned and spacious too. | [academics]: when it comes to academics , it's outstanding . all our professors are very well qualified in their fielsd and most of them have obtained doctrate from reputed institutions s well.they really help us to understand our core subjects really well. | [placements]: for placements, in our university right now,it's decent at best , but there's definitely scope for improvement in the upcoming years . most of the highest packages are secured by btech students by top companies

[college infrastructure]: the infrastructure of college is decent because it has not much space but sufficient place for building of all branches.there is free wifi provided in campus .labs are good for btech students but not good for mtech or phd students.the sports facilities are good here ,we have cricket and football play ground .also gym is available seperately for both boys and girls.classroom is also good and maintained.boys hostel is brahmputra hostel .it has 12 floor and capacity of 1200 students . | [academics]: im a cse student .cse facilities are awesome here.yes teacher are helpfull .almost every teachers are well qualified.the curriculum of cse is updating every year.the college is introducing machine learning and artificial intelligence and big data from fifth semester so that students get industry ready. | [placements]: place is much good here than other engineering college in bihar.nearly 90% students get placement in good company.the lowest salary package offerd is 6 lpa and the highest is 42 lpa .the top companies of campus for computer science are wipro ,infosys,tcs,vedanta,samsung,microsoft,adobe etc.so yes placement is good here. | [campus life]: camous life is good here .cultural and sports events are conducted every year .most popular event is tech fest that is organised every year in month of feb.in winter a cultural event called eccentrica are organised every year..the location of this college is just beside ganga river which make it awesome .there is pmc hospital near the college for emergency.ragging is poor here means there is no ragging here .seniors are supportive .but some seniors take ragging

[college infrastructure]: yes, the college has its own excellent infrastructure with the faculties who always push us forward in our academics. also all our classrooms, laboratories, libraries, sports centres and hostels are maintained with atmost clean and also with hygiene too. also the food in the hostels are with clean maintained. | [academics]: i'm pursuing my b.tech in vit. currently i'm going with 3rd year. all my studies are with more quality with quality teaching and the way the teachers teach are so good. also the curriculum is well developed for our development. | [placements]: the placements are 100% with most placed students all over india. the average salary will be around 5l per annum with most number of students placed. also the dream companies may get you a higher package depending on the company. | [campus life]: the whole campus is full of green where vit chennai is called the green campus. and everything we need are provided in the college itself with vast covering land.

lpu holds one world where students from each country showcase their culture and traditions. it holds one india where culture and traditions of all the states of india are shown. except this there is always something going on in university either in technical field or calling big personalities to interact and share their experience with students.alumni network is also excellent and alumni visits every year to interact with juniors. seniors are always helpful in clearing doubts about anything related to university principles or academics. there is completely 0 ragging case in university and a student friendly environment.

[college infrastructure]: the infrastructure is top-notch with modern design classrooms, hostels, a library and a sports complex among others. the campus is equipped with high-speed internet, round the clock medical facility, cafes that are open till 5 in the morning, and spacious hostel rooms. the mess serves nutritious and a rich in variety diet. overall, the infrastructure is in line with the reputation of the institute. | [academics]: the curriculum is designed keeping fit with the industry requirements in mind. the faculty members are vastly experienced and knowledgeable in their field. a class consists of 80 students so that maintains a healthy faculty-student ratio. the teaching method is entirely case-based. students are expected to thoroughly read the cases before the class which follows a discussion in the classroom. | [placements]: the placement process is not oriented towards achieving 100% placements, it is purpose is to provide the best job-person fit. however, inevitably, the entire batch gets placed every time within 3 days. major roles are across consulting, finance, marketing, general management, technology, etc. all the reputed indian .

review_text: by clearing jee main and advanced. the seats are allotted through josaa counselling. after the announcement of the jee advanced result & jee main (air), the josaa 2017 counselling is started. only those candidates are able to participate in the counselling process who have secured rank in the rank list. registration, filling & locking choices, seat acceptance fee payment process is done via online mode. document verification and other reporting process is conducted through offline mode.students are needed to appear at the reporting centre for document verification process. candidates have to report to the centre at the prescribed date & time. the list of document verification centre will be published through the website. don???t forget to bring the required original documents along with the photocopies. in case of candidate fails to produce the documents, the allotted seat will be cancelled. in case candidates have selected the float option and they have allotted a better seat in the further counselling rounds, then the candidates are needed to report again for document verification and seat acceptance. after completing the seat allocation, seat acceptance and document verification process, candidates are required to report to the allotted college or university. after reporting, students have to complete further admission formalities to confirm admission.placement scenario in branches like computer science, mathematics and computing, petroleum and mining is outstanding. multinational companies like adobe, microsoft, amazon, goldman sachs, schlumberger, samsung are campus visitors. they offer internships too in the pre final year. the placement packages range from 8 lac- 40 lac ctc in computer related branches, 6-30lac ctc in mining and petroleum related branches. the scenario of mechanical and civil is relatively less.
college_name: ISM Dhanbad - Indian Institute of Technology - [IITISM]

review_text: here fees are based on the annual income of the student and three categories: first is that those above 5 lakh income will pay full tuition fees. the second is for between 1 to 5 lakhs then there will be 2/3 of tuition fees weaver and the third is for below 1 lakh so for this category there are no tuition fees for that. i applied for an educational loan for my fees.the annual fest is utkansh which is also running an event right now in our college. there are many events and one another is known as techniti. here, there is a very big library having ample books. this college organizes many events and also goes to different nits for participation. here nss club works for the social welfare of our needy society.
college_name: Dr BR Ambedkar National Institute of Technology - [NIT]

review_text: [college infrastructure]: it has all the facilities, such as classrooms, libraries, music rooms, dance rooms, basketball courts, football courts, moot courts, computer labs, cafeterias, clubs, auditoriums, seminar halls, and a drama company. | [academics]: the curriculum is up-to-date and includes recent developments in fields such as ai, machine learning, cyber security, graphics, and animation. they make students study the latest tools which makes us job-ready. | [placements]: the placement quality is good. most students who had registered for placement got placed. college is supportive as it provides placement training to students so they can crack interviews and make the process easy and guide students further. | [campus life]: the college campus has many outdoor sitting areas that give beautiful views and one can enjoy nice weather. many students, teachers, and support staff are nice and when needed can help.

[college infrastructure]: lovely professional university is one of the best private universities in india in terms of infrastructure. classrooms are quite big and spacious with the modern equipments installed in it like smart boards, projectors, wifi. lpu has separate library for all the departments but the main central library is common for all the departments. lpu has 8 boys hostel and 7 girls hostel which are well maintained and whole campus is very neat and clean. | [academics]: i am pursuing my undergraduation in b. tech cse. lpu is very good for cse as compared to all other core branches. that's why i chose cse as my career. except few of the professors, all are very talented and knowledgeable. few professors use ppts frequently which we as a student don't prefer. so, i expect lpu to raise the bars of faculties other than the ppts. my course curriculum is very updated and contains all the advancements in the field. | [placements]: the quality of placements in this university is very good. lpu provides all the possible platforms for the student to excel in their career. now, i will talk about placement of my cse branch. just a few days back, almost 30 students were placed in amazon at a huge package of up to 30 lpa. the average package offered in cse is 5.7 lpa. top recruiting companies are tcs, tech mahindra, wipro, amazon, flipkart, capegemini etc. | [campus life]: no doubt, campus life in lpu is really very exciting and thrilling. students can engage in various extracurricular activities like attending workshops, joining a student organisation, cultural events etc. not only this, we enjoy a lot in edm nights which are organised very frequently in the campus. students, teachers and support staff are very good in manner. they behave very properly. campus is 100% safe with a lot of cctvs and security personnel. it can handle any emergencies.

[college infrastructure]: for our course, the college provides every required facility. we have high-speed internet, the best-quality classrooms, best library with every required book. i am not a hosteller but my hostel friends told me about facilities like the food is really good. every possible sport is played in the hostel. | [academics]: the faculty in our b.teach computer science course is highly qualified, knowledgeable, and supportive, ensuring excellent teaching quality. the curriculum is meticulously designed to be industry-relevant, equipping students with practical skills. semester exams are challenging yet fair, with a pass percentage around 75%, reflection academic rigour and standards. | [placements]: in our college, 92% students got placements. in our college, the highest package offered is 45 lakh, the average package offered in our college is around 13 lakh and the lowest package offered is 6lakh. 90% students get internships from our college in every year.
college_name: Thapar Institute of Engineering and Technology Patiala

review_text: [college infrastructure]: college having all the necessary facilities this college provide the best education to every students i have done my bcom in this college because i want to learn about the financial activities and this college also have a hostel facilities for both boys and girls and the classes are fully furnished and smart classrooms facilities having english college which are need in this college for the students and all facilities are well mainted | [academics]: done my bcom in this college in 2021 because i want to learn about the management and the financial activities skills and pursue my mba in future so that's why i have done my bcom and the quality of the teaching in my college is very good they are very helpful and the supportive to my every decisions and the curriculum in this college is where updated. | [placements]: quality of the placement in my college is good but i didn't get any placement because i want to pursue my other course for my career growth so that's why i didn't get any placement in this college but this college provide the placement facilities also to every students who are potential to get their placements and my college is very supportive and the helpful for my every decisions .

[college infrastructure]: college has a lush green campus. classes are so well developed but only for first year students. from second year onwards the studying area is not less than any govt school classroom. they should be maintained just like apjs. other than that library and labs are easily accessible. | [academics]: nsut is considered one of the best engineering college of delhi. no doubt all the professors are very talented here and teaches very well. but some guest profs sucks. they should learn how to teach first ig. | [placements]: i'm in first year but heard that placements here are very good. almost all the students get placement from on campus companies. tho i heard that only few students get chance for on campus intership still trying hard will always payback. | [campus life]: campus life is good. i spent 3-4 months having a lot of fun. roaming around and experiencing different things. just the minus point is that the campus have a lot of couples, sometimes their pda becomes cringe and sucks. | [anything else]: is anything left to say.. idts

review_text: > annual fest sparsh is conducted in april, tech fest is mindbend conducted in last of march. > almost all the books available in our course are in the central library and there are many types of literature also available. > classrooms are well designed are equipped (projector, mics, camera, etc.). > many sports are there like football basketball cricket and dance music also there. >many clubs are there like chard, nss are there> i am interested in energy field especially in nuclear energy field so my course give me a direction toward it. > there are 10-12 professor and assistant for per year student and there are 120 students each year. > most of the faculty have done their phds from iits and have an experience of many years. > there are mid and end sem for each semester and exams are of moderate level.

review_text: [college infrastructure]: our college has all the necessary facilities. but, personally i think that the architecture and design of the buildings is a little outdated. we have wi-fi all over the campus and projectors in almost every classroom. taste of the mess food is not that good. | [academics]: the professors are good, but we have a compressed semester. so, the professors are teaching a bit fast. even if the professors teach slow, the number of people listening to the professor is very low. also, some professors are not at all interactive. | [placements]: the placement quality is good. in fact, we have the highest placement this year which is around 2.6cr ctc. but, this year the career development center(cdc) has cancelled the pre placement offers of many students just before placements which was a huge mistake from the college side.

[college infrastructure]: most of the buildings are newly constructed, be it lecture hall, student activity center, computer lab, hostels and library. hostels are nice, well equipped with lan or wifi. overall it's good and is nicely maintained | [academics]: curriculum is quite similar to as that of iit kanpur. it is regularly updated, and also it is focused more on research and practical projects rather than being just theory oriented to prepare students according to the industrial demands. | [placements]: placement scenario is quite good here. almost all of the students belonging to cse and ece department get placed in some good mncs. it is quite better than most of the newly established nits and iiits.

review_text: [college infrastructure]: total campus is well-designed with modern classrooms, spacious seminar halls, and high-tech labs. each department has its own advanced lab facilities where students can work on projects and experiments. the library is digitalized, providing e-books, journals, and databases that students can access anytime. the hostel accommodation is good, with wi-fi, decent mess food, and separate facilities for boys and girls. the college also has playgrounds, indoor sports facilities, cafeterias, and a gym. | [academics]: maximum professors hold postgraduate and doctoral degrees, and they bring both teaching and industry knowledge into the classroom. they use practical methods of teaching, and some even include case studies and real-world examples. teachers guide students in academic projects, internships, and career opportunities. they also provide support for competitive exams like gate, gre, and cat. faculty often encourage participation in seminars, workshops, and conferences. | [placements]: excellent placements, with most students securing jobs before graduation. the placement cell trains students in coding, problem-solving, and communication skills right from the second or third year. companies like microsoft, amazon, capgemini, infosys, and wipro recruit regularly. students from computer-related branches get a large number of offers, with average salaries around ?6?7 lpa, and top salaries exceeding ?30 lpa.

[college infrastructure]: the campus life of the institute was students driven. it serves as a very unique style context of interaction among the students of different disciplines. sac is the center of all the students' activities. the campus is equipped with a gymnasium, swimming pool, music room, etc. there are multiple of hostels for boys and girls. we have a double sharing room in the 1st year and a single room in the 2nd year. vegetarian meals only are served. the registration process is simple and the rent is affordable. the hostels are located in hauz khas. | [academics]: the telecom technology input for the program are supplied by the bharti school of telecom technology and management. the schedule imparts education to internalise conventional and many modern methods of management. there are a total of 48 credits in the course, including elective subjects. hrm systems, business research methods, strategic management, information systems management, and managerial economics are the core subjects in this course. | [placements]: in the last year, mostly of the students got placed in the it and analytics sector. mostly 83 recruiters had participated in the many placement process. so the number of offers made exceeded the strength of the batch. the overall average salary package offered in the batch was 22.7 lpa and the highest salary package offered was 33 lpa. some of the prominent recruiters are blackrock, rockwell automation, medtronic, barclays, metro, and hcl.

review_text: pros/cons: the campus is very beautiful with all those greenery and with a very pleasant weather the faculties are very friendly. they try to help us in every problem. a faculy advisor is assigned to each student. the hostels and gym equipments are top-notch which you find in a proper gym the path from mega hostel to campus goes through a steep mountain climb which we have to climb when we miss the bus. | placement experience: students in 7th and 8th semester are eligible to sit for campus placements. companies like oracle, goldman sachs, l&t, bajaj, caterpillar and psu's like bel,hpcl and bpcl come to the college usually the coding companies offer aroung 35-40 lpa ctc and the core psu companies offer around 17-18 lpa. highest package is 51 lpa and an average package of 12 lpa. nearly 85% students from circuit and cs branch get placed and around 60% in core branches who sit for placements, my plans after getting the degree is to join mba to learn how business world works and how the money flows

[college infrastructure]: college facilities and equipment is working and well maintained , and the living spaces in college campus is clean and hygienic overall the best of our college is laboratories and libraries in conclusion i say college infrastructure is good | [academics]: here i am studying computer science and engineering and the quality of teaching is good , all the inside the teacher inside the department help all of us to solve doubt as soon as possible without any delay | [placements]: number of company visited is great ,and some students get great package ,but most of the student gets an average package ,so i personally think that placement cell would have to work more with student and make them more efficient in cracking high ctc | [campus life]: everything is fine inside the campus

[college infrastructure]: campus-wide high-speed wi-fi, modern seminar halls, and a fully equipped auditorium enhance the learning atmosphere. hostel facilities are top-notch with clean rooms, hygienic food, recreational areas, and round-the-clock security. sports complexes, gyms, medical centers, and cafeterias are also well-maintained and contribute to a vibrant campus life. | [academics]: the curriculum is industry-aligned, regularly updated, and emphasizes both theoretical understanding and practical application. faculty members are highly qualified, many with phds and research experience | [placements]: placement is satisfactory for most branches, especially cse, it, and business-related courses. top companies visit during placement season, although job roles are often limited to entry-level or service-based positions. | [anything else]: outstanding experience of myself

[college infrastructure]: infrastructure is good , there are all the facilities and equipments. the campus has wifi. classroom are good with projectors. libraries are good with all types of latest edition books. hostels facilities is best. mess food is also good. hostels are big and have enough space in rooms. proper hygiene is maintained. | [academics]: the course i am pursuing is bba honors and it is the best undergraduate management course here. this course contains developing good communication and competitive edge among students. it also has 4 major specializations. | [placements]: average placement for ug is 3 lpa. overall placements are good. highest places for ug is 10 lakhs. there are many reputed companies who come for recruitment such as byju's , tcs and many marketing companies as well | [campus life]: regular fests are there. there are lots of events held almost every day.

[college infrastructure]: the college has all the necessary infrastructure required for creating an academically inclined environment, including smart projectors, air conditioned classrooms and wifi. the living spaces are also hygienic and clean. | [academics]: the academic calendar stays jam packed with two continuous assessment tests (cats) at a gap of 35 days each, as well as two quizzes and a few digital assignments (das). the semester ends with a final assessment test (fat). | [placements]: the placements are getting better with each passing batch. a lot of companies do come here, belonging to various diverse industries and the packages are improving in quality. almost every student gets placed from the college. | [campus life]: there are a lot of activities to partake in this college. almost every week, some kind of celebration, event or competition happens and all the club's and chapters spread awareness about themselves from time to time as well.

pros/cons: faculty is good and supportive , also lot of good phd scholar who are teaching assistant. boys and girls ratio is ok type. all are good and ok connectivity of trains are nearer and good. we can easily travel to home . ashok rajput campus is small and outside of campus roads are not good inside campus the sport group is very small despite having all sports bhita campus take too much time to construct | placement experience: form 7th semester campus placement are started . lot of great company comes . average of mechanical is 12 lakh but overall average is 50 lakh approx. in mechanical department 100% placement ratio is happened this year but the trick is only students who get 8+ cgpa can sit for placement so the ratio is high . my plan is to do job in isro or go for mtech in iit

[college infrastructure]: the living spaces is clean and safe also the food is tasty and hygienic. library and laboratories are also available for the students to build their knowledge practically. smart boards, projector are available in the classrooms for the students. | [academics]: curriculum is updated and it includes all the recent developments and updates in the field which is helpful and supportive for the students. quality of teaching is very nice because staff are highly motivated and educated. | [placements]: placement if the college is also nice. 85% students get placed from the college in well recognized companies or organizations and gain experience. highest salary package was offered 18 lacs per annum and the average salary package was offered 3-4 lacs per annum. | [campus life]: campus life is average for me but campus location is very nice and it is safe to handle all the situations and emergencies.

review_text: [college infrastructure]: college infrastructure of iit delhi is awesome it has all the possible facilities and equipment. all the classrooms have smart boards, ac, cameras etc. libraries and labs are also amazing with all possible facilities. | [academics]: academics in iit delhi is also outstanding. quality of teaching is excellent because of our highly qualified and experienced faculty. curriculum is also update time to time and has all the recent developments in the field. | [placements]: placements in this college is outstanding and well known. almost all the big companies participate in placements drives and also offer attractive packages and almost everyone gets placed in good companies or start there own.

[college infrastructure]: infrastructure is not that good it is ok ok as the college is about 100 years old the buildings are maintained and the labs are being renovated with modern equipments and cleanliness is maintained in the campus but canteens are not good | [academics]: faculty members are well qualified either they are phd holder or mtech from renowned universities, curriculum is almost same as aktu which focuses more on theory than practicals which is a major drawback in almost all indian educational institutions | [placements]: placement records are amazing here almost 90% students get placed and in technology branches it goes as high as 100 %average placement is around 6 lakhs per annum which is a good start for a fresh engineering graduate in india | [campus life]: university is situated in the centre of the city so one will never be far from kfc mcd and malls

[college infrastructure]: we have very good infrastructure, facilities and equipment. we have very good classrooms laboratories and sportscenter and the were maintained well. we have good living spaces and the food was very good | [academics]: i'm studying b. tech third year. the quality of teaching was very well. the curriculum was updated and it includes the ask kinds of developments. the fests very celebrated very well. yes i think i would get a job with good package | [placements]: the placements were very good for this college. almost all the students get placed. last year highest package was 56 lakhs per annum. the average package was nearly 6 lakhs. i think i solid also got a good job

[college infrastructure]: the infrastructure is quite good, like ac classrooms, high-speed internet connection is also available, quite good labs, and good libraries available. hostels are also good, as there is daily cleaning of the rooms and washrooms. mess food is also okay, and there are a lot of snack shops as canteens. medical facility is also available with sports complex ensuring sports facility. | [academics]: teachers are quite good and friendly, ensuring proper communication between students and faculty members, some of whom are ph.d. holders and have good knowledge. course curriculum is also okay and relevant to the industry level, but not that much like teaching some old technologies till now. college exams are not much tougher, not much easier. passing percentage is 45%. | [placements]: various companies come for sure including mass recruiters. the highest package company that comes from paypal is 24 lpa to 30 lpa. the lowest package is around 3.5 lpa. the average package is around 4 lpa. around 60-70% of students got placed. mostly in less than 10 lpa. roles offered depend on market needs every year. in 2024 and 2025, data science, ai and ml are most offered roles.

[college infrastructure]: college is very clean and hygiene and they have all kind of equipments and facilities,they have clean classrooms with wifi facility and they have hostel for boys and girls , they have spacious library | [academics]: i was completed b.tech-ece in this college,the quality of teaching was excellent and all the faculty is fully experienced (at phd level) and the college will teach international languages to the students | [placements]: i got placed in 5 lpa package and the highest package of the college is 50 lpa and lowest package is 3 lpa, every year maximum 70-80% students will placed and the average package for maximum students get is 3-15 lpa | [campus life]: college will celebrate all religious festivals in the campus and they have so many clubs for students to engage in it. the college is so far from main road it's little tough to get location transport | [anything else]: overall my experience is good, i learn so many international languages like french, korean, chinese.and college is have ncc and nss also for graduation students and they need to improve sports curriculum because they don't bother sports, college is having seminar hall and very big auditorium, and the best thing in this college is they provide best food in hostel (veg and non veg everyday)and hostle fee is also affordable price they have separate hostel rooms for student parents to stay 2-3 days.

review_text: [college infrastructure]: the hostel is a little bad and the food is also not good. the hostel warden is strict and also many constructions are going on so please co-operate and you are fed up in first year by travelling daily in bus so transport also a problem. so, visit the hostel and check everything and then join. | [academics]: faculty members are helpful and well qualified. they are ph.d. holders and are knowledgeable. the teaching quality is average. the course is relevant and it makes students industry-ready. semester exams are difficult and passing percentage is 75%. almost all students pass but you need to study hard. | [placements]: the placements are very good at this university. the highest salary package offered is 16.89 per annum. there are so many companies like google and apple that come to recruit and also indian companies come. so you get a good placement undoubtedly so, join this college and read well. | [campus life]: pes is known for placement and extra curricular activities, which helps to learn and enhance the skills. | [anything else]: no

review_text: [college infrastructure]: gla university has very good infrastructure with all required facilities. classrooms are based on smart class facilities with projector facility wifi . hostel and living spaces are hygienic and well maintained. | [academics]: academics of the university is above average specially in mechanical engineering branch. quality of teaching is good. curriculum is well update based on market trends of the companies. college makes scholars job ready. | [placements]: placement of mechanical engineering branch is good but for computer science engineering and management branches it is outstanding. average package vof the students is 5.08 lpa and highest package is above 30lpa. | [campus life]: campus life is fun . many nearby places are tourist places.

review_text: [college infrastructure]: hostels are very good. they are made from japanese technology. they are beautiful and provide vibe to stay. there is radiant cooling system in the hostels. there are 3 large academic blocks for all the things with good wifi and large labs. apart from this there is btbm,msme and chemistry department building. ee and cse buildings are under construction. there are two mess in our college. the food served in the mess is far much better than at any other institute. there is a big canteen also. | [academics]: academics are very good here. the course curriculum is well updated here. the faculty are also very helpful, qualified ,knowledgeable. quality of teaching is good. the courses are relevant. the semester exams are easy for some courses like non core courses and for core courses the exams are not to difficult and not too easy. pass percentage is good. there are high chances of no backlog. | [placements]: 90 percent of students got placed every year. inr 66 lacs per annum is the highest package and average is inr 21 lacs per annum, approximately. nearly 9 international companies are in collaboration with iith. companies like microsoft, sprinklr, flipkart, amazon, nvidia, google, goldman sachs, etc. 60 percent students got internship. | [campus life]: our college conducts excellent fest. there are many co curricular activities organised in which we can take part. there are many clubs which provide knowledge in different domains and we can also pursue our hobbies by joining those clubs. staff is very supportive and helps immediately in every aspect. yes, it can handle emergencies and take immediate action in that.

[college infrastructure]: campus and infrastructure of this is one of the best with multiple buildings for various departments, campus is located in outskirts of city providing lush green scenery there is river alongside campus keeping the atmosphere cool. all the buildings are fully conditioned even classrooms are digital. college lacks cleanliness due to which there is unexplainable odour. laboratories are equipped as per the curriculum requirements. | [academics]: curriculum is defined as per industry requirements which helps students to relevant hard as well as soft skills. professors are moderately qualified some of them lacks basic teaching techniques also the faculty-student relationship lacks communication because of these a good chunk of students have trouble understanding few concepts | [placements]: average placement caps around 8lpa placing 75%of the cs students, remaining 20-25%of the students of core branches struggle to get placed as the average is of 5lpa. placement cell do provide internship opportunities but these do not align with core branches most the internships provided are of sales. highest package is of 48lpa

[college infrastructure]: according to my experience lpu has provided the quality education and is achieving milestone in the field of cse,as a student of lpu i will tell others that if ur planning to join lpu lpz join without any hesitation, because how much u put effect here the successful ur in ur career and placement. | [academics]: lpu is really well known university and has highest rank in top private unversity, as a student i really like to tell others that lpu has best service for students in campus in everything, like education, food rooms ,staff.lpu is great place where u can experience lot of things and meet different country and state people and make astringent network. | [placements]: i really loved the campus life ,as it's campus is vast and we'll maintain,with greenary. education is good and behavior of staff is very good ,they support u in every thing.the means is really very good and the service provide by lpu is really very good. but as university it has lots of student, i think it should it should have specific seat limit. | [campus life]: campus is diverse and good for cultural and academic both

[college infrastructure]: yes, all the necessary infrastructure and facilities are there in our campus. classrooms, laboratories, libraries, sports center and hostels r well maintained. and facilities are like separate hostels for boys and girls , library, sports, labs, classrooms and many more . yes the living spaces are very much cleaned and well maintained and the food is not too bad but it's fine. | [academics]: i'm from ece department because i like the course of this department. the quality of teaching is very good. and faculty members are highly educated in their respective fields. yes the curriculum is updated and includes all the recent developments in the fields. still i'm undergraduate student . | [placements]: the quality of placements in iit kharagpur was good. nearly 70%.last year the highest package was 2 cr per annum from ece department. the average salary offered is 25 lks. the placement process is not very easy and pleasent for me. and yes our college is very much supportive. | [campus life]: the best of iit kharagpur is beautiful tress and roads , hostels, classrooms, and many things are good and worst thing is dogs. etc.. the student, teachers and staffs like the students are very much helpful and also helps in studies. and also the teachers are very much thankful for their heardwork and teaching. location is iit kharagpur and it is very much safe in the campus . and yes if any emergency is needed they ll be very helpful at any time and anywhere.

i choose this course as i want to pursue my engineering in mechanical only and also my percentile was not very much high and only left with these choices. faculty to student ratio is 1:73 but there are many phd scholars who help us in improving our subject. also don't expect very much from the faculty as it is a government college. exams are easily cracked and most of the questions come from the teacher notes only and only 2 exams are held in one semester. i must say exams are not very difficult to pass and even if you study 1 week before or in some subject one night before you can achieve good gradeslife on the campus is very chill .your social life will depend upon you and which kind of friends you make. also on campus, you can talk to anyone .there is no ragging on campus. there are many extracurricular activities held on campus also sports events are also organised and fests are just awesome. there are many societies in which you can take part which improves your all over behaviour.

[college infrastructure]: main building is obviously a point where everyone got caught with stuck their eyes on it and lecture hall complex are also made with modern technologies and well furnished. and hostels are good but can be improved. | [academics]: academis is good. well everyone here are iitians so not that much dependent on profesors but yaa still professors are good at some point. most of the profesors come and go but some of them are real gems who care about students. | [placements]: placements are good but still with comparison of other iits roorkee have least placement opportunities. like i remember iit bhu have better placement states than us so i won't recommend that you should come to this college only because of placements. | [campus life]: i'll recommend every and each person to visit once but please try to park your vehicle outside the campus just you know traffic problems ruin all the enjoyment. like i personally roam around campus whole night so you can take a idea from me | [anything else]: iit roorkee main building is way more better than any other college in india.

it is feasible. its aroung 70000 for a merit seat. scholarships are also provided. for a comed-k seat it goes around 2 lakhs per annum. compared to other colleges giving the same education as this the college fees here are more feasible than at other universities.labs are conducted every week and it is made compulsary to attend them. practical knowledge is more focussed on. along with studies sport activities are encouraged. interdepartmental matches are conducted. as well as trainings are given to interested people.

[college infrastructure]: you will find peaceful environment there and it will be a bit harsh in summer but ac in the classrooms will keep us cool and the winter and rainy seasons are the best. you will find a big library there where you can study peacefully. | [academics]: the teachers are very supportive they help you to enhance your skills and you can share your ideas with them they will make sure to place you in a right path towards your success. there will be so many companies coming to the campus. | [placements]: they prepare you for the interviews from basics so you will crack the interview with ease and you will get placed easily. the highest package was from microsoft around 42lpa i guess. and we are looking forward to increase the number in the upcoming years. | [campus life]: the people and management are very friendly they support you all the time

[college infrastructure]: well developed infrastructure that includes a library, labs, sports facilities, and hostels. excellent infrastructure available in individual departments and centres; and has several centrally located facilities for researchers. | [academics]: the courses of study are organised as semester programs and each semester provides for a minimum of seventy instructional days.evaluation is done by the faculty, a consequence of the autonomous status granted to the institute | [placements]: iit madras is known for its exciting placement season with consistent statistics and success rates across the years. this college has announced that it has placed 80% of students in b.tech and dual degree courses and 75% of students in m.tech until april, 2024 | [campus life]: iit madras is a residential institute that occupies a 617 acre campus that was formely part of the adjoining guindy national park. the campus is located 10 km from the channai airport, 12 km from the chennai railway station.

i chose this course because artificial intelligence is the present and future. i also need to advance in this field. the faculty to student ratio at galgotias university is 1:20, for every faculty member, there are approximately 20 students. most of the faculty holds doctorates in their respective field. the teaching is good, they only take the next topic of every student understand it. there are 3 exams, cat1&2 and ete. the cat exam is easy and take only 90 minutes to complete but the eye takes 180 minutes to complete and it is hard.the annual fest is called unifest. there are many tech fests. the unifest are normally conducted in august or september. there are vast amount of books & journals available in the library. the classes are filled with basic amenities. there are football ground, cricket ground, basketball court, tennis court, badminton court, squash court and many more. there are about 20-25 clubs in the university rum by students. some of them are cal circle, noteveda, student council etc.

[college infrastructure]: it has all facilities and infrastructure is stunning, it's dream to join in psg for many students. classroom have projector and windows and proper tables and wifi is password protected. all places are hygiene | [academics]: i am studying be mechanical engineering because i chose it to study in psg college of engineering which is one of the best college in tamilnadu .the curriculum they are teaching in this college is very wonderful and there is lots of research going in this field and the job placements in psg college of technology is good. | [placements]: psg college of technology is good but the mechanical department is getting low placement compared to other departments like a computer science engineering and information technology but the companies that comes for mechanical engineering departments of good and mostly core companies | [campus life]: campus life is wonderful in psg college of technology we have various structures water doctors canteens and other extra cells which is really a good environment i will recommend this college for everyone who is interested in information technology computer science technology and electrical and electronic engineering other departments have good placements but these three departments are very good

[college infrastructure]: in my opinion the infrastructure is very well well-maintained. we have many different types of labs like chemistry and physics labs . we also have computer science labs . all the labs are air conditioned except chemistry lab. we have big library with thousands of books and ebooks for our reference. there is wifi every where in vit right from hostels to libraries . | [academics]: we have all the professors holding a phd degree. there is extensive research carried out every year in vit . many research papers are published in famous journals every month . the labs are well used for research purposes as well as for students to gain practical knowledge. as the academics is updated so we are well prepared for jobs. | [placements]: our institute offers 100 percent placement for every student. our average package goes more than 6 lac per annum .many dream and superdream companies like amazon , microsoft , oracle , adobe visit our campus . it is boasted that the computer science branch is the best branch of vit vellore . | [campus life]: the campus life is the best life. we have many students incoming every year in vit . so you would enjoy the diversity very much . also the college fests are worth it . many famous personalities are invited in the fests which makes it thrilling .

[college infrastructure]: my college infrastructure, facilities and equipment are very good. my classrooms are big and can fit many students. digital and chalk board, both are available. laboratories and libraries are also available. interested students can register for sports, yoga, gym is also well maintained. college wi-fi is provided for each student. living spaces are clean and food is also hygienic. | [academics]: i am studying computer science specialized in cyber security. i am interested in this field, and i secured seat in that department. teaching is also good. not only my domain courses are available, but also ethics, constitution, kannada classes are taught. my curriculum is updated and includes all recent developments. i want to secure a job in my domain. | [placements]: placements are strong and training is provided for placements. placement reputation is high, and they will conduct pre-placement activities like interviews, tests, workshops and many. dedicated training for placements is offered. placements are above 90 percent for most of the branches. and the salary ranges between 7 to 8 lakh per annum. it depends on the branch. i am still preparing for the placements. i have learned this information about the college. | [campus life]: the campus life is a perfect balance between academic and extracurricular activities. overall, my time has been rewarding. it helped me to grow both personally and professionally. i met many new people, and i found the people who are true to me and who are not. my experience is good. teachers support students to participate in many activities and to engage in the studies. location is safe and it can handle emergencies.

[college infrastructure]: the college has decent infrastructures. some of the labs and buildings are recently constructed but have all the basic facilities. classrooms or the lecture halls are proper air conditioned ones with cusioned seats and smart boards. library looks a bit outdated but the new library building is being constructed and will be operational anytime soon. sports facilities: one ground for football or cricket, four indoor badminton courts, 2 tennis courts, 2 basketball courts, table-tennis room. | [academics]: i am pursuing electrical engineering. the reason for this is the one with most of the students that i could not get cse. the teachers are good. some of them just do their job. curriculum gets updated after every 2-3 years. | [placements]: the placements have become quite decent recently. more than 80 percent of students are getting placed. the highest salary offered was over 1 crore grabbed by an ece student. average salary for cse and ece is around 12 lpa. for ee it is 10 lpa. | [campus life]: the campus is spread in around 150 acres which may feel a bit smaller to most of the students. popular food chains are missing here otherwise there are plenty of food joints. location of college is a bit far from the city. environment is safe for students.
college_name: Dr B R Ambedkar National Institute of Technology Jalandhar

review_text: [college infrastructure]: the infrastructure provided by the college is of next level. the maintanence provide by the college is also very good. we find everything there that a student need. the allover wifi speed in the campus is average, many times we have to use our internet only but it is better in librariries. hostels are safe and are a good option for accomodation. | [academics]: i would say, academics here are average, teachers also lack some professionalism while teaching. some teachers are extremely good while on the other hand a good number of teachers are average, yes they do clear the doubts if we have any but not getting as per expected. | [placements]: as of heard till now, placements here are good but in my batch, there is a lpt of competition as the volume of students who got admitted to cse is very large. here all the big tech companies come for placements but my main worry is about the unhealthy competition due to large number of students. | [campus life]: campus life on the cu campus is very nice, we get many refreshment options, specially if you are hostler, you will enjoy the night view of the college. we can find many people from several cultures and all the lgbtqs are also treated same and also given importance on the campus.

review_text: one india is celebrated as the annual fest of lpu, a four-day event that is usually in the month of march. the library of lpu has a great collection of over 3 lac books with a seating capacity of over 3.5k students. classrooms are equipped with comfortable chairs and desks to ensure that the students can sit comfortably for four long hours without any discomfort. it also had a wide range of sports facilities with extra curriculum activities.this course (btech cse) offers a better placement and also has a great scope in future with the increasing technology. genuinely the faculty of lpu is highly qualified and friendly in nature with each student and even they treat students with love and care. i love their way of teaching with fun which helps us to learn easily without any boringness. to pass term exams was quite difficult which used to hold each semester.

campus infrastructure is outstanding. wifi connection is somewhat weak. hostels are well maintained and neat & clean. .quality of mess food is poor. students use to order their food through zomato or swiggy. all sports from swimming to football, tennis, cricket, etc are available inside the campus. huge library with all kinds of study facilities like discussion room, projector room, the reading room is available for students.fees are very high. approx 25-28 lakh is the amount a student will spend for the 4 years of engineering. thapar is increasing its fees every year. most of the students move toward pgs due to the high amount of fees charged for hostels and mess fees. financial assistance is not provided in thapar but other colleges like nits and iiits do provide their students with financial aid.
college_name: Thapar Institute of Engineering and Technology - [Thapar University]

review_text: more than a positive we have lots of negative things in our institute. i definitely not recommend this college to anyone. they are completely money minded they will make you satisfied to join in the institute but after once joining here and paying fee they won't even think about students and their life's. you can go through youtube search about our college and you can see what's exactly happening in our college.no fee structure depends upon the performance on lpu nest. without any scholarship the annual fee is 209000. but with scholarship it get reduced to even 89000 per annum. fee structure is feasible with the facilities provided by the university. labs are fine classrooms are maintained with ac availability. no extra charges are put by the university.

the internship opportunity is not good for an internship you have to apply by yourself to another college for any industry. for research internships, you can apply to your faculties members and you can take help from your faculties for internships. but you have so many opportunities for projects in college.campus life is excellent there are so many fests happening in your college. at even semester time events are conducted. freely you can use the library and the infrastructure of the library is very nice and full ac library, so the opportunity for sport and extra curriculum.

review_text: after the end of the third year, the students will get a chance to attend the interviews. there are many reputed companies such as tcs, tata, etc are the main recruiters of the college. almost 80 percent of students get their placement in the college itself, some may go for further higher studies.the fee structure is not that high in the institutes like nits or iits. if you are of the general category then you have to pay the tuition fee of 78000 per semester or else for other categories fee waiver will be provided. those who are not able to buy immediately can take loans from banks.

review_text: i am good at coding and i love to do coding and became a coder, faculty with a student is good like iit level and they are friendly too they will explain the topic for the 2nd 3rd time also if students don't understand, midterm exams will be conducted after 2 months of semester start and end term with be in 4-5 months of semester start and passing in exam is 30% of the total and it is easy to get 30% by doing mcqs and we have ca too and will be taken at last for grade and attendance is of 5 marks for each subjectstudents are eligible in 3 years for placements and we have amazon, tech mahendra, cisco, deloitte, bosch and etc companies offering jobs for students in lpu. we have an average package of 3lakhs and the highest is 43 lakhs on amazon. in lpu 90-92% of students get placed and my plan after getting my degree is to go for higher studies abroad

review_text: pros/cons: the course curriculum is very relevant, so you don't have to study biology and chemistry. junior senior interaction is very good, no ragging culture. i like the infrastructure of this college, buildings and campus is well maintained . extra curricular activities like sports, dance, music is not much here. it has little bit of hectic acads, there are lots of assignments and quizs. faculties are strict but some are chill and have expertise in their domain. | placement experience: the placement scenario in iiit allahabad is commendable. in the session of 2024, over 280 companies participated in the recruitment drive. notable recruiters includes: google, microsoft, oracle, amazon, de shaw, goldman sachs, flipkart, paytm, wipro and many more. highest package : 1.21 cpa average package : 25.78 lpa

review_text: [college infrastructure]: very good infrastructure. the infrastructure of a college plays a vital role in the development of the college as the students are now focusing on the labs, class rooms, etc while selecting a college. it is important that the colleges have very good infrastructure with advanced laboratories equipped with state of the art equipment etc. | [academics]: good in academics. an academic department is a division of a university or school faculty devoted to a particular academic discipline.college life is an exciting adventure. it's a time to make new friends, learn new things, and grow as an individual. the freedom to choose your classes and explore your interests is liberating. you'll face challenges, like tough assignments and exams, but they help you grow. | [placements]: placement status is also very good. most of the companies select candidates who have gained a minimum of 60% in their class 12th exam. some highly recognized companies also increase their range and select students who have at least 70% marks in 12th.candidates need to work hard to crack campus placement interviews and as freshers, they require a lot of training for work. often, students at a college don't get their dream companies and they have to settle for the companies that recruit them at the time of campus placement at relatively lesser pay packages. | [campus life]: i like this college. | [anything else]: no no.

pros/cons: sports facilities is really good. all kinds of courts are present. faculty is good, everyone with phd degree. so many students club and various activities throughout the year. course curriculum is not updated and hence feels like it's not good enough for placement. management part is not good. rude behaviour from management department. exposure is not good enough, you need to spend your own money for it. | placement experience: 270/400 are placed till now, recruitment drive is still in progress. highest package 86 lpa average package 17lpa lowest packages varies between 5-8 lpa recruitment companies are google, amazon, microsoft, apple, tcs. only about 3% get internship 37/400, 10 of which were in google.

[college infrastructure]: iit delhi boasts world class infrastructure with advance labs and modern technologies. the campus with so much greenery and smart facilities make the infrastructure best and create the perfect setting for infrastructure. | [academics]: iit delhi academic environment is rigorous and research oriented . with expert faculty ,innovative curriculum and interdisciplinary learning,it fosters deep understanding, critical thinking and excellence in both theoretical and practical formats. | [placements]: iit delhi offers exceptional placement opportunities with top global recruiters. high packages , diverse profiles , and strong industry connections make it one of the india's best institute for carrer growth and professional success. | [campus life]: campus life at iit delhi is dynamic and vibrant filled with activities , clubs , fest and students . it blends with academics with recreation, fostering creativity , friendship and holistic personal growth . also there are many things apart from this which make it best.

the annual fest of dtu- engifest (north india's biggest fest). techfest, esummit, and more fests are conducted all year. library: the library of dtu is decent enough and contains major books of the syllabus of every course going on here. amenities in classrooms: classrooms are fully furnished with ac installed, whiteboard, projector, and screen. dtu contains almost every sport like cricket, football, table tennis, pool, kabaddi ground, lawn tennis, volleyball, basketball, etc. in dtu teachers are also supportive of extracurricular activities and allow students in their period to work on that if possible. here societies are uncountable, you name it and dtu have a society for that, and if not then you can start yours as well for the same.yes, of course, there is a fee hike for the last few years, and in fact, this hike got all over the world and not just in dtu. it is difficult for one to pay fees on their own, so there is loan availability and a sbi branch is opened as well on the college campus itself. the university offers merit scholarships for candidates belonging to sc/st/obc/minority category and a post metric scheme for sc candidates. for the btech continuous education program: the students whose family annual income is less than 4.5lakhs per annum are eligible for fee concession for students belonging to lean financial condition.

the course i opted for is basically all about fundamentals of computer system and programming, web development and other it related stuf.but in the first year that is for the first 2 semester all branch students have to study some common subjects together in mixed batches.those subjects are bme, maths1, maths2, chemistry, physics, electrical, electronics, technical communication, computer aided engineering drawing, economics, c programming, enivironmetal studies and ecology.well all this subjects are good but you actually dont need to study them cause most of this doesnt help you in future course (in your core subjects) like for students of cse (computer science and engineering) we dont need to study chemistry, bme exectra.the practical approach is the minimal here there are lots of labs for different subjects here but students are mostly pressurised on the theory of the experiment rather then the practical approach.there is only one sports ground for all type of sports which i feel is not upto the mark.the ground is used for football, cricket, athletics, running exectra at the same time.we have sports complex also for badminton and courts for tennis and basketball.almost we have courts and playing arena for all sports but they arent upto the mark also their are no coaches available for any sports which is quite disappointing.

[college infrastructure]: the lovely professional university has great campus they have around 600 acres of land with proper infrastructure .they also provide first class hostel facility upto 25000 students have stay in this hostel. | [academics]: the college provide have und 160 plus courses to the students such as engineering, management , law , pharmacy , design , computer application and many more . they have very good curriculm for the students. | [placements]: the placement is also great because they have around around 2500 plus top recruiters and they also provide upto 80000 plus internship for one month to the students. the top recruiters are dell, amazon ,google etc. | [campus life]: the campus life of lovely professional university is outstanding because they have provide various events and fests to the students which help the student in motivate each other. they also have cultural events. | [anything else]: no

the annual fest of iit kanpur is antaragni which is also one of asia's largest technical fest techkriti and both are conducted in the month of march. basically in the library, we have academics-oriented books that are large in number. nearly 10k books are there which is also the largest among all iits we have ac in our classes and staircase seats are there which also makes the board seems visible we have a projector which projects on a large screen. there are facilities for as many sports as possible. we have been provided with coaches for respective games. seniors help alot which makes it easy for some people who are starting fresh. in extracurricular as well have had every thing possible and seniors teach u so well that if you are starting from scratch also, you won't face problems. all the groups, clubs, website, ig as well as fest, everything is run by students.the faculty-student ratio depends on the department to department my department has a batch strength of 70 students whereas electrical peeps have a strength of 190 the faculty here are highly qualified. almost all have done phd in respective fields that too from colleges around the world and are ready to help you out if u ask for it. we have our exams namely quizzes, mid sem and ends it all happens within 4 months exams are not difficult to pass but its really difficult to get a good grade because the competition here is massive. also, you must be looking at your friends who are from let's say tier 2 college, they study just one or two days before the exams and gets result but there is nothing as such.
