[college infrastructure]: the university is indeed a city within noida. you?ll get so many facilities, along with the best educational services and job opportunities! loved the staff, students and campus life. highly recommended campus! | [academics]: the staff in the forensic department is amazing. they help you with a comprehensive range of options and make sure your future is in good hands! my grades got better with time, thanks to the hod and other staff members. | [placements]: the placement cell is comprehensive. you can explore your fit as you get in the third year. maximum students got placed! my interview went good, thanks to the staff members here. they also guide you along the process. | [campus life]: amazing campus life! amity university provides the best experience of college life.

[college infrastructure]: the infrastructure is the only thing that this college lacks , but still the college is undergoing great infrastructure changes. the college is overall super great, provides all facilities, studying environment is all also good.hostels are also good, and mess provides healthy, hygienic and tasty food. amazing institute with sky scrapping placement records even for core branches. | [academics]: i must say the academic of this institute is satisfactory , i am studying mechanical engineering and faculties, seniors are all very helpful. you will get all the resources required for studying. the curriculum is also good, no complaints so far. | [placements]: placement of this institute is awesome, and the best part is not just non core sectors have great placement records but even core branches have. you can check placement records online. it is under top 8 nits | [campus life]: campus life is safe, amazing ,superb, you will make great memories here.

pros/cons: the sports and gym facilities provided here the lab equipments and guidance provided bonding with teachers and the way they teach 75% attendance is mandatory which is sometimes tough to maintain because of huge campus , its a burden to reach the classes on time because of huge croud, we have to spend much time while ordering in canteen | placement experience: yeah, the college offers placement. you can appear in companies from 3rd year. on an average the package is 8lpa. and most of the students get placed before the course ends. even you will get global opportunity here.
college_name: Kalinga Institute of Industrial Technology - [KIIT], Bhubaneswar

review_text: the best thing about mnit jaipur is its campus life. the location factor is too good, it is in the center of the city with many nearby hangout places. the annual cultural fest is blitzschlag which was held in february and the technical fest is sphinx which happened in march. there are a large number of books and journals available in the library. they also provide many e-resources, and the wi-fi facility is great in the library. in mnit, lectures are held in vltc which is asia's largest lecture theater complex. there are projectors in class, a capacity of 120+ students in each class, etc. there are many clubs run by students here in mnit, one of them is ed cell which helps entrepreneurs represent their ideas in front of the college administration.i chose btech in ece because the ultrasmall microchips working behind our sophisticated machines interested me. the faculty: student ratio is about 1:23. faculties are well-qualified and well-versed in their respective domains. the teaching method is a bit old school because of no motivation to change their methods. for our batch, midterms were conducted in one and a half months after our classes started. end terms were conducted after 4 months of start of classes because our time was compressed due to covid delays. the exams are not too hard to pass, giving regular attention in class can make you top the class and studying properly before the exams is enough to pass the exam.

there are many branches 1. cse 2. it 3. ece 4. eee 5. mechanical 6. civil 7. biotech 8. mba 9. architecture and many more exam structure:- we have 6 exams in one year 1. cat1 50 marks exam converted into 15% weightage. 2. cat2 open notebook 50 marks exam converted into 15% weightage. 3. fat 100 marks exam having weightage 40%. 4. three internal assessments of 10 marks each having 30% weightage. total 100 % same for another semester also.they are extremely helpful. we have many clubs and chapters here in college and all the senior guide us and help us in gaining knowledge. we work together with seniors even in we study together in the same classes all thanks to ffcs. there is no ragging at all in college and they share every experience with us and guide us on what to do next in our life. they are the perfect motivation to us.

lpu provides a lot of facilities in the university and it has a huge library and a huge collection of books. and had good classrooms and there are regular sports and extracurricular activities. had a great experience with thisi choose the course because i have a deep interest in it. there are good faculty members and the student's ratio is also very high teaching methods of the faculty members are very good and the setup of the exam is very good

[college infrastructure]: facilities in terms of the classroom, library are excellent, but the hostel has tightened rules and regulations. it entirely depends on an individual where they would like to stay either in pg or campus hostel, as have their pros and cons. the canteen is ich that serves a variety of cuisine, and adapting to south indian food ingredients is essential as the usage of coconut oil in almost all of the dishes would be there. there is no canteen card, so you have to purchase it from there every day. | [academics]: the bba honours course would give you a plethora of knowledge about the particular specialization you would be choosing to excel in your career, while the curriculum is at a good level because it runs on international universities' standards. they have divided the exams into various components, and they do bring updates to refreshen the area of expertise. | [placements]: the quality is increasing yearly, and the placement for the bba honours course saw a good increment; companies like de shaw, mckinsey, deloitte, lowe's, bcg, so on came this year. at the same time, average salary offers were around 3.8 lakhs, and the highest was around 19 lakhs (including the incentives). | [campus life]: christ bgr campus is small, but it would be easier for you to connect with more people on this campus while they have recently launched this courses on their other campus. you could be a part of ngos, skill development team, consulting group, dance team, volunteering committee. students actively participate and organize the events on campus, so to evolve and for extracurriculars, this would be a plus.

[college infrastructure]: college infrastructure is good. class and labs are equipped with ac and projectors. kiit is fully wifi enabled. kiit has over 10 food courts preparing different cuisines for the students. it also have international hostel only for the international student. the living spaces are clean but few food courts are unhygienic. | [academics]: academic is excellent at kiit. the curriculum gets updated every year seeing the need of the subject in future. the teachers help the student in every respect. the lab assistant are also good in explaining small doubts. kiit's calendar is good giving space to the students from study sessions. | [placements]: one word for placement at kiit is wow. among all the private universities, kiit receives the highest placement of 39lpa every year. adobe recruited the highest . followed by gaints like amazon, microsoft, wipro , dell and rest. | [campus life]: college campus is really beautiful. kiit is near to a hill and the campus is surrounded by beautiful trees and flowers. kiit conducts manh international and national events for the students to have interactions with rest students . it provides a lot of scope to win scholarship.
college_name: Kalinga Institute of Industrial Technology Bhubaneswar

review_text: one india is celebrated as the annual fest of lpu, a four-day event that is usually in the month of march. the library of lpu has a great collection of over 3 lac books with a seating capacity of over 3.5k students. classrooms are equipped with comfortable chairs and desks to ensure that the students can sit comfortably for four long hours without any discomfort. it also had a wide range of sports facilities with extra curriculum activities.this course (btech cse) offers a better placement and also has a great scope in future with the increasing technology. genuinely the faculty of lpu is highly qualified and friendly in nature with each student and even they treat students with love and care. i love their way of teaching with fun which helps us to learn easily without any boringness. to pass term exams was quite difficult which used to hold each semester.

[college infrastructure]: being one of the prestigious college in india, the infrastructure in our college is well maintained. it has well wi-fi connection, classrooms, and library, besides this mess is simply excellent, sports arena are conducted every year. first aid is provided to the students and ambulance services. | [academics]: about the semester exams, in this course, there is no semester type thing. instead, we follow the term system (4 months). there are 3 terms in a year, and about the 'term end exams', some of the subjects are very difficult to pass for some of the students. also, if you can't pass a subject, you have to repeat the entire subject in the next term; there is no system like 'back exams' like other colleges. | [placements]: around 60% of the students got placed. the average package offered was around 15 lpa, the lowest was 5 lpa and the highest package was 60 lpa. the placements would have be much better this year but because of the recession, it was bad. top recruiting companies are p&g, wipro, ola etc. around 60% students got internships on campus. top roles offered are that of design trainee, graduate engineer trainee, cell and battery innovation center (r&d), management trainee etc. | [anything else]: superb college.

life is very good at lpu. there is no raging culture and everyone is equal here irrespective of what they are studying and where they are from. they give the same amount of preference to sports too. there are many players from lpu who won medals for our country.the teachers are very friendly and supportive. they will explain n number of times if required. the curriculum is very simple and easy. since my childhood, i'm into computers and mobile phones so i chose this computer science and engineering.

[college infrastructure]: our campus is shared part of another college thus there is always space issues. all the classrooms ad las are well equipped with acs and projectors. we have a small ground which can manage games like volleyball, basketball, badminton but we have to face issue while playing football and cricket due to space size. the whole campus is very neat and clean and the mess food is good | [academics]: all the faculties are well qualified did phd in their respective fields. they have good command over the topic of their field. our course curriculum is though not updated but we along with faculties work on various projects which gives us the practical insights which eventually help us in being job ready. | [placements]: we have various recruiters like amazon,oyo , delloite etc but we have very few companies for core branch like tata powers for eee branch. highest package offered is 39lpa by microsoft . we have average salary around 6lpa . around 80% of students got placed with good package. | [campus life]: we have a small campus area which creates hurdles many times such a during any sports event organisation or fest, though we have two fests every year along with freshers and farewell party. many teachers ad staffs are helpful in their respective domains. it is located near haryana border with around 200m away from harishchadra hospital thus we can better adjusted during emergencies.

[college infrastructure]: facilities provided by iit patns includes hostels with clean and properly maintained rooms, mess with well defined menu which includes all the nutrious and tasty diet, modern classrooms, incubation center, sports grounds, etc. | [academics]: i started coding in class 9 and developed great interest in competative programming with time, so i decided to choose computer science and engineering in iit patna. academics is very chill here as compared to other iits, there are less project and assingments in second and third year. | [placements]: quality of placements at iit patna is best and improving at its fastest rate. average salary offered to student of iit patna was 26 lakhs per annum in 2022 and highest package was from computer science branch of 1.2 crore per annum(domestic).

[college infrastructure]: good infrastructure along with all the necessary facilities and equipments. classrooms having projector, noise proof walls. wifi is available everywhere in campus. living spaces is clean and of course foods are hygienic. | [academics]: i am studying cse with specialization in iot. quality of teaching is appreciable. teachers are well qualified and are very attractive with students which makes teaching even more easy.curriculum is updated. | [placements]: placements are increasing every year along with increase in average package. almost 90-95% students get placement every year. placement processes are easy and pleasant. college is very supportive and caring. | [campus life]: great scenes almost from everywhere inside the college campus. good friends. nice playing equipments.

[college infrastructure]: classrooms are spacious and well-ventilated; labs are well-equipped with modern computers and tools. library has a decent collection and wifi works well. hostel rooms are clean, mess food is acceptable and living spaces are hygienic. | [academics]: i?m studying mba. in mnit jaipur; teachers are mostly friendly and helpful, lectures are clear, and assignments help understanding. however, syllabus could be updated ? some parts feel outdated. i feel like it's a great experience. | [placements]: the college arranges placement drives; last year around 60% of final-year students got placed, mostly in mid-level jobs. the highest package offered to my batch was ?16 lpa, but average was around ?8 lpa. internship opportunities are limited | [campus life]: campus life is good ? there are sports, cultural events and student clubs; it's peaceful and environment is friendly. safety and discipline are decent. | [anything else]: overall, i?m reasonably satisfied with my college. it works well especially if you want practical labs and a good campus life. if you want top-tier placements, it depends on your course and performance. i would recommend it to future students with interest in practical learning and a balanced campus environment.
college_name: Malaviya National Institute of Technology Jaipur

review_text: there is one the most famous cultural fest namely culrav in which all the cultural clubs participate and compete with each other. there is a large number of culture clubs, dance, music dramatics, bengali dance, rajasthani dance, and oration committee. apart from this, there is one the most famous tech fest called techno-management fest, aavishkar with all the students building websites apps, etc. the technical clubs are coding clubs, robotics, astrowing, photography, etc. the central library is the heart of mnnit you can have all the books on regular days but during exam time you may find it difficult to get the books the sports environment is good. yes, there is one website called paper factory in which you can find all the study material related to the first year. the motive of this portal is just to help newly admitted students.for income greater than 5 lpa no reduction in the tuition fees. income 1-5 lakh 2/3 of the tuition fees are not being asked by the students. income less than 1 lpa full tuition fees are free. apart from this, you can apply for different government schemes and scholarships like nsp, up scholarship and many more. secondly, the top 5 students from the second year to the final year in every branch received 20k per year as a merit scholarship reward. last but not least if didn't receive any government scholarship then you will be provided financial aid from the dean academic based on your academic performance and the number of applications received. bonus: you can also apply for a scholarship from mnnit alumini association.
college_name: MNNIT Allahabad - Motilal Nehru National Institute of Technology - [MNNIT]

review_text: [college infrastructure]: the electrical lab is very good and clean.however,all instruments are excellent. in my department, we have ac classrooms. the wifi provided is 2 gb per day. the library is very good it has a wide collection of books. sports facilities are excellent all the sports grounds are available badminton, tennis, hockey, cricket, etc. | [academics]: teachers are helpful. they are well qualified; they are the best in their research fields.but they are really awesome at teaching. you have to put in some extra effort to be industry-ready. the pass percentage is 40 percent in each subject. the difficulty level is average. we have 30 for internal, 20 for midterm, and 50 for the end term. | [placements]: about 80 percentage of students placed in my course this year. the lowest package is 5 lac per annum, and the highest package offered is 52 lac per annum. the average package is about 11 lac per annum. top recruiting companies are ongc, deloitte, etc.

[college infrastructure]: the college has a wonderful infrastructure, it has all the facilities like parking lot ,library,seminar hall,tv longue,faculty chambers,workstations etc. to add on there is a lawn area developed now in front the statue .there is also canteen for students to have food. the classroom have the digital board and some of them also have green boards. there is a placement cell aswell. the classrooms are well maintained,clean and tidy. | [academics]: i am pursuing my mba. the lectures are really well experienced and they have a very good knowledge on the topics they teach.they make us the topic understandable by giving live examples and practical knowledge. | [placements]: almost all qualified students get placed and mentoring will happen twice a week .placement training will also be conducted. they call different orators from various backgrounds to encourage and motivate students. | [campus life]: there are so many hood memories in the college.the are many events that happen both the management and cocurricular activities. they send us for various intercollegiate events where we make a lot of memories. the teachers are really supportive in all the good acts you do.the location is near rr nagar ,channasandra. it's in the main road hence can handle emergencies.

many tech fest is organized every year on basis of different clubs we have joined. most fest is conducted in december and january. the books in the library are not enough for 4000 students first-year students. the second and fourth-year students are on college campuses their classes are conducted online due to less accommodation in hostels. the hostels and academic block are under construction. half the building is constructed and classes of first-year students are conducted there only. but the classrooms are pretty nice and sufficient for students now. many games and tournaments are conducted on campus, for example, football basketball badminton table tennis, and many more. many clubs are there and run by students for example sports, software development, regional, english literacy, nss club, and many others.i was a computer science-interested student in my childhood. the college was fulfilling my demands to become a successful computer science data science engineer. the faculty-to-student ratio is about 4:1. this college has 100% ph.d. doctorate faculty. most teachers are from iits and nits govt college of engineering. two exams occur every semester i.e. midterm and final end term. it's very hard to crack those exams because of relative grading (percentile based examination). about 40% of students fail every semester because of this grading system. i managed to grade god in my first mid-term exams.

[college infrastructure]: yes my college has all necessary infrastructure, equipments and facilities available here .and classrooms are very neat and clean and it includes all necessary facilities like air conditioning and wifi and also equipped with led projectors and smart boards also. living spaces are neat and clean and food offered here is also hygienic. | [academics]: i'm currently pursuing my master's program from here and quality of education offered here is great. teachers are extremely qualified and they put every effort to make us learn new everyday. curriculum is up to date and also they teach about the new and evolving industry standards. | [placements]: quality of placements offered here is quite decent. and percentage of students placed this year is around 68 percent. highest package offered was of rupees 13 lpa and it went to mba finance. average package offered was around 6-7 lpa but the placement process was not at all easy but the college staff was very supportive and it helped at every corner.

pros/cons: hostel rooms i like very much. it is spacious. each room is having 3 bed 3 almirah and 3 table chair pairs. electricity is good .. main campus is not that much far away from hostel. as nit raipur is located at good location so environment is also good through out the year water facility at hostel is not good . tds is very high . uncleanliness at hostel corridors. no strict rules for mess workers somewhat i don't like the syllabus of the course. i am in it branch still i have to study one subject of ece branch | placement experience: placement status is good . 18 lpa is the average package 50 lpa is the highest package. companies visited here are -- black rock de shaw cisco triology fanatics zscaler zshealtcare if you are not placed then uyou can prepare for -- cat exam gate exam you can do your own startup if you are having that much followers.

[college infrastructure]: dsce has decent campus spread overo 30 acres . each department has its own building and labs . the college also has 3 hostels catering more than 1000 students . the college also has basketball court,football ground and gym | [academics]: dsce has one of the best academic excellence. majority of the faculties are phds. our college also offers be degree in various majors including computer science and engineering, ece,etc,civil engineering etc | [placements]: the placements of dsce are quite decent. dsce has an overall placement percentage of 75% with an average salary package of 8-9lpa. the cse department has the highest placement percentage and package of 51 lpa | [campus life]: the campus life is dsce is really good and students enjoy their time in the campus. campus provides amenities like gym, football ground meditation center. | [anything else]: the college is great with good academic records and excellence in sports. the campus comprises of students from various states and majors staying together. the college has well qualified faculties which help students in performing well in academics and career. dsce also provides opportunities like internships and mentorship for jobs and higher studies there are multiple placement rounds ensuring proper placement opportunities to every student
college_name: Dayananda Sagar College of Engineering Bangalore

review_text: gravitas and riviera are the two fests conducted in vit vellore per year. gravita fest in fall smester and rivera in winter semester. libraries are available in college campus , there are two types of library regular and digital. digital library contains e-books , kindle etc. classrooms are well maintained and clean. vit indulge in all type of sports, a sports premiere league is held where winnig teams get cash price. you can also participate in clubs in the college.there are around 200 clubs and chapters you can take part in.there is n number of courses to choose in this college. i choose my course because i had an interest in this side. as the college provides a lot of corses so, ratio of students studying are also high. yes, i would say the faculties are may more qualified and knowledgeable. about teaching method it depends on faculty, not every facutly is a good teacher in vit, some are very lenient whereas some are really strict. exams are held mothly and semester wise, 2 monthly exams and 1 final exam in a semester.

[college infrastructure]: good infrastructure . classrooms are with good ventilation, laboratories are well equiped, libraries are level maintained with pin drop silence ,sport centers are with good facilities. only wifi is of low speed sometimes. | [academics]: i am studying electronics and communication engineering 3rd year currently. good teaching and mentoring overall. syllabus what teach is being updated eveeyyear for every batch according to this industry needs. | [placements]: heard that reva ece branch has been going with good placements around 200+ placed in 2020. placed in good companies with high packages. training for placement examsare also given well. many competitions goes on which gives lots of opportunities to everyone | [campus life]: campus life is too good with good greenery surroundings , good food court to sit and chat ,huge ground to play, three floored library.

yes kiit provides so many scholarships to there student. i am one of the students who is enjoying scholarship given by them.i have earned 869 ranking in kiitee so kiit provides me scholarship of 10000 every month.this scholarship can be availed by all the student who have secured under top 1000 ranking in kiitee.and there are so many other scholarship which kiit provides to international students and to kiitians during the course period.kiit have very good infrastructure.it is providing free sports activities for there students,it promotes sports activities, you will have this idea after having knowledge about the 1st khelo india event organised by kiit. kiit's library has verity of book in every domain,you can find any thing whatever you need. labs are very advanced.

[college infrastructure]: we have the best campus infrastructure of our university. we have different blocks for different courses and best laboratories in our campus. our auditorium can accommodate large number of students at a time. | [academics]: we have best in class and experienced faculty to boost our knowledge and skills. we have latest curriculum which satisfies latest industry requirements. teachers keep us busy with enormous amount of assignments and practicals for practical knowledge. | [placements]: best companies visit our college for placement purpose. you can grab good package from university provided placement. we have a placement cell wuth good link with industry making placement drive more effective.

[college infrastructure]: iit madras is no 1 college in india so here all facilities be available .classroom and laboratry be well modern and updated. a lot of sports facilities is there one olympic size running ground is available .each and every thing what you expect in good college is available there. one of the most important things that campus is naturally habitat. | [academics]: i am studying m.tech in design in ev it is interdisciplinary course one of the new course in india.no doubt teaching quality is good nice teacher all teacher behaviour is very nice and friendly.all curriculum is updated and every department research is going on different field.if you well study you get very good job. | [placements]: placement statics of college is very nice . in mtech last year 91% overall placement is done which one is highest of in any iit. all most highest package is 2.4 cr and in btech course.average salary is approx 19 lpa and placement process is easy and pleasant as per senior experience.from the time of admission college is supportive. | [campus life]: one of the best campus in india .inside campus you can feel very natural . campus is full of flora and fauna and home of black buck, monkey and many more species. only one worst thing is weather in chennai is hot but inside campus you feel better compare to outside.every students ,teachers and staff be supportive.is it completely safe .if any emergencies helpline no is given management take immediate action. | [anything else]: iit madras is no 1 india college and no doubt here whatever be facility available is very nice .

pros/cons: the first thing i like here is the infrastructure, it is really great. the classrooms here are excellent and modern. most of the professors over here are knowledgeable and supportive. second is the ffcs(fully flexible credit system) which allows students to choose their own courses which they have to write in that particular semester. and it feels like you are the boss who decides which class to attend and at what time. next thing is the campus life and social interactions. here you can see students from all corners of india even from other nearby countries. the exposure that you get here is really great and you can enjoy your campus life to your fullest. things that i disliked at first was as a fresher you are not allowed to go out of the campus(as a hosteller) for first 3months without permission, but later i realised it is for our safety. the hostel rules might be strict with attendance and discipline and regular checkup will be there if they feel something suspicious about u. the tuition fees might feel a bit high and sometimes a burden to some families. | placement experience: b.tech students will be eligible after they complete their credits before the 3rd year and usually that is the period during which they will be eligible for placements. for integrated m.tech it might be after the 4th year in 5th year,they could get a year for internships which is good for students. this might be considered as my interest in this course.the placement is around 95 percent.my plans after getting the degree is to become a highly skilled person and to get a job in google. many companies like microsoft, amazon, qualcomm, etc place our campus.there are no such companies that visited and made no offers.
college_name: Vellore Institute of Technology - [VIT University], Vellore

review_text: [college infrastructure]: yes college have all the necessary infrastructure facilities and still developing. recently they inaugurated mega hostels for boys. all hostels are have wifi and cable internet facility. classroom are equipped with projectors ,ac.library is huge... can spend time to focus on your work there | [academics]: academics is good, you have to study well to pass. some part of the syllabus you may feel irrelevant but thats what is engineering.sometimes you have to know things that do not belong to your branch of study | [placements]: it is the thing that people choose mnnit allahabad. it is what the college is known for. you will find alums of mnnit in every big tech giants. most of the big tech giants visit the campus for hiring every year | [campus life]: for our batch, campus life was not so good due to less interaction... as 2 years we had online classes.. due to lockdown
college_name: Motilal Nehru National Institute of Technology Allahabad Prayagraj

review_text: from the 6th semester students are able to get campus placements to google amazon microsoft accenture and many more. many offers came from the companies highest is 50 lakhs and the average is 600000 good percentage - in 300 150 are placed with good placementscollege fees are upto 15 lakhs for 4 years for btech cse but excluding scholarship, there are many scholarships in my college hostels are quite costly but mess fees are good but if you represent your college at the national level you get a 1005 scholarship

[college infrastructure]: campus life is very happening as it's near to the koramangala, bangalore within walking distance, forum mall is there. as it's the oldest campus and has different departments situated here, so the main campus life is always fun-filled with events all the year. | [academics]: faculties are well experienced and mostly as its post-graduate course self-study matters a lot and how well you want to learn. faculty is very encouraging and helpful and you will feel the pressure a lot if you don't dedicate much even if you do if you feel a lot of pressure because its a culture. | [placements]: it's a tier-3 college but if you have caliber you can fetch double roi in terms of placements. just don't rely much on the college because college will try their best to make you capable at the end everything is in your hands. | [campus life]: no doubt about campus life. there are so many diverse people you will feel its the most happening place.( outside the class of course)

the fees of gla university are higher than other colleges. its b.tech computer science course fee of one year is about 2 lakh. and hostel fees are about 1 lakh. gla university also provides some scholarships for students. all the scholarship-related information is given on their website.the campus of gla university is very big. there are many facilities on campus. gla university has a central library. wifi is provided on the campus everywhere. classrooms are air conditioner. gla university conducts many fests. there are many clubs and societies at gla university.

[college infrastructure]: the infrastructure in-general is really nice. the labs are really high-tech. the department building looks a bit worn-down, but the facilities such as seminar rooms, library etc. are really up to the mark.the old hostels have really small rooms, and they are in repair mode. the new hostels, however, are really nice. a mess is present in every hostel, and a canteen is present in almost every hostel. the sport facilities are really awesome. both indoor and outdoor facilities are provided . there is a hospital inside the campus which provides free medical facility for every member.infrastructure is well and good. | [academics]: the faculty here is very well qualified, all of them being from well-reputed institutes .the teaching quality varies, some professors are really good teachers and some are not. however, every one of them is an excellent researcher. the curriculum provides you with strong theoretical fundamentals, and also provides opportunities for doing various projects. there are many professors here who work closely with the industry, and you can work with those professors to gain industry experience.professors are friendly with the students and with other staff members also. | [placements]: the placements of iit bombay are one of the best in the entire country. the percentage of placements in my senior year was around 75 % for all the branches, and it is was similar to that in my own degree. the highest package was around 4 crores inr per year, the lowest was 4 lpa, and the average was around 17-18 lpa.most of the top mnc's like mckinsey and co, bcg, brain and co, goldmann sachs, morgan stanely, tata steel, rakuta, jsw etc. came to our college.

i choose btech in eee because since childhood i have had a greater interest in electrical circuits, chipsets etc. so to make this interest into my passion i choose this course. the faculty-to-student ratio here is around 1:70. the faculty is highly qualified phd teachers with great contributions to research work in various fields. exams here are held on time and are moderately difficult to pass.students become eligible for placement from the 7th semester onwards. there are a number of big names visiting the campus flipkart, amazon, zs associates, paytm, ibm etc which gave more than 800+ offers. the highest package this year went around 53 lpa with the average being around 9 lpa. more than 80 per cent of students got placed this year.

three fests vivacity -cultural fest desportives - sports fest plinth - tech fest conducted each year between jan and feb, the library has a huge collection of various types of books. ac classrooms with comfortable chairs. every sport except swimming is available. various clubs are there, you can visit www.lnmiit.ac.in to see them.not many students get placed for internships from college. students majorly apply off campus for the same. those who get placed in the college themselves get around 30k per month as a stipend. various projects can be done under the supervision of faculty members.
college_name: The LNM Institute of Information Technology - [LNMIIT]

review_text: [college infrastructure]: yes our college have good infrastructure, facilities and equipment and we had good wifi connection and sports centre and hygiene food, pure drinking water, fresh air, clean toilets etc. i really satisfied with my college. | [academics]: i am studying biomedical engineering. i gained so many things from ours staffs. they help us at any time.they spent their valuable times for us. yes our curriculum is updated and includes all the recent developments. | [placements]: we had a good quality of placements in our college...maximum most of the students were placed in our campus interview...i haven't no idea about salary ppackage because i still attend campus interview... yes and our college support us to improve our knowledge | [campus life]: best campus ever i had seen in my life

review_text: placements at our college our is quite good various mnc companies visit our campus like google microsoft amazon. the highest offer in the previous placement season stood at 1.2cr per annum and the average package was around 15lpa. the sprinkler was the company that gave the highest stipend for an internship which was 2lac/month. more than 82% of students are placed rest go for either higher education or government exams preparation. my plan after getting the degree is to be placed in a good mnc with a decent package.life on campus is quite cheerful as there are many events and workshops conducted from time to time for refreshing+ there are many tech and nontech societies also annual fest is engifest and tech fest is invictus. books, magazines, and various kinds of journals are always available ranging on different topics in the central library. our classroom is well maintained and fully air-conditioned and they have many charging ports also. there are many sports facilities also both indoor and outdoor sports.

[college infrastructure]: the campus is expensive and well planned, with aesthetically designed buildings that house various departments and facilities. the architectural design blends functionality with modern aesthetics, creating an environment to learning and innovation. on campus accomodation is available with separate hostels for male and female students. these hostels are equipped with modern amenities, including wifi common rooms. | [academics]: vit offers a variety of courses in engineering, science, business , law and humanities. the curriculum is up to date and blends theory with practical skills. the faculty is experienced and highly qualified. many hold phd degrees and have significant research and industry. teaching methods include lectures, interactive sessions , lab works and projects. modern technology is used in classrooms to help students understand complex concepts better. | [placements]: a diverse range of companies from various sectors visit vit vellore for campus placements. top recruiters include major it firms like microsoft, google , amazon , tcs ,infosys and cognizant. vit also emphasis internships which often lead to pre placement offers. the institute has tie ups with various companies to provide students with valuable industry exposure and practical experience during their studies. | [campus life]: vit vellore hosts students from all over india and numerous countries worldwide. this diverse community fosters inclusive environment where students can learn from each other's cultural and perspectives. the campus is home to a wide range of clubs and societies including technical clubs, cultural clubs ,sports clubs and hobby clubs. vit vellore is known for its vibrant festivals and events. these events feature competitions , workshops , performances and guest lectures for the students to develop their leadership qualities. | [anything else]: vit vellore places a high priority on the safety and security of its students. the campus is equipped with cctv surveillance and there is a dedicated security team to ensure a safe environment.

[college infrastructure]: our college offers excellent infrastructure that truly supports learning and innovation. as a final-year civil engineering student, i've benefited greatly from the well-equipped laboratories, modern surveying instruments, and spacious classrooms with smart facilities. the library is rich in engineering resources and reference materials, making research easier. the campus is clean and well maintained and provides a comfortable environment for both academics and extracurriculars. overall, the infrastructure creates the perfect foundation for developing practical skill and preparing for successful engineering career. | [academics]: i am pursuing civil engineering because i've always been passionate about building and design. the academic curriculum here is well structured and industry oriented, helping us connect theory with real-world application. faculty members are highly knowledgeable and always supportive of our learning goals. regular workshops, projects, and site visits make the learning experience truly practical and engaging. | [placements]: the placement opportunities at our college are promising, especially for engineering students. around 70-80% of students get placed every year, and in my civil engineering department, also got the job in 7th semester. | [campus life]: campus life at our college is vibrant, engaging, and full of learning opportunities. the environment is friendly, with supportive teachers, helpful staff, and enthusiastic classmates from different backgrounds. the campus is safe, clean, and beautifully maintained, creating a positive space for study and recreation. from technical fests to cultural events, every day here adds to a memorable college experience. | [anything else]: overall, my journey as a civil engineering student at this college has been truly rewarding. the balance between academics and practical exposure and personal growth has shaped me into a confident professional.

[college infrastructure]: the infrastructure of the college is good. although it is not a very large campus but it has greenery all around. recent construction of highway has destructed the path and has created problems for everyone. | [academics]: i am information technology student of fourth year. the academics is average as any good college of apj abdul kalam technical university. the syllabus and everything is decided by the university itself. | [placements]: the placements of the college is average. it is basically the capability of student to prepare themselves and apply according to their capabilities. they always have option for applying off campus for better companies. | [campus life]: campus life depends on your friends and involvement in the co curricular activities. there are various societies but no fests take place in the college. also there are several restrictions imposed by the college.

review_text: pros/cons: itnu is the largest private university in western india. over 100 companies have mous with us and every year over 1000 students are placed from our campus. we have multiple streams in our university and be it engineering, management or law, all are top class. local students put their hands first on all the facilities and we get them post them. | placement experience: i am in my 7th semester and i was asked to apply. after beging rejected from two i was still provided the opportunity and in 4th attempt i finally made it. likewise every student is provided ample chances and mostly in penultimate semester around 70% students are placed. rest all get one final chance in the massive placements activity in the final semester.

review_text: [college infrastructure]: yes, our college has all the necessary infrastructure, facilities and equipment. our classrooms and labs are well maintained. yes, our living spaces and the foods are hygienic. smart boards and wi-fi facilities are equipped in each and every department of our college | [academics]: i am currently studying bachelor of technology in electronics and communication engineering. since childhood i have an interest in various types of electronic gadgets which always makes me wonder how these things work. yes, my course curriculum is completely updated and includes all the recent developments in the field. i think by gaining the complete knowledge and having a strong concept of my subject makes me job ready. | [placements]: the quality of placements at my college is pretty stable. around 90% of students from our college are placed after bachelors and the rest either go for entrepreneurship or for higher studies. according to the placement reports one student was offered 72 lakhs per annum which was the highest package received. average salary offered is from 6 lakhs per annum to 10 lakhs per annum. our college is very supportive when it comes to placements | [campus life]: best features- good lab facilities worst features- 1) when it comes to midterms, our college conducts the exam by taking 2 different subjects on the same day which becomes quite difficult to study and memorize the subjects. therefore, this creates a disturbance in understanding the subjects which becomes really stressful for the students. 2) our college does not provide any sufficient gaps (in terms of days) which becomes quite problematic for the students. 3) the same goes for our final semester examinations.

review_text: i choose this college because its placement is really good. and the course curriculum is very good and latest they keep on updating the syllabus base on the changing requirements. continuous guidance is taken from the companies to comply with the latest. if i talk about the faculty of the university is very good and amazing all teachers support us and uu can ask anything anytime. they are avail for us every time. and the faculty and student ratio is very good. all the teachers are qualified and most of the teachers are iitians the teaching method is all teachers is very good. there are two-term examinations in a semester one is the mid-term and the end-term examination if you are doing continuous work then it is very easy paper level is moderate and sometimes easy. and each semester is 6 months and every year two semesters are . and all teachers revise the course before the exam and taught well.there is a lot of tech fest annual fest in this university that makes our communication skills and many other skills more amazing. throughout the year several activities take place to engage the student. and there are 150+ clubs in gla that includes all categories like coding, singing, dancing, reports, and many other. and there are two big libraries one of the department and the other is a central library and all books are available to read for free without cost. and there are all types of sports are available at gla university. and many events are run by student daily and student participation in the event like cyber security and dancing. and many playgrounds for all sports and different grounds for different sports like football, cricket, baseball, etc. and so campus life is all students is amazing.

[college infrastructure]: facilities of this college were so awesome, all the equipment are available here in this college, infrastructure is also very good. laboratories of this college are also very good. wifi is also available here. | [academics]: i've done my bachelor's in business administration (bba) from there. and the quality of teaching of this college is so awesome. curriculum of this university is also very updated as it is a university so they teach us according to what market requirements are. | [placements]: the quality of placements are average as only 80% of our batch got placed only. our colleges average placement for our batch was 4 lakhs per annum only. and the highest placement gone to 6 lakhs per annum. placement process was not easy to us.

[college infrastructure]: talking about infrastructure, this college is amazing in terms of its infrastructure and i will personally suggest this college in terms of its huge campus infrastructure which covers arround 600+ accers of plot. and contains all the required things for students like mall, gym, huge library, all types of playcourts and playgrounds, own indoor stadium, several food courts, restaurants, and many more places and stuffs. | [academics]: i am studying computer science and engineering in lovely professional university, in terms of academics its average. because it all depends upon which faculty u get, as some of the faculties here are well educated and scholared but some seems like less knowledgeable and dont have vast knowledge about that topic, so u cant learn anything deeply in that subject. and personally i will say that u have to be self dependent for academics here. | [placements]: see, every colleges try its way best to give u a descent placement. so, its all depends upon what is the quality of student and how he represent himself in terms of knowledge and personality. if we talk about the visiting company then "mirosoft and amazon" have also visited our campus and also provided the package of about 42 lacs last year. so, as i said it all depends upon student. and apart from placements it also gives u best opportunities to represent your hidden talent. avg sal is 3-4 lacs

[college infrastructure]: the campus of this university is to big and it is very attractive looking . the whole campuses having a good wi-fi facility and will maintain gardens . i really love this university the infrastructure of university is great . | [academics]: really the teachers are very good and they are friendly in nature . the always stain with us to help us whenever we have any kind of doubt in the classes even after the classes also if we have any doubt with directly discuss with them and the practical help us with the solution . | [placements]: the placement of this university is well known to most of the students . here most of the student come for the just placement drive to get a good placement in a great companies . since the placement drive of our university is really outstanding .

review_text: [college infrastructure]: the infrastructure of college is quite good. but size of campus is quite small compared to other vit campus. the college campus has acc facilities like ac, library, wifi and other things. in hostel they are on double or triple sharing basis. | [academics]: faculty is very understanding, and mostly are phd holders, some teachers are new too who are studying and simultaneously completing their phd degree the results are on basis of both semester and i feel even more difficult than ordinary process. | [placements]: the highest salary package of this university is 20 lpa and almost 75% of student get placed rest focus on higher studies, maximum package is provided by companies like microsoft and top roles offered are for sde, data analyst and others.

[college infrastructure]: yes the college kiit provide all the faciities and all the equipments needed to flourish in someone's career of engineering. kiit has all fully functioned air-conditioned rooms and all officially certified labs eg:matlab. it provides a centralised library open for 24/7. yes very well maintained. it is also clean and very hygienic. | [academics]: i am studying b.tech in cs and the quility of teaching is top notch. yes my curriculum is updated and it includes all the recent developments in the field applied. the studies and education provide made us job ready as it deals mostly with real life applications. | [placements]: the quality of placement is top notch. it made us placement ready with internships provided and also certain job level certified test includes kareer school. it is well maintained in placement from starting of your curriculum only.

review_text: [college infrastructure]: the college has various facilities including gym. playing area for any sports you can think of. hostels are better than any other college out there, equipped with air conditions. mess food is flexible you get refund coupons if you decide not to consume. the library is digitally advanced as well with n number of journals books on varied topics not just related to academics. | [academics]: i had studied mechanical engineering and i found the rigorous nature of academics very much helpful. there are continuous tests 2 exams before the final sem exam and you have to make a project for every subject to lean through practicals. the curriculum was on par with my friends at iit. but it's not always the case that you learn from the curriculum. | [placements]: yes, the placement process was very much managed by the college. various companies participated around 150+ just for the computer science department. all the students were placed as it firms take mass recruitment where everyone other than the computer science branch joins as they get pretty good placements.

[college infrastructure]: the college is a new one compared to other nits. this college provides all required facilities like well-equipped computer labs, 24/7 accessible library, fast and free wi-fi for students. classrooms are also equipped with smartboards and heaters due to cold. mess food quality is okay, hostel facilities are good . medical facilities are quite good | [academics]: teachers are all well qualified and knowledgeable. course curriculum contains all things which are required for a student to know the subject well. but more practical must be implemented rather than just theories. | [placements]: the average salary offered is around 8.5 lpa, whereas the highest package is about 18lpa. around 95 per cent of students of the last batch of cse got placed. top recruiting companies are hackerrank, mcafee, samsung.. but the placement of civil is not that good compared to the other streams. | [campus life]: the extracurricular activities are not that good. since we have temporary campus we dont have that much facilities like ground, basketball court etc. the internet connection is not stable as it is hilly area.

the course curriculum is quite good. in the first year, you will study the extended version of the course you have studied in earlier classes, in your school. later on, in the next 3 years, you will get knowledge in the field of your selected branch. here at akgec faculty to student ratio is quite good. the number of students in each section is approximately 60 and there is 18 section for the first year. lecture time for each class is 50 min with a well-educated (but boring) faculty. qualification of maximum faculty is a master's degree in their respective field for having ph.d. if we talk about exams in this college, they organize exams very frequently. there are 4 to 5 exams you have to give before the end sem exam. one good thing is that you can pass it very easily by doing last night's study. they mostly ask selected questions from the previous year.the course fee is 1,44,000 for 1st year, 1,20,000 for 2nd year, and 1,10.000 for 3rd and 4th year. after this hostel fee is 1,20,000 per year. you have to give the full fee at the start of the year. college does not provide any scholarship or financial assistance but you can apply for state govt. scholarship. college does not provide any internship you have to find it on your own. but college surely gives campus placement opportunities.

[college infrastructure]: it has alot of facilities but it also lacks a few. parking being one of it. libraries and halls are arranged well and maintained well too. canteens are not so hygienic but they do have 2 canteens so we got options plus the restaurants aren't far. | [academics]: teaching faculty for design is not constant right now, in this situation, but in all its good. we have a mentor mentee relation which is amazing because they help and guide us alot. and the staff are really cool, i mean we can share our own views in the class. what else is needed! | [placements]: not reached there yet but my friends did say some are successful while some are still struggling. also we have a good 2.75 lac fees but we are not provided with anything except staff. everything- from paper to binding is on us. | [campus life]: it is amazing! i don't like when i say that the campus distance is soooooo much but when you are on your way, getting lollipops or lays, with those two besties of yours, you do not feel anything. students are so good specially seniors and taking part in some teams or groups is the best.
