annual fests - here are the name of the fests in iit kanpur - antaragni (cultural fest), udgosh (sports fest), and techkriti (tech fest). antaragni is conducted in the month of march, techkriti is shown in the month of march or maybe april, and udgosh is completed in october. iit kanpur has one of the most extensive libraries in india, called p.k.kelkar library. here are 223972+ books and 16000+ e-journals. iit kanpur has the best classrooms. they are fully furnished, temperature controlled, and with internet facility. here is a compulsory course in iitk called cpa (compulsory physical activity) for first-year students. students have to choose one of the available physical activities. there is a student body called the student's gymkhana. every clubs, society, and councils are in under that committee. there are many websites for students run by students like every fest has its websites.i chose this course because i am interested in research, and kanpur has the best research culture. there is an excellent faculty-to-student ratio. there is 500 faculty member on 8000 students. all the faculties are ph.d.-level qualified. there are some faculty which are not good at teaching, but there are lots of faculty which are very good at teaching. for the exam, it is not easy. you have to take classes regularly and complete assignments on time to at least pass.
college_name: IIT Kanpur - Indian Institute of Technology - [IITK]

review_text: iit bombay provides an excellent opportunity to excel in sports. it has got excellent sports facilities for cricket, football, athletics, hockey, squash, table tennis, lawn tennis, basketball, volleyball, badminton, weightlifting, swimming, etc. in the first year, some students are selected for each sport and they are trained well in that sport under the program nso. leaving it, beginner camps are organized, from time to time for enthusiastic students who want to learn the fundamental skills required for the game.there is no doubt for placements and job opportunities in iits because iits are named for the placements .almostt all students get placed in campus selections and there is absolutely no need for most of the students to search for jobs. the packages for the jobs in our college are high when compared to all other colleges.

review_text: pros/cons: many profs are outstanding with their knowledge and delivery, give the value education to stand out for industry. most faculties are very much helpful and ready to help you in all possible ways. as the first batch of m.tech ar-vr, our batch have secured almost 100% placement with competitive package. although need to work more campus placements. one of the good thing is it is offered by school of ai and data science, so have learning opportunity to become inter-disciplinary about immersive technologies, ai and software development. few subjects i don't feel much relevant with respect to industry although a new revision have changed course outline for m.tech ar vr after i have paased there were some faculties they have very less knowledge in subjects as it is new course and expertise is not available faced problems with respect to sufficient equipment related vr, only few are available to the department rest you have to get from other labs or societies on the basis of need | placement experience: there were total 11 students in my batch of m.tech ar-vr. from 3rd semter everyone becomes eleigible for the placements. almost each of the companies related to it/cs/ai were allowed us to sit for the placements. almost each of the students who were looking for placements got the opportunity either through campus or non-campus drive. one student got the phd opportunity. rest 10 students got some opportunity in different companies on roles like softawre development engineer, data scientist, ai research engineer, genai engineer, research associate etc.

pros/cons: infrastructure is as best as it gets. single occupancy rooms for hostels, excellent central dining facility, spacious classrooms, etc. faculties are very talented and experienced, a lot of things to learn from them under research. placement services are great, provides ample opportunities for students. infrastructure is good but not quality wise, the quality of construction is poor. having difficulties in monsoon course curriculum is not that great. it should be according to industry needs, just like other iits while some faculties are great, some are just existing there without much doing. their sole purpose seems to just exist there without contributing much. | placement experience: placements in my college are very good in one sense but okayish in some other. many companies visit the college but only some of them are good and if one loses opportunity in some top companies, then only low paying companies remain. students become eligible for college placements after 6 semester. some top companies visiting for placements include, goldman sachs, databricks, google, zomato, amazon, etc. all of the students in my branch have received their offers except one or two, who will receive it eventually. highest package this year is 1.04cr inr and average would fall around 30l inr. percentage of students getting placed in my branch is around always 100%. my plans after a degree is to work in industry offered to me by my placements, but even if i don't get on campus placement, i would be seeking out off campus placements and i am positive, i'll be in good place.

review_text: the campus is quite lively with a lot of students. the fests take place from time to time like gravitas and rivera. there are ipl screenings. vit also boasts an enormous library with 1000s of books you get every book you think for. clarins are well maintained with projectors and boards. lots of sorts of facilities are available like badmintonhub, swimming, squash, tennis, table tennis, snooker, etc. vit has a lot of clubs and chapters to babe a few horizons, gdc, isa, etc you get a good crowd with good mentorship from seniors.the course curriculum consists of several courses from which you can choose. of course, there are a set of compulsory courses depending on your branch. rest there is a minimum credits criteria you must complete like for cse core it's around 150 credits to be completed. the student-faculty ratio is nice there are a lot of faculties you get to choose from. the faculties are quite nice you also get to choose your faculty for every course. they are cooperative and friendly and clear the concepts well

pros/cons: expert faculty and quality teaching always eagaer to reach out interactive campus life always friendly to interact strong academic infrastructure , notes and related materials are provided limited clinical placement the placements were not clinically supported generic career support , when assigned with guides we were given just generic support from them and not we actually wanted from them. administrative ineffectiveness , administration is not that well managed | course curriculum overview: ma clinical psychology in amity university is revelant and forms the core base for students pursuing for mphill and other diploma courses. there is great exposure in real world settings and strong faculty with complusory internship every semester.

the course includes the basics of maths, accounting, marketing, and management as well as advanced levels. the student-faculty ratio is 1:60 for every subject. all the faculty holds a doctorate and is an expert in their field. the exams are of average level but 75% attendance is mandatorythe college placements are pretty good. about 80% of people get placed on the campus itself, further who want to pursue higher studies have that option as well. the highest package gone for btech is over 2 cr. bba is a newly introduced course so its placements are still on the basic level

review_text: our campus life is good i would say as our annual fest moksha is one of the best in north india and our tech fest conducts many activities for interested students. they were both conducted in the month of feb and march. our library is also good it has many books related to every course and different magazines and journals for interested students. our classrooms also have facilities that are needed like smart boards, ac, and better sitting. sports facilities are also awesome we have every sport in our college and our college host sports fest and inter university tournaments also our sports faculty send us on different tours to play and show our skills. our college has almost clubs for every extra curriculum activity including drama, dance, singing, standup, social service,gaming,photography,literature,quiz, coding, etc.. i mean i can't even remember the no.of societies and clubs. also, we have our official website and student sections for important information and instructions.i choose this course to get a mouth-watery package of course and another reason is my interest in the software field, especially in cyber security and ethical hacking. the faculty is quiet good i would say a mix some are very good and chill but few are not friendly and helpful to the students and the student ratio is now improving as our college gives a 20 percent female quota. all the faculty members are highly qualified and their teaching method is good needs to improve they need to connect the subject to students not just start teaching. we have a back-to-back examinations from class tests to practicals to mid sem to another ct and finally end sem exam and it is not easy to pass the exam the students need to give a certain amount of time to each and every subject.

ece is somewhat easy for those who love circuits, diodes, and all which helps us to understand modern technology better. the same goes for me, that's why i chose this branch and course. faculty to student ratio is quite nice here even in the first year. our faculty is mostly ph.d. and highly qualified. term exams are held every mid of semester and at the end of the semester. some class tests are also there. exams are easy to pass even if you study a few days before but you have to study regularly to score well.resonanz, moksha, innovision, etc are held every year in which students from different colleges take part. the library is quite good with the availability of mostly all types of books and journals. classrooms are equipped with modern technologies, especially for the freshers. all types of sports and extracurricular activities are held inside the campus from time to time. there are many societies and clubs in every interest and field for the students that are being run by the students.

[college infrastructure]: our college is last green campus all over the campus there good environment where student can develop themselves and compete in the market as well as we have a sports complex and other basic facilities | [academics]: our professors are highly skilled and qualified smart class is also available in our class and they are very supportive they are always helping us and pushing us and giving industry exposure and corporate knowledge | [placements]: mini company used to visit to our college at nitrouser kshetra and they are hyundai maruti suzuki bmw mercedes air india indigo taj itc hotel oberoi dream11 mpl byju vedantu physics wallah unacademy ellen

there is no fest in the college only one fresher in the college when you come new to the college after that there is no fest and the freshers party is concluded in the month of december after that books are provided by the college from the central library for which college takes 4-5000 from each student for 1 year there is a smart board in the classroom and tripod stand and lights and fans there is a lot of sports activities in the college there are 2 ground in the college and there are many social groups in the college like dance singing and much more fashion designingi have chosen this course because it is a most demanding course at this time every student want cs field that why i have chosen cse amile the college faculty is very good and helpful and the student ratio in college is girls over a boy is 4:5 and most of the faculty in the college is qualified with phd they have a doctorate degree and teaching method is good out of 100 only 2-3 faculty are average and in this college, they are frequent exam in 1 month at least 2 times exam and passing the exam depends on the study.

review_text: it is one of the thing that lpu do in most interesting ways.after all this is the most important part for any university. lpu has many exams like ca,mid term practical,and finally end term. if you want to score well you have to work hard and study regularly it is not like you will study one day before exam and can score well.overall if i say about my college is that it is the best college in india you have many opportunities here in academic, sports and many more other thing.the fees is feasible and faculty here is just awesome and helping nature. they have different digital platform that you can use

[college infrastructure]: my college has an modern infrastructure designed for an holistic educational experience. it is super student friendly, as well as lots of spots to hangout. the whole campus is very green and environmental friendly as well, overall amazing infrastructure | [academics]: in perspective of academics all our staffs are very well qualified and have years of experience in their respective field of study. our library is well equipped with all the books as well as high speed wifi for studying. the lab staffs are skilled and are helpful too. on considering academic aspects, it's very nice. | [placements]: when it comes to placements in srm, there's a very strong reputation for almost every student graduating with a job. there are so many companies that offers placement, so even with a mid to decent gpa an decent job with a good lpa can we secured for sure. if you excel in studies and have experience in other fields you sure will secure an extraordinary job. hence on aspects of placements, there needn't be a worry. | [campus life]: for campus life and value for money they just have to give rating no need to type aything

review_text: [college infrastructure]: no doubt that lpu is one of the best universities when it comes to the infrastructure. it has well-built classrooms, laboratories, playgrounds, an auditorium, etc., our university even has an on-campus hospital and a shopping mall i.e. unimall.the hostel rooms are big and clean, and there are different rooms according to the cost of a/c, non-a/c, single seater, two-seaters, three seaters, and four-seaters. | [academics]: they are very helpful and very friendly toward their students, and always ready to clear our doubt. they help every student in every way they can help, and the staff is qualified enough, and they have a good teacher-student relationship. | [placements]: some of the top recruiting companies for our college are amazon, ibm, capgemini, cognizant, qualcomm, virtusa, miq digital and bosch.lpu is one of the best colleges, from which most of the students got placed in well-known companies.

the infrastructure is okay and well maintained. there are gyms in the hostel, although the equipments don't work. the sports complex is huge and offers all sports facilities. there is a separate court for every sport. the library is huge and has a lot of books with a lot of copies so they never run out of the book that you need. the labs although are not well maintained. most of the apparatus are not working. the wifi works well in the whole of campus.dtu hosts one of the largest college fest in the while of north india, that is, engifest. you can see crowd from a lot of colleges (even outside delhi) during this fest. there a lot of other fests too held by dtu that are a great success. there are various societies (technical and non-technical) in dtu that offer various opportunities to the students.

[college infrastructure]: gla university is having very good computer labs. fully furnished and air conditioned. there is a big central library for collectively all branch students as well as one department library. class rooms are neat and clean. | [academics]: my branch is computer science with specialization course of cloud computing. the faculties are very potent and impart a good knowledge so they make the students job ready. the course content is very good and covers all fields. | [placements]: computer science students have almost 100 percent placement. average package is around 6 lpa. the highest package is 32lpa . college management brings very good companies for placements and provide everyone a good job. | [campus life]: campus life is awesome students can engage themselves in any indoor or outdoor activity. college is having 17 clubs and 8 societies so many educational and entertaining activities continuously keep on going here so we get a better exposure.

[college infrastructure]: each and every facility is available inside campus. all most all the software working are available and each and every class is provided with wifi and class rooms are not facilitated with the smart board. college infrastructure is nice. | [academics]: academic curriculum was just awesome but the thing is irritating 8 to 5 classes for some days in a week. teaching is good and teachers are barely good at clarification of doubts. yaa study makes ready for placements with some of our input. curriculum is updated every year and includes different subjects to be updated with upcoming technology. | [placements]: quality of placement is good and average package is around 6 lakhs and highest package recently was 42 lakhs per annum in microsoft. companies visit for placements are quite good. placement for cse people are quite good when compared to other branches in engineering. | [campus life]: student activities at lpu are great there are hundreds of student clubs at lpu and it also encourage people who are good at other activities like sports and lpu biggest events are youth vibe, one india and one world etc..., campus life good at lpu.

[college infrastructure]: yes, college is indeed has every possible kind of facilities good infrastructure and the equipment that is needed in either any domain whether it is academic or any some other. hostel can be said to be a kind of home where everyone lives peacefully and it needs to be clean and clear and in this perspective it is always keep in mind to make it clean and in this sense everyone has equally role in fullfiling this kind of environment | [academics]: currently i am on ece which i am studying for my own interest and the teaching environment and the way it is done is quite good and before starting to any new semester it is always tried to make the course updated so that it contains all the required as well as the new curriculum which help the students in their educational growth in this point of view it also leads us in creating and developing new kind of skills. | [placements]: placement scenario as usually average and many companies visits our college and through many recruitment drive they select the students for their company and usually 85% students get placed and the highest offer is somewhere around 25 lakh which can be said to be even more good . | [campus life]: good

review_text: [college infrastructure]: the college infrastructure is quite good. you have sjt (silver jubilee tower), tt(technology tower), periyar library. the library is the best, you have 3 floors in the library, the top floor has coursebook ebooks in the systems. to lease a book the process is automated you don't have to wait in line. just give scan your id card and your book will be leased for 2 weeks. | [academics]: the academics are fine... most of the hard work you have to do if you want to get an s grade, some courses lack good faculties which are the core for ece. you have to do most of the heavy lifting in order to get good grades. there is relative grading to calculate your cgpa. so we have to score just more than our classmates to get a good overall grade. | [placements]: mostly students do get placed in with a avg package of 5-6lakh. vit claims record for most number of student placed and company visits in placement cell. this year over 9000 placements happened on campus. almost 100% of the students get placements from our college. the highest salary package offered here was 44 lpa. | [campus life]: vit also has different types of cafes along with dominos in campus. there are two major events in vit called rivera and gravitas (technical event). both the events are conducted on a huge scale.

review_text: [college infrastructure]: infrastructure is so good of this university as compared to other universities in uttar pradesh nd other states also. this university have another campus also in noida which have also a good infrastructure | [academics]: yes all good infrastructure nd good food nd all good facilities provided many sport games played and apply in outer states also. smart boards provided in each class rooms nd lecture halls with big screen | [placements]: placements of this university is great ???? as compared to other universities every year students got placements in companies with good package many internships also offered by big companies just like microsoft google | [campus life]: campus life is so good ????.. plants nd nature air nd safe place no doubt. nd many facilities provided. | [anything else]: overall gla university is so great

pros/cons: the college provides you a good environment free from any type of ragging. the coding culture and placement statistics is also very good. facilities and teachers are very supportive and helpful. the infrastructure is not upto the mark but it is developing gradually. curriculum should be more up to date and should be based on industry needs. the wifi network in hostels and labs is not good. | placement experience: the placement statistics is very good. almost all the good and top companies visit here. internships start from the end of second yr. nearly 20% students gets internships. every company has different different criteria of eligibility based on cgpa and resume. mostly company that visits the campus doesn't go empty, it always hires students from here. some companies like media.net and uipath has made no offers. highest package- 64 lpa for sde and average package- 15 lpa for sde. placement percentage for cse is 90% and overall placement percentage is 70%. i want to become a software develper after pursuing my degree. and after some years i am thinking of doing mba for better future opportunities.

review_text: campus life is well and good except for going out for outings. there are many clubs that you can join like csi, ieee, and many more. more than 10-12 clubs are here. the infrastructure is well and nice clean big buildings with life and 2 way stare with an amazing light view at night, big corridors big ac classrooms with projector and router in every single classroom. every floor has 4 restrooms 2 each for girls and boys, and 2 water purifiers. annual fest probably is an algorithm but don't know in which month it happens. also, many other fests are held on this campus. 1 fest in 3-4 months. the library is amazing with a high capacity of students sitting and almost all books and e-books are available free of cost. the sports arena is also good in their field but the gym fee is high compared to its capacity and equipment available in the gym.form 5-6 semester students get eligible for placements. mostly mass recruiters like infosys tcs and some of the big recruiters also visit but a few students get to crack this. as per the university, 100% of placement is done by them. my plan is to join indian army.

[college infrastructure]: ?pros- the science and engg. faculty is brilliant! labs are well equipped, new labs are being built. libraries are also equipped with large no. of books. campus has its own gym for students. also each department provides free wifi to students. also no restriction on attendance. food is extremely good. 5-6 cantenes are here and they are fantastic! you may find the campus a bit dirty as there are posters due to a political environment here. but apart from it, campus is quite clean and beautiful. | [academics]: i am studying b.sc mathematics here. quality of teaching is quite good except a few professors. apart from the bachelor's level , masters and phd level are also one of the best in west bengal. yes syllabus has been updated after new cbcs system being introduced in sci-faculty. also the engg. dept provides a good syllabus that helps to pursue research/industry in near future. students can learn coding too. | [placements]: engg. placements are brilliant . average salary ranges between 10-15 lakhs for top tier streams like cse,ece,ee and a bit lower for other streams. science placement after b.sc /m.sc is not that good though the placement cell is working hard to secure placements in recent years. though most students get to research after msc and majority of them get into posts of lecturers in colleges of west bengal after completing phd. | [campus life]: ju is one of the best colleges to experience diverse campus life. dramatics, photography, mountaineering, painting , sports ,dance, singing are different activities one can take part in. you can take part in different cultural fests( like reunion, fest, ibtida etc.) and cherish your hobbies. the campus gates are open 24?7. so you can enter anytime and get out anytime. a very free campus to spend a quality time with your friends. location is on the main road. absolutely safe.

[college infrastructure]: the college have a big library which consists of different types of books including story and other topic related. wifi is average because sometimes its speed is very high and sometimes very low. the college has a big sporatorium where we can play different games and there are different grounds for different outdoor games. | [academics]: i am currently studying computer science in first year. the quality of teaching is okay. the curriculum is ,i can say properly not updated and not properly includes all the recent developments in the field. | [placements]: i don't know properly about placements because i am only first year student . according to my opinion, 70-80% students get placed and the highest salary package is 38 lakh i guess. the average salary offered is 4 - 5 lakh. | [campus life]: i like campus. there are so many games which students can play in their free time . the one of the best feature the students are very friendly either they are day scholar or hostellor . teacher are very friendly and supportive.

review_text: [college infrastructure]: college infrastructure is really good which enables all type of facility in the college which has all type of sufficient things in the collar as there is abundant lighting as well as good seating arrangement and college is well maintained with need clean environment it's a very good green campus and a very large seating arrangement the wi-fi smart board everything other than well maintained maintained and they are also cleanly followed with good rules and regulations | [academics]: academics it's really good in the city that's the reason i joined in the revival city the best thing is the teachers are well trained and well teaching career is there and the job about leaders are also very good in the campus it also provides various various opportunities for the students when it comes to our candidates there are too many opportunities to student to explore them themselves in the campus | [placements]: when it comes to placement in reverse the placements are comparatively very good but when it comes to the civil engineering placements there are very few companies that come for the placement and all the students are not placed in especially in civil history when it comes to it like computer science they are very good placement there is 100 percent placements for all the students but in civil engineering and mechanical replacement are less | [campus life]: if you're joined into the river university the best life is campus left because the campus is so big you can enjoy the campus and the campus is greenery everywhere you can see green day there is lot of space to sit and enjoy until with your friends can have a good time there campus is the main advantage of joining reva university

review_text: [college infrastructure]: all necessary infrastructure (130 crore ac buliding) and equipments are available for various experiments. free wifi in all around the campus, 13 hostel (9 for boys, 4 for girls) . hygienic food in mess. | [academics]: i am in mechanical engineering branch . knowledgeable professor available for teaching and having supportive nature. the faculty members are highly educated. the course curriculum is well updated and also in upcoming years many new courses will be introduce. | [placements]: amazing placement . around 91.38 % placement in 2021. average pakage of 9.38 lap. 100% placement of cse , 96% of me and ece , 92 % of mme 75% of civil . the highest pakage offered was 37.5 lpa in computer science branch . | [campus life]: since i am in online mode that's why i am not aware of the campus life but as heard from the seniors of our college, the campus life is pretty good . in the first year there are restrictions that we need to be in the campus till 8pm if we are outside the campus.

[college infrastructure]: the college campus is pretty nice with all the necessary requirements. it has adequate sports facilities with a student activity center (sac) which has a wooden basketball and badminton court. also, the college has cricket and football ground, tennis and volleyball court as well. the library and computer center building is also good with all the necessary facilities. the hostels are also above average with adequate space and lan and wifi facilities. | [academics]: well the courses offered are as per the national level and curriculum is also updated regularly. the quality of teaching is also adequate but the student need to study on its own as much depends on self studies. | [placements]: the placements here are getting better and better as the years are passing. many mncs come here for providing jobs to the students. most of the students get a job here so the placement percentage is pretty good especially for computer science and electronics and communication branches. | [campus life]: the campus life here is amazing as the campus is about 300 acres and the strength of the college is around 2000. so there is no crowd what so ever except at canteens. it is on the outskirts of the city and has a nature park.just next to it. so, the environment here is extremely good for those who love peace and nature's beauty.

review_text: course and curriculum is very nice. there are lot of students so the competition is also good, and the everyday there number of hackathon and workshops being held. exam structure is also good. there are 3-4 cas in each term out of which 2-3 are compulsory, one mid term and one end termone thing that is really great about lpu is discipline. you will not see a single case of ragging and violence inside the campus. if you got caught in any illegal activities there is a concept of umc and you might get your scholarship cancelled.

[college infrastructure]: our college infrastructure is so nice. i really love it. all classrooms, canteens, labs, library are well constructed and developed. wifi facility around college is so much speed and so much nice. corridors and quadrangles are also their to hangout. | [academics]: academic wise both curriculum and co curriculum are very well balanced and maintained. all teachers have lots of experience in teaching. they are very helpful and resourceful. regular tests are very much helpful to score in end send exams. | [placements]: being an institution under well reputed kle society, the placement chances every year is still increasing. the support from alumnis and board members is so good. every year lots of companies visit our college. | [campus life]: surrounding environment is so peaceful and nice that i really enjoy my campus life.

pros/cons: in my point of view the college is best for us . campus life iss best and the social inteeraction is also good faculties are very much supportive and the mentorship quality is also good internet speed can be improveed .college is giving us upto 30 mbps. infrastructure is good , classrroms are digital and well ventilized. | course curriculum overview: courese curriculum is good,teching method and style is very good.examss are held in a fixed time and an interval of almsost 2 months.course curriculum is best.teachers are verygood so they n ake the curriculum more interesting.

[college infrastructure]: this college has a sense of natural beauty along with its outstanding buildings and highly maintained infrastructure. all facilities are provided here and the food quality is better than the quality that is provided in several other government and private colleges. | [academics]: my branch in lnmiit is electonics and communication engineering and i chose it over computer science of an nit college. the teaching faculty is fine but the awareness level among students is outstanding. the coding culture of this college is above many iits as more than 10 students get selected for gsoc every year. | [placements]: amazing placements with current avg. placement rate at 12 lpa. many students get internships at google and many great companies. our future is secure here and once after getting here, we get to explore amazing fields which we had never heard of before. | [campus life]: due to the current pandemic situation, we are not able to experience the immense pleasure of college life but we still hope this would come to an end and we'll be able to have fun as we always expected.

review_text: [college infrastructure]: srm institute of science and technology has one of the finest infrastructure .they have provided the students with the finest infrastructure like spacy classes well equipped and central ac and srm has everything of what u think | [academics]: academics is as fine as u can imagine as the professor,tutors are handpicked for the best experience that students can have in academic s. as they are kind and will help you whenever they want . overall academics is good . | [placements]: placement is as good as u think . as srm university chennai has more than 800 companies visiting them each year and 80 percentage of the students studying there gets placed . for example companies like kpmg delloit pwc e&y so called the big 4 .even goldman y . | [campus life]: when u come to srm university the campus life will be so good that u can't even imagine . srm is located in katankullathur which is near potheri . you will experience a great campus life as srm university is as big as u can imagine .

review_text: pros/cons: academic freedom to select course which you want to do. there is a lot of hostel freedom with no hostel intime. the campus culture is very vibrant with lot of diverse people. the hostel washrooms may need improvement. the roaming of dogs will be a problem for some people. some people may not like the dressing sense of others. | placement experience: the students are eligible for placements in their final year. all the best companies come to recrute students. the best part is the bits does not allow bus companies to come for campus interviews. the average package for 2023-24 season was around 21 lakhs.

review_text: [college infrastructure]: iit bhubaneswar's infrastructure is a bit lacking, receiving a 2 out of 5. while it has essential facilities, there's room for improvement in terms of modernization and creating a more vibrant campus atmosphere. | [academics]: with a rating of 4 out of 5, iit bhubaneswar showcases strong academics. the institution offers a comprehensive and enriching learning experience, with knowledgeable faculty and a well-structured curriculum. | [placements]: iit bhubaneswar fares well in placements, earning a 4 out of 5. many students secure promising job offers, showcasing the institution's efforts to connect students with reputable companies. many big tech gaints like google visit here

[college infrastructure]: the college has one of the exceptional infrastructures with immense buildings where anyone can get lost at the very first attempt. the classrooms are spacious and airy with smart boards almost in every class. wifi is available in academic as well as hostel blocks. the library here is the best place to witness peace as well as advanced systems. there are many sport facilities and gyms too. the living spaces are really clean and the food hygiene is always taken care of. | [academics]: i am currently pursuing electrical and electronics engineering because i see an increasing exponent graph in this career.i feel the practical approach in this field is quite helpful and i think that the curriculum is updated. | [placements]: the quality of placements here is average but certainly more than other private institutes. the dream and the super dream packages ensure greater placements than usual. a higher number of campus placements are recorded than usual, every year. | [campus life]: my campus life so far has been great. the faculties are friendly enough to approach. the students are competing. the clubs and chapters give the opportunity to every student to showcase and polish their talents.

[college infrastructure]: in terms of facilities, dtu is very good. wi-fi facility is available all the time for students as well as faculty members. classrooms are like typical school classrooms, and labs are well maintained. there is every type of expensive equipment which you want. it is technologically advanced. | [academics]: the course curriculum is now updated with the latest changes. from the first year, students have to study the mixed subject, and they can also select electives in which they are interested. after that, from the second year, they have given the branch related subjects, and faculty here are very experienced and well-qualified. | [placements]: currently our placement season is ongoing and despite of covid-19 restrictions and problems, placements have faired well so far with about 30% of the batch placed. top roles offered have been majorly in non-tech domain with few being in technical roles in companies such as jp morgan & chase, citigroup.

bharat dhwani is the main annual fest and utkarsh is the technical fest of this college. bharat dhwani is the faondation day programm celebrated on the month of october. there are also small and big events organized in the college according to branch and year. in our central library there are almost all the books are available related to course and many other novels, jouranls, newspapers , encyclopedia, thessis are there in library. all classrooms has projectores and smart boards. and also all the lecture halls are airconditioned. atheletics, football , volleyball, cricket are the main sports club of the college which take the inductions to join them. you can also join prayas society and become a volunteer where you can teach the local students. zeal society , debate society are also the mains clubs which are run by the students of the college there are criminals and si clubs where you join and do dance in the feststhis course i get by my rank in the jee mains so there is no choice although i want to do preparation for the cds exam so there is a lot of time i get for preparation so this course suits me there are two teachers for every subject one take the classes and other take the tutorial classes to solve the doubt. it is basically a doubt session. all teachers completed their phd and the teacher for tutorial classes are doing their phd from this college. there are 2 minor exams and one end sem exam and almost a half-month gap between exams. the difficulty level depends on the subject and students there are many students which got 90% marks and there are students also which don't even get the grades to pass the exam.

review_text: [college infrastructure]: the iinfrastructure will be pleasant and good with many trees.there are 2 grounds. college is situated in a pleasant environment. there is one open auditorim and one ac room auditorium. we have solar power electricity and rain water harvesting system.we follow 5s principle in our college | [academics]: i studied electronics and communication engineering as i had interest in electronics. the quality of curriculum is good and still can be improved. yes curriculum is not updated it's far more outdated and job required more skills and knowledge that i got from college | [placements]: the placements will be excellent. we got around 70+ company's for placement and around 80 percentage students got placed. the highest salary package was 24 lpa for cse domain the college was supportive during placement we had aptitude coding and communication training the average package was 4lpa

review_text: the departments provide their students with the necessary skills in their respective fields through a fascinating course structure and industrial exposure, for five days a week. there are many practical workshops to give students enough industrial experience. moreover, recently, to give students a better industrial exposure, the focus of teaching has quite changed from a bookish manner to a more practical approach. course structures have been updated to provide essential skills required by the industry. faculties here are also quite experienced and hard-working, one of my favorite professors is dr. pratik chattopadhyay of the department of cse.the training & placement office, iit (bhu) varanasi facilitates the process of placement of students passing out from the institute by collaborating with leading organizations and institutes in setting up of internship and training program of students.the placement season runs through the course of the year commencing the last week of july through to march. every year around 200 big industrial and tech giants like google, microsoft, samsung, tata, uber recruits students from our college for internships and jobs.

the campus life at delhi technological university (dtu) is a mix of academic rigor and extracurricular activities. - social life: dtu has a vibrant social life with a diverse student population from all over india. the university has a number of student-run clubs and organizations that offer opportunities for students to socialize and get involved in various activities. there are also several events and festivals(engifest, yuvaan, etc) that are organized throughout the year, providing students with the opportunity to have fun and make new friends. - clubs: dtu has a variety of clubs, including technical clubs, cultural clubs, and sports clubs. these clubs provide students with the opportunity to pursue their interests and develop new skills. some of the popular clubs at dtu include the robotics club, music club(madhurima)a , dramatics club(pratibimb), dance club (vibe and nrityangana), and sports club. there are tech and business oriented clubs at dtu with huge number of accomplishments.the placements at delhi technological university (dtu) are quite good. dtu has a dedicated placement cell that works closely with companies to provide students with opportunities for internships and full-time employment. the placement percentage at dtu is consistently high, with a large number of students securing job offers from leading companies each year. in recent years, the placement percentage has been over 85% for most programs. dtu has a strong industry network and attracts a large number of recruiters from reputed companies across a variety of sectors, including it, finance, consulting, and manufacturing. some of the top recruiters include microsoft, google, amazon, flipkart, and mckinsey. in the 2022 session, 795 offers were made with packages between inr 10 lpa and inr 20 lpa. highest package inr 1.2 cr p.a.

[college infrastructure]: my classrooms are ample, bright, and equipped with digital teaching aids. laboratories across branches?like mechanical, civil, electrical, and computer science?are well-maintained and support hands-on learning. the central library offers a rich collection of textbooks, e-journals, and a quiet zone for focused study. computer labs have fast internet and updated hardware. hostels provide safe and comfortable housing with wi-fi and round-the-clock security. | [academics]: faculty have advanced degrees and years of teaching experience, they blend fundamentals with practical insights. professors engage students in live projects, research activities, and industry-linked workshops. regular guest lectures and seminars bring valuable real-world exposure. faculty members are readily available for guidance and help students prepare for competitive exams like gate, gre, and higher education paths. | [placements]: college placement cell provides comprehensive training in aptitude, technical skills, and soft skills from the third year. recruiters include it giants like infosys, tcs, cognizant, and wipro, as well as core companies like l&t, bhel, and bajaj auto. the average package ranges around ?4?5 lpa, while top performers secure offers up to ?10?12 lpa. internship opportunities are also well-structured and often turn into full-time placements.
college_name: Yeshwantrao Chavan College of Engineering Nagpur

review_text: [college infrastructure]: when it comes to infrastructure of the college, then lpu has set a benchmark in it. spread over a area of 700 acres, lpu has all the necessary infrastructure, facilities and equipments. lpu has a total of 8 boys hostel and 7 girls hostel in the campus. classrooms are very modern and latest technology are installed in the all the labs like wi-fi, smart boards, projectors. library is amazing and has vast collection of books and study material. i would definitely like to rate it 5 out of 5. | [academics]: i am pursuing b. tech cse. i have always been a fan of technology, that's why i choose this branch. i truly believe that my curriculum is updated. in addition to this, we also get some workshops and guest lectures by industry experts which is really very beneficial. almost all of the faculty are pg holders except few. one negative aspect is that sometimes faculties tend to do a lot of teaching through ppts which seems so boring. | [placements]: 80-85% of my branch i.e cse get placed in some reputed companies like amazon, flipkart, adobe, tcs, wipro, cognizant etc. this year a girl from cse named tanya arora bagged a package of 42 lpa which is highest. the average salary offered to a cse grads is 5.6 lpa. one additional point which i would like to state that if you will study well and focus on the placement, then this college will definitely help you out in getting a good package. | [campus life]: sometimes, it feels really hectic after attending 9-5 lectures but yes we have vacation for 2 days in the weekend i.e saturday & sunday, we tend to enjoy a lot during those times. we play cricket, basketball in the field. not only this, lpu has also an olympic size swimming pool in the campus in which we enjoy a lot with our friends. students, teachers & support staffs are very friendly in nature. lpu is situated at phagwara in punjab. the campus is very safe.

[college infrastructure]: college have good infrastructure and have decent facilities but all things are well maintained. the whole campus is wifi enabled and college has one sports ground for major sports, the class rooms have smart boards too. the living spaces are avergae and mess food is also average. | [academics]: academics is good the curriculum is well updated according to recent industry standards and developments in the fields, the quality of teaching is also good because of good teachers. and the college will make you job ready. but you have to work on yourself too. | [placements]: placement is quite average, the average package offered by university is 5-6 lakh per annum and the highest is around 32 lakh per annum. the placement process is smooth and the college is very supportive. | [campus life]: good campus life | [anything else]: overall college is good
college_name: Dayananda Sagar College of Engineering Bangalore

review_text: for the electrical engineering department, there are a significantly large number( around 30) of faculty members to help the students. the associate professors generally have an experience of around five years, and often come fresh from the industry. most of the associate professors have phds along with a few published paprs under their belt. the assistant professors generally have an experience of around ten years, and undergo regular training and recertification. assistant professors have quite a few published papers, regarding the various fields of research they have done. the senior professors are highly experienced, often having been teaching for fifteen or more years, having taken part in several research projects, and mentoring and assisting several students to achieve excellence in their chosen fields. the faculty of our college are very supportive and helpful in dealing with several problems the students might face in their time in the college.admission to nit silchar is obtained thourough josaa counselling, after gaining eligibility by giving jee(main) for engineering. based on the rank thus obtained, and the preference list for colleges filled online, a branch is alloted among all of the nits and other engineering colleges. after that, one has the option to either freeze at that particular branch at the same college, or choose float for a different branch at the same college, or move on to the next round of counselling. all in all there are 7 rounds of counselling, with all thouree options available for the first 6, and the first two options for the last. generally all these processes take place over july and august, and i ended up choosing electrical engineering, both because it fascinates me, and also because it is tough for me to sit still for long periods of time, so computer science and electronics ere out of the question.

in lpu there are so many functions and feat happening related to every festival so many programs is also happening the main fest is "one india" the library facility is awesome all types of books are available there and we can take the books from there for studying also a huge collection of books are there classroom is also good there are so many groups in lpu where many types of activities are happening we can choose based on our interest and the sports facility is also huge so many sportsfrom 6 semesters we are eligible for placement there are so many companies not only from india but also international companies who are also coming for interviews. the highest package was 3 crore which was earned by a computer science student in the students are going to master in remaining most of the people will be placed my plan is to do master's but no enough money so going to do the job and earn money after do master

review_text: [college infrastructure]: infrastructure of college is very nice . they build very good classrooms for the students and also fully air conditioning classrooms and they also have machine for study of engineering student's of the college . also provides hostel facilities for girls and boys separately. | [academics]: so i talking about the academic teacher and faculties of our collage was very knowledgeable and kind to the students . they teach each and everything in very good manner. they also makes students to job ready. | [placements]: i talking about placement every year 50 -60 % of students get placement in reputid company likes wipro ,tcs etc . they prepare student to job ready in their field . student gets around 6 -7 laks package every year.

[college infrastructure]: this college provides world class infrastructure and facilities including central library, labs equipped with modern technology,space centre,shopping malls,many auditoriums.classrooms are well maintained and air conditioned.clean environment. | [academics]: the college faculty is qualified and knowledgeable,their teaching quality is excellent,developing intellectual and personal strengths of students.pass percentage is 80%.the course curriculum is relevant and make students industry ready.doubt clearing sessions are scheduled by teachers. | [placements]: lpu has unbeatable placement records with higher package.about 80% students got placed.top recruiting companies visit our campus for recruiting students like linkedin,amazon,microsoft any many more.the average salary package offered is 3 lpa. | [campus life]: the campus life of this college is wonderful.the university engages students in different socio-cultural events and sports activities,seminars and workshops are conducted for the students.we do participate and excel our skills and knowledge.

[college infrastructure]: the infrastructure available here includes right from a full-size tennis court to an olympic-sized swimming pool, gymnasium, sports ground and many more. the good thing is that the library is well stocked. if there is a shortage of any book, you always have access to the iitb central library, which has every journal, book and subscription you would need.there is a provision of a proper cupboard (almirah) to store your clothes and other items that you would be bringing.in the first year, in the hostel, every room is given on a twin-sharing basis, i.e., two students stay in every room. in the second year, every student has an individual room. room facilities are quite good. | [academics]: every faculty member here is highly qualified, and many of them have multiple publications in famed research journals. the course curriculum is divided into core courses and elective courses. in the first year, only core courses are provided, which are basic courses to build up a base of all the domains such as finance, marketing, it, strategy, operations, etc. the exam follows a semester pattern, and every semester is divided into two terms. both the terms have entirely different subjects, and the exams are conducted as per the iitb calendar. | [placements]: there was an increase of 5% in the average salary package, i.e., it was increased to 21.96 lpa when compared to the previous year. the highest salary package offered was 32.8 lpa. there were offers from 16 new recruiters. top participants were bristlecone, gep, synergy consulting, tresvista and zs associates, among others.

[college infrastructure]: the college has the fantastic infrastructure. the academic building has all the modern facilities like smart classrooms, seminar hall, library with all resources, computer labs. the college has the hostel facilities also. | [academics]: the college has the mix of theory and practical in syllabus. the professors are well knowledge with every subjects. the projects we got are as per the market which helps the study get industry exposure. | [placements]: the college has good placements. the placement vary according to the branch of btech. around 70 percentage of students get placement through campus. the average package stood at 8-9 lpa according to the branch.

[college infrastructure]: offers a supportive and challenging academic environment. the faculty is knowledgeable and approachable, and the campus is well-equipped with modern facilities. extracurricular activities are diverse, fostering a well-rounded student experience. a great place for personal and academic growth! | [academics]: the academic experience is both rigorous and rewarding. the faculty members are highly qualified and passionate about their subjects, creating an engaging learning environment. professors are approachable, often offering personalized guidance to students, which fosters a strong sense of community within the classrooms | [placements]: the placement process is efficient and highly supportive, with a dedicated placement cell that works tirelessly to connect students with top companies. the college has a strong network of industry partners, ensuring that students have access to a wide range of job opportunities across various sectors.

[college infrastructure]: ict mumbai campus in matunga small but packed with good stuff for phd pharmaceutical chemistry. labs super advanced, got hplc, nmr for drug research, all clean and updated. classrooms ac, smart boards, wifi everywhere but slow in afternoons. library huge, tons of journals, quiet spots. hostels okay, rooms shared, mess food decent but spicy. sports ground for cricket, gym basic. parking tough in city. | [academics]: academics top for phd in pharmaceutical chemistry, guides are experts, many publish in big journals. focus on drug design, synthesis, bioanalysis deep, seminars weekly. curriculum flexible, choose projects on new molecules. guest lectures from sun pharma pros nice. some admin delays in approvals though. doubts cleared fast, office open. research funding good, publish papers easy. classes rare, mostly lab work. | [placements]: for phd pharmaceutical chemistry, placements not main, most go academia or research jobs. but cell helps, companies like pfizer, dr reddys come for r&d roles. median 7-8 lpa last year, highest 12 lpa. about 50% opt jobs, rest postdoc abroad. internships in labs pay 20k. need publications for good offers. alumni network strong, refer positions. not 100% like ug, but solid for pharma field. wish more biotech firms visited. | [campus life]: campus life busy at ict, phd batch small, bond quick with chem folks from india. fests like vortex tech fun, sportsaga cricket matches exciting. canteen cheap, vada pav tasty oily. evenings chat in green areas post-lab. clubs for debate, music, trips to beaches. girls hostel strict 9pm, boys chill. no ragging, seniors share notes. mess veg okay, weekends quiet city far. mix work fun, feels like home.

review_text: the campus of our college is awesome and quite big in terms of area. you must have a cycle or vehicle to roam around the full campus. greenery is everywhere on the campus. no pollution inside the campus. the infrastructure of our college is quite good but is it also improving day by day. recently naac comes to our college for the college infra is quite improved a lot within some days and they accredited this time an a grade from a b grade in past. social life is pretty awesome and you can roam around with your friends anywhere anytime. our classes are fully renovated and smart. lab facilities are quite good but improvement should be required especially in electronics and electrical labs. we have other building called the r&d building for cse and it branch labs. the computer labs of the r&d building are best. now coming to clubs yes there are plenty of clubs are there in our college depending on your interests you can join anyone. you can join more than 1 club with no restriction on the number.i choose the best branch of this college that is computer science and engineering because it's none other than placements. no doubt you get what you deserve after graduating from this premier institute. the faculty here are highly qualified most of them are doing their ph.d. from iits and very good reputed collage . student-faculty ratio is also very good. the teaching method is ok-ok it depends branch-wise, for cse and it branches most teachers are very good than other branches. coming exams in every semester are two-semester exams mid-semester followed by end -of the semester and many quizzes between them. exams are scheduled and done at their scheduled time. to pass the exams you have to like start studying at least 1 week before the mid-semester and at least two-week before the end of the semester. for quizzes and other stuff just before night study is enough.

review_text: [college infrastructure]: no worries whatsoever when it comes to technical facilities like lab equipment for both cse and ece, i'd go as far as to say that it has one of the best lab facilities in india :) hostel is pretty good as well, slightly small in terms of its room size. but, nothing un-adjustable. food is not as good as home-cooked ofc, but it was lot better than what i had at iits tbh, so that's good as well. you don't like the food? no worries lol there are 20+ restros on the mainroad which is walkable to. | [academics]: academics are dope ngl. they focus a lot on the course itself, as in starting cs and ece courses early (from 1st sem itself). this gives good advantage for us towards the end of 1st year. curriculum is completely different from iits and nits, mostly inspired by top uni's like mit and stanford. its slightly hectic, especially in the start, but you will get used to workload. academics-wise, no issues. keep in mind that academics won't be a cake walk here, so you will have to put lot of effort ;) | [placements]: i am not super aware of the placement scenario, but from what i saw with my seniors they're pretty good. median package ctc for cse was around 26.5 lpa this year and highest being around ~80 lpa. ~19 lpa for ece afaik, which is fairly decent imo. almost all major companies visit here for placements, so working hard will definitely pay off :) | [campus life]: good campus life. in the middle of the city, so no issues in terms of fun and food. stadium, restro and metro, all are close enough to the college. profs are pretty friendly, students as well. some are focused fully on studies, some just chill etc. college location is definitely ideal and all facilities are at walkable distance. advantage of college life here is having a good community and availability of resources. minus is hectic workload and lack of
college_name: International Institute of Information Technology Hyderabad

review_text: [college infrastructure]: college has all the necessary infrastructure and facilities required to study engineering of all branches. the classrooms and laboratories are well equipped and the cleanliness and air conditioned environment is well maintained. the hostel rooms are well ventilated and regularly cleaned. mess food is healthy and delicious. | [academics]: i studied electronics and communication engineering. the teaching department was good which focused on practical knowledge along with theory. the curriculum of the course had all the major subjects which are required for the gate with some additional subjects of other branches as well. the curriculum also focuses on programming language learning and soft skills. | [placements]: companies do come to our college but most of them hire for it job roles whereas core companies are very selective and take very few candidates. the placement percentage was around 70% during my time and highest salary offered was 18 lakhs to a cse branch student. average salary was 4.5 lpa and yes the college was supportive and prepared us well for the placements. | [campus life]: the university campus is large and has beautiful white buildings along with trees and other greeneries. it has sport grounds and many canteens and mini canteens all over the campus. it also has a mini mall inside the campus which has all the services which are needed by hostellers. students engage in sports and other club related activities like literature, music, robotics, drama, etc. the location is safe and it can handle all emergencies.

[college infrastructure]: iit g have the best campus . it's has different and multiple labs for every department. the wifi collage has wifi. the hostel rooms are single rooms with proper rooms , washing machine and a security system. | [academics]: the professors are highly qualified and are quite helpful in the cousre in the research activities. if we understand the concept then we can easily score good marks in semesters. life here is the best. | [placements]: my university thought mr critical job skill and provided me with opportunities and with poten employees. some of my seniors are placed at abode , amazon, bank of america and deloit. the career center me in arranging pre placed talk ,personal discussion and interviews. | [campus life]: numerous celebrities have been invited to the collage and hostel food is very good in respect to other collages. the collage maintains good hygiene and cleanliness.

review_text: pros/cons: campus is very clean and green. there are hills which create a pleasant climate. we could often go for trecking and beach is also not too far say 30 km. city is also close so that we don't need to spend much on autos.teachers are friendly and didn't even expect that kind of behaviour from those experienced faculty. curriculum is also very decent for all branches and cources. language us a problem always. people speak less hindi. everyone outside speaks more odia. welcome to gboard clipboard, any text you copy will be saved here.welcome to gboard clipboard, any text you copy will be saved here. gutka is also a problem. mess workers other people in campus use gutka. few professors are rude towards students with their own rules. distance from hostels to schools is more. we can take buses but they are often crowded. girls to boys ratio is 1:5. | placement experience: generally placements here start from the end of third year. that will go on till the fourth year.amazon, google often visit for placements. other companies like wipro, federal also visit. highest package of 2024 was 52 lpa. overall highest package was about 60 lpa. in cse around 96%studentes got placed and overall 89% students applied for placements have placed.

teaching aids like smart boards, projectors, and audio systems. laboratories are crucial for hands-on learning, especially in science, engineering, and technology, and should be equipped with up-to-date instruments and tools. libraries, as knowledge hubs, provide access to an extensive collection of books, journals, and digital resources, along with comfortable reading spaces. beyond academics, a well-designed campus includes administrative blocks to facilitate smooth operations and student services. hostels, dining halls, and recreational spaces ensure a comfortable living environment for residential students. sports facilities, auditoriums, and cultural spaces cater to extracurricular development. the inclusion of ict (information and communication technology) infrastructure, such as wi-fi-enabled campuses, computer labs, and online learning platforms, is increasingly important in modern education. a college with robust infrastructure not only enhances review_text: the curriculum very best suits my stream. the college has ffcs which means students get to choose what they study and under whom. students get to choose how many credits they want in particular sem and in what slots do they want their classes. the curriculum is very well groomed to help student secure best in class on campus placements. the industrial visits are aptly designed to provide a fun learning experience. being in a city like chennai the opportunities are endless.vibrance the cultural event and technovit the technical fest. fund infusion of about 2 core was made for cultural fest to invite artists for pro shows like dj night, north night and south night. the students were allowed to enterpreneurs for 3 day fest and there were many more competition like singing drama dance where all copies colleges from south participated with a footfall of more than 10000

i choose electronics and communication course because the fee for this course is half only when compared to computer science engineering course, i got merit scholarship based on my intermediate performance, and i took a specialisation in ai & ds also for the same fee of 82,500rs. the faculty are friendly and cooperative and the student ratio is also good and you can observe more boys students compare to girls students. all the faculty graduated and most of them completed their phd also. there are many teaching methods like teaching digital labs, group discussions and speeches, etc. in total, we have 3 unit exams,2 midterm exams and semester final exams. it is easy to pass when you are able to listen to the call to what the faculty was teaching and studying regularly means you can able to pass all exams, if you did not listen to the classes it is very difficult to pass and you will get carrier in that casethere are many annual fests the main fest's name is lavazza which is held for 3 days, and they have many tech feats every month. the university central library is one of the biggest libraries among all deemed universities they have a wide range of books and journals collection and there is a simple process to borrow the books. the classroom looks like a somewhat old type of classroom and the benches also look old every classroom is provided with a board and projector for presentations. there are many clubs in the university, there are good sports and extracurricular activities on campus, most of the clubs are run by students and there are official social media accounts also there in youtube and facebook and instagram.

from the sixth semester, students are eligible for internship and students can sit for the campus in their fourth year. for internship and placement, many companies visited our campus like amazon, google, reliance jio, mercedes, cred, bpcl, godrej, federal bank, infosys, texas instrument, oracle, samsung, hyundai, tcs and many startups. for the session 2019-23,636 were registered for placement and all were placed and they have offered 717 jobs. the highest package is 52 lpa and the average is 14.14 lpa this year. percentage placement is 100%. my plan after getting my degree is to sit in campus placement.campus life is fine here there are many clubs in different areas and incubation centers. the techno-culture fest of nit patna is corona and melange which is held in january every year many activities are organized. hackslash and gdsc is a tech club of nit patna, a month coding competition is organized and a learning session is taken by seniors and given guidelines. there is a dance club, photography club, ecell and many more clubs. the classroom is good, some of the classrooms have also ac. in sports, many sports-related events are organized frequently and inter-nit sports are also organized.

the course curriculum is quiet good. it's a balanced curriculum. i chose this course because based on my rank i have got this course only in this college. so i opted for this one as i wanted to stay in my mother's state. faculty are well qualified and have doctorates. all our faculty members have completed phds in iits. their teaching is very good and strict as we can see that factor in every college probably. mostly all of them are punctual in their own way. coming to faculty to student ratio cannot be predicted as it will be based on the branch to branch on respective departments. exams are conducted twice a year in 2 semesters and each semester has 2 mids and respective labs.as i am from a general category background i'm not eligible for any kind of scholarship given by the government and by academics standards i don't have many scholarships. the fee structure is based semester-wise. campus placements opportunities are excellent in every branch of the college .in chemical engineering the campus opportunities are high in level and the average to min package in our branch is 8lpa. internship opportunities are also provided by calling up the companies to our college. definitely, one can be placed in the final year if we concentrate on studies without any barriers

the teaching faculty of the course are selected through an entrance exam, many of the teachers are on contract, while some are permanent. the department consist of an hod and assistant professor for each subject, theory and laboratory. the teachers are quite qualified some of them even holding phd degrees. my opinion of the faculty will be poor. most of the teachers do not indulge with deep involvment in the subject and explanation of the topic, most of them only teach how to pass for the exam and explanation is really bad. discipline is also not maintained, numericals are hardly understandable, no relevance with real life scenarios. they ask for assignments which is joke, you have to fill irrelevant pages by copying each other and just fill pages and write blindly which will be bundled up and probably never open. most of the teachers excluding the hod and few others teach in native language and they explain mechanical without involving digital picture or diagramsthe process includes by appearing for the jee exam. if you attain a certain cutoff for this college you might get admission. there is no interview process, after you get the cutoff rank you have to verify documents from pu on mentioned date and register yourself. i chose mechanical engineering because i could attain a seat only in this field due to my curoff rank. after getting selected the jac panel will fix a date for verification of all engineering colleges affiliated to pu where your seat will be allotted and all documents and id proofs need to be verified, even hostels may be alloted on the same day. after verification you have to submit the fees online through sbi pay and pay the printed reciept along with registration to the required staff. this college offers engineering in 4 fields which are mechanical, civil, electronics and computer science. the highest no of students who get placed are from computer science department

review_text: [college infrastructure]: the hostels at bits pilani are of excellent quality. they offer spacious accommodations, with double rooms provided in the first and second year, and separate rooms thereafter. each wing of the hostel has its own washrooms, ensuring convenience for the residents. additionally, there are two designated areas for outdoor sports such as volleyball and badminton, as well as two common rooms in each hostel where indoor games like chess and carrom can be enjoyed. furthermore, the hostels are equipped . | [academics]: the bits pilani is known for its academic excellence and curriculum was updated as per new education policy rules and all the professors are helpful and supportive.the professor under i completed my phd was very genuine and supportive. | [placements]: bits pilani is known of its placements. students got placed in one of the best companies in the world. each student can get maximum 3 jobs and one of my friend got 3 jobs. many big companies jp morgan, citi bank, goldman sachs, deloitte, amazon, flipkart hire from our campus. good internship opportunities are arrange by campus in form of ps1 and ps2. | [anything else]: curriculum is best
college_name: Birla Institute of Technology and Science Pilani

review_text: [college infrastructure]: we have everything in our infrastructure, the college has provided us every essential needs we want,. the facilities like food in canteen, watee purifier, are maintained regularly. our college mostly eco friendly | [academics]: as i am a mechanical engineering student, our management has providing us the necessary laboratories and wide range of machinery, we have digital classroom as most the mechanisms needs to be understood in 3 dimensional way | [placements]: our college have also provided us with a good , placements in the mnc are being attractive by our college management, which have the beautiful carrier opportunity in the class itself, our average package during our batch is 6lpa

[college infrastructure]: the main building of the college is big and old style but well maitained.the science & technology building is modern, 8-storey tall, and houses several departments with smart classrooms and labs.the labs are fairly well equipped. | [academics]: the strong academics of this college with great faculty and various courses like b.tech,m.tech, m.sc,b.sc, and b.arch. as per nirf 2024 this college has been ranked 49th among all the engineering institutes and 4th in architecture and planning. | [placements]: the placement of this college is very good as per this year the highest placement offered was 56lpa by microsoft.we almost have 90-95 percent students placed every year irrespective of any branch. the average salary package for b.tech is 12lpa. | [campus life]: this college has a beautiful and historic campus with an area of 123 acres.it is filled with greenery and has a rich heritage.there are 17+ hostels within the campus and the hostels are also quite good ..
college_name: Indian Institute of Engineering Science and Technology Shibpur

review_text: pros/cons: the seniors and staff in this college are really friendly which is a good thing for a beginner the hostel atmosphere is really friendly department facilities are really to be appritiated mess food in the hostel should be improved college building should be renovated .the building is old class rooms dosnt have enogh power suppiles for laptops | placement experience: the placement are really hood in this college noth core and software based companies come for campus placement expecially for our depatrment electronics and communication engineering mostly everyone will get placed if there is no standing backlogs.

[college infrastructure]: the infrastructure is good with all the facilities. the library is quite good, wi-fi is also available, classrooms are not luxurious but decent for education. hostel facility is good. two or three students in one room. food is average, the medical facility is good. sports events are refreshing.. the new academic building is under construction and will be ready for classes from next semester with modern classes. the facilities provided by the hostel is nice, and the quality of food served in the | [academics]: the teachers are helpful and knowledgeable. they will clear all your doubts whenever asked. the teaching quality is also good, and the question paper is also of standard quality. the teachers keep healthy relations with students, students are free to speak and ask doubts. the course curriculum is good and does make students industry ready. | [placements]: about 95% of student got placed from my branch. all of them get a decent package. the highest package was 40 lacs per annum while the average package was 10 lacs per annum. top recruiting companies are amazon, microsoft, adobe, oracle, ola, paytm, all state, amdocs, yodlee, uhg and many more. sde role is provided to most of them. | [campus life]: . the annual events, sports events are refreshing.and we enjoy a lot in these times
