[college infrastructure]: the facilities of and infrastructure of the college is just amazing. i was shocked when i first got into campus. the wi-fi service is very good around 4 mbps speed we get. the classrooms are little bit shady but fine we can ignore that. the quality of the facilities provided in the hostel is average,but it depends on how you score as if you score more. you,ll get the better hostel room. there are many messes for different regions and cultures. | [academics]: teachers in our college are knowledgeable. if you try to interact with them. then they will be more helpful and involved. teachers quality depends of the faculty you choose for your subject. a few teachers teach, and others take classes. the course curriculum is flexible. students are free to choose what they want to learn apart from a few mandatory courses. | [placements]: about 70-80% of the students who attend for the placements got placed. the highest salary packed offered in our course is 25 lpa, and the lowest salary pakage offered is 2.5 lpa, top recruiting companies like maruti, tata, rishi fibc etc., visit our college for placements. i can't exactly tell what percentage of the students got an internship, but only few students got an internship in core jobs. a top role offered to the students is a graduate engineering trainee. | [campus life]: the campus is one of the most happening palces on earth. there were many annual events such as gravitas(tech fest) in which students from all over the country participate in many fun tech competitions such as drone racing, formula car testing, robowars etc., then there was riviera(cultural fest) which was a 4-day long event with many fun activities and night shows in which many famous bollywood celebrities and musical bands used to perform.

[college infrastructure]: a large college with all the facilities needed for a student to have a happy college life. it had a very good and well maintained basketball court. the labs are pretty good and the canteen food is truly affordable and tasty. | [academics]: a well qualified faculties are there for us they are having well educated from all aspects and making helpful for the students also in different programs. our university also provides a well industrial visit program to us. | [placements]: placements at our college are excellent. around 85% of the students get placement. highest package offered is 28lpa. and the average package is 5 lpa. college supports us during the placement process.

[college infrastructure]: the college has an excellent infrastructure with smart classrooms, well-equipped labs, good wi-fi, a central library, modern hostels, food courts and impressive sports and recreation facilities. the campus is great for a learning environment. | [academics]: the academic structure is designed and updated regularly to meet industry standards. professors are approachable and encourage discussions. evaluation is fair and there is strong focus on practical learning. | [placements]: placements are excellent with companies from diverse sectors visiting the campus. internships are widely available and placement cell provides strong support through resume building and training sessions. | [campus life]: it is vibrant and full of energy. numerous clubs, events, fests and cultural activities keep students engaged. the environment is friendly, inclusive, and promotes personal as well as professional growth.

[college infrastructure]: a bit underwhelming due to inadequate funding. basic labs found in first year are not upto the mark. however when it comes to equipments, toh would probably all of them except half of them are obsolete from industry pov. | [academics]: everything is great except the fact the first year has a lot of irrelevant subjects. other than that, the later half syllabus has to room to accomodate more subjects which correlate with the industry directly. | [placements]: i would say decent but recently we have been underperofiming according to the student talent present. the administration is kind of lazy when it comes to the placement procedure. statistics are best referred through official sources. | [campus life]: depends on the branch. if it's jadavpur campus, then you won't have enough time explore the entire college however the salt lake campus is really small.

[college infrastructure]: yes,the college have all the facilities and infrastructure and equipment every branch lab has all the facilities to perform lab work.the classrooms are have projector and sound observer which helps students to hear facilities nicely .they have been taken very good care with proper maintenance.the college,hostel and college campus is totally clean and food are also hyegnic | [academics]: i am btech cse student i got suggestions from my seniors that the college have very nice academic and the placement senario for cse is very nice.the curriculum is updated and the student are made aware of all the new technology and research .the cdc helps your to get ready for the placment and make you job ready. | [placements]: the quality of placment for computer science is excellent.where as it is less in other branches and approx very less in petro,ee,civil.the highest sallary offered is 22 lakh for cse student and for petroleum student was also same but to very less.the sallary offered average is 4 lakh.the college is very supportive. | [campus life]: the campus life is very nice it is near by mussorie and has excellent atmosphere.there are many club in college where you can get involved.the student gets very nice teacher as well as supportive staff.the problem is that you will not get a bus auto anything to come college after 7 pm for that you need private vechile.but overall everything is good and can handle all emergency.

the annual fest aloha, and tech fest amaya happen annually tech fest in april and annually fest in october. the library is there but not too big, and resources are there. sports are under construction they are working towards it. there are many different clubs where you can participate: coding club, hackathon club, music club, movie club, next tech lab and many more.from semester 3 students need to choose between higher studies and placement. many companies come including microsoft, infosys, wipro, and many more. 50 lakhs is the highest package offered. 100% of students get placed who choose to get placement. my plan is to get a decent package.

[college infrastructure]: indian institute of technology delhi provides such a big campus. students use cycles to go from campus to hostel because it is little bit far . there is no boundation of timing inside the campus. mess food is good . everyday s menu is different. | [academics]: best institute to make your career. there are different entrance exams for different courses. the teachers were qualified, helpful and knowledgeable. the teaching quality was very good. yes, the curriculum is relevant and it makes students industry-ready. | [placements]: about ninty eight percent get placed every year in almost each department in indian institute of technology delhi. they provide pretty good placements as comparison to other colleges. mostly students got on campus placement.

the annual fest is conducted every year. after the semester in the month of february, it is conducted. the library is very big and all types of books are present in the library. sports clubs and ground is also available for different types of sports. this type of thing help student to learn a lot of thingsthe faculty of the college is of phd level and with good industrial experience. which is very helpful for us. the college faculty motivates us to take part in the extra-curricular activities and provides us with full assistance during the research activity. the faculty of the college is very friendly.

[college infrastructure]: college infrastructure is good but management is improper. hierarchy misalignment can be observed. food hygiene is up to mark. free wifi facility for students. sports ground are there according to game type. | [academics]: advanded studing pattern is being followed to aware the students with market dynamics. the curriculum of gla some how lacks behind the quality content required for placement point of view. although regular immersion classes are conducted to prepare the students. | [placements]: gla brings 100+ companies for every students of different program. latest 51 lpa package cross the history of gla itself. for btech. students gla brings the company who offer atleast 6 lpa as a result the average package pf gla is 8 lpa. | [campus life]: improvement is needed. | [anything else]: gla is a good college for grates students.

[college infrastructure]: bennett university infrastructure is well-designed. high-speed wi-fi is available. laboratories are better. computers are available, and you can access them anytime. there is a decent library, and we can study there peacefully. mess is available. the food served in the canteen is decent. medical facilities are available. sports are conducted. i would recommend students to join this college. | [academics]: faculty members are very helpful. they help us in all situations. they are very knowledgeable. the course curriculum is relevant. semester exams are moderately difficult. the passing percentage is very good. | [placements]: the placements are average, student gets 7-8lpa average package and the highest on campus placement is 30lpa, the highest off campus placement is 50lpa this year approximately 80% of the students gets job, the lowest package offered on campus is about 4-5lpa by a mass recruiter company. | [anything else]: i recommend this college

according to me, it's the ideal place to experience it. one thing i would like to add is there are many events throughout the year but 3 of them are things that keep us ahead of other colleges, cultural fest(zeitgeist) lots and lots of fun, sports fest(aarohan), and one is technical fest(advitiya). this is in short about the college since there are unlimited things which can only be explored by self.this year the placement was around excellent,80% of students got their dream job and some didn't appear for the interview due to their dream of higher studies. the highest package was around 44 lpa and the average was 20.5 lpa in the companies like goldman sachs, amazon, ponds, tcs, etc. if you have a hard time and don't get a placement you can appear for gate etc. or approach higher studies.
college_name: IIT Ropar - Indian Institute of Technology - [IITR]

review_text: in fests point of view, my college is best, but it held for college students only, as we were not in our campus but our college students are very active and enthusiastic in these, so they do all possible thing to make fests a best one. till last yr, it was intra college only, but from this yr, we thought to increase participation from other colleges students.couse syllabus is almost updated as per the current need, but like other colleges, i feel, in this college also we are lagging in acquiring practical knowledge. till now industry exposure is almost nil. most of the faculties are good, but ad-hoc faculties are poor also. venkateshwarlu sir is one of the best faculty. also sandeep sir, our current hod is best.

[college infrastructure]: as a working professional i am very happy to share review on my college, in 2019 at that time before pandemic, our college has very high standards on maintaining good infrastructure and scalable infrastructure, which is very helpful for students growth and skill | [academics]: my faculty is explaining whatever i want iny educational purposes, they have teached me in the way that i eill succeeded on my career, thus we have to given best on my career opportunities and here i have learned my leadership management skills | [placements]: i have received various offers during my studies and internship goals, here we have best training and placement cell, which always searches to give good opportunity for us. here, this college is good in campus placement drives in our life

[college infrastructure]: gla have the greatest infrastructure with having academics and hostel buildings. it has classrooms with smart board and with working wi-fi in all the campus. it provides full of hygienic environment for students. | [academics]: i am doing mba in dual from this collage, because it provides grate academics for the students. with help of supportive teachers and helping staff i can do study easily. it provides latest curriculum to study. | [placements]: collage provides a high quality placements to the students, around 136 mnc's visit collage for the drive. they offered highest of 20 lpa in mba & 44 lpa in b.tech. around 90 percentage of students get placed through the drives. | [campus life]: collage provides best campus life by events and club activities.

[college infrastructure]: the campus is neat and clean and well structured. cleanliness is all the way in the campus. classrooms and labs are well equiped of each branch, wifi is available overall the campus but sometimes it makes an issue in the internet speed | [academics]: there is a strong focus of academics in this university, with short term tests in a time span of one and half months. if you are just coming to chill out and attend the classes then this is not for you , u have to do some efforts on your own too. | [placements]: placements are average by looking at the fee structure, product based and service based companies both come but some companies come in terms of mass hiring and take many students with a package of around 4 6 lpa but if you are a serious student overall then microsoft , amazon type companies are there also for those brilliant students | [campus life]: you will not find a chill campus life here all around like you think in delhi university or bits pilani type universities. there is strictness overall but if you found your group then you can really have your best time here

[college infrastructure]: infrasture is outstanding, i feel like i am in a city with great cleanliness and facilities. i have perfect evenings. but the only problem is the time limit for girls, it bumps me out. we have parks, malls, food courts, playgrounds, cafes, etc. | [academics]: overall it's good, but it all comes too you. the teaching faculty is good, the study material is good, they teach updated stuff. they are friendly. just don't try to disgrace them that's seriously not good and can cause you a penalty. | [placements]: nice. i have seen students getting placed in good companies. like every faculty is ready to help you in your placement. many multinational companies come here for recruitments. the pakage provided is good but only thing you have to earn it. | [campus life]: campus life is superb. but with only one issue, but you'll enjoy it.

[college infrastructure]: infrastructure of lpu is really world class. spread over an area of 700 acres, it has one of the largest residential capacity in the world. well, there are 8 boys hostel and 7 girls hostel in the campus. classrooms are very modern and spacious. use of smart boards, projectors, wifi is done here. central library of lpu is like a big mall and it has got all the variety of books starting from a noble to a thesis paper. a big stadium sized playground is also there inside the campus. | [academics]: i am studying b. tech cse because i find computers and technology very exciting. if we talk about quality of teaching in lpu, then its quite good. most of the professors are having a pg degree and they are very skillfull. no partiality is there in the class. sometimes, it becomes very hectic to attend 9-5 classes. curriculum is updated and contains all the recent developments in the field like ai & ml, data science, cyber security etc. which is a highly professional course and is in demand. | [placements]: placement of lpu is average if we consider average package offered to a student. but, most of the students has a job in their hand when they pass out. top recruiting companies in lpu are amazon, flipkart, adobe, tcs, wipro, tech mahindra etc. just a few days back, 30 students got placed in amazon at a whopping package of up to 30 lpa. the average salary offered to a cse grads is 5.6 lpa. | [campus life]: the best thing that lpu gives to a student is exposure and platform & the worst feature of lpu is some less experianced professors which makes study very boring. students can engage in several activities like playing sports, swimming, participating in cultural events, joining a student organisation, learning how to play piano in division of students welfare etc. students, teachers and support staffs are very hepful, kind and generous. overall, campus life is amazing.

i was always interested in cse so i took this course. it covers everything about computer science so there's that. the professors are great with one and one attention to every student. every branch has a strength of at max 100 so the class size is usually small after the first year. exams are conducted as per the schedule and are pretty hardthe annual fest here is exodia and techfest is expected. campus life is full of a lot of fun activities and is full of clubs. the library is full of the latest books and journals. and classrooms are well furnished. sports are highly encouraged here and so are student clubs
college_name: IIT Mandi- Indian Institute of Technology - [IITM]

review_text: [college infrastructure]: our department is fully facilitated. we have all the equipment available. every piece of machinery is state-of-the-art machinery. the hostels are good and very affordable, and there are numerous messes on campus where you can eat. we have good living conditions, safe and secure hostels, and good services. | [academics]: teachers in our college are very helpful. they are qualified and knowledgeable, and they give their best in teaching. our course is curriculum relevant. you can say some teachers try to make you industry-ready, but it's not possible without industry exposure. semester exams are not too tough. | [placements]: around 70% of people get placed in our college. others try for gate and other exams, some also get placed by applying outside the campus interviews. the placements in our college are very good as it is a central university.
college_name: Ajay Kumar Garg Engineering College Ghaziabad

review_text: [college infrastructure]: infrastructure of gla university is very big and attractive. classrooms are also very nice and all the necessary facilities like wifi, seats, fans, lights are available for the students. hostel of the gla university is also nice and living spaces is clean and hygienic. | [academics]: classes are conducted properly in a mannered environment and teachers are highly educated and experienced so they help students in their learnings and build their career. curriculum is updated and includes all the recent changes in the field. | [placements]: placement of gla university is pretty good and the process is easy which is done through interview round and extra classes are provided to the students for enhancing their knowledge and skills. highest salary package offered 35 lacs per annum and average salary package was stood 3 lacs per annum. | [campus life]: campus life is best because campus is very beautiful and big and all facilities are available like canteen, sports center, play grounds etc. there are so many activities in which students can get engaged in and enhance their skills.

the fee is modestly close to the? 2,00,000 per year for tuition fees, additionally you'll have to pay? 90,000 for the mess, hostel, sports, hospital and other facilities for an entire year. hence, the total fee for a year is closer to the? 2,90,000. it might seem huge, but you'll not have to pay a penny outside this and you'll get all the services at iit bombay included in this itself. normally free revision is done by a separate committee every year, and it is as per the policies which are quite legitimate. i did not receive any scholarships as they are only given to students from economically weaker sections and there are provisions for such scholarships. students whose family income is less than ? 8,00,000 and whose cpi>6.0 are not required to pay tuition fees under merit-cum-means scholarship. the full fee is waived for students with less than ? 5,00,000 income. there are plenty of other named scholarships by our alumni and believe me, funds won't be a problem if you want to study at iit bombay.clubs: consulting, finance, tech, f1 racing, mars rover, auv, cedrica asia's biggest cultural festival - mood indigo (dec.), asia's biggest technical festival - techfest (dec. or jan.), asia's biggest entrepreneurial summit - the e-summit (feb.), asia's biggest social festival - abhyuday (feb.) all kinds of books (digital and hard copy) are available at the central library of iit bombay. there is an online system as well to issue the books and find the exact location of those books on the shelves. classrooms have cushioned seats, acs, well lit, boards comparable to mit in the us. world-class olympic standard sports facilities for every sport, basketball, swimming, football, hockey, squash, badminton, tennis, table tennis, gym, kho kho, etc. we have 3 big auditoriums at student dispense to be used for all kinds of events, and a separate student activity centre (sac) where all the clubs and student bodies have dedicated rooms for an internal purpose, hence cultural exist.
college_name: IIT Bombay - Indian Institute of Technology - [IITB]

review_text: [college infrastructure]: the college is excellent when it comes to the infrastructure as we share our infrastructure with iit bombay. state of the art auditoriums, classrooms and sports facilities are provided on the campus. infrastructure is well and good.mess food is average.they cook contaminated vegetables sometimes.ambience within the campus is second to none.wifi facility is also available 24?7. | [academics]: the faculty members are helpful and always try to improve their course structure by the feedback they receive from the students. the courses are structured as per the curriculum. the curriculum is good and rigorous as the evaluation is done on the basis your attendance, class participation, project submission, midterm and final term marks. with just 5 to 6 hours of classes on a daily basis and weekends off,you can roam around the campus to see the campus beauty.faculty is quiet good and friendly. | [placements]: there are excellent placements across all the domains. majorly operations, finance, consulting and marketing were offered. the average salary offered to the students was 18 lpa. 100% summer and final placements are guaranteed. placement cell gas provided us with enough guidance and support to crack the interviews.

40 lectures per subject per semesters phd,btech,mtech graduates are apart of the faculty yes they have courses on various offbeat topics conducted thouroughout the year there are email id's on the website and whatsapp groups with teachers also an app which helps connect teachers and students can recheck classes but video quality is poor most of the communication thourough google groupsit's a decently vast curriculum, teaching is mediocre. exposure is also mediocre, importance is given to academics alone.no importance to cultural activities good campus and labs research options are good exam structure is systematics computer based tests ensuring fair judgement

ece is somewhat easy for those who love circuits, diodes, and all which helps us to understand modern technology better. the same goes for me, that's why i chose this branch and course. faculty to student ratio is quite nice here even in the first year. our faculty is mostly ph.d. and highly qualified. term exams are held every mid of semester and at the end of the semester. some class tests are also there. exams are easy to pass even if you study a few days before but you have to study regularly to score well.resonanz, moksha, innovision, etc are held every year in which students from different colleges take part. the library is quite good with the availability of mostly all types of books and journals. classrooms are equipped with modern technologies, especially for the freshers. all types of sports and extracurricular activities are held inside the campus from time to time. there are many societies and clubs in every interest and field for the students that are being run by the students.

[college infrastructure]: great infrastructure and campus life except for the hostel rules which i found to be archaic and conservative. the lab equipments are maintained well and all are accessible. great for people who are research oriented. | [academics]: this is where vit excels with its fully flexible credit system. one can set the course as per his requirements given that he meets a certain conditions. the curriculum ensured a holistic approach to your engineering degree and the faculty is well qualified. would prefer a more interactive approaches in certain courses. | [placements]: great for certain branches and again it largely depends on the state of economy and that's a whole different picture. as far as the quality of placements depends upon the branch there are cases where one has to make do with jobs from the non core sector. | [campus life]: except for the curfew and strict hostel rules, campus life is great with events all year round.
college_name: Vellore Institute of Technology Chennai Campus

review_text: [college infrastructure]: good infrastructure with all major facilities , good wifi , very well furnished library, beautiful campus, have multi-activity center with large auditorium , also nice hostel rooms with sufficient water supply | [academics]: professors are nice as per behaviour and teaching perspective, good syllabus coverage , timely exams, promotes multiple aspects of learning rather than just the syllabus. well defined syllabus and good teaching methodology | [placements]: a variety of companies visit campus every year including big tech giants and also startups. majority of the students get jobs from the software development profile and business development profile from all branches.

i was interested in coding since i was in class 11th that's why i choose this as not a very brilliant student i was unable to get into any government college so out of the all colleges j found this one which was perfect according to me i can't pay too many fees for other private colleges this has a fees everyone can afford students are good there are approx 50 sections in each section there are 70 students and yes you are gonna find this strength in every college so don't worry about strength keep working hard and you will get good placement exams to take place every month faculties are qualified some of them had done ph.d. in their respective fields.my fee is 159000 and i guess this fee is good i didn't get any scholarship i think my course is too much affordable as compared to other private colleges who are offering this course i'm in my first year so i didn't get any job till yet but ya co panties came here you have to pay the fees by any means of payment you want to do.

[college infrastructure]: yes college has all the facilities. there are well equipped labs with all necessary components to carry out project work.labs are all well maintained. food is hygienic and the places are clean in the college. | [academics]: i am currently pursuing electronics and computer engineering as i have interest in software side and also wanted to explore the hardware side of things. the curriculum is updated .we have to make ourselves job ready by our self efforts. | [placements]: the placement season is going in a little slow pace in the college. nearly 25% students are placed .the average salary is around 10lpa.due to recession placements are effected a little but some good companies are coming in college.
college_name: Thapar Institute of Engineering and Technology Patiala

review_text: [college infrastructure]: the infrastructure is state of the art. the lecture halls are well equipped in terms of acoustics, desks and monitors. the hostel rooms are not the best but comfortable while the amenities are complete. this includes geyser, hot drinking water, washing machine, fridge etc. | [academics]: i am studying textile engineering. the quality of teaching is good but more importantly the peer group discussions are what fuel learnings. the course gets updated with new de's every now and then which ensures recent developments are included. | [placements]: the placements are very good. companies come across all sectors and in big numbers for all sectors. the pay is also competitive and within a sector also there is diversity in jd. the best companies obviously come for placements. the average salary hasn't been disclosed for this year. | [campus life]: the campus life is what we will remember iit delhi for. the learnings happen on campus and the memories we cherish are also created on campus. being slightly more specific the hostel life is fun filled. the campus has good spaces to hang out, eat and discuss. the sports facilities are also good for occasional recreation. | [anything else]: not really

pros/cons: senior are helping and friendly and guide in academics girls ratio is very good and is about 1:5 there nirf ranking is good and some faculty are top faculty of india the campus is temporary and we have to travel by transport to reach hostel boys not allowed out of hostel after 7 pm they are providing branch change option which i don't like | placement experience: this year 2024 student got highest package by students is 51 lakh and lowest is not known and many companies visit here approx 50 company and placement ratio is very approx 80 percentage my plan is to get placement off campus
college_name: National Institute of Technology - [NIT] Meghalaya, Shillong

review_text: [college infrastructure]: the infrastructure of a college plays a vital role in the development of the college as the students are now focusing on the labs, class rooms, etc while selecting a college. it is important that the colleges have very good infrastructure with | [academics]: academic degree is a qualification awarded to a student upon successful completion of a course of study in higher education, usually at a college or university. these institutions often offer degrees at various levels, usually divided into undergraduate and postgraduate degrees. the most common undergraduate degree is the bachelor's degree, although some educational | [placements]: placements: 60% students were placed. highest package offered was inr 20 lakhs and the lowest was inr 3 lacs. wipro, tata and many more companies recruit from our college.it is outstanding college with high placement | [campus life]: awesome | [anything else]: no

pros/cons: faculty have superb record in research and development infrastructure is world class and constantly under development overall society in diverse and excellent peer group. everywhere post graduate students have not adequate representation academics is super tough and some irrelevant cousrses are there there is some sort of drug abuse happening in some hostels | placement experience: the placement drive start in 7th sem with interviews at the end of 7th semester and another in 8th sem. around 80% of students gets placed mostly in non core sector like sde, finance, consulting. average package is around 25lpa, with maximum around 4.3cr.
college_name: IIT Kanpur - Indian Institute of Technology - [IITK], Kanpur

review_text: yes, i am a student of this college. there is an entrance exam known as viteee which is generally after the 12th-grade board exams. vit releases an application form that is supposed to be filled by the applicant with necessary details such as the aadhaar number, permanent address, etc. there are a fixed number of options for the slot and dates. choose the one suitable for you and give the exam. a few weeks later, the results are announced and there is a date assigned for counseling. once you attend the counseling, you will be shown the number of seats left for each course depending on your rank. choose the appropriate course and your details will be taken. the fee structure, the allotment, the id card photo would be discussed with you. i have opted for computer science. i am interested in data science and i want to learn the appropriate course necessary for that domain. vellore institute of technology is a college that offers exposure with ample opportunities and chances for students to prove their worth. the teaching, the environment, and the management have always been well organized and combined units with experience in the field of education.the placements are a huge factor in the reputation vit has earned. companies such as microsoft, amazon, paypal ranging from multinationals to startups have visited the campus for their placement drives. the students are asked to first register for placements if they are willing to sit for interviews. there is a special placement cell that guides students for placement related activities. there is specialized training that starts around february or march that focuses on training students for the placement process. after a few months, companies visit the campus and placements take place. approximately, 74% of the students have been placed.

the are three major events in our college . 1.kurkhsastra 2.daksh 3.colleosum these three occurs in the even semester and the model of this was conducted in the odd semester, 1 is based on cultural. 2 is based on the technology.it is a technical fest.3 is sports activities.positive-good infrastructure positive staffs friendly senior the curriculum was semi theory and semi lab and there are five free periods per week in 1 st year.and 11 from 2 nd year. negative- out of the city no hostel provided for students from 70 km radius

pros/cons: campus life of this college is best ..big and beautiful campus very less restriction... .good freedom so we have enough time for hobby good placement opportunities and research opportunities remote location.... travelling is difficult | placement experience: placement starts from 7th sem . many companies visited our campus for placement..top it companies that visited our campus is samsung, nvidia, oracle , sap lab , cisco etc psu also visited for placement... which includes bpcl, oil india limited,eil, mecon, bel, hpcl.. etc .. top core company also visited here ... which includes vedanta , jsw , tata power, honda etc . highest package is 82 lpa which is given by atlassian. average is 6 lpa i am working in infratech company

pros/cons: the college has quite a good academic building but the hostels are old and not very well maintained the crowd is nice and quite competitive, people are smart and quite sharp the professors are a bit on a stricter side however some are quite chill, they might make you work hard in order to score good hostel and mess food is not up to date, often we face issues like insects in mess food or stale vegetables being served. | placement experience: students become eligible for internship after 4th semester , after 6th semester the companies start coming for regular placement for cse the average was around 20 lpa with median being 16-17 lpa companies that generally visit are - atlassian, amazon, flipkart , bny mellon, cisco, texas instruments etc around 140 offers were made and in a batch of 120, 100 have secured placement placement percentage is around 92% highest package - 65 lpa atlassian (on campus) 1.23 cr rubrik (off campus) lowest package - 7 lpa average - 18 - 20 lpa

[college infrastructure]: contains all necessary equipment. but some equipment are little bit old. classrooms also good. hostels need to be improved. hostels contains own mess and indore sports facilities. and our college contains two common grounds for football and cricket. | [academics]: teachers are highly qualified. very good teaching. curriculum is little bit old. curriculum need to be improved for present needs. some improvements in the curriculum makes us job ready and for competitive exams. | [placements]: placement for core departments need to be improved. for non core departments our college provides good placements. almost all software companies offers placements every year. microsoft offers good package every year. core companies like tata steel, l&t also offers placements. | [campus life]: lot of greenery in college campus.
college_name: Indian Institute of Engineering Science and Technology Shibpur

review_text: [college infrastructure]: the facilities provided in our college are good. wi-fi speed is good. other facilities like sports, games, and medical facilities are also good. quality of labs is also good. the quality of food served is average. | [academics]: teachers in our college are good, knowledgeable, and friendly with students. they use both theoretical and practical methods for teaching. of course, we get industry exposure. the course curriculum is good. | [placements]: the placement percentage of our college is in between 95% to 99%. most of my seniors got placed through college placements. the highest package offered was in between 40 lpa to 50 lpa, the lowest package offered was in between 10 lpa to 12 lpa.

pros/cons: the campus, its huge which can almost fit a whole city in it and also the faculties provided by the university the placement assistance and also the top level companies which offer internships and placements the sports complex which provides excellent sports facilities to all the students the 80% attendence which is a bit excessive compared to other universities which require only around 70 or so some mandatory events to attend which require credits attendence wont be considered even if we had a medical leave | placement experience: the students are eligible to start with the internships from around 4th semesters and the actual placements for the job are after the completion of the course. the companies like delloite, jp morgan, ikea, etc have made visits. the highest package offered for bba was 11lpa and the average being around 5-7 lpa

pros/cons: i like the sanmati garden which is our college i love the way our teachers teach and how they are supportive i love the cafeteria and all the hotels near to nitte construction work which is going on and how the noise is almost interrupting classes some teachers who do not teach that good i one think i dislike the most is there are no ac's in the classroom | course curriculum overview: the course is really very interesting and the teacherd teach really well , they try to relate most of the topic they can to real world applications, the timing for the 20 marks exam is 40 min and the end semester exam which is of 100 marks is almost 3 hours

i do not take any special courses. the faculty is good at timing and they are highly qualified teachers they explained high-level teaching and if you have any doubt regarding the subject you can ask doubt at the time in the class otherwise you can approach the respective faculty in their particular staff room.ph.d. and higher education qualified teachers. every 3 months there will be held exams and exams are difficult to pass.there will be many fests going on regarding the festival or something. fest is good and you enjoy it a lot. the college only provides the books library. asia's largest lecture hall we have provided. there will be a large ground and sports competition also going on. you can find many pages on social media under the name of mnit jaipur.

[college infrastructure]: the college has a really beautiful vibe to it. most of it is old but everything works fine. they are maintained regularly. the food is really better than what other colleges serve. all facilities are great. | [academics]: i am studing cse because it is mainstream. no interest in the beginning as such. most of the teachers are not good at teaching although some are great. the professors basically read you the slides. i studied on my own. the curriculum is little old i guess as we were not taught machine learning which is a mainstream thing now a days. it makes you job ready to some extent. | [placements]: the placements were good for students appearing for it companies. those without computer studies background struggled. students of cse, cce, it and ece did well on placements. mechanical students did well in core-job placements. the average salary offered would be 6-7 lakhs i guess. highest would be somewhere near 40 lakhs by microsoft. the placement process happened through out the semester so it got a bit hectic for students who were not getting placed. the process can get better. | [campus life]: full power enjoyment. college area is beautiful. those who like rains would enjoy it more and vice-versa. students can do whatever activities they want as everything is available there. students are very good and talented. teachers are ok. support staff is also good depending on how live inside the campus area.

the course is very much appreciated based and first the very basics of students are cleared and students are given an insight about various technological advancement s happening around the world at this time and though the theory is important also students are taught how to apply that as wellthere are lots of events celebrated in our college apart from various religious festivals we have various events like cultural fest where students showcase their hidden talents and use this opportunity to gain popularity and various opportunities tech fest is also held every year

there are many fests conducted during the semester and recently kiit has conducted a silver jubilee of having 25 years and has a tag soil to silver .there are good facilities for sports and games. recently our university has conducted world hockey games in our university only also there are my societies in which u can take part.i have chosen this course because i like doing things related to computer programming and i have a good interest in this course. faculty are very highly qualified from reputable universities in foreign countries. there are two exams per semester that are mid-sems and end-sems and the question is very difficult.

[college infrastructure]: the college has 4 buildings. the classrooms are big and have projectors too. although most of the rooms don't have ac. there are several different labs present with latest equipments. the college has the facilities that are important for a student. | [academics]: as academics is considered the college has a very talented staff who under the supervision of the vice chancellor have derived a great curriculum for us which has subjects like distruptive technologies that give us a lot of industrial knowledge. | [placements]: placements are very unsatisfactory as the average placements are 3-4 lakhs per annum and most of the students get placed by mass recruiters. the whole placement process is taken care by the placement cell of the college.

[college infrastructure]: yes, the college has almost all the facilities, namely: a skill centre, robotics, 3d printing, laser cutting centres. there is greenery all around, the environment is comforting and the students here are so amusing. | [academics]: the teachers are alright but you'll have to make the most of yourself. though, the college is at the top in aktu rankings based on the results. it's only the hardwork of students that counts and not only of the teachers. | [placements]: placements are quite good with 90% of them getting average pay of 3-3.5 lacs per annum. companies mostly that visit are related to it fields so if you're of mechanical or civil, you'll be sitting in the placements of it companies too. | [campus life]: campus life is amazing if you have good friends and people around you that are lively. teachers and staff here is quite not that good to understand the students. it's located on the asian highway, yes it's safe. fire and health emergencies can be handled rightly.
college_name: Ajay Kumar Garg Engineering College Ghaziabad

review_text: admission in thapar college is on the basis of the jee main entrance exam. then a list was prepared by the thapar university on the basis of the rank we have in our jee examination. only those students are applicable who has filled the form for the thapar university before the results.in thapar university every year a lot of companies come for the recruitments of the students in the placement cell. and thapar starts providing internship from third year onwards. the average is also good than other institute's
college_name: Thapar Institute of Engineering and Technology - [Thapar University]

review_text: [college infrastructure]: the college infrastructure is very good as it provides all types of facilities which is convenient for students . facilities like library facilities, internet facilities, canteen and hostel facilities are being provided to students | [academics]: the academics is very appreciative as the facilities as well as the course outcome does provide an insight of real life work and make them learn about the working strategy which means they able to get their mind more work which make the students to be able to enhance their skills and development | [placements]: placement are good enough for freshers as they are being given a whooping amount of package which helps them to motivate themselves. the quality of placement is that every year more than 85% of students are get placed at good companies | [campus life]: the campus life is very calm | [anything else]: the overall experience in this college of mine has been far more enjoyable

college life is very pleasant. there are many clubs present in college. its cultural festival is blitzschalg rajasthan's 2nd biggest fest conducted in february. many celebrities are also invited to this. techfest's name is sphinx held near december. it has a very huge library having books of all interests and at a time you can issue 8 books. mnit has vltc's largest lecture theatre in asia. where lecture and guest lectures are conducted. our college court for almost all sports and sports equipment are also provided by the sports complex. it has sports like basketball, volleyball, cricket, football, javelin, athletics, javelin, tennis, table tennis, chess, etc. many jamming sessions are conducted by students workshops are held by various clubs. it has zine as a robotics club, e=mc2 and levels as a dance club, and many other clubs like photography, mavericks, think india, nss, debating, etc.i don't have much knowledge about placements as i am in 3rd semester only. but still, as i have talked with my seniors all big companies visit the college for giving internships and placements. the previous year our college's highest package was 64 lakhs. after the 4th sem companies start visiting colleges. companies like goldman sachs, flipkart, deshaw, and apple. this year i don't why our college got blacklisted from amazon. many core companies also visit like texas, reliance, bpcl, etc. getting a placement in this college is really very easy. most of the companies even give you ppos

the campus life is awesome. a big and beautiful campus with lush greenery and sports infrastructure. the campus is so big that you cannot see it all on foot. some parts of the college have ac classrooms with projectors but the others don't. the are various societies handled by students themselves.the fees have now become a bit high if we consider the government college aspect but overall still less than private colleges. the fees add up if you avail hostel. the college provides financial assistance for those who have low family income.

cse is the best course at this college. having separate labs with fully functional computers for different courses. all faculty members are highly qualified with m.sc from iits or other renowned universities. faculty members take tests and term exams periodically to test the ability of students and exams are of good difficulty.there are 3 fest in college named - vivacity (cultural), plinth (tech fest), and desportivos (sports fest). all these fests happen in jan and feb. there is a big library in the college for students. we have all types of sports in our college from kabbadi to squash. there are more than 30 social and sports clubs.
college_name: The LNM Institute of Information Technology - [LNMIIT]

review_text: the course is quite decent and good. i chose the undergraduate degree of b.tech in the civil engineering department as it was my dream to study at this institute since i was in school. all the faculties are well educated and qualified to the best of their knowledge and the teaching is average. it depends on the student how well he interacts with the teachers and grasps knowledge.life on campus depends from student to student. the campus is very beautiful including lakes, roads covered with trees, ponds etc. the sunsets here are so beautiful and aesthetic. there are many clubs including literature, poetry, music, dance, spiritual, trading, machine learning, coding, gdsc and many more.

[college infrastructure]: as per me ,symbiosis have a nice and a well maintained infrastructure with good facilities and latest equipments which enables the students to keep them updated.we had well maintained labs for different type of practical experiments. we had separate hostels for boys and girls and was cleaned everyday. there was strong wifi in the entire campus and was easily accessible. dining was really clean with less variety of food but proper hygiene was maintained | [academics]: i completed my btech from symbiosis institute of technology and i am really proud that i got a chance to enroll myself in such a prestigious institute. every faculty was highly educated so the quality of teaching was really good . every individual was given proper assistance when required. there was a review of our curriculum in regular interval of time and was updated as per the requirement which in turn enabled the students to crack the interview and get then placed. | [placements]: to be honest placements depend upon the students, still our college tried and did it?s best to get the companies irrespective of the fact that it was not that old, still many students were placed. around 70 percent of the students were placed. highest package was offered around 10 lpa for a computer science student. rest average salary was around 3-4 lpa. and our placement team was really supportive and helped a lot in getting placed . | [campus life]: our campus was really good , happening , and happy people all around with open mind. no one cared what others did. students kept them engaged in different types of events, sports which happened throughout the year. other than the students , the teachers and the support staff were really friendly and helped everyone whenever required. our college was located away from city on a hill with natural beauty all around which gave a lot of positivity. there was an ambulance 24*7 for medical emergency .

[college infrastructure]: i guess it should have 2.5 star, it is neither good nor satisfactory, but okay.. there are no playgrounds, a basketball court is there which single-handedly becomes playground for futsal and many other games, classes are okay for management campus.. another thing that matters is the distance between three campuses from each other . tbh, u will not like it .. but u can manage.. | [academics]: there are really some good teachers and they care about the students... and also i can assure u can learn something from here if you want to. and the best thing is regular classes, in this 2 years of experience, i've never seen a teacher who is not responding to their duties .. | [placements]: as we all know, iem is famous for it's 100% placement records... though it may not be true or as pleasing as it seems to be as all the recruiters are pvt. companies, as per normal, the salary is not satisfactory and also it is not fully reliable as they can bench you anytime... still,, placement is okay, u will get a job for sure if you study well and also a good package is waiting for u buddy
college_name: Institute of Engineering and Management Kolkata

review_text: [college infrastructure]: campus is really ambient except for the construction site at girls hostel. all the labs are equipped well. it would really matter if you were in civil, eeeor mechanical because you will be spending a lot of time over there. coming to cs labs i love them because unlike our labs they are fully air-conditioned. hostels according to my opinion are better than most other colleges. 3 hostels: 15 floors each for boys and girls, 1 mba block, one 3 floored library (best features of the campus). | [academics]: the academics departments has lot of good facilities available in terms of labs especially for civil,mechanical and eee branch. i see you are interested in cse branch, so u just need systems and software installed. don?t worry you won?t face a problem with this. but mechanical and civil guys, beware of all the lab permission you have to take before using the machine for your personal research and projects. | [placements]: in 2018-19 alone, vit has brought more than 600 companies on campus for placements. last year, the highest offer made was 39 lakhs per year by microsoft. over the recent years, many reputed companies such as intel, ebay, amazon, dell, ge, texas instruments, schneider electric, de shaw & co, hitachi, hp, paypal, tata motors, l&t, dr. reddy's, bosch, deloitte, morgan stanley, qualcomm, ashok leyland, honda, ford, global analytics, tcs, cognizant, accenture, wipro and infosys have hired from vit. | [campus life]: it's quite hectic to be frank. and no ragging. seniors are the second best friends you could step into for anything and everything. everyone is very helping in nature. so feel free to talk and get help from them.
college_name: Vellore Institute of Technology Chennai Campus

review_text: [college infrastructure]: a tremendously amazing institute of india, nit jamshedpur is having a beautiful campus along with smart classrooms , developed laboratories and full wifi facility in the campus. but the mess food is not that much good. | [academics]: in my college the teachers are the ones who themselves being from nit's and iit's, and do have really great teaching skills. they are best in quality. the curriculum of college for my branch is completely up to date. | [placements]: the top companies like amazon visit our college during placements, during this year placement's although recession was their but our seniors performed very well and hoping the same and more improved opportunities for us in future from college.

after the 6th semester, students are eligible for placement. in my department, there are several companies like maruti suzuki, hero motorcop, reliance, valency international etc are coming for placement. reliance gave 10 offers hero gave 8 offers maruti gave 7 offers etc. the highest package is 22lpa in valency international. the average package is 7.5lpa.more than 80% of students got placed. my plan is to opt for placement and preparation for the gate.the annual festival is aadhay and the technical fest is technika. aadhay was held in june and technika was held in may. there are some monthly programs also. there are more than 1lakh books in a library. so we got from there. some classrooms have ac and good facilities. sports facilities are mediocre. other than cricket and football there is no good sports facility. there is a good society for dance and e- cell for startups.

it depends upon you if you have skills you get a preplacement offer in 2nd year. in many campuses, mainly web development companies came last year with 1500 offers and around 5000 students placed. the average package is around 4 lakhs and the highest is 46lakhsi got admission via lpunest exam i got category 2 in my examination. i recently not got the job because i am in my first year but i was done so many projects in html css javascript if you have skills you definitely got an internship

[college infrastructure]: yes, in term of infrastructure ,nit agartala is among the top engineering college in india. everything which comes under infrastructure are well maintained. laboratories are updated , library , academics buildings, hostel buildings ,sports centres/complex all are in huge areas , and separate for respective fields/courses. all classrooms are projector based and wifi are provided all over the campus. food provided are good ,not too much good. | [academics]: currently , i am pursuing btech. in electronics and communication engineering. most of the faculties are supportive ,. our course is very detailed , that gives us lot of knowledge for higher education. | [placements]: those who studied good ,are able to accept placement. there are lots of cells based on placements in this college. day by day ,the graph of placement is increasing very rapidly. cse,ece, ee are most preferred branches for placement.

[college infrastructure]: yes our college have all the necessary infrastructures, facilities and equipment. we have a smartboard along with 3 blackboards in our classrooms accommodating around 65 students per class. the laboratories for manual practicals or computer practicals are finely created with sittings and wifi enabled in all the blocks. the library is vast, containing journals of each type, with a long range of books, comics, college publications and more. the sports centre is well maintained , each sport and activity is given a priority, a whole building and various grounds are given to carry out the sports and extra curricular activities. the hostel is good but i feel the expense is high, the food is kind of hygienic but sometimes, its uncomfortable too. | [academics]: i chose computer science because i wanted an exposure in both theoretical and practical fields. the quality of teaching varies by teacher to teacher, if taught by an internal faculty, they teach you according to the college curriculum, if taught by an external trainer from a well - renowned industry will give you industry level teaching and insights. i feel the curriculum is outdated, still going in old patterns, they should add the latest trend that is rag, prompt engineering etc, to their courses to make it practical, theory subjects don't help in jobs, hands on does. | [placements]: the quality of placements is somewhat similar to other colleges, their process is good of taking employability skills to test a student, but they don't follow their own steps, so i feel that is wrong, the students who scored highest in employability tests are securing a base package of 4 or 5 lpa whereas a mediocre or average going for 5 to 6 or even higher, that is somewhere they lack. the highest package was offered by service now , given to only girls. the mail was sent to hostelers , no day scholars, so we weren't having any idea about filling it, . our official placements had started in 6th semester, now for our juniors they did in 5th sem and a count of 150 students are still unplaced from my snior batch so they should wind up the previous batches first in order to move forward with the other ones. | [campus life]: our college campus is good, a good place to vibe if you are a member of the student affairs club or any other technical club cause they host various events. the student affairs society consists of traditional and western dance, music, theatre, literature and so on, technical clubs include ieee society, acm society, geeksforgeeks, coding ninjas , coding blocks etc. students can engage in technical as well as non technical events too. the student crowd is fine if you are with good peeps, teachers are good, give you valuable insights, help you out. | [anything else]: i would like to add that the college could update itself more cause the world is changing, the generation is changing, they update their curriculum i dont know on what basis, even students have difficulty learning them, and teachers teaching that curriculum .

[college infrastructure]: the infrastructure is quite exciting if you like forests. it has departments built quite close to each other and with an ample amount of space which is covered with a lot of trees and vegetation is there. in short it has a the bell and whistles which you might be expecting, dont worry :) | [academics]: quality of the teachers is quite exceptional but you have to put you blood and sweat to maintain attendance. just keeping yourself consistent is quite enough. curriculum is similar in pros and cons as of other iits and nits. | [placements]: placement is quite excellent compared to even other collage of equal caliber. even last year where a lot of collage had bad placements, nsut seemed to maintain it's ground by maintaining an average of 15 in ece department. | [campus life]: campus life is one most essential memories we make along the collage and believe me you wouldn't regret a bit of it. bunking classes to going to vegas mall, and siting in sc with friends are one of the best memories.
college_name: Netaji Subhas University of Technology New Delhi

review_text: [college infrastructure]: the infrastructure is really huge with multiple buildings, keeping the diversity of each field in the college, its got spacious places which is very relaxing as well, the labs are well equipped and classrooms are occasionally well maintained. wifi connectivity is all across the buildings and are in good network speed. | [academics]: i'm studying in my second year of university with the course in b.tech cse w/s in iot, the teaching is pretty good here as the respective lecturers are highly knowledged with many years of experience hence making it easier to learn the subjects | [placements]: the quality is fairly good with many well based companies coming for placements, the percentage is notably high with the highest lpa coming close to 50-60lpa,average comes close to 15lpa,and the process is seemingly easy for the students aswell. | [campus life]: the campus life is the best in srm, with a diverse community of people all across india studying here, you get to meet alot of new people. | [anything else]: no
college_name: SRM Institute of Science and Technology Chennai

review_text: pros/cons: faculty is really supportive and if a student intends to research he can freely do it under the faculty with their preffered research background campus culture, environment and infrastructure is beautiful and has huge amount of extra curricular activities. majority of students are highly enthusiastic about career and coding culture and thus their is healthy competition high student intake which offers diversity, but often leads to bad community. coding culture is comparatively lesser prominent than nsut. administration is really lazy and thus things may take forever to materialize. | placement experience: dtu is very well known for its placements and internships. companies like amazon, microsoft, atlassian visit it several year with high ctcs. students are eligible for oncampus interns from 3rd year onwards.the pfficial stats arent out so the total number of companies isnt sure. the highest last year was 85lpa offered by atlassian while companies like google offered 65lpa. they mostly recruited for sde1 and the percentage is very fluctuating as it depends on the branch. tech branches have really good numbers like 75-85% while for core engineering branches it is about 60%. i plan to work and gain some experience as sde in a reputed company then mba.

[college infrastructure]: has modern and well-equipped infrastructure to support its academic and research activities library: the university library is a hub for academic resources, housing a vast collection of books, journals, and electronic databases. hostels: nsut provides residential accommodation to students through its hostels located within the campus. these hostels offer facilities such as mess, recreation rooms, and other amenities to ensure a comfortable stay for students. sports and recreation: the university encourages sports and extracurricular activities. it has facilities for various sports and recreational activities, including grounds and indoor sports complexes. auditoriums and seminar halls: nsut has auditoriums and seminar halls equipped with modern audiovisual facilities. these spaces are used for conferences, seminars, workshops, and cultural events. cafeteria and food courts: the campus has cafeterias and food courts where students can dine and socialize. | [academics]: offers a wide range of academic programs across various disciplines. courses and programs: nsut offers undergraduate (b.tech.), postgraduate (m.tech., mca, mba), and doctoral (ph.d.) programs in engineering, management, and applied sciences. the university regularly updates its curriculum to align with industry trends and technological advancements. | [placements]: are a significant aspect of its academic offerings. placement cell: nsut has a dedicated training and placement cell (tpc) that facilitates the placement process. the tpc coordinates with companies, organizes placement drives, and provides necessary support to students. | [campus life]: student clubs and societies: nsut hosts a variety of student clubs and societies catering to diverse interests such as technical, cultural, sports, and literary activities. these clubs organize events, workshops, and competitions throughout the year, providing students with opportunities for personal growth and skill development.
college_name: Netaji Subhas University of Technology New Delhi

review_text: [college infrastructure]: college has very well infrastructure.college facilities are very good. college is very well equipped libraries has every book available hostels are very good and they are well maintained food is also very hygenic. | [academics]: quality of teaching is very good . faculties are well qualified . curriculum is updated and this exposes to the industry requirements. they provides the good exposures to the industry requirements and they are very nice. | [placements]: college has 100 percent placements everyone gets placement highest package is around fifteen lakhs.average salary is 3.5 lakh. they are very good placements .they are very pleasant and very well paid .

[college infrastructure]: the college infrastructure is generally satisfactory, with room for improvement. facilities are decent, but there might be issues with maintenance and modernization. consider addressing shortcomings in certain areas to enhance the overall learning environment. | [academics]: the academic quality at the college is average, showing areas for improvement. while some courses and faculty members are strong, there may be inconsistencies or gaps in the curriculum. enhancements in teaching methodologies and resources could contribute to a more robust academic experience. | [placements]: the college's placement performance is below average, indicating room for substantial improvement. a rating of 2 suggests that there are challenges in providing effective career support, networking opportunities, or aligning the curriculum with industry needs. consider initiatives to bolster the placement process and increase student employability.
college_name: Sri Ramakrishna Institute of Technology Coimbatore

review_text: i have chosen this course because i want to serve myself as a software engineer in big it companies and this course is best for it as well as this college provides good placements to students. the student-faculty ratio is quite balanced, there are approx. 2-3 teachers for each subject. iit hyderabad's faculty is very intelligent and smart, as all iit colleges have good faculty. the teaching method is outstanding. they clear all the difficult concepts of physics and mathematics very easily. if i talk about the qualification, then all the teachers are ph.d. holders in this iit college. the exams are held twice in 5 months. the first exam taken by this college is the midterm exam and the second one is the semester exam which is the main exam, as the course is difficult so sometimes it becomes difficult for us to pass, more and more study is required to pass the exams of this college.the campus of iit hyderabad is culturally diverse, and we have the opportunity to learn from people from all over the world as well as india. the college environment is conducive to learning and research. sarang is the college's annual fest, and shastra is the technological fest held by the computer science students of this college where we can get to show off our innovative ideas. the library and the labs are among the largest in the country with many books from all over the world by various authors and writers. various types of computers are available in the computer lab with full wi-fi support. the research facilities are modern and outfitted with a wide range of research tools. in short, we can say that the college's infrastructure is in good condition right now.
college_name: IIT Hyderabad - Indian Institute of Technology - [IITH]

review_text: [college infrastructure]: infrastructure in this college having a excellent infrastructure like advanced technologies like cas cam like this and ...have a facilities like canteen , hostel these are available in our college campus. | [academics]: i am studying in bachelor of commerce choose this course because improved my communication skills technical skills innovative skills analytical skills then a time to time schedule and teacher's are knowledgeable | [placements]: 50% placements in our college comparison of last year i hink about this placement drive ..the highest salary package offered is 6 lpa to 4 lpa then a placement process is conducted interviews in our college. | [campus life]: green campus in our college having a good quality education provided and neatly maintained campus. | [anything else]: nothing

[college infrastructure]: our college has most of the necessary infrastucture,facilities, and equipement but it still lacks in some areas like the buildings which were at the starting of this institution are still there which are not suitable for this generation, equipments that are used in the laboratories are old and sometime doesn't work. but libary is one of the best that i have seen , sport centres is okayish ,wifi is good , hostel rooms are also okayish. | [academics]: academics wise our college is good as people are competitive which have powerful impact on the students.teachers here are very experienced and they know the industry very well.only one problem is that they should provide students with more practical knowledge than theoritical. | [placements]: quality of the placements of our college is pretty good. all the big mncs and tech giants come here to recruit our students. some students also get the chance to be placed outside india with a pretty package. almost all the students get placing barring those who want to pursue master. | [campus life]: campus life is decenst here. every now and then activities are always happening in our college.

i choose this course because it has the highest placements on the campus about 90% and they have old and experienced teachers in the ec department of the gla campus or university. i also have had an interest in chips and ics from the start so that's i choose the course. the faculties to students ratio changes from class to class but the average ratio is 1:45. our faculties are good and qualified (phd)or bsc or btech degree holders and have good experience. their teaching skills are so good that's why they relate each and every topic to real-life applications and it's uses. exams are held according to the academic calendar which can be made at the start of the session but it holds on time. the exams are held mid-term wise or end-term or final of the semester wise.there are many fests which hold monthly and weekly. the teach fests are also held weekly. fest like all or most of the festival, farewell or students related parties, placements party etc. the library is filled with books and all the books are available in it. the amenities are good in the classroom and there are many sports like cricket, football, volleyball etc and many extracurricular activities for the students on campus. there are many social groups and clubs available for the students. students can join this type of club according to their interests.

many fests are organized around the year at nsut. the main fest is "moksha" which is organized roughly around the end of march. there are other cultural and technical fests like teckweek (organized by ieee), resonanz, etc. in the central library, one can find any book one's needs. classrooms are very spacious with high quality and comfortable seats with charging ports below the table for each seat. classrooms have 4 acs, digital screens, and computers for lectures, open wi-fi, speaker system. classrooms are more or less like small auditorium halls. various sports facilities are provided in the college and one can hear about some sports competitions going on at any time. there are a lot of clubs aka societies which have events every now and then. nsutx is an app created by a student which has all the features from attendance, pyq, syllabus, and notices to exam results.i chose this course because my rank wasn't that good to go for a good branch in any nit whereas ice at nsut is well-established and a good course for both tech and non-tech placements. i believe that there are slightly fewer faculties relative to the requirement. faculty here at nsut are well experienced and highly qualified and their teaching method suits all students. exams are held regularly. from class tests, mid-semester, and practical to end-semesters all are planned perfectly to enhance learning. the exams are easy to pass if one has a basic grip on the topics.

[college infrastructure]: yes, my college have all the necessary infrastructure, facilities and equipment. classrooms are air conditioner ,more than sufficient space, 5-g wifi, smart boards are available. library is available 14 hours and in examination 24 hours. sufficient lab and sports center are available. everything is highly clean. mess , canteen and oat food is fresh and hygiene. | [academics]: we are studying coding course ,hss, ta,phy,mth,chm and labs are also regular.each and everything is useful for building knowledge , confidence and also preparing for getting job. quality of teaching is excellent but grading system is even ,i think that's not good.everything is updated and makes ready for job. | [placements]: more than 80% students placed each and every year. highest salary package offered was 1.2 crore and coding courses are important for this. average salary offered was approx 10-12 lakh. yes, college is supportive every time. | [campus life]: college campus is excellent ,i think nothing is worst. campus is very peaceful and pollution free place. students can do whatever they like.nobody will restrict them. safety and security is best and obviously it can handle emergencies.

[college infrastructure]: my college has a spacious campus with green surroundings. the classrooms are clean. labs for all branches are fully functional and well-maintained. the central library has thousands of books and a digital library section as well. internet is available through campus-wide wi-fi. the college also has a good hostel facility for boys and girls with 24/7 security. there are enough places to sit and study quietly. sports and cultural activities are encouraged with proper facilities. | [academics]: the teachers are kind and help students in both academics and career guidance. most of them have good subject knowledge and teach in a student-friendly manner. teachers conduct regular doubt-solving sessions before exams. practical work and mini-projects are also encouraged from early semesters, which builds strong technical understanding. exams are fair and based on what is taught in class. | [placements]: placements are overall good. more than 80% of eligible students get placed each year. many well-known companies like wipro, ibm, infosys, and tech mahindra hire from the college. a few students also get placed in companies like amazon or l&t with higher packages. pre-placement training sessions are provided to prepare students for aptitude tests and interviews. internships are also available through college contacts and help students gain real experience before final placements.
college_name: Yeshwantrao Chavan College of Engineering Nagpur

review_text: [college infrastructure]: facilities and infrastructure of our college are better. facilities like wi-fi, labs, classroom and library are available in our department. the quality of the hostel facility is good, and all the students are satisfied with the hostel facility. the quality of the mess and food are too good, and they will provide students with good quality food. | [academics]: the teachers are very qualified, very coordinating and very knowledgeable in their own fields. the course is very relevant to the industry and will prepare the students to face a new life in the future. the semesters are not too difficult to pass. | [placements]: the placements were awesome; from our course, almost 70 percent of the students got placed in the campus placements. the highest package was 6 lacs per annum, the average package was 3 lacs per annum and the lowest was 2.5 lacs per annum. recruiting companies are foxconn, keolis, etc. 75 percent of the students got their internship certificates. the top roles include managing and leading the team.

[college infrastructure]: college infrastructure was good 1.8k ultra mega hostel and mega hostel both were good also the academic and placement building was awesome incredible infrastructure i had seen in my life it was a wonderful experience | [academics]: college academics was good 1.8k ultra mega hostel and mega hostel both were good also the academic and placement building was awesome incredible infrastructure i had seen in my life it was a wonderful experience | [placements]: college was good 1.8k ultra mega hostel and mega hostel both were good also the academic and placement building was awesome incredible infrastructure i had seen in my life it was a wonderful experience placement were on high peak as more than any colleges
