[college infrastructure]: my experience with this college is a mixed one ..the infrastructure of the university is good and is the most remarkable for the computing programs the research facilities here are top notch with fully equipped labs and great professors (not all but a few ones are very experienced and influential in their field..other buildings are average and there is a wifi facility available 24/7 for laptops..no cycle is available ..the food is good..but everything has its bad days too..the form is quite clean | [academics]: the research facilities are one of a kind and the lab facilities are fully equipped ..some professors are really great in their field and have quite some experience..it is important in this uni that u prove that you are really interested in something and are willing to spend time and energy for it..it follows the policy of if you want it you have to grab it | [placements]: the placements are quite good with a wide range of companies coming every year..there are several internships as well as training programmes that are open in this university that can help in securing job in them company as well..the placements in biotech are pretty average as the number of biotechnology companies are less compared to it and other groups | [campus life]: the campus life is well..nice when friends are around..don't expect the culturals to be like other colleges..this uni mainly focuses on studies
college_name: Shanmugha Arts Science Technology Research and Academy Thanjavur

review_text: [college infrastructure]: the college infrastructure is very good.all the classes are well ventilated and well furnished.each class have laptop and smartboard.the hostel rooms are very neat and the mess food is good.campus has all the facilities.the library and laboratories are good. | [academics]: i am studying manufacturing engineering.the quality of education is very good.they follow the latest curriculum and updated syllabus staffs are well educated and they are very friendly with the students. | [placements]: we don't have to worry about placement in this college.the college supports the students to get into reputed companies.every year college secures 99% placement rate.the students are getting the average salary of 5 lacs per annum and the highest salary package is 13 lacs per annum. | [campus life]: the college life is really awesome.you can enjoy a lot here.this is a great platform for you to show up your talent.

[college infrastructure]: facilities are good, labs have good infrastructure, and classrooms are well equipped with good infrastructure. in our college, they provide us with wi-fi, and there are two libraries in our college with a good atmosphere and a variety of books. | [academics]: when it comes to the faculty, every faculty member is excellent and disciplined in teaching with high knowledge. teachers share more curriculum programs.semester exams are easy to pass if we study harder. | [placements]: it is one of the best engineering college. and top companies like benz, samsung, and amazon come for campus recruitment. 85% of students get placed every year. in our college, the highest package offered is inr 45 lacs, the average is inr 12 lacs, and the lowest is inr 4 lacs per annum.

there are 2 major fests namely moksha innovision and resonanz. they are the cultural and tech fest of nsut having a footfall of over 70000 people from various colleges. the classrooms are huge and well-equipped. there is a spacious library with lots of resources. sports facilities are also there. some include table tennis cricket badminton tennis volleyball football and many more. also, there are a bunch of societies which are groups and clubs run by the students themselves. so yes in conclusion campus life is great here at nsut.students become eligible for placements in the 3rd year. various companies visit the campus during the second year as well for the internship opportunities. many students intern and get placed in the same company after they get their offer letters. companies include microsoft adobe google, sprinkle visit the campus.

the fees structure of the college is poor as they continue to increase the fees day by day not only the study fees but also the hostel/mess fees so it is becoming really difficult for the middle class and the lower class to pay for the everyday increasing fees. the fees for 4 years is around 22 lakhsplacements of thapar are pretty good and have an average salary of around 10 lakhs per year. the highest ctc ever to be offered is 43 lakhs. companies like american express, amazon, oracle, etc. visit the campus for job offers every year. many companies visit both tech and nontech for job placements
college_name: Thapar Institute of Engineering and Technology - [Thapar University]

review_text: [college infrastructure]: the infrastructure of the university is good. it has a big area of 600 acres with many buildings. it has a mall, big library and a big sports complex inside. there are all the facilities in the classroom such as ac, fans, smartboards, good benches etc. the university is exceptional with its infrastructure. | [academics]: despite being a lot of computer science students in the university, the unversity handles the crowd very well and doesn't let it spoil the academics. the knowledge provided here is great and it matches with the current trends and advancements . professors are kind and helpful here who always provide relevant study material. | [placements]: placement for computer science is good as there are a lot of recruiters coming for the placement every year. there are placement training classes which give the required guidance to pass in the placement interviews. packages are also good alongwith the hiring percentage. | [campus life]: campus life is good at the college with multiple events and activities happening regularly. one can enjoy the life to the fullest living here. there is a mall inside with many shops which makes it easier for students to buy needful things. there is a playzone behind the mall where friends can enjoy. overall, the campus life is great here. | [anything else]: overall the university provides students with all the facilities. one can be an allrounder while being inside the university by learning multiple skills and gaining knowledge.

students get full time placement opportunities in fourth year. however internship opportunities come in the second and third year. every big mnc like google,amazon, microsoft ,flipkart,apple come here for recruitment. over 400 companies come for recruitment. in 2022 the average placement was about 16 lpa for entire college and 25 lpa in cse branch. record placements were seen in 2022. number of offers were close to 2400 approx and almost all the students(about 90percent) were placed who appeared for placements in 2022. highest international package was about 1.15 crore which was offered to 15 students form amazon dublin. highest domestic package was 65 lpa given by apple. my plan is to get a tech( full stack devloper) job with a decent package in any of these companies. however placement opportunities are really great, i feel that due to huge competition in dtu beacuse of large student strength, it becomes really competitive to get that dream package of above 40 lpa.college life at dtu is the best. our annual cultural fest is engifest. it is the biggest fest in north india. it is conducted in month of february. it is one of the best experience in our college to attend engifest . this time around sunidhi chouhan, amit trivedi and kaleshi chori guys came in our engifest and they just made the atmosphere crazy. library of dtu includes every book and journal which student needs. students can go to library at any time during day and study in a peace environment. the infrastructure of the library is very good. the classrooms for first year students in the pragya bhawan are very good. but apart from that classrooms are not that up to the marks. they are older and don't have ac. sports facilities in the college are decent. there is gym , sports complex as well as big grounds for playing sports. various inter and intra college sports competition are organised. there are a lot of student societies in dtu for every damn interest.

gender ratio: 5:3 for boys and girl. there are 150+ student organization that organization is conducting events on regular basis. like robotics, sports etc. all students organization are of good economic conditions at the time of events because lpu also sponsors them for there events.feasible compare to other university. but there is a charges of hostel, mess and laundry which makes sometimes difficulty for students to manage the fees at the time. yes college from the transparency in the fee breakdown. the fees depend upon how the students perform on there test.

college doesn't provide you with many high stipends internships but as you are in a city like noida so by skills and talent you can get good internships. also in the fourth year you will have the option to either choose internships or do a project under some professor. mass recruiting companies like infosys, ibm, cognizant give around 10-12k stipend to you in which they give you training.i wont say it has good placements but yes it has average placements . average package is around 5 lpa which may increase in the coming years. normally students get placed in mass recruiter companies like infosys, cognizant, ibm etc. also many students prefer to go to a better college for higher studies. highest package goes around 12-14 lpa every year.

[college infrastructure]: the infrastructure is absolutely beautiful. lots of trees, rescue dogs, birds and water bodies. an absolutely beautiful place to study in. highly recommend. the living spaces are clean, well-maintained and libraries are excellent too. | [academics]: the teachers are fantastic! everyone is highly helpful and the course is very detailed and structured. the curriculum is updated and includes the recent developments in the field. also, the guest lecturers are top-notch too. it absolutely makes you ready in all aspects. | [placements]: most of the students earn a placement as soon as they graduate. the quality of placement therefore is good. the engineering department receives the best placements from ju and the entire placement process as i heard is smooth and easy. | [campus life]: amazing campus life.

impressions are the annual fest(february) and literary fest of joust(august). there is a huge library which is available for all kinds of books. classrooms are quite large with a proper air conditioner facility. they can occupy more than 200 students. sports and extracurricular activities and quite less but still students play many games on the ground. there are many college hubs - ieee, gdsc,knuth programming hub, graficas(graphic designing), jhankaar(dance), crescendo(singing) ,parola(literary), debsoc(debate)i am quite interested in coding due to which i opted for computer science and engineering. we have lots of educated faculties. the faculty-student ratio is quite good which would be around 1:12. most teachers have done phd and teaching is mostly done on smart boards with the help of their self-made ppts. we have to give 3 exams in one semester which have a moderate difficulty level. mostly what is taught in class is asked.
college_name: Jaypee Institute of Information Technology University - [JIIT]

review_text: the course curriculum is very good that's why i choose this course. we can select faculties and timetables as we wish. we have to select minimum credits for each semester. the teachers are really good and helpful. we have to maintain good attendance.life at the chennai campus is good there will be an annually vibrance fest for up to 3 days celebrities will visit our college it will be very joyful. books are available in the library. there are so many sports present in vit

fees like i haven't seen yet the cost of the study is good if we consider hostel fees. all scholarships are provided here. the campus interview is pretty good here. sastra even provides students with welfare funds to make students into normal life.i choose this course because we can go for both it as well as a core extra advantage. the student ratio is good i study in a class of 51 students. ph.d. is min quality. monthly once cias are conducted it is quite tougher to get a good mark.

the fee structure is high. because as you can get all the benefits of college, so you must have to pay something extra. some students move back for fees but if you want you can grab the loan that is provided by university. kiitee exam if you score high marks then you can get a scholarship also from the university. day by day the placement record is growing. almost 100% of students are placed. the ctc is also good. but it depends on the student. how much they can explore him in that 3-4 years.kiit has a world-class best campus. where you can move freely with your friends. and it has obviously green. when you see around the campus you will find only green &green. people can explore them on this campus. in short, it provides beautiful campus life. and a lot of activities. which includes sports, social work, and so many societies where you can apply and move on.

after the 6th semester, students are eligible for placement. in my department, there are several companies like maruti suzuki, hero motorcop, reliance, valency international etc are coming for placement. reliance gave 10 offers hero gave 8 offers maruti gave 7 offers etc. the highest package is 22lpa in valency international. the average package is 7.5lpa.more than 80% of students got placed. my plan is to opt for placement and preparation for the gate.the annual festival is aadhay and the technical fest is technika. aadhay was held in june and technika was held in may. there are some monthly programs also. there are more than 1lakh books in a library. so we got from there. some classrooms have ac and good facilities. sports facilities are mediocre. other than cricket and football there is no good sports facility. there is a good society for dance and e- cell for startups.

[college infrastructure]: yes, our college have all necessary infrastructure, facilities and equipment. living space are clean and the food is hygienic. there are very good facilities in classroom, laboratories , libraries , sports centres and hostels. | [academics]: i am studying biotechnology and the quality of teaching is really very good . yes , i think that my curriculum is updated and includes all the recent developments inthe field of biotechnology .and yes my study makes me job-ready | [placements]: placements are quite good in our college . 75% of the students gets placements in average . the highest package is 7 lacks/year . average package is 3-4 lacks/year . yes the placement process is easy and pleasant to me and college is very supportive to us | [campus life]: i can only see the best feature in our college campus . you can see any type of ragging in our campus

[college infrastructure]: shiv nadar university i equiped with world class infracture that supports academic as well as sports excellence , sports - tennis , badminton , table tennis , basketball,football,cricket,gym,yoga, academic - town hall, smart classes, all subject labs , library personal - single/double sharing hostels , university wide wifi , arcade shop , mini mart , stationary , laundry , 3 mess , healthcare centre all the infrastructure mentioned above are well maintained | [academics]: im enrolled in btech cse program i would,nt say the curriculum is up to date but its better than other colleges | [placements]: we have a career development centre which provides help throughout our studies and introduce us to new opportunities ,the exact placement info cannot be shared

pros/cons: the infrastructure is good in this college. the campus of overall experience is good. all faculty are friendly and understand our problem properly. club culture are bad i think, there is based on state. food are also not my like type, maybe other are like this. hostel facilities are bad, there are always remain some issue | placement experience: yeah. there is present the placement facilties. for the placement scenarion the department of computer science and electronics communication is good placement offer. other branch are also doing good nowdays.

review_text: [college infrastructure]: college infrastructure are very good and nice building too much space in campus and there are cleaning in the campus.and there are very big buildings and big library there you can get book for studying purpose. | [academics]: academic are good and upto the mark and curriculum is updated and teacher teaching style are good.there is academic building to each and every school select,scope,smec,etc and in academic professor are very knowledgeable. | [placements]: placement is good and there 100%placement record of vit university and some student got 1 crore package in vit.in 2024 placement is going on and companies are coming to hire student on their knowledge. | [campus life]: campus life is very wonderfull and very good here some new friend are there . campus life is very joy full and full of hustle. | [anything else]: overall college is good and campus infrastructure is good , academic curriculum is excellent and upto the marks. campus life is very hustle and very good environment.

[college infrastructure]: college infrastructure is excellent and all types of equipments are top class as well as maintained that is wifi,smart boards,libraries,sports centres etc.and the most important thing sanitation i.e good environment as well as clean and hygienic. | [academics]: i am studying in b.tech because i want to become an engineer.the teaching quality is good but you have to remember that you have to do some extra effort from your side to crack competition like gate etc. all the syllabus and curriculum activities are latest and updated. | [placements]: placement quality is so impressive.the average salary is around 5-6 lakhs per annum.placement process is normally as same as other colleges but our college is so supportive to get placed in that company if he/she has some skills as well as hard work person.

pros/cons: very good academic environment and highly qualified faculty well-maintained labs, hostels, library, and sports facilities are available. effective career development cell with great placements. the 1:6 girls-to-boys ratio affects social balance on campus the quality of food could be significantly improved. some courses are too theory-heavy and could benefit from more practical content. | placement experience: placements at iit kanpur are excellent, especially in core engineering, software, analytics, and finance sectors . students become eligible for placements from 7th semester(b.tech). top recuiters include google, microsoft, goldman sachs, mckinsey, and texas instruments , startups and psus like iocl and isro also visit. highest package was around 1.5cr/annum, while avg package for mechanical is 18lpa. over 84% of eligible students get placed . after my degree , i plan to pursue higher studies .

review_text: [college infrastructure]: the infrastructure of our college is excellent. labs are well-equipped. classrooms are equipped with projectors. the library has many books. the hostel facilities are average. the food served in the hostel is best | [academics]: our teachers are helpful. they help us to understand the concept. the course curriculum is relevant to make the students industry-ready. it is not very difficult to pass the semester exams once you are good at studying. | [placements]: many students without backlogs can secure placements in well-known companies such as microsoft and google, as well as smaller startups that participate in placement drives.the placements percentage is almost 80

review_text: [college infrastructure]: college infrastructure is well and truly good. new buildings are constructed day by day. the lecture theater of college is within walking distance and having modern smart screens and projectors in every room of the building with full ac. | [academics]: good for the students who study with him/herself. some teachers they don't have manners to talk with students and faculties members. all the faculties are experienced. recently developments in academics is forming the ug community in the campus for mantors for juniors. | [placements]: dr.b.r. ambedkar national institute of technology jalandhar has good placement record with highest package of 1.2crore in 2022. mostly students are placed in good companies. many reputed mncs are visited in the campus for recruitment. | [campus life]: good and the campus area is limited. when we start walking in the campus it just starts and ends fatly. the institute provides a vibrant campus life with various activities and clubs, cultural events, and extracurricular activities allowing students to develop there skills beyond academics.

review_text: [college infrastructure]: i find the campus facilities absolutely stunning and incredibly vast, which i love exploring. the biotechnology department has state-of-the-art laboratory equipment, which is essential for my dual degree research. i appreciate the comfortable hostels and excellent centralized library for my late-night studying. i feel the college maintains a premier physical environment throughout. | [academics]: i feel the dual degree program is highly rigorous, demanding deep commitment to both engineering and research early on. my professors are experienced, and i find their specialized knowledge in genetics and bio-process engineering very helpful. i am consistently challenged by the coursework, which prepares me for the future master?s thesis. i believe the academic standard is excellent. | [placements]: i recognize that biotechnology placements are more niche than core engineering branches, which concerns me slightly. i know some pharmaceutical and research firms do visit, offering reasonable packages to my seniors. i understand i need to focus on building a strong research portfolio to attract the best opportunities. i believe the placement cell supports my efforts adequately. | [campus life]: i genuinely love the extremely vibrant and active social scene that defines life here. the sheer number of technical and cultural events is unmatched, giving me many opportunities to take part. i enjoy the extensive sports facilities and the supportive residential environment with my batchmates. i feel campus life is rich and full of constant activity.
college_name: Kalinga Institute of Industrial Technology Bhubaneswar

review_text: placement is the best thing in amrita for cse branch, it's 100%placement. they give us separate training to attend placements. students can attend placements from 3rd year onwards. many top companies like microsoft, google, and amazon come for recruitment.the internship opportunities are very high. various mncs come to our college. we can contact any teacher to do a project with them, which helps students to get a job easily. the minimum guarantee package is 4lpa by mass recruiters like tata, cisco, etc.

[college infrastructure]: this university has almost everything in campus, you just name it every facility there is gym, swimming pool, football ground, cricket ground indoor games also. classrooms are also good wifi also availabe but bad wifi spped is not good. hostel is good only if you have never been in hostel otherwise take a flat outside or pg and live there because there are so many restrictions. | [academics]: academics is very poor in this college, teachers nature wise are good but not knowledge wise, so if you are coming just to enjoy then you are most welcome in campus but if you are looking for placements then look for something else. | [placements]: placements are not good do not come here for placements what they show at the time of admissions are not real. they have a lot of intake of students are placements are very low as compared to what they show and how much fees they are charging.

review_text: [college infrastructure]: my college has all the necessary infrastructure facilities and equipments to be required to learn the syllabus in my course. i've got a well maintained classroom and practical labs for the purpose of studying the classrooms also have projectors and smart board for e-learning purposes,the labs have all the requirements of computers, the teaching faculty is well educated and good, libraries are present which have good amount of books related to my course as well as other subjects, we've got a good working sports department in which all the materials required for different types of sports are present, the hostels are also in good condition and well maintained. the surroundings is quite clean and ventilated, the food available here in the canteen is quite good as well. | [academics]: studing cs, and i've had a good experience the material taught here is related to curriculum and the activities taken here are making ne job ready, the lab practicals conducted are good and a lot can be learnt from it. | [placements]: placement rate is good and as the faculty teaching here is good at teaching im hoping my batch would get good placements as well. almost 90% placement can be seen from my college over the years and students here have good amount of package as well. | [campus life]: campus is quite big and well maintained, it feels fresh moving around the places here, all the extra curricular activities like dance, drama, singing etc are taken over here. the staff over here is quite supportive. | [anything else]: till now i've had a good experience, no big issues everything's is quite good and the requirements of students are being full-filled, extra curricular activities are being taken along with the course practices.

[college infrastructure]: christ university offers world-class infrastructure with modern classrooms, well-stocked libraries, advanced labs, spacious auditoriums, and excellent sports facilities. it also provides comfortable hostels, dining options, and recreation areas to support holistic student development. | [academics]: christ university is renowned for its academic excellence, offering a diverse range of undergraduate, postgraduate, and doctoral programs across disciplines like arts, science, commerce, management, law, and engineering. it follows a multidisciplinary approach, emphasizing experiential learning, research, and innovation. the curriculum integrates academic rigor with co-curricular activities, supported by highly qualified faculty and industry collaborations. | [placements]: christ university has an excellent placement record with top recruiters like deloitte, ey, kpmg, tcs, and amazon offering roles across diverse sectors. the university provides career training, internships, and competitive salary packages, ensuring strong industry connections and student readiness. | [campus life]: campus life at christ university is vibrant and diverse, offering a mix of academics, cultural events, sports, and extracurricular activities. students enjoy state-of-the-art facilities, active clubs, fests, and a multicultural environment that fosters creativity, collaboration, and personal growth.

i choose this course because i am interested in the healthcare industry. on average in this course, there are 15 - 30 students and for each subject different faculties are allocated. faculty members are quite knowledgeable with ph.d. qualifications. teachers are cooperative and understanding. a semester is of 4 - 5 months. with 3 internals and 1 external exam. the curriculum itself is easy, study a bit harder, and it's easy to gain a high cgpa.i am personally doing an internship at apollo spectra hospital, greater noida. it is paid internship. my students have joined different hospitals, blood banks, and labs for their dissertation work. the students who were unable to do their internship outside the campus were offered to do it under their mentor's assigned.

review_text: i chose my course because of my interest as well as the money, of course. but the course is not that relevant to what the market expects from us, but this is the case with all engineering colleges, even the best iits, so won't say you should come expecting that. the faculty-student ratio is decent, but again not what the global standards are. but, as per an indian engineering college, i would say it is decent. all i can say is if you really want to study you can easily get access to the teachers, because in any indian engineering college are really interested in learning much from the faculty, instead they learn from their friends and seniors. but if you are that rare one who wants to learn from the teachers you can easily do that. faculty are qualified, but it depends on your luck if you get a teacher who is chill & good teaching methods. our whole year is divided into 2 semesters, with mid term & end term exams in both exams. you can score well even if you start the last week.dtu is known for its campus life. it has a big campus of about 170 acres, with great infrastructure & greenery. it is located in delhi which makes it even better as delhi is a city itself and its metropolitan culture is an experience to have, which you can't get anywhere else. its cultural fest "engifest" is one of the largest fest in india and probably the largest in north india, which happens in feb every year. it is a 3-day extravaganza and its night concerts are something which will make you addicted to concerts, thereafter. it is a great place to meet new and different people as many students from different colleges attend "engifest". classes and the library are good. new classrooms are being built for cse and it students as well. overall, college is a great place to be at. culture is great. you can make new friends, and join clubs of almost any kind (even though some socities are better than others). almost all people are friendly and they can help you if you need some.

review_text: [college infrastructure]: our college is spread around 187 acres.there are total 14 halls for both boys and girls,for 1st year students you will be alloted the new hall number 11 where you have to share your room with 2 others.we have a cenrtal library having more than 10 lakhs books including journals,various books for competitive exams ,etc.we have a good medical unit and tied up hospitals in durgapur and kolkata.we have a caferteria and 2 saloons opened at saturday and sunday.we have a gym and unlimited wifi. | [academics]: the mechanical department of nit durgapur is pretty good.although our faculty members are very knowledgeable and highly qualified from premium indian colleges.but only few are very friendly and have a good teaching style ,few are very rude ,few have poor teaching skills,and some are just in a hurry to finish the syllabus somehow.well each semester consists of 3 phases ca1,ca2 and end term .curriculum is not fully updated compared to foreign top colleges. | [placements]: the placement of our college is pretty good this year.until now our 7th semester more than 70% are placed with an average placement of 11.46 lpa ctc and the highest is 46 lpa ctc grabbed by 19 students of cse and ece branches.about 11% of students got more than 20+ lpa ctc ,6% students got 15-20 lpa ctc,15% students got 10-15 lpa ctc. this year onwards we have a new placement policy where you can sit for companies offering 12.5+ lpa ctc or psu if your department placement % is more than 75. | [campus life]: there are 20 clubs in our college for example cca robocell,tech ,coding ,edc ,mntc and many quiz riddles clubs too.there is an annual fest every year and also junction and big bazar is near nit where you can enjoy your evening with your colleagues.we have a basic health care facility very popular among students.no ragging is there so a good social culture among students and you will be watching a lots of diversity in the campus .

[college infrastructure]: classrooms are very neatly maintained, and wi-fi is available everywhere.the library is very good and wi-fi is available in library. labs are also really good and well-maintained.there are so many grounds and sports complexes in this college. | [academics]: professors here are really good.they all are well-educated from very good universities and completed their post-graduation. professors help students personally. semester exams are not that difficult, but they are tricky.proper knowledge should be there to answer them. | [placements]: placement is really good in this college, and many companies like google, amazon,wipro come to campus placements to recruit students in my course.placement percentage is very high.nearly everybody will get an internship in this college.

review_text: dtu has one of the best fests in india. it is called engifest. there are many small and medium-level fests organized are other societies. sports is one of the best things about dtu . there are 2 full basketball courts. 1 cricket field, 1 football field, and an indoor stadium also.avg package last year was around rs 15 l.p.a and the highest package was rs . 1 . 8 cr. 200 + companies visit the campus and overall placements are good. there are 100 % placements at dtu. but there is a lot of competition due high number of students

[college infrastructure]: infrastructure is really good; at most places, you will get wi-fi. the library is also excellent. it's very comfortable reading in the library. the classroom is good, facilities are good?everything is good. in the hostel, you will get sufficient washing machines and a water cooler on each floor. | [academics]: teachers and professors of iit guwahati are highly qualified with ph.d. degree in their respective major. the curriculum although i feel is less relevant to the current scenario as it does not teach modern technology and follows its conservative approach to the corporate world. thereby, we can see a lack of modern skills in students and their way of coping up with job profiles. | [placements]: this is relatively a new branch but has a great scope of placements and internships. in recent years, good amount of students have secured their early internships and placements from this branch. it is comparable to computer science engineering and foster's a potential of being the next pumped-up sector and branch. | [anything else]: meet with some amazing friends.

the course curriculum is very good because if you got admission in vit in any branch, let's say chemical engineering then you don't have just to study chemical engineering core subject but you also have to study some cse course to such as python, object-oriented programming and java etc. the laboratory is superb. every faculty in our college is engaged in research. lab faculty is chilled sometimes but at last you have to study to pass the fat exam (final assessment test).some faculty is really good and ready to teach you anything. but some of them are not. almost 90% of the faculty are ph.d. holders from iit or isc bangalore. they are good at research all of them are doing research in their own field. they are from various parts of the world. they will motivate us and they will encourage us to do research.

moksha-innovision is the annual fest and along with that we also have resonanz. moksha - innovision is held around march and resonanz is held around october. the library is very well maintained and is stocked with books that are relevant. classrooms are top notch. there are many sports events that take place like winter sports and annual sports meet. there are numerous societies, and club groups that are run by students.i chose this course because the design is my passion. the faculty-to-student ratio is fairly nice. most faculty members are highly qualified and doing great in their own professional lives. there are two semesters with mid-sems and end-sems. class tests are held before each sem. term exams and internals are held on time

[college infrastructure]: the college infrastructure is quite good .all the necessary resources and equipments are provided here to the students. there are well equipped classrooms and laboratories along with good library facilities also. | [academics]: academic facilities are very nice here.the proper course and training are provided here.as a medical student i het to learn many things regarding my work . the teaching staffs are very good. they are very helpful to us. | [placements]: placements are very nice here.the placements depends on the course you are indulged in.the average placement rate is about 90 percent.the average package is approximately 6 to 9 lacs per annum specially in cs/it departments. | [campus life]: campus life is very nice here. we get a-lots of opportunities for soft skills development as well as sports. also a lots of events took place here very frequently and many celebrities have visited our university for their movie promotion.

[college infrastructure]: pretty good college tbh. would recommend and has a great campus boundaries and a clean environment. the campus is very minimalist and allows students to visit each and every part of the college campus | [academics]: decent academics pretty good teachers and overall a really good understanding. studies get hectic to some point but overall the teaching experience makes students understand the topics and even help students by conducting extra classes. | [placements]: placements are good in our college. many students get an opportunity to bag a pretty decent placement by the end of the third year and our college gives us proper training?s and allow us to do internships to be more approachable to the placements. | [campus life]: great campus life starting from academics to co curricular activities | [anything else]: not really

[college infrastructure]: very beautiful , very pretty college in terms of infrastructure which i appriciate the most about my college. campus is very neat and clean and very well developed which makes it even more attractive. the buildings are huge and nice. | [academics]: the academics are very nice , the syllabus is very easy and detailed. the quality of teaching is very effective and the teachers are very friendly. there are smart classrooms provided to us for better understanding. | [placements]: the placement record is good and it is more 90% as of now, the highest package is around 1.5cr and average package is 8-9 lakhs which is very nice for a private college and one of the best private college in terms of placements. | [campus life]: the campus life is one of the best life you will ever live because you will make good friends here who will be with you forever. airport and railway station are closer to college and the availaibility of resources is also very nice. | [anything else]: nothing
college_name: SRM Institute of Science and Technology Chennai

review_text: yes there is a whole society that works on alumini network.it is known as saic.it stands for students alumini interaction cell.it reguralt conducts events related to alumini of our college.yes it is helpful because it helps students know to about future opportunities that college give us.alumini also helps in getting in internships matching to profile of student.labs are equipped with latest equipment.labs are never closed even on saturdays so it is a very friends and learning environment for students.we also have different areas allocated for multiple games such as table tennis,basket ball, football ground etc.there is also a common room in each hostel where there is a tt table and a carrom board.
college_name: Thapar Institute of Engineering and Technology - [Thapar University]

review_text: [college infrastructure]: new academic building,fully equipped hightech.boys mega hostels for 2nd & 3rd year single occupancy room with balcony! common room with tv, table tennis, volleyball basketball.food quality comparatively good with variety in menu.girls hostel are old,not well maintained 3-4 occupancy rooms in 1st year, then 2 occupancy rooms.open campups in-time for girls is around 8pm. labs not well maintained and equipped.poor wi-fi network.library with good wifi.poor medical facility. available tmh medical car | [academics]: professors are knowledgeable and they try their best to teach you even in online mode. overall curriculum is modern and nice covering all important aspects for placements. some professor you might feel disappointing. if you are preparing for other competitive exams them professor here won't teach up to the mark. administration here is not so work efficient but it has it's own profit, you'll get to know this in college:) | [placements]: nit jsr placement for mechanical in class of 2021, 80/83 (96.5%) got placed with highest package of 16lpa with avg package 7.3lpa & median 6.5lpa.companies recruiting(mechanical)are vedana lt.,driver logistic,royal enfield, flipkart,tata steels, bajaj, etc. placements in core and it is almost 50% for mechanical. packages offered in it sector is a bit higher.few companies won't allow core branch for it jobs!companies start visiting from 3rd year for internships. nit jsr tries for good placements. | [campus life]: fest here are great and grand, you'll definitely enjoy this. major 5 fests are there. clubs of nit jsr are really appreciable, some clubs patrticiate in international events representing india and holding positions. you will learn time management, personality development from clubs. alumni network of nit jsr is also very good and regular guidance session are organised.

[college infrastructure]: the college infrastructure is pretty good . it is a vast campus with a lot of facilities. there are about three libraries and about 4 hostels which is build with the leastest technology helping students advance in their academics . there are multiple sectors on the college campus like law, architecture, commerce stream, medical and engineering. the maintenance of the vast campus which includes cleaning and sanitation is extremely good. | [academics]: i?m in the mechanical engineering branch of the institute which is a male dominated branch. the quality of teaching is pretty good and it is updated to the newest education policy. i think it?s the practical demonstration of theory and the application of it in our daily life as enforced by the faculty provides us with that sense of knowledge which makes us job ready | [placements]: the quality of placements in our college is very good as 90% of the students get placed into major companies like wipro, cognisant,ibm etc . in my branch the recruitment is very high as automobile industry is a growing industry. the highest package is about 60 lakhs per annul for a fresher by mercedes benz. the average salary is about 3-4 lakhs per annum. the faculty involved in the process are very supportive and try their best to get the best placements available. | [campus life]: the campus is average as currently there are no social or cultural events happening in the btech side of college the location is safe and it can handle emergencies. the staff are pretty supportive occasionally but they prioritise studying a lot more than they should.

campus life is very good. and you feel relaxed, peace everywhere like a library, sports complex, oat etc. the college life includes improving behaviour manners, and speaking skills and when we see around we get inspired by different students. all are talented students some in the study some. in sports and some dancing. annual fest is held every year many stars celebrity come. we enjoy ourselves a lot there. it helps by e summit, manifest or others. the availability of books is good here every semester books are there and every branch. the classroom is fully ac and with projectors, lights, and big desks.many students take internships here and get help in their placement. the internship is around 3-4 months it's taken 3 years. companies are samsung, microsoft, paytm, airtel etc provide internship and after job opportunities. we have to make different innovative projects to get better placement. the package of tech placement is a very good average package is 8-9 lakhs per annum.

i chose this course because i have immense intrest for aircrafts. the faculty-to-student ratio is a bit above average which means there are a decent amount of teachers. most of the teachers have a basic degree and some teachers also have a master's or ph.d. in their respective subjects. exams are pretty frequent with one internal exam every month. the exams are not easy at all from my point of view which i blame slightly on the teaching methods of certain teachers.the fee is a bit too high according to me. i do not know about the fee hike policy but the cost to study is fairly high. it has good scholarships through sports and other means, but the financial assistance in my experience is very bad. i'm yet to get a job through the campus.

social life is also very good here, there were many places in the campus to hang out like ic,oc, river point etc. for sports and health - there is a sports complex where cricket, football, basketball, tennis and athletic ground is there with 2 indoor and many outdoor badminton court with 2 multi gyms with every equipment and good trainer. for health there is a dispensery for medical help with 24*7 availablity of doctors. classrooms are air conditioned with proper sitting arrangements and smartboards. there are many clubs and societies here for different enthusiastic person which keep on organising fests all over the year. the fees if the college is quite on a higher side i.e around 14 lacs but the facilities available are worth it. scholarships are also provided on the basis of merit of 50% , 75% and 100% on tution fee but only for selected no of students, everyone doesn't get the scholarship. for those having annual income less than 3 lacs per annum are also eligible for merit com means scholarship where a little less grades were needed that's it. thanks

pros/cons: our college is now at par with all the top private law colleges such as symbiosis school of law, christ school of law and even imnu. instead of semester, we have trimester here. academics are definitely the best and even better than nlus. just a 8 floor building and out of which only three floor are ours as rest floors or or performing arts college or commin floors. | placement experience: in our college placements start from fourth year and because top quality ppos are provided due to intenrship we get placed easily. also, we have various things to do at our campus when it comes to placements. our cv has to be with atleast 8 internships done by the end of 4th year only then do we stand eligible for the same.
college_name: Narsee Monjee Institute of Management Studies - [NMIMS Deemed to be University], Mumbai

review_text: [college infrastructure]: the college is beautifully built.there are so many departments in a small campus. there are latest equipments installed in the campus.the classrooms are equipped with centralized air conditioners. we have more than 5 hostels and a big indoor sports auditorium and several grounds.the hostel is well maintained and the food served in mess is of good quality. | [academics]: i am a student of be cse and currently in 1st year.the faculty is well experienced with some of the international faculty. the curriculum is updated according to companies need and is revised every 3 years.this makes us job ready and nurtures our personality. | [placements]: i heard placements are very good and many product based companies visit our campus regularly.highest package offered was 31 lakh last year and several students got between 10 to 20 lakhs. the placement cell in the campus trains us for the companies and also for start-ups. | [campus life]: campus life is great as we students have so much to do in the campus like playgrounds,cafeteria and all essential shops like tailor,salon and we can go off the campus for enjoyment it's a good experience to live with.
college_name: Chitkara University Institute of Engineering and Technology Jhansla

review_text: i did choose this course because the placements from this branch were quite good. and also this is a circuital branch. the faculty: student ratio is 16. there are more students than the faculty in our department. all of our faculty did their ph.d. their teaching method is very different. it'sdifficultt to concentrate. we can nearly 4 exams per course which includes minors, midterm, and end sem exams. it's not that difficult to pass it. if you study one day before the exam you can easily pass it.there are internship opportunities in our college. the opportunities for the tech side are more than the core side. you can register a for summer or winter internship if you are eligible. generally, you get an internship in the third year.

u have to crack jee advance exam with approx rank of 2k to get in the college admission process in through jossa councelling process where seats are allocated to you according to ur rank,after the councilling process you have to choose a near by iit for your documents varificationit feasible, academic fee's is about 180000 the fee can be submitted through e banking, through sbi bank,the there are other things like library charges, medical charges and ect which maki the fee total of 200000,mess and hostle fee is about 28000 so the total fee is 230000
college_name: IIT Bhubaneswar - Indian Institute of Technology - [IITBBS]

review_text: pros/cons: the college has a training and placement cell which looks after all the placement related opportunities for students weather of the place where the college is located is very suitable as students do not suffer from much hot and cold, it remains moderate. student intake is less, that is very few students are present in each branch which leads to more one to one interactions with faculties . during winter season, there is acute shortage of water in campus and students suffer from this situation every year there is no proper sports facilities in campus, only a small ground is present, also extracurricular activities are not given much importance. | placement experience: placements of my college is average, as the location is remote only a limited number of companies visit for placement. - from seventh sem students become eligible for campus placements. - the highest package offered till now for on campus is 19lpa by c-dot and average package is 8lpa. - students getting placed differs from branch to branch , in cse almost every students gets placed who are eligible. - also i am planning for m.tech if i do not get a good placement.
college_name: National Institute of Technology - [NIT], Papum Pare

review_text: i chose this course because i was always interested in computer science and it's been my strongest subject a batch contains 30 students and there are enough faculty members that a student can get individual attention in classes almost every faculty member is phd degree holder and their teaching method is very impressive they interact with students take every doubts however 1-2 teachers don't teach that good but despite that all teachers are really friendly they even connect with students personally we can even study individually with them there are mid sem exams and end sem exams, mid sems are held after half of semester is done and end sem are held at end of the semester but throughout the semester we do get quizs and assignments which adds up in internals uphoria our annual cultural fest is beautifully curated and creatively organised with student driver actives like stand up, project expo, movies,folk damcey, etc zenevia our annual tech fest where students from different colleges gets invited to explore various fields in tech domain these are held in mid october we have all the books and journals available in our library we got almost every sports and you can even get in the college team in the tryouts

[college infrastructure]: the college infrastructure is good, the hostels are decent and so si the classrooms. nothing very extraordinary but enough for a common student to enjoy his/her college life. the classrooms are equipped with a decent quantity of instruments and despite some of them being defective, most of them are fine for performing experiments. the hostels and mess are quite clean and hygenic, the quality of food is also better compared to other colleges. | [academics]: i am studying electronics and computer engineering currently and i am currently in my 3rd year. the teaching is fine when it comes to offline teaching in the colleges but during the online classes, the condition is not good. tough teachers are trying their best to explain to us the concepts but the technology bridges gaps and the overdependency and believing the technology blindly especially during exams is creating some adverse impact for the students. hope the issues would be resolved soon. | [placements]: this is what vit is famous for. it has excellent placements in the it sector and core sector as well. many of our seniors have already bagged 20+ lpas and also a very average student ends up getting 6-7 lpas as a starting salary in it jobs. the core jobs are not as rewarding as it jobs but decent compared to the pan india scenario of core placements. also, vit is famous for its 100% placement records consistent throughout the years. | [campus life]: the campus life is again something that i am very dissatisfied with regarding the college. the strict restrictions on timings, the absurd hostel rules, and overall the extreme control of the college over student's every single step many times do much less good than bad. while these things if done within a limit, helps in the overall development of the student, but the college authorities overdo it. rest they are very good with the safety of students and also handle emergencies preety well.
college_name: Vellore Institute of Technology Chennai Campus

review_text: our college became autonomous from my year, even though 2nd to 4th year is under makaut. the first year syllabus was changed, we didn???t follow the exact makaut syllabus. along with that, our college teaches other subjects and labs along with the basic subjects, such as finance and chinese, which do not really help us being future engineers. secondly, our college is way too strict about mere matters, which becomes unbearable at times. the one time when people enjoy really much,i.e the college fest, not much effort goes into it. the faculty is good barring some. no industry visit happened till now. during quarantine, even though the aicte asked not to charge fees, our college charged fees. there???s many cons of this institution.the college provides students with numerous opportunities including seminars, webinars, internships etc. the reason for joining this college is mostly because it has a good placement record. the college has uniform which is something most do not like, but it gives a corporate feel. the faculty is average. i???ve chosen my course( ie ece) because the faculty is really good and the placement records are top notch. the college faculty is really strict.

[college infrastructure]: the college infrastructure is quite good ! the library is well and fully equipped and has quite a lot of books in there and wifi is pretty strong in library but outside it's not that good..classrooms don't have wifi and by next year the buildings and infrastructure will be even more eye catching | [academics]: since i study in computer science engineering the lecturers i have are almost all good teachers..they give the materials required for us to study on time and take frequent tests to improve .but i wanna say the curriculum is not that up to date here..we have to byheart many things to get a good cgpa | [placements]: the placements here are quite good as a 90 to 100% of placements are maintained here . and the placement team abhyudaya is constantly on a hunt for new companies and to bring huge companies like even japanese companies to the college | [campus life]: campus life is absolutely outstanding..the annual tech fest incredia is just awesome the tech events and non technical events held are just soo fun to watch and participate! the pro night and the events have my heart
college_name: NMAM Institute of Technology Karkala Taluk

review_text: [college infrastructure]: good infrastructure with several new buildings. smart class in all rooms. well equipped labs of all courses. great hostels with wifi in all buildings. great sports facilities and one of india's biggest library. | [academics]: the courses here are well defined with good faculty. highly experienced faculty especially for mechanics department. good amount of time in labs to get hands-on experience of all the concepts we learn in lecture. | [placements]: decent placement record. especially for a private university. highest average for coe students with almost 90% placed every year. the average package ranges from 7-8 lac per annum. had a good placement department to help students out. | [campus life]: great campus life with alot to do both inside and nearby the campus.
college_name: Thapar Institute of Engineering and Technology Patiala

review_text: [college infrastructure]: the college infrastructure has good environment along with best atmosphere conditions overall the facility management are awesome and the management increase the utility of facility it is so good . hostel food are awesome along with sports activities provided here. | [academics]: the academic opportunity is so awesome here and it is so perfect according to the facilities available in the college is so nice.the college infrastructure are highly effective and the teachers are highly qualified professionals and help the students every time. | [placements]: the students can get best estimated salary expectations towards the placement offers. and technology training opportunities are provided to students and they will get best training towards the technology upskilling activities also provided to the students.

[college infrastructure]: the college is in sync with the modern times. the campus is quite beautiful and peaceful. the classes are equipped with air conditioners and the whole campus has a wi-fi network that can be connected to anywhere. it has its own server where everything from study to movies are available. the library is state of the art with a modern 3-d printer too. the campus has various eateries to go to and the food is delicious. there are large cricket grounds and football grounds to play. | [academics]: the study material is very interesting as it provides with enough knowledge so the the student can himself discover in which field he wants to go to. the curriculum has been taken from the mit in us and is hence ok. although a student has to be self-sufficient as the academics aren't enough to get a good placement. | [placements]: the placements at the college are awesome. companies like google, facebook, amazon, microsoft, etc come here every year to recruit students. the average salary offered is 12-13 lakhs. students also go for higher studies abroad at universities like mit, harvard,uc, etc. | [campus life]: the campus is just so beautiful. there is a museum inside the college. the sports grounds are well maintained and the gym is equipped with everything you'd need to exercise. the students are smart and hence the competition is quite high. the location is quite rural but the campus is going to let you feel that with its facilities. the teachers are amazing mentors both in studies and the path of life.
college_name: Birla Institute of Technology and Science Pilani

review_text: [college infrastructure]: delhi technological university is one of the prestigious institution in the country which provides all basic as well as advanced amenities.the labs are equipped with all the necessary equipment and there has been a major focus on practical education approach.apart from this,it provides all campus wifi connectivity and is well maintained.sports complex has been recently renovated and provides students with all sorts of equipment.a gym is also available for recreational activities. | [academics]: i, being a student of mechanical engineering had a wonderful experience. the education incorporated into the students certainly leverages chances of employment. a lot of will experienced faculty is available for anytime guidance. | [placements]: looking at the market scenario the placement seems astonishing. almost 75% of all the students are placed and the mean salary in mechanical engineering department being around 6-7 lakhs per annum.the highest package goes to the computer science dept with as high as 40 lakhs per annum. | [campus life]: the college fest engifest is exuberant and the vibe and culture in the campus is vivid.it ensures participation in all cultural activities.

after getting the inter results we have to write srm university exam so that you can i get admission in the university according to the rank they will inform about the admission and they will give date and time for admission and we have to select the campus and beach you want to then they will register and alot the college.it is a very good college compares to other due to interaction between the students and lectures is good. there will be a limited freedom that you can utilize we will think the we are in home only and we can go to home any time with permission. according to the studies it is a very good college compared to others.

the course is very well defined and is intricately curated by keeping the industry standards in the mind. it enables the students to learn the latest technologies and keep up with the industry requirements. the faculty: student ratio is approx. 1:20. the faculties are mostly phd holders and are well qualified in research and education. the teaching method is quite insightful and very up-to-date. it is quite interactive. there are regular assessment tests that are held at regular intervals to check the progress of the student. also, mid-semester exams and end-semester exams are held which are quite challenging to pass and score good marks.tech fest is conducted every month here and the annual fest is conducted approx in june. every type of book is present in the library here e.g competitive exams books, journals, textbooks, programming lang books etc. lpu is most widely known for its sports. the lpu team everywhere they go they always make lpu proud. there are too many big names in sports from lpu e.g neeraj chopra.

[college infrastructure]: my campus has good architecture values. the design is nice. all the equipment available at the college laboratories. we also have large football ground. our hostel rooms are always maintained by the cleaning department of srm. | [academics]: academics is very nice. i am pursuing my degree in computer science. my goal of life is to start a big tech company. our curriculum helps in providing quality education. teachers and working staff are very talented and supportive. | [placements]: placement cell is not fully developed but still it brings multi national companies for placements. the highest package offered is around 25lpa. around 58% of students get placement every year. interview process is easy.
college_name: SRM Institute of Science and Technology NCR Campus Ghaziabad

review_text: [college infrastructure]: the college is very old and is established in 1997. it is a very old building. it has very big libraries. students are provided with one room each. the campus has three boys hostels and one girl's hostel | [academics]: the professors and assistant professors are all very highly qualified and are all ph.d. holders. our curriculum is always constantly being updated to the recent developments. and it very much makes us job-ready | [placements]: our college atal bihari vajpayee india institute of information technology and management gwalior is currently on top of all government iiit's when compared to placements. the highest package offered in 2021 is 59 lpa and the average package is 16lpa.
college_name: Atal Bihari Vajpayee Indian Institute of Information Technology and Management Gwalior

review_text: [college infrastructure]: placements are good, but not very good, all the maximum faculties are phd holders and the labs are very structured and good. there is a mac lab also. they will provide training for placements and soft skill subjects as a part of academics. many clubs are there like dance, musics, arts and drama, ncc, nss, photography. | [academics]: there are many branches available here. b. tech cae, ece, eee, cse with aiml, cse with aids, cse with ds...... the subjects were updated according to the latest trends | [placements]: comparetively our batch have less placements. but not bad it is good only. the highest packages is 44lpa in amazon. | [campus life]: there are many club activities and events are there
college_name: Vel Tech Rangarajan Dr Sagunthala R and D Institute of Science and Technology Chennai

review_text: [college infrastructure]: the college is very well built and it has a great quality of infrastructure. all the classes have projectors. the college is well equipped with all the necessary facilities. there are separate libraries for all departments in the university | [academics]: academics is average in our college. although the curriculum is good. the teachers are very supportive and are always there to help the students. the course syllabus has a perfect balance between practical and theory subjects. | [placements]: the quality of placements here is good. the highest package last year was 12 lakhs. but the college placements are improving a lot and with galgotias now getting nba accredited, the placements will also increase.

[college infrastructure]: our college have all necessary facility like wifi,equipment in good condition,3-d security ,smart board is also available in my classand all the professor of our college are well trained and experienced | [academics]: currently i am pursuing my btech from civil engineering in harcourt butler technical university and the teaching quality of harcourt butler technical university is so good all the professors are passout from good college | [placements]: the qualities of placements in our college harcourt butler technical university is very good .there is hundred percent of placements in computer science and engineering and information technology. paint branch is also good | [campus life]: our college campus is very good and all the facility are available in our college hbtu . our college location is very simple. our college is in nawabganj kanpur near zoo. our college environment is so good

[college infrastructure]: the college has all the necessary facilities. department has well-equipped laboratories and infrastructure.classrooms are spacious and well kept.for the freshers, the classes take place in the university building for all departments whereas for the others at tech park or high-tech block.hostels are fine and food will need to be getting used to. | [academics]: i'm pursuing a btech in electronics and communication engineering with a specialization in instrumentation engineering.the quality of teachers is good and they are well experienced,but we can't rely entirely on teachers.you have to work hard because teachers will not do everything.the curriculum is constantly updated and new developments are taken into consideration with suggestions from industry experts. | [placements]: the placements are very good and a lot of companies come to campus for recruitment.the college has maintained a high placement record over the years .the placement process is smoothly conducted.the average salary offered is around 4-4.5lpa.the college helps students prepare for placements and the cdc start training students right from 1st year. | [campus life]: campus life is very good.we have a large food court called java and is a popular hangout.students can enroll in clubs based on their interests.the location is quite safe and is well connected to the city.the teachers and support staff are good.
college_name: SRM Institute of Science and Technology Chennai

review_text: [college infrastructure]: yes our college has all the necessary infrastructure. we have the best faculties in our college . we have a seperate block library . it has 3 floors . we have one out door stadium and one indoor stadium . | [academics]: i am studing ece . i am studing this because i want to become a hard ware engineer and i am so much intrested in desiging citcuits . yes our curriculum is updated and includes all the recent developments in the feild. | [placements]: the quality of placements is very good . we have 100 percent of placemensts record . highest salary in our college is 32 lakhs per annum . the average salary is 6 lakhs per annun . yes the placement process is easy and pleasent for us

[college infrastructure]: rns institute of technology (rnsit) has excellent infrastructure with all the necessary facilities and equipment. the classrooms are spacious and equipped with projectors and wi-fi, and the laboratories are well-maintained with all the required instruments. the library is extensive, offering a wide range of books and digital resources for students. the college also has good sports facilities for both indoor and outdoor activities. the hostels are clean and comfortable, and the food served is hygienic and nutritious. overall, rnsit provides a well-equipped and well-maintained environment that enhances both learning and student life. | [academics]: the academics at rns institute of technology (rnsit) are strong and well-structured. the faculty members are knowledgeable, supportive, and focus on both theoretical and practical learning. the curriculum is updated and industry-relevant, helping students build a solid foundation for their careers. | [placements]: the placement opportunities at rns institute of technology (rnsit) are very good, with many reputed companies visiting the campus each year. the placement cell provides proper training and guidance to help students prepare for interviews. the overall placement record is strong, offering good opportunities for students in various fields. | [campus life]: campus life at rns institute of technology (rnsit) is vibrant and enjoyable. the college organizes various cultural events, technical fests, and sports activities that encourage student participation and talent. the campus environment is friendly and inclusive, helping students balance academics with extracurricular interests and build lasting memories.

review_text: eee is a very challenging branch of engineering. i chose eee just because i love dealing with electrical circuits and also placement for this branch is good. most of the teachers from the eee department have done ph.d. we have 2 term exams with a 1a -month gap and then the final exam. if you study properly your faculty notes, you can score good marks.we had one cultural fest in june where students can dance, sing in groups, or solo performances. there is a huge stack of books available on our campus. the only bad thing about my college is that most of the classrooms are not air-conditioned. iso vit is a chapter run by the students of vit.

[college infrastructure]: college infrastructure is very good and campus is very decent classrooms, labs , sports ground , lawns and all are very good and give a very unique vibe accordingly . wi fi facility is available in whole campus. classrooms: whether the classrooms are spacious, well-lit, and well-ventilated labs: whether the labs are well-maintained and have the latest equipment libraries: whether the libraries are well-maintained and have internet access hostels: whether the hostels are good and have tasty food canteens: whether the canteens are good and have tasty food | [academics]: purpose the review helps the university community strive for excellence and efficiency. it also helps to establish priorities for programmatic development and evaluate the effectiveness of program activities. process the review typically involves a combination of internal and external evaluations. the institution conducts an internal self-study, and then an external evaluation is conducted by a committee appointed by the institution. data the review uses both quantitative and qualitative data to gain a holistic view of the program. quantitative data includes student achievement metrics and graduation rates, while qualitative data includes classroom observations, student portfolios, and feedback from external experts. | [placements]: i am grateful for the opportunities and experiences i gained at my college, and i credit my successful placement to the college's support and dedication. campus placement is a program that helps students near the end of their studies find jobs. the educational institution partners with corporations that want to recruit from the student population.
college_name: Netaji Subhas University of Technology New Delhi

review_text: in university life is the best life because we experience a new life in gla university and there are 259 above clubs so the life of hostels is amazing and outstanding there was a big central library that opens at 2 am in lightgla university provides good internships in the best companies like ibm or dces like companies best placements and internships are provided by gla university and students were also interested in internships

[college infrastructure]: the college is infrastructure is really good. it's new and looks beautiful. the library is too good and labs are new and we'll equipped. the hostel has good wifi with upto 50 gb free usage. food is decent and it's green and clean campus. | [academics]: academics is good. the fact is it sometimes becomes over burden for the student to cope up with. there are lots of assignments quizzes and internal exams which really makes difficult to develop new skill sets. faculties are good and help when have doubt. | [placements]: placements is something good in vit with average package of 8.5 lacs per annum for cse students and 5-7 lpa for other branches. vit has a specialized department called pat cell which helps you in the placement drive. | [campus life]: campus life is a tough task in vit. it's full of restrictions. every single thing you do you need permission. in-time of 6 pm is what nobody likes since theory classes goes upto 5:30-5:45. college is too strict with its rules.
