review_text: [college infrastructure]: infrastructure is good, college has separate building for juniors and seniors. gardens between the buildings and a huge playground make the atmosphere of college more joyful. students develop a sense of sportsmanship during their graduation. | [academics]: faculty members in our college are highly knowledgeable and helpful, they maintain high quality when it comes to the faculty. i haven't seen any of the faculty who is reluctant to answer any of our doubts at any time. there are faculty members who graduated and every faculty members gradually helps to students with practical experience. | [placements]: students placed every year and also got chance for backlog which is very part for all students and some big package company also come here, many students go abroad from this college and 90 percent students got internship from this college.

the annual cultural fest is rendezvous which is a four-day event. the annual tech fest is 'tryst'. these two fests are generally held in continuation,i.e. one after the other. iit delhi has a huge and 'rich-in-literature' library, where books on various engineering and non-engineering topics can be found.the course curriculum is very interesting and that too being taught by highly-qualified faculty members is an awesome experience. there is approximately one professor per 100 students. the exams were held two times in the semester, one in the mid-semester and one as the final exam.
college_name: IIT Delhi - Indian Institute of Technology [IITD]

review_text: [college infrastructure]: the campus is scenic and well-maintained, offering excellent, facilities like tech-enabled classrooms and a strong wi-fi network. the library has all finance and hr resources, but rooms in the hostel should be more updated. | [academics]: curriculum in mba course is very tight and well-balanced. professors explain everything in detail about the field of hr and finance. alumni interaction and live projects make learning much more effective. industry trends of current times are lacking in the curriculum. | [placements]: placements have been pretty great with the very best of companies like hdfc, deloitte, to name a few, who are hiring exclusively for finance and hr profile. on an average package, there has been real competence; thus alumni networks hold a huge space in procuring good prospects. | [campus life]: campus life has been good, with regular cultural fests, sports and networking opportunities. hostel life is comfortable but for recreational purposes, facilities seem to be lacking. very supportive and growth-oriented in the environment. | [anything else]: my experience is just fabulous here in terms of personality development

i chose computer science engineering as my course because i have a keen interest in technology and in coding. computer science also is the most demanding field right now and will be in the future. there are various specializations also provided by the college so we can study deeply about the subjects. there are faculties who have completed their phd from iits and many ivy league universities abroad . they are very well versed and have a great knowledge about the subject . the faculty is more than enough and the ratio is 1:10. term exams include mid sems and sem exam. it's between three month gap. faculty conducts timely cla's( continues learning assessment) and internal exams. exams are of moderate difficulty. proper materials and slides are provided by the faculty and e-study materials are also provided. if properly followed we can score a decent 8.5-9cgpa easily.college annual fest is named aloha. it's conducted by mid-april or may. there are tech fests and hackathons conducted by the management. the library has a huge collection of books and covers all the topics for research-related and study materials. e access to the library is also available. there are various sports backed up by the college. there are basketball courts, table tennis and badminton courts. there is ground under construction for football and cricket. there will be various sports-based competitions. extracurricular activities include club activities. various clubs are available in the college.photography club, dance club, music club

the course is very well designed by the qualified faculty. the course outcomes were properly explained by the faculty. the faculty here are qualified and experienced in every department. the semester's exams are conducted where all the outcomes are covered and the level of the exam will be medium to hard and one can ace the exam by just listening to classes regularly.students in 3rd year are eligible to apply for internships and later can accept the ppo after the internship. full-time job roles are for 4 year students. considering all departments the average package is around 8 lakhs and the highest package offered in production engineering is around 36 lakhs. nitc is keen on beating the target for placements every year.

[college infrastructure]: infrastructure of my college was very nice . classrooms were very cleaned and they used to provide upgraded material. wifi facility was available 24 / 7 in hostels as well as in department. medical facilities were good . | [academics]: national institute of technology is known for good academics . so no doubt they provide the good education. this institute have lot of courses like btech in cse , btech in ece , btech in mechanical engineering etc. | [placements]: placement in national institute of technology agartala, 80% of students get placements every year . the highest placement offer has been 52 lpa and the lowest is 3.5 lpa . and the average package is 8 lpa . | [campus life]: campus life of the national institute of technology agartala was very good . teachers were helpful. the curriculum was good . they organised fest like technical and cultural fest the most famous one had been organised. | [anything else]: i'll recommend this college.

[college infrastructure]: iit have the best infrastructure in every aspect. all rooms are full centrally air conditioning including library which open all day in week . nice place to stay and study. it is my pleasure to get this college. washroom are hygienic and food is also good. | [academics]: teacher of iit bombay are top notch. but there is less time for intraction between teacher and students . teacher take classes regularly. and attendance policy is not so strict and followed. in last teacher's are good. | [placements]: about 95 percent students get placed in many multi national company and there package is also high comparison to private colleges . student gets a fair opportunity to get hired in company. placement cell is working good. | [campus life]: there are some restriction also. | [anything else]: iit are on top . you can come

[college infrastructure]: the college infrastructure is awesome and along with best environment conditions.we have everything in our hostel including cupboards, indoor games, indoor courts, gym, and wi-fi. the quality of food depends on the mess you prefer, so the quality is based on the mess similarly | [academics]: i got placed from this college in tcs at a really good package and i am really satisfied by my life that i got from this college so i am really thankful to this college for providing all the students these opportunities | [placements]: almost 70% of the students are placed with a salary package of 2-4 lpa. placements are offered by wipro,tech mahindra, etc., in the branch of cse. almost 100% of the students got internships in many government and private organisations and learn very well

cse is the favourite for many who are decided to work as computer software engineers so i opted for this subject there is one teacher for 10 students on the campus and the faculty is highly educated and they had very good knowledge of the subjects and the teaching is good, especially some professors. there will be two mid-exams and final exams these will be easy if you study. it will average the exam.the percentage of students getting placed is growing as compared to the previous year and the student placed is around 80 per cent there will be many companies coming to the college for campus interviews. and many will join in campus placements. but few of them do ms in the usa after the btech for better opportunities.

[college infrastructure]: amazing infrastructure and everything necessary are present here. for presentation purpose we have white screen and projector in classrooms and wifi system is also there. laboratory, libraries and sports facilities are up to date. food and hostel facility are also good. | [academics]: i had been a student of btech biotech. the standards are really good and professors are intelligent and kind. they teaches every one in same manner. yes the education we're going to have is surely make us job ready | [placements]: the college placement is really good and more than 85% students get placed every year. so, the quality of placement here is really awesome. i have no idea about highest salary offered, 5 lpa is average placement offered though. we receive training for this. | [campus life]: surely amazing campus life here we are getting. we are looking forward to some changes in sports facilities but still it's good. we engage in music and sports specially and sometimes dance and theatricals too.

[college infrastructure]: the infrastructure's very good with all the facilities, the classrooms have been well designed, library is good, sports facilities are amazing and hostels are great with the corridoors and washrooms being cleaned daily. food is average with importance being given to perfet diet. | [academics]: i am an undergraduate student persuing metallurgical and materials engineering.i chose it because i had great interest in material research also the department gives you many opportunities and the professors are helpful too. the curriculum is not up to date but it includes the basics but the webinars and talks organized by department keep us well informed about the latest technologies. | [placements]: the placement session depends on placement coordinator to much extent . i haven't given an interview yet but yess college will always be your support system. highest package offered last year was 17 l/p.a. for my department. and the average package was 8l/p.a. | [campus life]: campus life are always the best. you'll never regreat having one. everyone's very supportive . the campus is safe with its own dispensary and bank.

review_text: [college infrastructure]: wi-fi is poor in hostel, we have to buy our own personal connection most commonly airtel extreme. labs are not that well-equipped. the library is well stocked but sometimes we face problems in availability of some books. the quality of food has improved over time. we are going to leave block 2 soon as the tenure is about to expire. the other blocks like block is the best one but still the buildings are far off. | [academics]: the faculty members and other staff are exceptional. everyone is very helpful and kind to us. they are very much engaged and in love with us in all sorts of matters, including our daily affairs. the academics are also fine and at a good level compared to other nits. the system is accountable and very supportive. | [placements]: above-average placements, i would say, make the t&p very worthy. the new head is sukanta roy, who is the mastermind. the highest package offered is 14.6 lpa this year from cse avishek gope. internship-wise, this college also has impressive states. the percentage of students placed is 65 percent. | [anything else]: good college.

campus life is just awesome. the books you need for the course are available in the library. you don't need to buy them. just borrow from the library. there are many sports in college like cricket, volleyball, football, tennis, basketball, running, and many more also available. for students who are athletes, there are many sports in this college. there are also some students club like google developer club , dance club, and many more there is a separate building for students clubsmore than 1000 companies visit lpu for internships and some students get up to 1 lakh per month internship. there are many is done while you doing the course which help to get the internship. i think if you have high speaking skills & around 8 cgpa you can get easily an internship.

our annual fest name is "engifest" which happens in february and it is the largest cultural fest in north india. tech fest "invictus" happens in january. we have a very large library which has a very huge collection of books ranging from academic books to magazines, fiction, non-fiction etc. there are lots of scientific journals as well. all the classrooms are decently maintained. they are air-conditioned. sports facilities are also good. grounds are well maintained & the sports accessories are regularly provided. there are lots of societies & clubs run by students namely yuvaan, literature & film societ sahitya, writing & debating society uas, drone-making society dcg, a student-run consulting society 180 dc, consulting society etci chose this course based on my jee mains rank. faculty to student ratio is good (10:1) all the teachers are phd or pursuing phd from reputed colleges in india. teaching methods are average, mainly with ppt slides & notes. the exam happens twice a semester mid-term & end term. exams are of average level. what is taught in class comes in exams. mainly you have to refer teacher's notes.

[college infrastructure]: the infrastructure of my college is pretty good. its really big and well maintained. the buildings are new and clean. my campus is campus 12 its very beautiful, almost every campus has a dedicated garden when students can chill in their spare times. the classrooms are air conditioned and pretty accessible for even people with disabitlities. | [academics]: academics at kiit are very strong according to my opinion. i personally have 8.8 cgpa. teachers can be a bit egotistical sometimes but overall they are very good at teaching. there are a lot of research facilties also in the college. | [placements]: placements are pretty good with a lots of companies visiting. the average package is also decent. our seniors got placed in quite good companies. although placements for core branches are way better but my branch ecs is also giving good placements. about 85-90 percent students were placed which is a good number. and the average salary range is about 6-8 lakhs. | [campus life]: its good as well, events, clubs, fest nights, sports. there's always one or another event going on in the college. cultural societies are highly enthusiastic and always organise interesting events for us to take part in. | [anything else]: kiit provides a balanced college life. studies mixed with enjoyment. modern and lifely campus, cool students, active lifestyle, scenic gardens, well maintained libraries and abundance of books to study. it helps us grow academically as well as personally.
college_name: Kalinga Institute of Industrial Technology Bhubaneswar

review_text: [college infrastructure]: the infrastructure is completely impressive and outstanding proper class hai har ek teacher ke liye alag alag room the college has its own facilities and equipment for every things like laboratories full digital, libraries full digital and also 4 libraries are there in each atleast 2000 students can study | [academics]: like it's good for me because the teachers are good but the administration rules and helps are some time unsatisfied yes the curriculum is updated and include all the recent developments intl the field. and also they are launching new school ( the school of ai) | [placements]: this college gives opportunity for placement. college has its own placement committee which helps every student to apply on their eligibility . 94 percent student placed the n last last 3 year . highest package is 1 crore for bennett university in mera | [campus life]: campus life is completely impressive. you can roam in to the campus 24into 7 and no rules are there for night but there are rules for other things like birthday celebration, girls hostel rules, boys cannot walk into and launge and mess etc | [anything else]: no

placements are really good. almost 95 percent of students from cse, eee, ece get placed and nearly 90 percent place from civil, mechanical, and other departments. and also after the second year, our college will provide internships. many well known mnc s like amazon, microsoft, d shaw, paypal, etc come for placing students.the main advantage here is, they follow a fully flexible credit system ffcs. so from this, we can select the course in which we are interested. and the course curriculum is fine and up to date. coming to exam structure we have two internals cat1 and cat2 and also we will have internals for a lab, final exams fat.

pros/cons: the environment here is good as the students here are all equal as they have studied the same. the landscape here is so good due to trees. we are provided with so many facilities. the college proffesors are not good here. we can only use cycle here and we don't have other option. funds are not provided at ther correct time due to government issues. | placement experience: placements are pretty good in our college for the top tier branches with a placement percantage of 80%. low tier branches have a cut off of minimum 7.5 cgpa for sitting in the campus interviews. students get eligibility in 4th year.
college_name: IIT Bhubaneswar - Indian Institute of Technology - [IITBBS], Bhubaneswar

review_text: the annual cultural fest is called pecfest held in november and the now-discontinued annual technical fest was called vyom. the pec library is a 3 floor giant source of wisdom where various books on the most trivial of subjects or topics can be found easily. the digitisation of the data of books makes it way easier to find books. the classrooms are all well lit, air conditioned to allow students to have an easy time while studying. the college campus has some or the other sports/extra curriculular activity going on all the time. sports events like atheletic meet, hpl(hostel premiere league) /fpl(football primere league) etc are held where more than 42 teams participate. extra curriculular includes clubs like dramatics, music, saasc, peb which work round the year to perform in various fests and in house events. various meme pages, clubs, websites are run by students these days.students get pre-placement training in the 4th sem, and the 5th sem is all about finding an intern. 6th sem is dedicated to doing the internship and 7-8th interns are dedicated to finding campus placements. the companies like jp morgan and co, mechanzie, atlaccian, microsoft, maruti, and uber visit pec to pick pec's brightest men and women of tomorrow. various profiles like software, consultancy, data analysis, and core are open to students of various branches almost all the students from circuital and 80% of non-circuital get placed. dara science is the relatively newer branch and the exact package/stipend discussion is still underway and will only be found out after 2025. my plan is to go on study for mtech after my degree is complete
college_name: Punjab Engineering College University of Technology - [PEC]

review_text: [college infrastructure]: there are 10-12 facilities each semester, the quality of food in mess is good and canteen has variety of food for light snacks. there is a huge ground for sports with football a student activity centre, basketball court, tennis court, badminton and table tennis. there is wi-fi, labs, library, study rooms, etc. | [academics]: teachers are good, more focused on theoretical part, one could go to their cabins to ask questions, the course syllabus is according to ugc hence outdated, some courses are included due to the new education policy to make students industry ready. passing is not hard one has to study hard to ace the exam with good grades. | [placements]: there are 126 students and around 80%of them are placed. the highest package was 35 lacs and the lowest 3.6 lacs. top recruiters were exl, wipro, maruti, etc. around 30 students get the internship opportunity in these. top roles were get, data scientist, etc.

faculty behaviour is very good and they also do not take admission more than their capacity. teachers are very well qualified and educated. the exam is of two types mid sem & end sem. mid sem held after 2 months of sem starting and end sem after 4-5 months of starting sem during this lab sessional, viva, quizzes going on for internal marking.the admission fee is 75 k sem fees are 176k the exam registration fee is 1k mess admission fee is 15k the mess fee is 22.5k hostel fee depends according to the hostel there are 3-4 types. of hostels 3 bed ac premium 2 bed ac premium 1 bed ac premium 3 bed ac common washroom 3 bed non ac common washroom 2 bed non ac common washroom

[college infrastructure]: good infrastructure which have differnent blocks for different depertment and every blocks same and classes have smartboard in classrooms and good seminar halls and lift in almost all depertment in all blocks and with good and neat classrooms | [academics]: you will have different courses like hr, marketing, analytics and finance as a major course in all dual specialization and they have designed good courses structure i just wanted them to add some more practical exposure visits so that we will be more interested and will get to know more about outside world. | [placements]: companies will come to college and we have to apply for the companies and companies like lseg they take a lot of students at a time which will come to college and take interviews in the colleges itself | [campus life]: we will have have 9 to 5 classes in which it includes break and lunch break also and we will have mentoring class in the evening in which we will have to work on group discussions and practice communication and we will have lot more things and dont worry too much you will not get to know when your degree started and ended

there are many companies which are visiting our university.as i'm in second year now many seniors have been telling us that the mass recruitment is from tcs and cognizant and infosys companies which are software companies.in a year approx 2000 students will pass out from university.in that 600 students will be taken by tcs.placement department is very good in providing placement to students.i personally didn't notice any alumini becoz i'm in 2nd year only.as i grew to 6th sem i can explain.we have three fests in our university for every year.we have daksh known as a technical fest in which students from various universities will come and participate . colosseum known as sports fest in which various sports competition will be held.all the college's across tamilnadu will participate in this.coming to cultural fest we have kuruksastra which will be in a grand scale.all the fests will be held for three days in the campus.

[college infrastructure]: thapar has good infrastructure, with adequate facilities, which help in visual learning. it had very well design and campus for studying and activities. infrastructure is the only good thing in this college. | [academics]: quality of teaching is good, most professors are helpful and have very good knowledge of the subject they are teaching. professors and lab assistants too are kind and helpful during exams............. | [placements]: placement in computer branch is satisfactory. with good cg and good skills one can easily crack companies, it is quite difficult for lower branches such as enc and ece to score placements, overall placement of computers and mechanical are good | [campus life]: campus life is satisfactory.
college_name: Thapar Institute of Engineering and Technology Patiala

review_text: the faculty of iits are well known by everybody and are quite educated to a great level but most of them are much focused towards their research and other stuff and that's why they make the lecture part quite boring but some of them are good at teaching and makes lecture very interesting. in my course, i found have met till date only 2 professors to be having teaching attitude. overall the faculties are well educated and are able to handle all workload of academics and are well enthusiastic for the research part which is quite necessary for our nation.in my college, admission is through jee - advanced examination conducted by different iits under jee council board. there were two steps both having merit list, first one was jee main conducted by mhrd, nta then comes jee_advanced and those students who qualified in a specific range of ranks are proceeded further for admission in iits through jossa counselling and various steps including document verification and ordering of your preferences of iits, and finally authorised letter by jossa that is required during admission process in iit.
college_name: IIT Guwahati - Indian Institute of Technology - [IITG]

review_text: i want to know how big organization works and make trends in the market. there are many 80 to 90 students who pursuing bba. there hire very good teachers and their teaching methods are also very good. recently in nov -dec, they took my 1st sem exam. no there is no difficulty to pass the exam.recently in the first semester beginning they organize a fresher party for the new students their management is very good and the event is also awesome. they have many extra curricular activities and also many sports like cricket hockey football and many more.

fees structure of the college is equal for all. the average fee of the college is 1.5 lakh per annum. but while taking admission via the university side there is a quite chance of scholarship. and the finance for the college is through the serious admission process which can be asked while admitting. rest is just perfect.the internship is not still opted by me but as per the seniours the internship is quite good and there are many paid and unpaid internship options. which is thought opted by the students. the roles are minimal. but the opportunities are endless also with mncs

[college infrastructure]: the college infrastructure is very vast and fully planned . the college campus gives you a pleasant conditions for good learning curve both mental and physical. the college is well governed in terms of cleanliness, hygiene etc. | [academics]: the academic model of college is very good since it focuses on very needed subjects thus giving a high chance of pursing the specific need by a student. the university also provides various skill development courses. | [placements]: the placements are versatile, where many of the students get placed every year, in different companies like hcl, tcl, infosys, wipro etc. the placement cell fully focuses on skill development for work placement

[college infrastructure]: outstanding infrastructure and having all the necessary facilities which are required in every college for their students this college have a smart classrooms laboratories labs sports centres and hostel facilities also for their boys and girls and his college has a wi-fi and smart board facilities also and these all the facilities are well maintained and this college have a specious ground interactive and the attractive | [academics]: the teachers taught the courses very well and covered all the basic concepts. there was emphasis to learn about the latest technologies and updates however due to time constraints most of the time basic and intermediate concepts were covered theoretically and practically | [placements]: quality of placements is good and there is a package of 3.5 lacs (min.) by the companies. 80% of students got placed while we were studying. yes, college is supportive though. the average salary offered was 1.44 lacs per annum. i would like to say that the process of placements were easy and staffs were very supportive during the event.
college_name: Netaji Subhas University of Technology New Delhi

review_text: they conduct all the local cultural fests and also celebrate other functions but now under the pandemic situation, there are no such activities. they may plan for the future about them. the library is beautiful and the look is nice. books and journals are available to read. classrooms are good and spacious enough for strength. there are tennis courts and basketball courts and other grounds to play. there are lots of clubs and we are free to join any of them.i was interested in programming languages so i have chosen this course. there are many skilled facilities to teach and they are maintaining a decent faculty-student ratio. the faculties have higher degree qualifications and there are good at their teaching. there are two mid-term exams called cats and one final assessment test.

[college infrastructure]: the college has a compact and neat infrastructure, although new buildings are raising for every year. a very big arena hostel and five blocks of the buildings constitute the whole college. an excellent technology is there in the central library to access books and for checking due fee. new improvised automobile labs found a good place in the college. | [academics]: the faculty is good, and as it is an autonomous college with improving syllabus every year, now it is entirely outcome-based education. the students are trained and educated for the industrial requirements. more precise and accurate subjects help the students with good knowledge. | [placements]: the placements are good. above 90% of the eligible students get placed in many reputed companies. infosys was the main recruiter of this college with soliton, and tech mahindra are few other topnotch companies. they provide good training regarding placements with leading experts.

review_text: [college infrastructure]: the college infrastructure is quite good there are a lot of facilities and many food courts with reasonable rates. the hostel rooms and floors are cleaned regularly. the library contains a wide variety of books and you will find great novels too. the library is really clean and disciplined. jio signal in lpu campus is very weak airtel sim is preferable. the mess food is not good, the food in food courts is much better and hygiene, even thali's including south india thalis are available. | [academics]: the teachers are really good and well trained this college focuses a lot oververall development of a student. students are taught making cv's from first year and mock interviews are arranged for practice. the faculty work a lot on all over development of a student. | [placements]: this year lpu's placement in cse has been 100%. with a highest package of 42 lakhs per year. students are getting regular opportunities because a lot of competitions are being held by companies and many companies come here to hire the students so if you work a little you can achieve alot. | [campus life]: the campus life is quite interesting it's very enjoyable with a lot of friends edm nights, dj parties and what not. there are a lot of competitions and opportunities in co curricular activities provided here. we have the official speaker of tedx jalandhar from lpu. winners of olypics from here and many more great achievements. great campus life

review_text: [college infrastructure]: the infrastructure of the university is one of the best in india. it is equipped with all the facilities like mac labs, nvidia supercomputer, dell research labs, wi-fi covers the entire campus ( limited to 2.5gb per student per day ). has two libraries on campus one for all and one for law students only. the master library is currently under construction. mess food is good as compared to other nearby collages but during lunchtime waiting queue stretch meters long. | [academics]: all the teachers here are experts in their domain. all the teachers are very friendly and happy to help. one can reach out to them anytime to solve their doubts, some teachers reply to mail even at 2am, but when it comes to teaching 50% of the faculty are the best, they clear the concept really well, but the rest 50% will make you forget what you already know. | [placements]: after talking to some seniors i can say that the placement cell is very active here. they update themselves every year and prepare the junior batches early for the things that their senior batches missed during their placement.

[college infrastructure]: college infrastructure is really nice . whole campus is about 730+ acres , having different campus for each branch as well as sports and studnts activity centre acquires one campus which is huge and good. we have wifi , departmental libraries as well as central library . and hostel is fully equipped and furnished | [academics]: i'm pursuing btech in ecs (23-27) our faculties are very well trained and teach us in very smooth manner . assignment ate given regularly as well as weekly quiz . also help us in internship program which is very helpful | [placements]: kiit provide 100% placement with average package of 8-9 lpa and highest package of 62 lpa . companies like infosys, deloitte, adobe, samsung and many more visit here for our placement drive . pur college is very support | [campus life]: our campus is huge and big , we get many awesome infrastructure in our campus but we have an open campus which sometimes create chaos as well as strangers are also allowed which feels so uncomfortable. although we have flashmob , and many more activities

[college infrastructure]: yes, our college have all the necessary infrastructure facilities and equipment.we have different facilities in our classrooms like projectors, smart room, and various other facilities. they all are well maintained in our college.yes we are living in a clean and hygienic place. | [academics]: academic are comparable with almost any top colleges in india as they are updated to keep match with current changing scenerio. both industrial and technical aspects are taken in account that leads to overall development of student. | [placements]: one of the highest placed student ratio in both national and international companies makes it one of the best college in india. highest package with more than 25 lakh and lowest around 5 lakh is worthy of every dream of student.

review_text: [college infrastructure]: the infrastructure was excellent. it was built in a good area with zero traffic zone. the campus was 2 acres and provides separate hostels for girls and boys. they also provide good gardening on the college premises. the climate was good, and the food in the hostel was not up to the mark but students can manage it. | [academics]: the best faculty members in the world. the staff had international exposure where students can earn much knowledge from them. they will help students if they were not able to understand. most of the faculty members were ph.d. holders who had a lot of knowledge and experience | [placements]: this college will provide students with the best companies for applying for jobs. even in a hard time, i.e lockdown students use to get a lot of opportunities from the campus itself. i am from marketing specialization and i got placed in of the reputed it company for corporate sales | [campus life]: the college campus is best for students and teachers are very supportive to students in making the events and activities in college surrounding the college campus | [anything else]: no

exploring is the key at the age of 18-22 and dtu is the best place to get it. the social life in dtu is at its best with 2500 btech students taking admission every year from all over india, bringing along different cultures. college life is just amazing with loads of fest being organized. engifest the biggest cultural fest in north india organised in the month of february is always a memorable experience. then every month or two yuvaan fest and tech fest by innova invictus cell are organised. dtu has a huge library with every course book by several authors available. the classroom is well-designed with technical and digital assistance. sports events are also organised at a large scale with every sport you could expect being competed. there are societies for music, different dance styles, dramatics, entrepreneurship etc.the course curriculum has been defined very efficiently. it enables students to explore the course along with their practicals with the best experiences. considering all the subjects there are about 10 professors for a batch of 75 students. it has to be mentioned that the college faculty is highly qualified with phd and masters in their respective fields of subjects. this makes students understand the subject very clearly and practically and that's the reason why the term exams were quite a decent level but easily solvable if one has had a feel of the subject and studied efficiently enough.

i choose this course because of the increasing scope of computer technologies in current years. faculty: student ratio is not much good there are mostly guest faculties . there is a review system at the time of sem end. most teachers are p.hd holders. there are 3 term exams in a semester they are not much difficult to passin the third year, companies come for internships, and on their own anyone can crack internships in 4th semester. mostly offered roles are web developer and software developer .for web developer internship students have to show their projects on basis of which they get selected

review_text: here in this college the annual fest is conducted at every regular intervals of 2 months and also they conduct many small fest within the college in every one month.it is conducted regular intervals of 4 months where international students and iit and nit students take part .. which makes the college best. here they have a great library just like 5 star library where you can get books and journals of international writer and the best author of india .also they also have a research papers of students which have been approved the great college.here this is called the number 1 sports hub of india . here you will find each and every sports and will get a chance show your talents.here the great hockey players of india practice which inspires alot . gyms are just like a1 and have international coaches who gives training . and with the gym facilities. here we can find every group and clubs with great seniors and some researchers they help us a alot by guiding and giving innovative ideas.the course have a great future ahead and also is the core branch.the faculty student ratio is 1:60 the accurate thing.. the qualifications of the faculty that they have done their mtech and phd from the iits and nit . and they have been into the research teams and they have a great experience.the review of the teaching method : they are friendly with each and everyone.they show their experience of teaching.they also have one to one interaction with every student.also they send their personal notes ppt etc ... which helps a student alot. the real and dedicated teachers ????. the term exams are held at regular intervals excluding the mid terms and end terms they have regular intervals quizes , viva , and every basic tests .. it is easy to pass the exam because the all the topics are covered in the classes which makes the test too much easy to pass and have a great results..

pros/cons: the students team here in iit bombay is very good. the seniors are ready to help in anything you want. the campus is also peaceful and filled with greenary. you wouuld definitely enjoy the place here. the infrastucture is pretty good but not that good. the lecture halls are far from the hostel so it will take atleast 30 mins to walk. the professors even though are good at the subject they lack the ability to explain it clearly. the classes are really huge, which makes the class always distractive. | placement experience: the placements in iit bombay are one of the best in the whole country due to it's high packages, but recently many students are doing mtech and mba from foreign rather than going for direct jobs . some are also going for starting businesses.

review_text: [college infrastructure]: facilities and infrastructure available for our courses are well-equipped laboratories and fully wi-fi surrounded classrooms with all the latest technology. the campus and hostel are connected to high-speed wi-fi. asia's biggest library and auditorium are available. the hostel is very good. | [academics]: srm is known for good infrastructure, facilities and equipment. the facilities we have in our college is high tech with wifi on every classroom and they are well-maintained.the curriculum is updated regularly. | [placements]: the institute has successfully concluded its 2023 placement drive with more than 734 recruiters, who made around 7305 offers. srm university highest package stood at inr 57 lpa and the srm ist average package stood at inr 7.58 lpa.

review_text: [college infrastructure]: my college has really good infrastructure. we get all the facilities un equipment that are required for our growth. we have really good facilities of classroom laboratories libraries food centres and hostels. waverly great wi-fi network. and all the places are really clean and are food is also very hygienic | [academics]: the quality of teaching delivered by professor is well understandable and curriculum is also updated and certain period of time. university also give the student chance to visit factories and chemical labs for better research. yes,study to make us job ready. | [placements]: the quality of placements is very good. almost 80 - 90% of students get placed according to their learnings. the college is also very supportive in placement and providing internships opportunity to get a experience.

the fees have been the same since. the beginning and mostly no hike was there. there are several scholarships for students as well as relief for the economically unstable. there are a lot of opportunities as a grad from iitd.there are a lot of internship opportunities at the internet of things, designing, coding, robotics, manufacturing as well as tech jobs. indian institute of technology delhi is also known for jobs in consultancy and finances

review_text: [college infrastructure]: the college has a top class infrastructure with well-maintained labs consisting of latest software and technologies. the laboratories are air-conditioned and consists of projectors. the college also has a library consisting of 6 floors including the ground floor and has 250000+ books which includes national, international and journals. the library provides with many facilities such as wifi-facilities, e-books, video conferencing room, etc. besides academics, the college focus on physical health of the students and provides sports and gym facilities. the hostel offers well-maintained and secure wifi operating at 10mbps | [academics]: i am currently pursuing computer science and engineering since i was a tech-enthusiast since childhood. in vit, we get to select faculties and take the number of credits we wish to take in a process called ffcs. the quality of teaching depends on the faculty we select. however, the curriculum is updated every year based on the recent developments and updates in the industry making the student job-ready | [placements]: the college is well-known for it's placements. vit is the only private university offering an average package of 10lpa. even though the market been down, vit has placed nearly 10000+ students across all the 4 campuses. the highest package offered this year was 1cr. the placements are based on your cgpa achieved across your course duration. the eligibility of the placement is that there should be no standing arrears at the time of placements. | [campus life]: vit is believed to be one of the best colleges for having good campus life. there are many events that happen everyday like technical events, singing, dancing etc. these events are open to all students irrespective of their branches. vit has 50+ clubs and chapters where the student can be a part of depending upon their interest. vit also conducts 2 major fests: 1. gravitas(technical fest) - students get to participate in workshops, hackathons, competitive coding, etc. it lasts for 3 days 2. riviera(cultural fest) - students can participate in fun activities during the day time and during the evening time, singers and djs are invited. it lasts for 4 days

[college infrastructure]: our class has everything that students needs and i'm proud to say our university is one in india how give access supercomputer access to students to work on some researches and i can say this is good fit for students who can afford | [academics]: i'm currently doing my third year batchelors in field of computer science in bennett university and i'm doing this because i'm very much interested in programming not only that resources in this university is outstanding and that pulled me applying for this university and also our university has a top class faculty how are educated from iits and from other top class universities and i'm good to say that our university is teaching all latest technologies like aws, machine learning etc | [placements]: as this is the new university our faculty is trying to get new companies and we don't have any issue with this because they are doing there work very great well coming to the persentage of people placed in companies i cannot say this in a number but most of the people are placed and being placed and when coming to the average salary it was 4 lakh per annum | [campus life]: to say in one word it is decent we have everything covered we have nice place to work (for studying), nice play area which includes all court's and decent rooms to feel and fit free

the options i was getting were mechanical, chemical, and all the branches after it, and from these branches i chose biotechnology, as i had a slight inclination towards the subjects of this course as compared to the mechanical ones. there are approximately 200-250 girls and 500-600 boys in one academic year. the faculty is quite good. the theory subjects are usually taught by the professor with a phd degree, and the lab classes are mostly taken by the phd scholars under the guidance of the professor. the professors have good knowledge of their subjects and usually provide practical knowledge, so you can ask for their help whenever you need it. there are basically 3 exams held in a semester. two minor exams of 20 marks each and an end of semester exam for 40 marks. the rest of the marks are based on internal checking and assignments.as this college comes under the central government, there is no hike in fees every year. the hostel and mess fees are around 25000 and the semester fee is around 80000. so the total fee for one semester is approximately 100,000. many merit-based programs are there to help these students who are unable to pay their fees and whose family's annual income is less than a specified amount. one of the scholarships is the siemens india scholarship, which is for first-year students. the college offers a variety of internships with stipends ranging from 20,000 to 15,000, though only 2-3 students receive a 15,000 stipend. but the stipend varies from company to company, but many offer a 50k stipend as well.
college_name: Dr BR Ambedkar National Institute of Technology - [NIT]

review_text: [college infrastructure]: the college infrastructure is decent . the campus has seperate floors for each department. the college houses a huge 2 storied gym with all the necessary machine and weights. we have a huge library and adjacent to it is a nice canteen.we also have good research labs inside the campus viz. microsoft innovation lab where students can do internship after getting selected | [academics]: few professors are really nice and teach the subject with joy. on the other hand few teachers would just make the subject lame. but that is the case of all the colleges,so it's not a major concern. but they will be very friendly and guide you in every possible way. | [placements]: the placements are really nice. almost all the top notch companies come for recruitment on campus. we have microsoft coming every year and it recruits a handful of students. few people go for inter-deciplinary placements and sit for management consulting companies. on the other hand few people prefer core jobs. most of the people get placed through campus recruitment only . a lot of people prefer to go for foreign education in us, germany, canada,japan etc | [campus life]: the campus life is pretty average. forget walking on wide roads under the moon with friends and the so called hostel made maggie's. everybody in the campus is pretty helpful though .

[college infrastructure]: infrastructure is good in some blocks which are newly built.as well as in some old block not as per our expectation.clg labs and other equipment is good and library infrastructure is also better than some other colleges | [academics]: faculty teaching is good but some fault not as per our expectations.some of them are teaching good but some of them are not teaching well .they always use ppt to teach .so we can't understand those topics. | [placements]: placement is better compared to other colleges like nits and local colleges.companies recruiting more in this college than other colleges.many off our seniors is placed in good companies with good packages | [anything else]: no

review_text: iit jammu has very good placements stats as compared to all other 3rd gen iits. the highest package offered in the year 2021 is 52lpa for btech and median package for cse is 21lpa. almost 83% of students get placed. the overall median package of btech is 16lpa. in mtech highest package is 45lpa and the median is 25.5 lpa. the top companies visiting are amazon, microsoft, sprinklr, indeed, samsung, and qualcomm.there are basically two fest of iit jammu: renao id the name of our cultural fest and technuctus is the tech fest of iit jammu. the infrastructure here is good because it is newly constructed and all the classrooms are centralized ac. almost all the major sports facilities are here. also, there are various clubs run by students eg- coding club, astronomy club, beat street etc.
college_name: IIT Jammu - Indian Institute of Technology - [IITJ]

review_text: [college infrastructure]: the infrastructure could be categorised at super currently but a new campus nearing completion in 2020 would address most of the issues for the campus.recently shifting to a newer one. the food is good along with the hostels. | [academics]: the faculty especially for trade and finance are particularly notable with numerous phd's in the faculty. the teaching is a holistic mix of theory and practical application with internals accounting for 60% of the grade thus placing emphasis on continuous evaluation. a port visit in the second year along with student exchange programs enable students . | [placements]: the placements at have been historically at par with even some iims with the latest final placement at around 20 lpa with the highest package for trade roles at 1.5 crores. trafigura, olam etc. would some of the trade companies specifically coming to iift along with goldman sachs, jpmc, itc, godrej, bajaj and airtel being other notable mentions.

[college infrastructure]: campus is very nice in infrastructure. also, all the classrooms are enabled with projectors. hostels in the campus has all the basic necessary facilities. library consist of lot of books. campus is clean and green. | [academics]: i am studying mca here. course curriculum is updated. teachers are of very good quality and help when students faces difficulty in any problem. all the staff, seniors are very much supportive to students. | [placements]: placement is very good in this college. almost each students gets placed in final year. salary package offered is around 15 lakhs per annum. placement process is easy and pleasant for every body. college is supportive.

review_text: pros/cons: infrastructure is such quality that if india wants they can take inspiration from it. roads of our campus are clean as a whistle as brooming is done atleast twice everyday. washrooms are there at each floor of the building and therefore one don't have to rush for it. students are not as per a too class university should have as most have come from management quota. | course curriculum overview: our curriculum is amazing as we have every variable in our syllabus. there's nothing unheard of as soon as something in tech know how comes it's been taught to us. i have done four semesters and skills programming comes in 5th semester onwards and i am already quite excited about it as it is about to happen.

[college infrastructure]: as we know our college is the youngest coll in nits so it has the best and very modern infrastructure among all other nits, we also have a very good wi-fi, each floor has its own router, labs are very advanced up to date, quality of food is excellent here. | [academics]: yes, the teachers were really very helpful, and qualified and knowledgeable, the teaching quality was extraordinary and of course the course i'd curriculum relevant it makes student industry ready in each and every possible way the difficult in semester exams are okay, if we study we can do it. | [placements]: most of the students were placed in my campus placements and many others are going to abroad for higher studies and remaining are into research as per their interests accordingly.the average highest package is 44 lpa average is 9lpa the lowest is 7 lpa this year manager is the top role offered.

review_text: the courses and curriculum are pretty relevant and good. professors are also good at teaching except for some, teaching methods are mediocre here neither too advanced nor too backward. some professors are really helpful and good some are just rude. one can easily qualify for exams easily by studying one week before the exam. attendance is not that important, but it depends on prof.fees hike is very much here, every year fee is increasing exponentially and my 4-year fees are as( 2.06, 2.19, 2.36, 2.45 lacs). there is financial assistance from the college itself for low-background students and there is some govt scholarships too. if you want you can take loans at low interest from banks too.

[college infrastructure]: the sms infrastructure is better than the whole college. the classrooms are well lit and air conditioned. most of the classes are stacked up hence resulting in problems in allotment. labs are okay but not well maintained. library is okay. college consists of all kinds of fields but are maintained less frequently. hostels are average. the college campus is clean and hygienic. | [academics]: academics is a section which is not well updated and lack the industry exposure although several old concepts are still relevant. quality of teaching is good. the professors are knowledgeable and helpful. they encourage students to most importantly, always attend classes and regularly update themselves with recent developments. | [placements]: in terms of roi, the returns are good.2 91.18% of the students were placed (total students: 34). average package: 4.14 lakhs per annum. highest package: 5.75 lakhs per annum. placement process was smoothly conducted and every student got equal opportunity for placements. | [campus life]: college campus is decent in size keeping in mind the location of the institution. students are good along with teachers, but not well coordinated.

review_text: the annual fest will be conducted in march (vitopia). due to covid, it was not conducted for the past two years. the technical fests will be conducted frequently. we can have a peaceful atmosphere in the library we can find any book regarding the subject. their social life of vit was quite nice.i have opted for the option of computer science and engineering. the student and faculty ratio is about 30:1 .all faculties are with high experience and well-trained faculties. the teaching way is unique which makes students listen. three exams were conducted during a semester.

review_text: the campus is small, with not too much space to roam around but still campus life is good. annual fest is 8th mile but it won't happen annually, esummit happens almost after every year which is also a good fest. fests are conducted after every 2-3 months, small or big doesn't matter. enough books are available in the library to make use of it. the classroom contains a smart board and is good for a student kind of environment. the sports culture is pretty good as uk anil kumble and lots of other sports personalities are from rvce. ecell, raag, rotaract, coding club, alap etc. are some of the clubs.7th sem students are eligible for campus placement. placements are better than lots of nits and almost all the government colleges. average placement is >14 lpa this year for the isc department and >8 lpa for iem deloitte, capgemini, mercedes benz, microsoft, volvo etc. are some companies visit our college. no. of offers are maximum >250 for ece department. the highest package is nearly 88 lpa this year almost all the students are placed in iem. i may prefer mba as i'm already studying management at iem.

i choose the course cause i will really passionate about coding and was also having a good experience in the same. the faculty: student ratio is 1:15 and the faculty members are well qualified and most of them are highly experienced. most of the faculty have either completed their ph.d. or are currently pursuing it within the university, while others have done their mtech and are good at teaching. while you might find some teachers teaching methods to be a bit novice. the exams are conducted timely like mid sem, ends, and the cas the exam are of moderate level and the questions are mostly from the study material provided by teachers.the fees are a bit on the higher side and i pay 90000 per semester and 75000 for the hostel and 35000 for the mess which is pretty average. the cost to study here while availing of all the facilities provided by the university is around 3.5 lac per year. the scholarships available here are through lpunest, jee entrance, and on basis of 12th percentage. financial aid is given to orphans, the specially-abled, and children of the military of defense personnel. currently, i am not eligible for internships and jobs but placements here are quite good.

review_text: the student-to-faculty ratio is pretty decent and the teachers are well-qualified. most of them interactive with their students and solve their doubts of students as soon as possible. exams and tests are held on a regular basis to judge the level of preparation among the students.there are quite a few scholarships available for students to apply for. ranging from female scholarships to economically backward scholarships. there's also a 10% fee hike in course fees for every year. jobs and internships are pretty fair deals on campus.

pros/cons: !.campus and infrastructure:the college has an excellent campus with modern infrastructure, spacious academic blocks, well-maintained hostels, and a vibrant environment.facilities like libraries,labs,auditoriums, and sports grounds are well-developed 2.faculty and teaching quality:most of the faculty members are knowledgeable,approachable and supportive. they use both traditional methods and modern teaching aids to explain concepts clearly.a few professors also encourage research 3.placement support:the placement cell is very active and brings in top recruiters like tcs,infosys,wipro,accenture, deloitte and product-based companies. they also conduct mock interviews, aptitude training,and coding practice sessions. | course curriculum overview: the curriculum is fairly comprhensive covering core subjects in the first two years and advanced electives like ai,cloud and data analytics later, which influenced my decision to join. it balances theory with labs and projects,preparing students for real-world applications and higher studies. exams are held twice a semester plus finals with moderate difficulty. improvement is needed in making some courses ore practical and updating a few outdated topics.

review_text: hostel bed and lightnings are good. warden is a bit on the strict side. there are restrictions inside the hostel. but, overall it is good. food quality not that great, but there are a lot of street foods which are amazing. all sports fitness and wellness centres are available.teachers are knowledgeable but they can be better. the study is more bookish rather than industry oriented. lab teachers are really not that helpful. but one with the will to learn can get upskilled by showing more interest. not at par with other colleges in the same rank.

[college infrastructure]: the infrastructure is very well furnished within the college the classroom are huge and the auditorium base is there for any formal events there is gathering assembly hall too for ppo briefing and placement talks. | [academics]: academics are very relevant in terms of industry and market scenarios the professors themselves come from reputable management grounds so the kind of teaching offered is very specific and helpful for the students pursuing management studies. | [placements]: companies like infosys and act and accenture comes in the college campus during the placement process and they offer good placement and ppo offers sometimes so the placement in this college is excellent.

hostels for boys ,one is 15 km away from college for 1st and 2nd year students. another one is near the campus. also there are two small hostels for girls inside campus as girls ratio is small. all the classroom and labs have acs, projectors and wifi. we have sports area for volleyball, kabaddi, basketball etc . | [academics]: though we have space constraints which disables for having well equipped labs and workshop, faculties here made to erase this disappointment. all the faculties here are phd qualified and thus equipped with concepts which goes deeper . our course curriculum is subjects and be job ready. | [placements]: placements is a bit of disappointment for our department due to less number of core companies for placement. also many times students of our department not students along with faculties co-ordinate to make it a success and enjoy. it is located near narela market thus daily essentials can be easily accessed. also it is located near harishchandra hospital so that students can cope with health issues.

[college infrastructure]: college infrastructure is awesome and have all the necessary facilities, infrastructure and equipment. the classrooms, laboratories, sports centers, gym and hostels are well-maintained and clean- daily. their have proper wifi and classrooms and laboratories have smart boards. | [academics]: i am pursing in computer science in 1st year. the quality of teaching is very good. all the teachers and staff are good and helpful nature. the curriculum is updated and includes all the recent developments in the field. | [placements]: placement of university is very good. as per me the process of placement is easy and pleasant for every student. the average salary of cse-branch students is above 6 lakh . in placements there are all types of companies come in university .

review_text: [college infrastructure]: christ university is best known for its infrastructure. it provides one of the best facilities compared to all colleges in india. everything is in its best condition all the time. the food served in the canteen isn't a problem, and since there is a canteen and not a mess, thus you have to pay for whatever you eat. so, it completely depends on you. | [academics]: the course curriculum is excellent here. all the teachers who taught us here have excellent knowledge in their respective fields. i even saw the course curriculum of bits, dubai, and it is almost the same as our college's course curriculum. so, even though the salary packages offered in placements here are much good, but the knowledge you'll gain here would be the best. | [placements]: all the students from computer science usually get placed, but the salary package offered is comparatively a little less than the salary packages offered in tier-1 colleges. the highest salary package offered will be up to 15 lpa, whereas the average salary package offered can be anywhere between 6 lpa-9 lpa. the lowest salary package offered is around 3 lpa.

moksha-innovation is the annual fest and along with that we also have resonanz. moksha - innovation is held around march and resonant is held around october. the library is very well maintained and is stocked with books that are relevant. classrooms are top-notch. there are many sports events that take place like winter sports and annual sports meets.i have always been interested in design and that made me want to apply for design here. the faculty-student ratio is good. roughly one teacher per 30 students. the faculties are well qualified and experienced. terms exams and internals are held on time

[college infrastructure]: the college's infrastructure is pretty good. good, well maintained labs and classrooms. hostels could use for both rooms and wifi availability and better cleaned toilets. the academic blocks are well situated and clean. | [academics]: studying at vit chennai is quite enjoyable and competitive. most professors are very approachable and nice, and will help with most doubts and projects. the curriculum is rigorous, fostering innovation and critical thinking. | [placements]: the college offers rigorous training for any and all placements offers that a student could get. the training is rigorous and can span over multiple days. as a final year mech student i have not fully experienced the training as it starts a little later for me. | [campus life]: the best part of this campus is that we get full control over our teachers and time tables. however, there are a few over the top rules in place. going out as a hosteller is too much of a hassle and in time is 9 pm.
college_name: Vellore Institute of Technology Chennai Campus

review_text: [college infrastructure]: the college infrastructure is excellent. they offer all the facilities like unlimited wi-fi, a. c. classrooms, charging points everywhere and many more. labs are good and have every instruments required for the practicals. if you don't have a laptop in start, they will provide a computer to you at the time of programming classes. | [academics]: teachers are helpful, they will help you resolve any problem tat you have. most of the teachers are iit students and have done there ph.d. teaching is good but they pressurize you to do work and complete assignment. there is also a rule of 75% attendance which you have to follow otherwise you will get detained. | [placements]: placements are good as compared to other private engineering colleges but are not the best. many students got placed in mncs but the number is very low about 20-30 students, around 50% students are placed in companies which give package of above 6lakhs. the average package of the institute is around 4-5 lacs. the lowest package offered is 2.5 lacs and the highest is 29.3 lacs as per the university records.

review_text: [college infrastructure]: iitd has good infrastructure, facilities and equipment. there are numerous world-class labs, 5 badminton courts, many research buildings, large sports grounds, lot of eateries and messes, good connectivity to the city, good network connection. yes, the spaces are clean and the food is hygienic. | [academics]: i am studying computer science. the quality of teaching is amazing. i understand most of the concepts the professors teach. yes, the curriculum is updated, and the professors teach very up-to-date syllabus. 2 days after the landing of chandrayaan 2, there was a lesson on this in our ai course. | [placements]: the placement season was good. but a lot of great students did not land a job. the number of offers was quite less, and those in high-paying companies was much lesser. i am not aware of the highest international package, but the highest domestic package was a little above 1 cr. the placement process is smooth for. the ee, mnc, and cs students, and much harsh for the rest. | [campus life]: amazing campus life

i selected this course personally because of the family pressure plus societal pressure. there are so many claims from this course that mostly all students try to get this course no matter what. and there are so many jobs in it so i selected it. there is decent faculty present on the campus but very strict in every manner so not too good thing but some faculty members are good too. these are very qualified faculty members depending on what they do maybe best in their department of liking. some have a very easy way of teaching and a fun way and some have a very careless way of teaching just like typical teachers. term exams are moderate and sometimes a little hard depending on how the teacher was who was teaching and did he was teaching properly or not. passing is mostly easy every teacher passes the student but again mostly depends on the teacher as i said faculty is strict.there are two main fests one tech fest is known as moksha and another is a cultural fest known as resonance. moksha is usually conducted in the month of march and resonance is usually conducted in the month of october or november. there are plenty of books and journals available for students in the library and are quite easy to avail. there is so much exposure to other things than studying like all sports are present plus are being taught by the coaches and there are many societies which also help in extracurricular activities. there is an app present named nsutx made by students for the student profile and mainly attendance and there are a few pages after college on instagram handled by the students.

review_text: various on-campus internship opportunities are given to students like nvidea gives an internship with a stipend of 40k per month, similarly, amazon sde intern gives 80k per month, and various projects like weather forcast and ml learning projects such as fingerprint detector are used to clarify the tasks.exam occurs ever 6 months i.e semester-end exams, and exams are not too difficult, if student start studying one month prior to exam dates can easily pass the exam. the faculty is well qualified almost all the teachers are phd holders and they are very supportive, and overall experience is good.

[college infrastructure]: iit bombay has one of the best infrastructures all over india without any questions. all the departments are very well equipped and highly relevant research goes on in every lab. there is always constant addition and improvement to the infrastructure available. well equipped smart classrooms, a world class library, gymkhana facilities for every sport possible, wifi, hostels, messes, etc. all of which are well maintained | [academics]: im currently studying bs chemistry owing to my interest in doing research. quality of teaching is good. all professors are involved in research and hence are very updated in their fields. this gives us an opportunity to learn a lot. curriculum is constantly updated and revised keeping it relevant. | [placements]: iitb has one of the best placements in india. with the highest packages going in crores. but that is mostly restricted to people studying in the computer science department. otherwise the average package offered is around 15-20lpa, but it also depends on the market conditions. especially nowadays, with a recession in the job market, placements are getting tougher and more uncertain. | [campus life]: iitb has a huge green campus with a lake and a hill along with all the facilities one can ask for. the campus life is lively and happening and is a memorable one. fests and events are a regular thing. | [anything else]: i would request you to please not just come in for placements or the packages offered. come in to learn, study, research and do something in your field. money and everything else will eventually come.

[college infrastructure]: yes, nits are preferably one of the best engineering colleges of india. and yes, they have all the facilities required for a student starting from wifi to libraries and sports. the nit agartala labs and classroom are very well maintained. the library has almost 99% of all the books one needs. the hostel living space and the food is hygienic and the taste is average. | [academics]: i'm studying b.tech in chemical engineering. actually i wanted to be an engineer always so it was my passion and also want to make it my profession. the faculty is way too good and is very helpful. the best part is they always welcome the ideas of the students and gives their honest suggestions. well, i will say that yes the curriculum is updated and also there is a huge fest where there are robo fights and students innovate and make different electric or solar powered things. | [placements]: the quality of placement were very good and almost 90% of the students used to get placed. recently, there is a slight decline in the placement section. yet, the packages offered are very good and sufficient. a lot of them were placed at 10+ lakhs per annum while most of them were placed between 7-8 lakhs per annum. the placement process is lengthy like all engineering placements are. the teachers are very supportive and helps students a lot. | [campus life]: the campus life is great and vibrant. also the campus is very clean and most of it is newly built including the roads. a lot of workshops are happening these days. also there are a lot of cultural fest like "moksha" and also there is a robotics club which is really cool called the " asimov". so, overall the campus life is really great there.

review_text: [college infrastructure]: iiit bhopal?s infrastructure is decent but developing. classes run in manit?s campus, so facilities are shared. hostels are off-campus and average. labs and classrooms are fine, but no permanent campus yet. | [academics]: iiit bhopal?s academics are strong, with a good coding culture and regular contests. faculty is supportive, curriculum is industry-oriented, and placements are improving yearly. overall, academically reliable and growing. | [placements]: iiit bhopal offers steadily improving placements. cse/it see good packages, strong coding culture boosts results, and many students land roles in product-based companies. overall, placements are growing each year. | [campus life]: campus life at iiit bhopal is decent but limited due to the temporary manit campus. fests, clubs, and coding events are active, but hostel distance reduces involvement. overall: balanced but not very vibrant.

review_text: [college infrastructure]: the college campus is spacious and there are many buildings like management, gurukul buildings. there are libraries in each building. the campus is very hygienic and well maintained.our college provides language laboratories which is very helpful for us. | [academics]: i am studying in cse (2020-2024) and the quality of teaching is quite good. our college provides internship opportunities so that we can experience in real life. the teachers take a lot of extra classes for doubt clearing.the teachers as well as the seniors are very friendly and helpful. | [placements]: iem kolkata is known for its good placemnent and records 100% placement for cse and it department. renounwed companies like tcs, infosys, wipro, capgemeni, ibm, tech mahindra and so on come for picking talents with an average package of 10 to 12 lakhs per aannum | [campus life]: since i am a student of 1st year and due to lockdown we couldnot attend offline classes, but, the campus life is certainty joyous.there are a lot of clubs like rotaty club, innovation lab, quiz club, etc. and college organises a lots of fests.

review_text: [college infrastructure]: the college infrastructure is five-star, with top notch labs, a spacious campus and comfortable ladies rest area, and excellent facilities. the food can improve, but overall, its outstanding. the spacious campus is an advantage. | [academics]: the academics are exceptional with iit and anna university ph.d. professors. their subject knowledge, placement training and research motivation are top-notch. they are an inspiration always. they were approachable. | [placements]: the college excels in placements with major companies like tcs, cts, and infosys visiting regularly. tcs alone places over 600 students, prioritizing those with strong communication skills. the college stands out for its in-campus placement opportunities. | [campus life]: campus life was enriched by exceptionally supportive seniors from the second year onwards, helping with contests, presentations, and departmental activities. staff support was also stellar, especially placements, emergency handling, final year projects. this unforgettable experience made our college life truly special.

i got admission in this college on the basis of my jee mains rank, and obc home-state quota. electrical was the best branch i could get on the basis of my rank. i joined this college on 26th july. this institute was also very close to my hometown jamshedpur, which was one of the factors which led me to choose this college. also, being a deemed university it has excellent placement record.fee structure is a bit high, but there are several scholarship programs which lighten the burden of fees a little. the payment mode is online or cheque mode. the fee-breakdown is well structured and transparent. there are no additional fees/charges that had to be paid in order to secure an admission to your course.
