[college infrastructure]: you know my college is just great. i have completed by degree and lived the best years of my life. the infrastructure of iit kharagpur is very well constructed. we have classrooms, laboratories in the college. hostels amd mess is also present. | [academics]: the teachers i like most of them but some of them were quiet strict with me. but overall the academic facilities in the college are present. the curriculum is based on current technologies and we follow that only. | [placements]: in the placement drive students get high packages and even go abroad if they have the offer. i also got nice package and i am into corporate since 2 years gaining the experience you can also get the same if you work accordingly.

there are a lot of positivites about this college. there is lot of social exposure when one desires to get. there are also lot of foreign students which come from various parts of world and explore india and its diverse culture. there is lot of help for their accommodation. certain negatives are there is not much service for transportation by the college for its own students. entrance exam is held free of cost for the interested participants. the exam is based on science and maths. biology is optional. results are generally declared after a week. shortlisted students are then called for counseling and then are provided choices for various available streams according to their ranks.

[college infrastructure]: yes our college have all the necessary infrastructure from hostels to students to residential are to the staff. we are also provided with other facilities like gymkhana ground, a swimming pool and many indoor courts. college wi-fi is available through out the campus, the classrooms are enables with projector boards. we have a library with offline books and online materials. hostel area is maintained by the student bodies supervised by the staff of the college. | [academics]: i'm a cse undergrad and i'm more than satisfied by the curriculum of our department. we are mentored by world class professors who have years of experience. our curriculum is updated recently in 2013 but the course is dependent on the professor who undertook the course. | [placements]: the last placement season has seen some of the top companies like microsoft, adobe, goldman sachs, oracle etc. but the overall scene was not so good due to the pandemic. more than 90% of the participated students got placed in cse. average package offered is somewhere around 15lpa ctc. | [campus life]: best about the campus life is the friends. there are many clubs and activities one can engage in college. everyone is super friendly in college. campus is located beside a lake and a hill. there were leopard sighting almost every year. with out the sighting of the leopard king/queen, the college life isn't complete.

[college infrastructure]: the college has good basic infrastructure required for a student?s education life the campus is clean and fresh with a good atmosphere for students abundant resources but there is still scope for improvement | [academics]: i?m studying cse 2nd year the teaching quality is good enough teachers are interactive the curriculum has been updated according to recent trends in jobs the emphasis is also given on communication and skill set | [placements]: the quality of placement is decent enough a lot of good companies show up to the clg but at the end of the day it all comes down to the students a good amount of students gets placed the package offered is also decent enough to survive | [campus life]: campus life is amazing it?s very lively multiple activities to engage students the campus is very vast and is a safe place the extracurriculars are also good sports is also fine and encouraged by staff

fees are also fine and comparable to iits. the fee hike is an issue as they increase by 10% every year which is a thing to be thought upon. but college is fine and worth spending money on. you can have scholarships if your parents earn less, or you belong to sc, or st category.campus life is good. there are a good amount of girls. moksha is an annual fest and resonant is a tech fest both the fest are great. the library had got a sufficient amount of books. apj halls have the best classroom facilities.

i get this course on the basis of my merit (rank in the entrance examination) so, i did choose it. the student ratio in my class is boy: girl is 4:1. teachers are good, but you will have to put in the effort from your side as well to excel in your studies, as i said this college curriculum is a bit strict, you have to do and complete everything within a given deadline. there are ct(class tests), quizzes, mid semester, practicals, and then end semester examinations.the fee structure variates and increases every year, it was 2,06,000p. a last year, this year it was 2,19,000pa scholarships. yeah, there are many, you get that on the basis of your financial background, / your merit chola. there are many like district(merit cum means scholarship) cvpvsk provided by nsut or through nsp (national srship portal) etc.

[college infrastructure]: college infrastructure is good, it includes well equipped libraries, wifi facility, computer labs, canteen, hostel, clean classrooms and other facilities. campus has clean and green environment with a big ground. | [academics]: the teachers were knowledgeable but management is not cooperative they should focus more on club activities rather the college facilities. otherwise faculties of my college were good and friendly nature. | [placements]: placement opportunities and internship opportunities of our college is good even for ug course also, one can get a good exposure of working while studying. as only 60-70% students got intership from the college. companies like tcs, wipro, cts visit our college for recruitment.

[college infrastructure]: good college infrastructure nice clean bathrooms and staffs are always cleaning the floors in the entire building in the college campus and also a large cafeteria space in the university campus for large students | [academics]: average academics studies but very good and friendly faculties who always helps the students in their studies and also tries to give to external knowledge as well which helps them in the coming future. | [placements]: very good placement records holder for many years provides placement opportunity for every students the college tries to give placement to the students by providing them many skill development courses.

[college infrastructure]: there are classrooms, wi-fi, labs, and canteens. the department building seems quite and the infrastructure is a bit outdated; otherwise, it is good. the boys hostels are not good with poor infrastructure and limited space but the newer ones are nice.food quality also too good. | [academics]: personally, i do like chemical core, but some professors are really helpful. the course curriculum is better,and the department council is trying a lot to make the students industry-ready. exams are easy, at least for me. the grading is absolutely correct. | [placements]: 80% of students were placed in this course. the highest might be 24 lpa, and the lowest around 12?13 lpa. the top company for this course is hul. around 50% get internships in random companies and just 1 or 2 in hul. the top roles are r&d, research internships,etc.

if you get under category 1 it will cost you 5lakhs just for the tuition fee. whereas for btech it will cost you 8 lakhs for 4 years. for the remaining categories, it will cost more than that, depending upon the category you get. there is a merit scholarship. i don't know about it. you will get paid internship from your prefinal year as per knowledge.campus placements are good in our college. recently, 2 students from the btech cse department of the 2023 outgoing batch got a pre-placement-offer of 1crore ctc from motor. the eligibility for sitting in placements is for prefinal year and final year students. and for internships, it depends on the sector you have joined.

[college infrastructure]: most of the building are newly constructed such as academic block, student activity centre, 3 new boys hostel, new playgrounds, new library, new computer labs equipped with world class facilities. it have best infrastructure in iiit. | [academics]: academics are closely related to what is in iit kanpur. hence more emphasis on practical knowledge and project works is given by professor rather then just theory and examination. professor used practical expertise in teaching thus giving students a better idea of sub. | [placements]: cse and ece students are placed 100% as coding culture is highly prevalent in college. minimum package is rs 5 lakh per annum and max is 25 lakh per annum. it is best in comparison to new nits and iit too. | [campus life]: best part is natural scenery as it situated is middle of forest thus a giving always students a fresh view... and makes more memorable memories.
college_name: PDPM Indian Institute of Information Technology Design and Manufacturing Jabalpur

review_text: the annual fest is riviera and the tech fest is gravitas. gravitas is the annual cultural fest with a footfall of 20k students from across the south. celebrities are invited to perform and facilitate the event. gravitas is during winter and riviera is during feb march window one of the best libraries with n number of books to borrow, it is available for everyone. sports facilities are available for both boys and girls on either side of the campus which include a swimming gym etc.there are a sufficient amount of proficient faculties in our discipline and they are really good at teaching aspects. students to teacher ratios are far better than any and are fair. the faculties are well qualified and they teach us more than just subjects, they also regularly entertain us to do projects under them.

[college infrastructure]: the lovely professional university is equipped with the modern day facilities like computerized systems laboratories libraries auditoriums the infrastructure is also among the best in private college of punjab | [academics]: the mechanical academics of lovely professional university phagwara was among top of all departments with well framed curriculum and extracurricular activities aligned with course syllabus and academics. | [placements]: the university offers top placement in the private college of punjab and north india with a dedicated centralized placement cell the college attracts top automobile and mechanical multinational corporations

[college infrastructure]: since we entered college during the pandemic, we didn't get to visit our college that often. we visited it a few times and the campus was very spacious. hope we get to attend classes in college very soon! | [academics]: we have entered college during the pandemic and classes have continued in online mode. all the faculties have done their best in making us understand the concepts in the best way possible. all the classes are held on time. the interaction between students and teachers have also continued through whatsapp as well as calls. overall had a great learning session. | [placements]: since i am in first year, i don't have much information regarding this, but from my seniors, i've heard that the placements are really great and almost everyone got placed even during the pandemic. so you get the idea. | [campus life]: didn't get to experience campus life so far but hoping to enjoy it very soon. as i've heard, there are numerous numbers of activities taking place in college. the teachers are friendly and helpful as well. the location is also very safe.
college_name: Institute of Engineering and Management Kolkata

review_text: [college infrastructure]: infrastructure is good , all facilities are provided laboratories are well equipped with all the facilities, classroom are perfect for concentrative study , hostels are ideal with clean water and food. | [academics]: we study exactly what we should study , curriculum is best with all the required courses and knowledge, which helps us transform into a better engineer , well updated and makes us perfectly job ready . | [placements]: our college produces the best engineers which companies demand for and therefore it has the best placement offers , almost all the students gets placements with awesome packages and best average ever .
college_name: Indian Institute of Information Technology Kota

review_text: [college infrastructure]: yes ,institute has well developed infrastructure, facilities and well equipped. well equipped classrooms, properly maintained laboratories, large digital library containing books of almost all interests. | [academics]: i am pursuing chemical engineering. teaching as well as non teaching staff all are very polite and humble. also the quality of education that is provided here is also worth the name of nit. curriculum is updated as required. | [placements]: talking about chemical engineering branch placement are good but not as great as other branches like cs, ece etc. highest salary package always goes with computer science engineering branch. on campus placements amd internships are doing good. | [campus life]: being the campus inside main city, as a majority of institutes are situated outside city ,we enjoy a lot, having dinners, hanging out anytime. also being a tourist place ,there are many places to explore.
college_name: Malaviya National Institute of Technology Jaipur

review_text: the course of the college is very good. i choose this course because i liked this course and i know a senior from before who said that the faculty members of this course are very good. the faculty: student ratio is 15:1.the semester exams are taken every six months and one class test exam is one or two months before the semester.the fees structure of the college is very convenient it is around four to four and a half lakhs for a complete course and this fee is very nicely structured in eight semesters, there are many scholarships also that the college approves.

[college infrastructure]: srm ncr ghaziabad has modern classrooms, well-equipped labs, sports facilities, and a library, offering a clean, green, and student-friendly campus environment. overall srm ncr ghaziabad has good infrastructure. | [academics]: srm ncr ghaziabad offers quality education with experienced faculty, updated curriculum, and practical learning opportunities. regular workshops, seminars, and projects ensure students gain both theoretical knowledge and industry relevant skills. | [placements]: srm ncr ghaziabad has a dedicated placement cell that actively connects students with top recruiters across it, management, and engineering sectors. regular training sessions, mock interviews and industry interactions prepare students well, resulting in consistent placement opportunities and good average packages. | [campus life]: camous life at srmncr ghaziabad is vibrant and engaging, with numerous clubs, events, and cultural fests. students enjoy a balanced mix of academics, sports and extracurricular activities, fostering friendships, personal growth, and a sense of community on campus. | [anything else]: srm ncr ghaziabad offers a holistic experience with quality education, modern infrastructure, and a supportive campus environment. faculty are approachable, and the campus encourages innovation, extracurricular activitites and sports. regular industry interactions, workshops, and events ensure overall student deployment, making it a well-wounded choice for academics and personal growth. the institution provides an all-round experience combining academics, infrastructure, and campus life.
college_name: SRM Institute of Science and Technology NCR Campus Ghaziabad

review_text: the course is very interesting according to me as you can get good opportunities of doing something big in life. the faculty also teaches with not full maximum focus and attention. the teachers are very friendly here. the teachers are highly qualified. for example, our professor mr.himanshu mittal has done his graduation from iit delhi.the exam schedule is a bit hectic but easy to passmany fests are held twice a year like a cop,optica, etc. the fest is awesome and you can get a good amount of knowledge in a very fun and entertaining way. the classes here are fully ac and teachers use instruments like smart class as well. my campus has a basketball court, 6 badminton courts, a cricket field with nets fitted, and a cemented volleyball court.
college_name: Jaypee Institute of Information Technology University - [JIIT]

review_text: pros/cons: exposure along with international exposure via hackathons, courses and exchange programs. cultural and club activities. exposure through vast amount of clubs present on campus varying from technical to non technical backgrounds. no attendance policy and flexibility of courses one can take up. the amount of opportunities provided for pharmacy students including placements and other opportunities. stiff and close minded faculty in some departments. location of the campus (pilani). extreme heat and extreme cold, hostels rooms are not equipped with acs. | placement experience: the placements in my college are excellent for tech and other domains, however, in terms of my own degree, ie b.pharmacy, significant direct placement opportunities in core pharmacy are not available. the college is lacking in this respect, even in terms of summer training and opportunities, pharmacy students do not get much opportunity. this is prevelant even for pharm tech or other related fields. they have to look for other domains for placements (finance, data science, consulting etc). students can also get a ppo from ps2 opportunities. approx 70-80% people are placed, in terms of pharma, only 30-40% people are placed.

[college infrastructure]: great. all labs and libraries are well equipped with state of the art facilities. the food in all hostels do not taste that great, specially students from states other than west bengal do not like it much, but it is healthy and nutritious. wifi is not available everywhere in hostel rooms, but it is available and is very fast in the academic area. the gymkhana is also there to cater to the needs of sports lovers. the greenery all around is a treat to our eyes. | [academics]: the standards are, as expected, quite high, and there is a lot of competition here. the grading system though has room for improvement, but professors are excellent, and students are outstanding. research facilities are also available for prospective students. | [placements]: each year various companies, both domestic and foreign come to take students from our institute for placements, the interview process is rigorous and tough, but most students make it. the highest package offered is always in crores, and the cdc helps students in building their resumes and supports students throughout.

classrooms here are world-class. it's an honor studying here. antaragni the cultural fest of iit kanpur is the world s largest. techkriti is a technical fest. college life here is a dream for many. iit kanpur has all the facilities for all the sports existing.the fee structure is according to the class you are in. if parental income is less than 1 lakh fee is about 18k in cash for a semester, in case of more than 1 lakh and below 5 lakh fee is about 33kand in other cases the fee is 1 lakh per semester.
college_name: IIT Kanpur - Indian Institute of Technology - [IITK]

review_text: [college infrastructure]: pes university despite a small campus has a top-notch infrastructure. with various academic blocks/ departments its provides a wholesome experience. labs are well equipt, the library is well maintained. the sports complex, gym are facilities available on campus. classrooms are well maintained. so overall pes provides a great campus life. | [academics]: pes university is a highly academically oriented college. the syllabus per course is designed by experienced faculties, so, therefore, we follow a completely different syllabus than other state colleges here. the syllabus gets updated every 2 years i suppose, quality of teaching also has drastically ahead of many colleges. with an online student study portal, recorded classes, slides, course contents, students will not find it difficult to cope up here. | [placements]: pes university is known for its outstanding placement record. the placement cell here provides internships and placements. the cse department bags the best placements record with various product-based to startups. this is followed by branches like ece, eee where students get to pick core companies or explore the software side. this is followed by mechanical-civil branches where students end up with tire 2 jobs. the avg package is around 10lpa. pes university provides a good return on investment.

[college infrastructure]: the infrastructure is amazing, they have all the facilities and equipments that a student needs. the laboratories are fully equipped with good quality instruments. sport centre is very beautiful and they have separate places for different games, everything is arranged very well. | [academics]: the academics is good here, the professor's and all the faculty is very cooperative and supportive here. they all are like a family here and they are ready to hear and help you out with each and every problem either it's related to studies or any other personal issue you can share with them. | [placements]: placement will be given depending upon your performance, personality and the the knowledge you have. if you are great in your work you will surely be placed in a good company and with a decent pakacge too. now the placement is solely dependent on how serious you are when it comes to your work | [campus life]: speaking from my heart, it's the happiest time of my life. great friends and teachers, they here are a family. always so supportive, caring, loving and cooperative. these are the best days of my life. living my life to the fullest
college_name: Kalinga Institute of Industrial Technology Bhubaneswar

review_text: after 7 sem interview are there. iit delhi average pakage for btech is 13 lac for dual degree it is 15 lac highly paid companies like amazon, google etc ar ethere for interview internship not provided but we can do research under professor after research professor give desidn credits.two exam are there jee main and jee advanced. if you qualified in jee main then you are eligible for jee advanced. after cracking jee advanced we are eligible to take admission in iit. then there is counselling for variois iits and branchs.
college_name: IIT Delhi - Indian Institute of Technology [IITD]

review_text: [college infrastructure]: uiet is a decent college with really old infrastructure but it comes under panjab university which is really well built.hostels are alloted based on your rank.library of uiet is not that good but as the college comes under panjab university therefore you have access to ac joshi library which is pretty decent. | [academics]: course content is at par with some of the most reputed iits ,but faculty isn't capable enough to teach them correctly .but there are some exceptions everywhere , college has some very good and helpful teachers. | [placements]: placement mainly depends on your branch .if you are from cse or it department chances are you will be placed.for other branches placements are not that good but the college is trying its best to improve placements and in the recent years placements were pretty decent for other branches also but the average package is not good because most of the students are recruited by mass recruiters like infosys
college_name: University Institute of Engineering and Technology Panjab University Chandigarh

review_text: pros/cons: serene environment and some good proffessors everything except the above mentioned things. | placement experience: placement scenario of college is not so good. very less known company visit the college. most roles are offered for business development executive. generally students prepare for gate. if a student is coming just for the sake of degree then this college is best.
college_name: National Institute of Technology - [NIT], Papum Pare

review_text: [college infrastructure]: the hostel facility till 2023 april is somewhat temporary based and not up to the mark but while shifting to the new campus it's a very clear and neat ambience with full wi-fi and cooling facilities good room facilities and mess things which are up to the mark for an iit.apart from this, we have 2 canteens on campus that provide very good food at decent prices. we have a health care centre, and doctors visit there everyday. facilities for many games like table-tennis, badminton, cricket, football and athletics are available. | [academics]: teachers are highly qualified with expertise in their domains. everyone has a ph.d. degree from well-known institutions, both indigenous and abroad. they are available all the time for our help. the course curriculum is planned thoughtfully to make the students industry-ready. all the professors at iit bhilai are highly qualified and have a phd degree from top universities in the world. courses offered at iit bhilai are very good and relevant. courses are taught by highly qualified professors, and there are also separate tutorial classes for each course in a week. | [placements]: the highest salary package offered was 24 lpa last year, and the average salary package offered was 11 lpa. top recruiters are microsoft, bosch, deloitte, samsung, etc. around 49% of the students got internships in various companies like bosch. placement statistics at iit bhilai in the cse branch are quite well.we also got placements in other iits under other those professors who are from iits and nits. i don't know much about top roles offered in our course.

[college infrastructure]: it has one of the finest infrastructure in the india with the best campus life! it has big and spacious buildings with proper ventilation, power back up and electronic appliances. each building has lifts and maintained properly. | [academics]: lecturers and professors are extremely knowledgeable and experienced with high educational qualification. that certainly let's students get the best academic experience. the teachers use innovative and interactive sessions to conduct classes. | [placements]: i have not yet been to placement yet soo i may not be the right person to review this. but what i've heard is it has some great placement opportunities for the students. and have tieups with great company

[college infrastructure]: we have good infrastructure in our college and basic facilities just like a football ground badminton court basketball court handball and you also have a swimming pool and other coaches they used to teachers how to play the game | [academics]: we have a great professor and highly qualified and they are very supportive but sometime they don't use to come to our class instant of them phd scholars which are also very much knowledgeable and supportive and their future push usha | [placements]: wipro tcs infosys capgemini tech mahindra microsoft amazon google meso lenskart flipkart cardekho.com policybazaar magicbric.com ola uber century yamaha hero honda maruti suzuki tata motors this company used to visit at nit kurukshetra

[college infrastructure]: it has pretty decent infrastructure. we have all the necessity amenities nearby, hence the infrastructure complements the busy student life of engineering. we have domino's in the campus, also we have in campus gym and salon. | [academics]: pretty decent academics. equipped to the new curriculum. being a civil engineering student which is core engineering course we were also being taught about coding and other such new and upcoming things. | [placements]: very good placement opportunities. each student is handpicked and trained to get in their best for. the support from the pat is also tremendous. its also nice to see various teachers helping you get in the best shape.
college_name: Vellore Institute of Technology Chennai Campus

review_text: [college infrastructure]: the college does not have its own campus,so we are using all the facilities of mnit jaipur.all the labs are wi-fi enabled and air conditioned.allbthe facilities provided by the college are very good.the food served to the students is good,but sometimes. | [academics]: the course curriculum of our college is best,and up to date.teachers are very helpful.the course curriculum is very relevant and is very helpful for the students in industry or company work.all the teachers are highly qualified. | [placements]: about 90% of the students got placed at our college.the highest salary offered was 30lakhs and average 10lakhs.the college offers only two course cse and ece and majorly focusses on coding skills.5 students got internship at amazon.
college_name: Indian Institute of Information Technology Kota

review_text: [college infrastructure]: college infrastructure is pretty poor, specially the boys hostels. i wonder there will come a time when the hostels will fall upon us. the hostels are not really worth living in, very unhygienic with dogs littering all around the hostels. | [academics]: i am studying mechanical engineering because i have an interest on the subject. however, our curriculum is not updated according to the present requirements of the industry. many of the softwares are not taught in college and we are asked to learn it from somewhere else. | [placements]: placements are pretty decent with cst, it, etc, min getting around 80% to 100% placement. however, the core departments like mechanical, electrical have around 70% to 75% placements. civil has even less, around 60%. metallurgy and aerospace varies from year to year. this year the highest salary was offered by microsoft of 36 lpa.
college_name: Indian Institute of Engineering Science and Technology Shibpur

review_text: this course piqued my interest and also this course is in large demand. the faculty-student ratio is ok. the faculty here put in the effort to teach and are highly qualified. there are two internal exams and one sem end exam. they are relatively easy to pass.it is a little costly obviously as it is a private college but the fee structure depends upon your rank in the entrance exam. scholarships are provided to those who can't really afford to study in the institute and to those who natively belong to the state.

[college infrastructure]: good infrastructure.well maintained and there is 7 girls hostel and 6 boyes hostel.all equipment that is needed for hotel management is provided wifi network is speed slow.living sapaxr to s clean and food quality is also good. | [academics]: i am pursuing bachelor's of hotel management it is good and good chance of fet placed in abroad also . the teaching quality of staff is good and understandable. teacher also provide ppt for exams .all course block has their own laibary and also have central laibary for the university | [placements]: in the university there is good chance of getting placed. foreign company is also came for the placement.one of the highest package of last year is 2 cr and the minimum package is 30 lpa . the percentage of getting placed is 70%. | [anything else]: good experience in the university

[college infrastructure]: the newly constructed lecture theaters and labs are amazing with the best facilities but are usually for the freshers. rest of them have their classes in pother blocks which are without a/c's otherwise they are also fine. | [academics]: almost all the faculties are well experienced in their fields, although there still few which i feel are not up to the mark. there is not much update in the curriculum but still this year new software's were being taught unlike previous years | [placements]: there is always lack of companies for placement in civil branch and here also it is the same case. placements are not even 50% for civil branch and i haven't seen big companies coming in this college.
college_name: Thapar Institute of Engineering and Technology Patiala

review_text: there is gravitas, rivera. there are very great. these are conducted like gravitas is in october or november and rivera is in january or february. all types are available there in the library. in the lab class, ac is present but in normal classes no ac is there but there is a projector so faculty can teach you. there are clubs and chapters present like the dance club, leo club, and tech technical clubs are also present.reddy's, bosch, deloitte, morgan stanley, qualcomm, ashok leyland, honda, ford, global analytics, tcs, cognizant, accenture, wipro, and infosys among others, actively take part in the placement and hiring processes with vit. the highest and average package offered during vit vellore placements 2022 stood at inr 102 crore per annum and inr 8.19 lpa.

[college infrastructure]: the college has all the necessary infrastructure . the classrooms, sports complex, gym are fully equipped. mess food is par with occasional good days. the lectures are mostly taken through projectors. | [academics]: i am pursuing btech, computer science, and engineering. the college teaching prepares the student enough to go and explore things by themselves. the curriculum is one of the best in india. the academic departments also take good steps to make sure the students are industry ready | [placements]: the average package of the college has seen a constant rise since the first batch and is set to go even higher. there have been some outstanding off-campus placements in the recent batches too. you can expect the placement numbers to increase exponentially for the next few years

my course is b.tech in mechanical engineering, i choose this course because i have an interest in electrical automobiles, faculty is pretty here with a ratio of approx. 1:11, faculty members are of post greater or equal to assistant professors and professors, they have pretty good teaching techniques with practical teaching methods, term exams are approx. every two months and the difficulty level is moderate. class size: 120 course fees: inr 396000the campus life is pretty good at this college. the college organizes some fest or seminars or webinars regularly. the students are provided by the library and medical facilities on campus. also, there is a bank located inside the campus. for extracurricular activities, there are 5 clubs in the college. these clubs take the responsibility to make interaction and college life more interesting by continuously involving students in various activities

[college infrastructure]: the campus is about 300 accer and the mess food is really nice the hostel facility is also very good the staff is really very good and they help us a lot and the teaching is really good it's around 4lakh per annum looks like a bit high but worthy | [academics]: the staff is really very good and they help us a lot and the teaching is really good the campus is about 300 accer and the mess food is really nice the hostel facility is also very good really good placements and the average packege is about 9 lakhs | [placements]: really good placements and the average packege is about 9 lakhsthe staff is really very good and they help us a lot and the teaching is really good the campus is about 300 accer and the mess food is really nice the hostel facility is also very good | [campus life]: really good

[college infrastructure]: overall college infrastructure is really good , transport facility is easily available here ,availability of water supply is really good , also climate conditions are really good here specially in winters | [academics]: overall academics is outstanding here. not only core b tech specialisations are good but other courses such as mba, msc, mtech are providing a understandable and meaningful knowledge to all undergraduating and postgraduating students | [placements]: overall placements in the campus is on average if we talk about specialisation in mba. as it is a btech based college so mostly technical companies hire undergraduates . but it can improved if management pays more attention to other departments | [campus life]: campus life is outstanding , weather conditions are really good, food facilities is quite good, cafes, food corners are outstanding here , sports facilities are all available here , night life is good here.

[college infrastructure]: it has an ok ish infrastructure but really good with the greenery part. the infrastruncture for certain branches are really showing it's age and although there are constructions for it, let us just say that it is a bit old | [academics]: great for people who really want to study and explore suff, since it has a really strong aluminus network, it provides a great platform for aspiring students to achieve something and create their own niche | [placements]: great placement opportunities are there in the college. if you dont want to go for placements then the college provides pretty huge incentives for budding startups and provides an office space too for that. | [campus life]: great for exploring various fields and stuff
college_name: Dayananda Sagar College of Engineering Bangalore

review_text: [college infrastructure]: labs having extensive facilities, extensive library, vibrant hostels, green campus for holistic learning. campus provides us sports facilities, also shopping complex and canteen is there. overall good. | [academics]: college provide us a holistic environment to learn new things and there are excellent faculties to guide us through that. research facilities are provided to students and you can get into interdisciplinary things also | [placements]: here in geu campus placements are good. for bachelors they provide us internship and later that gets converted to ppo. as many top notch company visit our campus so it's a great place to kick start your career | [campus life]: the best features of the college is that we had snacks area everywhere in the college and a very big food court area. we had various clubs in which the students can engage and come up with their ideas. it is a very safe location to study

[college infrastructure]: vit vellore has world-class infrastructure that truly matches global standards. the campus is huge, clean, and green with excellent facilities. classrooms are modern, air-conditioned, and equipped with smart boards. the central library is one of the best in the country, with thousands of books, digital resources, and 24/7 access during exams. the labs are state-of-the-art, especially for engineering and biotechnology courses. hostel facilities are available for both boys and girls, with different options (ac/non-ac, single/double/triple sharing). food courts serve a variety of cuisines, and there are multiple cafeterias and convenience stores. wi-fi is available across the campus and hostels. | [academics]: vit follows a fully flexible credit system (ffcs), which allows students to choose their subjects, slots, and even faculty ? a unique advantage. i am pursuing [e.g., b.tech in computer science engineering], and the curriculum is frequently updated based on industry needs. professors are well-qualified and supportive, although the teaching quality may vary from faculty to faculty. there is a strong focus on project-based learning, research, and real-time application. students are encouraged to do online courses (nptel, coursera), take up internships, and participate in hackathons and coding competitions. | [placements]: placements at vit vellore are excellent, especially for cse and related branches. companies like microsoft, amazon, de shaw, qualcomm, tcs digital, and cognizant come for recruitment. in recent years, the highest package has gone above ?50 lpa (by microsoft), and the average for cse is around ?7?8 lpa. mass recruiters offer packages around ?3.5?4.5 lpa. the placement cell conducts pre-placement training for aptitude, technical, and communication skills. there are good internship opportunities from the third year onwards, and vit has strong industry tie-ups. | [campus life]: campus life at vit is vibrant and diverse. there are over 100 student clubs for technical, cultural, music, dance, drama, robotics, and more. fests like riviera (cultural fest) and gravitas (technical fest) are massive and attract participants nationwide. the student crowd is very diverse, with students from all over india and even abroad. the atmosphere is safe and welcoming, and there are medical facilities, shuttle services, and emergency support. there?s always something happening on campus, making life at vit exciting and memorable. | [anything else]: good college

[college infrastructure]: collage infrasrtucture is so big as it consists of huge buildings, gardens, some fountains, soprts activities like fotball, poll table, table tennis, badminton court, tennis court, cricket grounds, basketball and etc. there is a library where systems are also being installed for us. | [academics]: academics are good as teachers are well qualified and well trained and they know how to handle with each and every student . the are our mentors and they always try to help students as much as they can. thats why teachers are best frinds of students here. | [placements]: placements are above average. average package is of 4-5 lacks per annum by mass recruiting companies like tcs, tech m, and many other but some companies also offer a high package of even 15-20 lacks per annum but that are limited to students because they take only few students. | [campus life]: outstanding life at chitkara

review_text: my college life is good in sharda because i have met my seniors and different type of students from different fields i learned a lot of things and the sports rooms are well furnished and available for all the games. there are many clubs as we met many stars from india.the fee structure as the same as all of the colleges and also they provide a scholarship who have more than 85% and also they provide a good internship and good placement which gave a good rate of interest as compared to other colleges.

[college infrastructure]: our college situated in the heart of the city,near brahmaputra river , our college provides many engineering courses. large lecture halls, labs, a sizable library, and sports facilities are among the facilities. | [academics]: the college curriculum is very traditional, but efforts have been made in recent years. students can also participate in research projects, albeit these are more accessible to upper level students... | [placements]: some companies, such as wipro, tcs,capgemini and indian oil, l&t visit the campus for recruitment. placement rates vary by branch, and courses with core engineering departments typically performing better. | [campus life]: our college campus located near a very beautiful river, it is a lively campus including clubs and societies.

the course curriculum is very easy, just be continuous with your studies and you can achieve a great cgpa. moreover there are only 4 classes on a regular day (3days a week) whereas we have 5 classes on the other 2 days, so we get enough time with our studies and other hobbies.yes. our college provides us internships, even students from the 1st year get many chances to do internships during holidays. moreover our college has a separate placement cell which provides internships as well as placements in very reputated companies.

our college holds a good placement and internship record also. this year, till now highest package has been above 40 lpa by google. google has hired 3 students. other than google, students are placed in microsoft, oracle, l&t, amazon, flipkart, facebook, cesc, directi, ibm, infosys and many more. in terms of internship, our students have been taken by microsoft, l&t, cesc and so on.the course structure of iiest is well focused. in first year, students of all branches have the same syllabus. because there is a option for branch change after first year on the basis of first year result. from second year onwards, students study in their own field only. in each year 4 exams are conducted including 2 endsems and 2 midsems.

review_text: one of the greatest cultural and management fests in entire northeast india in which students from all other iits and nits and also from top management colleges participate and the participation count is around 30k & name of the techno-management feast is celesta which is also one of the greatest techno-management fests in entire northeast india, there is a library inside the campus where you will get all the good books and journals which are published around the world in digital or hard copy format, all the classroom are equipped with modern technology like ac, projector for displaying slides, animation, etc shown by the instructor, talking about sports facilities inside campus there is football ground, cricket ground, indoor badminton court, table tennis court, basketball court, lawn tennis court and swimming pool is under constructionas in iits all iits follows similar fee structure and cost of completing a degree from here is around 10-12lakhs for four years also scholarship was provided by the central government for whom whose family income is below 1lakh get full tuition fee wavier and those whose family income is between 1-5lakhs will get 1/3 of full tuition fee wavier, along with that several other scholarships is also available form government scheme(nsp) or private scheme from a different private organisation like reliance foundation, etc, also from mcm scheme 1000 also provided monthly to the student of top 10 per cent as pocket money also there are two banks in campus from where you can easily get education loan as financial assistance overall after getting admission you will not face any difficulty in paying your tuition fee.

good tecahing staff, in this era, we, the students of engineering colleges respect teachers who give good grades even if they can???t teach properly rather than the ones who teach well and give relatively bad grades. little do engineering students actually want to learn - the sole motive is to get a good pointer by hook or by crook (for 90% of the students). yes, i fall in this category too. hence, i???m not the best person to answer your question. also, the qualities of a good teacher varies from student to student. it???s subjective. good package nearest to my home fees reasonable motilal nehru national institute of technology, allahabad offers under graduate, post graduate, doctorate programs. the fee structure for major courses is mentioned below: the ph. d. course fee at motilal nehru national institute of technology is inr 15000 per annum. the course fee for all the specializations of m. tech is inr 24, 000 per annum. the course fee for all the specialization of b. tech/ b. arch is inr 1, 25, 000 per annum.

review_text: pros/cons: the campus is full of greenery with 2 lakes . there's a 24/7 centeral library with many books and some ac reading rooms all daily life goods are available within the campus the placement is low both in terms of package and ratio the adminstration is not so supportive for sports competitions the price of daily goods are also bit high inside the campus | course curriculum overview: the course curriculum is very relevant and is different for different branches according to their needs. i was interested in civil engineering and chose the course and find the curriculum intersting and relevant for me . the curriculum offers subject which are important for real world applications, like in civil engineering it's offers subjects like building construction, solid mechanics, fluid mechanics, material testing, serving, etc. the course curriculum is very good but the teaching methods needs improvement like more digitalization . the exams frequency and timings are neither too late nor too early, they are perfectly planned and executed.

from the sixth semester, students can go for the placement drives eligibility criteria are set by the companies such as an 8 cgpa in overall, and then some written examination is taken to proceed for an interview. 90% of students get a good package. the rest of the students go for a master's degree in this field. i will be going for masters after my bachelor's degree.i choose this course as i wanted to make my career in computer science background. the college is literally amazing the student to faculty ratio is like 2:100 and the 2 professors which teach are amazing and highly qualified. exams are withing short span of time and not too difficult to clear just students can easily clear by concentrating in exam days.

review_text: there are different kinds of fests conducted in our college like projects fests, annual fests, cultural fests like furore square, and ethnic day fests and tech fests. and every saturday one cultura is held in our college. there is a specific building for library where you can find any journals and books which you want. you can find a basketball court, squash court, volleyball court, football court, tennis court, and other indoor courts inside the campus. many social groups and clubs are there inside the campus like iedc, lenz club, pitchers desk, etc.i choose the eee branch because dsce gives more opportunities to their students for research and development and the placement for eee is also good. the course syllabus will be updated as per the schedule. and university provides enough industrial exposure. faculty members are experienced and one more thing if you will argue with any teacher they will become too bad for you. and the student ratio is 40:1. there will be three internal before every semester end exam and if will study before the exam you can pass with a good number of marks.

i have chosen this course to my interest. the interaction between faculty and students is absolutely good. teaching will be the same as in all engineering colleges but the placements are good to achieve. for every 5 months, there will be term exams and if you study well, you can easily score good marks.it will be almost 4 lakhs per annum including hostel, mess, and course fee and other expenses are not included. you can even get education loans for your study. the fees should be paid by 1 semester itself. your attendance will not be marked until you pay your fees.

a lot of alumni networks are almost as old as their alma maters. at the start, most of these associations were entirely voluntary, supported solely by individual alumni. volunteers maintained mailing lists, collected dues to support activities, produced publications, organized events, and annual meetings. the world of alumni relations has come a long way since its inception in the early eighteenth-century. they became a vital part of most of the educational institutions now thanks to the efforts of many outstanding professionals in alumni relations. a good alumni network benefits the institution, current students, and as well as its alumni. it is a win-win situation for everyone. i would like to conclude by saying that they are genuinely very helpful.maintaining a positive relationship among students, teachers and the administrators creates a harmonious learning environment. when students are nurtured in such surroundings, they are likely to increase their intellectual accomplishments and learn more effectively. cooperative engagement: encourage cooperation and mutual support by getting learners to study collaboratively. when learners study in a group, they share their ideas and knowledge to complete an assignment. support from the peer group also helps to boost learners??? confidence. unlike learning in isolation where discouragement or a sense of hopelessness may set in, learning becomes more enjoyable when friends are able to help or motivate one another.
