review_text: [college infrastructure]: it has one of the best infrastucture . the facilities class room and labs provides are really good enough. and most importantly they are well managed. we can access our campus wifi in all over the campus. we should mention about the library . the library is full of facilities . we can get any book from the library.it has online research also . | [academics]: i am doing b.tec c.s.e. from the very beginning of my student life i was fond of technology and computer which is the main reason behind taking this degree. the teacher of lpu is really good and they really helpful. the give many information also which is really important for our career. | [placements]: near 500 company come in the campus every for students placement . most of them are very well known companies and they offer good package . average salary offered by the company is 4-5 lacs every student get placement google and microsoft also. | [campus life]: it's one of the largest university in india . and every year any functions are held in the campus.and concerts and many celebrities are also visit the campus continiouly . the natural view of the campus is really amazing .

[college infrastructure]: lpu have good infrastructure and good facilities for student. and the equipment which is very useful for student.the classroom and laboratories are well decorated. whole university cover a wifi network which is provide university itself. the classroom and hostels rooms are clean. and the food are also hygienic. | [academics]: i am persuing my b.tech in civil engineering. i have passion about my subject. and the quality of teaching is good. and the uni curriculum is update. i think if i have skill and academic study i can find a good job. | [placements]: the placement quality of lpu is good. percentage of placements is 100% in respective department. somedays ago one student got a job in microsoft company. the package was rs 42 lac. yes our college is very supportive. | [campus life]: lpu campus is the largest campus in all over india. they have many activities to do. such as one world,one india etc. student are directly participate on this activity. the teachers are very friendly and helpful. the location of university is situated a good place. and it's safe for us.

[college infrastructure]: nsut has a well-equiped and modern campus that has an aesthetic appeal. it has a sprawling ground featuring state of the art lecture halls, an active library crowd, and advanced laboratories. the campus also has high speed internet. | [academics]: the college is highly regarded for its strong academic foundation in engineering, technology, and management disciplines. it's curriculum is updated to align with industry standards and the faculty has experience professionals and researchers. | [placements]: renowned companies like google, microsoft, amazon, and deloitte regularly recruit, offering competitive packages. core branches like computer science and it see the highest placement rates, prioritizing skill-development and industry interactions. | [campus life]: the campus is vast and infrastructure is modern and aesthetic. the people are also smart and ambitious. | [anything else]: overall the placement opportunities are great but non-technical branches may face fewer opportunities. the courses are comprehensive and taught dedicatedly by the faculty, that is hard-working, and so are the students.
college_name: Netaji Subhas University of Technology New Delhi

review_text: [college infrastructure]: as a proud alumnus of 2022 batch,i can confidently say that dayananda sagar college of engineering provided me with transformative educational experience. the college offers a well-rounded environment that focuses on not only academics but also on holistic development | [academics]: dsce boasts a robust curriculum tailored for industry demands. the faculty members are knowledgeable and approachable, always ready to clarify doubts and questions and guide students. the labs and infrastructure are well-equipped enabling hands on experience on theoretical concepts. | [placements]: the placement cell at dsce is highly active and supportive. during my final year, many companies from diverse sectors visited the campus, offering a wide range of opportunities. the training programs conducted by the placement team helped me to enhance my soft skills and technical skills. | [campus life]: the campus is vibrant and offers numerous opportunities for extracurricular activities . the serene campus environment fosters learning and relaxation alike.
college_name: Dayananda Sagar College of Engineering Bangalore

review_text: pros/cons: proffesor of my branch are new young so they know how new things work and they are not rigid to new learning ways and give enough freedom to students so they can try their things too on their own lot of opportunity for startup ,bussines bull , e cell and things like this encourage a nice platform for us to pitch our ideas , i did too though it wasnt upto mark but made lot of connections and learn a lot. lot of fun ,something is going on all day ,music,sports,dance,photography lot of societies to try new different things .after jee i was glad i tried different things and became a amazing person all together crowd : main issue for me was the crowd ,it is very populated and their are lot of typical delhi student cursing all day so it maybe is a negative environment for anyone who does not fit into stereotypes no hostel for majority of delhi students : i mean like you are already charging like 3 lakhs ,better provide a room to live as well , i have to spend additional 1 lakh on food and rental basis , its too exensive management : its not cooperative they do arbitrary thing , dont listen to students when we need , take so much time to process on any minute details and admin block is shit show on its own | placement experience: placements are rather nice ,specially of tech branch is quite nice , from what semester we are eligible , most students are from 5th semester eligible for internship and from 7th for actual placements , lot of companies do visit : sometimes bain ,mckinsey ,samsung,xiamo. otherwise local companies tcs , tata etc . lot of startup are coming nowdays which are offering lot of things. highest package was 80 lpa around by samsusng as far i remember for ai, ml enginner . percentage of student getting placed for my branch is around 70%. my plans would be to get internship in 5th semester and then make it a ppo

[college infrastructure]: the infrastructure of lpu is great, it has all necessary facilities and equipments. you don?t have to go outside of campus to buy any stuff, everything is available inside the campus. and don?t worry about food, the campus has many food stalls. | [academics]: i?m pursuing b.tech cse (hons.) and the curriculum is great. there are many good professors which will help you to grow and enhance your skill. to be in whichever college you are you have to study on your own, you can?t just rely on professors or college itself. | [placements]: now, coming to placements it totally depends what kind of student you are. if you have maintained a good cgpa, has great knowledge of your subject then you will definitely get placed in good companies with great package. and don?t worry, lpu doesn?t compromise when it comes to placement. | [campus life]: overall experience in lpu is fantastic.

[college infrastructure]: college classrooms are quit big enough to fit around 70 + students and have projectors. college labs are equipped with well working devices. the wi-fi is available to every student of the university. library have books which requires for each semester. | [academics]: teachers do their best to help us for the exams, interview, placements. overall career skills are improving with the help to teachers. curriculum does makes students industrial need ready. there gd sessions that allows every student to participate and become more fluent in expressing their points. | [placements]: there are almost 80 to 90% students get placed from m. tech. there are around 4 to 5 students got 50 lakh plus placement package offer. the quality of placement is good. the internship opportunities from 3th sem and sometimes form end of 2nd sem.

pros/cons: the alumini network is mighty with the rich past of mnnit and its reputation. the placements are fairly good, even in the times of recession the placement provided by the companies was amongst the highest in india highly active tech clubs and decent daily life facilities such as mess food and hostel accomodation. the declining nirf has led to lack of funds due to which the overall quality of the college is currently degrading when compared to its previous legacy research and lab facilities are far from being excellent. the college needs to step up and take serious actions in producing quality research work | placement experience: placements are very good. thne training and placement cell is very active and alert to provide the best opportunities to the aspiring students. the percentage of students getting placed is nearly 93 % for top 3 branches and nearly 85% for overall college. i aspire to join a semiconductor based company mainly hiring for analog or digital dsign engineer role.
college_name: MNNIT Allahabad - Motilal Nehru National Institute of Technology - [MNNIT], Allahabad

review_text: [college infrastructure]: it's good . campus is beautiful and have lot of facilities . hostel are insides with all basic facility like cafeteria, dispensary , genrel item . campus is also very clean and lush with garden in short it's good in terms of campus | [academics]: some teachers are good some are bad . a lot of them are phd but don't know teaching they just come and dictate the lecture as it is while some of them are actually good and knowledge but most of them are senior teacher | [placements]: believe in quantity not in quality . most of the company are either new or provide only medicore salary and pick up students in bulk and then slowly to out of job of u are not compitable but good companies also come but they are limited . so if i wanted high salary placement there is not much of space | [campus life]: it's good if u are fun loving

in our college students starts place in 5 to 6 semester. companies like microsoft, amazon,tcs, infosys etc approaches our college every year.for good companies students have 80% plus.my plan is to get good placement in 5 to 6 semester.for btech fees is 169000 per annum hostel charge is 54000 for the triple seater and mess charge is 34000. there is two type of scholarship on your 12 marks and other on you jee marks. this college provides very good job opportunities.

there are many clubs in the college and social life is quite conservative. there are two annual fests held in the college vibrance in the month of march techno vit in the month of october there are many books and journals available in the central library. there are ac labs and smart and ventilated classrooms. there are many sports and extracurriculars. cricket football handball badminton hockey tennis etc all are available here. in the name of extracurricular here sports activities and clubs organize events like garba night lohri etcthe college is promising very good placements for this course is very promising for the placements point of view. faculties are highly qualified most of them have a phd degree and are highly experienced. there are three exams per semester which are very helpful for the students to score marks.

[college infrastructure]: the college has very good infrastructure, have good facilities on campus. wifi isn't that good, most of the time it doesn't even connect. food is bad here. but the hostels are pretty good. and campus is big and green. | [academics]: i m doing mba at dms mnit. the roi is pretty good here that's why i chose this college for mba. professors are good and very experienced in their respective domain but the curricular isn't very updated. | [placements]: getting good job from here isn't that easy but placement cell is very active here. last year placement was good. sip here is very average, you won't get good stipend as this not a b school so don't get high hopes on placement and sip. both are avg here.
college_name: Malaviya National Institute of Technology Jaipur

review_text: honest opinion on the basis of my advanced rank i decided to choose the best iit so i got iit delhi electrical engineering. i also do have a quiet interest in electrical and electronics. in the first year, all students have to study the same course so the class strength is much larger usually, so they allow groups to students so that each faculty gets around 100-150 students after first-year student studies their core branches in which strength are also around 100-150 students faculties are highly qualified but some faculties lack teaching skills their knowledge is very wast but they somewhat lack the skill lectures to deliver to students while some faculties are gems/excellent exam always happens on time toughness varies in exams some are easy to pass while some are really difficult like passing criteria in that courses are 15-20% overallfrom 5th semester students are eligible for internship and in 4th-year students are eligible for placement the number of companies visited last year was around 1200 and 1000+ jobs were offered to students the highest package is provided by companies like google, microsoft, oracle, apple, amazon etc and the highest package is nearly 2cr per annum last year the average package is around 12 lacs provided by many companies like samsung, reliance etc almost 80-85 % of students get placed on campus placement my plans after completing my degree are either go in it sector or in my core sector as i'm in my 3rd sem, i'm exploring all the things so right now i'm not pretty much sure what career option i'm going with after pursuing my degree
college_name: IIT Delhi - Indian Institute of Technology [IITD]

review_text: [college infrastructure]: the infrastructure of lpu is what attracts people the most. the kind of modern day infrastructure that lpu has is exceptional. there are many things inside the college ranging from multiple food courts to a hospital inside the campus. there are all the facilities such as wifi, sports grounds, indoor sports, smart boards, etc. available inside the campus. the buildings are regularly cleaned and a proper hygienic environment is maintained inside the campus. | [academics]: the academics are very good in the lpu. usually the private universities are not very serious about students' score but lpu keeps a track of academic performance of students studying here. in aerospace engineering, the quality of teaching is very good. it has a wide curriculum set according to the modern trends and standards. the academics here focus on both, industrial exposure as well as research field. the professors here urge the students to study research papers to gain more knowledge and bring new ideas for the industry. | [placements]: placements are good in this university. for aerospace engineering department, it is above average with the highest package of nearly 13 lpa and average package of 4-5lpa. lpu does well in placement aspect in other departments. the highest package ever grabbed by an lpu student is 3cr. lpu helps the students to understand how one can get recruited by big companies during the placement drives. | [campus life]: campus life in lpu is very friendly and joyous. here the students are from different parts of the country which allows one to get good cultural exposure. national festivals are celebrated nicely in the university in traditional ways. the university has many other campus life benefits such as having a mall inside where students can do shopping and eat delicious foods. the campus is completely safe and it can handle emergencies as it has a hospital inside. | [anything else]: overall i would advice the students to take admission here and get all the benefits that you can have here.

pros/cons: beautiful campus and large enough to cater all needs of a student labs are good and as far as equipments are concerned they are working teacher are for the most part supportive. exceptions always there campus is borderless on two sides and hence there are security concerns. alot of mishaps have happened in the past and continues to. little far from the city for food purpose. zomato swiggy takes extra delivery charge to deliver stuff. campus goes silent when sunsets. night culture is quite nil coz hostels are separate for all and girls have a in time restriction of 9pm which makes it horrible for them. | placement experience: 7th semester students become eligible for placements. the highest package is offered by rubrik in 2025 of 1.41 cr(domestic) high paying jobs are mostly for swe/sde roles. percentage of students getting placed in cse/aiml is 75, ece 69, eee 60, mech 58. my plans after gettting degree is to get into job sector only for a while. no such higher education plans as such.
college_name: Birla Institute of Technology - [BIT Mesra], Ranchi

review_text: i chose this course in view that i would get to learn both about hardware and software. the course is good and i think i did a great job in choosing it because ultimately it is going to push me to heights to work harder on the course. in my course, the faculty-to-student ratio is about 10:60. faculties are highly experienced and knowledgeable. they are really good in their subject and i am thankful for their support in course-related queries and everything. term exams are held twice a semester. between term exams, there are class tests that create a platform where we can keep up with the work. the exams were thorough. if one studied well, one can easily score good marks in it.annual fests are lit. tech fest is also really good and very informative. books and journals in the library are up to date and we can always find good ones which help us with everything. classrooms have a smart board that professors use. faculty members encourage us to participate in sports and extracurricular activities. there are over 40 societies on campus where students can interact with seniors and learn new things.

[college infrastructure]: we have one of the best libraries in our college and a digital library. wi-fi is not available for students, but we have digital classrooms. the hostel is a bit expensive, and the food available in the mess is also average. there are some medical facilities.our college students are given concession in bms hospital. our college has a vast library.an ambulance service is available. there is a sports complex. students play all indoor games at the college. there are 3 canteens. | [academics]: teachers are highly qualified, and they did their masters in iit and nit. they are on point and make the tough topic look easy, and they also take care of every student. the course offered here is highly skilled required during placement time and can further continue in these courses.with the presentation skills, lectures will make students understand the concepts in a clear way. the course curriculum is very much relevant to industry standards, and it will teach us a lot. | [placements]: about 85% of the students got placed in our college, which is high. top recruiting companies are tcs, amazon, goldman sachs, nutanix and oracle. about 200 students got an internship in our college. top roles offered in our college are in hackathon and codeathon for skill development.the average salary package offered for computer science students is around 7-8 lpa and 4-5 lpa for electronics and communicate students. | [campus life]: our course helps to do new possible things and is a catalyst to your creativity.fest in bmsce is very famous in south india. it's called utsav. it goes for 3 days and each day has its own special activities.every week there will be an event going on around the college. two fests are held in a year one technical fest and one cultural fest

i have cleared the jee mains and on the basis of it i have chosen mechanical engineering in mnnit, i was always fasciated by machines and always wants to do mechanical engineering, so after 10th i started coaching in a local institute and after two years i have jee main and jee advance.i have to attend 7 lectures in a day, but the professor doesn't reach very good. i know they are highly qualified but the problem is their lack of interaction but they do go in depth of a topic and always help in doubts. the lecture helps in understanding the conceptual learning.
college_name: MNNIT Allahabad - Motilal Nehru National Institute of Technology - [MNNIT]

review_text: [college infrastructure]: the infrastructure of lpu is one the best thing about the college. the sports infrastructure in lpu is of world class level. the library in lpu is one of the biggest i have seen in my life. lpu also host one of the largest hostel facilities in india | [academics]: i am currently prusing btech cse from lpu. the curriculum is disigned in such a way that it always upto the industry standards. the techinical skills included will be always be an asset in your life . | [placements]: as i am doing btech from lpu i can assure you that it is the best thing about lpu. even now (2023) as the recession in goining on the college bring atleast one world class company to college every week . | [campus life]: i can assure you one thing for sure and that is the campus life you are goining to get in lpu. for eg you will get a chance to meet different people from not only whole india but also even from more than 30 countries.

[college infrastructure]: very good infrastructure. they have all the necessary infrastructure facilities and equipments. the classrooms have projector, speakers, wi-fi, white and black boards. the college has sports ground basketball quotes football court tennis court volleyball court. | [academics]: some teachers are great some are not. i studied mba and some teachers are able to teach subjects in exceptional way but just like two sides of the coin there will also be teachers who are not able to teach well | [placements]: 70-80% placed. the placement team works very hard and brings in as much companies as possible, even due during the pandemic covid-19 70 percentage of the people got placed from our class so it is fair to say that the placements are good | [campus life]: awesome. the campus life is very good ud but unfortunately due to the pandemic covid-19 i could only enjoy one year of my campus life but that one year was memorable and great. the overall setting the campus is nice

[college infrastructure]: the college is established in 2016, therefore the college's infrastructure is pretty new and well maintained. all the classrooms and labs have proper facilities with a.c. and wifi connectivity. there are ground for almost every sport. the mess food is hygienic and eatable. | [academics]: the professors here are well educated and d supportive. the curriculum here is fully updated and includes all the recent developments in the fields. the study here makes you job ready. the quality of teaching is unique and fun. | [placements]: the placement are average. but better than other private colleges. the highest placement in cse branch last year is around 70 lakhs per annum. the average package is around 7 lakhs per annum. the top 10% students got around 24 lakhs per annum. | [campus life]: the college life here is amazing. almost every week there is some events or fests is there to engage students. there are many clubs in the college in which students can enroll in it and make friends and connections. the campus is safe as the security is on all the time. there is one pharmacy and some doctors are available on the campus.

pros/cons: the campus was very eco-friendly with deer and monkeys roaming around. the professors of my department are very helpful and friendly. they help us as much as they can. there are 3-4 reading halls in our campus. some are open 24x7. they are beneficial for students who like to study during night. the mess food of our college is not so good. | placement experience: from the end of their 3rd year, students become eligible for placements. many companies visited our campus and the total number of offers were around 400. some notable companies are google, microsoft, adobe and amazon. anout 60% of the students get placed. after getting the degree, i may go to some company or may do some research in chemical engineering.
college_name: IIT Madras - Indian Institute of Technology - [IITM], Chennai

review_text: [college infrastructure]: it's well maintained and the infrastructureanagement is good. it's a huge campus. covers up almost all streams under all degrees. there's a replica of big ben in the middle. sanitary hygiene is well maintained. | [academics]: curriculum is pretty good. their curriculum pursues the student to become self driven. in depth knowledge is gained from every core and elective subjects. hands on experience is also included in the course. | [placements]: quality of placements is good. high brand value companies come here. companies like kpmg, accenture, tcs, capegemini, zs associates, zoho, ibm, ey, l&t, hp, asus, oracle, siemens, amazon, flipkart and so on come for placements. | [campus life]: it's almost like a different world within itself. there's foodcourt, sports grounds, huge auditorium and concerts happening all the time. | [anything else]: it's different from other colleges.
college_name: SRM Institute of Science and Technology Chennai

review_text: [college infrastructure]: lovely professional university, phagwara has really got a superb infrastructure as the building and the college itself us huge and is spread in a long area as well the event hall the staircase part being a highlight | [academics]: the academics at lovely professional university phagwara is the best the faulty is so cooperative and coordinating the teachers are highly educated holds phd degree and are always a ready and available for help | [placements]: the placement at lovely professional university phagwara has always proved itself to be the best as the college gets in all the multi national and most reputed company to place its students at its best

the campus is designed to provide students with a supportive and engaging environment with a variety of clubs and activities to promote social interaction and personal development. some of the clubs and organizations available at iit jammu include technical clubs for robotics, coding, and electronics, as well as cultural clubs for music, dance, and theatre. there are also sports clubs for basketball, cricket, and volleyball as well as social service clubs and entrepreneurship organizations. in terms of infrastructure, iit jammu is located on a sprawling campus with modern facilities and amenities the campus includes a library, computer center, sports complex, students activity center, and other resources for academic and personal development. while iit jammu is still in the process of developing its campus and student life it is designed to provide students with a rich and engaging quality experience with a variety of clubs and organizations to suit their range of interests.iit jammu is a relatively new institution having been established in 2016, it is part of the iit system and is expected to maintain the high academic standards and reputation of the iits. students at iit jammu can expect to receive a challenging and rewarding academic experience with access to state-of-the-art faculties, cutting-edge research opportunities, and a supportive learning environment. the faculties here are very nice and cooperative they help the students very much with the research and the studies.
college_name: IIT Jammu - Indian Institute of Technology - [IITJ]

review_text: [college infrastructure]: yes it has all the necessary infrastructure. there are 7, 8 canteen in my college. classrooms are very airy and spacious but without acs. labs are not updates like the pc and overall thing according to today's ugc guidelines. | [academics]: i studied bca in this college as i wanted to learn about internal development. the teachers were qualified. helped a lot in my studies. yes the college is updated and the hostels are not, they were yucky. yes the college made me job ready and i have worked for microsoft. | [placements]: i got the placement easily but keep in mind i had good scores and i was also a scholarship student. the highest package offered was 60 to 65k per month. if a student get placed before the end of the course the package would be around 20 to 25k and once they completely get the job it would double. | [campus life]: location is completely safe. it can handle emergencies. the environment is cool and clean. sports activites, computer accounts events take place. i am also a part of a club there called matrix of c2s2.

review_text: [college infrastructure]: ramaiah institute has a modern campus with advanced digital electronics labs, vlsi tools, and well-equipped communication systems labs. the library provides journals, e-resources, and project support, which help students in research and coursework. | [academics]: for i did mtech in electronics so the m.tech in digital electronics & communication is well structured with focus on design, coding, and system-level concepts. faculty are knowledgeable and guide students in projects, though self-study and extra effort are often needed. | [placements]: placements are good but competitive. core electronics companies come less often compared to it recruiters. students aiming for vlsi or embedded roles may need extra internships or skill training outside to secure good opportunities. | [campus life]: campus life is vibrant with cultural events, workshops, and technical fests. clubs and groups give exposure beyond academics. the environment is supportive, but workload of m.tech keeps students more study-focused. | [anything else]: ramaiah institute of technology is a reputed choice for m.tech in digital electronics & communication. it provides strong faculty support and facilities, though placements in core roles require extra effort from students.

[college infrastructure]: the college doesn't have it's own campus (under construction), currently operates in campus of mnit jaipur. all the facilities are available eg. sports complex, 24?7 computer laboratories, wifi connectivity, canteens. the classrooms are also good and air conditioned. their is a central library of mnit and one of our own institute (it is comparatively smaller but owns newer and relevant books). the hostels are good but boys hostel lacks furnishing fulfilment, which will be rectified soon. | [academics]: i am doing b.tech in ece. the curriculum is very well curated, like all other iiits, it is up to date and advanced. the most star rating is because of it. the teaching faculty is a mixture of some really good teachers and some not so good one's like in all other institutes. the book bank provides with books of latest and prevailing technologies and mostly it's up to the student how well one performs because unlike schools, there is no spoon feeding in colleges. | [placements]: i am yet to sit in my placements but the statistics show that the percentage of students getting places of those who applied for it is pretty good for cse. the highest package also went to student of cse. the average package is also quite promising. one benifit that we have currently is that we are able to sit for the companies that come in mnit for placements. the specific details and number facts about placement can be viewed on the institute website very easily. | [campus life]: the location of the mnit jaipur campus is very good. the biggest mall of the city is within 5km radius. the railway station and airport are also very close to the campus. other than that the college life is amazing and fulfilling with the large campus full of open areas and beautiful gardens. the students get to enjoy all the lively fests of mnit as an added benifit. the campus has a dispensary & ambulance for all sorts of medical requirements. the campus is safe & under surveillance.
college_name: Indian Institute of Information Technology Kota

review_text: [college infrastructure]: if you ask me about the bare minimum, i'll say yes, the college has all of that. be it classrooms, labs, libraries, hostels or even a gym. i'll like to add this though that don't expect anything over the top. the maintenance is pretty much shitty and despite its large area, most of the college is land that could be developed and worked upon. | [academics]: the curriculum is like any other nit or iit out there. basic and to the point. with that being said, i could rant for hours how engineering is meaningless and it's high time indians start considering other professions seriously but let's leave that for some other time :) | [placements]: i'll speak strictly with respect to my branch - cse. if i don't consider this year, cause things went downhill for almost everyone due to the covid situation, i can say that placements are definitely a strong suit of manit, bhopal. we do have companies like microsoft, amazon, flipkart, goldman sachs, jpmc come in every year to recruit students for jobs as well as internships. and this pretty much trumps all other negatives this college has. | [campus life]: the campus life. first things first, if you have high expectations about the crowd, sorry to say but you'll be disappointed by what the college has to offer. but all's not negative here. if you choose to be an optimist and look at the slightest speck of positivity here, you'll see how the college transforms you into a different person who is ready to face challenges in the outside world. you'll surely see yourself change as you pass your time here, and believe me, the change is good!
college_name: Maulana Azad National Institute of Technology Bhopal

review_text: [college infrastructure]: thapar university offers modern infrastructure, including smart-equipped classrooms, well-maintained laboratories, extensive libraries, and sports facilities. hostels are clean, and the food is hygienic. the university prioritizes the upkeep and use of these facilities to ensure a conducive learning environment. in summary, thapar university's infrastructure is a testament to its commitment to providing a conducive and modern learning environment for its students, fostering holistic development. | [academics]: thapar university offers diverse academic programs. i'm pursuing electronics and computer engineering because of its high demand in the job market. the teaching quality is generally good, with knowledgeable faculty. the curriculum is regularly updated, incorporating recent developments. it does prepare students for jobs through practical projects and industry exposure. | [placements]: thapar university boasts strong placements. the quality is excellent, with reputable companies visiting. a high percentage of students get placed, often exceeding 90%. the highest salary package offered varies by year and course, but it typically goes to engineering or mba students. the average salary is competitive. the placement process is well-organized, making it relatively easy and pleasant. the college is supportive with dedicated placement cells and training programs to enhance students' | [campus life]: thapar university's campus is spacious and green, providing a serene atmosphere for learning.students can engage in numerous activities, from clubs and cultural events to sports and technical competitions. the campus fosters a vibrant social life. the students, teachers, and support staff are diverse and generally helpful. the campus is located in patiala, punjab, known for its historical significance and safety.the university has protocols in place to handle emergencies.
college_name: Thapar Institute of Engineering and Technology Patiala

review_text: jee main will be conducted two times in a year and it will be conducted by national testing agency (nta). jee mains is india's most important exams as it is a gateway to most prestigious institutions of india. joint entrance examination (jee) main will be conducted by the nta from 2019 onwards. this examination was being conducted by the central board of secondary education (cbse) till 2018. the national level exam will be conducted twice a year (january and april) in online (computer based) mode. candidates can appear in either of the two or both.paper has three subject sections: mathematics, physics and chemistry. each one of the 3 subject sections consists of 30 questions each with equal weightage for every question. all questions are multiple choice objective-type questions each of which has four choices. out of the four choices for a given question, only one choice is correct. every correct answer will receive 4 marks each and every incorrectly attempted question will receive a negative marking of -1 mark. there is no negative marking applied if the question is left unanswered.yes nsut provides internships. the past performance of the outgoing batches has done us proud. in the past,eight students have been offered an annual package of rs. 1.35 crores from google.apart from that, various companies like goldmun sachs intuit, microsoft, amazon, adobe,walmart,linkedin,direct i among others have been visited nsut regularly for placements and number of companies has been rise ever since. there is an internship round at the end of 3rd year in which various companies including bigwigs like google, amazon, microsoft, deloitte, etc come to hire interns. the average stipend offered is about rs 30000/- per month. the experience is quite fruitful and you get to learn a lot of new things like working in pressure, limited time, and also new technical skills. if you work sincerely, the internship may lead to a full time job offer.

the faculty is renowned and dedicated to imparting knowledge. they are well communicated with the students. they help the students in each and every aspect be it projects, fests, internships, academics and placements. lectures and purely based on learning and practical knowledge. fee structure for comedk students is 2 lakh per annum and for kcet student it is 80k per annum. there is also hostel fees and mess fees if you opt for it. the fees is comparatively feasible when we talk about tier 1 private colleges. facility provided can be made better.

[college infrastructure]: excellent infrastructure, with top quality camps life , classes and library, in one of the prominent location of delhi , all the classes are ac equiped, well maintained hostel , new hostel is also very good , hostel and mess facilities are good , food of mess is also good | [academics]: chill academics, no such pressure , excellent faculty, teachers are very supportive and are very friendly, it will be very good experience of interacting with faculty. just follow what teachers told and be interactive with them. | [placements]: top notch placement almost all the companies visit the college every year obviously impact of recession is there , but still very good placement, good for both placement, higher studies in abroad and phd | [campus life]: osm campus life , lot's of event every day and it is delhi so very cool and interactive environment, fest are there , event like blind dating and lot's of things happen every week | [anything else]: go for it , it's worth it

there are 7 fest in the jadavpur university whose names are 1.ciippus 2.u turn 3.sanskriti 4.arena 5.srijan 6.chayanat and forget the name of the 7 th one in all of these srijan is the biggest fest which happens through a week in which all sports cultural and tech fest happens and in the final night there is band appointed.very low fee structure.as i belonges to faculty of engineering and technology in the engineering the fee of the wole 4 year is 12000 except information technology department.though the fee of information technology is very low compared to the other college which is 30000 per year.

[college infrastructure]: my college have all necessary infrastructure, facilities and equipment. the facilities i have in my classrooms, laboratories,libraries, sports centres and hostels are well maintained.the living spaces are clean. | [academics]: the curriculum is updated and includes all the recent developments in the field.yes,my study will make me job ready,even better with more ideas.the quality of teaching is quite good.if you have problem with faculty you can tell about it freely. | [placements]: the quality of placements at my college is quite good.the ones who seriously study surely get placement. the average salary is 13-15lakh per annum.my college was fully supportive during my placement time. | [campus life]: you will have your own personal life.no one can enter in that area.no restrictions.the location is just amazing.it is totally safe and can handle emergency in a very supportive manner.students can engage in any activity they like.

review_text: in the first year fees are almost 1.15 lakhs and every year it increases by 4-8 thousand. a student whose financial status is not that stable can either apple for swami vivekanand merit-cum-means scholarship or he can apply before the wbjee exam for tfw admission. in the svmcm scholarship you get a yearly stipend of 60,000 (probably change next year)and the tfw candidates do not have to pay fees all along 4 years except the admission charge which sums around 30,000 (in which around 10,000 is refundable after completion of the course) if you can acquire great skills in the first semester only then you can apply for an internship and can earn around 10k monthly but it all depends on you, the college will provide an opportunity of an internship in the third year.every year we have our annual fest named eclecia and there are many other also like sports, tech, entertainment etc. different fests happen all over the year but annual fest eclecia generally occur around mid-may aur june. we have a very huge library in which you can find almost every type of book concerning your academics to your self-study. there are more than 15 clubs from which a student can choose 3 clubs at most to join but every student must have to join at least one club. there tech club gdsc(google developer student club) has a telegram channel that has more than 9k members at present and there the seniors do teach new developer courses to fressers.

[college infrastructure]: in our campus, there are several buildings used for hostel , auditorium, admistrative building ,acedmic building ,labs, workshops , gym, indore activity,research activity , departmental building , guest house , staff quarter,and temple ,bank, post office . each things are located perfectly inside campus . there are sports ground in each hostel as well as twop big ground are also there .academic | [academics]: in academics, there are very environment-friendly and well-skilled professors and scholars. we have our departmental schedule and open elective, minor and we can work under professors on projects. here so many(22) clubs and societies are there for help in core department, industrial visit, research purpose, coding programming, automation engineering , cultural exposure, rj vj role, ...... | [placements]: on our campus, everyone has enough potential to be placed but some of them go to for higher studies in departmental subject and mba ,civil services also. in this batch 2022-2023 around 78% final year get placed .

google, microsoft, amazon, bajaj, wipro, tata, jio, reliance etc companies visit the campus every year. students are basically offered the role of a learner and they are opted to use their knowledge and skills for the company. students are asked to make projects on case studies and technology companies looking for coders.moksha fest is organized every year in the month of march and it is fantastic as always. all kinds of books are available in the library. there is a wide range exposure to sports and extracurricular activities. the college has the number of groups and societies like technology, sports, drama, arts etc.

course is nice. i am currently enrolled in bachelor of technology in production and industrial engineering branch and it is under the mechanical department, it covers many things theory practicals tutorial and a lot of interesting things. our college two exams in each semester one mid semester examination and one end semester examination.so i a year there is all over 4 exams and percentage of mid sem is 20% and rest end sem.labs here are good ie it covers a vast area like different chapters have a different labs for some specific topics but some instruments in the lab are too old and need some modification else the labs are quite good and nice.according to me labs are my favorite and i like to spend more time in labs than in lecture classes.

review_text: the campus is very good we all enjoy the campus and our entertainment they organise every type of performance and celebrities come to galgotia university. freshers' parties are conducted in december and i have no idea about techfest. there are two libraries on the campus and over books are available in the library if there is no book teacher will arrange the book. different types of sports are organised by the sports councils. i have no idea about social groups or clubs but the website i am joining at the university such as codechef, aict etc.in gu b.tech is better than other courses. and i am interested in computer. the behaviour of faculties at galgotia university is also very good. the qualification of a faculty teacher is also very good. in one semester there is three exams conducted at the university. in my view not very tough to pass the examination.

review_text: [college infrastructure]: the university is around 70-70 acres and it is a beautiful campus with greenary all the way. you will find a calm composed area here. classrooms are well equipped with modern facilities. libraries are well equiped with modern books and are well maintained. | [academics]: there is a strong focus of academics at chitikara. there are regular tests, assignments and group projects to make student industry ready. the curriculam is well maintained by looking at the future and it is well balanced. | [placements]: placements are not that much good as compared to the fees. you will get both product and service based companies. many companies come here as part of mass recuriter and hire many students at a package of around 4-6 lpa. but if you are a hard working student from day one than you can crack good companies like google amazon etc. | [campus life]: the campus life is great. there are so many tech events, fests, hackathon organized day by day here so that student feel engaging. there is not a chill college vibe here like the university of delhi or somewhere but if you find a good group of friends than you will really enjoy your time here.

[college infrastructure]: iit bhu is one of the oldest engineering institutes in india , the buildings here are mainly like old structured but the condition is improving many new hostel are under construction . for not it has all the facilities which should be in an iit , classrooms are good with projectors im every classroom , sac (students activity centre) is there for gym , and all the indoor sports . wifi speed is slow here in comparison with other iits roughly on wifi we get an average speed of 80-100mbps in mobile | [academics]: i am currently studying metallurgical engineering here and the professor are cool like some of the professors are too good while others are average, they have knowledge but they don't know how to give the knowledge to the students . load on the students are light as compared to other branches, we can do other activities with our course load . | [placements]: placements in iit bhu is the best thing why i am here almost 90% students got placed in the year 2021-2022 with highest package of 1.2cr and an average package of almost 15-17 lakhs . there is an training and placement cell which helps students throughout their placement | [campus life]: college campus is also one of the greenest in the whole india like you will got a 2-3 degree temperature drop from the main city of varanasi due to the trees , it is open campus so there is a advantage as well as there are disadvantages like due to open campus vehicle from outside go from the campus due to which risk of accident increases , the staffs and the proctor are very supportive in terms of everythi. if it will become a close campus then i think it will be one of the best campus in india

review_text: [college infrastructure]: the classes are well-equipped with air-conditioners and high-speed wi-fi. labs have very high level with high tech technology and we have very expensive equipments. library is too large and very beautiful with alot of books and references to read.we will find every books.hostels have nice facilities like automated washing machines, drinking water facilities etc.we have lot of food items in canteen. | [academics]: faculty members are excellent and have very high qualifications.there teaching is really excellent.the syllabus is too good it consists of lot of good chapters.about 90 percent of students get passed.we worked really very hard to get good marks in all the semesters. | [placements]: coming to the placements,last year the highest package was 3.5 crores.almost every student got placed who have applied for it. many people got the good internships.top roles offered to the students because of their dedication and all they got placements and internships.

campus life is happening as we have a fully residential campus. there are two major fests every year - breeze and surge and a lot of events all around the year. breeze is conducted in the month of march after mid sem exams. the library is very big and has thousands of books. we have smart classrooms that are equipped with the latest technologies and air conditioners and heaters function in the summers and winters. attention to sports is the thing that i love about snu. it hosts a lot of sports opportunities including training. competitions are conducted regularly. there is a lot of cultural and technical club. i am a part of gdsc.i will become eligible for campus placements from the 5th semester onward. tons of good companies visit our campus every year. to name a few, we have amazon, amex, dell, goldmann sachs, hp, etc. the highest package this year is about 55 lpa and the average package is 12 lpa and the median is 11 lpa. i guess over 90% of students got placed. i am hoping to get a good placement after getting the degree.

review_text: [college infrastructure]: the infrastructure of my college is average and could be improved in some areas. the campus is spread over a moderate area , with a few building dedicated to classrooms, labs ,and administrative offices. the classrooms are adequately sized and well maintained , but they do not have modern technology .the library is small but resources are full. students get appropriate amount of books to study .also library has a high speed wifi connectivity .the cafeteria is basic and food served is good. | [academics]: the academic standards of my college are average , and there is scope for improvement in some areas. the faculty is knowledgeable and experienced , but teaching methodology can be repetitive . the course content is updated .the college does offer many opportunities for internships and industry exposure. | [placements]: my college has an excellent placement record , and it is one of the key reasons why student prefer to join this college . the college has a dedicated placement cell that works tirelessly to bring in top companies . highest package = 28 lpa , average package = 10 lpa .

[college infrastructure]: the infrastructure is good, mainly library, which is equipped with a good books to study and an open area for different areas to do separate work. the library has fast wi-fi and is equipped with good computers. | [academics]: i am studying engineering 3rd academics are good and the teaching is good , all the teachers have some knowledge and they are well known about the syllabus. they update the curriculum regularly and they update the lab curriculum also. | [placements]: rnsit placement cell tries to provide a best placements. the placement is been good and the average package is 8 lakhs per annum and the highest package is 56 lakh per annum and the number of companies who visit the college is good.

[college infrastructure]: the college infrastructure is good. very cleaned campus. it have seminar hall ,laboratory,computer lab ,agriculture department, digital classroom .. the teacher in college is good and all are phd holders. | [academics]: the galgotias university is one of few universities in india that have outcome based education .. in studies galgotias?s university is quite good university .. the curriculum of galgotias university is quite good and updated. | [placements]: most of the students get placements and placed in big companies like kpmg,icic bank, samsung etc. they get high placed jobs and high salary paying jobs . overall placement is quite good in galgotias university. | [campus life]: the campus life is quite good in galgotias university . there is always some curricular activities happens in university. also many events happen like unifest which is also north india biggest fest and also many movie promotions happen. | [anything else]: overall college is good

sport's and zym too given so much priority in our college. do many competitions are conducted that between nits and also between local colleges. we'll have a coach too for every sport and they take sole responsibility for each gameour is a student oriented college. when we students are responsible and take part of everything. student secretaries and class representatives. club general secretaries and so many other benefits where students can learn to rule

[college infrastructure]: vit vellore has amazing infrastructure. there are various academic buildings which provide lots of facilities for students to excel in all domains. we have sufficiently large classrooms and laboratories with the latest equipment. we have a world class library that hosts a plethora of academic books and journals for reference, and even for borrowing. the sport centres provide an opportunity to perform well at all sports like badminton, basketball, and even powerlifting. hostels are decent too. | [academics]: i'm studying computer science and engineering, as i'm interested in software development. the teaching is good, depending on the faculty. the curriculum is up to date as well, and professors sometimes provide us an opportunity to write research papers and do internships. we are taught a lot of subjects in our course, which are relevant for the industry and equip us with the necessary skills. | [placements]: placements are good as far as i've heard. almost everyone gets placed, and the highest salary was 1 cr+ pa offered to 2 people. it of course went to computer science graduates. but someone from mechanical branch also got around 50 lpa. the average salary is around 6 lpa, but a lot of people bag 10 lpa+ offers. i'm yet to experience placement myself as i'm still a sophomore student. | [campus life]: campus has good facilities in all aspects, but you're supposed to follow a lot of rules here. it's a discipline oriented environment. students from all walks of life come here, so there's a lot of diversity. teachers are decent, and a lot of them are helpful. but you might find some teachers who are not as understanding. same goes for the support staff. it is located in vellore which is a small town with some tourist sports and shopping complexes and a railway. cmc hospital is nearby.
college_name: Vellore Institute of Technology Chennai Campus

review_text: [college infrastructure]: the university provides the good infrastructure like proper benches,tables,smart boards etc.the facilities like proper reverse osmosis drinking water,ventilation,electricity is available and importantly the wifi runs all around the university.there are many libraries in every institute with more number of books.from talking about living spaces like hostel,it is satisfying.the food provided can be rated 3.5 to 5 sometimes. | [academics]: the quality of teaching can be rated 4 to 4.5 if we talk about computer science.all the lecturers are kind enough in solving the queries.the curriculum gets updated as per the need.for student to be placement ready,there is a vertical of university that runs industry embedded programs that are for short period of time,skill based courses through which we get professional certificates and internship opportunities too. | [placements]: vit university placement drive is outstanding.all mncs visit the university with decent packages ranging from 4lpa to 60lpa.the students get trained for the placements.before appearing the interview several mock interviews are conducted through which students get ready for it.the faculty and university are supportive enough.

the teacher in our institution is very helpful well qualified and have good knowledge and some of them are qualified from iits, dtu is considered better than other collage as it provides a lot of opportunities when it comes to placement or other personality development. many students get on-campus placement.there are many fests conducted by the societies and the biggest fest in north india is engifest which is conducted in dtu, there is a very good library, a good ac classroom sports complex and a mic mac. there are many socities like madhurima, yuvaan, wave society and many more, that conduct many activities.

[college infrastructure]: nit warangal has a great central library with huge number of books that is almost 1.8l. it also has various e-books, video casesstes. there is free wifi all around the campus and various food places are situated inside the campus. | [academics]: i have passed my b.tech course in computer science and engineering in the year 2021. course curriculum is been regularly updated. the quality of professors also matter a bit though . the faculty members are highly qualified. | [placements]: the placements at this college is top notch. recently we noticed 100% placements in the cse branch and the overall percentage was 93% approximately. the average package in the cse branch is around 18l per annum and median stays 16l per annum. | [campus life]: nit warangal follows strict discipline in its campus rules like no roaming around the campus after 9 pm and if anyone caught strict action would be taken against them. but overall it's kind of chill life because freedom is also given to the students .
